The Linkage Engine联动内核
Pattern Cards · 证型卡证型卡 · 一证多病
Each card is one 证型 defined by its Qi dynamic (升降出入). The branches show how that single root transmits into different diseases — click any disease to jump straight to its differentiation for that pattern. This is the reverse of a textbook: instead of one disease to many patterns, you see one pattern to many diseases.每张卡是一个由气机（升降出入）定性的证型。分支展示这一个根本如何传变为不同病症——点击任一病名，直达该病对应此证的辨证段。这是教科书的逆向：不是一病多证，而是一证多病。
The Reasoning Center推理圆心
Pathomechanism · 病机病机 · 升降出入
In Chinese medicine the disease name and the symptom are the surface; the pathomechanism (病机) is the root. This is why one mechanism treats many diseases (异病同治). Each card below takes one disordered Qi dynamic and pushes outward in two directions — ① what symptoms it produces across organs and regions, and ② how to treat it, with the main points and herbs and the reason each one fits this mechanism.中医里，病名与症状是表象，病机是根本。故同一病机可治多病——此即异病同治。下面每张卡取一个气机失常方向，向两个方向发散：①它会产生哪些症状（贯穿各脏腑部位），②如何治疗——主穴、主药，以及每一个为何针对这个病机。
Dermatology · Qi Dynamic皮肤病证 · 气机框架
Acne痤疮
Heat and Damp-Phlegm rising through the Lung-Stomach axis to block the skin's pores — a failure of descent in the upper body热邪与湿痰循肺胃轴线上蒸，阻塞皮肤毛孔——上焦下降功能的失常
Core Mechanism: Heat Rising Through the Lung-Stomach Axis to the Face核心机制：热邪循肺胃轴线上蒸至面部
The face is the territory of the Lung (which governs the skin) and the Stomach/Large Intestine channels (which traverse the face). Acne occurs when pathogenic Heat — from any source — rises through these channels to the face, blocks the skin pores, accumulates with Damp or Phlegm, and produces the visible lesions.

Lung-Wind-Heat: Early, superficial — small inflammatory papules, surface-level Heat
Stomach-Intestine Damp-Heat: Deeper, more severe — large red pustules, conglobate lesions, strongly correlated with diet
Phlegm-Damp Accumulation: Nodular/cystic acne — Heat + Phlegm congeal into hard nodules
Chong-Ren Disharmony: Female cycle-correlated acne — worsens before period, around the jaw and chin

Qi dynamic core: in all patterns — Heat from different sources rises through the face channels. The face concentrates Heat because it is the meeting point of all Yang channels. Treatment: clear the Heat source + facilitate downward descent through the Stomach/Large Intestine. 面部是肺（主皮毛）和胃/大肠经络（循行过面部）的领域。痤疮发生于各种来源的病理性热邪循这些经络上蒸至面部，阻塞皮肤毛孔，与湿或痰邪结合，产生可见皮损。

肺经风热：早期、浅表——小的炎症性丘疹，表浅层热邪
胃肠湿热：较深、较严重——大的红色脓疱，聚合性皮损，与饮食强烈相关
痰湿凝结：结节/囊肿性痤疮——热+痰邪凝聚为坚硬结节
冲任失调：女性月经相关性痤疮——经前加重，主要在下颌和下巴

气机核心：各证型均为升太过——不同来源的热邪循面部经络上蒸。面部热邪集中是因为它是所有阳经的交汇点（六阳皆会于面）。治疗：清除热邪来源+促进通过胃/大肠的下降（通降）。
Key Differentiation Questions关键鉴别问诊
1. Lesion type and location1. 皮损类型和位置
Small red papules, mainly on forehead and cheeks: Lung-Wind-Heat — the Lung channel governs the upper face; Wind-Heat agitates the skin pores superficially.

Large red pustules, around nose/mouth/chin, diet-correlated: Stomach-Intestine Damp-Heat — the Stomach and LI channels traverse the nose and lower face. Heavy, greasy, spicy diet generates Damp-Heat in the GI tract which rises along these channels.

Hard nodules or cysts, deep, slow to resolve: Phlegm-Damp accumulation — Phlegm is the most stubborn pathogen; it congeals with Heat to form hard nodular masses that are difficult to resolve.

Jaw line and chin, worsens pre-menstrually: Chong-Ren disharmony — the Ren vessel passes through the midline of the face; pre-menstrual Liver Qi stagnation + Blood Heat erupts along this pathway. 小红丘疹，主要在额头和面颊：肺经风热——肺经主上部面部；风热表浅地扰动皮肤毛孔。

大的红色脓疱，在鼻/口/下颌周围，与饮食相关：胃肠湿热——胃经和大肠经循行经过鼻部和面部下方。油腻、辛辣饮食在胃肠产生湿热，沿这些经络上蒸。

坚硬结节或囊肿，深在，难以消退：痰湿凝结——痰为最顽固的病邪；与热邪凝结形成坚硬结节性包块，难以消解。

下颌线和下巴，经前加重：冲任失调——任脉通过面部中线；经前肝气郁滞+血热沿此路径爆发。
2. Diet, bowel habits, and lifestyle correlation2. 饮食、大便习惯与生活方式相关性
Worsens after spicy food, dairy, fried food, sweets, alcohol: GI Damp-Heat — these foods generate Damp-Heat in the Stomach/Intestines directly. This is the most common and underdiagnosed trigger in modern clinical practice.

Constipation concurrent: Strong indicator of Stomach-LI Damp-Heat — Heat accumulation in the LI blocks downward movement → Heat backs up and rises to the face. A patient with acne and constipation almost always has GI Damp-Heat as the primary pattern.

Stress triggers acne: Liver Qi stagnation transforming to Heat → rises to face. Often mixed with Lung-Wind-Heat. 辛辣食物、乳制品、油炸食物、甜食、酒精后加重：胃肠湿热——这些食物直接在胃/肠产生湿热。这是现代临床实践中最常见且最易被忽视的诱因。

同时伴便秘：胃-大肠湿热的有力指标——大肠热邪积聚阻塞下行运动→热邪积压并上蒸至面部。痤疮伴便秘的患者，胃肠湿热几乎必为主要证型。

压力诱发痤疮：肝气郁滞化热→上蒸至面部。常与肺经风热混合。
Forehead/cheeks + small papules额头/面颊+小丘疹
Lung Wind-Heat肺经风热 升太过
Nose/mouth + pustules + diet鼻/口周+脓疱+饮食相关
GI Damp-Heat胃肠湿热 升太过
Nodules/cysts + deep + slow结节/囊肿+深在+缓慢
Phlegm-Damp痰湿凝结 出不畅
Jaw/chin + menstrual-correlated下颌/下巴+月经相关
Chong-Ren冲任失调 降不及
Lung Channel Wind-Heat肺经风热证
Excess实证
Wind-Heat invades Lung → rises to face via Lung's control of skin → blocks pores → small red inflammatory papules风热侵肺→循肺主皮毛之功上蒸面部→阻塞毛孔→小的红色炎症性丘疹
Key symptoms主要症状Small red papules and pustules mainly on forehead, nose, cheeks; mild-moderate severity; may worsen after Wind-Heat exposure or stress; skin slightly oily; may have concurrent dry or itchy throat; red tongue, thin yellow coat; floating-rapid pulse小的红色丘疹和脓疱，主要在额头、鼻部、面颊；轻至中度严重程度；风热暴露或压力后可能加重；皮肤略油腻；可伴咽干或咽痒；舌红苔薄黄；脉浮数
Qi dynamic气机: The Lung controls the skin surface — any Heat lodging in the Lung channel will rise to the face through the skin's connection to the Lung. Wind is the carrier pathogen that brings Heat to the skin surface. The pores close (Wind-Cold response of the skin's surface) trapping Heat inside → inflammatory papule formation. The lesions are relatively superficial because Wind-Heat has not yet penetrated deeply.升太过：肺主皮毛——任何热邪停留于肺经，将通过皮肤与肺的联系上蒸至面部。风为携带热邪至皮肤表面的载体病邪。毛孔关闭（皮肤表面的风寒反应）将热邪困于内部→炎症性丘疹形成。皮损相对浅表，因为风热尚未深入。
Stomach-Intestine Damp-Heat胃肠湿热证
Excess实证Damp-Heat湿热
Diet-generated Damp-Heat in Stomach/LI → rises along ST and LI channels to the face → large red pustules, especially nose/chin/perioral饮食生湿热于胃/大肠→沿胃经和大肠经上蒸至面部→大的红色脓疱，尤其在鼻/下颌/口周
Key symptoms主要症状Severe red papules, pustules, nodules mainly around nose, mouth, chin, along the jawline; clearly worsens after spicy/greasy food or alcohol; constipation or infrequent stools; oily skin; thirst; red tongue, yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse严重的红色丘疹、脓疱、结节，主要在鼻部、口周、下颌、下颌线；辛辣/油腻食物或酒精后明显加重；便秘或大便不频；皮肤油腻；口渴；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Qi dynamic气机(Stomach Heat rebels upward): The Stomach channel traverses the central and lower face (nose, cheeks, mouth, chin). When Damp-Heat accumulates in the GI tract, the Stomach's normal descending function is disrupted → turbid Heat reverses direction and rises along the Stomach-LI face pathway. The Large Intestine's constipation is a key sign: the bowel exit is blocked → Heat has nowhere to descend → it rises to the face instead. Treating the bowel (facilitating) is essential.升太过（胃热上逆）：胃经循行经过面部中央和下部（鼻部、面颊、口、下颌）。胃肠湿热积聚时，胃的正常下降功能（胃主降浊）被打乱→浊热逆向上行，循胃-大肠面部路径上升。大肠便秘是关键体征：肠道出口被阻→热邪无法下降→转而上蒸至面部。治疗肠道（促进通降）至关重要。
Phlegm-Damp Accumulation (Nodular/Cystic)痰湿凝结证（结节/囊肿型）
Excess实证
Chronic Heat + Damp congeal into Phlegm → Phlegm blocks the skin channels → hard nodules and cysts that are slow to resolve慢性热+湿凝结为痰邪→痰邪阻塞皮肤经络→坚硬结节和囊肿，消退缓慢
Key symptoms主要症状Deep nodules and cysts; skin-coloured or dark red; firm to palpation; slow to develop and slow to resolve (weeks to months); may leave scars or hyperpigmentation; often concurrent with Spleen Xu signs; pale or dusky tongue, thick greasy coat; slippery-wiry pulse深在结节和囊肿；肤色或暗红色；触之坚实；发展缓慢，消退缓慢（数周至数月）；可留瘢痕或色素沉着；常同时伴脾虚表现；舌淡或紫暗苔厚腻；脉滑弦
Qi dynamic气机(Phlegm blocks the skin's exit layer): Phlegm is the product of chronic Heat + Damp interaction — the Heat "cooks" the Damp into a thick, sticky substance (Phlegm). Phlegm in the skin layer is far more obstructing than simple Damp — it forms solid masses that resist resolution. Treatment requires resolving Phlegm first (— soften hardness and dissipate accumulation), then clearing residual Heat and Damp. Long treatment duration expected (3–6 months).出不畅（痰邪阻塞皮肤出口层）：痰为慢性热+湿互结的产物——热邪将湿邪"煮炼"为粘稠的物质（痰）。皮肤层的痰邪比单纯湿邪更具阻塞性——形成抵抗消解的实性包块。治疗首先需化痰（软坚散结），然后清除残余热邪和湿邪。预计治疗时间较长（3–6个月）。
Chong-Ren Disharmony (Female, Cycle-Correlated)冲任失调证（女性，月经相关）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Liver Qi stagnation + Kidney Yin insufficiency → Blood Heat accumulates in Chong vessel pre-menstrually → erupts along Ren vessel pathway to chin/jaw肝气郁滞+肾阴不足→经前血热积聚于冲脉→沿任脉路径爆发至下颌/下巴
Key symptoms主要症状Acne strictly correlated with menstrual cycle — flares 7–10 days before period; predominantly jaw line, chin, lower face; concurrent premenstrual tension, breast distension, irritability; irregular period or dysmenorrhea; wiry-thin pulse; red tongue痤疮与月经周期严格相关——经前7–10天爆发；主要在下颌线、下巴、面部下方；同时伴经前紧张感、乳胀、易怒；月经不调或痛经；脉弦细；舌红
Qi dynamic气机(Liver Qi fails to descend pre-menstrually): Pre-menstrually, the Chong vessel fills with Blood. If Liver Qi is stagnant, it cannot regulate this filling → Blood-Heat accumulates in the Chong → finds outlet through the Ren vessel (which passes through the midline face/chin) → erupts as acne at the jaw/chin pre-menstrually. The cyclical nature is the definitive diagnostic sign. Treatment must address the menstrual cycle root, not just the skin lesions.降不及（经前肝气不能下行）：经前冲脉充盈血液。若肝气郁滞，不能调节此充盈过程→血热积聚于冲脉→通过任脉（经过面部/下颌中线）寻找出口→经前在下颌/下巴爆发为痤疮。周期性是确诊依据。治疗必须处理月经周期的根本，而非仅处理皮损。
Acupuncture for Acne: Clear the Source, Facilitate Descent痤疮针灸：清除来源，促进下降
The two-step strategy for all acne patterns: (1) clear the Heat/Damp source specific to the pattern; (2) facilitate the Stomach and Large Intestine's descending function to draw Heat downward and away from the face. Local facial points must always be combined with distal points to prevent merely suppressing surface lesions without clearing the root.所有痤疮证型的两步策略：(1) 清除证型特定的热邪/湿邪来源；(2) 促进胃和大肠的下降功能，将热邪向下引离面部。面部局部穴位必须始终配合远端穴位，以防止仅仅抑制表面皮损而不清除根本。
Core Points — All Patterns基础穴位——各证型通用
LI4 合谷
Yuan-source of LI — "face and mouth, seek Hegu." Commands the face through the LI channel. Clears Heat from the face and skin, facilitates LI descending function. Reduces facial inflammation. Essential for all acne patterns.大肠原穴——"面口合谷收"。通过大肠经统领面部。清面部和皮肤热邪，促进大肠下降功能。减少面部炎症。各证型痤疮必用。
LI11 曲池
He-sea of LI — clears Heat from the entire LI channel (which traverses the face). Combined with LI4, strongly facilitates the LI's descending function, drawing Heat downward from the face through the GI tract. Classical pair for all facial skin conditions.大肠合穴——清整条大肠经（循行经过面部）的热邪。配合LI4，有力促进大肠下降功能，将面部热邪向下引流通过胃肠道。面部皮肤病的经典配对。
SP10 血海
Sea of Blood — cools Blood-Heat at the skin level. Acne always involves Blood-Heat erupting to the skin surface. SP10 cools Blood-Heat directly, reducing the inflammatory drive of the eruption. Reducing method for all acne patterns.血海——在皮肤层凉血热。痤疮始终涉及血热上蒸至皮肤表面。SP10直接凉血热，减少爆发的炎症驱动力。各证型痤疮均用泻法。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Lung Wind-Heat肺经风热证Add: LU7 (open Lung surface, dispel Wind-Heat), GV14 (clear systemic surface Heat), BL12 (expel Wind through Wind Gate). Reducing method. Local: ST7 , ST6 for cheek lesions; GV23 for forehead.加：LU7列缺（开肺解表，祛风热），GV14大椎（清全身表热），BL12风门（通过风门驱散风邪）。泻法。局部：颊部皮损取ST7下关、ST6颊车；额头取GV23上星。
GI Damp-Heat (most common severe pattern)胃肠湿热证（最常见的严重证型）Add: ST25 (front-mu of LI — clears Damp-Heat from GI at the source), ST44 (ying-spring of Stomach — clears Stomach Heat directly), SP9 (resolve Damp). For constipation: add ST37 (lower he-sea of LI — facilitates bowel movement). Reducing method.加：ST25天枢（大肠募穴——从源头清胃肠湿热），ST44内庭（胃之荥穴——直接清胃热），SP9阴陵泉（化湿）。便秘：加ST37上巨虚（大肠下合穴——促进排便）。泻法。
Phlegm-Damp (nodular/cystic)痰湿凝结证（结节/囊肿型）Add: ST40 (master Phlegm-resolving point), SP6 (resolve Damp through three Yin organs), CV12 (middle jiao pivot — regulates Spleen-Stomach Phlegm production). Local: surround needling around nodules with reducing method. Long treatment course required.加：ST40丰隆（化痰主穴），SP6三阴交（通过三阴经化湿），CV12中脘（中焦枢纽——调节脾胃产痰）。局部：结节周围围刺泻法。需要长期治疗。
Chong-Ren disharmony (female)冲任失调证（女性）Add: CV4 (regulates Chong/Ren), LV3 (smooth Liver Qi — the pre-menstrual stagnation root), SP6 (regulate three Yin organs and menstrual cycle). Treat throughout the cycle. Stronger reducing LV3 in the pre-menstrual week.加：CV4关元（调节冲任），LV3太冲（疏肝气——经前郁滞之根），SP6三阴交（调节三阴经和月经周期）。贯穿整个月经周期治疗。经前一周加强泻LV3。
Pi Pa Qing Fei Yin枇杷清肺饮
Lung Wind-Heat acne — small red papules on forehead/cheeks, oily skin, floating-rapid pulse肺经风热痤疮——额头/面颊小红丘疹，皮肤油腻，脉浮数
Mechanism: is the chief herb — it descends Lung Qi and clears Lung Heat. When Lung Qi properly descends, it can carry the skin's surface Heat downward rather than letting it rise to the face. +clear Lung Heat; clears Stomach Heat (companion organ); +protect Spleen-Stomach from Heat-clearing damage. The formula addresses the Lung's descending failure directly through the chief herb.机理：枇杷叶为君药——降肺气（宣降肺气）并清肺热。肺气正常下降时，可将皮肤表面的热邪向下携带，而非让其上蒸至面部。桑白皮+黄芩清肺热；黄连清胃热（表里脏腑）；人参+甘草保护脾胃不被清热药所伤。本方通过君药直接处理肺之下降失常。
Liang Ge San凉膈散
GI Damp-Heat acne — large pustules around nose/mouth/jaw, constipation, thirst, red tongue yellow greasy coat胃肠湿热痤疮——鼻/口/下颌周围大脓疱，便秘，口渴，舌红苔黄腻
Mechanism: "Cool the diaphragm" — clears accumulated Heat from the upper jiao (face, chest) by facilitating descent through the bowel. +open the bowel, creating a downward exit for the accumulated Heat; ++clear Heat from the upper jiao directly; disperses surface Heat. The principle: if the face is full of Heat, open the bowel exit and draw it downward. "Give the pathogen an exit route" — same principle as for urticaria.机理："凉膈"——通过促进肠道下行清除上焦（面部、胸部）积热。大黄+芒硝开通肠道，为积热创造向下的出口；连翘+栀子+黄芩直接清上焦热邪；薄荷散表热。原则：若面部充斥热邪，开通肠道出口并将其向下引导。"给邪气一条出路"——与防风通圣散治荨麻疹相同原则。
Hai Zao Yu Hu Tang (modified)海藻玉壶汤（加减）
Phlegm-Damp nodular/cystic acne — hard nodules, slow to resolve, thick greasy coat, slippery-wiry pulse痰湿凝结结节/囊肿型痤疮——坚硬结节，消退缓慢，苔厚腻，脉滑弦
Mechanism: Originally for thyroid goiter (a Phlegm accumulation in the neck), modified for skin Phlegm-nodules. ++soften hardness and resolve Phlegm; clears Heat and dissolves nodular masses; +resolve Damp-Phlegm in the middle jiao; clears the residual Heat component. The principle: Phlegm must be softened before it can be resolved — direct clearing methods alone cannot break up Phlegm-hardness.机理：原为甲状腺肿大（颈部痰湿积聚），经加减用于皮肤痰湿结节。海藻+昆布+浙贝母软坚散结；夏枯草清热消散结节性包块；陈皮+半夏化中焦湿痰；连翘清残余热邪成分。原则：痰必须先软化才能消解——单独的直接清除方法不能化解痰硬结。
Case — GI Damp-Heat Acne (Most Common Clinical Pattern)病案——胃肠湿热痤疮（最常见临床证型）
Patient: 22M, university student. Severe acne for 4 years — large red pustules and some nodules mainly around nose, mouth, and jaw. History of trying topical antibiotics and benzoyl peroxide with limited results. Reports: diet heavy in take-out food, fried foods, spicy instant noodles, soft drinks. Bowel movement every 2–3 days, stools hard. Skin very oily. Thirst. Red tongue, thick yellow greasy coat. Slippery-rapid pulse.患者：男，22岁，大学生。严重痤疮4年——鼻部、口周和下颌主要为大的红色脓疱和部分结节。曾尝试外用抗生素和过氧化苯甲酰，效果有限。述及：饮食以外卖食品、油炸食物、辛辣方便面、软饮料为主。每2–3天排便一次，大便干硬。皮肤非常油腻。口渴。舌红苔黄厚腻。脉滑数。
Reasoning chain: Chronic high-fat, spicy, processed diet → Damp-Heat generated in Stomach/Intestines → Stomach's descending function disrupted → turbid Heat cannot descend → reverses upward along the ST and LI face channels → erupts as acne. The constipation is the key confirmatory sign: the bowel exit is blocked → Heat has nowhere to go but upward → the face is the highest point of the ST/LI channel → maximum Heat accumulates there. Very oily skin = Damp component. Yellow thick greasy coat = Damp-Heat established in GI.

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Clear GI Damp-Heat; facilitate bowel descent; clear face channels
Acupuncture: LI4, LI11, ST25, ST44, SP9, ST37 (for constipation), SP10. Reducing method.
Herbal: Liang Ge San
Diet (essential): Eliminate fried/spicy/processed food; reduce dairy; increase vegetables, whole grains 推理链：长期高脂、辛辣、加工食品饮食→胃/肠产生湿热→胃主降浊功能受扰→浊热不能下降→逆向上行循胃经和大肠经面部路径→爆发为痤疮。便秘是关键确认体征：肠道出口阻塞→热邪无处可去但向上→面部是胃/大肠经最高点→热邪最大程度积聚于此。皮肤非常油腻=湿邪成分。苔黄厚腻=胃肠湿热已成。

证型：胃肠湿热
治则：清胃肠湿热；促进肠道通降；清面部经络
针灸：LI4、LI11、ST25、ST44、SP9、ST37（便秘）、SP10。泻法。
方药：凉膈散
饮食（必须）：戒除油炸/辛辣/加工食品；减少乳制品；增加蔬菜、全谷物
Teaching point: Diet intervention is not optional for GI Damp-Heat acne — it is the single most powerful treatment. Acupuncture and herbs will produce limited results if the Damp-Heat source continues to be replenished daily through diet. The bowel movement frequency is an objective treatment monitoring indicator: as GI Damp-Heat clears, bowel frequency normalises (daily), oiliness decreases, and acne gradually resolves over 6–10 weeks.教学要点：对于胃肠湿热痤疮，饮食干预不是可选项——它是单一最有效的治疗。如果湿热来源每天通过饮食持续补充，针灸和中药效果将十分有限。排便频率是客观的治疗监测指标：随着胃肠湿热清除，排便频率恢复正常（每日），油腻程度下降，痤疮在6–10周内逐渐消退。
Special Therapies · NADA Protocol特殊疗法 · NADA方案
Addiction & Withdrawal戒断治疗
The NADA five-point auricular protocol — calming the Shen, supporting the Liver-Kidney detoxification axis, and regulating the autonomic nervous system through the ear's dense vagal innervationNADA五穴耳针方案——安神定志，支持肝肾解毒轴，通过耳部密集的迷走神经支配调节自主神经系统
TCM Framework: Addiction as Shen Disorder with Organ Depletion中医框架：成瘾为神志失常伴脏腑耗竭
Substance addiction in TCM is understood as a complex of two interacting mechanisms:

1. Shen disturbance: The Heart-Shen is unable to remain anchored — it seeks external stimulation to compensate for internal emptiness. Substances temporarily satisfy this demand, but deplete the constitutional Yin and Jing further with each use, creating a deepening spiral. The craving IS the Shen seeking stimulation to fill the void of depleted Jing.

2. Organ depletion axis: Different substances deplete different organs:
— Opioids: Kidney Jing depletion (the deepest constitutional reserve)
— Alcohol: Liver Blood and Yin depletion + Damp-Heat accumulation
— Stimulants (cocaine, methamphetamine): Heart Yin depletion + Liver Fire
— Nicotine: Lung Qi and Yin depletion
— Cannabis: Spleen Qi depletion + Phlegm-Damp

The NADA protocol's mechanism: The five ear points simultaneously calm the Shen (Heart/Shen Men), support detoxification (Liver, Kidney), regulate the autonomic nervous system (Sympathetic), and open the Lung (Lung — the breath-control and emotional release point). The ear is densely innervated by the vagus nerve — auricular stimulation produces direct parasympathetic activation, reducing the sympathetic hyper-arousal of withdrawal. 中医对物质成瘾的理解是两种相互作用机制的复合体：

1. 神志失常：心神不能保持锚固——寻求外部刺激来补偿内在空虚。物质暂时满足这种需求，但每次使用进一步耗竭体质阴液和精气，形成不断加深的螺旋。渴求就是神志在寻求刺激以填补耗竭的精气所留下的空虚。

2. 脏腑耗竭轴线：不同物质耗竭不同脏腑：
— 阿片类：肾精耗竭（最深层的体质储备）
— 酒精：肝血和阴液耗竭+湿热积聚
— 兴奋剂（可卡因、甲基苯丙胺）：心阴耗竭+肝火
— 尼古丁：肺气和阴液耗竭
— 大麻：脾气耗竭+痰湿

NADA方案的机制：五个耳穴同时安神定志（心/神门），支持解毒（肝、肾），调节自主神经系统（交感），并开通肺（肺——呼吸控制和情感释放穴）。耳部有密集的迷走神经支配——耳穴刺激产生直接的副交感激活，减轻戒断的交感神经过度兴奋。
⚠ Scope and Referral⚠ 适用范围与转诊
TCM acupuncture (especially the NADA protocol) is an evidence-supported ADJUNCTIVE treatment for addiction — it significantly reduces cravings, withdrawal symptoms, and anxiety, and improves treatment retention. It is NOT a standalone treatment for severe addiction. Opioid withdrawal requires medical supervision (possible medication-assisted treatment with buprenorphine/methadone). Alcohol withdrawal can produce life-threatening seizures — always assess withdrawal severity and refer for medical management if CIWA score is high. Cannabis and nicotine withdrawal are generally safe to treat with TCM as a primary or adjunctive approach. 中医针灸（尤其NADA方案）是成瘾的循证辅助治疗——它显著减少渴求、戒断症状和焦虑，并改善治疗保留率。它不是严重成瘾的独立治疗。阿片类戒断需要医疗监督（可能需要丁丙诺啡/美沙酮药物辅助治疗）。酒精戒断可能产生危及生命的癫痫发作——始终评估戒断严重程度，若CIWA评分高则转诊医疗管理。大麻和尼古丁戒断通常作为主要或辅助方法用中医治疗是安全的。
Withdrawal Stage and Symptom Profile戒断阶段与症状特征
What substance? How long using? How long since last use? Current symptoms: anxiety, insomnia, sweating, craving intensity, mood?何种物质？使用多久？上次使用多久了？当前症状：焦虑、失眠、出汗、渴求强度、情绪？
→ Withdrawal stage determines treatment intensity; symptom profile identifies the depleted organ system→ 戒断阶段决定治疗强度；症状特征识别耗竭的脏腑系统
Acute withdrawal (1–7 days off substance): Sympathetic hyper-arousal dominates — anxiety, sweating, insomnia, agitation, craving. TCM: Liver Fire and Heart Shen disturbance. NADA protocol most valuable in this phase — produces rapid calming of the sympathetic storm. Treat daily if possible.

Post-acute withdrawal (weeks to months): The "dry drunk" phase — anxiety, depression, anhedonia, craving without acute physical symptoms. TCM: Kidney Jing and Heart Yin depletion (the substances have exhausted the constitutional reserve). Treatment shifts to nourishing Yin and Jing while continuing NADA for Shen anchoring.

Nicotine cessation — a specific pattern: Lung Qi and Yin are depleted by smoking. Withdrawal: irritability (Liver Qi stagnation), weight gain (Spleen Qi weakened, Damp accumulating), strong oral craving. The "sweet taste point" (— a point between LU and HT on the ear) specifically reduces oral cravings. Combine with Lung-nourishing herbs (Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang). 急性戒断（停用物质1–7天）：交感神经过度兴奋占主导——焦虑、出汗、失眠、激动、渴求。中医：肝火和心神失常。NADA方案在此阶段最有价值——快速平息交感神经风暴。若可能每日治疗。

急性后戒断（数周至数月）："干性醉酒"阶段——无急性躯体症状的焦虑、抑郁、快感缺乏、渴求。中医：肾精和心阴耗竭（物质已耗尽体质储备）。治疗转向滋养阴液和精气，同时继续NADA锚固神志。

戒烟——特定模式：吸烟耗竭肺气和阴液。戒断：烦躁（肝气郁滞），体重增加（脾气虚弱，湿邪积聚），强烈口腔渴求。"甜味穴"（耳部肺和心之间的一个穴位）专门减少口腔渴求。与养肺草药联合（沙参麦冬汤）。
Liver Fire + Heart Shen Disturbance (Acute Withdrawal)肝火+心神失常证（急性戒断）
Excess实证
Substance removal → Liver-Heart Fire flares unchecked → anxiety, agitation, insomnia, craving storm物质移除→肝心火失控上燃→焦虑、激动、失眠、渴求风暴
Key symptoms主要症状Severe anxiety and agitation; insomnia; sweating; tremor; intense craving; irritability; red eyes; bitter taste; red tongue; wiry-rapid pulse严重焦虑和激动；失眠；出汗；颤抖；强烈渴求；烦躁易怒；眼红；口苦；舌红；脉弦数
Treatment治疗NADA daily (or twice daily for severe cases) + body points: HT7 (calms the Heart-Shen), LV3 (calms Liver Fire and stagnation), PC6 (calms Heart, reduces anxiety and nausea), KI1 (grounds the rising Fire downward — the most grounding point in the body). Herbal: Long Dan Xie Gan Tang (clears Liver Fire) + Suan Zao Ren Tang (calms the Shen and promotes sleep).每日NADA（严重病例每日两次）+体针：HT7神门（安神），LV3太冲（平息肝火和郁滞），PC6内关（宁心，减轻焦虑和恶心），KI1涌泉（将上升之火引向下——全身最有接地作用的穴位）。方药：龙胆泻肝汤（清肝火）+酸枣仁汤（安神促眠）。
Kidney Jing + Heart Yin Depletion (Post-Acute)肾精+心阴耗竭证（急性后期）
Deficiency虚证
Chronic substance use has depleted Kidney Jing and Heart Yin → anhedonia, low energy, depression, continued craving from emptiness长期物质使用耗竭肾精和心阴→快感缺乏，低能量，抑郁，来自空虚的持续渴求
Key symptoms主要症状Low energy; depression; anhedonia; poor concentration; craving without acute physical distress; poor sleep (waking at 3–4am); night sweats; low back soreness; pale-red tongue; thready-rapid pulse低能量；抑郁；快感缺乏；注意力差；无急性躯体痛苦的渴求；睡眠差（凌晨3–4点醒来）；盗汗；腰酸；舌淡红；脉细数
Treatment治疗NADA 3× per week (maintenance) + body points: KI3 (nourish Kidney Yin and Jing), HT6 (xi-cleft of Heart — nourishes Heart Yin, stops night sweats), SP6 (nourishes three Yin simultaneously), GV20 (lifts Yang to address the depression and anhedonia). Herbal: Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan (nourish Heart-Kidney Yin) or Zuo Gui Wan (restore Kidney Jing).每周3次NADA（维持）+体针：KI3太溪（滋肾阴和肾精），HT6阴郄（心经郄穴——滋心阴，止盗汗），SP6三阴交（同时滋养三阴），GV20（升阳以处理抑郁和快感缺乏）。方药：天王补心丹（滋养心肾阴液）或左归丸（恢复肾精）。
The NADA Five-Point Protocol — The Core of All Addiction TreatmentNADA五穴方案——所有戒断治疗的核心
The National Acupuncture Detoxification Association (NADA) protocol uses five specific points on the outer ear, needled bilaterally (10 needles total). The protocol was developed at Lincoln Hospital, Bronx NY, and is now used in over 40 countries for substance use disorders, trauma, PTSD, and crisis intervention.

The five points (lateral to medial, needled in this sequence):

1. Sympathetic: On the antihelix, at the junction with the inferior antihelix crus. Calms the sympathetic nervous system — reduces the hyper-arousal, sweating, agitation, and cardiovascular effects of withdrawal. This is the autonomic regulator of the five.

2. Shen Men: At the apex of the triangular fossa, where it meets the antihelix. The "Spirit Gate" — calms the Heart-Shen, reduces anxiety, promotes sleep, and creates the "NADA calm" that patients report as the distinctive effect of the protocol. The most important single point.

3. Kidney: On the lower concha, below the helix crus. Nourishes Kidney Jing (depleted by substance use), calms fear (the Kidney governs fear in the Five Element framework), and supports the body's detoxification capacity through the Kidney's filtering function.

4. Liver: On the concha, adjacent to the Kidney point. Detoxifies the Blood (the Liver is the primary metabolic detoxification organ), calms Liver Fire and stagnation (the emotional root of addictive craving), and processes the emotional clearing that occurs during withdrawal.

5. Lung: On the concha, superior and lateral to Kidney. Governs the breath and grief (the two things most affected in addiction — shallow breathing and suppressed grief). Opening the Lung point allows deep breathing, emotional release, and clears the Lung's role in skin and surface detoxification. Also specific for nicotine addiction (Lung point + Sweet Point for smoking cessation).

Protocol administration:
Needles (typically 0.20mm × 15mm) are inserted into the outer ear cartilage at these five locations. Patient sits quietly for 30–45 minutes with needles in place. No manipulation needed. May be done in a group setting (the original NADA model — community treatment room where patients sit together, which has its own therapeutic value). Insert needles from Sympathetic → Shen Men → Kidney → Liver → Lung. Retain 30–45 minutes. Remove in reverse order. 美国针灸戒毒协会（NADA）方案使用外耳上的五个特定穴位，双侧针刺（共10针）。方案在纽约布朗克斯的林肯医院开发，现已在40多个国家用于物质使用障碍、创伤、PTSD和危机干预。

五个穴位（从外侧至内侧，按此序列针刺）：

1. 交感：在对耳轮上，与对耳轮下脚的交汇处。平息交感神经系统——减轻戒断的过度兴奋、出汗、激动和心血管效应。这是五穴中的自主神经调节者。

2. 神门：在三角窝顶点，与对耳轮交汇处。"神志之门"——安心神，减轻焦虑，促进睡眠，产生患者报告为方案独特效果的"NADA平静"。单一最重要的穴位。

3. 肾：在耳甲下部，耳轮脚下方。滋养肾精（被物质使用耗竭），平息恐惧（五行框架中肾主恐），并通过肾的过滤功能支持机体的解毒能力。

4. 肝：在耳甲，邻近肾穴。净化血液（肝是主要代谢解毒器官），平息肝火和郁滞（成瘾渴求的情感根源），并处理戒断期间发生的情感清理。

5. 肺：在耳甲，肾穴上方和外侧。统领呼吸和悲伤（成瘾中受影响最深的两件事——浅呼吸和压抑的悲伤）。开通肺穴允许深呼吸、情感释放，并清理肺在皮肤和体表解毒中的作用。也专用于尼古丁成瘾（肺穴+甜味穴用于戒烟）。

方案施用：
针（通常0.20mm×15mm）插入外耳软骨这五个位置。患者安静坐45分钟留针。不需要手法操作。可在团体环境中进行（原始NADA模式——患者一起坐在社区治疗室，具有其自身的治疗价值）。按交感→神门→肾→肝→肺的顺序插针。留针30–45分钟。按反向顺序取针。
Adjunct Points for Specific Substances特定物质的附加穴位
Smoking cessation戒烟Add auricular: Sweet Point (— between HT and LU on the ear, reduces oral cravings), Mouth point (— on the lower tragus, addresses oral fixation). Body points: LU7, HT7, LI4 (reduces irritability). Herbal: Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang (nourishes Lung Yin depleted by smoking).加耳穴：甜味穴（耳部心和肺之间，减少口腔渴求），口穴（耳屏下部，处理口腔固着）。体针：LU7、HT7、LI4（减轻烦躁）。方药：沙参麦冬汤（滋养吸烟耗竭的肺阴）。
Alcohol detox support酒精解毒支持Add body points: LV3 + LV14 (front-mu of Liver — specifically addresses alcohol's Liver-Damp-Heat damage), SP9 (resolves Damp), ST36 (rebuilds Spleen-Stomach function damaged by alcohol). Herbal: Ge Hua Jie Cheng San (— the classical alcohol hangover and liver protection formula; is the specific anti-alcohol herb).加体针：LV3太冲+LV14期门（肝之募穴——专门处理酒精的肝湿热损伤），SP9阴陵泉（化湿），ST36（重建被酒精损伤的脾胃功能）。方药：葛花解醒散——经典酒后和肝脏保护方；葛花是特异性抗酒精草药。
Treatment frequency guidelines治疗频率指南Acute withdrawal: daily NADA for 5–10 days (the critical window). Early recovery (weeks 2–8): 3× per week. Maintenance (months 2–6): 1–2× per week. The NADA protocol is remarkably time-efficient — 45 minutes per session, can be done in group format (5–10 patients simultaneously), dramatically reduces per-patient cost. No conversation required during treatment — patients simply sit quietly, which is itself therapeutic for addicted minds accustomed to constant stimulus.急性戒断：每日NADA，持续5–10天（关键窗口期）。早期恢复（第2–8周）：每周3次。维持（第2–6个月）：每周1–2次。NADA方案时间效率极高——每次45分钟，可团体进行（同时5–10名患者），大幅降低每位患者成本。治疗期间不需要对话——患者只需安静坐着，这本身对习惯持续刺激的成瘾心理具有治疗价值。
Suan Zao Ren Tang酸枣仁汤
Insomnia and anxiety in all withdrawal stages — the foundational Shen-calming formula for any withdrawal where sleep is disrupted所有戒断阶段的失眠和焦虑——任何睡眠受扰戒断的基础安神方
Mechanism: (sour jujube seed) is the chief herb — the primary sedating herb in TCM, specifically nourishes Heart and Liver Blood to calm the Shen. clears the empty Heat that disturbs sleep in Yin-deficient withdrawal. calms the Shen through its Heart-anchoring effect. moves Blood to prevent stagnation in the sedating formula. harmonises. The formula addresses the specific insomnia pattern of withdrawal: waking at 2–4am (Liver time) with racing thoughts and anxiety — exactly the pattern of Liver Blood deficiency failing to hold the Shen during sleep.机理：酸枣仁为君药——中医主要镇静草药，专门滋养心肝血以安神。知母清扰乱睡眠的虚热（阴虚戒断）。茯苓通过安心作用安神。川芎行血以防止滋养方中的停滞。甘草调和。本方处理戒断的特定失眠模式：凌晨2–4点（肝时）醒来伴思维奔逸和焦虑——正是肝血虚不能在睡眠中固摄神志的模式。
Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan天王补心丹
Post-acute withdrawal — Heart-Kidney Yin deficiency with Shen disturbance: palpitations, anxiety, poor concentration, forgetfulness, insomnia, night sweats急性后戒断——心肾阴虚伴神志失常：心悸、焦虑、注意力差、健忘、失眠、盗汗
Mechanism: Specifically designed for Heart-Kidney Yin depletion — exactly the constitutional damage from long-term substance use. nourishes Kidney Yin (the root); ++nourish Heart and Lung Yin; +calm the Shen; activates Heart Blood; astringes the scattered Shen (prevents further dispersal of the depleted Jing). The formula is essentially a Heart-Kidney Yin tonic combined with a Shen-anchoring formula — addressing both the constitutional depletion and the Shen disturbance simultaneously. Take for 3–6 months during recovery maintenance.机理：专为心肾阴虚耗竭而设——正是长期物质使用造成的体质损伤。生地黄滋肾阴（根本）；天冬+麦冬+玄参滋养心肺阴液；酸枣仁+柏子仁安神；丹参活心血；五味子收敛散乱的神志（防止耗竭的精气进一步散失）。本方本质上是心肾阴补方与安神方的结合——同时处理体质耗竭和神志失常。恢复维持阶段服用3–6个月。
Case — Smoking Cessation: NADA + Sweet Point + Lung Nourishment病案——戒烟：NADA+甜味穴+养肺
Patient: 52M, accountant. Smoked 1.5 packs/day for 28 years. Previous quit attempts: 3 (used nicotine patches — relapsed at weeks 2–3 each time due to anxiety and irritability). Current attempt motivated by cardiac event (mild angina). Main concerns: anxiety and irritability when not smoking, strong oral craving, weight gain worry. Pulse: wiry, slightly rapid. Tongue: red with slight dry coat. Concurrent: mild chronic cough (dry).患者：男，52岁，会计师。吸烟1.5包/天，持续28年。之前戒烟尝试：3次（使用尼古丁贴片——每次因焦虑和烦躁在第2–3周复发）。当前戒烟动机：心脏事件（轻度心绞痛）。主要担忧：不吸烟时焦虑和烦躁，强烈口腔渴求，担心体重增加。脉弦略数。舌红苔略干。同时伴：轻度慢性咳嗽（干咳）。
Pattern analysis: 28 years smoking → Lung Qi and Yin depletion (dry cough, dry tongue) + Liver Qi stagnation (irritability, wiry pulse) + Heart Yin beginning to deplete (cardiac event, slightly rapid pulse). The previous relapses at weeks 2–3 correspond to the peak of withdrawal anxiety and craving (Liver Fire flaring without the "nicotine damper").

Treatment plan (12-session course):
Sessions 1–5 (daily for the first week, then every 2 days): Full NADA + Sweet Point + Mouth point. Body: LU7, HT7, LI4, LV3. After each session patient reports markedly reduced craving for 6–8 hours.
Sessions 6–12 (2× per week): Shift to Lung nourishment: add LU9, BL13 (Lung shu). NADA continues. Herbal introduced week 2: Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang (nourish Lung Yin) + Suan Zao Ren Tang (for the sleep-anxiety component).
Outcome: Patient did not smoke after session 1. At 3 months: smoke-free. Cough resolved. Weight gained 2kg (manageable). Irritability episodes brief and manageable without pharmacotherapy. 证型分析：28年吸烟→肺气和阴液耗竭（干咳，舌干）+肝气郁滞（烦躁，脉弦）+心阴开始耗竭（心脏事件，脉略数）。前几次在第2–3周复发，对应戒断焦虑和渴求的高峰期（没有"尼古丁阻尼器"的肝火上燃）。

治疗计划（12次疗程）：
第1–5次（第一周每日，然后隔天）：完整NADA+甜味穴+口穴。体针：LU7、HT7、LI4、LV3。每次治疗后患者报告渴求显著减少6–8小时。
第6–12次（每周2次）：转向养肺：加LU9、BL13（肺俞）。NADA继续。第2周引入方药：沙参麦冬汤（滋养肺阴）+酸枣仁汤（处理睡眠-焦虑成分）。
结果：患者第1次治疗后未再吸烟。3个月时：无烟。咳嗽消除。体重增加2kg（可控）。烦躁发作短暂且无需药物治疗即可控。
Teaching point: The NADA protocol's primary value in smoking cessation is reducing the anxiety and craving spike that causes most relapses in the first 2–3 weeks. It does not make quitting effortless — it makes the withdrawal symptoms manageable enough that the patient's motivation is not overwhelmed. The daily sessions in week 1 (versus the twice-weekly patches alone) provide continuous Shen-anchoring support during the most vulnerable period. The Lung nourishment herbs address the constitutional damage from 28 years of smoking — something no pharmacotherapy touches.教学要点：NADA方案在戒烟中的主要价值是减少导致大多数前2–3周复发的焦虑和渴求峰值。它不能使戒烟毫不费力——而是使戒断症状足够可控，患者的动力不会被压倒。第一周的每日治疗（与单独隔天使用贴片相比）在最脆弱的阶段提供持续的安神支持。养肺草药处理28年吸烟造成的体质损伤——这是任何药物治疗都无法触及的。
Mind & Sleep · Emotional神志情志 · 情志病证
Anxiety焦虑症
Heart-Shen failing to anchor — from Liver-GB Qi deficiency (chronic worry) to Heart-Kidney disharmony (panic attacks). Overlaps with Palpitations and Depression modules but with distinct clinical features requiring different treatment emphasis.心神不能锚固——从肝胆气虚（慢性焦虑）到心肾不交（惊恐发作）。与心悸和郁证模块重叠，但有需要不同治疗重点的独特临床特征。
The Two Axes of Anxiety in TCM中医焦虑症的两条轴线
All anxiety in TCM reflects the Heart-Shen failing to remain anchored. Two primary axes account for most presentations:

Axis 1 — Shaoyang (Liver-GB): The Gallbladder governs courage and decision-making. When GB Qi is deficient, the person lacks the ability to "switch" between states — they remain in a hypervigilant sympathetic state. Chronic worry and rumination = Liver Qi stagnation consuming GB Qi. Clinical picture: anticipatory anxiety, indecisiveness, easily startled, chronic low-grade dread.

Axis 2 — Shaoyin (Heart-Kidney): The Water-Fire axis broken — Heart Fire cannot descend, Kidney Water cannot ascend. Panic attacks arise when the Heart-Fire flares suddenly without Kidney Water to anchor it. Clinical picture: acute panic attacks with palpitations, sweating, heat sensations, fear of dying. 中医所有焦虑都反映心神不能保持锚固。两条主要轴线解释大多数表现：

轴线1——少阳（肝胆）：胆主决断。当胆气虚时，人缺乏在状态之间"切换"的能力——保持在过度警觉的交感神经激活状态。慢性焦虑和反刍=肝气郁滞耗竭胆气。临床表现：预期性焦虑、优柔寡断、易受惊吓、慢性轻度恐惧感。

轴线2——少阴（心肾）：水火轴破坏——心火不能下降，肾水不能上升。惊恐发作在心火突然上燃而无肾水锚固时发生。临床表现：急性惊恐发作伴心悸、出汗、热感、濒死感。
Anxiety Type and Trigger焦虑类型与触发
Chronic background anxiety, or sudden panic attacks? Specific triggers or pervasive? Palpitations, sweating, heat during episodes?慢性背景性焦虑，还是突然惊恐发作？特定触发还是弥漫性？发作时心悸、出汗、热感？
→ Chronic diffuse = Liver-GB Qi Xu. Acute panic attacks = Heart-Kidney disharmony or Heart Fire→ 慢性弥漫性=肝胆气虚。急性惊恐发作=心肾不交或心火
Chronic worry + easily startled + indecisive慢性焦虑+易受惊吓+优柔寡断
HT-GB Qi Xu心胆气虚
Panic attacks + palpitations + heat + fear of dying惊恐发作+心悸+热感+濒死感
HT-KD disharmony心肾不交
Irritable anxiety + restlessness + insomnia烦躁型焦虑+坐立不安+失眠
Heart Fire / Liver Fire心火/肝火
Anxious + fatigue + pale + poor memory焦虑+疲乏+面白+记忆差
HT-SP Xu心脾两虚
Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu — Chronic Anxiety (most common)心胆气虚证——慢性焦虑（最常见）
Deficiency虚证
GB Qi deficient → cannot initiate the Yin-Yang switching function → stuck in hypervigilant Yang mode → chronic anxiety胆气虚→不能启动阴阳切换功能→卡在过度警觉的阳性模式→慢性焦虑
Key symptoms主要症状Chronic diffuse anxiety; easily startled by small sounds or events; timidity and indecisiveness; chronic low-grade dread; cannot relax; sleep disrupted (see Insomnia — HT-GB pattern); palpitations triggered by minor events; pale tongue; wiry-thin or weak pulse慢性弥漫性焦虑；细小声音或事件即受惊；胆怯优柔寡断；慢性轻度恐惧感；无法放松；睡眠受扰（见失眠——心胆气虚型）；细小事件引发心悸；舌淡；脉弦细或弱
Key formula关键方剂Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang (Shang Han Lun — the classical formula for exactly this presentation: chest oppression, anxiety, easily startled, palpitations). smooths Shaoyang; +(fossilized bone + oyster shell) anchor the Shen by their weight and mineral nature; calms the Shen; +clear residual Fire. This formula treats the Shaoyang axis of anxiety directly.柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤（伤寒论——正是此表现的经典方：胸满、烦惊、心悸）。柴胡疏通少阳；龙骨+牡蛎（化石骨+牡蛎壳）以其重量和矿物质性质锚固心神；茯苓宁心；黄芩+大黄清残余火热。此方直接治疗焦虑的少阳轴线。
Heart-Kidney Disharmony — Panic Attacks心肾不交证——惊恐发作
Mixed虚实夹杂
Kidney Yin cannot anchor Heart Fire → sudden surge of Heart Fire without counterbalance → acute panic with heat, palpitations, fear肾阴不能锚固心火→心火突然上冲无制衡→急性惊恐伴热感、心悸、恐惧
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden panic attacks with intense palpitations; racing heart; sweating; chest tightness; heat sensation; fear of dying; tinnitus; early waking; five-centre heat; red tongue little coat; thready-rapid pulse突发惊恐发作伴剧烈心悸；心跳加速；出汗；胸部紧束感；热感；濒死感；耳鸣；早醒；五心烦热；舌红苔少；脉细数
Treatment治疗KI3 + HT7 (the Water-Fire axis pair) + PC6 + GV20 (reducing). Acute panic: KI1 strong stimulation grounds the rising Fire immediately. Herbal: Jiao Tai Wan (+— the 2-herb formula that restores the Water-Fire axis) + Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan for sustained Yin nourishment.KI3+HT7（水火轴对）+PC6+GV20（泻法）。急性惊恐：KI1涌泉强刺激立即接地上升的火热。方药：交泰丸（黄连+肉桂——恢复水火轴的2味药方）+天王补心丹持续滋阴。
Anxiety Acupuncture Protocol焦虑症针灸方案
Core: HT7 + PC6 + GV20核心：HT7+PC6+GV20
All anxiety patterns. HT7 (tonification for deficiency, reducing for excess) anchors the Shen. PC6 opens the chest and calms the Heart-Pericardium. GV20 (reducing for excess Fire type, tonification for deficiency) regulates the Yang apex. These three together address the Shen from the Heart (HT7), the Pericardium shield (PC6), and the Yang axis (GV20).所有焦虑证型。HT7（虚证补法，实证泻法）锚固心神。PC6开胸宁心包。GV20（实火型泻法，虚证补法）调节阳轴顶端。这三穴从心（HT7）、心包屏障（PC6）和阳轴（GV20）同时处理心神。
GB40 + GB34 (for HT-GB Qi Xu)GB40+GB34（心胆气虚型）GB40 (source point of GB — tonifies GB Qi, restores the switching function). GB34 (he-sea of GB — sinews and muscle tension associated with chronic anxiety). The Shaoyang axis treatment: smooth and tonify the Gallbladder's decision-making and transition function. Tonification method. This is the acupuncture equivalent of Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang.GB40丘墟（胆经原穴——补胆气，恢复切换功能）。GB34阳陵泉（胆经合穴——与慢性焦虑相关的筋腱和肌肉紧张）。少阳轴治疗：疏通和补益胆的决断和转换功能。补法。这是柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤的针灸等效。
KI1 (for acute panic)KI1涌泉（急性惊恐）The most grounding point in the body — the lowest point of the Kidney channel, on the sole of the foot. During a panic attack or acute anxiety episode: strong stimulation (press-needle or strong needling) of KI1 immediately activates the descending function of the Kidney channel, pulling the rising Heart Fire downward. Patients often report rapid calming within 1–2 minutes of stimulation. Can be taught as a self-acupressure technique for patient self-management between sessions.全身最有接地作用的穴位——肾经最低点，位于足底。急性惊恐发作或急性焦虑发作期间：KI1强刺激（压针或强针刺）立即激活肾经的下降功能，将上升的心火向下引导。患者常报告刺激后1–2分钟内快速平静。可作为自我穴位按压技术传授给患者，用于疗程间的自我管理。
Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤
HT-GB Qi Xu anxiety — chronic diffuse anxiety, easily startled, chest oppression, indecisive, disturbed sleep, wiry pulse心胆气虚焦虑——慢性弥漫性焦虑，易受惊吓，胸满，优柔寡断，睡眠扰乱，脉弦
Mechanism: Originally from Shang Han Lun for the Shaoyang pattern with chest oppression and frightened palpitations. +smooth the Shaoyang axis; +are the key additions — their heavy mineral nature anchors the rising, scattered Shen (literally weighing it down). in the original is omitted (toxic); calms the Shen; warms and opens the Heart Qi; purges downward (ensuring the Fire has an exit route). This formula treats the exact Shaoyang-axis anxiety mechanism: the Gallbladder's switching function has failed, and the Shen is scattered and startling.机理：原出自《伤寒论》少阳证伴胸满烦惊。柴胡+黄芩疏通少阳轴；龙骨+牡蛎是关键加味——其沉重的矿物质性质锚固上浮散乱的心神（字面意义上的向下压制）。原方铅丹因毒性省去；茯苓宁心；桂枝温通心气；大黄向下泻出（确保火热有出路）。本方治疗精确的少阳轴焦虑机制：胆的切换功能失常，心神散乱易惊。
Ling Gui Zhu Gan Tang苓桂术甘汤
Anxiety with palpitations + water-rheum rising + chest fullness + dizziness — the Water-type anxiety where Phlegm-fluid disturbs the Heart焦虑伴心悸+水饮上冲+胸满+头晕——痰饮扰心的水型焦虑
Mechanism: drains Phlegm-fluid from the Heart; warms and opens the Heart Yang (Shaoyin axis); strengthens the Spleen to prevent fluid regeneration; harmonizes. When anxiety is accompanied by a sensation of water sloshing in the epigastrium, palpitations on slight movement, and dizziness — this is Water-type anxiety. The formula specifically resolves the fluid accumulation that is directly disturbing the Heart-Shen. Often used when other Shen-calming formulas have limited effect because the fluid obstruction is the primary mechanism.机理：茯苓从心排出痰饮；桂枝温通心阳（少阴轴）；白术健脾防止液体再生；甘草调和。当焦虑伴胃脘水声漉漉、轻微活动即心悸、头晕——这是水型焦虑（饮邪上冲心）。本方专门消解直接扰动心神的液体积聚。常用于其他安神方效果有限时，因为液体阻塞是主要机制。
Case — Panic Disorder: 6 Sessions to Resolution病案——惊恐障碍：6次治疗缓解
Patient: 38F, accountant. Panic attacks for 8 months — began after a stressful period at work. Attacks: sudden intense palpitations, sweating, chest tightness, heat sensation, fear of dying, lasting 10–20 minutes. 2–3 attacks/week. Between attacks: early waking 3–4am, night sweats, fatigue. Prescribed lorazepam (uses as needed — helps acutely but not preventing attacks). Tongue: red, little coat. Pulse: thready, rapid, weak at chi.患者：女，38岁，会计师。惊恐发作8个月——工作压力大时期后开始。发作：突发剧烈心悸、出汗、胸部紧束感、热感、濒死感，持续10–20分钟。每周2–3次。发作间：早醒3–4点、盗汗、疲乏。处方劳拉西泮（按需使用——急性有效但不能预防发作）。舌红苔少。脉细数，尺弱。
Pattern: Heart-Kidney Disharmony — confirmed by: red tongue little coat + thready rapid pulse (Yin deficiency) + chi weak (Kidney) + early waking 3–4am + night sweats + five-centre heat during attacks. The panic attacks are Heart Fire surging without Kidney Water anchor. The workplace stress depleted Kidney Yin over months → Water-Fire axis broke → panic attacks began.

Sessions 1–3 (weekly): KI3 + HT7 (both tonification) + PC6 + GV20 (light reducing) + KI1 (taught patient to self-stimulate during attacks). Herbal started: Jiao Tai Wan + Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan.

Week 3: Attacks reduced to 1/week. Night sweats 50% less. Week 6: Zero panic attacks for 2 weeks. Early waking resolved. Patient discontinued lorazepam.

Teaching herself KI1 acupressure proved critical — she had two minor anxiety surges (not full panic attacks) during weeks 2–3 and was able to abort them with self-treatment. 证型：心肾不交——确认：舌红苔少+脉细数（阴虚）+尺弱（肾虚）+早醒3–4点+盗汗+发作时五心烦热。惊恐发作是心火上冲而无肾水锚固。工作压力数月耗竭肾阴→水火轴破裂→惊恐发作开始。

第1–3次（每周）：KI3+HT7（均补法）+PC6+GV20（轻泻）+KI1（教导患者发作时自我刺激）。开始方药：交泰丸+天王补心丹。

第3周：发作减至每周1次。盗汗减少50%。第6周：2周内零惊恐发作。早醒消除。患者停用劳拉西泮。

自学KI1穴位按压被证明至关重要——她在第2–3周有两次轻度焦虑上冲（非完整惊恐发作），通过自我治疗成功中止。
Teaching point: KI1 acupressure as a patient self-management tool between sessions is uniquely effective for panic attacks — it gives the patient a physical, evidence-based intervention during the moment of maximum distress, replacing the helplessness of the attack with an active coping strategy. Teaching this in session 1 prevents the "what do I do when an attack happens" crisis that often leads to medication dependence.教学要点：KI1穴位按压作为疗程间患者自我管理工具对惊恐发作具有独特效果——在最大痛苦时刻给患者一个有循证依据的物理干预，用积极的应对策略取代发作时的无助感。在第1次治疗时教授此技术，可以预防常常导致药物依赖的"发作时我该怎么办"危机。
Lung System肺系病证
Asthma哮喘
Root: (latent Phlegm lodged in the Lung) is the essential precondition — without it, no asthma. Triggers activate the latent Phlegm, producing an acute attack. Between attacks, the underlying deficiency must be addressed or attacks will inevitably recur. Two completely different treatment strategies for two phases of the same disease.根本：宿痰伏肺是哮喘发生的根本前提——无此则无哮喘。诱发因素激活伏痰，产生急性发作（发作期）。发作间期必须处理根本的虚损（缓解期），否则发作不可避免地会复发。同一疾病两个阶段的两套完全不同的治疗策略。
The first and most critical question: is this an active attack or a between-attack visit? This determines everything — treatment during an attack focuses entirely on opening airways and expelling Phlegm. Treatment between attacks focuses entirely on tonifying the deficient organs. Applying the between-attack strategy during an attack, or vice versa, will worsen the patient. 首要关键问题：这是急性发作期还是缓解期就诊？这决定一切——发作期治疗完全聚焦于开通气道和驱逐痰邪。缓解期治疗完全聚焦于补益虚损的脏腑。在发作期用缓解期策略，或反之，都会加重患者病情。
Core Framework · The Two-Phase Disease Model核心框架 · 双阶段疾病模型
Zheng Zhi Zhun Sheng: "Asthma has a root and a trigger. Without the root, the trigger cannot produce asthma." The latent Phlegm is formed by chronic Spleen-Kidney deficiency that fails to transform fluids — Phlegm accumulates over years in the Lung. It remains dormant until a trigger (cold air, allergen, emotion, exertion, food) activates it.

Once activated: Phlegm + trigger → Phlegm-Cold or Phlegm-Heat obstruction in the airways → Lung Qi cannot descend or exit → wheezing, dyspnea (+). Treatment: expel the activated Phlegm, open the airway.

Between attacks: the Phlegm returns to latency, but the root deficiency remains. Lung, Spleen, and Kidney are all involved. Treatment: tonify the deficient organs so less Phlegm forms, and Wei Qi is strong enough to resist future triggers. 《证治准绳》：「哮喘有夙根，有诱因。无夙根，诱因不能发哮。」伏痰（宿痰伏肺）由慢性脾肾亏虚不能运化津液形成——痰液在肺中积聚多年。它保持潜伏状态直到诱发因素（冷空气、过敏原、情志、劳累、食物）将其激活。

一旦激活：痰+诱因→寒痰或热痰阻塞气道→肺气不能肃降或出入→喘鸣、呼吸困难（出入失常+升太过）。治疗：驱出激活的痰邪，开通气道。

缓解期：痰返回潜伏状态，但根本虚损仍在。肺、脾、肾均受累。治疗：补益虚损脏腑，使痰的形成减少，卫气足够强壮以抵御未来的诱发因素。
Attack Phase (+):
Cold-Phlegm: Cold trigger → activates cold-type latent Phlegm → white frothy sputum, cold sensation, pale face. Treat: warm Lung, expel Phlegm-Cold, open airway.
Heat-Phlegm: Heat trigger / internal Heat → activates heat-type latent Phlegm → yellow thick sputum, fever, red face, thirst. Treat: clear Lung Heat, expel Phlegm-Heat.

Remission Phase (+):
Lung Xu: shortness of breath after attack, spontaneous sweat, weak voice. Tonify Lung.
Spleen Xu: abundant phlegm production, fatigue, poor appetite. Tonify Spleen to stop Phlegm at source.
Kidney Xu: most important root — Kidney Yang cannot warm the Lung (Phlegm remains cold), Kidney cannot grasp Qi (breath cannot reach the root). Tonify Kidney. 发作期（出入失常+升太过）：
寒哮：寒邪诱发→激活寒性伏痰→白色泡沫痰，寒冷感，面色苍白。治疗：温肺，驱寒痰，开气道。
热哮：热邪诱发/内热→激活热性伏痰→黄色稠厚痰，发热，面红，口渴。治疗：清肺热，驱热痰。

缓解期（升不及+降不及）：
肺虚：发作后气短，自汗，声低。补肺。
脾虚：大量产痰，疲乏，食欲不振。补脾以从源头截断痰邪。
肾虚：最重要的根本——肾阳不能温肺（痰持续寒性），肾不能纳气（气不能达根）。补肾。
Group 1 · Phase Identification — The Essential First Question第一组 · 阶段识别——首要问题
Phase阶段
Is the patient currently experiencing wheezing, dyspnea, or chest tightness — or are they coming in between attacks to prevent recurrence?患者目前是否正在经历喘鸣、呼吸困难或胸部憋闷——还是在发作间期就诊以预防复发？
→ Attack phase = open and expel. Remission phase = tonify and consolidate. Never mix strategies.→ 发作期=开通驱邪。缓解期=补益固本。绝不混用策略。
＋
Mechanism · Why Phase Determines Everything机理 · 为什么阶段决定一切
During an attack: Phlegm is actively blocking the airway. The clinical priority is to open the obstruction immediately — wheezing must be reduced within the session. Using tonification during an attack is like trying to replenish a blocked pipe: the supply cannot flow because the blockage is still in place. Tonifying during an attack can actually worsen breathing by adding substance (Qi, Phlegm) to an already-obstructed system.

During remission: The acute Phlegm has resolved. The airway is clear. Now the root deficiency is accessible for treatment. This is the window to rebuild Spleen-Kidney function, reduce Phlegm formation, and strengthen the Lung-Wei barrier. Using expelling/reducing treatment during remission attacks healthy tissue and depletes the already-deficient organs — making future attacks more likely and more severe.

Classical teaching: "During attacks, treat the branch. During remission, treat the root." This is the fundamental clinical rule for asthma management. 发作期：痰邪正在主动阻塞气道。临床优先级是立即开通阻塞——喘鸣必须在本次治疗中减轻。发作期使用补法就像试图在堵塞的管道中补充供应：阻塞仍在，供应无法流通。发作期补益实际上可能因为向已经阻塞的系统增加物质（气、痰）而加重呼吸。

缓解期：急性痰邪已消解。气道通畅。现在可以治疗根本虚损。这是重建脾肾功能、减少痰邪形成和强化肺卫屏障的窗口期。缓解期使用驱邪/泻法攻伐健康组织，耗竭已经亏虚的脏腑——使未来的发作更可能发生且更严重。

经典教学：发时治标，平时治本——「发作时治标，缓解时治本。」这是哮喘处理的基本临床规则。
Direction答案指向
Active wheezing / dyspnea当前喘鸣/呼吸困难
— open airway, expel Phlegm发作期——开气道，驱痰
Between attacks, feeling relatively well发作间期，相对感觉良好
— tonify Lung, Spleen, Kidney缓解期——补肺脾肾
Group 2 · Attack Phase — Cold vs Heat Phlegm第二组 · 发作期——寒哮与热哮
Sputum痰液
During the attack: is the sputum thin, white, and frothy — or thick, yellow, and difficult to expectorate?发作期间：痰液是稀薄、色白、泡沫状——还是稠厚、色黄、难以咯出？
→ Sputum character splits from — the two attack-phase patterns with opposite treatments→ 痰液性状区分寒哮与热哮——两个发作期证型，治疗方向相反
＋
Mechanism机理
Cold-Phlegm attack: The latent Phlegm was of cold nature (formed by Kidney Yang deficiency failing to warm and transform). Cold trigger (cold air, cold food, cold weather) activates it without transforming it to Heat. The Phlegm remains cold, white, and frothy — it is abundant and thin, blocking the airway physically but without inflammatory Heat. Cold contracts the bronchi → tight, high-pitched wheeze. Face is pale, patient feels cold, limbs are cold. Treat with warming Phlegm-expelling herbs.

Heat-Phlegm attack: Either the latent Phlegm was of warm nature (from internal Heat or Yin deficiency), or a Cold attack has been present long enough to transform to Heat. The Phlegm is now thick, yellow, and sticky — it is harder to expectorate and causes more inflammation. Heat dilates vessels → lower-pitched wheeze, red face, fever, thirst. Treat with cooling Phlegm-clearing herbs. Never use warming herbs here. 寒哮：伏痰属寒性（由肾阳虚不能温化形成）。寒邪诱因（冷空气、寒食、寒冷天气）激活痰邪但不将其化热。痰邪仍寒白泡沫——量多质稀，物质性阻塞气道但无炎症性热邪。寒性收缩支气管→紧绷、高调喘鸣音。面色苍白，患者感觉寒冷，肢冷。用温热化痰药治疗。

热哮：伏痰属温性（来自内热或阴虚），或寒哮持续时间足够长已化热。痰邪现在稠厚、色黄、黏稠——更难咯出，引起更多炎症。热邪扩张血管→低调喘鸣音，面红，发热，口渴。用凉性清痰药治疗。这里绝不用温热药。
Direction答案指向
White frothy, thin + cold + pale白色泡沫稀薄+寒冷+面白
Cold-Phlegm attack — warm and expel寒哮——温化驱痰
Yellow thick sticky + fever + thirst黄色稠厚黏稠+发热+口渴
Heat-Phlegm attack — clear and expel热哮——清化驱痰
Trigger诱因
What triggers the attacks — cold air/food/weather, or exertion, heat, allergens, or emotions?什么触发发作——冷空气/寒食/寒冷天气，还是劳累、热邪、过敏原或情志？
→ Cold triggers → . Heat/allergen triggers → . Exertion triggers → Kidney Qi deficiency→ 寒邪诱发→寒哮。热邪/过敏原→热哮。劳累诱发→肾气虚
＋
Mechanism · Trigger-Pattern Mapping机理 · 诱因-证型对应
Cold air, cold food, cold weather → : Cold directly activates cold-nature latent Phlegm without transformation. The pattern is immediate — breathing changes within minutes of cold exposure.

Exertion → Kidney Qi deficiency: The Kidney "grasps" Qi during inhalation — Kidney Qi roots the breath downward. When Kidney Qi is deficient, exertion consumes the little remaining Kidney Qi, causing Qi to rebel upward and triggering an attack. This pattern often has no wheeze — just dyspnea on exertion that does not fully resolve with rest.

Allergens (pollen, dust, food) → often : Allergens generate an internal inflammatory response (Heat) that activates Heat-nature latent Phlegm. These attacks tend to be more severe and harder to resolve quickly.

Emotional stress → Liver Qi stagnation compressing the Lung: Liver Qi can constrain the chest and prevent Lung expansion. Combined with latent Phlegm, emotional stress can precipitate attacks — especially in patients who report anxiety or anger as consistent triggers. 冷空气、寒食、寒冷天气→寒哮：寒邪直接激活寒性伏痰而不化热。证型反应迅速——受寒后数分钟内呼吸改变。

劳累→肾气虚：肾「纳气」于吸气时——肾气将气根向下。肾气虚时，劳累耗竭剩余的少量肾气，导致气逆上行，触发发作。此证型常无喘鸣——只是劳累时气促，休息后不能完全缓解。

过敏原（花粉、灰尘、食物）→常为热哮：过敏原产生内部炎症反应（热邪）激活热性伏痰。这类发作往往更严重，更难迅速缓解。

情志压力→肝气郁滞压迫肺：肝气可以约束胸部，阻止肺扩张。与伏痰结合，情志压力可以诱发发作——特别是那些报告焦虑或愤怒是一致诱因的患者。
Direction答案指向
Cold trigger寒邪诱发
Cold-Phlegm
Exertion trigger劳累诱发
Kidney Xu — root treatment priority肾虚——根本治疗优先
Allergen / heat trigger过敏原/热邪诱发
Heat-Phlegm
Group 3 · Remission Phase — Which Organ is Deficient?第三组 · 缓解期——哪个脏腑亏虚？
Deficiency虚损
Between attacks: shortness of breath and sweating (Lung), abundant Phlegm and fatigue (Spleen), or cold limbs / breathless on exertion / low back ache (Kidney)?发作间期：气短自汗（肺），痰多疲乏（脾），还是肢冷/劳则气促/腰酸（肾）？
→ Identifies the deficient organ for remission-phase treatment — all three may coexist, Kidney is usually the deepest root→ 确认缓解期治疗的虚损脏腑——三者可并存，肾虚通常是最深的根本
＋
Mechanism · The Three-Organ Deficiency Sequence机理 · 三脏虚损序列
Lung Xu (earliest stage): After each attack, the Lung is further depleted — it takes longer to recover, and shortness of breath persists longer between attacks. Spontaneous sweating (Lung Qi cannot consolidate the surface). Weak voice. This is the most superficial deficiency.

Spleen Xu (middle stage): Long-standing Lung Qi deficiency eventually weakens the Spleen (Soil fails to generate Metal). The Spleen loses its ability to transform fluids → more Phlegm is produced between attacks (not just during attacks). More Phlegm = more frequent attacks = more Lung depletion: a vicious cycle. Signs: abundant sputum even between attacks, fatigue, poor appetite, loose stools.

Kidney Xu (deepest root — usually present in chronic asthma): The Kidney is the root of Qi — it grasps Qi during inhalation. Without sufficient Kidney Qi/Yang, breath cannot reach its root → dyspnea on minimal exertion, breathlessness worse lying flat, low back aching, cold limbs, frequent urination. In long-standing asthma, Kidney Xu is almost always present. Treating only Lung and Spleen without addressing Kidney will provide temporary improvement but not long-term resolution. 肺虚（最早期）：每次发作后肺进一步亏耗——恢复时间延长，发作间期气短持续更久。自汗（肺气不能固表）。声低无力。这是最浅表的虚损。

脾虚（中期）：长期肺气虚最终削弱脾（土不生金）。脾失运化津液能力→发作间期产生更多痰（不只在发作时）。更多痰=更频繁发作=更多肺的亏耗：恶性循环。体征：发作间期也有大量痰，疲乏，食欲不振，便溏。

肾虚（最深根本——慢性哮喘通常存在）：肾是气的根本——在吸气时纳气。没有足够的肾气/肾阳，气息不能达根→轻微劳累即气促，平卧时气短加重，腰酸，肢冷，尿频。长期哮喘中，肾虚几乎总是存在的。只治肺脾不处理肾只能提供暂时改善而非长期解决。
Direction答案指向
SOB + sweat + weak voice气短+自汗+声低
Lung Xu — tonify Lung肺虚——补肺
Abundant Phlegm + fatigue + poor appetite痰多+疲乏+食少
Spleen Xu — dry Damp, stop Phlegm脾虚——燥湿截痰
Exertion SOB + cold limbs + low back ache劳则气促+肢冷+腰酸
Kidney Xu — tonify Kidney, grasp Qi肾虚——补肾纳气
Five patterns — two attack-phase and three remission-phase. They are never used simultaneously. The phase question from intake determines which half of this page applies. In clinical practice, a patient who comes in during an attack may need one or two sessions of attack-phase treatment before transitioning to remission-phase treatment.五个证型——两个发作期，三个缓解期。从不同时使用。问诊中的阶段问题决定此页面适用哪一半。临床实践中，发作期就诊的患者可能需要一到两次发作期治疗才能过渡到缓解期治疗。
Attack Phase Patterns — +发作期证型——出入失常+升太过

① Cold-Phlegm Attack寒哮

+ — Cold activates cold-nature latent Phlegm出入失常+升太过——寒邪激活寒性伏痰
Most common attack pattern in cold climates. Cold air or food directly activates cold-nature Phlegm. Wheezing is tight and high-pitched (Cold contracts). Treatment: warm and dispel — never use cold herbs during a Cold-Phlegm attack.寒冷气候中最常见的发作证型。冷空气或寒食直接激活寒性痰邪。喘鸣紧绷，高调（寒性收缩）。治疗：温化散邪——寒哮发作期绝不用寒凉药。
  • Wheezing + dyspnea; worse in cold, better in warmth喘鸣+呼吸困难；遇寒加重，遇热减轻
  • Thin white frothy sputum, copious, easy to expectorate痰稀白泡沫，量多，容易咯出
  • Cold sensation, pale face, cold limbs; no thirst畏寒，面色苍白，肢冷；口不渴
  • Chest tightness and fullness胸部憋闷胀满
  • Tongue: pale, white slippery coat; Pulse: floating tight or wiry slippery舌淡苔白滑；脉浮紧或弦滑

② Heat-Phlegm Attack热哮

+ — Heat activates heat-nature latent Phlegm出入失常+升太过——热邪激活热性伏痰
Wheezing is lower-pitched and more urgent than Cold-Phlegm. Heat is present systemically — red face, fever, thirst. Sputum is thick and hard to remove. Treatment: clear Heat and expel Phlegm — never use warming herbs.喘鸣比寒哮低调但更急迫。全身有热象——面红、发热、口渴。痰液稠厚难以排出。治疗：清热化痰——绝不用温热药。
  • Wheezing + dyspnea; triggered by allergens, heat, infection喘鸣+呼吸困难；过敏原、热邪、感染诱发
  • Thick yellow or green sputum, hard to expectorate痰稠厚色黄或绿，难以咯出
  • Fever, sweating, red face, thirst for cold drinks发热，出汗，面红，渴喜冷饮
  • Restlessness; possible chest pain烦躁；可有胸痛
  • Tongue: red, yellow greasy coat; Pulse: slippery rapid舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Remission Phase Patterns — +缓解期证型——升不及+降不及

③ Lung Qi Deficiency肺气虚

— Lung loses descending and consolidating capacity降不及——肺失肃降和固摄能力
Early-stage remission deficiency. Attacks are less frequent and less severe than Kidney Xu, but the surface is open — susceptible to Wind invasion that can trigger new attacks. Tonify Lung and consolidate Wei Qi.早期缓解期虚损。发作频率和严重程度轻于肾虚，但体表开放——易受风邪侵袭诱发新发作。补肺固卫。
  • Shortness of breath and fatigue after attacks发作后气短疲乏
  • Spontaneous sweating; prone to catching colds自汗；容易感冒
  • Weak cough; thin sputum; pale face咳声低弱；痰稀薄；面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale, thin coat; Pulse: thin weak舌淡苔薄；脉细弱

④ Spleen Qi Deficiency脾气虚

— Spleen fails to transform fluids → Phlegm source active升不及——脾失运化→痰源持续活跃
Middle-stage. The Spleen is producing Phlegm continuously — the latent Phlegm reservoir is constantly being replenished. Treating only Lung will have diminishing returns. Tonify Spleen to stop the Phlegm source.中期。脾持续产痰——伏痰的储备不断被补充。只治肺效果会递减。补脾以截断痰源。
  • Abundant sputum even between attacks; fatigue发作间期也有大量痰；疲乏
  • Poor appetite; loose stools; heavy limbs食欲不振；便溏；肢体沉重
  • Bloating after eating; pale complexion食后腹胀；面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale, tooth marks, greasy coat; Pulse: slippery weak舌淡齿痕苔腻；脉滑弱

⑤ Kidney Deficiency肾虚（阳虚/阴虚）

— Kidney cannot grasp Qi or warm the Lung升不及——肾不能纳气或温肺
Deepest root — always present in chronic asthma. Kidney Yang Xu: cold attacks, cold limbs, frequent urination. Kidney Yin Xu: dry throat, night sweats, red tongue. Both fail to grasp Qi. Most important remission-phase pattern to address.最深根本——慢性哮喘中总是存在。肾阳虚：寒哮，肢冷，尿频。肾阴虚：咽干，盗汗，舌红。两者都不能纳气。缓解期最重要的需处理证型。
  • Dyspnea on minimal exertion; breathlessness worse lying flat轻微劳累即气促；平卧时气短加重
  • Low back and knee soreness; dizziness腰膝酸软；头晕
  • Yang Xu: cold limbs, pale tongue, frequent urination, slippery pulse阳虚：肢冷，舌淡，尿频，脉沉迟
  • Yin Xu: dry throat, night sweats, red tongue little coat, thin rapid pulse阴虚：咽干，盗汗，舌红少苔，脉细数
Decision Steps破案决策步骤
Step 1:第一步： Currently wheezing/dyspneic? → Attack phase. Between attacks? → Remission phase. 当前喘鸣/气促？→发作期。发作间期？→缓解期。
Step 2 (Attack):第二步（发作期）：White frothy sputum + cold + pale → ① warm and expel. Yellow thick sputum + fever + red face → ② clear and expel. 白色泡沫痰+寒冷+面白→①寒哮，温化。黄色稠厚痰+发热+面红→②热哮，清化。
Step 3 (Remission):第三步（缓解期）： SOB + sweat + colds easily → ③ Lung Xu. Abundant Phlegm + fatigue + poor appetite → ④ Spleen Xu. Exertion SOB + low back + cold/dry signs → ⑤ Kidney Xu. 气短+自汗+易感冒→③肺虚。痰多+疲乏+食少→④脾虚。劳则气促+腰酸+寒/燥象→⑤肾虚。
Step 4:第四步： Chronic asthma almost always has combined deficiencies — Lung + Spleen + Kidney. Prioritize: Kidney Yang Xu → warm Kidney + grasp Qi first; Kidney Yin Xu → nourish Yin + supplement Kidney first. Then address Spleen and Lung. 慢性哮喘几乎总是复合虚损——肺+脾+肾。优先顺序：肾阳虚→温肾纳气优先；肾阴虚→滋阴补肾优先。然后处理脾和肺。
⚠ SAFETY:安全警示： Severe acute asthma attack with cyanosis, inability to speak, accessory muscle use, SpO₂ <90% → medical emergency. Do not attempt acupuncture as primary treatment — call emergency services immediately. TCM is adjunct to, not substitute for, emergency bronchodilator therapy in severe attacks. 严重急性哮喘发作伴发绀、不能言语、辅助肌使用、SpO₂<90%→医疗急症。不要以针灸作为主要治疗——立即拨打急救电话。严重发作中中医是急症支气管扩张药治疗的辅助而非替代。
Two completely separate acupuncture protocols: attack-phase (open airway, expel Phlegm — always reducing or even technique) and remission-phase (tonify deficient organs — always tonification + moxa for Yang Xu). The base point for attack phase is Ding Chuan (EX-B-1) — the classical empirical asthma point not found in the regular channels.两套完全独立的针灸方案：发作期（开气道，驱痰——始终泻法或平补平泻）和缓解期（补益虚损脏腑——阳虚始终补法+灸）。发作期基础穴是定喘（EX-B-1）——不在正经中的经典经验性哮喘穴。
Attack Phase Base Points — All Attack Patterns发作期基础穴位——所有发作期证型
EX-B-1 + BL 13
Ding Chuan + Feishu · Asthma-Calming + Lung Back-Shu定喘 + 肺俞 · 定喘穴 + 肺背俞穴
The essential attack-phase pair — empirically specific for wheezing and dyspnea发作期必用穴对——经验性专治喘鸣和呼吸困难
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
Ding Chuan (EX-B-1) is located 0.5 cun lateral to GV 14 — it is an empirical point with no classical channel attribution, but centuries of clinical use have established it as the most reliably effective single point for stopping wheezing. It directly regulates the Lung's descending function and relaxes bronchospasm. BL 13 (Lung Back-Shu) communicates directly with the Lung organ — during an attack, stimulating BL 13 directly promotes Lung Qi descent and opens the airway. Together, Ding Chuan opens the airway empirically while BL 13 addresses the Lung organ's functional disruption — they work at different levels and reinforce each other. Electroacupuncture (2 Hz, mild intensity) on this pair during an acute attack can significantly accelerate airway opening.定喘（EX-B-1）位于大椎旁开0.5寸——无经典经脉归属的经验穴，但数百年临床使用确立了其作为阻止喘鸣最可靠有效的单一穴位。直接调节肺的肃降功能，缓解支气管痉挛。肺俞（肺背俞穴）直接与肺脏沟通——发作期刺激肺俞直接促进肺气肃降，开通气道。合用，定喘经验性开通气道，肺俞处理肺脏的功能紊乱——两者作用于不同层面，相互强化。急性发作时在此穴对使用电针（2Hz，轻度强度）可显著加速气道开通。
Technique操作
Ding Chuan: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun toward spine, even method, bilateral. BL 13: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, reducing for excess, bilateral. Electroacupuncture 2 Hz optional. Moxa for Cold-Phlegm attack only.定喘：向脊柱斜刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻，双侧。肺俞：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，实证泻法，双侧。可选电针2Hz。仅寒哮发作时加灸。
LU 7 + CV 22
Lieque + Tiantu · Lung Luo + Throat opening列缺 + 天突 · 肺经络穴 + 开喉穴
Open the Lung channel (LU 7) and directly relieve throat and airway constriction (CV 22)开肺经（列缺）并直接缓解咽喉和气道收缩（天突）
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LU 7 regulates the Lung's diffusing and descending functions from the channel level. CV 22 (Tiantu) is located at the suprasternal notch — directly over the trachea. Needling CV 22 with the specific technique (perpendicular first, then angled sharply downward behind the sternum) stimulates the tracheal and bronchial tissue directly, relieving the sensation of tightness and promoting expectoration. CV 22 technique is critical: after inserting 0.3 cun perpendicular, angle the needle sharply downward (posteriorly) 1–1.5 cun to follow the trachea. Incorrect technique risks pneumothorax or vascular injury. Only perform if trained in this technique.列缺从经络层面调节肺的宣发和肃降功能。天突（CV 22）位于胸骨上窝——直接在气管上方。以特定手法针刺天突（直刺后向下急转）直接刺激气管和支气管组织，缓解憋闷感，促进排痰。天突操作手法关键：直刺0.3寸后将针尖急转向下（向后）1–1.5寸沿气管方向。操作不当有气胸或血管损伤风险。仅在接受过此技术训练后操作。
Technique操作
LU 7: oblique toward elbow 0.5–0.8 cun, even method, bilateral. CV 22: perpendicular 0.3 cun, then angle needle sharply posterior-inferior 1–1.5 cun behind sternum. Even method. Moxa on LU 7 for Cold-Phlegm only.列缺：向肘部斜刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻，双侧。天突：直刺0.3寸后将针尖急转向胸骨后下方1–1.5寸。平补平泻。仅寒哮时列缺加灸。
① Cold-Phlegm — Add Warming Points① 寒哮——加温热穴位
GV 14 + BL 12 (moxa)
Dazhui + Fengmen · Yang-warming + Wind-expelling大椎 + 风门 · 温阳 + 祛风
Warm Yang and dispel Cold from the Wei Qi layer — the Cold-Phlegm attack addition温阳散寒于卫气层——寒哮发作期加穴
＋
Why为什么
Cold-Phlegm attack has Cold both in the Phlegm and at the body surface. GV 14 warms all Yang channels simultaneously; moxa on GV 14 drives Cold outward. BL 12 (Fengmen) expels the Cold-Wind that triggered the attack from its entry point. Cupping on BL 12 + BL 13 draws out Cold from the Lung surface — an important adjunct in Cold-Phlegm asthma. ST 40 added to transform the Phlegm itself.寒哮在痰邪中和体表都有寒邪。大椎同时温热所有阳经；大椎灸法将寒邪向外驱出。风门驱散触发发作的寒风邪气。风门+肺俞拔罐将寒邪从肺表面抽出——寒哮的重要辅助治疗。加丰隆化痰邪本身。
Technique操作
GV 14: oblique upward 0.5–1 cun + moxa 15 min. BL 12: oblique + cupping 10 min. ST 40: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, even method, bilateral.大椎：向上斜刺0.5–1寸+灸15分钟。风门：斜刺+拔罐10分钟。丰隆：直刺1–1.5寸，平补平泻，双侧。
② Heat-Phlegm — Add Cooling Points (No moxa)② 热哮——加凉性穴位（不灸）
LI 11 + ST 40
Quchi + Fenglong · Clear Heat + Transform Phlegm曲池 + 丰隆 · 清热 + 化痰
Clear the Heat component and transform the Phlegm simultaneously — the Heat-Phlegm essential addition同时清热成分和化痰——热哮必加穴位
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
Heat-Phlegm asthma has two simultaneous targets: the Heat component (LI 11 — clears Yangming Heat systemically) and the Phlegm component (ST 40 — transforms Phlegm, descends Stomach Qi). LU 5 (Water point of Lung) added — it cools and descends Lung Qi, specifically clearing Heat from within the Lung while promoting the downward flow that is obstructed during an attack.热哮有两个同时的靶点：热的成分（曲池——全身清阳明热）和痰的成分（丰隆——化痰，降胃气）。加尺泽（肺经水穴）——凉降肺气，专门从肺内清热，同时促进发作时被阻塞的向下流动。
Technique操作
LI 11: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. ST 40: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. LU 5: perpendicular 1 cun, reducing, bilateral. No moxa anywhere in Heat-Phlegm attack.曲池：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。丰隆：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。尺泽：直刺1寸，泻法，双侧。热哮发作任何穴位均不灸。
Remission Phase — Tonification Protocols缓解期——补益方案
③ Lung Xu: BL 13 + LU 9 + CV 6
Feishu + Taiyuan + Qihai肺俞 + 太渊 + 气海
Tonify Lung Qi and consolidate the surface — prevent trigger-induced attacks补肺气，固护体表——防止诱因性发作
＋
Protocol方案
BL 13 tonification + moxa (direct Lung organ tonification). LU 9 tonification (Source point — replenishes Lung Qi). CV 6 tonification + moxa (Sea of Qi — overall Qi foundation). Add ST 36 to build Middle Jiao Qi that generates Lung Qi (Earth generates Metal). All tonification technique. Weekly sessions. Combine with Yu Ping Feng San to consolidate the Wei Qi surface.肺俞补法+灸（直接补肺脏）。太渊补法（原穴——补充肺气）。气海补法+灸（气之海——整体气机基础）。加足三里建立生成肺气的中焦之气（土生金）。均补法。每周一次。配合玉屏风散固护卫表。
④ Spleen Xu: BL 20 + ST 36 + ST 40
Pishu + Zusanli + Fenglong脾俞 + 足三里 + 丰隆
Tonify Spleen to stop Phlegm production at source — cut off the latent Phlegm supply补脾以从源头截断痰液产生——切断伏痰的补给
＋
Protocol方案
BL 20 tonification + moxa (Spleen Back-Shu). ST 36 tonification + moxa (build Middle Jiao Qi). ST 40 even method (gently transform existing Phlegm without depleting — note: in remission, ST 40 is used with even technique, not reducing, because the Phlegm is latent not acute). CV 12 tonification (Middle Jiao hub). The strategic goal: if Phlegm production reduces, the latent reservoir shrinks, and attacks become less frequent. This is the most direct long-term prevention strategy.脾俞补法+灸（脾背俞穴）。足三里补法+灸（建立中焦之气）。丰隆平补平泻（温和化已有痰而不耗竭——注意：缓解期丰隆用平补平泻，不用泻法，因为痰是伏痰而非急性痰）。中脘补法（中焦枢纽）。战略目标：若痰的产生减少，伏痰储备缩减，发作变得不那么频繁。这是最直接的长期预防策略。
⑤ Kidney Xu: BL 23 + KI 3 + CV 4 + GV 4
Shenshu + Taixi + Guanyuan + Mingmen肾俞 + 太溪 + 关元 + 命门
Tonify Kidney to grasp Qi — address the deepest root of chronic asthma补肾纳气——处理慢性哮喘最深的根本
＋
Protocol方案
BL 23 tonification + moxa (Kidney Back-Shu — most direct Kidney access). KI 3 tonification (Source — replenishes Kidney Essence and Qi). CV 4 (Guanyuan) tonification + moxa (Meeting of three Yin and Ren Mai — the root of Yuan Qi; warming CV 4 with moxa is the most powerful Yang-tonifying technique in the body). GV 4 (Mingmen) + moxa (Gate of Life — Kidney Yang). For Kidney Yin Xu: omit moxa on GV 4, add SP 6 and KI 6 tonification to nourish Yin. For Kidney Yang Xu: moxa all points, especially CV 4 and GV 4 — this is the most important treatment session in Yang-deficiency chronic asthma.肾俞补法+灸（肾背俞穴——最直接的肾的入口）。太溪补法（原穴——补充肾精和肾气）。关元补法+灸（三阴与任脉交会——元气之根；艾灸关元是全身最有力的温阳手法）。命门+灸（生命之门——肾阳）。肾阴虚：去命门灸，加三阴交和照海补法以滋阴。肾阳虚：所有穴位均灸，尤其是关元和命门——这是阳虚慢性哮喘最重要的治疗。
Five formulas for two phases. The attack-phase formulas share one key herb: She Gan (Belamcanda) — the most specific herb for opening the bronchial passage in TCM. The remission-phase formulas share the goal of tonifying Spleen-Kidney to reduce Phlegm formation. Never use attack-phase formulas during remission, or vice versa.两个阶段五张方。发作期方剂共享一个关键药：射干——中医中开通支气管通道最专效的药物。缓解期方剂共享补脾肾以减少痰液形成的目标。绝不在缓解期用发作期方剂，反之亦然。
Attack Phase Formulas发作期方剂
① : She Gan Ma Huang Tang① 寒哮：射干麻黄汤
Jin Gui Yao Lue, Zhang Zhongjing — the classical Cold-Phlegm wheezing formula出处：《金匮要略》张仲景——经典寒痰喘鸣方
Active wheezing + white frothy sputum + cold sensation + no thirst + pale tongue white slippery coat当前喘鸣+白色泡沫痰+畏寒+口不渴+舌淡苔白滑
Formula logic:方解逻辑： She Gan (Belamcanda rhizome) is the chief — it specifically opens the throat and bronchial passage, clears Phlegm from the airway, and is the most targeted herb for wheezing in the TCM pharmacopoeia. Ma Huang opens the Lung surface and promotes Qi descent — its bronchodilating action is well-documented. Sheng Jiang and Xi Xin warm the interior and dispel Cold-Phlegm. Ban Xia and Kuan Dong Hua descend Lung Qi and transform Phlegm. Wu Wei Zi astringes the Lung to prevent further Qi leakage. Da Zao harmonizes. The formula pairs the opening action (She Gan, Ma Huang) with the warming action (Xi Xin, Sheng Jiang) and the astringing action (Wu Wei Zi) — open, warm, and consolidate simultaneously. This three-directional logic is Zhang Zhongjing's characteristic approach. 射干是君药——专门开通咽喉和支气管通道，清除气道痰邪，是中医药典中最针对喘鸣的药物。麻黄开肺表，促进气机下降——其支气管扩张作用有充分记载。生姜和细辛温内散寒痰。半夏和款冬花降肺气化痰。五味子收摄肺气防止进一步气机外泄。大枣调和。本方将开通动作（射干、麻黄）与温热动作（细辛、生姜）和收摄动作（五味子）配对——同时开通、温化和固摄。这种三向逻辑是张仲景的特征性方法。
Open bronchial passage射干（开气道） Open Lung, bronchodilate麻黄（开肺，扩支气管） Warm interior, dispel Cold-Phlegm细辛（温内散寒痰） Warm, dispel Cold生姜（温散寒邪） Descend Qi, transform Phlegm半夏（降气化痰） Descend Lung, stop wheezing款冬花（降肺止喘） Astringe Lung, consolidate五味子（敛肺固摄）
② : Ding Chuan Tang② 热哮：定喘汤
She Sheng Zhong Miao Fang — "Asthma-Calming Decoction" — Heat-Phlegm attack formula出处：《摄生众妙方》——「定喘汤」——热痰发作方
Active wheezing + yellow thick sputum + fever + red face + thirst + red tongue yellow greasy coat + slippery rapid pulse当前喘鸣+痰稠黄+发热+面红+口渴+舌红苔黄腻+脉滑数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Ma Huang opens the Lung and descends Qi — here used in combination with Bai Guo (Ginkgo) which astringes the Lung to prevent over-dispersion. Huang Qin and Sang Bai Pi clear Lung Heat. Kuan Dong Hua and Zi Su Zi descend Lung Qi and stop wheezing. Ban Xia transforms Phlegm. Xing Ren descends Lung Qi and moistens. Gan Cao harmonizes. The key tension in this formula: Ma Huang opens (Yang, outward), Bai Guo astringes (Yin, inward) — their balance is what makes Ding Chuan Tang effective: open the airway while preventing exhaustion of Lung Qi. This is Zhang Zhongjing's open-and-consolidate logic again, applied to Heat-Phlegm. 麻黄开肺降气——这里与敛肺的白果（防止过度发散）配合使用。黄芩和桑白皮清肺热。款冬花和紫苏子降肺气止喘。半夏化痰。杏仁降肺气润肺。甘草调和。本方的关键张力：麻黄开通（阳，向外），白果收摄（阴，向内）——两者的平衡使定喘汤有效：开通气道同时防止肺气耗竭。这是张仲景开通-收摄逻辑的再次应用，用于热痰。
Open Lung, descend Qi麻黄（开肺降气） Astringe Lung, check dispersion白果（敛肺，防过散） Clear Lung Heat黄芩（清肺热） Clear Lung Heat, descend桑白皮（清肺热肃降） Descend Lung, stop wheezing款冬花（降肺止喘） Descend Qi, transform Phlegm紫苏子（降气化痰） Transform Phlegm半夏（化痰）
Remission Phase Formulas缓解期方剂
③ Lung Xu: Yu Ping Feng San (same as Qi-deficiency cold prevention)③ 肺虚：玉屏风散（同气虚感冒预防方）
Dan Xi Xin Fa — consolidate Lung Wei Qi surface to prevent trigger-induced attacks出处：《丹溪心法》——固护肺卫表面以防诱因性发作
Between attacks + shortness of breath + spontaneous sweating + prone to colds + pale tongue + thin weak pulse发作间期+气短+自汗+易感冒+舌淡+脉细弱
Cross-disease insight:异病同治洞见： Yu Ping Feng San appears here for the third time — first for Qi-deficiency cold prevention, now for Lung-Xu asthma remission. The same formula works for both because the underlying mechanism is identical: Lung-Spleen Qi deficiency → Wei Qi too weak to consolidate the surface → susceptible to Wind invasion (which, in asthma, triggers attacks; in colds, causes illness). The formula's mechanism does not change between diseases — it tonifies the source of Wei Qi and consolidates the surface. 玉屏风散在此第三次出现——先用于气虚感冒预防，现在用于肺虚哮喘缓解期。同一方剂用于两种疾病，因为内在机制相同：肺脾气虚→卫气太弱无法固护体表→易受风邪侵袭（哮喘中触发发作；感冒中引起疾病）。方剂机制不随疾病改变——补充卫气来源并固护体表。
30g Consolidate Wei Qi surface黄芪30g（固护卫表） Tonify Spleen-Earth白术（健脾土） Expel Wind without depleting防风（祛风不耗气）
④⑤ Spleen + Kidney Xu: Liu Jun Zi Tang + Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan④⑤ 脾肾两虚：六君子汤合金匮肾气丸
Liu Jun Zi Tang: Yi Xue Zheng Zhuan. Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan: Jin Gui Yao Lue — the classical Spleen-Kidney combined treatment for chronic asthma remission六君子汤：《医学正传》。金匮肾气丸：《金匮要略》——慢性哮喘缓解期经典脾肾合治
Between attacks + abundant Phlegm + fatigue + poor appetite (Spleen) + cold limbs + dyspnea on exertion + low back ache (Kidney Yang)发作间期+痰多+疲乏+食少（脾）+肢冷+劳则气促+腰酸（肾阳）
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Liu Jun Zi Tang is Si Jun Zi Tang (the four Qi-tonifying herbs: Ren Shen, Bai Zhu, Fu Ling, Gan Cao) plus Ban Xia and Chen Pi — it simultaneously tonifies the Spleen Qi (stopping Phlegm production at the source) and transforms existing Phlegm. This is the formula that addresses pattern ④ — using Earth to generate Metal while also clearing the Phlegm the Earth has been producing.

Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan (Kidney Qi Pill) warms Kidney Yang and tonifies Kidney Essence — it enables the Kidney to grasp Qi and warms the Lung from below. The combination covers the two deepest layers of chronic asthma: Spleen (Phlegm source) and Kidney (Qi root). For Kidney Yin Xu: replace Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan with Liu Wei Di Huang Wan — same Kidney base, without the warming herbs (Gui Zhi, Fu Zi). 六君子汤是四君子汤（四味补气药：人参、白术、茯苓、甘草）加半夏和陈皮——同时补脾气（从源头截断痰液产生）和化已有痰。此方处理④型——用土生金，同时清除土一直在产生的痰。

金匮肾气丸（肾气丸）温肾阳，补肾精——使肾能够纳气，从下温肺。两方合用覆盖慢性哮喘最深的两个层面：脾（痰源）和肾（气根）。肾阴虚：以六味地黄丸替换金匮肾气丸——同样的肾基础，但没有温热药（桂枝、附子）。
Tonify Qi (Liu Jun)人参（补气，六君子） Tonify Spleen, dry Damp白术（健脾燥湿） Transform Phlegm半夏（化痰） Resolve Damp, support Spleen茯苓（渗湿健脾） Nourish Kidney Yin-Essence熟地（滋肾阴填精） Warm Kidney Yang附子（温肾阳） Warm Yang, promote circulation桂枝（温阳通脉） Astringe Kidney Qi山茱萸（收摄肾气）
Three cases: one Cold-Phlegm attack, one Heat-Phlegm attack, and one chronic remission-phase case showing the Spleen-Kidney combined approach. The first two cases are the attack-phase contrast. The third case demonstrates the long-term treatment strategy that most students never see — because patients rarely return for prevention.三个案例：一个寒哮发作，一个热哮发作，一个慢性缓解期案例展示脾肾合治方法。前两个是发作期对比案例。第三个展示大多数学生从未见过的长期治疗策略——因为患者很少回来接受预防治疗。
Case 1 Cold-Phlegm Attack案例一 · 寒哮发作
Presentation主诉
Male, 38. Asthma since childhood; attacks triggered by cold air and winter. Currently having an attack — began 2 hours ago after cycling in cold wind. Audible wheezing, dyspnea. Copious thin white frothy sputum. Feels cold, needs a jacket inside the clinic. Pale face and lips. No thirst. Uses a salbutamol inhaler for emergencies — has used it once already today. Tongue: pale, white slippery coat. Pulse: floating tight, slippery. 男性，38岁。童年起哮喘；寒冷空气和冬季诱发发作。目前正在发作——2小时前在冷风中骑车后开始。可闻及喘鸣，呼吸困难。大量稀薄白色泡沫痰。感觉寒冷，在诊所内需要穿夹克。面色和唇色苍白。口不渴。备有沙丁胺醇吸入器应急——今天已用过一次。舌淡苔白滑，脉浮紧滑。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic + Safety Assessment气机分析+安全评估
Cold trigger + white frothy sputum + cold sensation + pale tongue white slippery coat = , + confirmed.

Cold air directly activated cold-nature latent Phlegm. The Phlegm surged into the airways → Lung Qi could not descend or exit normally → wheezing and dyspnea. Cold contracted the bronchi → high-pitched tight wheeze (consistent with white sputum, no fever, no thirst).

Safety check before proceeding: Patient can speak in full sentences (mild-moderate severity, not severe). Lips are pale but not cyanotic. Has already used one dose of salbutamol with partial relief. If SpO₂ were below 92%, lips cyanotic, patient unable to speak — stop, call emergency services immediately, have patient use inhaler again while waiting. This patient can be treated with TCM as primary/adjunct. 寒邪诱发+白色泡沫痰+畏寒+舌淡苔白滑=寒哮，出入失常+升太过确认。

冷空气直接激活寒性伏痰（宿痰伏肺）。痰邪涌入气道→肺气无法正常肃降或出入→喘鸣和呼吸困难。寒性收缩支气管→高调紧绷喘鸣（与白痰、无发热、不渴一致）。

治疗前安全评估：患者能说完整句子（轻中度，非重症）。口唇苍白但无发绀。已用一次沙丁胺醇，部分缓解。若SpO₂低于92%，口唇发绀，患者无法言语——停止，立即拨打急救电话，等待期间让患者再次使用吸入器。此患者可以中医为主/辅助治疗。
Treatment Plan — Attack Phase治疗方案——发作期
Acupuncture: EX-B-1 (Ding Chuan) bilateral + BL 13 bilateral (even, + moxa) · LU 7 bilateral (even + moxa) · CV 22 (even — airway opening) · GV 14 (even + moxa) · BL 12 (cupping 10 min) · ST 40 bilateral (even — transform Phlegm)

Formula: She Gan Ma Huang Tang — 3–5 day acute course

Outcome in session: Wheezing should audibly reduce within 20–30 minutes of needling. Ask patient to assess breathing at 15-minute intervals. If no improvement after 30 minutes → have patient use inhaler again; reassess whether further TCM treatment is appropriate today.

Transition to remission phase: As soon as the attack fully resolves (typically 3–7 days), begin remission-phase assessment. Identify which organs are deficient (Lung, Spleen, Kidney) and start the appropriate remission formula. The most important clinical message: most asthma patients receive only attack-phase treatment and never address the root. This is why their attacks continue indefinitely. The practitioner's job is to initiate remission-phase treatment and explain clearly why it is essential. 针灸：双侧定喘+双侧肺俞（平补平泻+灸）· 双侧列缺（平补平泻+灸）· 天突（平补平泻——开气道）· 大椎（平补平泻+灸）· 风门（拔罐10分钟）· 双侧丰隆（平补平泻——化痰）

方药：射干麻黄汤——急性3–5天疗程

治疗中预期：针刺后20–30分钟内喘鸣应可闻及减轻。每15分钟请患者评估呼吸。若30分钟后无改善→让患者再次使用吸入器；重新评估今天是否继续中医治疗。

过渡到缓解期：发作完全消退（通常3–7天）后立即开始缓解期评估。确定哪些脏腑亏虚（肺、脾、肾），开始相应缓解期方剂。最重要的临床信息：大多数哮喘患者只接受发作期治疗，从不处理根本。这就是为什么发作无限期持续。临床医生的工作是启动缓解期治疗并清楚解释为什么这是必不可少的。
Case 2 Heat-Phlegm Attack — The Contrast案例二 · 热哮发作——对比案例
Presentation主诉
Female, 29. Asthma since adolescence; attacks triggered by dust, pollen, and respiratory infections. Currently having an attack — began yesterday with cold symptoms that progressed to wheezing by this morning. Dyspnea and wheezing. Thick yellow-green sputum, hard to expectorate. Feverish (38.1°C), red face, sweating. Thirsty for cold water. Restless. Tongue: red, yellow greasy coat. Pulse: slippery rapid. 女性，29岁。青春期起哮喘；灰尘、花粉和呼吸道感染诱发。目前正在发作——昨天感冒症状开始，今晨进展为喘鸣。呼吸困难和喘鸣。痰稠厚黄绿，难以咯出。发热（38.1°C），面红，出汗。渴喜冷水。烦躁。舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数。
Key Contrast with Case 1与案例一的关键对比
Yellow sputum + fever + red face + thirst + restlessness + red tongue yellow coat = confirmed.

Side-by-side comparison:
Case 1: Cold trigger → white frothy sputum → cold sensation → pale tongue white coat → → warm and expel (moxa, Xi Xin, Sheng Jiang)
Case 2: Infection trigger → yellow thick sputum → fever → red tongue yellow coat → → clear and expel (no moxa, Huang Qin, Sang Bai Pi)

Applying Case 1's treatment to this patient (moxa, warming herbs) would intensify the fever and Heat-Phlegm, potentially worsening the attack severely. This is the attack-phase equivalent of giving warming herbs to a Wind-Heat cold patient.

The transition from cold symptoms to wheezing (Wind-Cold → Heat-Phlegm transformation) is also a teaching point: untreated respiratory infections in asthma patients frequently trigger attacks as the Cold transforms to Heat and activates the latent Phlegm. 黄色痰+发热+面红+口渴+烦躁+舌红苔黄=热哮确认。

并排对比：
案例一：寒邪诱发→白色泡沫痰→畏寒→舌淡苔白→寒哮→温化（灸，细辛，生姜）
案例二：感染诱发→黄色稠厚痰→发热→舌红苔黄→热哮→清化（不灸，黄芩，桑白皮）

对此患者使用案例一的治疗（灸、温热药）会加重发热和热痰，可能严重恶化发作。这是发作期等同于给风热感冒患者用温热药的错误。

从感冒症状到喘鸣的转变（风寒→热痰转化）也是一个教学点：哮喘患者未治疗的呼吸道感染频繁触发发作，因为寒邪化热激活伏痰。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (no moxa): EX-B-1 bilateral + BL 13 bilateral (reducing) · LU 7 bilateral (reducing) · LI 11 bilateral (reducing — fever) · ST 40 bilateral (reducing — Phlegm) · LU 5 bilateral (reducing — cool and descend Lung) · CV 22 (even)

Formula: Ding Chuan Tang — 5–7 days

Important note: If this is a bacterial infection driving the attack (bacterial pneumonia, bacterial bronchitis), the fever will not resolve with TCM alone. The patient should seek medical assessment for antibiotics if fever exceeds 39°C or is unresponsive to treatment after 24 hours. 针灸（不灸）：双侧定喘+双侧肺俞（泻法）· 双侧列缺（泻法）· 双侧曲池（泻法——退热）· 双侧丰隆（泻法——化痰）· 双侧尺泽（泻法——凉降肺气）· 天突（平补平泻）

方药：定喘汤——5–7天

重要说明：若是细菌感染驱动发作（细菌性肺炎、细菌性支气管炎），单纯中医治疗发热不会消退。若体温超过39°C或24小时内对治疗无反应，患者应寻求抗生素医疗评估。
Case 3 · Chronic Remission Phase — Spleen-Kidney Combined Treatment案例三 · 慢性缓解期——脾肾合治
Presentation主诉
Male, 55. Asthma for 25 years. Currently between attacks — last attack was 3 weeks ago. Comes to prevent future attacks. Average of 6–8 attacks per year, mostly in autumn and winter. Uses inhaled corticosteroids daily. Shortness of breath on climbing stairs. Chronic fatigue. Cold limbs year-round, especially feet. Low back aching, worse in cold. Large amounts of white phlegm daily. Poor appetite. Loose stools. Frequent urination at night (2–3 times). Tongue: pale, tooth marks, white greasy coat. Pulse: deep slow, slippery at guan, weak at chi. 男性，55岁。哮喘25年。目前在发作间期——上次发作在3周前。前来预防未来发作。每年平均6–8次发作，多在秋冬季。每日使用吸入性糖皮质激素。爬楼梯时气短。慢性疲乏。全年肢冷，尤其脚冷。腰部酸痛，遇寒加重。每日大量白痰。食欲不振。便溏。夜间尿频（2–3次）。舌淡齿痕苔白腻，脉沉迟，关部滑，尺部弱。
Three-Organ Analysis + Long-Term Strategy三脏分析+长期策略
This patient has all three remission-phase deficiencies simultaneously — the typical picture of chronic long-standing asthma.

Lung Xu signs: Shortness of breath on exertion (Lung cannot sustain descent during activity)
Spleen Xu signs: Large daily Phlegm + poor appetite + loose stools + tooth marks (Spleen failing to transform → continuous Phlegm production replenishing the latent reservoir)
Kidney Yang Xu signs: Cold limbs + low back ache (worse in cold) + nocturia (Kidney not warming and grasping) + deep slow pulse at chi (Kidney Yang insufficient to warm the pulse)

Priority of treatment: Kidney Yang Xu is the deepest and longest-standing — address first. Then Spleen (stop the Phlegm supply). Then Lung (consolidate the surface). The practitioner cannot do everything at once — prioritize the deepest deficiency.

Realistic expectations: 25 years of accumulated deficiency and latent Phlegm cannot be resolved in weeks. Explain clearly: this is a 6–12 month commitment. Attacks should reduce in frequency and severity within 3 months if the patient is consistent. The goal is not zero attacks — it is fewer, milder, shorter attacks with better baseline function. 此患者同时具有三个缓解期虚损——慢性长期哮喘的典型表现。

肺虚体征：劳则气短（肺不能在活动时维持肃降）
脾虚体征：每日大量白痰+食少+便溏+齿痕（脾失运化→持续产痰，不断补充伏痰储备）
肾阳虚体征：肢冷+腰酸（遇寒加重）+夜尿（肾不温化和纳气）+尺脉沉迟（肾阳不足以温暖脉象）

治疗优先顺序：肾阳虚是最深且最长期的——首先处理。然后脾（截断痰源）。然后肺（固护体表）。不能同时做所有事情——优先最深的虚损。

现实预期：25年积累的虚损和伏痰不能在数周内解决。清楚解释：这是6–12个月的承诺。若患者坚持，3个月内发作频率和严重程度应减少。目标不是零发作——而是更少、更轻、更短的发作，基础功能改善。
Long-Term Treatment Plan长期治疗方案
Phase 1 (Months 1–2) — Warm Kidney Yang, Grasp Qi:
Acupuncture: BL 23 + GV 4 (heavy moxa) + CV 4 (heavy moxa) + KI 3 bilateral (tonification) — weekly sessions
Formula: Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan + Liu Jun Zi Tang combined

Phase 2 (Months 3–4) — Tonify Spleen, Stop Phlegm:
Acupuncture: BL 20 + ST 36 (tonification + moxa) + ST 40 (even) + CV 12 — continue weekly
Formula: Liu Jun Zi Tang as base, reduce Jin Gui if warmer weather reduces cold signs

Phase 3 (Months 5+) — Consolidate Lung, Prevent Triggers:
Acupuncture: BL 13 + LU 9 + ST 36 (maintenance) — biweekly or monthly
Formula: Yu Ping Feng San — sustained, especially in autumn (before cold season)

Corticosteroid note: Do not advise the patient to reduce inhaled corticosteroids without coordination with their prescribing physician. As asthma control improves, the physician may choose to step down medication — but this is a medical decision.
