TCM and inhaled corticosteroids work synergistically; one does not replace the other. 第一阶段（1–2个月）——温肾阳，纳气：
针灸：肾俞+命门（重灸）+关元（重灸）+双侧太溪（补法）——每周一次
方药：金匮肾气丸+六君子汤合方

第二阶段（3–4个月）——补脾，截痰：
针灸：脾俞+足三里（补法+灸）+丰隆（平补平泻）+中脘——继续每周
方药：六君子汤为基础，若天气转暖寒象减轻则减少金匮剂量

第三阶段（5个月+）——固肺，防诱因：
针灸：肺俞+太渊+足三里（维持）——每两周或每月一次
方药：玉屏风散——持续，特别是秋季（寒冷季节前）

关于糖皮质激素：不要建议患者在未与处方医生协调的情况下减少吸入性糖皮质激素。随着哮喘控制改善，医生可能选择降级用药——但这是医学决定。中医和吸入性糖皮质激素协同起效；一方不能替代另一方。
Lung System肺系病证
Common Cold感冒
Root: Wind is the primary vector — it always carries a secondary pathogen. The Lung-Wei system governs the body's exterior; when Wei Qi is breached, Wind enters and disrupts both the diffusing and descending functions of the Lung simultaneously. The nature of the secondary pathogen determines the entire treatment direction.根本：风为百病之长——风邪总是携带次生邪气。肺卫系统主司体表；当卫气被突破，风邪入侵，同时扰乱肺的宣发和肃降功能。次生邪气的性质决定整个治疗方向。
The first and most critical split: chills predominate (Wind-Cold) vs fever predominates (Wind-Heat). This single finding — which is stronger, the cold sensation or the heat sensation — determines the entire treatment direction before any other questioning. Getting this wrong reverses the treatment and worsens the patient. 首要关键分辨：恶寒为主（风寒）还是发热为主（风热）。这个单一发现——寒的感觉还是热的感觉更强——在任何其他问诊之前决定整个治疗方向。判断错误会逆转治疗并使患者病情加重。
Core Framework · The Lung-Wei System and Wind's Entry核心框架 · 肺卫系统与风邪入侵
The Lung controls the Wei Qi — the defensive layer that circulates in the exterior of the body, warming the skin and muscles, regulating pores, and preventing pathogen entry. Wind is the "spearhead" of all external pathogens: it moves quickly, attacks the surface first, and always carries another factor — Cold, Heat, Damp, or Dryness. When Wei Qi is weakened (fatigue, stress, seasonal change) or the pathogen is strong, Wind breaches the surface → Lung's diffusing function is obstructed → the entire Lung Qi mechanism is disrupted → all exterior symptoms arise simultaneously. 肺主卫气——卫气是循行于体表的防御层，温煦皮肤肌肉、调节腠理、防止邪气入侵。风是所有外邪的「先锋」：移动迅速，首先攻击表面，总是携带另一邪气——寒、热、湿或燥。当卫气虚弱（疲劳、压力、季节变换）或邪气强盛时，风邪突破表层→肺的宣发功能受阻→整个肺气机制被打乱→所有表证同时出现。
Wind-Cold (+): Cold contracts the pores tightly shut → Wei Qi cannot circulate → strong chills. Lung Qi cannot diffuse outward or descend → congestion, cough, aching. Cold has not yet transformed to Heat → no thirst, white sputum, no sore throat.

Wind-Heat (+ with Heat): Heat expands and pushes outward → fever predominates, less cold sensation. Heat scorches the throat → sore throat. Heat transforms fluids → yellow sputum, yellow nasal discharge, thirst.

Summer-Damp (+): Damp obstructs the Middle Jiao while Wind-Heat attacks the surface simultaneously. The heaviness and nausea are from Damp invading the Spleen. Unique to summer months.

Qi-Deficiency Cold (→): Underlying Qi deficiency → Wei Qi is chronically weak → repeated colds, prolonged recovery. The root must be tonified between episodes. 风寒（升太过+出入失常）：寒性收缩将毛孔紧闭→卫气不能循行→明显恶寒。肺气不能宣发或肃降→鼻塞、咳嗽、身痛。寒邪尚未化热→口不渴，痰白，无咽痛。

风热（升太过+出入失常，兼热）：热性膨胀向外推→发热为主，恶寒较轻。热灼咽喉→咽喉肿痛。热化津液→黄痰，黄涕，口渴。

暑湿感冒（出入失常+降不及）：湿邪阻滞中焦，同时风热侵袭表面。沉重和恶心来自湿邪犯脾。仅见于夏季。

气虚感冒（升不及→出入失常）：素体气虚→卫气长期虚弱→反复感冒，恢复缓慢。发作间期必须补益根本。
Group 1 · The Core Split — Chills vs Fever第一组 · 核心分辨——恶寒与发热
Thermal寒热
Which is stronger — the sensation of cold (needing extra clothing, blankets, shivering) or the sensation of heat (fever, feeling flushed, wanting cool air)?哪个更强——寒的感觉（需要加衣、盖被、发抖）还是热的感觉（发热、面热潮红、想要凉爽空气）？
→ The stronger sensation identifies the primary pathogen and determines treatment direction entirely→ 更强的感觉识别主要病邪，完全决定治疗方向
＋
Mechanism · Why Chills vs Fever Identifies the Pathogen机理 · 为什么恶寒与发热能识别病邪
Chills predominate (Wind-Cold): Cold contracts the pores and traps Wei Qi inside — the Wei Qi cannot circulate properly in the exterior to warm the skin. Result: strong chills despite the body generating heat internally. The pores are closed → no sweating → the cold pathogen cannot exit. Treatment: open the pores with warming, dispersing herbs and points to release the Cold.

Fever predominates (Wind-Heat): Heat expands and pushes outward — the body's Yang Qi is fighting the Heat pathogen vigorously at the surface. The fever IS the Wei Qi fighting. Pores are partly open → mild sweating possible. Treatment: clear the Heat and gently open the surface with cooling herbs. Using warming herbs here would add Heat to Heat — catastrophic.

Both equal (early stage or transitional): The pathogen is just arriving or transitioning. Observe closely — within hours, one will predominate. Meanwhile, use neutral surface-releasing approach. 恶寒为主（风寒）：寒性收缩毛孔，将卫气困于内——卫气无法在体表正常循行以温煦皮肤。结果：即使体内产热，仍明显恶寒。毛孔关闭→不出汗→寒邪无法外出。治疗：用温热发散药物和穴位开通毛孔以解寒。

发热为主（风热）：热性膨胀向外推——身体阳气在体表奋力抗争热邪。发热就是卫气在战斗。毛孔部分开放→可能轻微出汗。治疗：用凉散药物清热并温和开表。这里用温热药会热上加热——灾难性后果。

两者相当（早期或过渡期）：邪气刚到来或处于过渡中。密切观察——数小时内会有一个占主导。同时用中性解表方法。
Direction答案指向
Chills >> fever恶寒>>发热
Wind-Cold — warm and disperse风寒——温散
Fever >> chills发热>>恶寒
Wind-Heat — cool and release风热——凉散
Equal + summer + nausea相当+夏季+恶心
Summer-Damp — clear Heat + resolve Damp暑湿——清热化湿
Sweat汗
Is there sweating, or is the skin completely dry despite feeling hot?有出汗吗，还是尽管感觉发热皮肤完全干燥？
→ No sweat = pores closed (Wind-Cold). Sweat present = pores open (Wind-Heat or Wei Qi Xu)→ 无汗=毛孔关闭（风寒）。有汗=毛孔开放（风热或卫气虚）
＋
Mechanism · Sweating Status Reveals Pore State机理 · 出汗状态揭示毛孔状态
No sweating (Wind-Cold): Cold contracts the pores shut — sweating is impossible even though the body is generating heat internally to fight the pathogen. This is why Wind-Cold patients feel intensely cold despite having a temperature. Treatment goal: open the pores with diaphoretic herbs (Ma Huang, Gui Zhi, Sheng Jiang) so the Cold can exit with the sweat.

Spontaneous sweating but still feels unwell (Wind-Heat or Wei Qi Xu): Wind-Heat: pores are partly open, mild sweating, but the Heat pathogen is too strong to be resolved by sweating alone. Wei Qi deficiency cold: the pores are too weak to close properly → spontaneous sweating → Wei Qi leaks out → immune defence collapses repeatedly. 无汗（风寒）：寒性收缩毛孔关闭——即使身体内部产热以对抗病邪，出汗也不可能。这就是为什么风寒患者尽管有体温仍感到极度寒冷。治疗目标：用发汗药（麻黄、桂枝、生姜）开通毛孔，使寒邪随汗外出。

自汗但仍感不适（风热或卫气虚）：风热：毛孔部分开放，轻微出汗，但热邪太强单靠出汗无法解决。气虚感冒：毛孔太弱无法正常关闭→自汗→卫气泄漏→免疫防御反复崩溃。
Direction答案指向
No sweat at all完全无汗
Wind-Cold — pores closed风寒——毛孔关闭
Mild sweat, still unwell轻微出汗，仍不适
Wind-Heat风热
Spontaneous sweat, repeated colds自汗，反复感冒
Wei Qi Xu — tonify between episodes卫气虚——发作间期补益
Group 2 · Nasal Discharge and Throat第二组 · 鼻涕与咽喉
Nasal鼻涕
Nasal discharge: clear and watery, or thick and yellow/green?鼻涕：清稀如水，还是稠厚色黄/绿？
→ Confirms the Hot/Cold split; tracks transformation during treatment→ 确认寒热之分；治疗过程中追踪转化
＋
Mechanism + Clinical Use机理+临床应用
Clear watery discharge (Wind-Cold): Cold does not transform fluids — they remain thin and clear. The nasal passage is congested (Cold contracts tissues) but the fluid produced is watery. The patient often has nasal congestion alternating with flooding of thin clear mucus.

Thick yellow/green discharge (Wind-Heat or Cold transforming to Heat): Heat "cooks" the nasal fluids into thick, colored mucus. Once the discharge turns yellow, the Cold has transformed to Heat — treatment must shift accordingly. Tracking nasal discharge color during treatment is a simple, reliable marker of whether the pathogen is clearing or transforming. 清稀鼻涕（风寒）：寒邪不化津液——津液保持稀薄清澈。鼻腔充血（寒性收缩组织），但产生的液体是水样的。患者常有鼻塞与大量稀薄清涕交替。

稠厚黄/绿鼻涕（风热或寒邪化热）：热邪将鼻腔液体「煎」成稠厚有色黏液。一旦鼻涕变黄，寒邪已化热——治疗必须相应转变。在治疗过程中追踪鼻涕颜色是判断邪气是否清退或转化的简单可靠标志。
Direction答案指向
Clear, watery清稀如水
Wind-Cold confirmed风寒确认
Thick yellow/green稠厚黄/绿
Wind-Heat or transformation风热或已化热
History病史
How many colds per year? Do they last longer than 10–14 days? Does the patient catch cold easily with mild exposure?每年感冒几次？是否持续超过10–14天？轻微受凉就容易感冒？
→ Frequent, prolonged, or easily-triggered colds = Wei Qi (Lung Qi) deficiency as underlying cause→ 频繁、迁延或轻易诱发的感冒=卫气（肺气）亏虚为内在原因
＋
Mechanism · The Qi-Deficiency Cold Pattern机理 · 气虚感冒的证型
Normal Wei Qi acts like a strong immune barrier — pathogens must be substantial to breach it. When Lung-Spleen Qi is deficient, Wei Qi is chronically inadequate — even weak pathogens can enter. The patient catches cold from minor exposure (a breeze, a slightly cool room). Once ill, recovery is slow because there is insufficient Qi to drive the pathogen out. The cold lingers for 2–3 weeks.

Treatment strategy shifts completely: During the cold, use gentle surface-releasing herbs (not strong diaphoretics — there is not enough Qi to sustain strong sweating). Between episodes: tonify Lung and Spleen Qi with Yu Ping Feng San to rebuild the Wei Qi barrier. This is the prevention phase — the most important part of treating Qi-deficiency cold. 正常卫气像强大的免疫屏障——邪气必须足够强才能突破。当肺脾之气亏虚，卫气长期不足——即使弱小的邪气也能入侵。患者因轻微暴露（一阵风、稍凉的房间）而感冒。一旦生病，恢复缓慢，因为没有足够的气来驱邪外出。感冒持续2–3周。

治疗策略完全改变：感冒期间用温和解表药（不用强力发汗药——没有足够的气来维持强力出汗）。发作间期：用玉屏风散补肺脾之气，重建卫气屏障。这是预防阶段——治疗气虚感冒最重要的部分。
Direction答案指向
3+ colds/year, prolonged每年3次以上，迁延
Qi Xu cold — treat root between episodes气虚感冒——发作间期治本
Four patterns. The Cold vs Heat split is determined in intake — by the time you reach this page, you should already know which half you are in. The Qi-deficiency pattern is the only one requiring a two-phase approach: acute treatment during the episode and prevention between episodes.四个证型。寒热之分在问诊中已确定——到达此页时，你应该已经知道自己在哪一半。气虚证型是唯一需要双阶段方法的：发作期急性治疗和发作间期预防。
+ External Wind Patterns升太过+出入失常 · 外感风邪类

① Wind-Cold风寒感冒

+ — Cold closes the exterior升太过+出入失常——寒邪束表
Wind-Cold contracts the pores, traps Wei Qi, and blocks Lung diffusion. Treatment: warm and disperse. Never use cooling herbs — they close the pores further and trap the Cold inside.风寒收缩毛孔，困住卫气，阻碍肺宣发。治疗：温散。绝不用凉性药——会进一步关闭毛孔，将寒邪困于内。
  • Chills >> fever; needs extra clothing and blankets恶寒>>发热；需加衣盖被
  • No sweating; nasal congestion; clear watery discharge无汗；鼻塞；清稀鼻涕
  • Body aches and headache; no thirst身痛头痛；口不渴
  • Cough with thin white sputum (if present)咳嗽痰稀白（若有）
  • Tongue: normal or pale, thin white coat; Pulse: floating tight舌正常或淡，苔薄白；脉浮紧

② Wind-Heat风热感冒

+ — Heat expands and fights at the surface升太过+出入失常——热邪膨胀，在表面抗争
Wind-Heat pushes outward — fever dominates. The throat is always involved (Heat accumulates in the Lung channel at the throat). Treatment: cool and release the surface. Never use warming diaphoretics — they add Heat to Heat.风热向外推——发热为主。咽喉始终受累（热邪在咽喉处的肺经积聚）。治疗：凉散开表。绝不用温热发汗药——热上加热。
  • Fever >> chills; feels hot, dislikes warmth发热>>恶寒；感觉发热，厌热
  • Sore, swollen, red throat; thirst for cool drinks咽喉肿痛红；渴喜凉饮
  • Yellow nasal discharge; thick yellow sputum鼻涕色黄；痰稠黄
  • Mild sweating possible; headache可能轻微出汗；头痛
  • Tongue: red tip/edges, thin yellow coat; Pulse: floating rapid舌尖边红，苔薄黄；脉浮数
+ Summer-Damp Pattern出入失常+降不及 · 暑湿感冒

③ Summer-Heat Damp Cold暑湿感冒

+ — Wind-Heat on surface, Damp obstructing Middle Jiao出入失常+降不及——风热在表，湿阻中焦
Summer Damp-Heat attacks both surface and interior simultaneously. The exterior component resembles Wind-Heat; the interior component resembles Damp obstructing the Spleen. The distinguishing features are the heaviness, nausea, and poor appetite — absent in pure Wind-Heat. Treat both levels simultaneously.夏季湿热同时攻击表里两个层面。表的成分类似风热；里的成分类似湿阻脾。鉴别特征是沉重、恶心和食欲不振——单纯风热中没有。同时治疗两个层面。
  • Fever with chills; heavy, aching body and head发热恶寒；头身重痛
  • Nausea, vomiting, or poor appetite; abdominal fullness恶心呕吐或食欲不振；腹部胀满
  • No sweating despite fever; loose stools possible发热但无汗；可有便溏
  • Occurs only in summer (May–September)仅发生于夏季（5–9月）
  • Tongue: red, thick white or yellow greasy coat; Pulse: soft rapid舌红，苔白厚腻或黄腻；脉濡数
→ Qi-Deficiency Pattern (Two-Phase)升不及→出入失常 · 气虚感冒（双阶段）

④ Qi-Deficiency Cold气虚感冒

(root) → (branch) — Weak Wei Qi cannot defend the surface升不及（本）→出入失常（标）——卫气虚弱，不能卫外
Two-phase treatment: (A) During acute episode — gentle release with simultaneous tonification; strong diaphoretics are dangerous. (B) Between episodes — rebuild the Wei Qi barrier with Yu Ping Feng San. Phase B is the most important and most often neglected.双阶段治疗：（A）急性发作期——温和解表同时补益；强力发汗药危险。（B）发作间期——用玉屏风散重建卫气屏障。B阶段是最重要也最常被忽视的。
  • Frequent colds (3+ per year); prolonged recovery (2–3 weeks)频繁感冒（每年3次以上）；恢复缓慢（2–3周）
  • Mild symptoms — no high fever, no strong chills症状轻微——无高热，无明显恶寒
  • Spontaneous sweating even when not ill; easily chilled平素自汗；稍受凉即感冒
  • General fatigue, shortness of breath, pale face (background)平素疲乏，气短，面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale, thin white coat; Pulse: floating but weak (deficient floating)舌淡苔薄白；脉浮而无力（虚浮）
Decision Steps破案决策步骤
Step 1:第一步： Chills >> fever + no sweat + clear nasal discharge → ① Wind-Cold. Warm and disperse. 恶寒>>发热+无汗+清稀鼻涕→①风寒。温散。
Step 2:第二步： Fever >> chills + sore throat + yellow discharge → ② Wind-Heat. Cool and release. 发热>>恶寒+咽痛+黄涕→②风热。凉散。
Step 3:第三步： Summer month + fever + nausea/vomiting + heavy body + greasy coat → ③ Summer-Damp. Clear Heat + resolve Damp simultaneously. 夏季+发热+恶心/呕吐+身重+苔腻→③暑湿。同时清热化湿。
Step 4:第四步： Repeated colds + prolonged recovery + spontaneous sweat + pale tongue weak pulse → ④ Qi Xu. Gentle release during episode; Yu Ping Feng San between episodes. 反复感冒+恢复缓慢+自汗+舌淡脉弱→④气虚。发作期温和解表；间期玉屏风散。
⚠ CRITICAL:关键： Never use warming diaphoretics (Ma Huang, Gui Zhi) for Wind-Heat — it adds Heat to Heat. Never use cold clearing herbs (Lian Qiao, Bo He) for Wind-Cold — it closes the pores further and traps the Cold. Never use strong diaphoretics for Qi-deficiency cold — exhausting sweat further depletes the Wei Qi. 绝不对风热用温热发汗药（麻黄、桂枝）——热上加热。绝不对风寒用寒凉清热药（连翘、薄荷）——进一步关闭毛孔，困住寒邪。绝不对气虚感冒用强力发汗药——大汗进一步耗竭卫气。
All cold patterns share one principle: restore the Lung's exterior-regulating function. Beyond that, Wind-Cold requires warming and opening; Wind-Heat requires clearing and dispersing. The key clinical rule: moxa is for Wind-Cold only — never for Wind-Heat or Summer-Damp.所有感冒证型共享一个原则：恢复肺调节体表的功能。此后，风寒需要温散开表；风热需要清散。关键临床规则：灸法仅用于风寒——绝不用于风热或暑湿。
Base Points · All Patterns基础穴位 · 所有证型
LI 4 + LU 7
Hegu + Lieque · LI Source + Lung Luo合谷 + 列缺 · 大肠原穴 + 肺经络穴
The universal exterior-releasing pair — used in every external cold pattern通用解表穴对——用于所有外感证型
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LI 4 is the most powerful single point for releasing the exterior — the LI channel is the Yang partner of the Lung; when the LI surface is released, the Lung surface follows. It also promotes sweating, clears the head, and relieves pain — addressing body aches and headache simultaneously. LU 7 regulates the Lung's diffusing function directly — it is the Luo point connecting to the LI, and also opens the Ren Mai. Together they open the Lung-LI axis at the channel level, restoring both diffusion (outward) and the ability to descend (inward). Technique determines direction: reducing for excess (Wind-Cold, Wind-Heat); gentle even for Qi-deficiency cold.合谷是解表力量最强的单一穴位——大肠经是肺经的阳配；大肠经表被解，肺经表随之。同时促进出汗、清头目、止疼痛——同时处理身痛和头痛。列缺直接调节肺的宣发功能——是连接大肠的络穴，也通任脉。合用在经络层面开肺大肠轴，恢复宣发（向外）和肃降（向内）的能力。手法决定方向：实证泻法（风寒、风热）；气虚感冒温和平补平泻。
Technique操作
LI 4: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. LU 7: oblique toward elbow 0.5–0.8 cun. Both bilateral. Reducing for Wind-Cold/Wind-Heat; even method for Qi-deficiency. Add moxa on LI 4 for Wind-Cold only.合谷：直刺0.5–1寸。列缺：向肘部斜刺0.5–0.8寸。均双侧取穴。风寒/风热泻法；气虚平补平泻。仅风寒时合谷加灸。
① Wind-Cold — Warm, Open Pores, Disperse Cold (Reducing + moxa)① 风寒感冒——温散开表（泻法+灸）
GV 14 + BL 12
Dazhui + Fengmen · Yang Meeting + Wind Gate大椎 + 风门 · 诸阳之会 + 风邪之门
Disperse Cold at the Wei Qi level and close the "Wind Gate" against re-entry在卫气层散寒，关闭「风门」防止再入
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
GV 14 is the meeting point of all Yang channels — it directly accesses and releases the Wei Qi layer, which is where Wind-Cold is lodged. Moxa on GV 14 is particularly effective: the warmth penetrates the Wei Qi layer and drives Cold outward through the skin. BL 12 (Fengmen, "Wind Gate") is the point through which Wind enters the body — needling or cupping BL 12 directly expels Wind from its entry point. Cupping BL 12 (and BL 13) is a classical technique for Wind-Cold: the suction draws Wind-Cold outward from deep in the muscle-Wei Qi layer. The combination of moxa on GV 14 + cupping on BL 12 is arguably the most effective non-herbal treatment for early Wind-Cold.大椎是诸阳经交会穴——直接进入并解除卫气层，这是风寒所在之处。大椎灸法特别有效：温热穿透卫气层，将寒邪从皮肤向外驱出。风门（BL 12）是风邪进入身体的穴位——针刺或拔罐风门直接从入侵点驱出风邪。在风门（和肺俞）拔罐是治疗风寒的经典手法：负压将风寒从肌肉-卫气层深处向外吸出。大椎灸+风门拔罐的组合可以说是早期风寒最有效的非药物治疗。
Technique操作
GV 14: oblique upward 0.5–1 cun + moxa 15–20 min. BL 12: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun bilateral, or flash cupping / retained cupping 5–10 min. Add BL 13 to the cupping protocol. Treat daily in acute phase.大椎：向上斜刺0.5–1寸+灸15–20分钟。风门：斜刺0.5–0.8寸双侧，或闪罐/留罐5–10分钟。拔罐方案加肺俞。急性期每日治疗。
GB 20
Fengchi · Gallbladder, Wind Pool风池 · 胆经，风邪汇聚处
Dispel Wind from the head and neck — essential for Wind-Cold headache and neck stiffness祛头颈风邪——风寒头痛颈项强痛必用
＋
Why this point为什么选它
GB 20 (Fengchi, "Wind Pool") is where Wind accumulates after entering the body — it is one of the most important Wind-dispelling points. For Wind-Cold with headache and neck stiffness, GB 20 directly addresses the local accumulation at the back of the head. Needling GB 20 toward the opposite eye (classic direction) disperses Wind from the head and clears the mind. Add BL 10 (Tianzhu) for severe neck pain.风池（GB 20）是风邪进入身体后积聚之处——是最重要的祛风穴之一。风寒伴头痛颈项强痛时，风池直接处理头部后方的局部积聚。针刺风池朝向对侧眼睛（经典方向）散风清头目。颈痛严重加天柱（BL 10）。
Technique操作
Needle toward opposite eye, 0.8–1.2 cun. Reducing. Bilateral. Avoid deep perpendicular insertion (proximity to brainstem). For Wind-Cold: add moxa with moxa stick over bilateral GB 20 after needling.朝对侧眼睛方向刺入0.8–1.2寸。泻法。双侧。避免垂直深刺（靠近脑干）。风寒：针刺后用艾条熏双侧风池。
② Wind-Heat — Clear Heat, Cool and Release (Reducing, NO moxa)② 风热感冒——清热凉散（泻法，不灸）
LI 11 + LU 11
Quchi + Shaoshang · Heat-clearing pair曲池 + 少商 · 清热穴对
Clear systemic Heat (LI 11) and throat Heat (LU 11 bloodletting) — the Wind-Heat essential pair清全身热（曲池）和咽喉热（少商放血）——风热必用穴对
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LI 11 clears Heat from the Yangming channel systemically — it is the primary fever-reducing point in acupuncture. LU 11 (Shaoshang, the Well point of the Lung) clears acute Heat from the Lung channel at the throat level. Pricking LU 11 to bleed 2–3 drops directly releases Heat from the throat — classical texts describe immediate relief of throat pain and swelling within minutes of the bleeding. The combination of LI 11 (systemic fever reduction) + LU 11 (local throat relief) mirrors the Sang Ju Yin formula logic: clear the upper-body surface Heat while reducing systemic temperature. Add GB 20 for headache; add GV 14 (reducing only, no moxa) if fever is high.曲池从阳明经全身清热——是针灸中最主要的退热穴。少商（肺经井穴）在咽喉层面清除肺经急性热邪。点刺少商出血2–3滴直接从咽喉释放热邪——经典文献描述放血后数分钟内立即缓解咽痛肿胀。曲池（全身退热）+少商（局部咽喉缓解）的组合与桑菊饮方剂逻辑相呼应：清上焦体表热邪同时降低全身体温。头痛加风池；高热加大椎（仅泻法，不灸）。
Technique操作
LI 11: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. LU 11: prick with lancet, 2–3 drops blood, bilateral. No moxa anywhere in Wind-Heat treatment.曲池：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。少商：三棱针点刺出血2–3滴，双侧。风热治疗任何穴位均不灸。
③ Summer-Damp — Surface + Middle Jiao③ 暑湿感冒——表里同治
PC 6 + ST 36 + SP 9
Neiguan + Zusanli + Yinlingquan内关 + 足三里 + 阴陵泉
Address the interior Damp layer while Wind-Heat base points treat the surface在风热基础穴处理表证的同时，处理里层的湿邪
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
Summer-Damp cold has two simultaneous layers: the surface (Wind-Heat component — treat with LI 4, LU 7, LI 11) and the interior Middle Jiao (Damp component — treat with PC 6, ST 36, SP 9). PC 6 calms nausea and vomiting by descending Stomach Qi. ST 36 strengthens the Middle Jiao to resist the Damp invasion. SP 9 resolves Damp from the Spleen. Together they clear the interior Damp obstruction that is causing the heaviness, nausea, and digestive symptoms absent in pure Wind-Heat.暑湿感冒有两个同时存在的层面：表（风热成分——用合谷、列缺、曲池治疗）和里中焦（湿邪成分——用内关、足三里、阴陵泉治疗）。内关降胃气止恶心呕吐。足三里强健中焦以抵御湿邪入侵。阴陵泉从脾化解湿邪。合用清除内部湿阻——这是引起沉重、恶心和单纯风热中没有的消化症状的原因。
Technique操作
PC 6: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, even method. ST 36: perpendicular 1–2 cun, even method. SP 9: perpendicular 1–2 cun, even method. All bilateral. No moxa for Summer-Damp — Heat is already present.内关：直刺0.5–1寸，平补平泻。足三里：直刺1–2寸，平补平泻。阴陵泉：直刺1–2寸，平补平泻。均双侧取穴。暑湿不灸——热邪已经存在。
④ Qi-Deficiency Cold — Two Phases④ 气虚感冒——双阶段
ST 36 + BL 13 + CV 6
Zusanli + Feishu + Qihai · Prevention Phase足三里 + 肺俞 + 气海 · 预防阶段
Between-episode Wei Qi rebuilding — the most important phase of Qi-deficiency cold management发作间期重建卫气——气虚感冒处理最重要的阶段
＋
Why this combination (prevention phase)为什么选这个组合（预防阶段）
Between episodes, the goal is rebuilding the Wei Qi barrier. ST 36 tonifies Spleen-Stomach Qi (the generator of Wei Qi). BL 13 (Lung Back-Shu) directly tonifies Lung Qi — the Lung is responsible for distributing Wei Qi to the body surface. CV 6 (Sea of Qi) tonifies the overall Qi foundation. Moxa on all three is essential — warmth builds Yang Qi, which constitutes Wei Qi. Weekly moxibustion sessions during autumn (before cold season) is the classical preventive strategy for Qi-deficiency cold patients. "Tonify the root before the pathogen arrives." During the acute episode: use LI 4 + LU 7 with gentle even technique — not strong reduction, which would exhaust the little Qi remaining.发作间期，目标是重建卫气屏障。足三里补脾胃之气（卫气的产生者）。肺俞（肺背俞穴）直接补肺气——肺负责将卫气布散于体表。气海（气之海）补充整体气机基础。三穴均灸至关重要——温热建立阳气，即卫气的构成。秋季（寒冷季节前）每周艾灸是气虚感冒患者的经典预防策略。「邪气未至，先固其根」。急性发作期：用合谷+列缺温和平补平泻——不用强泻法，会耗竭所剩无几的气。
Technique操作
Prevention: ST 36 tonification + moxa, BL 13 tonification + moxa, CV 6 tonification + moxa. Weekly sessions. Acute phase: LI 4 + LU 7 even method only (no strong reducing, no moxa — there is insufficient Qi to sustain it).预防：足三里补法+灸，肺俞补法+灸，气海补法+灸。每周一次。急性期：合谷+列缺仅平补平泻（无强泻法，不灸——没有足够的气来维持）。
The herbal logic for the common cold is the clearest example of the Hot-Cold treatment reversal: warming herbs for Cold patterns, cooling herbs for Heat patterns. Using the wrong temperature direction worsens every case. The Qi-deficiency prevention formula (Yu Ping Feng San) is arguably the most clinically important formula in this module — it prevents future episodes.感冒的方药逻辑是寒热治疗方向相反的最清晰案例：寒性证型用温热药，热性证型用凉寒药。用错温度方向会使每个案例都加重。气虚预防方（玉屏风散）可以说是本模块临床最重要的方剂——它预防未来发作。
① Wind-Cold① 风寒感冒
Jing Fang Bai Du San荆防败毒散
Shi Yi De Xiao Fang — wind-cold with body aches and headache; the clinical workhorse for Wind-Cold common cold出处：《摄生众妙方》——风寒感冒伴身痛头痛；风寒感冒的临床主力方
Chills >> fever + no sweat + body aches + headache + nasal congestion + clear discharge + floating tight pulse恶寒>>发热+无汗+身痛+头痛+鼻塞+清涕+脉浮紧
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Jing Jie and Fang Feng are the chief herbs — both dispel Wind and open the exterior without being too drying or too warming. They are gentler than Ma Huang, making this formula broadly applicable. Qiang Huo and Du Huo specifically address body aches and neck-back pain from Wind-Cold in the Taiyang channel. Chai Hu and Qian Hu together regulate Qi and expel Wind from the chest. Jie Geng opens the Lung and expels Phlegm. Zhi Ke descends Lung Qi. Fu Ling strengthens the Spleen to support the body's resistance. The formula's strength is its breadth — it addresses Wind-Cold at the surface (Jing Jie, Fang Feng), the Taiyang channel (Qiang Huo, Du Huo), and the Lung (Jie Geng, Qian Hu) simultaneously, making it effective for the full range of Wind-Cold symptoms. 荆芥和防风是君药——两者都祛风开表，但不过于燥烈或温热，比麻黄温和，使本方广泛适用。羌活和独活专门处理风寒在太阳经导致的身痛颈背痛。柴胡和前胡合用调气从胸部驱风。桔梗开肺祛痰。枳壳降肺气。茯苓健脾支持正气。本方的优势在于其广度——同时处理体表风寒（荆芥、防风）、太阳经（羌活、独活）和肺（桔梗、前胡），对风寒全程症状有效。
Dispel Wind, open surface荆芥（祛风解表） Dispel Wind, stop pain防风（祛风止痛） Taiyang, body ache羌活（太阳，身痛） Lower body ache独活（下部身痛） Regulate Qi, expel Wind柴胡（理气祛风） Open Lung, expel Phlegm桔梗（开肺祛痰） Strengthen Spleen茯苓（健脾）
② Wind-Heat② 风热感冒
Yin Qiao San银翘散
Wen Bing Tiao Bian, Wu Jutong — the foundational Wind-Heat common cold formula; more powerful than Sang Ju Yin for systemic Wind-Heat出处：《温病条辨》吴鞠通——风热感冒基础方；全身性风热比桑菊饮更有力
Fever >> chills + sore throat + thirst + yellow discharge + red tongue tip + floating rapid pulse发热>>恶寒+咽喉肿痛+口渴+黄涕+舌尖红+脉浮数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Jin Yin Hua and Lian Qiao are the chief herbs — both clear Heat and resolve toxicity powerfully while being light enough to act at the Wei Qi (surface) level. They address the Heat component. Jing Jie and Dan Dou Chi (fermented soybean) gently open the surface to allow the Heat to exit. Bo He cools and disperses. Jie Geng opens the throat and disperses Wind-Heat from the Lung channel. Niu Bang Zi clears Heat and benefits the throat. Lu Gen generates fluids to replace those consumed by Heat. Zhu Ye clears Heat. The formula's elegance is in combining cooling and surface-opening simultaneously — it does not purge downward (which would trap the pathogen inside) but disperses the Heat outward through the surface. 金银花和连翘是君药——两者都有力清热解毒，同时轻扬足以作用于卫气（表）层。荆芥和淡豆豉温和开表以使热邪外出。薄荷凉散。桔梗开喉，散肺经风热。牛蒡子清热利咽。芦根生津以补充被热消耗的液体。竹叶清热。本方的优雅在于同时清热和开表——不向下攻下（会将邪气困于内），而是通过表面向外散热。
Clear Heat, detoxify金银花（清热解毒） Clear Heat, surface连翘（清热开表） Cool, open surface薄荷（凉散开表） Gently open surface荆芥（温和开表） Open throat桔梗（开喉） Clear throat Heat牛蒡子（清咽热） Generate fluids芦根（生津）
③ Summer-Damp③ 暑湿感冒
Xin Jia Xiang Ru Yin新加香薷饮
Wen Bing Tiao Bian — modified Xiang Ru formula for summer exposure to Damp-Heat出处：《温病条辨》——用于夏季暑湿的香薷方加减
Summer fever + chills + heavy aching body + nausea/vomiting + no thirst or slight thirst + greasy coat夏季发热恶寒+身重疼痛+恶心呕吐+口不渴或微渴+苔腻
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Xiang Ru is the "Ma Huang of summer" — it opens the exterior surface specifically in summer conditions while also resolving Damp. Bian Dou Hua (hyacinth bean flower) resolves Summer-Heat and Damp from the middle. Hou Po resolves Damp and moves Middle Jiao Qi. Jin Yin Hua and Lian Qiao clear the Heat component. The formula treats both layers: surface (Xiang Ru opens the exterior) and interior (Bian Dou Hua, Hou Po resolve Damp from the Spleen-Stomach). 香薷是「夏季的麻黄」——在夏季条件下专门开通表面，同时化湿。扁豆花从中部化解暑湿。厚朴化湿行中焦气。金银花和连翘清热的成分。本方治疗两个层面：表（香薷开表）和里（扁豆花、厚朴从脾胃化湿）。
Open surface, resolve Damp (summer)香薷（开表化湿，夏季） Resolve Summer-Damp扁豆花（解暑化湿） Resolve Damp, move Qi厚朴（化湿行气） Clear Heat金银花（清热） Clear Heat, surface连翘（清热开表）
④ Qi-Deficiency Cold — Two Formulas for Two Phases④ 气虚感冒——两个阶段两张方
Phase A (Acute): Shen Su Yin Phase B (Prevention): Yu Ping Feng SanA阶段（急性期）：参苏饮 · B阶段（预防）：玉屏风散
Shen Su Yin: He Ji Ju Fang. Yu Ping Feng San: Dan Xi Xin Fa — "Jade Screen Wind Powder" — the Wei Qi guardian参苏饮：《和剂局方》。玉屏风散：《丹溪心法》——「玉屏风散」——卫气的守护者
Phase A: Acute Qi-deficiency cold — mild Wind-Cold symptoms + fatigue + pale tongue weak pulse. Phase B: Between episodes — spontaneous sweat + repeated colds + pale face + Qi deficiency signsA阶段：急性气虚感冒——轻微风寒症状+疲乏+舌淡脉弱。B阶段：发作间期——自汗+反复感冒+面白+气虚体征
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Shen Su Yin (acute): Ren Shen tonifies Qi while the formula simultaneously releases the surface with Su Ye and Ge Gen — this is the "tonify and release simultaneously" approach specific to Qi deficiency cold. Standard Wind-Cold formulas cannot be used because they are too depleting. The supporting herbs (Fu Ling, Chen Pi, Zhi Ke) strengthen the Middle Jiao and prevent Phlegm accumulation during the illness.

Yu Ping Feng San (prevention — the most important formula): Three herbs only: Huang Qi (large dose) tonifies Lung-Wei Qi and consolidates the surface; Bai Zhu strengthens Spleen Qi (Earth generates Metal — Spleen supports Lung); Fang Feng gently expels any residual Wind without depleting Qi. The formula's genius: Huang Qi strengthens the barrier; Fang Feng ensures it is not too rigid — the surface needs to both defend and breathe. "Jade Screen" — like a jade screen door that defends without sealing: protective but permeable. 参苏饮（急性期）：人参补气，同时以苏叶和葛根解表——这是专门针对气虚感冒的「补益同时解表」方法。不能用标准风寒方，因为过于耗竭。辅助药（茯苓、陈皮、枳壳）在病期强健中焦，防止痰湿积聚。

玉屏风散（预防——最重要的方剂）：仅三味药：黄芪（大剂量）补肺卫气，固护体表；白术健脾气（土生金——脾支持肺）；防风温和驱散残余风邪而不耗气。方剂的精妙：黄芪强化屏障；防风确保不过于僵硬——体表既需防御又需呼吸。「玉屏风」——像玉制屏风门，防御而不封闭：有保护性但可渗透。
30g Tonify Wei Qi, consolidate surface黄芪30g（补卫气，固表） Tonify Spleen (Earth→Metal)白术（健脾，土生金） Expel Wind without depleting防风（祛风而不耗气） Tonify Qi (Shen Su Yin)人参（补气，参苏饮用） Open surface (Shen Su Yin)苏叶（开表，参苏饮用）
Three cases illustrating the three most important clinical distinctions: the Wind-Cold/Wind-Heat treatment reversal, Summer-Damp, and the Qi-deficiency two-phase approach. Case 1 and 2 side-by-side are the essential teaching comparison — same chief complaint, completely opposite treatments.三个案例展示最重要的三个临床区分：风寒/风热治疗方向逆转、暑湿感冒和气虚感冒双阶段方法。案例一和案例二并排是基本的教学对比——相同主诉，完全相反的治疗。
Case 1 · Wind-Cold — The Warming Strategy案例一 · 风寒感冒——温散策略
Presentation主诉
Female, 28. Onset yesterday evening after walking home in cold rain without a coat. Strong chills — needs three blankets; fever 37.8°C but feels intensely cold. No sweating despite the temperature. Nasal congestion with floods of clear watery discharge. Occipital headache and neck stiffness. Body aches, especially the upper back. No sore throat. No thirst. Tongue: normal, thin white coat. Pulse: floating tight. 女性，28岁。昨晚冒雨未穿外套步行回家后发病。明显恶寒——需要三条被子；发热37.8°C但感觉极度寒冷。尽管有体温但无汗。鼻塞伴大量清稀鼻涕。枕部头痛和颈项强痛。身痛，以上背部为甚。无咽喉肿痛。口不渴。舌正常苔薄白，脉浮紧。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic气机分析
Chills >> fever + no sweat + clear nasal discharge + no thirst + floating tight pulse = Wind-Cold confirmed.

Cold rain → Wind-Cold entered through skin → contracted the Wei Qi layer → pores sealed shut → no sweating possible → Wei Qi trapped inside (chills despite internal heat generation). Taiyang channel is most affected: occipital headache + neck stiffness + upper back aching = classic Taiyang Wind-Cold distribution. The floating pulse confirms the pathogen is still at the surface (not yet internalized).

The no-sweat sign is the critical differentiator from Wind-Heat: Wind-Heat patients can produce some sweat; Wind-Cold patients cannot. This confirms pores are sealed by Cold. 恶寒>>发热+无汗+清涕+口不渴+脉浮紧=风寒确认。

冷雨→风寒通过皮肤入侵→收缩卫气层→毛孔紧闭→无法出汗→卫气困于内（尽管内部产热仍感恶寒）。太阳经受累最重：枕部头痛+颈项强痛+上背酸痛=经典太阳风寒分布。浮脉确认病邪仍在表层（尚未内化）。

无汗是与风热的关键鉴别：风热患者可以产生一些汗；风寒患者完全不能。这确认毛孔被寒邪封闭。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture: LI 4 bilateral (reducing) · LU 7 bilateral (even) · GV 14 (even + moxa 20 min) · BL 12 + BL 13 bilateral (cupping 10 min) · GB 20 bilateral (reducing + moxa stick after needles) · BL 10 bilateral (neck stiffness)

Formula: Jing Fang Bai Du San, 3–5 days

Immediate advice: Hot ginger sugar water immediately after leaving clinic. Rest. Stay warm but do not overdress (pores need to be able to open to release the pathogen). Avoid bathing for 24 hours (cold water would re-close pores; hot bath would over-exhaust sweat).

Outcome marker: Mild sweating beginning within 2–4 hours of treatment = pores are opening, pathogen is releasing. This is the target. Once sweating begins and chills lessen, the treatment is working. If the nasal discharge turns yellow over the next 2–3 days → Cold is transforming to Heat; switch formula to Yin Qiao San. 针灸：双侧合谷（泻法）· 双侧列缺（平补平泻）· 大椎（平补平泻+灸20分钟）· 双侧风门+肺俞（拔罐10分钟）· 双侧风池（泻法+针后艾条熏）· 双侧天柱（颈项强痛）

方药：荆防败毒散，3–5天

即时建议：离诊所后立即饮热姜糖水。休息。保暖但不要过度（毛孔需要能够开放以释放病邪）。24小时内避免洗澡（冷水会重新关闭毛孔；热水会过度耗竭汗液）。

疗效标志：治疗后2–4小时内轻微出汗开始=毛孔正在开放，病邪正在释放。这是目标。一旦出汗开始且恶寒减轻，治疗正在奏效。若接下来2–3天鼻涕变黄→寒邪化热；换银翘散。
Case 2 · Wind-Heat — The Cooling Strategy (Contrast with Case 1)案例二 · 风热感冒——凉散策略（与案例一对比）
Presentation主诉
Male, 35. Onset this morning — was feeling fine yesterday. Fever 38.6°C, feels very hot and uncomfortable; mild chills but they are secondary to the strong fever sensation. Sore, swollen throat — painful to swallow. Thirst for cold drinks. Yellow nasal discharge. Mild headache at temples. Slight sweating. No body aches. Tongue: red tip and edges, thin yellow coat. Pulse: floating rapid. 男性，35岁。今晨发病——昨日感觉良好。发热38.6°C，感觉非常热不适；轻微恶寒，但次于强烈的发热感。咽喉肿痛——吞咽时疼痛。渴喜冷饮。鼻涕色黄。颞部轻微头痛。轻微出汗。无身痛。舌尖边红，苔薄黄；脉浮数。
↓ The Critical Contrast with Case 1与案例一的关键对比
Same chief complaint — completely opposite treatment相同主诉——完全相反的治疗
Fever >> chills + sore throat + yellow discharge + thirst + floating rapid pulse = Wind-Heat confirmed.

Side-by-side comparison with Case 1:
Case 1: Chills >> fever → Wind-Cold → warm and disperse → moxa, ginger, Jing Fang Bai Du San
Case 2: Fever >> chills → Wind-Heat → cool and release → no moxa, Yin Qiao San, LU 11 bleeding

If this patient were given the Wind-Cold treatment from Case 1 (warming herbs, moxa on GV 14), the Heat would be intensified — potentially causing high fever, severe throat swelling, or transmission deeper into the body. The warming strategy is catastrophic in a Heat pattern.

The throat is the diagnostic differentiator: Sore, swollen, red throat = Wind-Heat (Heat accumulates in the Lung channel at the throat). No sore throat = Wind-Cold (Cold does not create throat inflammation). This is the fastest single sign for the Cold/Heat split. 发热>>恶寒+咽喉肿痛+黄涕+口渴+脉浮数=风热确认。

与案例一的并排对比：
案例一：恶寒>>发热→风寒→温散→灸法、生姜、荆防败毒散
案例二：发热>>恶寒→风热→凉散→不灸、银翘散、少商放血

若给此患者使用案例一的风寒治疗（温热药、大椎灸），热邪会被加剧——可能导致高热、严重咽喉肿胀或邪气传变入里。温热策略在热性证型中是灾难性的。

咽喉是诊断鉴别标志：咽喉肿痛红=风热（热邪在肺经咽喉处积聚）。无咽痛=风寒（寒邪不产生咽喉炎症）。这是寒热之分最快的单一体征。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (NO moxa): LI 4 bilateral (reducing) · LU 7 bilateral (even) · LI 11 bilateral (reducing — fever reduction) · LU 11 bilateral (prick to bleed — immediate throat relief) · GB 20 bilateral (reducing — headache) · GV 14 (reducing only, no moxa)

Formula: Yin Qiao San, 3–5 days

Outcome marker: Fever begins to drop within 4–8 hours. Throat pain reduces within 24 hours. If throat swelling increases or fever rises above 39.5°C → seek medical evaluation for bacterial throat infection (strep throat is not treatable by TCM alone). 针灸（不灸）：双侧合谷（泻法）· 双侧列缺（平补平泻）· 双侧曲池（泻法——退热）· 双侧少商（点刺出血——立即缓解咽喉）· 双侧风池（泻法——头痛）· 大椎（仅泻法，不灸）

方药：银翘散，3–5天

疗效标志：4–8小时内开始退热。24小时内咽痛减轻。若咽喉肿胀加重或体温升至39.5°C以上→寻求医疗评估（链球菌性咽喉炎单靠中医治疗不足）。
Case 3 · Qi-Deficiency Cold — The Two-Phase Strategy案例三 · 气虚感冒——双阶段策略
Presentation主诉
Female, 52. Currently has a cold — 5 days now, mild fever (37.4°C), slight chills, nasal congestion, fatigue much worse than the nasal symptoms. Has had 4 colds already this year; usually takes 2–3 weeks to recover. Spontaneous sweating even when not exercising. Shortness of breath. Pale complexion and lips. Low appetite. Tongue: pale, thin white coat. Pulse: floating but clearly weak"deficient floating". 女性，52岁。目前患感冒——已有5天，轻微发热（37.4°C），稍有恶寒，鼻塞，疲乏远重于鼻部症状。今年已经感冒4次；通常需要2–3周恢复。平素自汗，不运动也出汗。气短。面色和唇色苍白。食欲不振。舌淡苔薄白，脉浮但明显无力——「虚浮」。
↓ The Two-Phase Reasoning双阶段推理
Why Standard Cold Treatment Would Fail为什么标准感冒治疗会失败
Frequent colds + prolonged recovery + spontaneous sweat + pale tongue + floating-weak pulse = Qi-deficiency cold confirmed.

The "deficient floating" pulse is the diagnostic key: a floating pulse in Wind-Cold or Wind-Heat is strong and taut (excess at the surface). Here the pulse floats but is weak and forceless — this is the Wei Qi floating outward because it is too weak to hold inside, not because a pathogen is pushing it out from outside. The spontaneous sweating confirms the same: pores cannot close properly because Wei Qi is insufficient to hold them shut.

Why Jing Fang Bai Du San alone would fail: The formula's diaphoretic herbs (Jing Jie, Fang Feng, Qiang Huo) would promote sweating in a patient who is already spontaneously sweating and losing Wei Qi with every bead of sweat. This would deplete her further and prolong the illness — the classic mistake in Qi-deficiency cold management. 反复感冒+恢复缓慢+自汗+舌淡+脉浮而无力=气虚感冒确认。

「虚浮」脉是诊断关键：风寒或风热的浮脉有力而紧（实邪在表）。这里脉浮但无力——这是卫气因太弱无法守内而浮于外，不是因为外邪从外向内推。自汗确认同样：毛孔无法正常关闭，因为卫气不足以固摄。

为什么单用荆防败毒散会失败：方中发汗药（荆芥、防风、羌活）会在一个本已自汗、每滴汗水都在丢失卫气的患者身上促进出汗。这会进一步耗竭她并延长病程——气虚感冒处理的经典错误。
Two-Phase Treatment Plan双阶段治疗方案
Phase A — Acute (current cold):
Acupuncture: LI 4 + LU 7 bilateral (even method only — gentle) · ST 36 bilateral (tonification — support Qi during illness) · CV 6 (tonification)
Formula: Shen Su Yin — gently releases surface while simultaneously tonifying Qi

Phase B — Prevention (between episodes, starting as soon as the cold resolves):
Acupuncture: ST 36 + BL 13 + CV 6 (all tonification + moxa) — weekly sessions through autumn and winter
Formula: Yu Ping Feng San — sustained 2–3 month course

Goal of Phase B: Reduce cold frequency from 4 per year to 1 or zero. This is realistic with consistent treatment. The patient must understand that the pill she takes when she is sick only treats the branch; Yu Ping Feng San treats the root — and must be taken consistently when well, not reactively when ill.

Lifestyle: Regular sleep, moderate exercise (not exhausting — excessive exercise depletes Qi), dietary Qi-building foods (root vegetables, cooked grains, gentle warming foods). Avoid cold raw foods which burden Spleen Qi — the generator of Wei Qi. A阶段——急性期（当前感冒）：
针灸：双侧合谷+列缺（仅平补平泻——温和）· 双侧足三里（补法——病期支持气机）· 气海（补法）
方药：参苏饮——温和解表同时补气

B阶段——预防（感冒消退后立即开始，发作间期）：
针灸：足三里+肺俞+气海（均补法+灸）——贯穿秋冬每周一次
方药：玉屏风散——持续2–3个月疗程

B阶段目标：将感冒频率从每年4次减少到1次或零次。这是在持续治疗下可以实现的。患者必须理解她生病时服的药只治标；玉屏风散治本——必须在健康时持续服用，而不是生病时被动使用。

生活方式：规律睡眠，适度运动（不过度耗竭——过度运动耗气），饮食补气食物（根茎蔬菜、熟谷物、温和偏温食物）。避免寒凉生食——它们负担脾气，即卫气的产生者。
Digestive System消化系统
Constipation便秘
Root: the Large Intestine's function of transmission depends on Qi descending, fluids moistening, and Yang warming. Constipation arises when any of these three conditions fail.根本：大肠传导功能依赖阳明气降、津液润肠、阳气温煦三个条件。任一条件失常均可致秘。
The first and most critical split: stool quality vs. stool frequency. Hard, dry, difficult-to-pass stools point to excess Heat or fluid deficiency. Soft stools that are difficult to expel point to Qi deficiency. This single distinction separates the treatment direction before any other questioning. 首要关键分辨：粪质问题 vs. 排出困难。干硬难下的粪便指向实热或津液亏虚。粪质不硬但排出费力指向气虚。这一区分在任何其他问诊之前就已决定治疗方向。
Core Framework · Three Conditions for Normal Bowel Transmission核心框架 · 大肠正常传导的三个条件
Suwen: "The Large Intestine is the organ of transmission, from which change and transformation emerge." Normal defecation requires three things working together: (1) Yangming Qi descending — the downward driving force; (2) Fluids moistening the intestine — the lubricant; (3) Yang warming the intestine — the warmth that keeps transmission moving.《素问》：「大肠者，传导之官，变化出焉」。正常排便需要三个条件同时运作：（1）阳明气降——向下的驱动力；（2）津液润肠——润滑剂；（3）阳气温煦——维持传导运动的温热。
— Descent fails: Either Heat binds the intestine (excess — use cold purgatives) or Cold congeals the intestine (deficiency-cold — use warming purgatives). Both block Yangming descent but require opposite treatment.

— Transmission disrupted: Liver Qi stagnation fails to promote the smooth entry-exit rhythm of the intestine. Stool may be formed but the passage is obstructed by constrained Qi. Regulate Qi rather than purge.

+ — Dual failure: Qi deficiency (no push), Blood/Yin deficiency (no lubrication). The intestine has neither force nor moisture. Tonify and moisten rather than purge — purging would further deplete an already-deficient system. 降不及——下降失常：热结肠道（实证——用寒性泻下药）或寒凝肠道（虚寒——用温性泻下药）。两者都阻碍阳明下降，但治疗方向相反。

出入失常——传导节律被打乱：肝气郁滞不能促进肠道正常的出入节律。粪质可成形，但被郁滞气机阻断通道。当调气而非攻下。

升不及+降不及——双重失常：气虚（无推动力）、血/阴虚（无润滑）。肠道既缺乏动力又缺乏水分。当补益润肠而非攻下——攻下会进一步耗竭已经亏虚的系统。
Group 1 · Stool Character — The Primary Split第一组 · 粪质特征——首要分辨
Stool粪质
Hard, dry, pellet-like stools — or soft/normal stools that are difficult to expel?干硬如球的粪便——还是粪质不硬但努挣无力排出？
→ Stool hardness separates excess/fluid-deficiency from Qi deficiency in >85% of cases→ 粪质软硬在85%以上案例中区分实证/津亏与气虚
＋
Mechanism · Why Stool Hardness Indicates the Pathomechanism机理 · 为什么粪质软硬指示病机
Hard, dry stools (excess Heat or fluid deficiency): Either Heat is scorching the intestinal fluids (excess — stool is dry because fluids are consumed by Fire), or insufficient fluids reach the intestine (deficiency — stool is dry because the source is depleted). Either way, the lubricant is gone. The intestine tries to push but the contents are too dry to move. Treatment must address the dryness — either clear Heat to stop fluid consumption, or replenish fluids directly.

Soft stools that won't come (Qi deficiency): The intestine has adequate lubrication but no propulsive force. The Spleen-Lung Qi is too weak to descend and push. The patient strains, sweats, feels exhausted after a bowel movement. Purging would be disastrous — it would further deplete the already insufficient Qi. The only correct treatment is to tonify Qi and gently assist descent. 干硬粪便（实热或津液亏虚）：热邪灼伤肠道津液（实证——粪便干是因为津液被火消耗），或津液来源不足，无法到达肠道（虚证——粪便干是因为来源枯竭）。两种情况润滑剂都没有了。当处理干燥——要么清热阻止津液消耗，要么直接补充津液。

粪质不硬排出费力（气虚）：肠道有足够润滑，但没有推动力。脾肺之气太弱无力下降推动。患者用力努挣，出汗，排便后精疲力竭。攻下会是灾难性的——会进一步耗竭已不足的气。唯一正确治疗是补气并温和助降。
Direction答案指向
Hard, dry, pellet-like干硬如球
Heat热秘 降不及Fluid Xu津亏 降不及
Soft, effortful粪软难出
Qi Xu气虚 升不及
Normal stool, bloating成形但腹胀
Qi Stagnation气秘 出入失常
Interval间隔
How many days between bowel movements? Any sensation of incomplete evacuation?几天一次大便？有无排便不尽感？
→ Interval alone is insufficient — must combine with stool quality and effort required→ 单独的间隔天数不够——必须结合粪质和用力程度
＋
Mechanism机理
Clinical rule: interval days alone do not determine severity or pattern. A patient passing hard, burning stools every 3 days is in more distress than one passing soft stools every 4 days with little effort. The pattern is determined by the combination: interval + stool quality + effort + accompanying signs.

Incomplete evacuation sensation: This sign specifically points to Qi stagnation — the Qi rhythm of entry-exit is disrupted, so the bowel empties partially but the patient feels as if something remains. Also seen in Qi deficiency where the push is insufficient to complete the movement. 临床规则：单独的间隔天数不能决定严重程度或证型。每3天排出干硬灼痛粪便的患者比每4天轻松排出软便的患者更痛苦。证型由组合决定：间隔+粪质+用力程度+伴随症状。

排便不尽感：这个体征特别指向气秘（出入失常）——气机出入节律被打乱，肠道部分排空但患者感觉仍有残留。也见于气虚，推动力不足以完成排便动作。
Direction答案指向
3–5+ days, hard stool3–5天以上，粪硬
Heat / Cold binding热秘/冷秘
Incomplete evacuation排便不尽感
Qi stagnation / Qi Xu气秘/气虚
Group 2 · Heat vs Cold vs Deficiency Signals第二组 · 热秘/冷秘/虚秘鉴别信号
Thermal寒热
Burning sensation on defecation, thirst, hot body — or cold limbs, cold abdomen, no thirst?排便有灼热感、口渴、身热——还是肢冷、腹部冷感、口不渴？
→ This single axis separates from — opposite treatment required→ 这一轴线区分热秘与冷秘——治疗方向完全相反
＋
Mechanism · Why Thermal Signs Are Decisive机理 · 为什么寒热体征是决定性的
Heat constipation (— excess Heat): Yangming is a Yang channel — the richest source of Heat in the body. When pathological Heat accumulates in the Stomach and Large Intestine, it scorches the intestinal fluids, drying the stool. The Heat also prevents Yangming Qi from descending normally — Heat rises, and the descending force is consumed. Signs: burning anus, thirst for cold drinks, yellow urine, red face. Tongue: red, yellow dry coat. Treatment: cold purgatives to clear Heat and restore descent.

Cold constipation (— Cold binding): Cold contracts and congeals — it physically slows transmission. Yang Qi cannot warm the intestine sufficiently, so the propulsive wave of peristalsis weakens. Stool may not be particularly dry, but it simply won't move. Signs: cold abdomen (better with warmth), no thirst, clear urine, pale complexion. Tongue: pale, white coat. Treatment: warming purgatives — never cold herbs. 热秘（降不及——实热）：阳明是阳经——人体热量最丰富的来源。病理性热邪积聚于胃和大肠，灼伤肠道津液，使粪便干燥。热邪也阻止阳明气正常下降——热性上行，下降之力被消耗。体征：肛门灼热，渴喜冷饮，小便黄，面红。舌红苔黄干。治疗：寒性泻下以清热恢复下降。

冷秘（降不及——寒凝）：寒性收缩凝结——物质性减慢传导。阳气不足以温暖肠道，蠕动推进波减弱。粪便不一定特别干燥，但就是不动。体征：腹部冷感（温敷改善），口不渴，小便清，面色苍白。舌淡苔白。治疗：温性泻下——绝不能用寒性药物。
Direction答案指向
Burning + thirst + yellow urine灼热+口渴+尿黄
Heat热秘 降不及
Cold abdomen + no thirst腹冷+口不渴
Cold冷秘 降不及
Emotion情志
Does stress, frustration, or emotional pressure worsen constipation? Accompanied by flank distension, belching, or frequent sighing?压力、情绪郁闷或情志刺激使便秘加重？伴胁肋胀满、嗳气、频繁叹气？
→ Emotion-triggered constipation = Liver Qi stagnation failing to support Yangming descent→ 情志诱发便秘=肝气郁滞不能支持阳明下降
＋
Mechanism · Liver-Intestine Axis机理 · 肝肠轴
The Liver governs smooth flow — this includes the smooth transmission of the intestine. When Liver Qi stagnates due to emotional frustration, it fails to promote the rhythmic entry-exit of the Large Intestine. The Qi becomes stagnant in the intestinal channel — the stool is there, formed, but the passage is Qi-blocked. This is at the intestinal level.

The accompanying signs are classic Liver stagnation: flank distension (Liver channel runs through the flanks), belching (Liver Qi invading Stomach, which rebels upward instead of descending), frequent sighing (the body's attempt to release constrained Qi). Treatment: regulate Qi and relieve stagnation — not purgatives, which would deplete Qi further. 肝主疏泄——包括肠道的顺畅传导。情绪郁闷导致肝气郁滞，不能促进大肠的节律性出入。气在肠道经脉中郁滞——粪便在那里，成形，但通道被气机阻塞。这是肠道层面的出入失常。

伴随症状是经典肝郁：胁肋胀满（肝经循行经过胁部）、嗳气（肝气犯胃，胃气上逆而非下降）、频繁叹气（身体试图释放郁滞气机）。治疗：理气解郁——不用攻下，攻下会进一步耗竭气机。
Direction答案指向
Stress trigger + flank distension情志诱发+胁胀
Qi Stagnation气秘 出入失常
Effort用力
Does the patient strain greatly, sweat, feel exhausted or short of breath after defecation? Does stool come eventually but require enormous effort?患者是否需要大力努挣、出汗、排便后感到精疲力竭或气短？粪便最终排出但需要极大用力？
→ Post-defecation exhaustion is pathognomonic for Qi deficiency constipation→ 排便后疲惫是气虚便秘的特征性表现
＋
Mechanism · Why Qi Deficiency Causes Constipation Without Hard Stool机理 · 为什么气虚便秘粪质不硬
Normal defecation is an active Qi process: The Lung Qi descends to the Large Intestine (the Lung-LI axis), the Spleen provides the propulsive force, and the coordinated descent pushes stool through. When Lung-Spleen Qi is deficient, this propulsive wave is weak — like a river with insufficient current. The water (stool) is there but doesn't flow. Stool is soft because fluids are relatively adequate; it simply lacks the force to be expelled.

Post-defecation exhaustion is the diagnostic key: The patient has used so much of their remaining Qi just to force a bowel movement that they feel depleted afterward. This never happens in excess patterns — Heat constipation patients feel better after passing stool, not worse. This sign alone confirms the pattern. 正常排便是一个主动的气机过程：肺气下降到大肠（肺与大肠相表里），脾提供推动力，协调的下降将粪便推出。当肺脾之气亏虚，这个推动波减弱——像一条水流不足的河流。水（粪便）在那里但不流动。粪质软是因为津液相对充足；只是缺乏排出的力量。

排便后疲惫是诊断关键：患者用尽所剩气力来强迫排便，之后感到耗竭。实证从不发生这种情况——热秘患者排便后感觉更好，而非更差。这个体征单独确认证型。
Direction答案指向
Exhausted after defecation排便后疲惫
Qi Xu气虚便秘 升不及
Relieved after defecation排便后轻松
Excess pattern实证
Fluids津液
Dry mouth, dry skin, dry hair? History of postpartum, chronic illness, blood loss, or older age?口干、皮肤干、毛发干？有无产后、慢性病、失血史或年老体虚？
→ Systemic dryness signs confirm Blood/Yin deficiency as the cause of intestinal dryness→ 全身干燥体征确认血虚/阴虚是肠道干燥的原因
＋
Mechanism · Blood Nourishes, Yin Moistens机理 · 血以濡之，阴以润之
Blood deficiency constipation: Blood nourishes the intestinal wall and provides the fluid component for stool formation. When Blood is deficient (postpartum, chronic illness, blood loss), the intestine is undernourished and the stool is dry. Distinguishing feature from Heat: no heat signs — the patient is pale, fatigued, possibly dizzy, with a pale tongue and thin pulse. The dryness is from deficiency, not from Heat consuming fluids.

Yin deficiency constipation: Often in older patients or those with chronic Yin depletion. The intestinal Yin — the fluids that lubricate the passage — is depleted. Stool is dry, passage is difficult, but there is also a background of Yin deficiency heat: afternoon warmth, night sweats, tongue red and dry with little coat. This is different from Heat constipation because the Heat is internal and deficient, not exogenous and excess. 血虚便秘：血液濡养肠壁并提供粪便成形的液体成分。血虚时（产后、慢性病、失血），肠道失于濡养，粪便干燥。与热秘的鉴别：无热象——患者面色苍白、疲乏、可能眩晕，舌淡脉细。干燥来自亏虚，而非热邪消耗津液。

阴虚便秘：常见于老年患者或慢性阴液耗竭者。肠道阴液——润滑通道的津液——耗竭。粪便干燥，排出困难，但背景有阴虚热象：午后烦热，盗汗，舌红干少苔。与热秘不同，因为热是内在的虚热，而非外来的实热。
Direction答案指向
Pale + fatigue + postpartum/blood loss面白+疲乏+产后/失血
Blood Xu血虚便秘
Dry + afternoon heat + night sweats干燥+午后烦热+盗汗
Yin Xu阴虚便秘
Five patterns across three Qi dynamic categories. The stool hardness + thermal signs + effort signs should have narrowed you to the correct category before reaching this page. The key clinical trap: never purge a deficiency pattern — it will worsen the condition.五个证型，分属三个气机类别。粪质软硬+寒热体征+用力程度应已在到达此页前缩小范围。关键临床陷阱：绝不攻下虚证——会加重病情。
Descent Failure Patterns降不及 · 下降失常类

① Heat Constipation热秘

— Heat binds Yangming降不及——热结阳明
Excess Heat in the Stomach and Large Intestine scorches intestinal fluids. The most common acute constipation pattern. Treat with cold purgatives — results fastest of all patterns.胃与大肠实热灼伤肠道津液。最常见的急性便秘证型。以寒性泻下治疗——所有证型中见效最快。
  • Hard, dry stools; days between movements粪便干硬，数天一次
  • Burning sensation on defecation; thirst for cold drinks排便灼热感；渴喜冷饮
  • Red face, hot body, yellow urine, bad breath面红身热，小便黄，口臭
  • Tongue: red, yellow dry coat; Pulse: slippery rapid or deep excess舌红苔黄干，脉滑数或沉实
  • Feels relieved after bowel movement排便后感轻松

② Cold Constipation冷秘

— Cold congeals Yangming降不及——寒凝阳明
Yang deficiency fails to warm the intestine — peristalsis slows and congeals. Opposite of Heat constipation: same descent failure, opposite temperature. Never use cold herbs.阳虚不能温煦肠道——蠕动减慢凝滞。与热秘相反：同样的下降失常，完全相反的寒热性质。绝不用寒性药物。
  • Difficult defecation; stool not necessarily very dry排便困难；粪质不一定极干
  • Cold abdomen, cold limbs; better with warmth腹冷肢冷；温敷改善
  • No thirst; clear or frequent urination口不渴；小便清或频
  • Tongue: pale, white moist coat; Pulse: deep slow舌淡苔白润，脉沉迟
Qi Stagnation Pattern出入失常 · 气机郁滞类

③ Qi Stagnation Constipation气秘（气滞型）

— Liver Qi stagnation disrupts intestinal rhythm出入失常——肝气郁滞打乱肠道节律
Liver Qi stagnation impairs the smooth entry-exit rhythm of the Large Intestine. Stool is formed but cannot pass — the obstruction is Qi, not dryness or cold. Regulate Qi; do not purge.肝气郁滞损害大肠顺畅的出入节律。粪便成形但不能通过——阻塞是气机，不是干燥或寒凝。当理气，不可攻下。
  • Constipation with incomplete evacuation sensation; stool may be formed便秘伴排便不尽感；粪质可成形
  • Abdominal distension and pain; flank fullness; frequent belching/sighing腹部胀痛；胁肋满闷；频繁嗳气叹气
  • Clearly worsened by emotional stress or frustration情绪压力或郁闷明显加重
  • Tongue: normal or slightly dark edges; Pulse: wiry舌正常或边略暗，脉弦
+ Deficiency Patterns升不及+降不及 · 虚证类

④ Qi Deficiency Constipation气虚便秘

— No propulsive force升不及——无推动力
Lung-Spleen Qi too weak to generate the descending wave that propels defecation. Stool is soft — there is adequate lubrication but no force. Post-defecation exhaustion is pathognomonic.肺脾之气太弱无力产生推动排便的下降波。粪质软——有足够润滑但无力。排便后疲惫是特征性表现。
  • Soft stools; great effort required; incomplete evacuation粪质软；需极大用力；排不尽感
  • Sweating and shortness of breath during straining努挣时出汗、气短
  • Exhausted after defecation; general fatigue, pale face排便后精疲力竭；平素疲乏，面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale, tooth marks; Pulse: thin weak舌淡齿痕，脉细弱

⑤ Blood/Yin Deficiency Constipation血虚/阴虚便秘

— No lubrication降不及——无润滑
Blood or Yin deficiency leaves the intestine dry without sufficient fluid to form and pass stool. Common in postpartum patients, the elderly, or those with chronic illness. Moisten and nourish — never purge.血虚或阴虚使肠道干燥，没有足够液体形成和排出粪便。产后、老年或慢性病患者多见。当润肠滋养——绝不攻下。
  • Hard dry stools; difficult passage粪便干硬；排出困难
  • Blood Xu: pale face, dizziness, palpitations, pale lips血虚：面白眩晕，心悸，唇色淡
  • Yin Xu: afternoon warmth, night sweats, dry mouth, red tongue little coat阴虚：午后烦热，盗汗，口干，舌红少苔
  • Tongue: pale (blood Xu) or red dry (yin Xu); Pulse: thin舌淡（血虚）或红干（阴虚），脉细
Decision Steps · The Critical Warning破案决策步骤 · 关键警告
Step 1:第一步： Hard dry stool? → Yes: excess Heat ①, Cold ②, or fluid deficiency ⑤. No (soft): Qi Xu ④ or Qi stagnation ③粪便干硬？→ 是：热秘①、冷秘②或液亏⑤。否（软便）：气虚④或气秘③
Step 2:第二步： If hard: burning + thirst → ① Heat. Cold abdomen + no thirst → ② Cold. Pale + fatigue → ⑤ Blood/Yin Xu若粪硬：灼热+口渴→①热秘。腹冷+口不渴→②冷秘。面白+疲乏→⑤血虚/阴虚
Step 3:第三步： Soft stool + exhausted after defecation → ④ Qi Xu. Soft + bloating + emotion trigger → ③ Qi stagnation软便+排便后疲惫→④气虚。软便+腹胀+情志诱发→③气秘
Step 4:第四步： Yin Xu vs Blood Xu: afternoon heat + night sweats + red tongue → Yin Xu. Pale face + dizziness + palpitations → Blood Xu阴虚vs血虚：午后烦热+盗汗+舌红→阴虚。面白+眩晕+心悸→血虚
⚠ CRITICAL:关键警告： NEVER use purgative herbs (Da Huang, Mang Xiao, Fan Xie Ye) in patterns ③④⑤. Purging a deficiency pattern will cause further depletion, worsening the condition and damaging the patient's constitution.绝不在③④⑤型中使用攻下药（大黄、芒硝、番泻叶）。攻下虚证会导致进一步亏耗，加重病情并损伤患者体质。
All constipation patterns share one base local point (ST 25, the Large Intestine Front-Mu). Beyond that, the approach is completely opposite: excess patterns use reducing technique on points that clear Heat or move Qi; deficiency patterns use tonification on points that generate Qi or warm Yang. Never mix the techniques.所有便秘证型共享一个基础局部穴位（天枢，大肠募穴）。此后方向完全相反：实证对清热或行气穴用泻法；虚证对补气或温阳穴用补法。绝不混用手法。
Base Point · All Patterns基础穴位 · 所有证型
ST 25
Tianshu · Large Intestine Front-Mu天枢 · 大肠募穴
Direct access to the Large Intestine — adjusts transmission regardless of pattern直接通达大肠——无论何种证型均可调节传导
＋
Why this point为什么选它
ST 25 is the Front-Mu point of the Large Intestine — the point on the chest/abdomen where the Qi of the organ directly concentrates. Front-Mu points are used primarily to treat diseases of their associated Fu organ; they have the most direct functional connection to the organ's activity. Needling ST 25 directly stimulates Large Intestine Qi, regardless of whether the pattern is excess or deficiency — technique determines direction. Bilateral needling is standard. Adding electrical stimulation (2 Hz) or moxa (cold patterns) significantly enhances effectiveness.天枢是大肠募穴——脏腑之气直接汇聚于腹部的点。募穴主要用于治疗相应腑病；与脏腑活动有最直接的功能连接。针刺天枢直接刺激大肠气机，无论证型是实是虚——操作手法决定方向。双侧取穴为标准。加电针（2Hz）或艾灸（寒性证型）显著提高效果。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Bilateral. Excess: reducing. Deficiency: tonification. Cold: add moxa. Electrical stimulation 2 Hz bilateral can be added for all patterns.直刺1–1.5寸。双侧取穴。实证：泻法。虚证：补法。寒证：加灸。双侧电针2Hz可用于所有证型。
① Heat Constipation — Clear Heat, Restore Descent (Reducing)① 热秘——清热通腑（泻法）
LI 11 + LI 4
Quchi + Hegu · LI He-Sea + LI Source曲池 + 合谷 · 大肠合穴 + 大肠原穴
Clear Yangming Heat from the channel — the primary excess-clearing pair for Heat constipation从经络清泄阳明热邪——热秘首要清实穴对
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LI 11 is the He-Sea point of the Large Intestine"He-Sea points govern counterflow Qi and diarrhea" (and by extension, any intestinal dysfunction). It clears Heat from the LI channel most powerfully. LI 4 is the Source point — direct access to the channel's original Qi, and also one of the four key points for clearing Heat from the body generally. Together they address Yangming Heat at both the channel (LI 11) and constitutional (LI 4) levels. Upper body points clearing lower body intestinal heat — in reverse: treating the channel at its upper-body segment to influence the organ below.曲池是大肠合穴——「合治内腑」，处理一切肠道功能失调。从大肠经最有力地清泄热邪。合谷是原穴——直接进入经脉原气，也是全身清热的四个关键穴之一。合用在经络（曲池）和体质（合谷）两个层面处理阳明热邪。上部穴位清泄下部肠道热——上病下取的反向：在经脉上部段治疗以影响下方脏腑。
Technique操作
LI 11: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. LI 4: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, reducing, bilateral.曲池：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。合谷：直刺0.5–1寸，泻法，双侧。
SJ 6
Zhigou · SJ Jing-River point支沟 · 三焦经经穴
Classic constipation point — unblocks the Triple Energizer's water passage, promotes Qi descent治便秘经典穴——疏通三焦水道，促进气机下降
＋
Why this point为什么选它
SJ 6 has been used for constipation for centuries — it appears in classical texts specifically for this purpose. The Triple Energizer governs the waterways and Qi pathways of the entire body; when the Lower Jiao's Qi pathway is obstructed, defecation fails. SJ 6 unblocks the SJ channel's descent into the Lower Jiao, restoring the downward movement essential to bowel function. It is effective across multiple constipation patterns (Heat, Qi stagnation), making it a near-universal adjunct point. Classic teaching: SJ 6 is to constipation what PC 6 is to nausea — a specific go-to point confirmed by centuries of clinical use.支沟治便秘已有数百年历史——古典文献中专门用于此目的。三焦主全身水道和气路；当下焦气路阻塞，排便失常。支沟疏通三焦经下入下焦的通道，恢复肠道功能必需的下降运动。对多种便秘证型有效（热秘、气秘），是近乎通用的配穴。经典教学：支沟之于便秘，如同内关之于恶心——数百年临床使用确认的专效穴。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Reducing for excess; even method for mixed. Bilateral.直刺0.5–1寸。实证泻法；夹杂证平补平泻。双侧取穴。
③ Qi Stagnation — Regulate Qi, Open the Passage③ 气秘——理气开通
LV 3 + LV 14
Taichong + Qimen · Liver Source + Liver Front-Mu太冲 + 期门 · 肝经原穴 + 肝募穴
Relieve Liver stagnation at source and locally — restore smooth Qi flow to the intestine在源头和局部解除肝郁——恢复顺畅气机至肠道
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
Qi stagnation constipation is a Liver problem expressed in the intestine. LV 3 (Source) addresses the Liver's Qi constraint at the root — releasing the suppressed smooth-flow function. LV 14 (Front-Mu of Liver) directly releases the stagnant Qi from the Liver organ itself, particularly the flank fullness and distension. Together they relieve the primary cause so the intestinal Qi flow can normalize. Pair with SJ 6 — which opens the pathway from above — for maximum effect on Qi stagnation constipation.气秘是肝的问题在肠道的表现。太冲（原穴）在根本上解除肝气郁结——释放被压制的疏泄功能。期门（肝募穴）直接从肝脏本身释放郁滞气机，特别是胁肋满闷。合用解除主要原因，使肠道气机流通正常化。配支沟——从上方打开通道——对气秘疗效最佳。
Technique操作
LV 3: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, reducing, bilateral. LV 14: oblique along rib 0.5–0.8 cun, even method, bilateral.太冲：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，泻法，双侧。期门：沿肋斜刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻，双侧。
④ Qi Deficiency — Tonify Qi, Assist Descent (Tonification + Moxa)④ 气虚便秘——补气助降（补法+灸）
ST 36 + SP 6
Zusanli + Sanyinjiao足三里 + 三阴交
Tonify Spleen-Stomach Qi to generate the propulsive force for defecation补益脾胃之气，产生排便的推动力
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
Qi deficiency constipation requires rebuilding the propulsive force from the Middle Jiao. ST 36 is the primary Qi-tonifying point of the body — it builds Spleen-Stomach Qi, which descends to the Large Intestine and generates peristaltic force. SP 6 tonifies all three Yin channels simultaneously, supporting both the Qi (Spleen) and the fluid aspect (Liver, Kidney) needed for smooth defecation. Contrast with excess patterns: the same ST 36 is used here for tonification, whereas in Heat constipation we use LI 11 for reduction. This illustrates how the same problem location (intestine) requires completely different approaches based on Qi dynamic.气虚便秘需要从中焦重建推动力。足三里是全身补气第一穴——建立脾胃之气，下达大肠产生蠕动力。三阴交同时补益三阴经，支持平顺排便所需的气（脾）和液（肝、肾）两个方面。与实证对比：同样的足三里在此用补法，而热秘中用曲池泻法。说明同样的病变部位（肠道）基于气机需要完全不同的方法。
Technique操作
ST 36: perpendicular 1–2 cun, tonification, moxa 10 min. SP 6: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, tonification. Bilateral both.足三里：直刺1–2寸，补法，灸10分钟。三阴交：直刺1–1.5寸，补法。均双侧取穴。
LU 7
Lieque · Lung Luo point, Ren Mai opener列缺 · 肺经络穴，通任脉
The Lung-LI axis: descending Lung Qi drives Large Intestine transmission肺与大肠相表里：肺气下降驱动大肠传导
＋
Why this point为什么选它
The Lung and Large Intestine are paired organs — when Lung Qi descends, it directly promotes Large Intestine descent and transmission. In Qi deficiency constipation, the failure is often in the Lung-LI axis: insufficient Lung Qi descend means the intestine lacks its primary driving signal. LU 7 strengthens Lung Qi and promotes its descent to the Large Intestine. This is the mechanistic explanation for why patients with chronic lung disease or frequent shortness of breath often develop constipation — the Qi descending axis is compromised at the Lung level. The shortness of breath during straining (a characteristic sign of Qi Xu constipation) directly reflects this Lung-LI axis weakness.肺与大肠相表里——当肺气下降时，它直接促进大肠的下降和传导。气虚便秘中，失常往往在肺大肠轴：肺气下降不足意味着肠道缺乏其主要驱动信号。列缺强化肺气并促进其下达大肠。这是为什么慢性肺病或频繁气短患者常发展为便秘的机理解释——气机下降轴在肺的层面受损。努挣时气短（气虚便秘的特征体征）直接反映了这种肺大肠轴的虚弱。
Technique操作
Oblique toward elbow 0.5–0.8 cun. Tonification. Bilateral.向肘部斜刺0.5–0.8寸。补法。双侧取穴。
⑤ Blood/Yin Deficiency — Moisten and Nourish⑤ 血虚/阴虚便秘——润肠滋养
SP 6 + KI 6
Sanyinjiao + Zhaohai · Three Yin Meeting + KD Yin三阴交 + 照海 · 三阴交会 + 肾阴
Replenish Yin and Blood to moisten the intestine — the fluid-deficiency base pair补益阴血以润肠——液亏便秘基础穴对
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
SP 6 meets the three Yin channels (Liver, Spleen, Kidney) — simultaneously nourishing Blood (Liver), tonifying the source of fluid production (Spleen), and supplementing Yin (Kidney). KI 6 directly tonifies Kidney Yin and opens the Yin Qiao Mai, which governs the internal fluid metabolism. Together they address the fluid deficiency from three angles. For Blood deficiency, add BL 17 (Blood meeting point) and BL 20 (Spleen Back-Shu). For Yin deficiency, add KI 3 (Kidney Source) and BL 23.三阴交交会三条阴经（肝、脾、肾）——同时养血（肝）、补液体化生来源（脾）、补阴（肾）。照海直接滋肾阴并通阴跷脉，阴跷脉主内在液体代谢。合用从三个角度处理液亏。血虚加膈俞（血会）和脾俞。阴虚加太溪（肾原穴）和肾俞。
Technique操作
SP 6: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, tonification, bilateral. KI 6: perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun, tonification, bilateral.三阴交：直刺1–1.5寸，补法，双侧。照海：直刺0.3–0.5寸，补法，双侧。
The herbal strategy for constipation is the clearest example of how the same symptom (no bowel movement) requires opposite treatments. Da Huang purges excess downward; Rou Cong Rong moistens deficiency upward-into-descent. Using the wrong approach will worsen the condition.便秘的方药策略是同一症状（不排便）需要完全相反治疗的最清晰案例。大黄攻下实邪；肉苁蓉润补虚证。用错方向会加重病情。
① Heat Constipation① 热秘——降不及（实热）
Maziren Wan麻子仁丸
Shang Han Lun, Zhang Zhongjing — the classic formula for Yangming excess constipation with fluid damage出处：《伤寒论》张仲景——阳明实证便秘伴津液损伤的经典方
Hard dry stools + burning sensation + thirst + red tongue yellow dry coat. Moderate Heat — not severe enough for Da Cheng Qi Tang粪便干硬+灼热感+口渴+舌红苔黄干。中等热秘——程度不及大承气汤
Formula logic:方解逻辑： The formula contains Da Huang to purge (drive Yangming descent), Mang Xiao to soften the hardened stool (salt draws water into the intestine), Zhi Shi and Hou Po to break Qi stagnation and move the intestine. But crucially, it adds Ma Zi Ren (hemp seed) and Xing Ren to moisten and lubricate — this is what separates it from pure purging formulas. The formula addresses both the excess (purge) and the secondary fluid damage (moisten). Key clinical decision: use Maziren Wan for moderate Heat constipation; escalate to Da Cheng Qi Tang only for severe Heat with high fever, delirium, or abdominal rigidity. 方含大黄攻下（驱动阳明下降），芒硝软化干硬粪便（盐分引水入肠道），枳实和厚朴破气滞推动肠道运动。但关键是加入麻子仁和杏仁润肠——这与单纯攻下方的区别所在。方药同时处理实邪（攻下）和继发的津液损伤（润肠）。关键临床决策：中度热秘用麻子仁丸；仅在重度热秘伴高热、神昏或腹部板硬时升级为大承气汤。
Moisten intestine麻子仁（润肠通便） Purge, clear Heat大黄（攻下清热） Soften stool芒硝（软坚润燥） Break Qi stagnation枳实（破气消积） Move intestinal Qi厚朴（行气导滞） Descend Lung, moisten杏仁（降气润肠） Nourish Yin, relax芍药（养阴缓急）
② Cold Constipation② 冷秘——降不及（寒凝）
Jichuan Jian济川煎
Jing Yue Quan Shu, Zhang Jiebin — "nourishing the river to carry the boat" — warming and moistening for cold-type constipation出处：《景岳全书》张介宾——「济川行舟」——温润通便，用于冷秘
Difficult defecation + cold abdomen + cold limbs + no thirst + pale tongue white coat + deep slow pulse排便困难+腹冷肢冷+口不渴+舌淡苔白+脉沉迟
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Rou Cong Rong (Cistanche) is the primary herb — it warms Kidney Yang and moistens the intestine simultaneously, perfectly matching the cold-dry pathomechanism. Dang Gui nourishes Blood and moistens. Ze Xie drains turbid Qi downward. Sheng Ma raises clear Yang (paradoxical in a descending formula — but clear Yang must rise for turbid Yin to descend: the relationship). Zhi Qiao moves Qi to assist transmission. The name "Ji Chuan" (Crossing the River) reflects the strategy: add water (moisten) and provide a warm current (warm Yang) so the boat (stool) can sail through. 肉苁蓉是主药——同时温肾阳和润肠，完美契合寒燥病机。当归养血润肠。泽泻引浊气下行。升麻升举清阳（在下降方中看似矛盾——但清阳须升才能使浊阴下降：升降关系）。枳壳行气助传导。「济川」之名（渡河）反映策略：加水（润）并提供温流（温阳），让船（粪便）能够顺流而下。
Warm KD, moisten肉苁蓉（温肾润肠） Nourish Blood, moisten当归（养血润肠） Drain turbidity泽泻（泻浊） Lift clear Yang升麻（升清阳） Move Qi枳壳（行气） Guide down牛膝（引药下行）
③ Qi Stagnation③ 气秘——出入失常
Liu Mo Tang六磨汤
He Ji Ju Fang — six herbs ground and taken with warm water; regulates Qi descent without harsh purging出处：《和剂局方》——六味研磨温水送服；调理气机下降而不峻猛攻下
Constipation + abdominal distension + flank fullness + belching + emotional trigger + wiry pulse便秘+腹部胀满+胁肋满闷+嗳气+情志诱发+脉弦
Formula logic:方解逻辑： This formula contains no purgatives — it works entirely through Qi regulation. Wu Yao warms and disperses cold Qi stagnation in the Lower Jiao. Chen Xiang warms and descends Qi (one of the best herbs for promoting descending). Mu Xiang moves Qi in the intestine. Zhi Qiao and Zhi Shi break Qi stagnation in the middle and lower. Bing Lang drives Qi downward. The combined effect is to restore the smooth entry-exit rhythm of the intestine without purging. This formula perfectly embodies the principle that Qi stagnation constipation must be regulated, not purged — the problem is stuck Qi, not excessive content; moving the Qi resolves the constipation without depleting the patient. 此方不含泻下药——完全通过理气起效。乌药温散下焦寒气郁滞。沉香温降气机（最善促进下降的药物之一）。木香在肠道中行气。枳壳和枳实破中下焦气滞。槟榔引气下行。综合效果是在不攻下的情况下恢复肠道顺畅的出入节律。此方完美体现气秘必须调气而非攻下的原则——问题是气机郁滞，不是内容物过多；行气化解便秘而不耗竭患者。
Warm, disperse Qi乌药（行气散寒） Warm, descend Qi沉香（温中降气） Move intestinal Qi木香（行气止痛） Break Qi stagnation枳实（破气消积） Regulate middle Qi枳壳（理气宽中） Drive Qi downward槟榔（行气导滞）
④ Qi Deficiency④ 气虚便秘——升不及
Huang Qi Tang黄芪汤
Jin Gui Yi — tonify Qi to generate the propulsive force, with gentle moistening出处：《金匮翼》——补气以生推动力，兼温润
Soft stools + exhaustion after defecation + shortness of breath on straining + pale tongue tooth marks + thin weak pulse粪质软+排便后疲惫+努挣时气短+舌淡齿痕+脉细弱
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Huang Qi is the chief — the largest single dose in this formula — because the primary deficiency is Qi. It tonifies Lung-Spleen Qi and directly promotes the descending action needed for defecation. Huo Ma Ren (hemp seed) moistens to provide lubrication without harsh purging. Chen Pi regulates Qi to prevent stagnation from over-tonification. Bai Mi (honey) — taken with decoction — is a classic intestinal moistener and also tonifies Qi. The critical teaching point: Huang Qi in large dose (30g) is not constipating — it tonifies the Qi needed for the descent. This surprises students who think "tonification" always means ascending. Here, tonifying Qi actually promotes descent of the intestinal contents. 黄芪是君药——本方单味最大剂量——因为主要亏虚是气。补肺脾之气并直接促进排便所需的下降动作。火麻仁润肠提供润滑而不峻猛攻下。陈皮理气防止过补导致气滞。白蜜（与煎液同服）是经典润肠药，同时补气。关键教学点：黄芪大剂量（30g）不会导致便秘——它补益下降所需的气。这让认为「补」总是升提的学生感到惊讶。这里补气实际上促进了肠道内容物的下降。
30g Tonify Qi for descent黄芪30g（补气助降） Moisten intestine火麻仁（润肠通便） Regulate Qi陈皮（理气） Moisten, tonify白蜜（润燥补中）
⑤ Blood/Yin Deficiency⑤ 血虚/阴虚便秘——降不及（无润）
Run Chang Wan (Blood Xu) / Zeng Ye Tang (Yin Xu)润肠丸（血虚）/ 增液汤（阴虚）
Run Chang Wan: Li Dongyuan. Zeng Ye Tang: Wen Bing Tiao Bian, Wu Jutong润肠丸：李东垣。增液汤：《温病条辨》吴鞠通
Blood Xu: pale face + dizziness + dry stool + thin pale tongue. Yin Xu: dry stool + afternoon heat + night sweats + red dry tongue little coat血虚：面白+眩晕+粪干+舌淡脉细。阴虚：粪干+午后烦热+盗汗+舌红干少苔
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Run Chang Wan (Blood Xu): Da Huang in small dose (used here not as a purgative but as a blood-activating herb), Tao Ren and Huo Ma Ren moisten and lubricate, Dang Gui nourishes Blood to replenish the intestinal fluid. The key is the small dose of Da Huang — just enough to move, not to purge. This is (using movement as tonification).

Zeng Ye Tang (Yin Xu): Wu Jutong's formulation is brilliantly simple — three herbs only: Xuan Shen, Mai Men Dong, Sheng Di. Together they "increase the fluid" to float the stool through the intestine. Wu's dictum: "If the boat is stranded, add water." No purgatives — just fluid replenishment. For severe cases, combine with Cheng Qi Tang (Zeng Ye Cheng Qi Tang). 润肠丸（血虚）：大黄小剂量（此处不作泻下药而是活血药），桃仁和火麻仁润肠，当归养血补充肠道液体。关键在大黄小剂量——恰好足以推动，不足以攻下。这是以通为补。

增液汤（阴虚）：吴鞠通的配方精妙地简单——仅三味药：玄参、麦门冬、生地。合用「增液」使粪便在肠道中漂浮通过。吴鞠通名言：「水津不下，舟楫不行」。无泻下药——仅补充液体。重症合承气汤（增液承气汤）。
Nourish Yin, clear heat玄参（滋阴清热） Nourish Yin, moisten麦冬（养阴润燥） Nourish Yin, cool Blood生地（滋阴凉血） Nourish Blood (Run Chang)当归（养血·润肠丸用） Moisten intestine火麻仁（润肠） Moisten, activate Blood桃仁（活血润肠）
Three cases illustrating the three treatment directions: purge (excess), regulate Qi (stagnation), tonify and moisten (deficiency). The same presenting complaint — no bowel movement for days — requires completely opposite approaches. Cases 1 and 3 are the most important contrast for students.三个案例展示三个治疗方向：攻下（实证）、理气（气滞）、补益润养（虚证）。同样的主诉——数天不排便——需要完全相反的方法。案例一和案例三是学生最重要的对比。
Case 1 · Heat Constipation — Excess Pattern案例一 · 热秘——实证
Presentation主诉
Male, 35. No bowel movement for 4 days. Stools are hard, dry, and pellet-like when they do come. Burning sensation on defecation. Drinks cold water constantly. Red face, feels hot, yellow concentrated urine, bad breath. Feels relieved when he eventually passes stool. Tongue: red, thick yellow dry coat. Pulse: slippery rapid, strong at guan. 男性，35岁。4天未排便。偶有排便时粪质干硬如球。排便有灼热感。持续饮冷水。面红，感觉发热，小便黄浓，口臭。最终排便后感轻松。舌红苔黄厚干，脉滑数，关部有力。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic气机分析
Hard dry stool + burning + thirst for cold + red tongue yellow dry coat = (excess Heat) confirmed.

Yangming channel is the richest Yang channel — excess Heat accumulates here easily, especially in patients with dietary excess (spicy food, alcohol, red meat). Heat scorches intestinal fluids → stool dehydrates and hardens → the hardened stool physically blocks descent → further Heat accumulates behind the blockage → vicious cycle.

The "feels relieved after passing stool" is the key confirmation of excess — the stool was blocking the channel; clearing it relieves the obstruction. This never happens in deficiency patterns where post-defecation exhaustion follows. 干硬粪便+灼热+渴喜冷饮+舌红苔黄干=降不及（实热）确认。

阳明经是阳气最充沛的经脉——实热在此容易积聚，尤其是饮食过度的患者（辛辣、酒、红肉）。热邪灼伤肠道津液→粪便脱水变硬→硬化粪便物质性阻塞下降→进一步热邪积聚于阻塞后方→恶性循环。

「排便后轻松」是实证的关键确认——粪便阻塞了经道；清除它解除了阻塞。虚证从不出现这种情况，虚证是排便后疲惫。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all reducing): ST 25 bilateral (reducing) · LI 11 + LI 4 bilateral (reducing) · SJ 6 bilateral (reducing) · ST 44 bilateral (Stomach Spring point — clears Yangming Heat)

Formula: Maziren Wan — 5–7 days. If severe (high fever, abdominal rigidity, delirium), escalate to Da Cheng Qi Tang immediately.

Dietary guidance: Eliminate spicy food, alcohol, red meat temporarily. Increase vegetables, fruits, water. These are not optional lifestyle suggestions — they are part of the treatment.

Outcome: Expect bowel movement within 24–48 hours of acupuncture. Stool will be large and dark initially (clearing backed-up Heat). Patient should feel significantly better within 2–3 sessions. 针灸（全程泻法）：双侧天枢（泻法）· 双侧曲池+合谷（泻法）· 双侧支沟（泻法）· 双侧内庭（胃经荥穴——清阳明热）

方药：麻子仁丸——5–7天。若重症（高热、腹部板硬、神志改变），立即升级为大承气汤。

饮食指导：暂时戒除辛辣、酒、红肉。增加蔬菜、水果、水分摄入。这不是可选的生活方式建议——是治疗的一部分。

预期结果：针灸后24–48小时内排便。初期粪便量大色深（清除积存的热邪）。2–3次治疗后患者应感觉明显改善。
Case 2 · Qi Stagnation Constipation案例二 · 气秘（气滞型）
Presentation主诉
Female, 44. Constipation for 3 months, coinciding with a period of intense work pressure and family conflict. Stool is formed and not particularly dry, but she cannot pass it — strains for 20–30 minutes with incomplete evacuation. Abdominal bloating, flank fullness, frequent sighing. Worse on stressful workdays. Tongue: slightly dark at edges. Pulse: wiry, especially at guan. 女性，44岁。便秘3个月，与工作压力大和家庭冲突时期同步出现。粪质成形，不特别干，但排不出——努挣20–30分钟，排便不尽。腹部胀满，胁肋满闷，频繁叹气。压力大的工作日加重。舌边略暗，脉弦，关部尤甚。
↓ Reasoning推理
Key Diagnostic Features关键诊断特征
Formed stool (not dry) + emotion trigger + flank fullness + wiry pulse = (Qi stagnation) confirmed.

The critical point: the stool exists and is adequately moist, but cannot be expelled. This is not a dryness problem and not a force problem — it is a passage problem. Liver Qi stagnation is acting like a valve that won't open: the intestine is trying to push, the content is ready, but the Qi mechanism of the outlet is stuck.

The 3-month onset correlating exactly with emotional stress is a strong etiological confirmation. The wiry pulse at guan (Middle Jiao/Liver) confirms Liver-Stomach involvement. 成形粪便（不干）+情志诱发+胁胀+脉弦=出入失常（气秘）确认。

关键点：粪便存在且有足够水分，但无法排出。这不是干燥问题，也不是动力问题——是通道问题。肝气郁滞像一个打不开的阀门：肠道在尝试推动，内容物已经准备好，但出口的气机机制被卡住。

3个月的起病与情绪压力的完全对应是强有力的病因确认。关部脉弦（中焦/肝）确认肝胃受累。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture: ST 25 bilateral (even technique) · SJ 6 bilateral (reducing) · LV 3 bilateral (reducing) · LV 14 bilateral (even) · PC 6 (calms emotions, regulates Middle Jiao) · GB 34 (Sinew meeting — relaxes the constraint)

Formula: Liu Mo Tang

Teaching point: Do NOT add Da Huang or any purgative. The stool is already formed; purging would damage Qi and make the underlying stagnation worse in the long run. The goal is to open the valve, not to force the content out. Once the Liver Qi flows smoothly, the constipation resolves naturally.

Adjunct: Address the emotional root — brief discussion of stress management is part of treatment. Qi stagnation constipation will recur with every stress episode until the Liver-Qi axis is strengthened. 针灸：双侧天枢（平补平泻）· 双侧支沟（泻法）· 双侧太冲（泻法）· 双侧期门（平补平泻）· 内关（安神调中焦）· 阳陵泉（筋会——松解拘束）

方药：六磨汤

教学要点：绝不加大黄或任何泻下药。粪便已经成形；攻下会损伤气机，从长远来看加重郁滞。目标是开阀门，不是强行将内容物逼出。一旦肝气流通顺畅，便秘自然解决。

辅助治疗：处理情志根源——简短的压力管理讨论是治疗的一部分。气秘每次遇到压力都会复发，直到肝气轴得到加强。
Case 3 · Qi Deficiency Constipation — The Critical Contrast案例三 · 气虚便秘——关键对比
Presentation主诉
Female, 68. Constipation for 2 years, worsening over 6 months. She has bowel movements every 2–3 days, but each one requires 30–40 minutes of straining. She sweats profusely and feels exhausted and short of breath during and after defecation. Stool is soft, not dry. Has tried laxatives (Senna) repeatedly — works temporarily but makes her feel worse overall. General fatigue, pale complexion, poor appetite. Tongue: pale, tooth marks along edges, thin white coat. Pulse: thin weak, especially at cun and guan. 女性，68岁。便秘2年，6个月来加重。每2–3天排便一次，但每次需要努挣30–40分钟。排便中和排便后大量出汗，感到精疲力竭，气短。粪质软，不干燥。曾多次服用泻药（番泻叶）——暂时有效但整体感觉更差。平素疲乏，面色苍白，食欲不振。舌淡，边有齿痕，苔薄白。脉细弱，寸关尤甚。
↓ Critical Reasoning — Why Laxatives Made Her Worse关键推理——为什么泻药使她更差
Qi Dynamic + The Laxative Mistake气机分析+泻药错误
Soft stool + exhausted after defecation + sweating while straining + pale tongue tooth marks + thin weak pulse = (Qi deficiency) confirmed.

This case illustrates the most dangerous clinical error in constipation management: treating Qi deficiency constipation with purgatives. The Senna (Fan Xie Ye) is a cold, strongly purgative herb that works by forcibly driving Qi downward. In an excess pattern, this is appropriate. In a Qi deficiency pattern, it is catastrophic: it uses the patient's remaining Qi to force a bowel movement, depletes it further, and then the constipation returns worse than before — requiring more laxative — creating a dependency cycle that progressively destroys the patient's Middle Jiao Qi.

The sweating during straining is pathognomonic: sweat is the fluid of the Heart; excessive straining causes Qi to scatter, and it takes fluids with it. This is Qi failing to contain fluids — a clear deficiency sign that should have immediately ruled out purgatives. 粪质软+排便后疲惫+努挣时出汗+舌淡齿痕+脉细弱=升不及（气虚）确认。

此案例展示便秘处理中最危险的临床错误：用攻下药治疗气虚便秘。番泻叶是寒性强力泻下药，通过强制驱动气机下行起效。在实证中这是适当的。在气虚证中是灾难性的：它动用患者剩余的气来强制排便，进一步耗竭，然后便秘比之前更重地回来——需要更多泻药——形成进行性破坏患者中焦之气的依赖循环。

努挣时出汗是特征性表现：汗是心之液；过度努挣导致气散，带走津液。这是气不能固摄津液——一个应该立即排除使用泻药的明确虚证体征。
Treatment Plan + Stopping the Laxative治疗方案+停用泻药
Acupuncture (all tonification + moxa): ST 25 bilateral (tonification) · ST 36 bilateral (tonification + moxa) · SP 6 bilateral (tonification) · LU 7 bilateral (tonification — Lung-LI axis) · CV 4 (moxa — tonify Yuan Qi) · BL 20 + BL 21 (Back-Shu of Spleen and Stomach)

Formula: Huang Qi Tang (Huang Qi 30g, Huo Ma Ren, Chen Pi, Bai Mi)

Stopping the laxatives: This must be done gradually, not abruptly. The patient's bowel has become dependent — sudden cessation can cause severe rebound constipation. Reduce Senna by 50% in week 1, another 50% in week 2, and discontinue by week 3 as Huang Qi Tang takes effect. Explain this plan clearly.

Timeline: 4–6 weeks minimum to rebuild Qi. The patient must understand that there is no quick fix — the years of laxative use have damaged the foundation and it takes time to rebuild. 针灸（全程补法+灸）：双侧天枢（补法）· 双侧足三里（补法+灸）· 双侧三阴交（补法）· 双侧列缺（补法——肺大肠轴）· 关元（灸——补元气）· 脾俞+胃俞（脾胃背俞穴）

方药：黄芪汤（黄芪30g，火麻仁，陈皮，白蜜）

停用泻药：必须逐步进行，不能突然停用。患者肠道已产生依赖——骤然停用可导致严重反跳性便秘。第1周减少番泻叶50%，第2周再减50%，第3周随黄芪汤起效后停用。清楚向患者解释此计划。

时间线：最少4–6周重建气机。患者必须理解没有速效方案——多年泻药使用已损伤根本，需要时间重建。
Lung System肺系病证
Cough咳嗽
Root: the Lung governs Qi and controls descending — cough is always a failure of Lung Qi to descend. The question is never "why is there cough" but "what is preventing Lung Qi from descending, and what caused that obstruction."根本：肺主气，主肃降——咳嗽始终是肺气不降的表现。问题从来不是「为什么咳嗽」，而是「什么阻碍了肺气下降，以及是什么导致了这个阻碍」。
The first and most critical split: new cough (days to weeks) vs chronic cough (months to years). New cough is almost always external invasion — Wind-Cold or Wind-Heat. Chronic cough is almost always internal — Phlegm-Damp, Liver Fire invading Lung, or Lung Yin deficiency. The entire treatment strategy differs between these two categories. 首要关键分辨：新病咳嗽（数天至数周）vs 久病咳嗽（数月至数年）。新病咳嗽几乎都是外邪侵袭——风寒或风热。久病咳嗽几乎都是内伤——痰湿、肝火犯肺或肺阴虚。两类的整体治疗策略截然不同。
Core Framework · Why All Cough is Lung Qi Failing to Descend核心框架 · 为什么所有咳嗽都是肺气不降
Suwen: "The five Zang and six Fu all cause cough — not the Lung alone." Yet all cough passes through the Lung. The Lung's primary directional function is descent and diffusion. When descent fails, Qi rebels upward — producing cough. External pathogens obstruct the Lung's surface (blocking diffusion → descent also fails). Internal pathogens invade the Lung from below (Liver Fire) or accumulate within it (Phlegm-Damp). Deficiency patterns arise when the Lung loses its substance (Yin) and can no longer maintain the downward motion. 《素问》：「五脏六腑皆令人咳，非独肺也。」然而所有咳嗽都经过肺。肺的主要方向功能是肃降和宣发。当肃降失职，气逆上行——产生咳嗽。外邪阻遏肺的表面（阻碍宣发→肃降也失职）。内伤邪气从下侵犯肺（肝火）或在肺内积聚（痰湿）。虚证在肺失去其物质基础（阴液）而不能维持向下运动时出现。
— Lung Qi rebels upward: External Wind obstructs the Lung surface — diffusion blocked → descent blocked → Qi surges upward → cough. Or Liver Fire invades from below, driving Qi upward into the Lung. Both produce forceful, urgent cough.

— Lung's entry-exit disrupted: Phlegm-Damp accumulates in the Lung, physically blocking the airway. Qi cannot move in or out smoothly — cough is the attempt to clear the obstruction. Characterized by productive cough with abundant sputum.

— Descent capacity lost: Lung Yin deficiency — the Lung loses its moistening, downward-cooling function. Dry cough, no sputum, afternoon worse. The descent mechanism is weakened from within. 升太过——肺气上逆：外风阻遏肺的表面——宣发受阻→肃降受阻→气逆上行→咳嗽。或肝火从下侵犯，将气向上驱入肺。两者均产生有力、急迫的咳嗽。

出入失常——肺的出入被打断：痰湿在肺内积聚，物质性阻塞气道。气不能顺畅出入——咳嗽是试图清除阻塞的动作。以痰多的湿性咳嗽为特征。

降不及——肃降能力丧失：肺阴虚——肺失去其滋润、向下凉降的功能。干咳无痰，午后加重。肃降机制从内部削弱。
Group 1 · Duration and Onset — The Primary Split第一组 · 病程与起病——首要分辨
Onset起病
Did the cough begin suddenly within the past 2–3 weeks, with other symptoms of external invasion (chills, fever, body aches, runny nose)?咳嗽是否在过去2–3周内突然开始，伴有外感症状（恶寒、发热、身痛、流涕）？
→ Sudden onset with exterior signs = external Wind pattern; treat the surface first→ 突然起病伴表证=外感风邪证型；先解表
＋
Mechanism · External vs Internal Cough机理 · 外感咳嗽vs内伤咳嗽
External cough (new, with exterior signs): Wind is the leading pathogen — it always carries another factor: Wind-Cold (chills predominate, no thirst, white sputum, tight pulse) or Wind-Heat (fever predominates, thirst, yellow sputum, floating rapid pulse). The Lung surface is obstructed → both diffusion and descent fail simultaneously → cough is the forced attempt to restore movement. Treatment must open the surface first — once the exterior is released, Lung Qi can descend naturally.

Internal cough (chronic, no exterior signs): The cough has persisted long after any initial external cause — now the pattern is determined by internal pathology. No chills, no body aches, no runny nose. Look for the internal cause: Phlegm-Damp (abundant sputum), Liver Fire (urgent paroxysmal cough, dry throat, flank pain), or Lung Yin Xu (dry cough, afternoon/evening worse, night sweats). 外感咳嗽（新病，有表证）：风为百病之长——总是携带另一邪：风寒（恶寒为主，口不渴，白痰，脉紧）或风热（发热为主，口渴，黄痰，脉浮数）。肺的表面受阻→宣发和肃降同时失职→咳嗽是试图恢复运动的强制动作。治疗必须先开表（解表）——一旦表邪解除，肺气自然下降。

内伤咳嗽（慢性，无表证）：任何初始外感原因消退后咳嗽持续——现在证型由内部病理决定。无恶寒，无身痛，无流涕。寻找内因：痰湿（痰多）、肝火（急迫阵发性咳嗽、咽干、胁痛）或肺阴虚（干咳、午后/晚间加重、盗汗）。
Direction答案指向
Sudden + chills/fever + runny nose突发+恶寒发热+流涕
External Wind — open surface first外感风邪——先解表
Chronic, no exterior signs慢性，无表证
Internal injury — find the organ内伤——寻找脏腑
Group 2 · Sputum — The Central Diagnostic Tool第二组 · 痰液——核心诊断工具
Sputum痰液
Is there sputum? What color, quantity, and consistency? Thin and watery, thick and white, thick and yellow, or no sputum at all (dry cough)?有痰吗？颜色、量和质地如何？稀薄如水、稠厚色白、稠厚色黄，还是完全无痰（干咳）？
→ Sputum character is the single most informative sign in cough differentiation→ 痰液性状是咳嗽辨证中信息量最大的单一体征
＋
Mechanism · Reading the Sputum机理 · 解读痰液
Thin, watery white (Wind-Cold / Phlegm-Cold): Cold constricts and produces thin, clear fluid. Wind-Cold: thin white mucus, easy to expectorate. Cold-Phlegm (chronic): thin white frothy or watery sputum in large amounts — the Spleen fails to transform fluids, producing Phlegm that floods the Lung. "Spleen is the source of Phlegm; Lung is the container of Phlegm."

Thick yellow or green (Wind-Heat / Phlegm-Heat): Heat transforms fluids into thick, yellow-green, difficult-to-expectorate sputum. The heat "cooks" the fluid into a thicker consistency. Yellow = mild Heat; green = intense Heat; blood-streaked = Heat damaging vessels.

Thick white sticky (Phlegm-Damp, harder to expectorate than Wind-Cold): Spleen-Damp producing cold Phlegm that is abundant but not fluid — sits in the chest, hard to move. The classic "Phlegm-Damp" presentation.

No sputum — dry cough (Lung Yin Xu / Wind-Dryness): Either Lung Yin is depleted (no fluid to produce sputum) or the Dryness pathogen has consumed the Lung's moisture. Both produce a distinctive dry, tickling, non-productive cough.
