Often worse in dry weather or heated indoor environments. 稀薄色白（风寒/寒痰）：寒性收缩，产生稀薄清液。风寒：稀白黏液，容易咯出。寒痰（慢性）：大量稀薄白色泡沫或水样痰——脾失运化，生痰泛肺。「脾为生痰之源，肺为贮痰之器」。

稠厚黄色或绿色（风热/痰热）：热邪将津液转化为稠厚、黄绿色、难以咯出的痰。热「煎」津液使其变稠。黄色=轻度热；绿色=热甚；带血丝=热邪伤络。

稠厚白色黏稠（痰湿，比风寒更难咯出）：脾湿生寒痰，量多但非流质——留滞胸中，难以移动。经典「痰湿」表现。

无痰——干咳（肺阴虚/风燥）：肺阴耗竭（无液产痰）或燥邪消耗了肺的津液。两者均产生特征性的干燥、痒感、无痰的咳嗽。干燥天气或室内供暖环境中常加重。
Direction答案指向
Thin white, easy稀薄色白，易咯
Wind-ColdPhlegm-Cold
Thick yellow/green, difficult稠厚黄绿，难咯
Wind-Heat / Phlegm-Heat风热/痰热
White sticky, abundant白色黏稠，量多
Phlegm-Damp
No sputum, dry tickle无痰，干痒
Lung Yin Xu / Wind-Dryness肺阴虚/风燥
Group 3 · Timing and Triggers第三组 · 时间规律与诱发因素
Timing时间
When is the cough worst — morning, daytime, or afternoon/evening/night?咳嗽何时最重——清晨、白天，还是午后/傍晚/夜间？
→ Time of day reveals the organ and Qi dynamic involved→ 时间规律揭示涉及的脏腑和气机方向
＋
Mechanism · Time Mapping机理 · 时间对应
Morning (Phlegm-Damp / Phlegm-Cold): Phlegm accumulates overnight when the body is horizontal and circulation slows. On waking and sitting up, the Phlegm moves into the airway — triggering coughing to clear it. Morning cough that produces abundant white sputum and then settles = classic Phlegm-Damp.

Afternoon / evening (Lung Yin Xu): Yin Qi is lowest in the late afternoon (3–5pm is Bladder time — Yin beginning to rise but not yet sufficient). Lung Yin deficiency is exposed when the body's Yin is at its daily nadir. Afternoon-evening cough + night sweats + low-grade warmth = Lung Yin Xu until proven otherwise.

Paroxysmal at any time, triggered by emotion / irritants (Liver Fire invading Lung): Liver Fire does not follow a predictable time schedule — it erupts when triggered by anger, stress, or irritants (smoke, strong smells). The cough is often described as coming "in waves" or "spasms" that are hard to stop once started. 清晨（痰湿/寒痰）：夜间身体水平且循环减慢时痰液积聚。醒来坐起时痰移入气道——触发咳嗽以清除。清晨咳嗽咯出大量白痰后安静=经典痰湿。

午后/傍晚（肺阴虚）：阴气在下午最低（下午3–5点是膀胱经时——阴气开始升但尚不足）。肺阴虚在身体阴气处于日常最低点时暴露。午后傍晚咳嗽+盗汗+低热=肺阴虚直至证实为止。

任何时间阵发，情绪/刺激物诱发（肝火犯肺）：肝火不遵循可预测的时间规律——在愤怒、压力或刺激物（烟雾、强烈气味）触发时爆发。咳嗽常被描述为来「成波」或「痉挛」，一旦开始难以停止。
Direction答案指向
Morning, clears after coughing清晨，咯痰后缓解
Phlegm-Damp
Afternoon / evening / night午后/傍晚/夜间
Lung Yin Xu肺阴虚
Paroxysmal, emotion trigger阵发，情绪诱发
Liver Fire肝火犯肺
Throat咽喉
Sore and swollen throat, itchy throat, or dry throat without soreness?咽喉肿痛、咽痒，还是咽干无痛？
→ Throat character distinguishes Heat invasion, Wind, and Yin deficiency→ 咽喉性状区分热邪、风邪和阴虚
＋
Mechanism机理
Sore, swollen, red throat (Wind-Heat / Phlegm-Heat): Heat invading the Lung channel accumulates in the throat — the Lung channel passes through the throat. Swelling = Heat forcing fluids outward; redness = Heat in the Blood level of the throat tissue. The more swollen and red, the more Heat.

Itchy throat triggering cough (Wind — Cold or Heat): Wind is the "itching" pathogen. It stimulates the nerve endings of the throat mucosa, triggering the cough reflex before sputum has even formed. The characteristic tickle-then-cough sequence = Wind pattern.

Dry throat without pain, worse in evening (Lung Yin Xu): The Lung Yin is insufficient to moisturise the throat — it becomes dry, slightly uncomfortable, but not acutely painful or swollen. The dryness worsens in the evening when Yin is lowest. No redness or swelling on examination. 咽喉肿痛红（风热/痰热）：热邪侵入肺经在咽喉积聚——肺经过咽喉。肿胀=热邪迫使液体外溢；红=咽喉组织血分有热。越肿越红，热越甚。

咽痒触发咳嗽（风邪——寒或热）：风是「痒」的病邪。它刺激咽喉黏膜的神经末梢，在痰液形成前就触发咳嗽反射。特征性的痒后咳序列=风邪证型。

咽干无痛，傍晚加重（肺阴虚）：肺阴不足以润泽咽喉——变得干燥、轻微不适，但无急性疼痛或肿胀。傍晚阴气最低时干燥加重。查体无红肿。
Direction答案指向
Sore + swollen + red肿痛红
Wind-Heat / Phlegm-Heat风热/痰热
Itchy → cough reflex咽痒→咳嗽反射
Wind (Cold or Heat)风邪（寒或热）
Dry, no pain, evening干燥，不痛，傍晚
Lung Yin Xu肺阴虚
Emotion情志
Is the cough triggered or dramatically worsened by anger, frustration, or stress? Does it come in forceful paroxysms with a sensation of Qi rushing up?咳嗽是否由愤怒、郁闷或压力触发或明显加重？是否呈有力的阵发性，伴气机上冲感？
→ Emotion-triggered paroxysmal cough = Liver Fire invading the Lung→ 情志诱发的阵发性咳嗽=肝火犯肺（木火刑金）
＋
Mechanism Wood-Fire Insulting Metal机理 · 木火刑金
In the Five Element system, Wood (Liver) controls Metal (Lung) — when Wood overacts, it damages Metal. Anger and frustration cause Liver Qi to surge upward and transform into Fire. Liver Fire rises through the chest and invades the Lung, driving Lung Qi sharply upward → paroxysmal cough that is forceful, urgent, and difficult to stop. Distinguishing features from all other patterns: (1) clearly emotion-triggered; (2) comes in waves/paroxysms rather than continuous; (3) accompanied by chest and flank pain or tightness during coughing; (4) dry throat, bitter taste; (5) face flushes during coughing episode. Cross-disease insight: same mechanism as Liver Fire tinnitus and Liver Fire migraine — Liver Yang/Fire surging upward, this time targeting the Lung instead of the ear or head. 在五行系统中，木（肝）制约金（肺）——当木过旺，克伐金。愤怒和郁闷导致肝气上冲化火。肝火上升穿胸侵入肺，将肺气急剧向上驱动→阵发性咳嗽，有力、急迫、难以停止。与所有其他证型的鉴别特征：（1）明确情绪诱发；（2）呈波浪/阵发而非持续；（3）咳嗽时伴胸部和胁部疼痛或憋闷；（4）咽干，口苦；（5）咳嗽发作时面色潮红。异病同治洞见：与肝火耳鸣和肝火偏头痛是同一机制——肝阳/火上冲，这次目标是肺而非耳或头。
Direction答案指向
Anger trigger + paroxysmal + flank pain情怒诱发+阵发+胁痛
Liver Fire肝火犯肺 木火刑金
Six patterns across four Qi dynamic categories. External patterns (Wind-Cold, Wind-Heat) must be treated urgently — untreated external cough can transform into chronic internal patterns within 2–3 weeks. The transformation from Wind-Cold to Phlegm-Heat is the most common clinical trajectory.六个证型，分属四个气机类别。外感证型（风寒、风热）必须紧急治疗——未治的外感咳嗽可在2–3周内转化为慢性内伤证型。从风寒转化为痰热是最常见的临床轨迹。
Lung Qi Rebels Upward — External Patterns升太过 · 肺气上逆——外感类

① Wind-Cold Cough风寒咳嗽

— Wind-Cold obstructs Lung surface升太过——风寒束肺
Wind-Cold contracts the Lung surface, blocking both diffusion and descent. The most common pattern in cold climates and winter. Treat urgently with warming, surface-opening herbs and points.风寒收缩肺的表面，同时阻碍宣发和肃降。寒冷气候和冬季最常见证型。以温热开表的药物和穴位紧急治疗。
  • Sudden cough, itchy throat; chills more than fever骤然咳嗽，咽痒；恶寒重于发热
  • Thin white sputum, easy to expectorate痰稀薄色白，容易咯出
  • No thirst; nasal congestion with clear discharge口不渴；鼻塞流清涕
  • Tongue: normal or pale, thin white coat; Pulse: floating tight舌正常或淡，苔薄白；脉浮紧

② Wind-Heat Cough风热咳嗽

— Wind-Heat invades Lung, scorches fluids升太过——风热犯肺，灼伤津液
Wind-Heat invades a warmer, more open surface than Wind-Cold. Heat transforms the sputum from thin-white to thick-yellow. Fever predominates over chills. Treat urgently — untreated Wind-Heat can rapidly become Phlegm-Heat.风热侵犯较温热、开放的表面。热邪将痰液从稀薄白色转化为稠厚黄色。发热重于恶寒。紧急治疗——未治风热可迅速成为痰热。
  • Cough with sore, swollen, red throat; fever more than chills咳嗽伴咽喉肿痛红；发热重于恶寒
  • Thick yellow or sticky sputum, harder to expectorate痰稠厚色黄或黏稠，较难咯出
  • Thirst for cool drinks; yellow nasal discharge口渴喜凉饮；鼻涕色黄
  • Tongue: red tip/edges, thin yellow coat; Pulse: floating rapid舌尖边红，苔薄黄；脉浮数
Lung Qi Rebels Upward — Internal Excess Pattern升太过 · 肺气上逆——内伤实证类

③ Liver Fire Invading Lung肝火犯肺（木火刑金）

— Liver Fire drives Lung Qi sharply upward升太过——肝火驱动肺气急剧上逆
Liver Fire surges upward and invades the Lung — Metal cannot control Wood when Wood is in excess. The most dramatic cough pattern: paroxysmal, forceful, hard to stop, clearly emotion-triggered. Do not suppress the cough — clear the Liver Fire causing it.肝火上冲侵入肺——当木过旺，金不能制木。最戏剧性的咳嗽证型：阵发，有力，难以停止，明确情绪诱发。不要压制咳嗽——清除导致它的肝火。
  • Paroxysmal cough in waves; hard to stop once started阵发性咳嗽成波状；一旦开始难以停止
  • Anger/stress trigger; chest and flank pain during coughing愤怒/压力诱发；咳嗽时胸部和胁部疼痛
  • Dry throat, bitter taste; face flushes red during attack咽干口苦；发作时面色潮红
  • Sputum scanty, may be blood-streaked (Heat damages vessels)痰少，可带血丝（热伤血络）
  • Tongue: red, yellow coat; Pulse: wiry rapid舌红苔黄，脉弦数
Phlegm Obstructs Lung Airway出入失常 · 痰湿阻肺

④ Phlegm-Damp Cough痰湿咳嗽

— Phlegm accumulates in Lung, blocks Qi passage出入失常——痰湿积聚于肺，阻塞气机通道
Spleen fails to transform fluids → Phlegm accumulates in the Lung → blocks the entry-exit of Lung Qi → cough to expel. The Phlegm is the problem, not the cough. Clear the Phlegm; the cough resolves. Root: treat the Spleen. Branch: treat the Lung.脾失运化→痰液在肺中积聚→阻塞肺气出入→咳嗽以驱邪。痰是问题，不是咳嗽。清除痰液，咳嗽解决。治本：治脾。治标：治肺。
  • Cough with abundant white sticky sputum; morning worse咳嗽痰多，白色黏稠；清晨加重
  • Chest oppression and fullness; heavy limbs胸闷憋胀；肢体沉重
  • Poor appetite, loose stools (Spleen involvement)食欲不振，便溏（脾受累）
  • Tongue: pale, thick white greasy coat; Pulse: slippery舌淡，苔白厚腻；脉滑
  • Cough settles after morning expectoration清晨咯痰后咳嗽缓解
Lung Loses Descending Capacity — Deficiency Patterns降不及 · 肺失肃降能力——虚证类

⑤ Lung Yin Deficiency肺阴虚咳嗽

— Lung loses Yin moisture to sustain descent降不及——肺失阴液以维持肃降
Lung Yin depletion — from chronic illness, overwork, or post-febrile damage. The Lung loses its moistening coolant; descent fails. Dry cough is the cardinal sign. Nourish Yin and moisten the Lung — never use drying herbs.肺阴耗竭——由慢性病、过劳或病后损伤。肺失去润泽的冷却液；肃降失职。干咳是主要体征。滋阴润肺——绝不用燥性药物。
  • Dry cough with little or no sputum; tickling sensation干咳，痰少或无；咽喉痒感
  • Worse in afternoon, evening, and night午后、傍晚、夜间加重
  • Dry throat and mouth (not improved by drinking)口咽干燥（喝水不能改善）
  • May have night sweats, low-grade afternoon fever, weight loss可有盗汗、午后低热、体重减轻
  • Tongue: red, little or no coat, dry; Pulse: thin rapid舌红，苔少或无，干；脉细数

⑥ Lung Qi Deficiency肺气虚咳嗽

— Lung Qi too weak to maintain descent rhythm降不及——肺气太弱无力维持肃降节律
Lung Qi is insufficient to sustain the regular rhythm of inhalation-descent. Cough is weak, shallow, and effortful — like a pump that's lost pressure. Often accompanies Spleen Qi deficiency. Tonify both Lung and Spleen.肺气不足以维持吸气—肃降的规律节律。咳嗽无力、浅表、费力——像失去压力的泵。常伴脾气虚。肺脾双补。
  • Weak, low cough; worse with exertion咳声低弱无力；劳累后加重
  • Thin white sputum; easy to expectorate but little of it痰稀薄色白；容易咯出但量少
  • Shortness of breath; spontaneous sweating; pale face气短；自汗；面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale, thin white coat; Pulse: thin weak舌淡苔薄白；脉细弱
Decision Steps破案决策步骤
Step 1:第一步： New cough (<3 weeks) + exterior signs (chills, fever, runny nose)? → External pattern ① or ② 新病咳嗽（<3周）+表证（恶寒、发热、流涕）？→外感证型①或②
Step 2:第二步： If external: chills > fever + white sputum → ① Wind-Cold. Fever > chills + yellow sputum + sore throat → ② Wind-Heat 若外感：恶寒重>发热+白痰→①风寒。发热>恶寒+黄痰+咽痛→②风热
Step 3:第三步： Chronic cough, no exterior signs → internal pattern. Paroxysmal + anger trigger + flank pain → ③ Liver Fire 慢性咳嗽，无表证→内伤证型。阵发+情怒诱发+胁痛→③肝火犯肺
Step 4:第四步： Abundant white sticky sputum + morning worse + greasy coat → ④ Phlegm-Damp 痰多白黏+清晨加重+苔腻→④痰湿
Step 5:第五步： Dry cough no sputum + afternoon/night worse + red tongue little coat → ⑤ Lung Yin Xu 干咳无痰+午后/夜间加重+舌红少苔→⑤肺阴虚
Step 6:第六步： Weak effortful cough + fatigue + shortness of breath + pale tongue → ⑥ Lung Qi Xu 咳声低弱费力+疲乏+气短+舌淡→⑥肺气虚
⚠ WATCH FOR:注意： Untreated Wind-Cold can transform into Phlegm-Heat within 1–2 weeks (Cold transforms to Heat internally, Phlegm accumulates). Blood-streaked sputum with weight loss + night sweats = consider Lung Yin Xu with vessel damage; refer for investigation if persistent. 未治风寒可在1–2周内转化为痰热（寒在内化热，痰液积聚）。血丝痰伴体重减轻+盗汗=考虑肺阴虚伤络；持续存在时转介检查。
All cough patterns share one base approach: LU 7 (open the Lung) + BL 13 (Back-Shu of Lung). From there, the strategy diverges entirely. External patterns require surface-opening technique; internal deficiency patterns require tonification and moistening. Never use cold, reducing technique on Lung Qi or Yin deficiency patterns.所有咳嗽证型共享一个基础方法：列缺（开肺）+肺俞（肺背俞穴）。此后策略完全分化。外感证型需要开表手法；内伤虚证需要补法和润养。绝不对肺气虚或肺阴虚证型用寒凉泻法。
Base Points · All Patterns基础穴位 · 所有证型
LU 7 + BL 13
Lieque + Feishu · Lung Luo + Lung Back-Shu列缺 + 肺俞 · 肺经络穴 + 肺背俞穴
Open the Lung from the channel (LU 7) and directly at the organ (BL 13) — the universal cough base pair从经络（列缺）和直接从脏腑（肺俞）开肺——通用咳嗽基础穴对
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LU 7 is the Luo point of the Lung channel and opens the Ren Mai — it regulates Lung Qi and promotes its descending and diffusing functions. It is the most direct channel-level point for restoring normal Lung movement. BL 13 (Back-Shu) communicates directly with the Lung organ — it has the deepest functional access. Together they operate at two levels: BL 13 addresses the organ's functional state; LU 7 addresses the channel's movement pattern. Technique varies by pattern: excess = reducing; deficiency = tonification; external = even method with surface-opening intent.列缺是肺经络穴并通任脉——调节肺气，促进其肃降和宣发功能。是恢复肺正常运动最直接的经络层面穴位。肺俞（背俞穴）直接与肺脏沟通——具有最深的功能入口。合用在两个层面起效：肺俞处理脏腑的功能状态；列缺处理经络的运动模式。手法随证型变化：实证=泻法；虚证=补法；外感=平补平泻兼开表意图。
Technique操作
LU 7: oblique toward elbow 0.5–0.8 cun. BL 13: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun (avoid deep perpendicular — pneumothorax risk). Both bilateral. Technique determined by pattern.列缺：向肘部斜刺0.5–0.8寸。肺俞：斜刺0.5–0.8寸（避免垂直深刺——气胸风险）。均双侧取穴。手法由证型决定。
① Wind-Cold — Open Surface, Warm and Disperse (Reducing + moxa)① 风寒咳嗽——开表、温散（泻法+灸）
LI 4 + GV 14
Hegu + Dazhui · Release the exterior surface合谷 + 大椎 · 开表解肌
The classic exterior-releasing pair — open the surface so Wind-Cold can exit经典解表穴对——开表使风寒外出
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LI 4 is the Source point of the Large Intestine channel — its exterior-releasing action is the strongest of any single point on the body. The LI channel is paired with the Lung (exterior-interior relationship); releasing the LI surface simultaneously releases the Lung surface. GV 14 is the meeting point of all Yang channels — it directly releases the Wei Qi (defensive Qi) layer where Wind-Cold is lodged. Moxa on GV 14 is particularly effective: the warmth drives Cold outward through the surface. The four-point combination LU 7 + BL 13 + LI 4 + GV 14 is the complete Wind-Cold cough protocol — it opens from the Lung (LU 7), addresses the organ directly (BL 13), releases the surface (LI 4), and disperses the Cold at the Wei Qi level (GV 14).合谷是大肠经原穴——解表作用是全身任何单穴中最强的。大肠经与肺相表里；解大肠经表同时解肺表。大椎是诸阳经交会穴——直接解卫气层的风寒。大椎灸法特别有效：热力将寒邪从表面驱出。四穴组合列缺+肺俞+合谷+大椎是完整的风寒咳嗽方案——从肺经开（列缺），直接处理脏腑（肺俞），解表（合谷），在卫气层散寒（大椎）。
Technique操作
LI 4: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, reducing, bilateral. GV 14: oblique upward 0.5–1 cun, even method; add moxa 10–15 min for Wind-Cold. Treat early and frequently — daily if possible in acute phase.合谷：直刺0.5–1寸，泻法，双侧。大椎：向上斜刺0.5–1寸，平补平泻；风寒加灸10–15分钟。尽早频繁治疗——急性期每日治疗。
② Wind-Heat — Clear Heat, Open Surface (Reducing, no moxa)② 风热咳嗽——清热开表（泻法，不灸）
LU 11 + LI 11
Shaoshang + Quchi · Lung Well + LI He-Sea少商 + 曲池 · 肺经井穴 + 大肠合穴
Clear Heat from the Lung-LI channel axis — specifically for throat and upper body Heat清肺大肠经热邪——专用于咽喉和上焦热
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LU 11 (Shaoshang) is the Well point of the Lung — Well points clear acute Heat from the channel and are particularly effective for throat disorders (the Lung channel passes through the throat). Pricking LU 11 to bleed releases Heat rapidly from the Lung channel. LI 11 clears Yangming Heat systemically — fever reduction, anti-inflammatory. Together they address both the local (throat via LU 11) and systemic (fever via LI 11) aspects of Wind-Heat. LU 11 bloodletting for sore throat is a classical emergency technique — 2–3 drops of blood can provide immediate throat relief within minutes.少商（肺经井穴）——井穴清经络急性热邪，对咽喉疾患特别有效（肺经过咽喉）。点刺少商出血可迅速从肺经释放热邪。曲池全身清阳明热——退热，消炎。合用同时处理局部（咽喉，通过少商）和全身（发热，通过曲池）风热。少商放血治咽喉肿痛是经典急症手法——2–3滴血可在数分钟内立即缓解咽喉症状。
Technique操作
LU 11: prick with lancet to bleed 2–3 drops (bilateral) — especially effective for acute sore throat. LI 11: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. Add LI 4 reducing. No moxa for Wind-Heat — Heat must not be reinforced.少商：三棱针点刺出血2–3滴（双侧）——咽喉急性肿痛尤效。曲池：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。加合谷泻法。不灸——风热不可助热。
③ Liver Fire Invading Lung — Clear Liver, Descend Lung (Reducing)③ 肝火犯肺——清肝降肺（泻法）
LV 2 + LU 6
Xingjian + Kongzui · Liver Spring + Lung Xi-Cleft行间 + 孔最 · 肝经荥穴 + 肺经郄穴
Clear Liver Fire at source; stop acute cough rebellion at the Lung Xi-Cleft在源头清肝火；在肺经郄穴阻止急性咳嗽上逆
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LV 2 (Spring point — clears Liver channel Heat) addresses the root cause: the Liver Fire generating the upward surge. LU 6 (Xi-Cleft point of Lung) is the emergency point for acute Lung conditions — Xi-Cleft points store Qi and Blood, and stimulating them rapidly clears acute channel obstruction. For Liver Fire invading Lung: LV 2 stops the Fire at its source; LU 6 stops the acute cough surge at the Lung channel level. Xi-Cleft points are specifically indicated for acute conditions of their channel's organ — LU 6 for acute cough, HT 6 for acute heart pain, KI 5 for acute kidney pain. This is the Xi-Cleft rule.行间（荥穴——清肝经热）处理根本原因：产生上冲的肝火。孔最（肺经郄穴）是肺的急性病急救穴——郄穴储存气血，刺激它迅速清除急性经络阻塞。肝火犯肺：行间在源头阻止火；孔最在肺经层面阻止急性咳嗽上逆。郄穴专用于其经络脏腑的急性病——孔最治急性咳嗽，阴郄治急性心痛，水泉治急性肾痛。这是郄穴规则。
Technique操作
LV 2: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, reducing, bilateral. LU 6: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, reducing, bilateral. Add LV 3 reducing (Source point — completes Liver clearing). Add GB 34 to release flank constraint.行间：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，泻法，双侧。孔最：直刺0.5–1寸，泻法，双侧。加太冲泻法（原穴——完成清肝）。加阳陵泉以解胁部拘束。
④ Phlegm-Damp — Transform Phlegm, Dry Damp (Even / Reducing)④ 痰湿咳嗽——化痰燥湿
ST 40 + SP 9
Fenglong + Yinlingquan · Phlegm + Damp丰隆 + 阴陵泉 · 化痰 + 利湿
Transform the Phlegm (ST 40) and eliminate the Damp that produced it (SP 9) — treat root and branch simultaneously化痰（丰隆）并消除产生痰的湿（阴陵泉）——标本同治
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
ST 40 transforms existing Phlegm — it is the premier Phlegm-transforming point in the body, acting on both the physical Phlegm in the Lung and the systemic Phlegm-producing tendency. SP 9 eliminates Damp from the Spleen-Stomach level — addressing the source that produces the Phlegm. "Spleen is the source of Phlegm; Lung is the container of Phlegm" — ST 40 empties the container; SP 9 blocks the source from refilling it. Adding BL 20 (Spleen Back-Shu) tonifies the Spleen directly — the long-term strategy for chronic Phlegm-Damp cough is to strengthen the Spleen so it stops producing Phlegm.丰隆化已有的痰——是全身化痰第一穴，作用于肺中实质性的痰和全身产痰倾向。阴陵泉从脾胃层面消除湿邪——处理产生痰的来源。「脾为生痰之源，肺为贮痰之器」——丰隆清空容器；阴陵泉阻止来源不断充填。加脾俞（脾背俞穴）直接补脾——慢性痰湿咳嗽的长期策略是强健脾脏，使其停止产痰。
Technique操作
ST 40: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. SP 9: perpendicular 1–2 cun, even method, bilateral. Add BL 20 tonification + moxa for chronic Phlegm-Damp. Add CV 12 to regulate Middle Jiao.丰隆：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。阴陵泉：直刺1–2寸，平补平泻，双侧。慢性痰湿加脾俞补法+灸。加中脘调理中焦。
⑤ Lung Yin Xu — Nourish Yin, Moisten Lung (Tonification, no moxa)⑤ 肺阴虚——滋阴润肺（补法，不灸）
LU 9 + KI 6
Taiyuan + Zhaohai · Lung Source + KD Yin, Yin Qiao太渊 + 照海 · 肺原穴 + 肾阴，通阴跷脉
Nourish Lung Yin from its own source (LU 9) and replenish from the Kidney (KI 6) — Metal draws from Water从肺自身来源滋养肺阴（太渊），并从肾补充（照海）——金从水中汲取
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
LU 9 is the Source and Earth point of the Lung — Earth generates Metal; tonifying LU 9 strengthens the Lung's own Yin-generating capacity. KI 6 tonifies Kidney Yin and opens the Yin Qiao Mai — the Kidney is the root of Yin for the entire body. In Five Element terms, Water (Kidney) generates Metal (Lung) — replenishing the Water source replenishes the Metal's Yin. In Lung Yin Xu, the dryness often extends to the throat and upper respiratory tract — add CV 22 (Tiantu, throat point) to moisten locally. Never use moxa — it dries further.太渊是肺经原穴和土穴——土生金；补太渊强化肺自身的生阴能力。照海补肾阴并通阴跷脉——肾是全身阴液之根。五行上，水（肾）生金（肺）——补充水的来源即补充金的阴液。肺阴虚中，干燥常延伸至咽喉和上呼吸道——加天突（咽喉穴）局部润泽。绝不灸——会进一步干燥。
Technique操作
LU 9: perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun (avoid radial artery), tonification, bilateral. KI 6: perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun, tonification, bilateral. Add SP 6 tonification (nourishes all Yin). Add CV 22 0.3 cun perpendicular then angle downward, even method.太渊：直刺0.3–0.5寸（避开桡动脉），补法，双侧。照海：直刺0.3–0.5寸，补法，双侧。加三阴交补法（滋养所有阴经）。加天突直刺0.3寸后向下斜刺，平补平泻。
⑥ Lung Qi Xu — Tonify Lung and Spleen Qi (Tonification + moxa)⑥ 肺气虚——补肺脾之气（补法+灸）
ST 36 + BL 20 + CV 6
Zusanli + Pishu + Qihai足三里 + 脾俞 + 气海
Rebuild Lung Qi from the Spleen-Earth source — "Earth generates Metal"从脾土来源重建肺气——「土生金」
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
Lung Qi deficiency often accompanies Spleen Qi deficiency — the Earth (Spleen) is the mother of Metal (Lung). Rebuilding the Earth strengthens the Metal. ST 36 tonifies Spleen-Stomach Qi (the primary Qi generator); BL 20 directly tonifies the Spleen organ; CV 6 (Sea of Qi) strengthens the body's overall Qi foundation and supports the Lung's descending function. Add BL 13 + LU 9 to tonify the Lung itself directly. Moxa is essential in Lung Qi Xu — warmth supports Yang Qi and prevents further depletion. This is opposite to Lung Yin Xu where moxa is contraindicated.肺气虚常伴脾气虚——土（脾）是金（肺）之母。重建土则强化金。足三里补脾胃之气（主要气机化生器）；脾俞直接补脾脏；气海（气之海）强化全身气机基础并支持肺的肃降功能。加肺俞+太渊直接补肺。肺气虚中灸法至关重要——温热支持阳气，防止进一步亏耗。这与肺阴虚中灸法禁忌完全相反。
Technique操作
ST 36: perpendicular 1–2 cun, tonification + moxa. BL 20: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, tonification + moxa. CV 6: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, tonification + moxa. Bilateral for ST 36 and BL 20.足三里：直刺1–2寸，补法+灸。脾俞：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，补法+灸。气海：直刺1–1.5寸，补法+灸。足三里和脾俞双侧取穴。
The herbal strategy for cough is dominated by the Lung's directional rule: external patterns require surface-opening herbs that restore diffusion; internal patterns require herbs that either clear obstruction (Phlegm, Fire) or replenish the substance the Lung needs (Yin, Qi). The single most important rule: never use drying or warming herbs in Lung Yin Xu.咳嗽的方药策略以肺的方向性规则为主导：外感证型需要恢复宣发的开表药；内伤证型需要清除阻塞（痰、火）或补充肺所需物质（阴、气）的药物。最重要的单一规则：肺阴虚绝不用燥热药物。
① Wind-Cold① 风寒咳嗽——升太过（外感）
Xing Su San杏苏散
Wen Bing Tiao Bian, Wu Jutong — "Apricot Kernel and Perilla" — warm diffusion and descent出处：《温病条辨》吴鞠通——「杏苏」——温宣肃降
New cough + chills predominate + thin white sputum + no thirst + white coat + floating tight pulse新病咳嗽+恶寒为主+痰稀薄色白+口不渴+苔白+脉浮紧
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Zi Su Ye (Perilla leaf) opens the exterior surface and disperses Wind-Cold — the chief exterior-releasing herb. Xing Ren descends Lung Qi and stops cough — once the surface is open, the Qi needs to be directed downward. Qian Hu disperses Wind and descends Qi. Ban Xia and Chen Pi dry Damp and transform any early Phlegm. Fu Ling strengthens Spleen to prevent Phlegm formation. Zhi Ke promotes Qi descent. Together: open exterior → descend Lung → prevent Phlegm. Contrast with Ma Huang Tang (for more severe Wind-Cold with no sweating, tighter pulse) — Xing Su San is gentler, for Wind-Cold without tight constriction of the exterior. 紫苏叶开表解风寒——主要解表药。杏仁降肺气止咳——一旦表开，气需引向下。前胡散风降气。半夏、陈皮燥湿化初期痰液。茯苓健脾防痰生。枳壳促进气机下降。合用：开表→降肺→防痰。与麻黄汤对比（用于较重风寒，无汗，脉更紧）——杏苏散较温和，用于无明显表闭的风寒。
Open exterior, disperse Cold紫苏叶（解表散寒） Descend Lung, stop cough杏仁（降肺止咳） Disperse Wind, descend Qi前胡（散风降气） Dry Damp, transform Phlegm半夏（燥湿化痰） Strengthen Spleen茯苓（健脾） Regulate Qi陈皮（理气） Descend Qi枳壳（降气）
② Wind-Heat② 风热咳嗽——升太过（外热）
Sang Ju Yin桑菊饮
Wen Bing Tiao Bian, Wu Jutong — the foundational Wind-Heat cough formula出处：《温病条辨》吴鞠通——风热咳嗽基础方
New cough + fever predominates + sore throat + yellow sputum + thirst + red tongue tip + floating rapid pulse新病咳嗽+发热为主+咽喉肿痛+黄痰+口渴+舌尖红+脉浮数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Sang Ye (Mulberry leaf) and Ju Hua (Chrysanthemum) clear Wind-Heat from the upper body — they are light, ascending herbs that act on the Lung and head level. Bo He adds cooling surface-opening. Lian Qiao and Jie Geng clear throat Heat and open the throat channel. Xing Ren descends Lung Qi. Lu Gen (Reed root) generates fluids to replace those consumed by Heat. Gan Cao harmonizes. Clinical decision: Sang Ju Yin for mild-moderate Wind-Heat cough. Escalate to Yin Qiao San if throat is severely swollen, high fever, or systemic Heat signs predominate. 桑叶和菊花清上焦风热——轻扬上浮，作用于肺和头面。薄荷增加凉散开表。连翘和桔梗清咽喉热邪，开咽喉通道。杏仁降肺气。芦根生津以补充被热消耗的津液。甘草调和。临床决策：轻中度风热咳嗽用桑菊饮。若咽喉严重肿胀、高热或全身热象为主，升级为银翘散。
Clear Wind-Heat, cool Lung桑叶（清风热，凉肺） Clear upper Heat菊花（清上焦热） Clear Heat, detoxify连翘（清热解毒） Open throat, expel Phlegm桔梗（开喉祛痰） Descend Lung, stop cough杏仁（降肺止咳） Generate fluids芦根（生津） Cool, open surface薄荷（凉散开表）
③ Liver Fire Invading Lung③ 肝火犯肺——升太过（内伤实证）
Xie Bai San + Longdan cao泻白散加龙胆草
Xie Bai San: Xiao Er Yao Zheng Zhi Jue — clear Lung Heat; add Longdan cao to clear Liver Fire泻白散：《小儿药证直诀》——清肺热；加龙胆草清肝火
Paroxysmal cough + anger trigger + chest and flank pain + dry throat + bitter taste + wiry rapid pulse + red tongue yellow coat阵发性咳嗽+情怒诱发+胸胁疼痛+咽干口苦+脉弦数+舌红苔黄
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Xie Bai San (Sang Bai Pi + Di Gu Pi + Gan Cao + Jing Mi) clears Heat from the Lung and descends Lung Qi — it specifically clears Heat that is resident in the Lung. But the root cause here is Liver Fire, not Lung Fire alone. Adding Long Dan Cao directly drains Liver-Gallbladder Fire at the source. Add Huang Qin to clear both Lung and Liver Heat. Add Qing Pi to regulate Liver Qi and open the chest-flank. Cross-disease note: Long Dan Cao appears in Liver Fire tinnitus (Longdan Xiegan Tang), Liver Fire insomnia, Liver Fire migraine, and here — Liver Fire cough. Same organ, same mechanism, same chief herb, different target organ where the Fire has struck. 泻白散（桑白皮+地骨皮+甘草+粳米）清肺热并降肺气——专清居于肺中的热邪。但这里的根本原因是肝火，不单是肺火。加龙胆草在源头直接泻肝胆实火。加黄芩同时清肺和肝热。加青皮疏肝气，开胸胁。异病同治注：龙胆草出现在肝火耳鸣（龙胆泻肝汤）、肝火失眠、肝火偏头痛，以及此处的肝火咳嗽——同一脏腑，同一机制，同一君药，不同的火所攻击的靶器官。
Clear Lung Heat, descend桑白皮（清肺热肃降） Clear deficiency Heat in Lung地骨皮（清肺阴分热） Drain Liver-GB Fire龙胆草（泻肝胆实火） Clear Lung and Liver Heat黄芩（清肺肝热） Regulate Liver Qi, open chest青皮（疏肝气，开胸胁） Descend Lung杏仁（降肺气）
④ Phlegm-Damp④ 痰湿咳嗽——出入失常
Er Chen Tang + San Zi Yang Qin Tang二陈汤合三子养亲汤
Er Chen Tang: He Ji Ju Fang. San Zi Yang Qin Tang: Han Shi Yi Tong — "three seeds nourish the elders" (warm, descend, and transform)二陈汤：《和剂局方》。三子养亲汤：《韩氏医通》——「三子温降化痰」
Chronic cough + abundant white sticky sputum + morning worse + chest oppression + greasy coat + slippery pulse慢性咳嗽+痰多白黏+清晨加重+胸闷+苔腻+脉滑
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Er Chen Tang is the classical Phlegm-Damp base: Ban Xia dries Damp and transforms Phlegm (the strongest Phlegm-drying herb); Chen Pi regulates Qi to prevent Phlegm stasis; Fu Ling strengthens Spleen to stop Phlegm production at the source; Gan Cao harmonizes; Sheng Jiang warms the middle. San Zi Yang Qin Tang adds three seeds specifically for Phlegm-Damp cough: Lai Fu Zi (radish seed) descends Qi and transforms food Phlegm; Bai Jie Zi (white mustard seed) warms and disperses cold Phlegm in the chest; Su Zi (perilla seed) descends Qi and transforms Phlegm while stopping cough. The combination is particularly effective for elderly patients with abundant white sticky Phlegm — exactly the "nourish the elders" population San Zi was designed for. 二陈汤是经典痰湿基础方：半夏燥湿化痰（最强燥痰药）；陈皮理气防痰停；茯苓健脾从来源止痰；甘草调和；生姜温中。三子养亲汤加三种专用于痰湿咳嗽的种子：莱菔子降气化食痰；白芥子温散胸中寒痰；苏子降气化痰止咳。两方合用对老年患者痰多白黏特别有效——正是三子养亲汤设计的「养亲」人群。
Dry Damp, transform Phlegm半夏（燥湿化痰） Regulate Qi陈皮（理气） Strengthen Spleen茯苓（健脾） Descend Qi, food Phlegm莱菔子（降气化食痰） Warm, disperse chest Phlegm白芥子（温散胸中寒痰） Descend Qi, stop cough苏子（降气止咳）
⑤ Lung Yin Xu⑤ 肺阴虚——降不及（虚）
Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang沙参麦冬汤
Wen Bing Tiao Bian, Wu Jutong — nourish Lung-Stomach Yin for post-febrile or chronic Lung dryness出处：《温病条辨》吴鞠通——滋养肺胃之阴，用于病后或慢性肺燥
Dry cough, no sputum + worse afternoon/evening + dry throat mouth + red tongue little coat + thin rapid pulse干咳无痰+午后/傍晚加重+口咽干燥+舌红少苔+脉细数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Sha Shen (Glehnia root) and Mai Men Dong nourish Lung-Stomach Yin — they are the primary Yin-nourishing pair for the upper-middle Jiao. Yu Zhu nourishes Yin and generates fluids. Sang Ye gently clears residual Lung Heat while being moistening (not drying). Tian Hua Fen generates fluids powerfully. Bian Dou strengthens Spleen to support fluid production. Gan Cao harmonizes. Critical teaching: this formula contains no Chuan Bei Mu (fritillary) or other Phlegm-transforming herbs — there is no Phlegm to transform; the cough is from dryness, not from Phlegm. Adding Phlegm-drying herbs would worsen the condition. Match the treatment to the pathomechanism precisely. 沙参和麦门冬滋养肺胃之阴——上中焦滋阴的主要穴对。玉竹养阴生津。桑叶温和清肺残余热邪，且具润性（非燥性）。天花粉有力生津。扁豆健脾以支持液体化生。甘草调和。关键教学：此方不含川贝母或其他化痰药——没有痰可化；咳嗽来自干燥，不是痰。加燥痰药会加重病情。精确将治疗与病机匹配。
Nourish Lung Yin沙参（滋肺阴） Nourish Lung-Stomach Yin麦冬（滋肺胃阴） Nourish Yin, generate fluids玉竹（养阴生津） Generate fluids powerfully天花粉（清热生津） Gently clear residual Heat桑叶（轻清余热） Strengthen Spleen, support fluids扁豆（健脾助津）
Four cases spanning the most important clinical distinctions: Wind-Cold vs Wind-Heat (external), Phlegm-Damp (internal obstruction), and Lung Yin Xu (internal deficiency). Case 4 demonstrates the critical transformation pattern — untreated Wind-Cold becoming Phlegm-Heat.四个案例涵盖最重要的临床鉴别：风寒vs风热（外感）、痰湿（内伤阻滞）和肺阴虚（内伤虚证）。案例四展示关键的转化模式——未治风寒转化为痰热。
Case 1 · Wind-Cold Cough案例一 · 风寒咳嗽
Presentation主诉
Female, 32. Cough began 3 days ago after getting caught in cold rain. Chills worse than fever; she needs extra blankets. Cough produces thin watery white sputum, easy to expectorate. Nasal congestion with clear discharge. No thirst. Headache and body aches. Tongue: normal, thin white coat. Pulse: floating tight. 女性，32岁。3天前淋雨受寒后开始咳嗽。恶寒重于发热；需要额外盖被子。咳嗽有稀薄水样白痰，容易咯出。鼻塞流清涕。口不渴。头痛身痛。舌正常苔薄白，脉浮紧。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic气机分析
New cough + cold trigger + chills > fever + thin white sputum + floating tight pulse = Wind-Cold, confirmed.

Cold rain drove Wind-Cold through the skin into the Wei Qi layer and Lung surface. Cold's contracting nature closed the pores and obstructed Lung diffusion → descent also blocked → Qi rebelled upward → cough. The thin watery white sputum = Cold has not yet transformed to Heat (fluid remains clear and cool). The floating pulse = pathogen is still at the surface (not yet internalized).

Urgency: Treat immediately. Wind-Cold can transform to Heat within 3–5 days of onset, especially if the patient stays in heated indoor environments. Once transformed, treatment changes completely — the window for surface-opening is short. 新病咳嗽+寒冷诱发+恶寒>发热+痰稀白+脉浮紧=风寒，升太过确认。

冷雨将风寒通过皮肤驱入卫气层和肺表面。寒性收缩关闭毛孔，阻碍肺宣发→肃降也被阻→气逆上行→咳嗽。稀薄水样白痰=寒尚未化热（液体仍清凉）。浮脉=病邪仍在表层（尚未内化）。

紧迫性：立即治疗。风寒在发病3–5天内可化热，尤其是患者待在温热室内环境。一旦转化，治疗完全改变——开表的窗口期很短。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture: LU 7 + BL 13 bilateral (even method — open Lung) LI 4 bilateral (reducing — release surface) GV 14 (even + moxa 15 min — disperse Cold at Wei Qi level) LU 5 bilateral (cool and descend Lung Qi)

Formula: Xing Su San, 3–5 days

Practical advice: Warm ginger tea (— fresh ginger + brown sugar in hot water) immediately on leaving clinic — warms the interior and assists the herbs in dispersing Cold. Rest, stay warm. Daily treatment if possible for first 3 days.

Outcome marker: Within 24–48 hours: sweating begins (surface opening), cough loosens, sputum may temporarily increase then decrease. If sputum turns yellow or green — Wind-Cold has transformed to Heat; switch to Sang Ju Yin immediately. 针灸：双侧列缺+肺俞（平补平泻——开肺）· 双侧合谷（泻法——解表）· 大椎（平补平泻+灸15分钟——在卫气层散寒）· 双侧尺泽（凉降肺气）

方药：杏苏散，3–5天

实用建议：离诊所后立即饮热姜糖水（生姜红糖水）——温中助药散寒。休息，保暖。前3天如能每日治疗最佳。

疗效标志：24–48小时内：开始出汗（表开），咳嗽松动，痰量可能短暂增多后减少。若痰变黄绿——风寒已化热；立即换桑菊饮。
Case 2 · Liver Fire Invading Lung案例二 · 肝火犯肺
Presentation主诉
Male, 47. Cough for 6 weeks. Comes in episodes — seemingly triggered by stressful meetings at work or arguments at home. Episodes last 5–10 minutes of paroxysmal coughing, hard to stop once started. Feels like "Qi rushing up" into his chest. Chest tightness and right flank pain during attacks. Dry throat, bitter taste. Occasionally coughs up a small amount of blood-streaked sputum. Face flushes during attacks. No fever, no chills. Tongue: red, yellow coat. Pulse: wiry rapid, strong at guan. 男性，47岁。咳嗽6周。以发作性出现——似乎由工作中有压力的会议或家中争吵触发。每次发作持续5–10分钟阵发性咳嗽，一旦开始难以停止。感觉「气上冲」入胸。发作时胸部憋闷，右胁疼痛。咽干口苦。偶尔咯出少量血丝痰。发作时面色潮红。无发热恶寒。舌红苔黄，脉弦数，关部有力。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic + Cross-Disease Recognition气机分析+跨病种识别
Paroxysmal + anger trigger + flank pain + bitter taste + wiry rapid pulse = (Liver Fire invading Lung), confirmed.

The distinctive feature is the paroxysmal, emotion-triggered nature — this is not the continuous cough of Wind or Phlegm, but explosive bursts driven by Liver Fire erupting upward into the Lung. The flank pain during coughing = Liver channel tension (the Liver channel runs through the flanks; when Fire is in the channel, coughing creates tension and pain along it). Blood-streaked sputum = Heat damaging the Lung vessels (not yet serious, but requires monitoring).

Cross-disease recognition: this patient's Liver Fire also likely causes sleep disruption around 1–3am, right-sided headaches during stress, and possible right flank heaviness — the same Fire is acting on different target organs simultaneously. Treating the Liver Fire resolves all of these together. 阵发+情怒诱发+胁痛+口苦+脉弦数=木火刑金（肝火犯肺），升太过确认。

特征性表现是阵发性、情绪诱发的性质——这不是风邪或痰湿的持续性咳嗽，而是肝火爆发向上冲入肺的爆炸性发作。咳嗽时胁痛=肝经紧张（肝经过胁肋；当火在经络中，咳嗽沿经络产生紧张和疼痛）。血丝痰=热邪伤肺络（尚不严重，但需要监测）。

跨病种识别：这个患者的肝火很可能同时引起1–3点的睡眠障碍、压力时的右侧头痛和可能的右胁沉重——同一肝火同时作用于不同靶器官。清肝火同时解决所有这些问题。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all reducing): LU 7 + BL 13 bilateral · LV 2 + LV 3 bilateral (clear Liver Fire at source) · LU 6 bilateral (Xi-Cleft — stop acute cough) · GB 34 bilateral (release flank constraint) · PC 6 (calm the emotional trigger)

Formula: Xie Bai San + Long Dan Cao 6g + Huang Qin 10g + Qing Pi 6g

Blood-streaked sputum: Add Di Gu Pi and Bai Mao Gen (White Imperata root) to cool Blood and stop bleeding. If persistent or worsening, refer for chest X-ray.

Lifestyle essential: Stress management. The Liver Fire will continue to flare as long as the emotional trigger persists. This is not optional — it is part of the pathomechanism. Even perfect herbal treatment will be undermined by continued anger and frustration. 针灸（全程泻法）：双侧列缺+肺俞 · 双侧行间+太冲（在源头清肝火）· 双侧孔最（郄穴——阻止急性咳嗽）· 双侧阳陵泉（解胁部拘束）· 内关（平息情志触发）

方药：泻白散+龙胆草6g+黄芩10g+青皮6g

血丝痰：加地骨皮和白茅根凉血止血。若持续或加重，转介胸部X线检查。

生活方式：压力管理。只要情绪诱因持续存在，肝火就会继续爆发。这不是可选项——它是病机的一部分。即使完美的方药治疗，持续的愤怒和郁闷也会抵消疗效。
Case 3 · Lung Yin Deficiency案例三 · 肺阴虚咳嗽
Presentation主诉
Female, 52. Dry cough for 4 months following a severe respiratory illness. No sputum at all — just a persistent dry tickle in the throat that triggers the cough. Worse in the afternoon from about 3pm, continues into evening and night. Dry throat and mouth — drinking water doesn't help. Night sweats (wakes with damp pillow). Slight afternoon warmth but no fever on thermometer. Lost 3kg over 4 months. Tongue: red, very little coat, dry. Pulse: thin rapid. 女性，52岁。严重呼吸道疾病后干咳4个月。完全无痰——只是持续的咽喉干痒触发咳嗽。从下午3点左右开始加重，持续至傍晚和夜间。口咽干燥——喝水无济于事。盗汗（醒来枕头湿）。轻微午后烦热但体温计无发热。4个月内体重减轻3kg。舌红苔极少且干，脉细数。
Reasoning + Clinical Alert推理+临床警示
Post-illness dry cough + afternoon worse + night sweats + weight loss + red dry tongue little coat + thin rapid pulse = Lung Yin Xu, confirmed.

The severe respiratory illness consumed Lung Yin — this is the classic post-febrile Yin damage pattern described in the Wen Bing literature. The residual Heat (from the illness) has depleted the Lung's fluid reserve, leaving it dry and unable to perform its moistening-descent function.

Clinical alert — weight loss of 3kg in 4 months + night sweats + dry cough: While this presentation fits Lung Yin Xu cleanly, this triad also overlaps with tuberculosis and lung malignancy. Before committing to TCM treatment alone, refer for chest imaging and basic investigations to rule out organic pathology. This is a professional responsibility, not an option. TCM treatment can proceed alongside medical investigation. 病后干咳+午后加重+盗汗+体重减轻+舌红干苔少+脉细数=肺阴虚，降不及确认。

严重呼吸道疾病消耗了肺阴——这是温病文献中描述的经典病后阴伤证型。疾病遗留的热邪耗竭了肺的液体储备，使其干燥，无法执行润泽肃降功能。

临床警示——4个月体重减轻3kg+盗汗+干咳：虽然此表现完全符合肺阴虚，但这个三联征也与结核病和肺部恶性肿瘤重叠。在单独投入中医治疗之前，转介胸部影像和基本检查以排除器质性病变。这是职业责任，不是选项。中医治疗可以与医学检查同步进行。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all tonification, NO moxa): LU 7 + BL 13 bilateral (tonification) · LU 9 bilateral (Source — nourish Lung Yin) · KI 6 bilateral (tonify Kidney Yin — Water generates Metal) · SP 6 bilateral (nourish all Yin) · CV 22 (moisten throat locally)

Formula: Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang — sustained 6–8 week course

Absolutely no moxa. No drying herbs (Ban Xia, Chen Pi, Cang Zhu). No warming herbs. Dietary advice: moistening foods (pears, lily bulb, white wood ear fungus, honey, sesame). Avoid spicy, fried, alcohol.

Timeline: Dry cough from Yin deficiency takes weeks to months to resolve — the Yin reservoir must be rebuilt. Night sweats typically improve first (2–3 weeks), then throat dryness, then cough frequency and intensity gradually reduce. 针灸（全程补法，绝不灸）：双侧列缺+肺俞（补法）· 双侧太渊（原穴——滋肺阴）· 双侧照海（滋肾阴——水生金）· 双侧三阴交（滋养所有阴经）· 天突（局部润泽咽喉）

方药：沙参麦冬汤——持续6–8周疗程

绝对不灸。无燥性药（半夏、陈皮、苍术）。无温热药。饮食建议：润养食物（梨、百合、白木耳、蜂蜜、芝麻）。忌辛辣、油炸、酒。

时间线：阴虚干咳需数周至数月解决——阴液储备须重建。盗汗通常最先改善（2–3周），然后咽喉干燥，最后咳嗽频率和强度逐渐减少。
Case 4 · The Transformation — Wind-Cold Becoming Phlegm-Heat案例四 · 转化模式——风寒转化为痰热
Presentation主诉
Male, 28. Started with typical Wind-Cold 2.5 weeks ago (chills, thin white sputum). Did not seek treatment; tried to "push through." Now: chills have disappeared; replaced by fever (38.2°C). Sputum has changed from thin white to thick yellow-green, difficult to expectorate. Cough is now more frequent and productive. Sore throat. Thirsty for cold drinks. Tongue: red, yellow thick coat. Pulse: slippery rapid, no longer floating. 男性，28岁。2.5周前以典型风寒起病（恶寒，痰稀薄色白）。未就诊；试图「硬撑」。现在：恶寒消失；代之以发热（38.2°C）。痰液从稀薄白色变为稠厚黄绿色，难以咯出。咳嗽现在更频繁，有痰。咽喉疼痛。口渴喜冷饮。舌红苔黄厚，脉滑数，不再浮。
The Transformation Pattern — A Teaching Case转化模式——教学案例
This case illustrates the most important transformation in cough management: Wind-Cold → Phlegm-Heat.

What happened: Wind-Cold entered the body and was not expelled (no treatment, warm indoor environment, possibly over-dressed causing Heat to accumulate). The Cold transformed into Heat internally over 7–10 days. The Heat then "cooked" the originally thin white sputum into thick yellow-green Phlegm. The pathogen is now internal, not on the surface — the floating pulse is gone (sunk inward), confirming internalization.

Critical teaching point: the treatment is now completely different. Opening the surface with Wind-Cold herbs (Su Ye, Sheng Jiang) would be wrong — the exterior has already closed. The pathogen is now Phlegm-Heat inside the Lung. Treatment: clear Heat + transform Phlegm → Qing Fei Hua Tan formula.

This transformation is preventable: treating Wind-Cold within the first 3–5 days almost always prevents it from internalizing. This is why urgency of treatment in early external cough is clinically important — not just for comfort, but to prevent a more complicated internal pattern from developing. 此案例展示咳嗽处理中最重要的转化：风寒→痰热。

发生了什么：风寒入侵体内未被驱出（无治疗，温热室内环境，可能过度保暖导致热积聚）。寒邪在7–10天内在内部化热。热邪随后将原来稀薄白痰「煎」成稠厚黄绿痰。病邪现在在内部，不在表面——浮脉消失（沉入内部），确认内化。

关键教学点：治疗现在完全不同。用风寒药开表（苏叶、生姜）是错误的——表已经关闭。病邪现在是肺内痰热。治疗：清热+化痰→清肺化痰方剂。

这种转化是可以预防的：在前3–5天内治疗风寒几乎总能防止其内化。这就是为什么外感咳嗽早期治疗的紧迫性在临床上很重要——不只是为了舒适，而是为了防止更复杂的内伤证型发展。
Treatment Plan — Phlegm-Heat治疗方案——痰热
Acupuncture (reducing): LU 7 + BL 13 bilateral (reducing) LI 11 + LI 4 bilateral (clear Heat, reduce fever) ST 40 bilateral (transform Phlegm) LU 5 bilateral (cool and descend Lung Qi — Water point of Lung) LU 11 (prick to bleed for sore throat)

Formula: Qing Jin Hua Tan Tang — clears Lung Heat and transforms Phlegm: Huang Qin, Zhi Zi, Sang Bai Pi, Jie Geng, Mai Dong, Gua Lou, Bei Mu, Chen Pi, Fu Ling, Gan Cao

No moxa. No warming herbs. The surface is now closed and the interior is Hot — warming would worsen the condition. 针灸（泻法）：双侧列缺+肺俞（泻法）· 双侧曲池+合谷（清热退烧）· 双侧丰隆（化痰）· 双侧尺泽（凉降肺气——肺经水穴）· 少商（点刺出血治咽痛）

方药：清金化痰汤——清肺热化痰：黄芩、栀子、桑白皮、桔梗、麦冬、瓜蒌、贝母、陈皮、茯苓、甘草

不灸。无温热药。表现已关闭，内部有热——温热会加重病情。
Emotional Disorders情志病证
Depression · Constraint Disorder郁证
Root: is not simply "sadness" — it is a systemic failure of the Liver's smoothing and flowing function. When Qi cannot move freely, it stagnates. Stagnant Qi generates Heat, Phlegm, Blood stasis, and Shen disturbance in sequence. The entire disease trajectory is a cascade from one initial failure of movement.根本：郁证不单是「悲伤」——它是肝的疏泄功能的系统性失常。当气不能自由流动，则郁滞。郁滞之气依次产生热、痰、血瘀和神志扰乱。整个疾病轨迹是从一个最初的运动失常开始的级联反应。
Related:相关模块：
The first and most critical question: is this primarily emotional constraint (Qi stagnation) or has it progressed to physical manifestations (Phlegm, Fire, Blood stasis, or deficiency)? Early-stageis pure Qi stagnation — it moves quickly with Qi-regulating treatment. Late-stagehas transformed into one or more secondary pathologies that require targeted treatment beyond simple Qi regulation. 首要关键问题：这主要是情志郁结（气滞）还是已经进展为躯体表现（痰、火、血瘀或虚损）？早期郁证是单纯气滞——用理气治疗反应迅速。晚期郁证已转化为一个或多个继发病理，需要超出简单理气的针对性治疗。
Core Framework · The Cascade from Qi Stagnation核心框架 · 从气滞开始的级联反应
Danxi Xin Fa: "The six— Qi, Blood, Damp, Fire, Phlegm, Food." But in clinical practice, Qi stagnation is always the initiating event. The sequence:

Emotional frustration / suppressed anger / chronic stress → Liver Qi stagnation
↓ (if untreated, weeks to months)
Stagnant Qi generates Heat → Liver Fire
↓ (months)
Fire consumes Yin → Heart-Liver Yin Xu
↓ or parallel track:
Liver overacts on Spleen → Qi stagnation + Phlegm (+ Phlegm obstruction)
↓ (long-standing stagnation)
Qi cannot move Blood → Qi-Blood stagnation (deeper) 《丹溪心法》：「六郁——气、血、湿、火、痰、食。」但临床实践中，气滞始终是起始事件。序列：

情志郁闷/被压制的愤怒/慢性压力→肝气郁结（出入失常）
↓（若未治疗，数周至数月）
郁滞之气生热→肝火（升太过）
↓（数月）
火耗伤阴→心肝阴虚（降不及）
↓ 或平行轨迹：
肝克脾→气滞+痰（出入失常+痰阻）
↓（长期郁滞）
气不能行血→气血郁滞（更深的出入失常）
Why this matters clinically: A patient who has been depressed for 2 weeks needs Qi regulation. A patient who has been depressed for 2 years and is now also anxious, insomniac, has chest tightness, and feels a lump in the throat — has progressed through multiple transformation stages. The treatment must match the current stage, not the initiating event. Asking "when did it start and how has it changed" is more important than any single symptom. 临床意义：抑郁2周的患者需要理气。抑郁2年且现在也有焦虑、失眠、胸闷、咽喉有异物感的患者——已经经历了多个转化阶段。治疗必须匹配当前阶段，而不是起始事件。询问「何时开始，如何变化」比任何单一症状都重要。
Group 1 · Duration and Trajectory — Maps the Stage第一组 · 病程与轨迹——确定阶段
Duration病程
How long have these emotional symptoms been present? Weeks, months, or years? Has the character of the symptoms changed over time?这些情志症状存在多久了？数周、数月还是数年？症状的性质随时间改变了吗？
→ Duration maps the transformation stage; character change reveals which secondary pathology has developed→ 病程反映转化阶段；症状性质变化揭示已发展出哪种继发病理
＋
Mechanism · Reading the Timeline机理 · 解读时间线
Weeks — Pure Qi stagnation: Still reversible with relatively simple Qi-regulating treatment. The patient can often identify a triggering event (job loss, relationship conflict, grief). Primary symptoms: chest and flank distension, sighing, mood variability (better or worse with changes in circumstance), no fixed heat or cold signs.

Months — Qi stagnation + early transformation: Heat signs beginning to appear (irritability, poor sleep, restless mind). Or Phlegm signs (heaviness, foggy thinking, sensation of lump in throat). The patient can no longer identify a single trigger — the pattern has become self-sustaining.

Years — Multiple transformations, deficiency predominating: Heat has consumed Yin → fatigue, dry mouth, afternoon warmth, poor memory. Or long-standing stagnation has produced Blood stasis → fixed pain, dark complexion, choppy pulse. Both are serious and require more complex treatment. The initial emotional trigger may be forgotten or unimportant — the current pathology has its own momentum. 数周——单纯气滞：用相对简单的理气治疗仍可逆。患者通常能识别诱发事件（失业、关系冲突、悲伤）。主要症状：胸胁胀满、叹气、情绪不稳（随环境改变好转或加重），无固定寒热体征。

数月——气滞+早期转化：热象开始出现（烦躁、睡眠差、心神不宁）。或痰象（沉重、思维模糊、咽喉异物感）。患者无法再识别单一触发因素——证型已变得自我维持。

数年——多次转化，虚损为主：热邪已耗伤阴液→疲乏、口干、午后烦热、记忆力差。或长期郁滞产生血瘀→固定疼痛、面色晦暗、脉涩。两者均严重，需要更复杂的治疗。初始情志诱发因素可能已被遗忘或不重要——当前病理有其自身动力。
Direction答案指向
Weeks, clear trigger数周，明确诱因
Pure Qi stagnation — regulate Qi单纯气滞——理气
Months, irritable + poor sleep数月，烦躁+睡眠差
Qi stagnation → Fire — clear + regulate气滞化火——清热+理气
Years, fatigue + dry + poor memory数年，疲乏+干燥+健忘
Yin/Qi Xu predominating — tonify阴/气虚为主——补益
Group 2 · The Emotional Quality — Identifies the Primary Organ第二组 · 情志性质——识别主要脏腑
Emotion情志
Primarily low mood / withdrawal / loss of interest — or primarily irritability / frustration / suppressed anger?主要是情绪低落/退缩/兴趣丧失——还是主要是烦躁/郁闷/被压制的愤怒？
→ The emotion's quality identifies the predominant organ disruption→ 情志性质识别主要的脏腑失调
＋
Mechanism · Five-Zang Emotional Attribution机理 · 五脏情志归属
Frustration / suppressed anger / irritability → Liver Qi stagnation: Anger is the Liver's emotion. When anger cannot be expressed (social suppression, cultural norms, power dynamics), it turns inward → Liver Qi stagnates. The patient often reports being "unable to express how they feel" or feeling trapped. This is the most common primary pattern in TCM depression. Sighing is the body's attempt to release the constrained Qi through breath.

Sadness / grief / weeping easily → Lung and Heart involvement: Grief is the Lung's emotion. Prolonged grief depletes Lung Qi and Heart Blood simultaneously. The patient may cry easily, feel hollow in the chest, have a thin weak pulse. This is more common in loss-triggered depression (bereavement, major loss).

Excessive worry / overthinking / mental fog → Spleen: Pensiveness is the Spleen's emotion. Chronic worry damages the Spleen → Phlegm forms → further clouding the mind. The patient feels mentally foggy, has poor concentration, and may have concurrent digestive symptoms. Often seen in academic overwork or anxiety-predominant depression.

Fear / anxiety / startle easily → Kidney and Heart: Fear depletes Kidney Qi; persistent anxiety keeps the Heart's Shen unsettled. The patient feels a persistent underlying dread, cannot relax, startles at sounds. Often seen in chronic anxiety disorders. 郁闷/被压制的愤怒/烦躁→肝气郁结：怒是肝的情志。当愤怒无法表达（社会压制、文化规范、权力关系），就转向内→肝气郁结。患者常报告「无法表达感受」或感觉被困。这是中医抑郁中最常见的原发证型。叹气是身体试图通过呼吸释放郁滞气机的动作。

悲伤/悲痛/容易哭泣→肺和心受累：悲是肺的情志。长期悲伤同时耗竭肺气和心血。患者容易哭泣，感觉胸部空洞，脉细弱。更常见于丧失诱发的抑郁（丧亲、重大失去）。

过度担忧/反复思虑/思维模糊→脾：思是脾的情志。慢性忧虑损伤脾→痰生→进一步蒙蔽心智。患者感觉思维模糊，注意力差，可能有同步消化症状。常见于学习过劳或以焦虑为主的抑郁。

恐惧/焦虑/容易惊吓→肾和心：恐耗竭肾气；持续焦虑使心神不安。患者感到持续的深层恐惧感，无法放松，对声音容易惊吓。常见于慢性焦虑障碍。
Direction答案指向
Frustration / trapped feeling郁闷/被困感
Liver Qi stagnation — primary pattern肝气郁结——原发证型
Sadness / grief / hollow chest悲伤/哀痛/胸部空洞
Lung-Heart involvement肺心受累
Worry / fog / poor concentration忧虑/思维模糊/注意力差
Spleen (Phlegm) pattern脾（痰）证型
Fear / anxiety / startle恐惧/焦虑/易惊
Kidney-Heart axis肾心轴
Group 3 · Physical Manifestations — Confirms Secondary Transformation第三组 · 躯体表现——确认继发转化
Body躯体
Chest and flank distension, sighing? Or throat lump sensation? Or insomnia / irritability / heat? Or fatigue and poor memory?胸胁胀满、叹气？还是咽喉异物感？还是失眠/烦躁/热象？还是疲乏和记忆力差？
→ Physical symptoms identify which transformation has occurred and guide the specific treatment target→ 躯体症状识别发生了哪种转化，指导具体的治疗靶点
＋
Mechanism · Physical Manifestations Map the Transformation机理 · 躯体表现反映转化
Chest/flank distension + frequent sighing (pure Qi stagnation): Qi is blocked in the Liver channel (flanks) and chest. Sighing temporarily releases pressure. These are the mildest physical signs — earliest stage.

Throat lump that cannot be coughed out or swallowed (— Phlegm-Qi): Liver Qi stagnation + Spleen Phlegm production → Phlegm and Qi congeal together in the throat. The sensation is real but nothing is found on examination. Directly related to— see the Plum Pit Qi module for full treatment.

Insomnia + irritability + heat sensation (Fire transformation): Qi stagnation → Heat → disturbs the Heart Shen. This is the most clinically urgent secondary transformation — insomnia fromFire is very common and very distressing. → See Emotional Insomnia module for full treatment of this pattern.

Fatigue + poor memory + dry mouth (Yin/Qi deficiency): Long-standing Fire has consumed Yin, or chronic Qi stagnation has depleted the Qi it was consuming. Now the condition is predominantly deficiency — simple Qi-regulating treatment is insufficient and may even be depleting. 胸胁胀满+频繁叹气（单纯气滞）：气机阻滞于肝经（胁部）和胸部。叹气暂时释放压力。这是最轻微的躯体体征——最早期阶段。

咽喉异物感，咯不出也咽不下（梅核气——痰气郁结）：肝气郁结+脾生痰→痰与气在咽喉凝结。感觉真实但检查未发现异常。与郁证直接相关——完整治疗见梅核气模块。

失眠+烦躁+热感（化火转化）：气滞→热邪→扰动心神。这是临床上最紧迫的继发转化——郁证化火型失眠非常常见且非常痛苦。→ 此证型完整治疗见情志失眠模块。

疲乏+记忆力差+口干（阴/气虚）：长期火热耗伤阴液，或慢性气滞耗竭所消耗的气。现在以虚损为主——简单的理气治疗不足，甚至可能进一步耗竭。
Direction答案指向
Chest/flank + sighing胸胁+叹气
Pure Qi stagnation ①单纯气滞①
Throat lump咽喉异物感
Phlegm-Qi ② → Plum Pit module痰气②→梅核气模块
Insomnia + irritable + heat失眠+烦躁+热象
Fire ③ → Emotional Insomnia module化火③→情志失眠模块
Fatigue + dry + poor memory疲乏+干燥+健忘
Yin/Qi Xu ④⑤阴/气虚④⑤
Safety安全
Has the patient expressed thoughts of self-harm, hopelessness, or feeling that life is not worth living?患者是否表达过自伤的想法、绝望感或感觉生命没有意义？
→ Mandatory safety screen — must be asked at every initial consultation for emotional disorders→ 强制性安全筛查——每次情志病初诊都必须询问
＋
Clinical Responsibility临床责任
This question must be asked directly and without apology. Avoiding this question out of discomfort is a clinical failure. The question does not plant suicidal ideation — research consistently shows that asking about suicide does not increase risk, and often provides relief to the patient who has been afraid to raise the topic.

If the patient expresses active suicidal ideation with a plan → this is beyond TCM scope. Provide crisis resources immediately (Crisis Services Canada: 1-833-456-4566; or local emergency services) and document the referral. Do not attempt to manage an actively suicidal patient with acupuncture alone.

If the patient expresses passive hopelessness ("I don't care if I wake up") → this is within TCM scope but warrants close monitoring, more frequent sessions, and explicit discussion of when to escalate. Coordinate with the patient's family doctor or mental health provider. 必须直接询问这个问题，不要回避。因不舒适而回避这个问题是临床失职。问题不会植入自杀意念——研究一致表明询问自杀不会增加风险，往往给一直害怕提起这个话题的患者带来解脱。

若患者表达有计划的积极自杀意念→超出中医范围。立即提供危机资源（加拿大危机服务：1-833-456-4566；或当地急救服务）并记录转介。不要试图单独用针灸处理有积极自杀意念的患者。

若患者表达被动的绝望（「我不在乎自己是否会醒来」）→在中医范围内，但需要密切监测、更频繁的治疗，以及关于何时升级的明确讨论。与患者的家庭医生或心理健康提供者协调。
Direction答案指向
Active plan / intent有计划/意图
Crisis referral immediately — beyond TCM scope立即危机转介——超出中医范围
Passive hopelessness被动绝望
TCM + close monitoring + coordinate care中医+密切监测+协调医疗
No — emotional distress only否——只有情志痛苦
Proceed with TCM assessment继续中医评估
Five patterns following the cascade sequence. Patterns ① and ② are excess (stagnation/fire). Patterns ③ and ④ are mixed (stagnation + deficiency). Pattern ⑤ is primarily deficiency. The patterns often overlap and transition — document which features are present and treat the most prominent. Never try to fit a patient into a single rigid pattern.五个证型按级联序列排列。①②是实证（郁滞/火）。③④是虚实夹杂（郁滞+虚损）。⑤以虚损为主。证型常重叠和过渡——记录存在哪些特征，治疗最突出的。绝不要试图将患者强行归入单一刚性证型。
Excess Stagnation Patterns出入失常 · 实证郁滞类

① Liver Qi Stagnation肝气郁结

— Liver's smooth-flow function arrested出入失常——肝疏泄功能受阻
The foundational pattern — all otherpatterns develop from this. Emotional constraint prevents Liver Qi from flowing freely. The most reversible pattern; responds quickly to treatment. Duration: typically weeks to a few months.基础证型——所有其他郁证证型都从此发展。情志郁结阻止肝气自由流动。最可逆的证型；对治疗反应迅速。病程：通常数周至数月。
  • Emotional depression; mood changes with circumstances情绪抑郁；情绪随环境改变
  • Chest and flank distension; frequent sighing胸胁胀满；频繁叹气
  • Irritability; frustration; feeling trapped or unable to express烦躁；郁闷；感觉被困或无法表达
  • Menstrual irregularity in women (Liver governs Blood and menstruation)女性月经不调（肝主血，主月经）
  • Tongue: normal or slightly dark edges; Pulse: wiry舌正常或边略暗；脉弦

② Qi Stagnation + Phlegm Obstruction气郁痰阻（梅核气型）

— Phlegm and Qi congeal, obstructing the throat and chest出入失常——痰气凝结，阻塞咽喉和胸部
Liver overacts on Spleen → Spleen produces Phlegm → Phlegm combines with stagnant Qi → lodges in throat and chest. The throat lump is the pathognomonic feature. See Plum Pit Qi module for complete treatment of the throat presentation.肝克脾→脾生痰→痰与郁滞之气结合→停留于咽喉（梅核气）和胸部。咽喉异物感是特征性表现。咽喉表现的完整治疗见梅核气模块。
  • Throat lump sensation — "something stuck" — cannot cough out or swallow; exam normal咽喉异物感——「有东西卡着」——咯不出咽不下；检查正常
  • Chest oppression and fullness; belching胸部憋闷胀满；嗳气
  • Mental fog; heavy head; poor concentration思维模糊；头重；注意力差
  • Tongue: normal or slight coat; Pulse: wiry slippery舌正常或苔略腻；脉弦滑
→ Fire Transformation Pattern升太过→出入失常 · 化火转化类

③ Liver Fire Disturbing the Heart Shen肝火扰神

— Stagnant Qi transforms to Fire; Fire disturbs Heart Shen升太过——郁滞之气化火；火扰心神
Qi stagnation generates Heat → Heat rises and disturbs the Heart's Shen. The most distressing secondary pattern — insomnia, agitation, and anxiety are prominent. This pattern bridgesand emotional insomnia. → For complete insomnia treatment: see Emotional Insomnia module.气滞生热→热邪上扰心神。最令人痛苦的继发证型——失眠、躁动和焦虑突出。此证型连接郁证和情志失眠。→ 失眠完整治疗：见情志失眠模块。
  • Depression + pronounced irritability and agitation抑郁+明显烦躁不安
  • Insomnia — difficulty falling asleep, or waking 1–3am (Liver time)失眠——难以入睡，或1–3点醒来（肝经时）
  • Palpitations; restless mind that "won't stop"心悸；心神不宁，「停不下来」
  • Bitter taste; headache; red eyes; constipation口苦；头痛；目赤；便秘
  • Tongue: red, yellow coat; Pulse: wiry rapid舌红苔黄；脉弦数
+ Deficiency Patterns (Long-standing)降不及+出入失常 · 虚损类（久病）

④ Heart-Spleen Deficiency心脾两虚

— Qi and Blood insufficient to nourish Heart Shen升不及——气血不足，不能养心神
Chronic Qi stagnation injures the Spleen (Liver overacts) → Spleen fails to generate Qi and Blood → Heart loses its nourishment → Shen becomes unstable. Sadness and tearfulness predominate rather than irritability. The depleted pattern.慢性气滞损伤脾（肝克）→脾失化生气血→心失濡养→神志不稳。以悲伤和流泪为主而非烦躁。虚耗证型。
  • Depression with sadness, weeping easily; loss of interest in all activities抑郁伴悲伤，容易哭泣；对所有活动失去兴趣
  • Palpitations; poor memory; difficulty concentrating心悸；记忆力差；注意力难以集中
  • Fatigue; poor appetite; loose stools疲乏；食欲不振；便溏
  • Insomnia — difficulty staying asleep; many dreams失眠——难以维持睡眠；多梦
  • Tongue: pale, thin coat; Pulse: thin weak舌淡苔薄；脉细弱

⑤ Yin Deficiency with Empty Fire阴虚火旺

— Fire exhausted Yin; Empty Fire disturbs Shen降不及——火耗伤阴；虚火扰神
Long-standing Liver Fire has consumed Kidney and Heart Yin. Now the Heat is "empty" (deficiency Heat, not excess Fire) — it is subtler but harder to resolve. The patient looks and feels depleted but is still agitated. Tonify Yin and clear empty Heat simultaneously.长期肝火耗竭肾和心之阴。现在热是「虚热」（虚性热，不是实火）——更隐微但更难解决。患者看起来和感觉都虚耗，但仍有躁动。同时滋阴清虚热。
  • Depression + restlessness and agitation despite obvious fatigue抑郁+尽管明显疲乏仍有躁动不安
  • Afternoon warmth; night sweats; dry mouth (worse at night)午后烦热；盗汗；口干（夜间加重）
  • Poor memory; dizziness; tinnitus记忆力差；眩晕；耳鸣
  • Tongue: red, little or no coat, dry; Pulse: thin rapid舌红，苔少或无，干；脉细数
Decision Steps破案决策步骤
Step 1:第一步： Duration + character: weeks + frustrated/trapped + chest/flank/sighing → ① pure Qi stagnation 病程+性质：数周+郁闷/被困+胸胁/叹气→①单纯气滞
Step 2:第二步： Add throat lump + chest oppression + mental fog → ② Phlegm-Qi (→ Plum Pit module for throat treatment) 加咽喉异物感+胸部憋闷+思维模糊→②痰气（→梅核气模块治咽喉）
Step 3:第二步： Months + irritability escalating + insomnia + bitter taste + red tongue yellow coat → ③ Liver Fire (→ Emotional Insomnia for sleep treatment) 数月+烦躁加剧+失眠+口苦+舌红苔黄→③肝火（→情志失眠治睡眠）
Step 4:第四步： Years + sadness/weeping + fatigue + pale tongue + thin weak pulse → ④ Heart-Spleen Xu 数年+悲伤哭泣+疲乏+舌淡+脉细弱→④心脾两虚
Step 5:第五步： Fatigue + agitation + afternoon heat + night sweats + red dry tongue little coat + thin rapid pulse → ⑤ Yin Xu Empty Fire 疲乏+躁动+午后热+盗汗+舌红干少苔+脉细数→⑤阴虚火旺
⚠ ALWAYS:始终： Screen for suicidal ideation at every visit. Document the screening and response. If active suicidal ideation is present → immediate crisis referral. This is a professional and ethical obligation, not optional. 每次就诊都筛查自杀意念。记录筛查和反应。如有积极自杀意念→立即危机转介。这是职业和伦理义务，不是可选项。
Allpatterns share one base point: LV 3 — the Liver Source point and the most direct access to restoring smooth Qi flow. Beyond that, the strategy shifts: excess patterns reduce stagnation/fire; deficiency patterns tonify the depleted organ. The "Four Gates" (LV 3 + LI 4) is the most powerful Qi-regulating combination in acupuncture — essential for allpatterns with an active excess component.所有郁证证型共享一个基础穴位：太冲——肝经原穴，恢复气机顺畅流动最直接的入口。此后策略转变：实证减少郁滞/火；虚证补益虚损脏腑。「四关」（太冲+合谷）是针灸中最有力的理气组合——所有有实邪成分的郁证证型均必用。
Base Points · All Patterns with Excess Component基础穴位 · 所有有实邪成分的证型
四关 LV 3 + LI 4
Taichong + Hegu The Four Gates太冲 + 合谷 · 四关穴
The most powerful Qi-regulating combination — opens the four "gates" of the body's Qi flow最有力的理气组合——开通身体气机流动的四个「关口」
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
LV 3 (Taichong, "Supreme Surge") is the Source and Earth point of the Liver channel — it directly releases Liver Qi stagnation, the root of allpatterns. LI 4 (Hegu, "Joining Valley") is the Source point of the Large Intestine — paired with the Lung (the distributor of Qi to the body surface). Together, these four points (LV 3 bilateral + LI 4 bilateral) open the four major Qi "gates" of the body: two at the hands, two at the feet. The combination moves Qi in all directions simultaneously, breaking up stagnation wherever it has accumulated. Classical teaching: is to Qi stagnation what ST 40 is to Phlegm — the premier specific point combination for the pattern. Used in everypattern where Qi stagnation is still active (patterns ① ② ③).太冲（「至高冲击」）是肝经原穴和土穴——直接解除肝气郁结，所有郁证证型的根本。合谷（「汇聚之谷」）是大肠经原穴——与肺相表里（肺将气布散至体表）。合用，这四个穴位（双侧太冲+双侧合谷）开通身体四个主要气机「关口」：两个在手，两个在脚。组合同时向所有方向行气，无论积聚在何处都能破解郁滞。经典教学：四关之于气滞，如同丰隆之于痰——证型的首要专效穴组合。用于所有气滞仍活跃的郁证证型（①②③）。
Technique操作
LV 3: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, reducing for excess, even for mixed. LI 4: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, reducing for excess. Both bilateral. Note: LI 4 is contraindicated in pregnancy.太冲：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，实证泻法，虚实夹杂平补平泻。合谷：直刺0.5–1寸，实证泻法。均双侧。注意：合谷孕妇禁用。
PC 6 + GV 20 + GV 24
Neiguan + Baihui + Shenting · Shen-calming trio内关 + 百会 + 神庭 · 安神三穴
Calm and stabilise the Heart Shen — the core emotional regulation cluster安定心神——核心情志调节穴组
＋
Why this trio为什么选这三穴
PC 6 (Neiguan) opens the chest, calms the Shen, and regulates Heart Qi — it is the primary point for emotional and chest symptoms in any condition. GV 20 (Baihui) at the crown of the head directly raises and clarifies the Mind — in depression where the Shen is "sinking" (low mood, withdrawn, dark thinking), GV 20 lifts the Shen upward. GV 24 (Shenting, "Shen Court") is specifically indicated for emotional disorders — it calms the mind and clears the space in which the Shen resides. In modern research, GV 20 and GV 24 are among the most studied acupuncture points for depression — they are standard in evidence-based acupuncture depression protocols.内关（PC 6）开胸、安神、调节心气——是任何情况下情志和胸部症状的主要穴位。百会（GV 20）在头顶直接升举和澄清心智——在神志「下沉」的抑郁中（情绪低落、退缩、黑暗思维），百会向上升举神志。神庭（GV 24，「神的庭院」）专门用于情志病——安心神，清澈神居之处。在现代研究中，百会和神庭是研究最多的抑郁针灸穴位之一——是循证针灸抑郁方案的标准穴位。
Technique操作
PC 6: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, even method, bilateral. GV 20: flat insertion 0.5–0.8 cun, even or tonification (upward for lifting Shen). GV 24: flat insertion 0.3–0.5 cun, even method.内关：直刺0.5–1寸，平补平泻，双侧。百会：平刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻或补法（向前以升举神志）。神庭：平刺0.3–0.5寸，平补平泻。
① Liver Qi Stagnation — Regulate and Open (Reducing / Even)① 肝气郁结——理气开郁（泻法/平补平泻）
LV 14 + GB 34 + SP 6
Qimen + Yanglingquan + Sanyinjiao期门 + 阳陵泉 + 三阴交
Release Liver constraint locally (LV 14), through the Sinew meeting (GB 34), and regulate the three Yin (SP 6)局部解肝郁（期门），通过筋会（阳陵泉），调节三阴（三阴交）
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
LV 14 (Qimen, Liver Front-Mu) directly releases stagnant Qi from the Liver organ — treating the flank fullness and distension that characterise this pattern. GB 34 (Yanglingquan, Sinew Meeting) releases the physical tension that accumulates with Liver Qi stagnation — the tight muscles, rigid posture, and contracted breathing pattern that accompany emotional constraint. SP 6 regulates all three Yin channels and is particularly important for women with menstrual irregularity secondary to.期门（肝募穴）直接从肝脏释放郁滞气机——治疗此证型的胁部满胀。阳陵泉（筋会）释放肝气郁结积累的躯体紧张——伴随情志郁结的紧绷肌肉、僵硬姿势和收缩呼吸模式。三阴交调节三条阴经，对郁证继发月经不调的女性特别重要。
Technique操作
LV 14: oblique along rib 0.5–0.8 cun, even method, bilateral. GB 34: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. SP 6: perpendicular 1–1.5 cun, even method, bilateral.期门：沿肋斜刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻，双侧。阳陵泉：直刺1–1.5寸，泻法，双侧。三阴交：直刺1–1.5寸，平补平泻，双侧。
③ Liver Fire Disturbing Shen — Clear Fire, Calm Shen③ 肝火扰神——清火安神
HT 7 + LV 2 + GB 43
Shenmen + Xingjian + Xiaxi神门 + 行间 + 侠溪
Settle the Shen (HT 7), clear Liver Fire at source (LV 2), drain Gallbladder channel Heat (GB 43)安神（神门），在源头清肝火（行间），泻胆经热（侠溪）
＋
Why this trio为什么选这三穴
HT 7 (Shenmen, "Shen Gate") is the Source point of the Heart — direct access to calming the disturbed Shen. It is the primary point for insomnia, palpitations, and anxiety in any pattern. LV 2 (Xingjian, Spring point) clears Fire from the Liver channel — Spring points are specifically for clearing channel Heat ("Spring points govern Heat"). GB 43 (Xiaxi, another Spring/Water point) clears Heat from the Gallbladder channel, which is most active 11pm–1am — the classic Liver-Gallbladder Fire waking time. Cross-disease note: this same trio is used in Liver Fire insomnia (→ Emotional Insomnia module) and Liver Fire tinnitus — same Fire, different manifestation locations.神门（HT 7，「神的门户」）是心经原穴——直接安定被扰的神志。是任何证型失眠、心悸和焦虑的主要穴位。行间（LV 2，荥穴）清肝经火热——荥穴专门清经络热邪（「荥主身热」）。侠溪（GB 43，另一水/荥穴）清胆经热，胆经在晚11点–凌晨1点最活跃——经典的肝胆火扰醒来时间。异病同治：同一穴组用于肝火失眠（→情志失眠模块）和肝火耳鸣——同一肝火，不同表现部位。
Technique操作
HT 7: perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun, reducing, bilateral. LV 2: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, reducing, bilateral. GB 43: perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun, reducing, bilateral.神门：直刺0.3–0.5寸，泻法，双侧。行间：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，泻法，双侧。侠溪：直刺0.3–0.5寸，泻法，双侧。
④ Heart-Spleen Deficiency — Tonify Qi and Blood, Nourish Shen④ 心脾两虚——补气血，养心神（补法）
ST 36 + SP 6 + HT 7 + BL 15 + BL 20
Zusanli + Sanyinjiao + Shenmen + Xinshu + Pishu足三里 + 三阴交 + 神门 + 心俞 + 脾俞
Rebuild Qi and Blood from the Spleen, nourish the Heart, settle the Shen从脾重建气血，濡养心脏，安定神志
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
ST 36 + SP 6 (tonification): build the Spleen-Stomach Qi and Blood that is the root of the deficiency. HT 7 (tonification here, unlike its reducing role in pattern ③): gently nourish the Heart rather than drain it — same point, opposite technique, opposite effect. BL 15 (Heart Back-Shu, tonification): direct organ-level Heart nourishment. BL 20 (Spleen Back-Shu, tonification): direct organ-level Spleen strengthening. The contrast in HT 7 technique between pattern ③ (reducing) and pattern ④ (tonification) is a key teaching point: the point does not determine the direction — the technique and the pattern together determine the effect.足三里+三阴交（补法）：建立作为虚损根本的脾胃气血。神门（此处补法，不同于③中的泻法）：温和滋养心而非泻心——同一穴位，相反手法，相反效果。心俞（补法）：直接脏腑层面滋养心。脾俞（补法）：直接脏腑层面健脾。神门在③（泻法）和④（补法）之间的手法对比是关键教学点：穴位不决定方向——手法和证型共同决定效果。
Technique操作
All tonification. ST 36 + moxa. BL 20 + moxa. HT 7: 0.3–0.5 cun, tonification. BL 15: oblique 0.5–0.8 cun, tonification. SP 6: 1–1.5 cun, tonification.均补法。足三里+灸。脾俞+灸。神门：0.3–0.5寸，补法。心俞：斜刺0.5–0.8寸，补法。三阴交：1–1.5寸，补法。
⑤ Yin Deficiency Empty Fire — Nourish Yin, Clear Empty Heat (Tonification, no moxa)⑤ 阴虚火旺——滋阴清虚热（补法，不灸）
KI 3 + HT 6 + SP 6 + KI 6
Taixi + Yinxi + Sanyinjiao + Zhaohai太溪 + 阴郄 + 三阴交 + 照海
Replenish Kidney-Heart Yin and clear the empty Fire that has arisen from its depletion补肾心之阴，清因阴虚而生的虚火
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
KI 3 (Source, tonification): replenishes Kidney Yin — the root Yin for the entire body, and specifically the foundation for Heart Yin. HT 6 (Xi-Cleft of Heart, reducing): the Xi-Cleft point specifically clears deficiency Heat from the Heart channel — the empty Fire disturbing the Shen. Note: HT 6 here is used with reducing technique even in a deficiency pattern — because the target is the empty Fire, which must be cleared. This is the exception to "deficiency = tonification" rule: when clearing empty Fire, reduce the Fire while tonifying the Yin. SP 6 (tonification): nourishes all three Yin channels simultaneously. KI 6 (tonification): tonifies Kidney Yin specifically, opens Yin Qiao Mai. No moxa — Heat is already present in the system.太溪（原穴，补法）：补充肾阴——全身阴液的根本，也是心阴的基础。阴郄（心经郄穴，泻法）：郄穴专门清心经虚热——扰动神志的虚火。注意：阴郄在虚证中用泻法——因为目标是虚火，必须清除。这是「虚=补」规则的例外：清虚火时，泻火同时补阴。三阴交（补法）：同时滋养三条阴经。照海（补法）：专门补肾阴，通阴跷脉。不灸——系统中已有热邪。
Technique操作
KI 3: 0.5–1 cun, tonification. HT 6: 0.3–0.5 cun, reducing (clear empty Fire). SP 6: 1–1.5 cun, tonification. KI 6: 0.3–0.5 cun, tonification. All bilateral. No moxa.太溪：0.5–1寸，补法。阴郄：0.3–0.5寸，泻法（清虚火）。三阴交：1–1.5寸，补法。照海：0.3–0.5寸，补法。均双侧。不灸。
The herbal strategy follows the cascade: early patterns use Qi-regulating formulas that move without tonifying; middle patterns add clearing herbs; late patterns add nourishing herbs. The most important formula in this module is Xiao Yao San — it is the foundationalformula and appears in multiple variations across the entire cascade.方药策略沿级联进行：早期证型用不补益的理气方剂；中期加清热药；晚期加滋补药。本模块最重要的方剂是逍遥散——它是基础郁证方剂，以多种变化出现于整个级联序列。
① Liver Qi Stagnation① 肝气郁结
Chai Hu Shu Gan San柴胡疏肝散
Jing Yue Quan Shu — pure Qi regulation without tonification; for the acute early stage出处：《景岳全书》——纯理气不补益；用于急性早期阶段
Weeks-duration depression + chest/flank distension + sighing + irritability + wiry pulse + no deficiency signs数周病程的抑郁+胸胁胀满+叹气+烦躁+脉弦+无虚损体征
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Chai Hu is the chief — it spreads Liver Qi and lifts the constrained Yang Qi (its lifting quality is what makes it specific forrather than for descending conditions). Bai Shao nourishes the Liver Blood and Yin that are consumed by stagnation — preventing the stagnation from damaging the substance while being moved. Xiang Fu, Chen Pi, and Zhi Ke regulate Qi and relieve distension. Chuan Xiong moves Blood (Qi stagnation always begins to obstruct Blood) and relieves pain. Gan Cao harmonizes. This formula is purely moving — it has no strong tonifying herbs. This is correct for early-stagewhere the Qi simply needs to be freed. Adding strong tonifying herbs at this stage would add substance to an already-obstructed channel. 柴胡是君药——疏肝气，升举郁滞的阳气（其升举特性使它专用于郁证而非降气条件）。白芍滋养被郁滞消耗的肝血和肝阴——在行气的同时防止郁滞损伤物质基础。香附、陈皮、枳壳理气消胀。川芎行血（气滞始终开始阻碍血行）并止痛。甘草调和。此方纯属行气——无强力补益药。对早期郁证是正确的，此时气机只需被释放。在此阶段加强力补益药会向已经阻塞的经道添加物质。
Spread Liver Qi, lift constraint柴胡（疏肝气，升举郁滞） Nourish Liver Yin-Blood白芍（养肝阴血） Regulate Liver Qi香附（疏理肝气） Regulate Qi, relieve distension陈皮（理气消胀） Move Blood, relieve pain川芎（行血止痛） Break Qi stagnation枳壳（破气消积）
① + ④ Qi Stagnation + early deficiency: Xiao Yao San — The Core Formula①+④ 气滞+早期虚损：逍遥散——核心方剂
Xiao Yao San逍遥散
He Ji Ju Fang"Free and Easy Wanderer" — the most widely used formula forat any stage出处：《和剂局方》——「逍遥散」——郁证任何阶段使用最广泛的方剂
Depression + Liver Qi stagnation + some Spleen/Blood deficiency: fatigue, poor appetite, or pale face alongside the Liver signs抑郁+肝气郁结+一些脾/血亏虚：疲乏、食欲不振或面白同时伴有肝的体征
Formula logic — why this is the centralformula:方解逻辑——为什么这是核心郁证方剂：Xiao Yao San simultaneously does three things thatalways requires: (1) spreads Liver Qi (Chai Hu, Bo He) — moves the stuck; (2) nourishes Liver Blood (Dang Gui, Bai Shao) — replenishes what stagnation depletes; (3) strengthens the Spleen (Bai Zhu, Fu Ling, Gan Cao, Sheng Jiang) — supports the organ most damaged by Liver overaction. No other formula addresses all three simultaneously.

Jia Wei Xiao Yao San: add Mu Dan Pi and Zhi Zi → for pattern ③ (Qi stagnation + Fire). Same formula with Fire-clearing additions — the most elegant single modification in TCM herbal medicine. One formula serves the entire early-to-middlespectrum by simple addition. 逍遥散同时做郁证始终需要的三件事：（1）疏肝气（柴胡、薄荷）——行气解郁；（2）养肝血（当归、白芍）——补充郁滞消耗的物质；（3）健脾（白术、茯苓、甘草、生姜）——支持被肝克伤最重的脏腑。没有其他方剂同时处理这三个方面。

加味逍遥散（丹栀逍遥散）：加牡丹皮和栀子→用于③型（气滞+化火）。同一方剂加清火药——中医方药中最简洁的单一加减。一张方通过简单加减服务郁证从早期到中期的整个谱系。
Spread Liver Qi柴胡（疏肝气） Nourish Blood, move Blood当归（养血行血） Nourish Liver Yin白芍（养肝阴） Tonify Spleen白术（健脾） Resolve Damp, calm Shen茯苓（渗湿，安神） Assist Chai Hu, clear head薄荷（助柴胡，清头目） Clear Blood Heat (Jia Wei)牡丹皮（清血热，加味用） Clear Fire (Jia Wei)栀子（清火，加味用）
④ Heart-Spleen Deficiency④ 心脾两虚
Gui Pi Tang归脾汤
Ji Sheng Fang — tonify Heart and Spleen Qi-Blood; nourish the Shen出处：《济生方》——补心脾气血，养心神
Long-standing depression + sadness + fatigue + poor appetite + palpitations + poor memory + pale tongue + thin weak pulse久病抑郁+悲伤+疲乏+食少+心悸+记忆力差+舌淡+脉细弱
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Ren Shen and Huang Qi tonify the Spleen Qi — the source of all Qi and Blood. Dang Gui nourishes Blood. Suan Zao Ren and Yuan Zhi calm the Heart Shen and nourish Heart Blood. Long Yan Rou (Longan flesh) nourishes both Heart and Spleen. Fu Ling strengthens Spleen and calms Shen. Mu Xiang moves Qi to prevent the tonifying herbs from causing stagnation. A key clinical distinction from Xiao Yao San: Gui Pi Tang is for the stage where deficiency clearly predominates over stagnation. If there is still significant chest/flank distension and sighing, Xiao Yao San is still more appropriate. When the patient is primarily exhausted and sad (not primarily frustrated), Gui Pi Tang takes over. 人参和黄芪补脾气——所有气血的来源。当归养血。酸枣仁和远志安心神，养心血。龙眼肉同时滋养心和脾。茯苓健脾安神。木香行气防止补益药导致气滞。与逍遥散的关键临床区分：归脾汤用于虚损明显超过郁滞的阶段。若仍有明显胸胁胀满和叹气，逍遥散仍更合适。当患者主要是虚耗悲伤（不是主要郁闷烦躁），归脾汤接替。
Tonify Spleen-Heart Qi人参（补心脾气） Tonify Qi, consolidate黄芪（补气固摄） Nourish Blood当归（养血） Calm Shen, nourish Heart酸枣仁（养心安神） Calm Shen, open Heart远志（安神，开心气） Nourish Heart-Spleen龙眼肉（养心脾） Prevent stagnation from tonics木香（防补药滞气）
⑤ Yin Deficiency Empty Fire⑤ 阴虚火旺
Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan天王补心丹
She Sheng Mi Pou — "Heavenly Emperor's Heart-Supplementing Elixir" — nourish Heart-Kidney Yin, calm Shen出处：《摄生秘剖》——「天王补心丹」——滋养心肾之阴，安神
Long-standing depression + agitation despite fatigue + night sweats + dry mouth + poor memory + red tongue little coat + thin rapid pulse久病抑郁+尽管疲乏仍躁动+盗汗+口干+记忆力差+舌红少苔+脉细数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Sheng Di Huang (the chief, large dose) is the primary Yin-nourishing herb — it directly replenishes Heart and Kidney Yin. Xuan Shen and Mai Men Dong nourish Yin and clear empty Heat. Dang Gui nourishes Blood (Blood is the material basis for Shen). Tian Men Dong nourishes Lung-Heart Yin. Wu Wei Zi astringes the Heart Qi to stop agitation. Suan Zao Ren and Bai Zi Ren calm the Shen. Dan Shen moves Blood to prevent stagnation. The formula's elegance: it simultaneously nourishes the depleted Yin (root), clears the resulting empty Fire (branch), and calms the disturbed Shen (symptom) — three levels of treatment in one formula. This mirrors the pattern's complexity: deficiency generating Fire generating Shen disturbance. 生地黄（君药，大剂量）是主要滋阴药——直接补充心肾之阴。玄参和麦门冬滋阴清虚热。当归养血（血是神志的物质基础）。天门冬滋养肺心之阴。五味子收摄心气以止躁动。酸枣仁和柏子仁安神。丹参行血防止郁滞。本方的优雅：同时滋补耗竭的阴液（根本）、清由此产生的虚火（分支）和安定被扰的神志（症状）——一张方三个层面的治疗。这与证型的复杂性相呼应：虚损产生火热产生神志扰乱。
large dose Nourish Heart-KD Yin生地黄大量（滋心肾阴） Nourish Yin, clear heat玄参（滋阴清热） Nourish Yin, moisten麦冬（滋阴润燥） Astringe Heart Qi, stop agitation五味子（收摄心气，止躁） Calm Shen, nourish Heart酸枣仁（养心安神） Move Blood, prevent stagnation丹参（活血，防郁滞） Nourish Blood当归（养血）
Three cases spanning the cascade: early Qi stagnation, Fire transformation, and long-standing Yin deficiency. Each case also demonstrates how to navigate the safety screen and how to frame realistic expectations with the patient. Case 3 includes the cross-module handoff to Emotional Insomnia.三个案例跨越级联：早期气滞、化火转化和长期阴虚。每个案例还展示如何进行安全筛查以及如何与患者建立现实预期。案例三包括到情志失眠的跨模块交接。
Case 1 · Pure Liver Qi Stagnation — Early Stage案例一 · 单纯肝气郁结——早期阶段
Presentation主诉
Female, 34. Feeling depressed and "stuck" for 6 weeks following a career setback — was passed over for promotion she had been working toward for 2 years. Feels frustrated, not sad. Chest tightness and right flank distension, especially in the afternoon. Sighs frequently — notices herself doing it automatically. Sleep is disrupted but not severely (can fall asleep, wakes once, returns to sleep). No appetite change. Periods have become irregular — 5–7 days late for the past 2 cycles. No suicidal ideation. Tongue: slightly dark edges, thin white coat. Pulse: wiry, especially at left guan. 女性，34岁。在职业挫折后6周感到抑郁和「被困」——努力争取了2年的晋升机会落空。感到郁闷，不是悲伤。胸部憋闷和右胁胀满，下午尤为明显。频繁叹气——注意到自己自动地这样做。睡眠受扰但不严重（能入睡，醒一次，能再入睡）。食欲无变化。月经变得不规律——过去2个周期晚5–7天。无自杀意念。舌边略暗，苔薄白，脉弦，左关尤甚。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic + Prognosis气机分析+预后
6 weeks + clear trigger + frustration (not sadness) + chest/flank + sighing + irregular periods + wiry left guan pulse = Liver Qi stagnation ①, confirmed. No transformation yet.

The left guan position corresponds to the Liver — the wiry quality at this position specifically confirms Liver channel tension. The menstrual irregularity is a classic Liver Qi stagnation sign in women (Liver governs menstruation). The "frustrated but not sad" quality further confirms Liver (anger/frustration) rather than Heart-Lung (sadness/grief).

Prognosis is excellent at this stage: Pure Qi stagnation without transformation responds quickly — often within 3–5 sessions. Explain this clearly to the patient: this is not chronic depression; it is a response to a specific life event. The treatment will help her Qi flow freely again, but she may also need to address the underlying situation (career decision, grieving the loss). TCM can restore the Qi flow; it cannot resolve the external circumstances. 6周+明确诱因+郁闷（非悲伤）+胸胁+叹气+月经不调+左关脉弦=肝气郁结①，出入失常确认。尚无转化。

左关位对应肝——此位的弦脉质地专门确认肝经紧张。月经不调是女性肝气郁结的经典体征（肝主月经）。「郁闷而非悲伤」的性质进一步确认是肝（怒/郁闷）而非心肺（悲伤/哀痛）。

此阶段预后极好：无转化的单纯气滞反应迅速——通常3–5次治疗内。向患者清楚说明：这不是慢性抑郁；它是对特定生活事件的反应。治疗将帮助她的气机再次自由流动，但她可能还需要处理根本情况（职业决策、哀悼失去）。中医能恢复气机流动；它不能解决外部环境。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture: (LV 3 + LI 4 bilateral, reducing) PC 6 bilateral (even) GV 20 + GV 24 (flat, even) LV 14 bilateral (even) GB 34 bilateral (reducing) SP 6 bilateral (even — address menstrual irregularity)

Formula: Chai Hu Shu Gan San for 2 weeks; if fatigue or poor appetite develops, switch to Xiao Yao San

Patient communication: "Your Liver Qi is constrained — think of it as your body's response to feeling stuck in your life situation. The treatment frees the constraint. You will likely feel some emotional release during or after the sessions — sighing, spontaneous tears, or a sense of relief. This is the Qi moving. It is normal and it is the treatment working." 针灸：四关（双侧太冲+合谷，泻法）· 双侧内关（平补平泻）· 百会+神庭（平刺，平补平泻）· 双侧期门（平补平泻）· 双侧阳陵泉（泻法）· 双侧三阴交（平补平泻——处理月经不调）

方药：柴胡疏肝散2周；如出现疲乏或食欲不振，换逍遥散

患者沟通：「你的肝气郁结——把它想象成你的身体对生活中感到被困的反应。治疗释放这种郁结。你在治疗中或之后可能会感到一些情绪释放——叹气、自发的眼泪或解脱感。这是气机在运动。这是正常的，是治疗在起效。」
Case 2 · Heart-Spleen Deficiency — Long-standing Depression案例二 · 心脾两虚——久病抑郁
Presentation主诉
Female, 48. Depression for 3 years, following divorce. Initially had some irritability and chest tightness; those have faded and now the dominant feeling is sadness and emptiness. Cries easily, often without a clear reason. No interest in activities she used to enjoy. Persistent fatigue — "bone tired" even after adequate sleep. Poor appetite, eats only when reminded. Loose stools 3–4 times daily. Palpitations with anxiety. Poor memory — forgets words mid-sentence. On antidepressants (SSRI) for 2 years — "takes the edge off but I'm still not myself." Passive suicidal ideation assessed — present but no plan or intent. Tongue: pale, slight tooth marks, thin white coat. Pulse: thin weak, especially chi and guan. 女性，48岁。抑郁3年，离婚后开始。最初有一些烦躁和胸部憋闷；这些已经消退，现在主要感觉是悲伤和空洞。容易哭泣，通常没有明确原因。对以前喜欢的活动没有兴趣。持续疲乏——即使睡眠充足也「骨子里累」。食欲差，只在被提醒时才吃。每日3–4次便溏。心悸伴焦虑。记忆力差——说话到一半忘记词语。服用抗抑郁药（SSRI）2年——「减轻了一些，但还不是我自己」。评估被动自杀意念——存在但无计划或意图。舌淡，轻微齿痕，苔薄白，脉细弱，尺关尤甚。
Reasoning + SSRI Coordination推理+SSRI协调
3 years + sadness/emptiness (not frustration) + fatigue + loose stools + palpitations + pale tongue tooth marks + thin weak pulse = Heart-Spleen deficiency ④ confirmed. The original Liver Qi stagnation has fully transformed into deficiency.

The timeline is classic: irritability/chest tightness (Qi stagnation) → fading as deficiency develops → sadness/emptiness/fatigue (Blood and Qi depleted). The Spleen has been damaged by 3 years of Liver overaction → loose stools, poor appetite, fatigue (Spleen not generating Qi). The Heart has lost its Blood nourishment → palpitations, poor memory, weeping easily (Heart Shen unstable).

Regarding the SSRI: Do not advise the patient to reduce or stop. Antidepressants and TCM work through completely different mechanisms and are complementary, not competing. The TCM is addressing the root Qi-Blood deficiency that the SSRI cannot address. If improvement occurs, the patient's prescribing doctor may eventually consider reducing the medication — but this is their decision, not ours.

Passive suicidal ideation: Documented. No plan or intent — within TCM scope. Will reassess at every session. Patient has been informed to contact crisis services if ideation becomes active. Coordinating with family doctor. 3年+悲伤/空洞（非郁闷）+疲乏+便溏+心悸+舌淡齿痕+脉细弱=心脾两虚④确认。原始肝气郁结已完全转化为虚损。

时间线是经典的：烦躁/胸部憋闷（气滞）→随虚损发展而消退→悲伤/空洞/疲乏（气血耗竭）。脾已被3年肝克所伤→便溏、食少、疲乏（脾不能化生气）。心已失血液濡养→心悸、记忆力差、容易哭泣（心神不稳）。

关于SSRI：不要建议患者减少或停药。抗抑郁药和中医通过完全不同的机制起效，是互补的，不是竞争的。中医处理SSRI无法处理的根本气血虚损。若有改善，患者的处方医生可能最终考虑减少药物——但这是他们的决定，不是我们的。

被动自杀意念：已记录。无计划或意图——在中医范围内。每次就诊重新评估。患者已被告知若意念变为主动请联系危机服务。正在与家庭医生协调。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all tonification + moxa): ST 36 + BL 20 (moxa — Spleen base) · HT 7 bilateral (tonification) · BL 15 (tonification) · SP 6 bilateral (tonification) · PC 6 bilateral (even) · GV 20 + GV 24 (tonification — lift Shen)

Formula: Gui Pi Tang — sustained 3-month course minimum

Realistic timeline: 3 years of depletion requires sustained rebuilding. Explain: energy and appetite usually improve first (Spleen recovering), then mood stabilises (Heart Blood rebuilding), then interest in life gradually returns. Do not promise rapid results — the transformation was slow, and the recovery will also be gradual. Monthly check-ins with family doctor recommended. 针灸（均补法+灸）：足三里+脾俞（灸——脾的基础）· 双侧神门（补法）· 心俞（补法）· 双侧三阴交（补法）· 双侧内关（平补平泻）· 百会+神庭（补法——升举神志）

方药：归脾汤——最少持续3个月疗程

现实时间线：3年的虚耗需要持续重建。说明：精力和食欲通常先改善（脾恢复），然后情绪稳定（心血重建），然后对生活的兴趣逐渐回归。不要承诺快速结果——转化是缓慢的，恢复也将是渐进的。建议每月与家庭医生确认。
Case 3 · Liver Fire → Emotional Insomnia (Cross-module handoff)案例三 · 肝火扰神→情志失眠（跨模块交接）
Presentation主诉
Male, 41. Depression and severe insomnia for 8 months, following a business failure. Primary complaint is the insomnia — can fall asleep but wakes at 1am and cannot return to sleep, lying awake until 5–6am with racing anxious thoughts. Irritable throughout the day. Bitter taste in the morning. Constipated. Right-sided temporal headache. Palpitations. Face flushes easily. No passive or active suicidal ideation. Tongue: red, yellow coat. Pulse: wiry rapid. 男性，41岁。抑郁和严重失眠8个月，在一次商业失败后。主诉是失眠——能入睡但1点醒来无法再入睡，带着焦虑的思绪躺到早上5–6点。白天全程烦躁。晨起口苦。便秘。右侧颞部头痛。心悸。容易面色潮红。无被动或主动自杀意念。舌红苔黄，脉弦数。
The Cross-Module Moment跨模块交接时刻
8 months + business failure (frustration/anger trigger) + insomnia at 1am (Liver-Gallbladder time) + bitter taste + constipation + headache + wiry rapid pulse = Liver Fire ③ (→ Fire transformation) confirmed.

This patient's depression and insomnia are the same problem viewed from two perspectives. In theframework: Liver Qi stagnation → Fire → Heart Shen disturbed. In the insomnia framework: Liver Fire disturbing the Shen at night (1am = Liver-Gallbladder peak time) → inability to return to sleep after waking.

The insomnia is the dominant and most distressing symptom for this patient — it is also the most important to treat first, because chronic sleep deprivation will continue to worsen the depression regardless of other treatment.

→ For the complete insomnia treatment protocol: see the Emotional Insomnia module. The acupuncture and herbal treatment for the insomnia component uses LV 3 + HT 7 + GB 43 + LV 2 + Jia Wei Xiao Yao San (with Dan Zhi additions). Treating the insomnia will simultaneously treat the depression — they share the same root. 8个月+商业失败（郁闷/愤怒诱因）+1点失眠（肝胆时）+口苦+便秘+头痛+脉弦数=肝火③（郁证→化火转化）确认。

此患者的抑郁和失眠是从两个角度看同一个问题。从郁证框架：肝气郁结→化火→心神被扰。从失眠框架：肝火夜间扰神（凌晨1点=肝胆经峰值时间）→醒后无法再入睡。

失眠是此患者最主要、最令人痛苦的症状——也是最重要的首先治疗的症状，因为无论其他治疗如何，慢性睡眠剥夺将继续加重抑郁。

→ 失眠的完整治疗方案：见情志失眠模块。失眠成分的针灸和方药治疗使用太冲+神门+侠溪+行间+加味逍遥散（加丹栀）。治疗失眠将同时治疗抑郁——它们共享同一根本。
Module Navigation模块导航
For Case 3 full treatment → click the Emotional Insomnia button at the top of this page. The treatment approach there addresses the Liver Fire insomnia pattern, which simultaneously resolves theFire pattern. Return to this module for the sustained remission-phase treatment once the acute Fire and insomnia are controlled. 案例三完整治疗→点击本页顶部的情志失眠按钮。那里的治疗方法处理肝火失眠证型，同时解决郁证化火证型。一旦急性火热和失眠得到控制，返回本模块进行持续的缓解期治疗。
Metabolic · Three Jiao代谢内分泌 · 三焦
Pre-Diabetes / Xiao Ke消渴·糖尿病前期
The Three Thirsts — Lung (upper), Stomach (middle), Kidney (lower) — each reflecting Yin depletion at a different organ level. TCM acupuncture and herbs have documented evidence for improving insulin sensitivity and reducing HbA1c in pre-diabetic states.三消——肺消（上）、胃消（中）、肾消（下）——各反映不同脏腑层次的阴液耗竭。中医针灸和草药在改善胰岛素敏感性和降低糖尿病前期HbA1c方面有记录的证据。
⚠ Scope: Pre-Diabetes and Type 2 Adjunct Only⚠ 适用范围：仅限糖尿病前期和2型辅助治疗
TCM is most effective as primary treatment for pre-diabetes (IGT/IFG) and as adjunctive treatment for Type 2 diabetes alongside conventional management. Type 1 diabetes (insulin-dependent) requires insulin — TCM is adjunctive only. Never advise a patient to reduce or stop diabetes medication without physician guidance. Monitor blood glucose regularly throughout treatment.中医对糖尿病前期（糖耐量减低/空腹血糖受损）作为主要治疗最有效，对2型糖尿病与常规管理联合作为辅助治疗有效。1型糖尿病（胰岛素依赖）需要胰岛素——中医仅作辅助。绝不建议患者在没有医生指导的情况下减少或停止糖尿病药物。治疗全程定期监测血糖。
The Three Xiao Framework三消框架
Classical TCM describes diabetes (= "wasting and thirsting") through three organ levels, identified by which symptom predominates:

Upper Xiao — Lung: Excessive thirst, large fluid intake. Lung Yin depleted → Lung cannot distribute Body Fluids → thirst. Corresponds to early diabetes with primary thirst.
