Middle Xiao — Stomach: Excessive hunger despite eating, weight loss. Stomach Fire consuming Yin faster than it can be replenished → ravenous hunger. Corresponds to the hypermetabolic state of uncontrolled diabetes.

Lower Xiao — Kidney: Frequent copious urination, turbid urine (glucosuria). Kidney Yin-Yang fails to transform and reabsorb fluids → fluids pass through unprocessed. Corresponds to advanced diabetes with renal involvement.

Modern clinical presentation rarely maps cleanly to one level — most patients show components of all three. The dominant level indicates the primary treatment focus. 经典中医通过三个脏腑层次描述糖尿病（消渴=消瘦和口渴），由哪种症状为主来识别：

上消——肺：过度口渴，大量饮水。肺阴耗竭→肺不能输布津液→口渴。对应以口渴为主的早期糖尿病。

中消——胃：进食后仍过度饥饿，体重减轻。胃火消耗阴液超过补充速度→贪食。对应不受控制的糖尿病的高代谢状态。

下消——肾：频繁大量排尿，尿液浑浊（糖尿）。肾阴阳不能转化和重吸收液体→液体未被处理即通过。对应有肾脏受累的晚期糖尿病。

现代临床表现很少干净地映射到一个层次——大多数患者显示三者的成分。主导层次提示主要治疗重点。
Polydipsia dominant + dry mouth + red tongue多饮为主+口干+舌红
Upper Xiao — Lung Yin Xu上消——肺阴虚
Polyphagia dominant + weight loss + constipation多食为主+体重减轻+便秘
Middle Xiao — Stomach Fire中消——胃火
Polyuria dominant + turbid urine + low back多尿为主+尿液浑浊+腰酸
Lower Xiao — Kidney Yin/Yang Xu下消——肾阴/阳虚
Obese + fatigue + greasy coat (pre-diabetes)肥胖+疲劳+苔腻（糖尿病前期）
Spleen Xu + Phlegm-Damp脾虚+痰湿
Yin Deficiency + Empty Fire (core mechanism)阴虚燥热证（核心机制）
Deficiency-Heat虚热
Yin depleted at one or more organ levels → Empty Fire scorches and consumes remaining Yin → the three excesses (polydipsia, polyphagia, polyuria)一个或多个脏腑层次的阴液耗竭→虚火灼烧并消耗残余阴液→三多（多饮、多食、多尿）
Treatment治疗Nourish Yin, clear Empty Fire, generate Body Fluids. KI3 + SP6 (nourish Yin) + ST36 (regulate metabolism) + LU7 + CV12. For thirst: SP6 + KI6 + LU7 pair. For Stomach Fire: ST44 (clear Stomach Fire) + CV12 + LI11. For urinary excess: BL23 + KI3 + CV4. Herbal: Liu Wei Di Huang Wan (the foundational Kidney Yin formula — the most evidence-based TCM formula for diabetes, with clinical trials showing HbA1c reduction).滋阴清虚火，生津液。KI3+SP6（滋阴）+ST36（调节代谢）+LU7+CV12。口渴：SP6+KI6+LU7对。胃火：ST44（清胃火）+CV12+LI11。多尿：BL23+KI3+CV4。方药：六味地黄丸（基础肾阴方——有临床试验显示降低HbA1c，中医糖尿病循证依据最充分的方剂）。
Spleen Qi Xu + Phlegm-Damp (pre-diabetes / obese T2DM)脾气虚+痰湿证（糖尿病前期/肥胖2型）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Spleen fails to transform food into usable Qi → unprocessed sugars accumulate → insulin resistance pattern脾不能将食物转化为可用之气→未处理的糖分积聚→胰岛素抵抗模式
Clinical significance临床意义This is the pre-diabetes pattern — obese or overweight, fatigue after meals, greasy tongue coat, slippery pulse, mildly elevated fasting glucose. The Spleen's failure to metabolize is directly analogous to insulin resistance. Treatment: strengthen Spleen Qi to improve metabolic efficiency. ST36 + SP9 + ST40 + CV12. Herbal: Shen Ling Bai Zhu San (Spleen tonification) + 10g (the single most evidence-based anti-diabetic herb — metformin's mechanism of action has overlap with /berberine). Lifestyle modification is essential and primary.这是糖尿病前期证型——肥胖或超重，饭后疲乏，苔腻，脉滑，空腹血糖轻度升高。脾的运化失常直接类比于胰岛素抵抗。治疗：健脾气以改善代谢效率。ST36+SP9+ST40+CV12。方药：参苓白术散（健脾）+黄连10g（单味循证依据最充分的抗糖尿病草药——二甲双胍的作用机制与黄连素/小檗碱有重叠）。生活方式干预是必要且主要的。
Key Points for Xiao Ke消渴关键穴位
BL13 + BL20 + BL23BL13肺俞+BL20脾俞+BL23肾俞The three Back-Shu points corresponding to the Three Xiao levels. All three are used in every diabetes treatment, with the emphasis varying by presentation. Upper Xiao (thirst): heavier stimulation on BL13. Middle Xiao (hunger): heavier on BL20. Lower Xiao (urination): heavier on BL23 with moxa. Clinical research supports BL23 + CV12 + ST36 + SP6 as the core 4-point combination for glycaemic regulation.对应三消层次的三个背俞穴。每次糖尿病治疗均用三穴，重点随表现变化。上消（口渴）：BL13重点刺激。中消（饥饿）：BL20重点。下消（多尿）：BL23加灸重点。临床研究支持BL23+CV12+ST36+SP6作为血糖调节的核心4穴组合。
SP6 — the metabolic master pointSP6三阴交——代谢主穴SP6 activates all three organs involved in glucose metabolism: Spleen (transforms food into Qi), Liver (stores glycogen and regulates glucose release), and Kidney (the constitutional foundation). EA at SP6-ST36 at 2/100Hz has documented effects on insulin receptor sensitivity in animal studies. For pre-diabetes: SP6 + ST36 + ST40 + CV12 is the metabolic protocol — treat 2×/week for 12 weeks, with blood glucose monitoring to demonstrate response.SP6激活参与血糖代谢的三个脏腑：脾（将食物转化为气），肝（储存糖原并调节血糖释放），肾（体质基础）。SP6-ST36电针2/100Hz在动物研究中有记录的胰岛素受体敏感性效果。糖尿病前期：SP6+ST36+ST40+CV12是代谢方案——每周2次治疗12周，监测血糖以证明反应。
Liu Wei Di Huang Wan六味地黄丸
Kidney Yin deficiency Xiao Ke — Lower Xiao (polyuria, turbid urine) or mixed pattern with Yin deficiency signs. The most evidence-based formula for Type 2 diabetes in TCM research.肾阴虚消渴——下消（多尿，尿液浑浊）或伴阴虚征象的混合证型。中医糖尿病研究中循证依据最充分的方剂。
Mechanism: The foundational Kidney Yin formula. (24g) — deeply nourishes Kidney Yin, the root. astringes to prevent Yin from leaking (directly relevant to polyuria — preventing Yin fluid loss). strengthens Spleen and Kidney simultaneously. ++drain the Empty Fire and Phlegm-Damp that complicate Yin deficiency. Clinical trials: Liu Wei Di Huang Wan demonstrates measurable reduction in fasting blood glucose, HbA1c, and insulin resistance index. For Upper Xiao (thirst): add +. For Middle Xiao (hunger): add +. For Lower Xiao (urination): add +.机理：基础肾阴方。熟地黄（24g）——深层滋养肾阴，根本。山茱萸收敛防止阴液外泄（与多尿直接相关——防止阴液流失）。山药同时健脾补肾。泽泻+茯苓+牡丹皮泻出阴虚并发的虚火和痰湿。临床试验：六味地黄丸显示空腹血糖、HbA1c和胰岛素抵抗指数的可测量降低。上消（口渴）：加麦冬+天花粉。中消（饥饿）：加黄连+知母。下消（多尿）：加菟丝子+益智仁。
Huang Lian — The Evidence-Based Anti-Diabetic Herb黄连——循证依据的抗糖尿病草药
All patterns with elevated blood glucose — can be added to any formula. Most important single herb addition for glycaemic control.所有血糖升高证型——可加入任何方剂。血糖控制最重要的单味草药加味。
Mechanism: 's active compound berberine has multiple anti-diabetic mechanisms: (1) activates AMPK (the same pathway as metformin) → improves insulin sensitivity; (2) reduces hepatic glucose output; (3) improves gut microbiome (reduces LPS-induced insulin resistance); (4) clears Stomach Fire in TCM terms (the Middle Xiao mechanism). Clinical evidence: berberine produces HbA1c reduction of 0.9% on average in RCTs — comparable to first-generation oral hypoglycaemics. Dose: 10–15g in decoction, or berberine supplement 500mg 3× daily. Must be used with caution in patients on metformin (additive effect — risk of hypoglycaemia).机理：黄连的活性成分小檗碱（黄连素）有多种抗糖尿病机制：(1)激活AMPK（与二甲双胍相同的途径）→改善胰岛素敏感性；(2)减少肝脏葡萄糖输出；(3)改善肠道微生物组（减少LPS诱导的胰岛素抵抗）；(4)中医清胃火（中消机制）。临床证据：小檗碱在随机对照试验中平均降低HbA1c 0.9%——与第一代口服降糖药相当。剂量：黄连10–15g煎服，或小檗碱补充剂500mg每日3次。与二甲双胍联用时必须谨慎（叠加效果——低血糖风险）。
Case — Pre-Diabetes Reversed Without Medication病案——糖尿病前期无药物逆转
Patient: 52M. HbA1c 6.1% (pre-diabetic range 5.7–6.4%). Fasting glucose 6.4 mmol/L. BMI 29. Doctor advised "watch and wait" or start metformin. Patient prefers to try TCM first. Symptoms: fatigue after meals, excessive thirst especially afternoons, occasional nocturia 1–2×. Tongue: red, slightly dry. Pulse: thready, rapid at cun. Also obese (visceral pattern) and sedentary.患者：男，52岁。HbA1c 6.1%（糖尿病前期范围5.7–6.4%）。空腹血糖6.4 mmol/L。BMI 29。医生建议"观察等待"或开始二甲双胍。患者倾向先尝试中医。症状：饭后疲劳，尤其午后口渴，偶有夜尿1–2次。舌红略干。脉细数，寸部明显。也有肥胖（内脏型）和久坐生活方式。
Treatment (12-week protocol):
Acupuncture 2×/week: BL13 + BL20 + BL23 + ST36 + SP6 + CV12 (EA SP6-ST36 2/100Hz). KI3 (tonification).
Herbal: Liu Wei Di Huang Wan + 10g + 15g + 15g.
Lifestyle (essential): Mediterranean-style diet briefing, 30-min daily walking, no food after 8pm.
Week 12 re-test: HbA1c 5.6% (normal range). Fasting glucose 5.3 mmol/L. Weight -4.2kg. Fatigue resolved. Thirst normalized.
The lifestyle component is genuinely co-equal — TCM without dietary change produces partial results. TCM + lifestyle in a motivated patient can reverse pre-diabetes in 12 weeks. 治疗（12周方案）：
每周2次针灸：BL13+BL20+BL23+ST36+SP6+CV12（SP6-ST36电针2/100Hz）。KI3（补法）。
方药：六味地黄丸+黄连10g+麦冬15g+天花粉15g。
生活方式（必要）：地中海式饮食指导，每天步行30分钟，晚8点后不进食。
第12周复查：HbA1c 5.6%（正常范围）。空腹血糖5.3 mmol/L。体重-4.2kg。疲劳消除。口渴正常化。
生活方式成分真正是同等重要——没有饮食改变的中医产生部分效果。积极的患者中医+生活方式可在12周内逆转糖尿病前期。
Teaching point: Pre-diabetes is the ideal application for TCM metabolic intervention — the Spleen-Kidney mechanism has not yet caused irreversible damage, the lifestyle modifiability is high, and the measurable outcome (HbA1c, fasting glucose) allows objective treatment validation. Berberine is now one of the most researched natural anti-diabetic compounds in the world, with mechanisms comparable to metformin. Combining it with Spleen-strengthening acupuncture and dietary modification creates a comprehensive metabolic intervention that addresses insulin resistance at multiple levels simultaneously.教学要点：糖尿病前期是中医代谢干预的理想应用——脾肾机制尚未造成不可逆损害，生活方式可改变性高，可测量结果（HbA1c、空腹血糖）允许客观治疗验证。小檗碱（黄连素）现在是世界上研究最多的天然抗糖尿病化合物之一，机制与二甲双胍相当。将其与健脾针灸和饮食干预联合，创造一种同时在多个层次处理胰岛素抵抗的综合代谢干预。
Digestive Disorders消化病证
Diarrhea泄泻
encompasses all patterns of increased stool frequency with loose or watery consistency. In TCM, the Large Intestine is the final gate of the digestive Qi dynamic: everything that was not transformed and absorbed by the Spleen-Stomach must exit through it. When the Spleen's transforming function fails, or when pathogenic Qi disrupts the intestinal environment, the exit gate loses its regulation — and matter descends too fast, too wet, or without adequate separation of clear from turbid. Understanding means understanding what disrupts the Spleen's central role in Qi ascent and fluid separation. 泄泻涵盖所有排便频率增加、粪质稀薄或水样的证型。在中医，大肠是消化气机的最终门户：所有未被脾胃转化吸收的物质必须经此排出。当脾的运化功能失常，或邪气扰乱肠道环境，出口门户失去调节——物质下降过快、过湿，或清浊不能分别。理解泄泻，意味着理解什么破坏了脾在气机上升和水液分别中的核心作用。
Qi Dynamic Framework · The Spleen's Central Role in Diarrhea气机框架 · 脾在泄泻中的核心角色
Normal digestive Qi dynamic:
Spleen raises the clear → nutrients ascend to Lung and Heart for distribution.
Stomach descends the turbid → waste descends to Small and Large Intestine.
Small Intestine separates clear from turbid → clear fluids to Bladder, solid waste to Large Intestine.
Large Intestine receives and excretes → formed stool exits in regulated fashion.

What causes diarrhea — three Qi dynamic failures:
① (Ascent insufficient): Spleen Qi is too weak to raise the clear → nutrients and fluids descend instead of ascending → watery stools. This is the deficiency axis.
② (Descent excessive): Pathogenic Cold-Damp, Damp-Heat, or food stagnation disrupts the intestinal environment → forces premature rapid descent → urgent watery diarrhea. This is the excess axis.
③ (Entry-exit disrupted): The Small Intestine fails to separate clear from turbid adequately → clear fluids exit with the stool instead of being absorbed → "" (divert fluids to urine to consolidate stool) is the therapeutic principle.

Key teaching insight: (Spleen governs ascending the clear) is the single most important mechanism. When the Spleen ascends the clear, the Large Intestine automatically receives only solid, well-formed material. When Spleen Qi sinks, everything — fluids and solids together — descends into the colon, producing diarrhea regardless of what pathogen initiated the process. 正常消化气机：
脾主升清→营养物质上升至肺和心以布散。
胃主降浊→废物下降至小肠和大肠。
小肠分清别浊→清液归膀胱，糟粕归大肠。
大肠传导→成形粪便有节律地排出。

泄泻的原因——三种气机失调：
①升不及：脾气太虚无力升清→营养物质和水液下降而非上升→水样便。这是虚损轴线。
②降太过：寒湿、湿热或食积病邪扰乱肠道环境→强迫提前快速下降→急迫水样腹泻。这是实证轴线。
③出入失常：小肠分清别浊功能不足→清液随粪便排出而非被吸收→「利小便以实大便」（引导水液入尿以充实大便）是治疗原则。

核心教学洞见：脾主升清是最重要的单一机制。当脾升清功能正常，大肠自然只接收固体、成形的物质。当脾气下陷，一切——水液和固体一起——下降入结肠，无论何种病邪启动了此过程，均产生泄泻。
⚠ Red Flags — Rule Out Before TCM Treatment⚠ 红旗警征——治疗前必须排除
TCM treats functional and chronic diarrhea patterns. Refer immediately for: Blood in stool (especially dark/tarry = upper GI bleed; bright red = lower GI — both require urgent investigation); fever > 38.5°C with profuse watery diarrhea (infectious gastroenteritis requiring medical management); signs of dehydration (sunken eyes, decreased skin turgor, oliguria, altered consciousness — especially in elderly and children); diarrhea > 4 weeks without diagnosis (rule out IBD, colorectal cancer, celiac disease); recent antibiotic use + watery diarrhea (C. difficile risk); travel history + acute diarrhea (parasitic or bacterial infection). 中医治疗功能性和慢性泄泻。立即转诊：粪便带血（尤其黑色/柏油样=上消化道出血；鲜红=下消化道——均需紧急检查）；发热>38.5°C伴大量水样腹泻（需医疗处理的感染性胃肠炎）；脱水征象（眼眶凹陷、皮肤弹性下降、少尿、意识改变——尤其老人和儿童）；腹泻>4周无诊断（排除IBD、结直肠癌、乳糜泻）；近期使用抗生素+水样腹泻（艰难梭菌风险）；旅行史+急性腹泻（寄生虫或细菌感染）。
Stool Character粪质特征
Describe the stool: watery and profuse? Loose but formed? Mucus or slime present? Foul-smelling or odourless? Yellow, brown, or pale? Any undigested food visible?描述粪便：水样且量多？质稀但有形？有无黏液？气味臭秽还是无味？黄色、棕色还是淡白色？有无未消化食物？
→ Stool character is the single most diagnostically rich question in diarrhea — it directly reveals the pathological mechanism→ 粪质是泄泻中诊断信息最丰富的单一问题——直接揭示病理机制
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Reading the Stool机理 · 解读粪便
Watery, profuse, odourless or slightly cold: Cold-Damp — pathogenic Cold has congealed the intestinal Qi, preventing normal transformation. The water cannot be absorbed (Small Intestine failing) and rushes out together with solid matter.

Yellow, watery, foul-smelling, burning sensation at anus: Damp-Heat — Heat agitates the intestinal Qi downward (from Heat), accelerates transit, and scorches the stool to yellow with a burning smell.

Watery with undigested food, no foul smell: Spleen/Kidney Yang deficiency — the digestive fire is insufficient to complete transformation. Food passes through without adequate processing.

Mucus or slimy stool: Damp accumulation in the Large Intestine — whether Cold-Damp (white mucus) or Damp-Heat (yellow mucus).

Stools that alternate with normal consistency, triggered by stress: Liver overacting on Spleen — the Liver's stagnant Qi invades the Spleen's territory during emotional stress, suddenly disrupting its transforming function. 水样、量多、无味或略感寒凉：寒湿——寒邪凝滞肠道气机，阻碍正常转化。水液不能被吸收（小肠分清失常），与固体物质一起急速排出。

黄色、水样、臭秽、肛门灼热感：湿热——热邪向下激扰肠道气机（热邪致降太过），加速传导，将粪便烧灼成黄色伴灼热气味。

水样伴完谷不化、无臭秽气味：脾/肾阳虚——消化之火（命门火）不足以完成转化。食物未经充分处理而通过。

黏液或黏滑粪便：大肠湿邪积聚——寒湿（白色黏液）或湿热（黄色黏液）均可。

与正常粪质交替出现、情绪压力诱发：肝郁乘脾——情绪压力时郁滞的肝气侵犯脾的领域，突然破坏其运化功能。
Watery, odourless, cold水样、无味、寒凉
Cold-Damp寒湿 降太过
Yellow, foul, burning anus黄色、臭秽、肛门灼热
Damp-Heat湿热 降太过
Undigested food, no smell完谷不化、无臭
Yang Xu阳虚 升不及
Stress-triggered, alternates情绪诱发、交替出现
Liver-Spleen肝郁乘脾 出入失常
Timing & Urgency时间与紧迫性
Does it wake you in the early morning (4–6am) with urgent need? Come on suddenly after eating? Triggered by stress or emotional upset? Present for years with gradual worsening?是否在黎明前（凌晨4–6点）急迫感醒来？进食后立即发作？情绪压力诱发？多年来逐渐加重？
→ Timing is one of the most reliable pattern-differentiating questions: 4–6am = Kidney Yang Xu; post-meal urgency = Spleen Qi Xu or food stagnation; stress-triggered = Liver-Spleen→ 时间是最可靠的辨证问题之一：凌晨4–6点=肾阳虚（五更泻）；餐后急迫=脾气虚或食积；情绪诱发=肝郁乘脾
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Time as Qi Dynamic Signature机理 · 时间作为气机特征
(Fifth-Watch Diarrhea, 4–6am): At this hour, Yang Qi begins its ascent for the new day — the Kidney's Yang must ignite to start this process. When Kidney Yang is deficient, the Yang ascent impulse instead agitates the Large Intestine without the warmth to properly move and consolidate — producing urgent loose stools at dawn. The Cold of night has accumulated; the Kidney cannot warm the intestine enough to hold it.

Immediately after eating: The Spleen, upon receiving food, cannot transform it — it simply passes the food mass directly downward. This is the most direct expression of Spleen Qi Xu: the transforming function is so weak that eating itself triggers the descent.

After emotional stress: Liver Qi surges during stress, immediately invades Spleen territory, disrupts Spleen Qi → abrupt diarrhea. The patient can often predict the pattern: "every time I'm anxious or upset, within minutes I need the bathroom." 五更泻（凌晨4–6点）：此时辰，阳气开始为新一天上升——肾阳必须点燃以启动此过程。当肾阳不足（命门火衰），阳气上升冲动反而激扰大肠，却无足够温煦来推动和固摄——在黎明产生急迫溏便。夜间寒气积聚；肾不能充分温暖肠道来固摄。

餐后即泻：脾接受食物后无力运化——直接将食物向下传导。这是脾气虚最直接的表现：运化功能如此虚弱，进食本身即触发下降。

情志压力后（情志诱发）：压力时肝气上冲，立即侵犯脾的领域，破坏脾气→突发腹泻。患者通常能预测这一模式：「每次焦虑或烦躁，几分钟内就要去洗手间。」
4–6am urgent diarrhea凌晨4–6点急迫腹泻
Kidney Yang Xu五更泻 肾阳虚
Immediately after eating餐后即泻
Spleen Qi Xu脾气虚 升不及
Stress-triggered, immediately relieved after情绪诱发，便后缓解
Liver-Spleen disharmony肝郁乘脾
Acute onset, recent bad meal急性发作，近期饮食不洁
Food stagnation / Damp-Heat食积/湿热
Abdominal Pain Character腹痛特征
Is there abdominal pain? Cramping that is relieved after passing stool? Or dull persistent ache? Does warmth help (warm hands on belly, hot water bottle)? Pain worse with pressure or better with pressure?有腹痛吗？便后缓解的痉挛痛？还是持续隐痛？温热是否有帮助（热手敷腹、热水袋）？按压加重还是按压缓解？
→ Pain character is the clearest Cold vs Heat, excess vs deficiency distinguisher in diarrhea→ 腹痛特征是泄泻中寒热、虚实最清晰的鉴别指标
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Pain as Qi Blockage Signal机理 · 腹痛作为气机阻滞信号
Cramping, relieved after stool: Qi is blocked in the Large Intestine. The cramping IS the Qi trying to push through the obstruction. After stool passes, the block temporarily clears → relief. In excess patterns (Damp-Heat, food stagnation), the block is caused by pathogenic accumulation. In deficiency, the block is caused by insufficient Qi to move normally.

Relieved by warmth: Cold pathogen or Yang deficiency. Cold contracts and constricts → warmth disperses Cold → temporary relief. This single sign distinguishes Cold patterns from Heat patterns in abdominal pain with near-100% reliability.

Worse with pressure: Excess pattern — there is a pathological substance (food, Phlegm, Qi stagnation) that pressing on increases the discomfort.

Better with pressure: Deficiency pattern — the gentle pressure provides the "support" that deficient Qi cannot provide internally. Patients instinctively curl up or hold their abdomen. 痉挛痛、便后缓解（里急后重）：气机阻滞于大肠。痉挛正是气机试图穿越阻滞的表现。粪便排出后，阻滞暂时清除→缓解。实证（湿热、食积）中，阻滞由病理积聚引起。虚证中，阻滞由气机不足以正常运行引起。

温热缓解（喜温）：寒邪或阳虚。寒邪收引痉挛→温热散寒→暂时缓解。这一单一体征在腹痛中区分寒热证型的可靠性接近100%。

按压加重（拒按）：实证——存在按压时加重不适的病理物质（食积、痰浊、气滞）。

按压缓解（喜按）：虚证——轻柔按压提供了虚损之气内部无法提供的「支撑」。患者本能地蜷曲或抱住腹部。
Cramping + relieved by warmth + worse with pressure痉挛+温热缓解+按压加重
Cold-Damp寒湿实证
Burning pain + worse with warmth + worse with pressure灼痛+温热加重+按压加重
Damp-Heat湿热实证
Dull ache + better with warmth + better with pressure隐痛+温热缓解+按压缓解
Yang Xu阳虚虚证
Pain before stool, relieved completely after便前腹痛，便后完全缓解
Liver-Spleen肝郁乘脾
Systemic Signs全身症状
Fatigue and low energy? Cold limbs and cold intolerance? Thirst — or no thirst? Low back soreness and cold knees? History of prolonged stress, frustration, or anxiety?疲乏无力？四肢冷、怕冷？口渴——还是不渴？腰酸膝冷？长期压力、郁闷或焦虑史？
→ Systemic signs confirm which organ system is at the root — Spleen, Kidney, or Liver — and guide long-term treatment strategy→ 全身症状确认根本脏腑——脾、肾还是肝——引导长期治疗策略
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Organ System Signatures机理 · 脏腑系统特征
Fatigue + poor appetite + pale face (Spleen Qi Xu): The Spleen is the source of post-natal Qi and Blood. When it fails, the entire body's energy production falters — not just digestion. Diarrhea here is a symptom of a broader energy generation failure.

Cold limbs + low back soreness + cold knees + nocturia (Kidney Yang Xu): The Kidney Yang warms ALL organs from below. When deficient, the Cold sign appears in the Kidney's territory (lower back, knees) and in peripheral circulation (cold limbs). Nocturia is the Kidney's failure to consolidate fluids at night.

No thirst despite diarrhea (Cold-Damp): The Damp itself is a fluid — the body is already over-burdened with cold fluid. Adding more (drinking) would worsen the pattern. If the patient craves warm drinks specifically, this further confirms Cold pattern.

Thirst with preference for cold drinks (Damp-Heat): Heat creates thirst; the patient seeks cold to balance the Heat sensation. 疲乏+纳差+面色苍白（脾气虚）：脾是后天气血的来源。脾失健运时，全身能量生产受损——不仅仅是消化。此处泄泻是更广泛能量生成失败的症状。

四肢冷+腰酸+膝冷+夜尿（肾阳虚）：肾阳（命门火）从下方温煦所有脏腑。不足时，寒象出现在肾的领域（腰、膝）和外周循环（四肢冷）。夜尿是肾夜间固摄水液失常。

腹泻却不渴（寒湿）：湿邪本身是水液——身体已经被寒性水液过度负担。再饮水会加重证型。若患者特别渴望热饮，进一步确认寒证。

口渴且喜冷饮（湿热）：热邪产生口渴；患者寻求寒凉以平衡热感。
Pattern Decision — Excess First, Then Deficiency辨证决策——先辨虚实
Step 1 — Acute or Chronic?第一步——急性还是慢性？ Acute onset (days to weeks) → likely excess (Cold-Damp, Damp-Heat, Food stagnation). Chronic (months to years) → likely deficiency (Spleen Xu, Kidney Yang Xu) or mixed (Liver-Spleen).急性发作（数天至数周）→多为实证（寒湿、湿热、食积）。慢性（数月至数年）→多为虚证（脾虚、肾阳虚）或虚实夹杂（肝脾不和）。
Step 2 — Hot or Cold?第二步——热还是寒？ Yellow foul stool + burning anus + thirst + red tongue yellow coat = Heat. Watery pale stool + no thirst + warmth preference + white coat = Cold.粪黄臭秽+肛门灼热+口渴+舌红黄苔=热。水样淡色粪便+不渴+喜温+白苔=寒。
Step 3 — Which deficiency?第三步——哪种虚证？ Fatigue + poor appetite + pale tongue = Spleen Qi Xu. Cold limbs + low back + 5am diarrhea + pale-wet tongue = Kidney Yang Xu. Stress-triggered + flank pain + wiry pulse = Liver-Spleen.疲乏+纳差+舌淡=脾气虚。四肢冷+腰酸+五更泻+舌淡湿=肾阳虚。情绪诱发+胁痛+弦脉=肝脾不和。
① Cold-Damp(Cold forces rapid descent)① 寒湿——降太过（寒邪强迫急速下降）
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden watery diarrhea; borborygmus; abdominal pain relieved by warmth; no thirst; possibly nausea and vomiting; cold limbs; white greasy tongue coat; soggy-slow pulse突发水样腹泻；肠鸣音；腹痛温热缓解；不渴；可有恶心呕吐；四肢冷；苔白腻；脉濡缓
Qi dynamic气机Cold congeals intestinal Qi → descent cannot be regulated → watery matter rushes out uncontrolled. Spleen Yang is temporarily suppressed by external Cold → function disrupted → fluids join the descending stream instead of being absorbed upward.寒邪凝滞肠道气机→下降不能调节→水样物质不受控制地急速排出。脾阳暂时被外寒压制→升清功能受扰→水液加入下降流而非向上吸收。
Formula方药(Huoxiang Zhengqi San) — dispels Cold-Damp, harmonizes Spleen-Stomach藿香正气散——辟秽化浊，解表散寒，健脾和中
② Damp-Heat(Heat drives rapid forced descent)② 湿热——降太过（热邪驱动急迫强制下降）
Key symptoms主要症状Urgent watery or loose diarrhea; yellow foul-smelling stool; burning sensation at anus; abdominal pain; thirst with preference for cold drinks; fever possible; scanty dark urine; red tongue yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse急迫水样或稀便；粪便黄色臭秽；肛门灼热感；腹痛；口渴喜冷饮；可有发热；尿少色深；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Qi dynamic气机+ simultaneously — Damp-Heat in the intestines creates an environment of agitation. Heat drives Qi downward with force; simultaneously Heat rising creates the burning sensation and thirst. The intestine cannot separate clear from turbid because Damp-Heat disrupts the entire separating mechanism of the Small Intestine.升太过+降太过同时存在——肠道湿热创造躁动环境。热邪强力驱气下降（降太过）；同时热邪上升产生灼热感和口渴（升太过）。肠道不能分清别浊，因为湿热扰乱了小肠整个分别机制。
Formula方药(Gegen Qin Lian Tang) — the classical Damp-Heat diarrhea formula from葛根芩连汤——《伤寒论》经典湿热泄泻方
③ Food Stagnation(Blocked → explosive release)③ 食积——出入失常（积滞→爆发性排出）
Key symptoms主要症状Diarrhea following overeating or spoiled food; foul-smelling stool like rotten eggs; abdominal distension and pain relieved by passing stool or gas; belching with foul smell; nausea; thick greasy tongue coat; slippery pulse暴饮暴食或食用变质食物后腹泻；粪便臭如腐蛋；腹胀腹痛便后或矢气后缓解；嗳腐吞酸；恶心；苔厚腻；脉滑
Qi dynamic气机Food accumulates beyond the Spleen's capacity to transform → stagnation blocks the intestinal Qi → Qi backs up → explosive release downward. The treatment principle is "" (use free-flowing to treat free-flowing): do NOT stop the diarrhea — help it complete the expulsion of the stagnation. Once the stagnation is cleared, diarrhea stops naturally.食物积聚超过脾的运化能力→积滞阻塞肠道气机→气机郁积→向下爆发性释放（出入失常）。治疗原则为「通因通用」：不能止泻——帮助其完成积滞的排出。一旦积滞清除，腹泻自然停止。
Formula方药(Baohe Wan) — dissolves food stagnation without harsh purgation保和丸——消食化积而不峻下
④ Spleen Qi Deficiency(Clear cannot ascend)④ 脾气虚——升不及（清阳不能上升）
Key symptoms主要症状Chronic recurrent loose stools; worse after eating (especially greasy or cold foods); fatigue; poor appetite; abdominal fullness after eating; pale face; pale swollen tongue with teeth marks; thin weak pulse慢性反复溏便；进食后加重（尤其油腻或寒凉食物）；疲乏；纳差；食后腹胀；面色苍白；舌淡胖有齿痕；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机— The Spleen cannot raise the clear. Nutrients and fluids that should ascend to be distributed as Qi and Blood instead remain in the intestine and join the descending stream. This is a chronic energy generation failure: the patient has loose stools AND fatigue AND poor appetite because all three share the same root — Spleen Qi cannot ascend what it has transformed.升不及——脾不能升清。本应上升以布散为气血的营养物质和水液，反而留在肠道中加入下降流。这是慢性能量生成失败：患者同时有溏便、疲乏和纳差，因为三者共享同一根本——脾气无力上升其所运化之物。
Formula方药(Shen Ling Bai Zhu San) — tonify Spleen Qi, drain Damp, restore ascending参苓白术散——健脾益气、渗湿止泻、恢复升清
⑤ Kidney Yang Deficiency — at the root⑤ 肾阳虚（五更泻）——升不及于根本
Key symptoms主要症状Diarrhea at dawn (4–6am), urgent, with borborygmus; stool contains undigested food; low back soreness; cold limbs; cold intolerance; nocturia; pale wet tongue with white coat; deep-weak-slow pulse黎明前腹泻（凌晨4–6点），急迫，伴肠鸣；粪便含完谷不化；腰酸；四肢冷；怕冷；夜尿；舌淡湿白苔；脉沉弱缓
Qi dynamic气机— The Kidney's Yang fire warms the Spleen from below. Without this warming, the Spleen cannot transform at all (at its most fundamental). At dawn, Yang Qi attempts to rise but the Kidney lacks the fuel to sustain the ascent — instead the effort produces intestinal agitation and diarrhea. The undigested food confirms: the digestive fire is too low to process food completely.命门火衰——肾的阳火（命门之火）从下方温煦脾胃。若无此温煦，脾完全无法运化（最根本层面的升不及）。黎明前，阳气试图上升但肾缺乏维持上升的动力——这种努力反而产生肠道激扰和腹泻。完谷不化证实：消化之火太弱无法完全处理食物。
Formula方药(Si Shen Wan) — warm Kidney Yang, warm Spleen, consolidate intestine, stop diarrhea四神丸——温肾暖脾、涩肠止泻
⑥ Liver Overacting on Spleen⑥ 肝郁乘脾（痛泻）——出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden abdominal pain followed immediately by urgent diarrhea; pain completely resolved after passing stool; recurrent episodes triggered by stress, anxiety, or frustration; may have alternating diarrhea and constipation; wiry pulse; pale or normal tongue突发腹痛后立即急迫腹泻；便后腹痛完全缓解；反复发作，情绪压力、焦虑或郁闷诱发；可有腹泻与便秘交替；脉弦；舌淡或正常
Qi dynamic气机— The Liver's constraint creates a pressure build-up. When stress triggers Liver Qi to surge, it overflows into the Spleen territory, suddenly disrupting Spleen Qi → abrupt downward Qi movement → immediate diarrhea. The complete relief after passing stool confirms: this is a Qi dynamic disruption, not a structural intestinal disease. Between episodes, bowel function can be entirely normal.出入失常——肝气郁结产生压力积聚。情绪压力触发肝气冲动时，溢入脾的领域（木克土），突然破坏脾气→急剧向下气机运动→即刻腹泻。便后完全缓解证实：这是气机扰动，而非器质性肠道疾病。发作间期，肠道功能可以完全正常。
Formula方药(Tong Xie Yao Fang) — the classical formula for this exact pattern, from痛泻要方——《丹溪心法》经典方，专为此证型而设
Using Descending to Treat Descending通因通用 · 以通治通
Food stagnation diarrhea exemplifies — using the same movement (downward, outward) that characterizes the disease to treat it. In food stagnation, the body IS already trying to expel the stagnation; TCM assists rather than opposes this direction. Compare with constipation where the descending must be restored from an opposing direction. This cross-module contrast is one of the most important demonstrations of TCM's flexible treatment principle: the treatment direction is determined by the pathological substance and its location, not by the symptom direction alone. 食积泄泻是通因通用的典型示例——使用与疾病特征相同的运动方向（向下、向外）来治疗它。在食积中，身体已经在尝试排出积滞；中医顺应而非对抗这一方向。与便秘（便秘模块）对比——便秘需要从相反方向恢复下降。这一跨模块对比是中医灵活治疗原则最重要的示范之一：治疗方向由病理物质及其位置决定，而非单纯由症状方向决定。
Core Protocol — All Patterns核心处方——所有证型
ST25 天枢 Tianshu Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
ST25 is the Front-Mu of the Large Intestine — the direct alarm/gathering point for the Large Intestine organ. It sits exactly at the level of the navel (umbilicus), the midpoint between upper and lower body, and is the primary regulatory point for all intestinal disorders (both diarrhea AND constipation — it is bidirectionally regulatory, consolidating excess descent and restoring deficient descent as needed). In diarrhea: regulates the Large Intestine's reception and transmission function, calms the intestinal Qi, and stops diarrhea regardless of pattern. Always used bilaterally.ST25是大肠的前募穴——大肠脏腑的直接报警/聚集穴位。恰好位于脐旁，上下身的中点，是所有肠道疾患的首要调节穴（既治腹泻又治便秘——双向调节，按需固摄过度下降或恢复不足下降）。在泄泻中：调节大肠的受纳传导功能，安定肠道气机，无论何种证型均能止泻。始终双侧取穴。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Reducing for excess (Damp-Heat, food stagnation); reinforcing for deficiency (Spleen Xu, Kidney Yang Xu); even method for Cold-Damp and Liver-Spleen. Moxa strongly recommended for Cold-Damp and Yang deficiency patterns (direct moxa or moxa box over abdomen).直刺1–1.5寸。实证（湿热、食积）用泻法；虚证（脾虚、肾阳虚）用补法；寒湿和肝脾不和用平补平泻。寒湿和阳虚证型强烈推荐灸法（直接灸或腹部灸盒）。
CV12 中脘 Zhongwan Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
CV12 is the Front-Mu of the Stomach and the Hui-Meeting point of the Fu organs. It governs the entire Middle Jiao (Spleen-Stomach axis) and is the primary point for restoring Spleen-Stomach Qi dynamic (ascending Spleen, descending Stomach). In diarrhea, CV12 addresses the upstream Spleen function that determines whether the Large Intestine receives properly formed material. Without restoring Spleen-Stomach function, treating the Large Intestine alone (ST25) addresses only the branch.CV12是胃的前募穴，六腑的会穴。统领整个中焦（脾胃轴线），是恢复脾胃气机升降（脾升胃降）的首要穴位。在泄泻中，CV12针对决定大肠是否接收适当成形物质的上游脾的功能。不恢复脾胃功能，单独治疗大肠（ST25）只治标。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing for most patterns. Reinforcing + moxa for Cold and deficiency patterns. Caution: do not needle deeply in thin patients (stomach lies close to the surface).直刺1–1.5寸。大多数证型平补平泻。寒证和虚证加补法+灸法。注意：消瘦患者不宜深刺（胃与体表较近）。
ST36 足三里 Zusanli Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
ST36 is the He-Sea point of the Stomach channel and the primary point for tonifying Middle Jiao Qi and Blood. The classical teaching: "" — Sea points treat the Fu organs internally. ST36 directly supports Spleen-Stomach Qi generation — for diarrhea, this means providing the Qi energy the Spleen needs to raise the clear and complete transformation. In chronic deficiency diarrhea (Spleen Xu, Kidney Yang Xu), ST36 is essential. Moxa on ST36 is one of the most powerful Yang-tonifying clinical interventions in TCM.ST36是胃经合穴，补中焦气血的首要穴位。经典教义：「合治内腑」——合穴从内部治疗腑病。ST36直接支持脾胃气的生成——对于泄泻，意味着为脾提供升清和完成运化所需的气机能量。慢性虚损泄泻（脾虚、肾阳虚）中，ST36不可或缺。ST36灸法是中医最有效的温阳临床干预之一。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–2 cun. Reinforcing for deficiency; even method for excess. Moxa on ST36 strongly recommended for all chronic deficiency patterns (10–15 min moxa per session).直刺1–2寸。虚证用补法；实证用平补平泻。所有慢性虚证强烈推荐ST36灸法（每次10–15分钟）。
SP9 阴陵泉 Yinlingquan Minister — Damp Resolution臣——化湿
Why this point为什么选它
SP9 is the He-Sea (Water) point of the Spleen channel — the primary point for resolving Damp throughout the body. In diarrhea, Damp is almost universally involved: Cold-Damp, Damp-Heat, Spleen Xu generating Damp, Kidney Yang Xu allowing Cold-Damp to accumulate. SP9 specifically promotes the Spleen's ability to transform and transport fluids, directing excess fluid downward into the Bladder rather than into the stool. This is the acupuncture expression of "" — diverting fluids via urination to consolidate the stool.SP9是脾经合穴（水穴）——全身化湿的首要穴位。在泄泻中，湿邪几乎普遍存在：寒湿、湿热、脾虚生湿、肾阳虚致寒湿积聚。SP9特异性促进脾运化和输布水液的能力，将多余水液向下引入膀胱（利小便）而非进入粪便。这是「利小便以实大便」的针灸体现——通过利尿引流水液以充实大便。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–2 cun. Reducing for Damp-Heat and Cold-Damp excess. Even method for Spleen Xu. Reinforcing sparingly — SP9's primary action is draining/moving, so heavy reinforcing is inappropriate.直刺1–2寸。湿热和寒湿实证用泻法。脾虚用平补平泻。补法少用——SP9主要作用是引流/运动，过度补法不适当。
ST37 上巨虚 Shangjuxu Assistant — Large Intestine Lower He-Sea佐——大肠下合穴
Why this point为什么选它
ST37 is the Lower He-Sea point of the Large Intestine. The classical principle: "" — Lower He-Sea points directly treat the corresponding Fu organ. ST37 provides direct regulatory access to the Large Intestine from a distance point, complementing the local action of ST25 (Front-Mu). Together, ST25 + ST37 create a Front-Mu/Lower He-Sea combination — one of the most powerful paired-point strategies for Fu organ disorders.ST37是大肠的下合穴。经典原则：「合治内腑」——下合穴直接治疗相应腑病。ST37从远端穴位提供对大肠的直接调节通路，补充ST25（前募穴）的局部作用。ST25+ST37共同构成募穴/下合穴配伍——腑病最有效的配穴策略之一。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–2 cun. Match technique to pattern (reducing for excess, reinforcing for deficiency). Strong Qi sensation toward foot is the desired response.直刺1–2寸。手法与证型匹配（实证泻，虚证补）。向足部的强得气感是预期反应。
Pattern Modifications随证加减
① Cold-Damp①寒湿Add CV8 (moxa only — NEVER needle; indirect moxa over salt filling the navel =) — most powerful warming point for intestinal Cold. Add SP6 (even method) to strengthen Spleen-Damp transformation.加CV8神阙（仅灸法——绝不针刺；脐中填盐隔盐灸）——温化肠道寒邪最有效穴位。加SP6三阴交（平补平泻）以强化脾的运化湿邪。
② Damp-Heat②湿热Add LI11 (reducing) — clears Heat from the Large Intestine channel. Add GV14 (reducing) for systemic Heat clearance if fever present. No moxa.加LI11曲池（泻法）——清大肠经热邪。有发热时加GV14大椎（泻法）清全身热邪。不用灸法。
③ Food Stagnation③食积Add PC6 (reducing) for nausea. Add CV10 (even method) to address the lower stomach-upper intestine junction where food stagnates. Reducing on ST25 and ST37.加PC6内关（泻法）止恶心。加CV10下脘（平补平泻）针对食积停留的胃下部-上肠接合部。ST25和ST37均用泻法。
④ Spleen Qi Xu④脾气虚Add BL20 (reinforcing + moxa) — back-shu of Spleen, directly tonifies Spleen Qi. Add GV20 (reinforcing) — raises Yang Qi upward, directly restoring function. Moxa on ST36 essential.加BL20脾俞（补法+灸）——脾背俞穴，直接补脾气。加GV20百会（补法）——引阳气上升，直接恢复升清功能。ST36灸法必不可少。
⑤ Kidney Yang Xu⑤肾阳虚（五更泻）Add CV4 (reinforcing + moxa — essential) — nourishes Kidney Yang and warms the Gate of Vitality. Add BL23 (reinforcing + moxa). Add CV8 . All moxa — the entire protocol should be warming.加CV4关元（补法+灸——必须）——滋养肾阳，温命门之火。加BL23肾俞（补法+灸）。加CV8神阙（隔盐灸）。全用灸法——整个处方应以温煦为主。
⑥ Liver-Spleen⑥肝郁乘脾（痛泻）Add LV3 (reducing) — soothes Liver Qi and stops the Wood-overacting-on-Earth dynamic. Add GB34 (even method) — dredges Shaoyang, restores Gallbladder-Spleen balance. Replace heavy reinforcing on Spleen points with even method.加LV3太冲（泻法）——疏肝气，阻止木克土动态。加GB34阳陵泉（平补平泻）——疏少阳，恢复胆脾平衡。将脾的穴位重补法改为平补平泻。
葛根芩连汤 Gégēn Qínlián Tāng
Source: Pattern: Damp-Heat diarrhea (②)出处：《伤寒论》· 证型：湿热泄泻（②）
Urgent watery or loose diarrhea; yellow foul stool; burning anus; fever; thirst; red tongue yellow coat; rapid pulse. Also used for modern IBS-D with heat presentation and acute gastroenteritis.急迫水样或稀便；粪黄臭秽；肛门灼热；发热；口渴；舌红黄苔；脉数。也用于现代热证IBS-D和急性胃肠炎。
葛根 15g黄芩 9g黄连 6g炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
(Sovereign, 15g): Raises Spleen Yang and Qi upward, simultaneously releases the exterior (when there is concurrent fever/chills). Its ascending action directly counteracts the of Damp-Heat diarrhea. Also specifically known for "" — stopping diarrhea — in the classical texts.

+ : Clear Heat from the intestines. specifically clears Damp-Heat from the Middle and Lower Jiao; its bitter-cold nature descends pathological Fire. Together they address the Heat component that alone cannot handle.

: Harmonizes and protects the Middle Jiao from the bitter-cold of /.

Formula logic summary: lifts what should ascend; /drain what should be cleared; protects the center. Four herbs, complete Qi dynamic correction for Damp-Heat diarrhea.葛根（君，15g）：向上升举脾阳和气机（升清），同时解表（有并发发热/恶寒时）。其上升作用直接对抗湿热泄泻的降太过。经典文献中也特别以「止利」著称——止泻。

黄芩+黄连：清肠道热邪。黄连特异性清中下焦湿热；其苦寒之性下降（降）病理性火热。合用针对葛根单独无法处理的热的成分。

炙甘草：调和并保护中焦免受黄芩/黄连苦寒之伤。

方义总结：葛根升举应当上升之物；黄芩/黄连泄去应当清除之物；炙甘草保护中心。四味药，完整的气机纠正，专为湿热泄泻。
参苓白术散 Shēnlíng Báizhú Sǎn
Source: Pattern: Spleen Qi Deficiency diarrhea (④)出处：《太平惠民和剂局方》· 证型：脾气虚泄泻（④）
Chronic recurrent loose stools; fatigue; poor appetite; abdominal fullness after eating; pale face; pale swollen tongue with teeth marks; thin weak pulse慢性反复溏便；疲乏；纳差；食后腹胀；面色苍白；舌淡胖有齿痕；脉细弱
党参 12g白术 9g茯苓 12g山药 15g莲子 9g薏苡仁 15g扁豆 9g砂仁 6g后下桔梗 6g炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
Spleen-tonifying axis (+ + +): This is essentially — the foundational Spleen Qi tonifying formula. It builds the basic Spleen Qi needed to resume function.

Damp-draining axis (+ +): Spleen Qi Xu invariably produces Damp (the Spleen cannot transform fluids). These three drain the Damp that the tonifying herbs alone cannot address.

Middle Jiao support (+): Nourish Spleen Yin while astringently consolidating the intestine — preventing over-drainage.

: Moves Qi in the Middle Jiao to prevent the heavy tonifying herbs from causing stagnation (the same role as in).

: Raises Lung Qi upward — acting as the "boat" that carries the formula's effects to the upper body, expressing the ascending direction the entire formula is designed to restore. This is the most elegant aspect of the formula: a single Lung-ascending herb that embodies the therapeutic direction.补脾轴线（党参+白术+茯苓+炙甘草）：本质上是四君子汤——基础补脾气方。建立恢复升清功能所需的基本脾气。

渗湿轴线（茯苓+薏苡仁+扁豆）：脾气虚必然生湿（脾不能运化水液）。这三味药排除补益药单独无法处理的湿邪。

中焦支持（山药+莲子）：滋养脾阴同时收涩固肠——防止过度渗泄。

砂仁：运化中焦气机，防止重补药产生郁滞（与归脾汤中木香的作用相同）。

桔梗：向上升举肺气——作为「船」载方药效果至上部，体现整个方剂旨在恢复的上升方向。这是方剂最精妙的一面：单一升肺药体现了治疗方向（升清）。
四神丸 Sì Shén Wán
Source: Pattern: Kidney Yang Deficiency(⑤)出处：《证治准绳》· 证型：肾阳虚——五更泻（⑤）
Dawn diarrhea (4–6am), urgent with borborygmus, undigested food in stool, cold limbs, low back soreness, cold intolerance, pale wet tongue, deep-weak pulse黎明前腹泻（凌晨4–6点），急迫伴肠鸣，粪便含完谷不化，四肢冷，腰酸，怕冷，舌淡湿，脉沉弱
补骨脂 12g肉豆蔻 6g吴茱萸 3g五味子 6g生姜 9g大枣 5枚
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
(Sovereign): Warms Kidney Yang and the Gate of Vitality — addresses the root cause. Also specifically astringes the Large Intestine. The character (bone) signals its deep Yang-warming action at the Kidney/bone/marrow level.

: Warms the Middle Jiao (Spleen-Stomach) and astringes the intestine — bridges the Kidney warming to the Spleen warming needed for transformation. Also has specific astringent action on the Large Intestine (consolidates the exit gate).

: Warms the Liver and Middle Jiao, descends rebellious Qi (stops vomiting/diarrhea), and expels Cold. The Liver channel connects to the intestines; warming the Liver helps consolidate the intestinal Yang.

: Astringes and consolidates — the "lock" on the exit gate. Without this astringent component, warming alone would not prevent the uncontrolled dawn descent.

+ : Harmonize Middle Jiao and moderate the formula's warming properties.

Teaching point: works on two axes simultaneously: warming the root (Kidney Yang) and consolidating the gate (Large Intestine astringency). Missing either axis = incomplete treatment.补骨脂（君）：温肾阳和命门之火——针对根本病因。也特异性收涩大肠。「骨」字提示其在肾/骨/髓层面的深层温阳作用。

肉豆蔻：温中（脾胃）并收涩肠道——将温肾与运化所需的温脾相连接。也对大肠有特异性收涩作用（固摄出口门户）。

吴茱萸：温肝和中焦，降逆气（止呕止泻），散寒邪。肝经连接肠道；温肝有助于固摄肠道阳气。

五味子：收涩固摄——出口门户的「锁」。没有此收涩成分，单纯温煦无法防止不受控制的黎明前下降。

生姜+大枣：调和中焦，缓和方剂的温热之性。

教学要点：四神丸同时在两条轴线起效：温暖根本（肾阳）和固摄门户（大肠收涩）。缺少任一轴线=治疗不完整。
痛泻要方 Tòngxiè Yào Fāng
Source: Pattern: Liver overacting on Spleen (⑥)出处：《丹溪心法》· 证型：肝郁乘脾（⑥）
Pain before diarrhea, completely relieved after; stress-triggered recurrent episodes; may alternate diarrhea and constipation; wiry pulse; pale or normal tongue泻前腹痛，便后完全缓解；情绪诱发反复发作；可有腹泻便秘交替；脉弦；舌淡或正常
白术 9g白芍 12g陈皮 6g防风 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
Only four herbs, but each specifically chosen to address one component of the Liver-Spleen disharmony:

(Spleen Qi Xu): Tonifies Spleen Qi and drains Damp — restores the Earth that Wood is overacting on.

(Liver Qi): Softens the Liver, restrains the excessive Wood, and relieves abdominal spasm. The acid flavor of "gathers" Liver Qi that is surging too freely.

(Qi regulation): Moves Spleen-Stomach Qi to prevent stagnation from 's tonifying action; also drains Damp.

(Wind-Wood): The most elegant choice(literally "guard against Wind") is a Wind-dispersing herb. In TCM, the Liver corresponds to Wind. By dispersing Wind-Wood agitation, simultaneously calms the excessive Liver Qi surge AND slightly lifts Spleen Yang (Wind herbs have an ascending quality). It is the formula's "double agent" — treating Liver and Spleen in one herb.仅四味药，但每味均特异性针对肝脾不和的一个成分：

白术（脾气虚）：健脾气、燥湿——恢复被木所侵的土。

白芍（肝气）：柔肝，制约过亢的木，缓急止痛。白芍的酸味「收敛」过于自由冲动的肝气。

陈皮（气机调节）：运化脾胃气机，防止白术补益所致的郁滞；也燥湿。

防风（风木）：最精妙的选择——防风是疏散风邪的药。在中医，肝对应风（肝主风）。通过疏散风木之扰，防风同时平息过亢的肝气冲动，并略微升举脾阳（风药有上升性质）。它是方剂的「双重角色」——一味药同时治肝治脾。
Case 1案例一Damp-Heat Diarrhea — Acute Gastroenteritis Presentation湿热泄泻——急性胃肠炎表现
Patient: 32M. 2-day history of acute diarrhea after eating at a food stall. 6–8 loose yellow stools/day, foul-smelling, burning sensation at anus. Low-grade fever (37.8°C). Thirst, prefers cold drinks. Abdominal cramping. Dark scanty urine. Red tongue, yellow greasy coat. Slippery-rapid pulse. No blood in stool. No significant weight loss.患者：男，32岁。外出就餐后急性腹泻2天。每日6–8次稀黄便，臭秽，肛门灼热感。低热（37.8°C）。口渴喜冷饮。腹部痉挛痛。尿少色深。舌红苔黄腻。脉滑数。粪便无血。无明显体重减轻。
Contaminated food → Damp-Heat enters intestine不洁食物→湿热入肠
→
Heat drives rapid descent热邪驱动急速下降（降太过）
→
Small Intestine fails to separate clear小肠分清别浊失常
→
Yellow foul urgent diarrhea黄色臭秽急迫腹泻
Formula: + 6g + 9g (additional Lower Jiao Heat clearance). Acupuncture: ST25 (reducing) + CV12 (even) + ST36 (even) + SP9 (reducing) + ST37 (reducing) + LI11 (reducing). Dietary: Clear fluids only, avoid dairy, raw food, cold drinks despite craving (Cold drinks worsen Damp by further disrupting Spleen Yang).方药：葛根芩连汤+木香6g+黄柏9g（加强下焦清热）。针灸：ST25（泻法）+CV12（平补平泻）+ST36（平补平泻）+SP9（泻法）+ST37（泻法）+LI11（泻法）。饮食：仅清流质，避免乳制品、生食、冷饮（尽管渴望冷饮，寒凉饮料通过进一步破坏脾阳加重湿邪）。
Outcome: Diarrhea reduced to 2–3x/day by day 3. Resolved by day 5. Teaching point: For acute Damp-Heat diarrhea, is one of the fastest-acting classical formulas — often visible improvement within 24–48 hours. The action of is the key: stopping the descent from above, not just blocking the exit below.疗效：第3天腹泻减少至每日2–3次。第5天痊愈。教学要点：急性湿热泄泻，葛根芩连汤是起效最快的经典方之一——通常24–48小时内可见明显改善。葛根的升清作用是关键：从上方阻止下降，而非仅从下方封堵出口。
Case 2案例二— Kidney Yang Deficiency Dawn Diarrhea五更泻——肾阳虚黎明前腹泻
Patient: 67M, retired. 3-year history of waking at 5am with urgent diarrhea — 1–2 loose stools, then normal for the rest of the day. Undigested food visible. Cold limbs. Low back soreness. Cold intolerance. Nocturia (2–3x/night). Fatigue. Pale wet tongue, white coat. Deep-weak-slightly slow pulse.患者：男，67岁，退休。3年病史，凌晨5点急迫腹泻——1–2次稀便，之后全天正常。可见完谷不化。四肢冷。腰酸。怕冷。夜尿（每夜2–3次）。疲乏。舌淡湿白苔。脉沉弱略缓。
Kidney Yang decline (aging)肾阳衰退（年龄）
→
— Spleen not warmed命门火衰——脾失温煦
→
At dawn Yang surge — no Kidney fuel黎明阳气上升——肾无动力
→
Intestinal agitation →肠道激扰→五更泻
Formula: + (enhance Spleen-Kidney Yang warming). Acupuncture: ST25 (reinforcing) + CV12 (reinforcing + moxa) + ST36 (reinforcing + moxa) + CV4 (reinforcing + moxa) + BL23 (reinforcing + moxa) + CV8 (only). Treat 3x/week for 8 weeks minimum. Lifestyle: Warm breakfast before 7am daily; avoid cold environments in the morning; morning sunlight exposure (Yang Qi cultivation).方药：四神丸+附子理中丸（加强脾肾阳温煦）。针灸：ST25（补法）+CV12（补法+灸）+ST36（补法+灸）+CV4（补法+灸）+BL23（补法+灸）+CV8（仅隔盐灸）。每周3次，最少治疗8周。生活方式：每日7点前吃温热早餐；早晨避免寒冷环境；接受晨间阳光（培育阳气）。
Outcome: After 4 weeks, dawn diarrhea reduced from daily to 3–4x/week. After 8 weeks, 1–2x/week. Low back soreness and nocturia also improving. Teaching point: Kidney Yang deficiency takes months to rebuild — 3–6 month treatment course expected. The patient must also understand that lifestyle (sleep, warmth, diet) is part of the treatment: without these, herbal/acupuncture gains erode quickly.疗效：4周后，黎明前腹泻从每日减少到每周3–4次。8周后每周1–2次。腰酸和夜尿也在改善。教学要点：肾阳虚需要数月重建——预期3–6个月疗程。患者也必须理解生活方式（睡眠、保暖、饮食）是治疗的一部分：否则草药/针灸的疗效很快消退。
Case 3案例三— Liver-Spleen (IBS-D Pattern)痛泻——肝脾不和（IBS-D证型）
Patient: 38F, accountant, high-stress job. 2-year history of IBS diagnosed by gastroenterologist (colonoscopy normal). Pattern: sudden abdominal cramping before important meetings or stressful events → urgent diarrhea → complete relief after stool. Bowel function entirely normal between episodes. Also: alternates with constipation during low-stress periods. Wiry pulse. Slightly pale tongue. Normal coat.患者：女，38岁，会计师，高压工作。2年IBS病史（肠镜正常）。模式：重要会议或压力事件前突发腹部痉挛→急迫腹泻→便后完全缓解。发作间期肠道功能完全正常。另有：低压力时期便秘交替出现。脉弦。舌略淡。苔正常。
Chronic work stress → Liver Qi stagnation慢性工作压力→肝气郁滞
→
Acute stress → Liver Qi surges急性压力→肝气上冲
→
Wood overacts on Earth木克土
→
Spleen disrupted →脾气受扰→痛泻
Formula: + 9g + 15g (reinforce Liver-softening). Acupuncture: ST25 (even) + CV12 (even) + ST36 (even) + SP9 (even) + LV3 (reducing) + GB34 (even) + SP4 (even — Chong Mai master point for intestinal Qi regulation). Counselling suggestion: Stress management is therapeutic, not optional — without addressing the Liver stagnation source, formula and acupuncture treat only the manifestation.方药：痛泻要方+柴胡9g+白芍增至15g（加强柔肝）。针灸：ST25（平补平泻）+CV12（平补平泻）+ST36（平补平泻）+SP9（平补平泻）+LV3（泻法）+GB34（平补平泻）+SP4（平补平泻——冲脉主穴调节肠道气机）。建议心理疏导：压力管理是治疗必要部分，而非可选——不解决肝气郁滞的来源，方药和针灸只治标。
Outcome: After 6 sessions, episode frequency reduced by ~60%. Episodes still occur before major deadlines but less severe and shorter. Formula continued 3 months. Teaching point: is the most clinically relevant formula in this system for modern urban populations — IBS-D triggered by stress is extremely common. The formula's name (= "essential formula for painful diarrhea") is self-explanatory. Modern research has confirmed its efficacy in IBS-D.疗效：6次治疗后，发作频率减少约60%。重大截止日期前仍发作但程度较轻、持续时间较短。方药持续3个月。教学要点：痛泻要方是本系统中对现代城市人群临床最相关的方——情绪压力诱发IBS-D极为普遍。方名（痛泻要方=「痛泻要方」）不言自明。现代研究已证实其在IBS-D中的疗效。
Cross-Module in Digestive Disorders跨模块 · 消化病证中的升降出入
(Constipation) = or — exit gate blocked or descent insufficient. (Diarrhea) = or — descent excessive or ascent insufficient. These are mirror images on the Qi dynamic axis. ST25, CV12, and ST36 appear in BOTH modules — because they regulate the Spleen-Intestine axis bidirectionally. Same points, opposite techniques (reducing vs reinforcing), opposite results. 便秘=降不及或出入失常——出口门户受阻或下降不足。泄泻=降太过或升不及——下降过度或上升不足。这两者在气机轴线上是镜像。ST25、CV12和ST36在两个模块中均出现——因为它们双向调节脾-肠轴线。相同穴位，相反手法（泻法vs补法），相反结果。
Digestive Disorders消化病证
Dysentery痢疾
is distinguished from by one defining feature: the presence of mucus, pus, or blood in the stool, combined with tenesmus (— urgent urge to defecate with incomplete evacuation and lingering rectal heaviness). Where is a failure of the Large Intestine's transmission, is active injury to the intestinal wall itself — Damp-Heat or Cold-Damp has penetrated to the layer, damaging the vessel network of the Large Intestine. Understanding means understanding the difference between a disrupted channel and a damaged one. 痢疾与泄泻的区别在于一个定义性特征：粪便中含有黏液、脓血，并伴有里急后重（急迫便意但排出不畅，便后仍有肛门坠胀感）。泄泻是大肠传导失常；痢疾是肠壁本身受到主动损伤——湿热或寒湿已深入气血层面，损伤大肠的血络。理解痢疾，意味着理解经络失调与经络受损之间的区别。
⚠ Critical Safety — Dysentery Requires Diagnosis First⚠ 重要安全提示——痢疾必须先明确诊断
Bloody diarrhea with tenesmus is a medical emergency until proven otherwise. Before TCM treatment, confirm: stool culture (rule out Shigella, Salmonella, Campylobacter, E. coli O157:H7 — bacterial dysentery requiring antibiotics); rule out amebic dysentery (Entamoeba histolytica); rule out inflammatory bowel disease (Crohn's, Ulcerative Colitis — chronic recurrent bloody stool requires colonoscopy); rule out colorectal cancer (especially age >50, weight loss, anemia). TCM is appropriate for: chronic mild dysentery after pathogen clearance, IBS with mucus, residual symptoms post-infectious colitis, and mild chronic cases confirmed benign by modern workup. 伴里急后重的血性腹泻在排除前视为医疗急症。中医治疗前必须确认：粪便培养（排除志贺菌、沙门菌、弯曲杆菌、大肠杆菌O157:H7——细菌性痢疾需要抗生素）；排除阿米巴痢疾（溶组织内阿米巴）；排除炎症性肠病（克罗恩病、溃疡性结肠炎——慢性反复血便需肠镜）；排除结直肠癌（尤其年龄>50岁、体重减轻、贫血）。中医适用于：病原体清除后的慢性轻度痢疾、伴黏液的IBS、感染后结肠炎的残余症状，以及现代检查确认为良性的轻度慢性病例。
Qi Dynamic Framework · Beyond Transmission — Tissue Damage气机框架 · 超越传导——组织损伤
vs — the key distinction:
: pathogen disrupts Large Intestine's Qi dynamic (transmission function) → watery stool, no blood, no tenesmus
: pathogen penetrates deeper, injuring the (blood vessels/network) of the intestinal wall → mucus, pus, blood; tenesmus from Qi-Blood stagnation in the rectal area

— the signature of :
"" = inner urgency (the Qi is obstructed and trying to push through)
"" = rectal heaviness after defecation (Qi-Blood stagnation remains even after stool passes; the obstruction is in the tissue, not just in the stool)

Qi dynamic: at the tissue level. The Large Intestine's exit function is not merely dysregulated — it is actively obstructed by pathological accumulation (Damp-Heat or Cold-Damp binding with Qi and Blood in the intestinal wall). The treatment principle is "regulate Qi and the rectal heaviness resolves on its own; move Blood and the pus-stool heals on its own." Both Qi and Blood must be addressed. 泄泻与痢疾——关键区别：
泄泻：病邪扰乱大肠气机（传导功能）→水样便，无血，无里急后重
痢疾：病邪深入，损伤肠壁血络→黏液、脓、血；肛门区气血郁滞导致里急后重

里急后重——痢疾的标志：
「里急」=内部急迫感（气机阻滞并试图穿越）
「后重」=便后肛门坠胀（即使粪便排出，气血郁滞仍留在组织中；阻滞在组织，而非仅在粪便中）

气机：出入失常在组织层面。大肠的排出功能不仅是失调——而是被病理积聚（湿热或寒湿与肠壁气血互结）主动阻塞。治疗原则：调气则后重自除，行血则便脓自愈——「调气则里急后重自行消除，行血则脓血便自行痊愈。」气血两者均须兼顾。
Stool — Blood, Pus, Mucus?粪质——脓血黏液
What does the stool look like? Bright red blood mixed with mucus? Dark blood? White mucus with no blood? Pus-like discharge? Stool that is mostly mucus with very little fecal matter?粪便是什么样的？鲜红色血液混合黏液？暗色血液？无血的白色黏液？脓样分泌物？以黏液为主几乎无粪质？
→ The ratio of blood to mucus, and the color of blood, directly identifies whether Heat or Cold-Damp is dominant, and how deeply the blood vessels are injured→ 血与黏液的比例及血色，直接识别热还是寒湿占主导，以及血络损伤的深度
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Reading the Pus-Blood Ratio机理 · 解读脓血比例
Bright red blood predominant: Heat injuring the blood vessels directly. Fire agitates the Blood, forces it out of the vessels. Damp-Heat dysentery.

White mucus predominant, little or no blood: Cold-Damp has coagulated the intestinal Qi and damaged the mucous lining without significant vascular injury. Cold-Damp dysentery.

Mixed red and white: Both Damp-Heat and Cold-Damp present, or Heat injuring both Qi layer (white mucus) and Blood layer (red blood).

Dark purple or maroon blood: Blood stasis — older injury, or chronic pattern where stagnated Blood has congealed. Seen in chronic dysentery or post-infectious colitis.

Mostly mucus, barely any formed stool: The intestinal wall is so inflamed that it is secreting mucus continuously. Severe Damp accumulation in the Large Intestine — the organ is producing more fluid than it can process. 鲜红色血为主：热邪直接损伤血络。火热激扰血液，迫血外溢（热迫血行）。湿热痢。

白色黏液为主，少血或无血：寒湿凝滞肠道气机，损伤黏膜但无明显血管损伤。寒湿痢（白痢）。

赤白相间（赤白痢）：湿热与寒湿并存，或热邪同时损伤气分（白色黏液）和血分（红色血液）。

暗紫色或暗红色血液：血瘀——较旧的损伤，或慢性证型，郁滞之血已凝结。见于慢性痢疾或感染后结肠炎。

以黏液为主，几乎无成形粪便：肠壁炎症严重，持续分泌黏液。大肠湿邪积聚严重——脏腑产生的液体超过其能处理的量。
Bright red blood + foul smell鲜红血+臭秽
Damp-Heat湿热痢
White mucus, no blood, odourless白色黏液，无血，无味
Cold-Damp寒湿痢
Mixed red and white赤白相间
Mixed赤白痢
Dark purple blood, chronic暗紫色血，慢性
Blood stasis血瘀
Tenesmus Character里急后重特征
After passing stool, do you feel a persistent heaviness or urge in the rectum as if there is more to come — but nothing passes? How many times per day are you going? Is the urge constant or comes in waves?排便后肛门是否有持续的坠胀感或便意，感觉还有东西没排出——但什么也排不出？每天去几次？便意是持续的还是阵发性的？
→ The severity and character of tenesmus directly reflects the degree of Qi-Blood stagnation in the rectal/sigmoid area — more constant = more severe Qi-Blood obstruction→ 里急后重的严重程度和特征直接反映直肠/乙状结肠区域气血郁滞的程度——越持续=气血阻滞越严重
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Tenesmus as Qi-Blood Obstruction Signal机理 · 里急后重作为气血阻滞信号
is caused by Qi-Blood stagnation in the rectum and sigmoid colon — the pathogenic Damp-Heat or Cold-Damp has penetrated the tissue, binding with local Qi and Blood. The rectum "feels full" because it IS congested — not with stool, but with pathological Qi-Blood accumulation. Each time the body tries to evacuate this "fullness," only mucus and blood come out, not the relieving passage of formed stool.

Frequency matters: 10–20+ bowel attempts per day = severe Damp-Heat, significant Blood layer involvement. 3–5x per day with mild tenesmus = milder pattern, better prognosis. The classical description: "" (frequent trips to toilet, small amount each time) is the hallmark. 里急后重由直肠和乙状结肠的气血郁滞引起——湿热或寒湿病邪已深入组织，与局部气血互结。直肠「感觉充盈」是因为确实充血——不是粪便，而是病理性气血积聚。每次身体试图排出这种「充盈感」，只排出黏液和血，而非能带来缓解的成形粪便。

频率很重要：每天如厕10–20次以上=严重湿热，血分受累明显。每天3–5次伴轻度里急后重=较轻证型，预后较好。经典描述：「频频如厕，每次量少」是特征性表现。
Systemic Heat vs Cold Signs全身热象与寒象
Fever? Thirst with preference for cold or warm drinks? Burning sensation in anus? Cold limbs and aversion to cold? Fatigue out of proportion to duration of illness?发热？口渴喜冷还是喜热饮？肛门灼热感？四肢冷怕冷？疲乏与病程不相称？
→ These signs distinguish Damp-Heat (excess, acute) from Cold-Damp (excess with Cold) and Deficiency patterns (chronic, depleted)→ 这些体征区分湿热（实证，急性）与寒湿（实证兼寒）及虚损证型（慢性，耗竭）
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Acute vs Chronic Differentiation机理 · 急性与慢性鉴别
Acute Damp-Heat: Fever (Heat in Blood layer), burning anus (Heat scorching the lower aperture), thirst for cold (systemic Heat), foul-smelling bright red blood. Tongue: red, yellow greasy coat. Pulse: slippery-rapid.

Cold-Damp: No fever, no thirst or prefers warm drinks, white mucus, cold limbs. The Cold has congealed the intestinal vessels without generating Heat. Tongue: pale, white greasy coat. Pulse: soggy-slow.

Chronic deficiency: Prolonged illness has depleted Qi and Blood. Patient is pale, weak, easily fatigued. The dysentery "pattern" may have cleared but the damaged intestinal tissue cannot heal because there is insufficient Qi and Blood to repair it. This is where tonification is needed even though there may still be some Damp-Heat remnant. 急性湿热：发热（血分热邪），肛门灼热（热邪灼伤下窍），渴喜冷饮（全身热邪），臭秽鲜红血便。舌：红，苔黄腻。脉：滑数。

寒湿：无发热，不渴或喜热饮，白色黏液，四肢冷。寒邪凝滞肠道血络而不生热。舌：淡，苔白腻。脉：濡缓。

慢性虚损（久痢）：病程日久耗竭气血。患者面色苍白、虚弱、易疲乏。痢疾「证型」可能已清，但受损肠壁无法愈合，因为没有足够的气血修复它。此时需要补益，即使可能仍有少量湿热残余。
Pattern Decision — Acute vs Chronic First辨证决策——先辨急慢
Step 1:第一步： Acute (days–weeks) with fever and strong tenesmus → excess pattern (①②③). Chronic (months–years) with weakness → deficiency or mixed pattern (④⑤).急性（数天至数周）伴发热和强烈里急后重→实证（①②③）。慢性（数月至数年）伴虚弱→虚证或虚实夹杂（④⑤）。
Step 2 (acute):第二步（急性）： Red blood + heat signs = Damp-Heat ①. White mucus + cold signs = Cold-Damp ②. Mixed red-white = treat both ③.红血+热象=湿热①。白色黏液+寒象=寒湿②。赤白相间=兼治③。
Step 3 (chronic):第三步（慢性）： Fatigue + pale face + recurrence → Spleen Xu ④. Prolonged illness, occasional relapses, constitutional weakness → Deficiency-Excess mixed ⑤.疲乏+面色苍白+反复发作→脾虚④。病程日久，偶有复发，体质虚弱→虚实夹杂⑤。
① Damp-Heat Dysentery — +① 湿热痢——出入失常+升太过
Key symptoms主要症状Urgent frequent stools; bright red blood and yellow mucus; severe tenesmus; burning anus; abdominal pain; fever; thirst; red tongue yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse急迫频繁排便；鲜红血液伴黄色黏液；严重里急后重；肛门灼热；腹痛；发热；口渴；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Qi dynamic气机Damp-Heat penetrates the Blood layer of the Large Intestine → injures → Blood forced out of vessels → bloody stool. Qi-Blood stagnation in rectal area → . Treatment: — clear Heat, dry Damp, regulate Qi, move Blood simultaneously.湿热深入大肠血分→损伤血络→热迫血行→脓血便。直肠区域气血郁滞→里急后重。治疗：清热燥湿，调气行血——同时清热、燥湿、调气、行血。
Formula方药(Shaoyao Tang) — the principal Damp-Heat dysentery formula芍药汤——湿热痢主方
② Cold-Damp Dysentery② 寒湿痢（白痢）——出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状White or grey mucus stools; little or no blood; tenesmus present but less severe; abdominal pain relieved by warmth; no fever; no thirst or prefers warm drinks; cold limbs; pale tongue white greasy coat; soggy-slow pulse白色或灰色黏液便；少血或无血；里急后重存在但较轻；腹痛温热缓解；无发热；不渴或喜热饮；四肢冷；舌淡苔白腻；脉濡缓
Qi dynamic气机Cold congeals intestinal Qi and damages the mucous layer without driving Blood out (no significant vascular injury). The mucus is the Large Intestine's defensive secretion against Cold — the intestine is trying to protect itself. Treatment: — warm the Middle, transform Damp, regulate Qi, harmonize Blood.寒邪凝滞肠道气机，损伤黏膜层而不迫血外出（无明显血管损伤）。黏液是大肠对抗寒邪的防御性分泌——肠道在试图保护自身。治疗：温中化湿，调气和血——温中、化湿、调气、和血。
Formula方药(Weiling Tang) or — warm Middle, transform Damp胃苓汤或不换金正气散——温中化湿
③ Epidemic Dysentery / Severe Heat③ 疫毒痢——升太过极重
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden onset; high fever; profound tenesmus; dark red or purplish blood; severe abdominal pain; may have delirium or altered consciousness; red or purple tongue; yellow or black dry coat; rapid-forceful or wiry-rapid pulse. Severe — refer urgently to hospital if these features are present.突然发作；高热；严重里急后重；暗红或紫红色血便；剧烈腹痛；可有谵妄或意识改变；舌红或紫；苔黄或黑干；脉数有力或弦数。严重——出现上述特征时紧急转诊医院。
Qi dynamic气机Fire Toxin has penetrated to the Ying-Blood level — beyond Damp-Heat, this is a systemic toxic invasion. The altered consciousness indicates Heart involvement (Fire toxin disturbing the Shen). TCM formula adjunct only if hospitalized: + . Primary treatment is modern medical management.火毒深入营血分——超越湿热，这是全身性毒邪侵袭。意识改变提示心受累（火毒扰神）。仅在住院时作为辅助使用TCM方药：白头翁汤+黄连解毒汤。主要治疗是现代医疗处理。
Formula方药(Baitouweng Tang) — the classical severe Heat dysentery formula from白头翁汤——《伤寒论》经典重度热痢方
④ Chronic Deficiency Dysentery④ 久痢/休息痢——升不及
Key symptoms主要症状Prolonged intermittent dysentery; mild mucus-blood stool; mild tenesmus; fatigue; poor appetite; pale face; cold limbs; pale tongue; thin-weak pulse. Triggered by dietary indiscretion or cold exposure.长期间歇性痢疾；轻微黏液血便；轻度里急后重；疲乏；纳差；面色苍白；四肢冷；舌淡；脉细弱。饮食不慎或受寒诱发。
Qi dynamic气机— prolonged illness has depleted Spleen and Kidney Qi/Yang. The intestinal wound (damage) cannot heal because there is insufficient Qi-Blood to repair the tissue. A residual Damp pathogen may remain, but it persists because the body's own clearing mechanism (Spleen Yang) is too weak to expel it. Treatment must simultaneously tonify Qi-Blood AND clear residual Damp: .升不及——久病耗竭脾肾气/阳。肠道创面（血络损伤）无法愈合，因为气血不足以修复组织。可能有残余湿邪，但持续存在是因为身体自身的清除机制（脾阳）太虚弱无法驱逐它。治疗必须同时补益气血和清除残余湿邪：扶正兼祛邪。
Formula方药(Zhenren Yangzang Tang) — warm and tonify, astringe and stop dysentery真人养脏汤——温补固涩止痢
The Universal Dysentery Treatment Principle调气行血 · 痢疾通用治疗原则
The classical teaching principle for all dysentery patterns: . This means: regardless of whether the pattern is Hot or Cold, excess or deficiency — the (tenesmus) and the pus-blood stool share the same mechanism (Qi-Blood stagnation in the intestinal wall). Regulating Qi (, in excess; , in deficiency) relieves the urgency; moving Blood (,) heals the injured vessels. Every dysentery formula, from to , contains at least one Qi-regulating and one Blood-moving herb for this reason. 所有痢疾证型的经典教学原则：调气则后重自除，行血则便脓自愈。这意味着：无论证型是热还是寒、实还是虚——里急后重和脓血便共享同一机制（肠壁气血郁滞）。调气（实证用木香、槟榔；虚证用陈皮、砂仁）缓解急迫；行血（当归、赤芍）愈合受损血络。每一个痢疾方，从芍药汤到真人养脏汤，均包含至少一味调气药和一味行血药，正是出于此原则。
Core Protocol — All Patterns核心处方——所有证型
ST25 天枢 Tianshu Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
Front-Mu of Large Intestine — direct regulatory access to the Large Intestine. In dysentery, ST25 specifically addresses the intestinal wall injury by regulating Qi-Blood flow at the organ level. Reducing technique for acute excess patterns; reinforcing for chronic deficiency patterns. Always bilateral.大肠前募穴——直接调节大肠。在痢疾中，ST25通过调节脏器层面的气血运行，特异性针对肠壁损伤。急性实证用泻法；慢性虚证用补法。始终双侧取穴。
ST37 上巨虚 Shangjuxu Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
Lower He-Sea of Large Intestine — the distal point with most direct organ access. In dysentery, ST37 specifically regulates the Large Intestine's reception and holding function. Paired with ST25 (Front-Mu/Lower He-Sea combination), it creates a proximal-distal axis for treating the Large Intestine from both ends simultaneously. Reducing for Damp-Heat; reinforcing for deficiency.大肠下合穴——对大肠有直接脏器通路的远端穴位。在痢疾中，ST37特异性调节大肠的受纳和固摄功能。与ST25配伍（募穴/下合穴组合），从两端同时治疗大肠，形成近远端轴线。湿热用泻法；虚证用补法。
SP9 阴陵泉 Yinlingquan Minister — Damp Resolution臣——化湿
Why this point为什么选它
Primary Damp-resolving point — Damp is universally present in dysentery (whether Cold-Damp or Damp-Heat). SP9 transforms and drains Damp, and also addresses the Spleen's fluid-transforming function that is disrupted in all dysentery patterns. Even method or reducing for excess; mild even method for deficiency.首要化湿穴——湿邪在痢疾中普遍存在（无论寒湿还是湿热）。SP9化湿渗湿，也针对所有痢疾证型中受扰的脾的水液运化功能。实证平补平泻或泻法；虚证轻度平补平泻。
GV1 长强 Changqiang Assistant — Local Tenesmus Point佐——里急后重局部穴
Why this point为什么选它
GV1 sits at the tip of the coccyx, immediately above the anus — it is the most local point for the rectal and anal region. In dysentery, it directly relieves tenesmus by regulating the Qi and Blood stagnation in the local rectal tissue. Also used for prolapse and hemorrhoids. The classical indication: "" — exactly the dysentery signature symptom. Needling GV1 directly at the source of the stagnation addresses both the (urgency) and (heaviness) simultaneously.GV1位于尾骨尖，肛门正上方——是直肠和肛门区域最局部的穴位。在痢疾中，通过调节局部直肠组织的气血郁滞，直接缓解里急后重。也用于脱肛和痔疮。经典适应证：「肛门坠胀，里急后重」——正是痢疾的标志性症状。在郁滞源头针刺GV1，同时针对「里急」（急迫）和「后重」（坠胀）。
Technique操作
Slightly oblique upward 0.5–1 cun (toward the sacrum). Patient in lateral decubent or knee-chest position. Even method or mild reducing. Sensitive area — communicate with patient before needling. Do not needle perpendicularly (risk of rectal puncture).略向上斜刺0.5–1寸（朝向骶骨方向）。患者取侧卧位或膝胸位。平补平泻或轻泻法。敏感区域——针前与患者充分沟通。不可垂直深刺（有穿透直肠的风险）。
Pattern Modifications随证加减
① Damp-Heat①湿热痢Add LI11 (reducing) — clears Large Intestine channel Heat. Add SP10 (reducing) — cools Blood and stops bleeding. No moxa. All reducing technique.加LI11曲池（泻法）——清大肠经热邪。加SP10血海（泻法）——凉血止血。不用灸法。全用泻法。
② Cold-Damp②寒湿痢Add CV12 (reinforcing + moxa) — warms Middle Jiao. Add CV8 — warms intestine. All warming technique.加CV12中脘（补法+灸）——温中焦。加CV8神阙（隔盐灸）——温肠道。全用温热手法。
④ Chronic deficiency④久痢虚证Add ST36 (reinforcing + moxa) + BL20 (reinforcing + moxa) + CV4 (reinforcing + moxa) to rebuild Qi-Blood foundation. Gentle technique throughout.加ST36足三里（补法+灸）+BL20脾俞（补法+灸）+CV4关元（补法+灸）以重建气血基础。全程轻柔手法。
芍药汤 Sháoyào Tāng
Source: Pattern: Damp-Heat dysentery (①)出处：《素问病机气宜保命集》· 证型：湿热痢（①）
Urgent frequent bloody-mucus stools; severe tenesmus; abdominal pain; burning anus; fever; red tongue yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse急迫频繁脓血便；严重里急后重；腹痛；肛门灼热；发热；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
白芍 15g黄连 9g黄芩 9g当归 9g木香 6g槟榔 6g大黄 6g后下肉桂 3g炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic — Four-axis formula核心逻辑——四轴方
Clear Heat axis (+): Bitter-cold, clears Damp-Heat from intestines. specifically targets Middle-Lower Jiao Damp-Heat; targets Upper-Middle Jiao.

Move Blood axis (+): Nourishes and moves Blood — heals the injured . also relieves abdominal spasm and is the sovereign herb for its dose (15g). The principle embodied here.

Regulate Qi axis (+): Moves intestinal Qi, relieves tenesmus. moves Middle Jiao Qi; descends Qi in the Large Intestine specifically. The principle embodied here.

: A small dose of is used to "push through" the remaining Damp-Heat stagnation — using the downward purgative direction to assist in expelling the pathogen. This is in action: using a laxative in diarrhea to clear the pathogen.

(tiny dose, 3g): Prevents the heavy bitter-cold of /from damaging Spleen Yang. Also enters Blood layer to assist /in warming the vessels. The contrast of (hot) with /(cold) embodies the formula's dynamic balance.清热轴线（黄连+黄芩）：苦寒，清肠道湿热。黄连特异性针对中下焦湿热；黄芩针对上中焦。

行血轴线（白芍+当归）：养血行血——愈合受损血络。白芍也缓急止痛，以其剂量（15g）为君药。「便脓自愈」原则体现于此。

调气轴线（木香+槟榔）：运化肠道气机，缓解里急后重。木香运化中焦气机；槟榔特异性使大肠气下降。「后重自除」原则体现于此。

通因通用（大黄）：小剂量大黄用于「推通」残余湿热郁滞——以向下通泻的方向辅助驱逐病邪。这是通因通用的实际运用：在腹泻中使用泻下药以清除病邪。

肉桂（微量，3g）：防止黄连/黄芩的重苦寒损伤脾阳。也入血分辅助当归/白芍温通血脉。肉桂（热）与黄连/黄芩（寒）的对比体现了方剂的动态平衡。
白头翁汤 Báitóuwēng Tāng
Source: Pattern: Severe Heat dysentery / Epidemic dysentery (③)出处：《伤寒论》· 证型：重度热痢/疫毒痢（③）
Severe bloody diarrhea; burning anus; abdominal pain; fever; thirst; extreme tenesmus; red or purple tongue dry yellow coat; rapid-forceful pulse严重脓血便；肛门灼热；腹痛；发热；口渴；极度里急后重；舌红或紫，苔干黄；脉数有力
白头翁 15g黄柏 12g黄连 9g秦皮 12g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
Four herbs, all bitter-cold, all targeting the Blood level of the Large Intestine: (sovereign) is the classical herb for bloody dysentery — it specifically clears Heat-Toxin from the blood layer of the intestine and stops bleeding. clears Lower Jiao Damp-Heat and drains Fire from the Blood. is the strongest Damp-Heat clearer (used in all dysentery formulas). clears Large Intestine Heat and astringes to stop bleeding. All four act together as an intensive Heat-Toxin clearing battery. Unlike , this formula does not include Qi-moving or Blood-nourishing herbs — it is a pure clearing formula for acute toxic emergency, not for chronic use.四味药，全为苦寒，全针对大肠血分：白头翁（君）是血痢的经典药——特异性清肠道血分热毒并止血。黄柏清下焦湿热，泻血中之火。黄连是最强的湿热清除药（用于所有痢疾方）。秦皮清大肠热并收涩止血。四药共同形成密集的热毒清除组合。与芍药汤不同，本方不含调气或养血药——它是急性毒邪紧急情况的纯清热方，不适合慢性使用。
真人养脏汤 Zhēnrén Yǎngzāng Tāng
Source: Pattern: Chronic deficiency dysentery (④)出处：《太平惠民和剂局方》· 证型：久痢虚证（④）
Prolonged dysentery; mild mucus-blood stool; mild tenesmus; fatigue; cold limbs; poor appetite; pale tongue; thin-weak pulse病程日久痢疾；轻微黏液血便；轻度里急后重；疲乏；四肢冷；纳差；舌淡；脉细弱
党参 12g白术 9g当归 9g白芍 9g木香 6g肉桂 6g肉豆蔻 6g罂粟壳 6g诃子 9g炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
Tonifying axis (+ +): Rebuilds Spleen Qi — the source of healing energy for the damaged intestinal wall.

Blood-nourishing axis (+): Nourishes Blood to repair the injured blood vessels. The principle maintained even in this deficiency formula.

Warming axis (+): Warms Spleen and Kidney Yang — essential because chronic dysentery always depletes Yang.

Astringent axis (+): Consolidate and astringe the Large Intestine — prevents further loss of Qi-Blood through the damaged wall. (poppy husk) is the most powerful intestinal astringent in the TCM materia medica. Note: regulated substance in many jurisdictions; often substituted with or .

: The Qi-regulating component maintained even in this tonifying formula — without Qi regulation, the tonifying herbs would stagnate.补益轴线（党参+白术+炙甘草）：重建脾气——受损肠壁愈合能量的来源。

养血轴线（当归+白芍）：养血以修复受损血络。调气行血原则在此虚证方中仍得以维持。

温阳轴线（肉桂+肉豆蔻）：温脾肾阳——因为久痢必然耗竭阳气，这一轴线不可或缺。

收涩轴线（罂粟壳+诃子）：固涩大肠——防止气血通过受损肠壁进一步流失。罂粟壳是中药材料中最强效的肠道收涩药。注：在许多司法管辖区为管制物质；常以五倍子或赤石脂替代。

木香：即使在此补益方中仍维持调气成分——若无调气，补益药会产生郁滞。
Case 1案例一Damp-Heat Dysentery — Post-Travel Acute Onset湿热痢——旅行后急性发作
Patient: 28M. Returned from overseas trip 4 days ago. Stool culture negative (done at ER — no bacterial pathogen identified). 8–12 bloody-mucus stools/day. Severe tenesmus — constant rectal heaviness. Burning anus. Low fever (37.9°C). Thirst. Abdominal cramping. Red tongue, yellow greasy coat. Slippery-rapid pulse. Gastroenterology: no structural lesion on sigmoidoscopy; diagnosis of post-infectious colitis.患者：男，28岁。4天前从海外旅行归来。粪便培养阴性（急诊室完成——无细菌病原体）。每日8–12次脓血便。严重里急后重——持续肛门坠胀。肛门灼热。低热（37.9°C）。口渴。腹部痉挛痛。舌红苔黄腻。脉滑数。消化内科：乙状结肠镜无器质性病变；诊断感染后结肠炎。
Formula: (standard dose). Acupuncture: ST25 (reducing) + ST37 (reducing) + SP9 (reducing) + GV1 (even) + LI11 (reducing) + SP10 (reducing). Daily acupuncture for first week. Diet: No dairy, no raw foods, no spicy food; congee-based diet with and .方药：芍药汤（常规剂量）。针灸：ST25（泻法）+ST37（泻法）+SP9（泻法）+GV1（平补平泻）+LI11（泻法）+SP10（泻法）。首周每日针灸。饮食：不吃乳制品、生食、辛辣食物；以山药薏苡仁粥为主食。
Outcome: Stool frequency reduced to 3–4x/day by day 4. Tenesmus significantly reduced by day 5. Blood resolved by day 7. Continued formula 2 more weeks at half dose to consolidate. Teaching point: embodies the full principle — its four axes (clear Heat, move Blood, regulate Qi,) make it the most complete dysentery formula in the classical repertoire.疗效：第4天排便频率减少至每日3–4次。第5天里急后重明显减轻。第7天便血消失。继续以半量方药再服2周以巩固。教学要点：芍药汤完整体现调气行血原则——其四条轴线（清热、行血、调气、通因通用）使其成为经典中最完整的痢疾方。
Case 2案例二Chronic Dysentery — IBS with Mucus Blood久痢——伴黏液血便IBS
Patient: 55F. 18-month history of intermittent loose stools with occasional mucus and trace blood. Colonoscopy: mild non-specific colitis, no IBD confirmed. Episodes triggered by cold food or stress. Between episodes: normal stool. Fatigue. Cold limbs. Low back ache. Pale swollen tongue. Thin-weak pulse.患者：女，55岁。18个月间歇性稀便伴偶有黏液和少量血便史。肠镜：轻度非特异性结肠炎，未确认IBD。寒凉食物或压力诱发发作。发作间期：大便正常。疲乏。四肢冷。腰酸。舌淡胖。脉细弱。
Formula: (replaced with 6g). Acupuncture: ST25 (reinforcing) + ST37 (reinforcing) + ST36 (reinforcing + moxa) + BL20 (reinforcing + moxa) + CV4 (moxa) + GV1 (gentle even). Lifestyle: Avoid cold/raw foods; warm breakfast daily; gentle walking 30 min/day.方药：真人养脏汤（罂粟壳改用五倍子6g）。针灸：ST25（补法）+ST37（补法）+ST36（补法+灸）+BL20（补法+灸）+CV4（灸）+GV1（轻度平补平泻）。生活方式：避免寒凉生食；每日温热早餐；每天轻柔散步30分钟。
Teaching point: Chronic dysentery requires sustained treatment (3–6 months). The key clinical decision is recognizing that this is no longer primarily a Damp-Heat pattern — it has become a deficiency pattern where the intestinal wall cannot heal because Qi-Blood is too depleted to repair the damage. Continuing to clear Heat in a deficiency pattern would further damage the Spleen Yang and worsen the condition.教学要点：慢性痢疾需要持续治疗（3–6个月）。关键临床决策是认识到这不再主要是湿热证型——它已成为虚证，肠壁因气血太虚无法修复损伤而不能愈合。在虚证中继续清热会进一步损伤脾阳并加重病情。
Digestive Disorders — Qi Dynamic Spectrum消化病证——气机动态谱系
(Constipation) = . (Diarrhea) = or . (Dysentery) = at tissue level (Qi-Blood). These three conditions form a complete spectrum of Large Intestine Qi dynamic pathology — from blocked exit to uncontrolled exit to damaged exit. 便秘=降不及。泄泻=降太过或升不及。痢疾=出入失常在组织层面（气血）。这三个病证构成大肠气机病理的完整谱系——从出口受阻到出口失控再到出口受损。
Gynecology · Qi Dynamic妇科病证 · 气机框架
Dysmenorrhea痛经
Painful menstruation — the uterine Qi dynamic blocked, unable to freely descend月经期腹痛——胞宫气机受阻，不能顺利下行
Core Mechanism: Not free, therefore pain核心机制："不通则痛"
The uterus depends on a smooth Qi dynamic during menstruation: Liver Qi descends to move Blood through the Chong and Ren vessels, Blood discharges freely, no pain. When this descent is obstructed — by Cold, stagnation, Blood Xu, or Kidney deficiency — pressure builds inside the uterus and cramping pain arises.

Two root categories:
Excess: Qi stagnation, Blood stasis, Cold obstruction, Damp-Heat — something actively blocks the Chong/Ren flow
Deficiency: Qi and Blood Xu, Kidney deficiency — insufficient force to move Blood, pain from emptiness

Key clinical rule: Excess pain rejects pressure; Deficiency pain is relieved by warmth and pressure. 胞宫依赖月经期顺畅的气机：肝气下行推动血液通过冲、任二脉，经血自由排出，不痛。当此下行受阻——由寒邪、气滞、血虚或肾虚——胞宫内部压力积聚，产生痉挛性疼痛。

两大根本类别：
实证：气滞、血瘀、寒凝、湿热——有邪气主动阻滞冲任之流
虚证：气血两虚、肾虚——推动血液的力量不足，因"不荣则痛"而痛

关键临床规律：实证痛拒按；虚证痛喜按喜温。
Clinical Intake — Key Questions问诊要点
1. Timing: When does pain peak?1. 时间：疼痛何时最重？
Before onset? During? After? Day 1 vs day 2-3?经前？经期中？经后？第1天还是第2–3天？
Before menstruation: Liver Qi stagnation — blocked Qi creates pressure before Blood begins to move.

During menstruation (day 1): Cold obstruction or Blood stasis — the pathogen resists the descending Blood, causing pain when flow begins.

After menstruation: Qi and Blood deficiency — the uterus empties and the deficient Qi cannot maintain warmth and nourishment, dull aching from emptiness. 经前：肝气郁滞——气郁在血未动之前形成压力。

经期（第1天）：寒凝或血瘀——邪气阻抗下行之血，经血开始流动时即疼痛。

经后：气血两虚——胞宫空虚，虚弱之气无法维持温煦与濡养，因空虚而隐隐作痛。
Pain before period经前痛
Liver Qi stagnation肝气郁滞 降不及
Pain at onset/during经期第1天痛
Cold/Stasis寒凝/血瘀 入不及
Pain after period经后痛
Qi-Blood Xu气血两虚 升不及
2. Character: What does the pain feel like?2. 性质：疼痛是什么感觉？
Cramping? Distending? Dull aching? Burning? Cold and fixed? Relieved by heat pad? Relieved by discharge of clots?痉挛性？胀痛？隐痛？灼热感？冷痛固定？热敷可缓解？排出血块后是否缓解？
Cramping/colicky: Cold obstruction — Cold contracts smooth muscle violently. Heat pad dramatically relieves.

Distending/pressure pain: Qi stagnation — Qi has nowhere to go; pressure builds in the lower jiao. Pain worse before clots pass.

Fixed stabbing pain: Blood stasis — stasis has a fixed location; it does not move like Qi stagnation.

Dull aching, continuous: Deficiency — Qi and Blood insufficient to nourish vessels; the emptiness aches.

Burning pain with yellow discharge: Damp-Heat — Heat combines with Damp in the lower jiao. 绞痛/痉挛：寒凝——寒邪剧烈收缩平滑肌。热敷明显缓解。

胀痛/压迫感：气滞——气无处可去；下焦压力积聚。排出血块前疼痛往往更重。

固定刺痛：血瘀——瘀血有固定位置；不像气滞那样游走。

隐隐持续痛：虚证——气血不足，无法濡养经脉；空虚而痛。

灼热痛伴黄带：湿热——热邪与湿邪在下焦结合。
3. Flow: Describe the menstrual blood3. 经血：描述月经
Colour: bright red, dark red, purplish-black? Clots: present? Does passing a clot relieve pain? Volume: scanty, normal, heavy?颜色：鲜红、暗红、紫黑？血块：有无？排出血块后是否缓解？量：少、正常、多？
Dark blood with clots, pain relieved after clot passes: Classic Blood stasis — the stasis is the obstruction itself. Once the clot exits, the obstruction clears temporarily. This is a definitive stasis sign.

Scanty pale blood, dull pain after period: Qi-Blood Xu — insufficient Blood to fill the Chong vessel; the vessels are empty and cold.

Dark purplish clots with cold pain: Cold stasis — Cold has congealed the Blood; clots form as frozen turbid masses. 血色暗有血块，排块后疼痛缓解：血瘀经典表现——瘀血本身就是阻塞物。血块排出后，阻塞暂时清除。这是血瘀的确诊依据。

经量少色淡，经后隐痛：气血两虚——血液不足以充填冲脉；经脉空虚寒冷。

紫暗血块伴冷痛：寒凝血瘀——寒邪凝滞血液；血块如冻结的浊物。
4. Modifying factors4. 加减因素
Heat pad? Pressure? Cold exposure? Stress/emotional upset before period?热敷？按压？受寒？经前情志波动？
Heat pad relieves dramatically: Cold pattern — Heat counteracts the Cold contraction.

Pressure relieves: Deficiency — the emptiness benefits from support.

Pressure worsens: Excess — the obstructed area is already under pressure.

Stress/anger triggers or worsens: Liver Qi stagnation — emotional constraint tightens the Liver's descending Qi, which stagnates into the uterus pre-menstrually. 热敷明显缓解：寒凝——热力对抗寒邪收缩。

喜按：虚证——空虚状态受益于支持。

拒按：实证——受阻区域本已压力过大。

情志紧张/生气诱发或加重：肝气郁滞——情志抑制收紧肝之疏泄，郁滞经前下注胞宫。
Cold Obstruction — Excess寒凝胞宫证
Excess实证Cold寒证
Cold contracts vessels → Blood cannot descend freely → severe cramping pain寒邪收引→经脉痉挛→经血不能顺利下行
Key symptoms主要症状Severe cramping before/during period; cold lower abdomen; dramatically relieved by heat pad; aversion to cold; cold hands/feet; scanty dark flow with clots; pale or bluish tongue with white coat; wiry-tight pulse经前/经期剧烈痉挛痛；下腹冷痛；热敷明显缓解；畏寒；手足冷；经量少色暗有血块；舌淡或青紫苔白；脉弦紧
Qi dynamic气机: Cold invades the uterine vessels (from cold exposure during period, swimming, cold foods). Cold's nature is contraction → Chong and Ren vessels constrict → Blood cannot flow through → backs up → pressure → severe cramping.寒凝胞宫（入不及/降不及）：寒邪侵入胞宫经脉（常因经期受寒、游泳、食冷所致）。寒性收引→冲任二脉收缩→血液无法通行→积滞→压力→剧烈痉挛。
Qi Stagnation + Blood Stasis气滞血瘀证
Excess实证
Liver Qi fails to descend → Blood follows Qi stagnation → Chong/Ren blocked → pain + dark clots肝气不降→血随气滞→冲任受阻→疼痛+紫暗血块
Key symptoms主要症状Distending pain + cramping before/at onset; pain worse with pressure; mood swings/irritability before period; dark purplish clots; pain relieved after clot passage; breast distension; purple-dusky tongue; wiry pulse经前/经初胀痛兼痉挛；拒按；经前情绪波动/易怒；紫暗血块；排块后痛减；乳房胀痛；舌紫暗；脉弦
Qi dynamic气机/: Emotional stress knots the Liver. "Qi moves Blood; when Qi stagnates, Blood stagnates". Accumulated pressure in the uterus → pain before flow begins → partial relief when clots finally expel.降不及/出不畅：情志刺激郁结肝气。"气行则血行，气滞则血瘀"。胞宫积压→经血未行即痛→血块最终排出后部分缓解。
Qi and Blood Deficiency气血两虚证
Deficiency虚证
Insufficient Qi-Blood → vessels empty after discharge → uterus loses nourishment → dull aching from emptiness气血不足→排血后经脉空虚→胞宫失于濡养→因"不荣则痛"而隐痛
Key symptoms主要症状Dull continuous aching after period; relieved by pressure and warmth; scanty pale blood; fatigue; pale face and lips; palpitations; poor sleep; pale tongue, thin coat; weak-thin pulse经后隐隐持续疼痛；喜按喜温；经量少色淡；疲乏；面唇色淡；心悸；睡眠差；舌淡苔薄；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机/: When Spleen is weak, Blood production is insufficient. During menstruation, whatever Blood exists is discharged → the Chong vessel empties → the uterus loses nourishment. The pain of emptiness is dull and continuous, unlike the sharp pain of excess.升不及/荣不足：脾虚则血液生化不足。月经期，仅有的血液被排出→冲脉空虚→胞宫失养。虚痛隐隐持续，不同于实证的尖锐疼痛。
Kidney Deficiency肾虚证
Deficiency虚证
Kidney Essence fails to fill Chong/Ren → uterus lacks foundational nourishment → chronic dull pain especially after period肾精不足，不能充养冲任→胞宫缺乏根本濡养→慢性隐痛，尤以经后为甚
Key symptoms主要症状Dull lower back + lower abdominal ache during/after period; scanty blood; low back soreness as main complaint; dizziness; tinnitus; frequent urination; deep-weak pulse especially at chi经期/经后下腰及下腹隐痛；经量少；腰酸为主诉；头晕；耳鸣；尿频；脉沉细弱，尤以尺脉为甚
Qi dynamic气机(Kidney as root): The Kidney is the foundation of the Chong and Ren Mai — both vessels draw on Jing to nourish the uterus. When Kidney Jing is deficient, the Chong vessel lacks the essential substance to fill → the uterus is chronically undernourished. Low back pain is the Kidney's signature sign.入不足（肾为根本）：肾为先天之本，冲任二脉皆发源于肾，依赖肾精濡养胞宫。肾精亏虚，冲脉缺乏精微物质以充盈→胞宫长期失养。腰痛为肾之标志性症状（腰为肾之府）。
Damp-Heat Accumulation湿热蕴结证
Excess实证Heat热证
Damp-Heat stagnates in the lower jiao → ferments → obstructs Chong/Ren → burning painful menstruation湿热蕴结下焦→蒸腾发酵→阻遏冲任→灼热痛经
Key symptoms主要症状Burning pain during menstruation; worsened by heat; yellow or reddish thick discharge between periods; low fever; red tongue with yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse经期灼热疼痛；热敷加重；平时黄或红色黏稠带下；低热；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Qi dynamic气机: Damp-Heat is a composite pathogen — the Damp component obstructs flow, the Heat component agitates upward. Together they create a fermenting obstruction in the lower jiao that inflames the Chong and Ren vessels. Unlike Cold (relieved by heat), Damp-Heat is worsened by heat.出不畅（排出受阻）：湿热为复合病邪——湿邪阻滞流通（降不及），热邪蒸腾上扰（升太过）。两者在下焦形成蒸腾阻塞，炎热冲任二脉。与寒凝不同（寒凝热敷缓解），湿热遇热加重。
Acupuncture Principle: Open the Chong/Ren, Regulate the Uterine Qi Dynamic针灸原则：通调冲任，调理胞宫气机
Core strategy: select points that directly open the Chong and Ren vessels, regulate the Liver's descending function, and address the specific pattern (warm Cold, move stasis, nourish Xu). Timing matters: preventive treatment 3-5 days before onset for excess patterns; during period for acute pain; throughout cycle for deficiency patterns.核心策略：选取直接疏通冲任、调节肝之疏泄下行、并针对具体证型的穴位。时机至关重要：实证在经前3–5天预防性治疗；急性疼痛在经期治疗；虚证贯穿整个月经周期。
Core Points — All Patterns基础穴位——各证型通用
CV4 关元
Meeting of Ren Mai + three Yin channels; regulates the axis任脉与三阴之会；调节胞宫轴线
CV4 is where the Ren Mai concentrates its Qi in the lower abdomen. As the meeting point of all three leg Yin channels (Liver, Spleen, Kidney) it simultaneously nourishes Kidney Jing (foundation of Chong/Ren), warms Spleen Qi (source of Blood), and regulates Liver's descending function. For Cold: add moxa heavily. For deficiency: tonifying method + moxa.CV4是任脉（主胞宫）在下腹部Qi最集中处。作为三条足阴经的交会穴，同时滋养肾精（冲任之根），温补脾气（血液之源），调节肝之疏泄下行。寒凝证：重加灸。虚证：补法加灸以培补精气。
CV3 中极
Front-mu of Bladder; opens the lower jiao; directly reaches the uterus膀胱募穴；开通下焦；直达胞宫
CV3 is one level below CV4 and closer to the uterus structurally. Its primary action is to open obstruction in the lower jiao. Combined with CV4: CV4 nourishes and regulates; CV3 opens and clears.CV3在CV4下方一寸，在结构上更接近子宫。主要作用是开通下焦阻滞。CV4+CV3配合：CV4濡养调节；CV3开通清泄。
SP6 三阴交
Meeting of Spleen, Liver, Kidney channels; the master gynecological point脾肝肾三经之会；妇科要穴
SP6 simultaneously addresses all three Yin organ systems involved in menstruation: Liver (regulates Qi and Blood, ensures smooth descent), Spleen (generates Qi and Blood), Kidney (provides the Jing foundation for Chong/Ren). One point reaches three organs. Contraindicated in pregnancy.SP6同时处理月经涉及的所有三个阴脏系统：肝（调节气血，确保顺利下行）、脾（生成气血）、肾（为冲任提供精之根基）。一穴达三脏。孕妇禁用。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Cold obstruction寒凝证Add: GV4 (moxa — warms the Kidney Yang fire that warms the uterus), CV8 (moxa on salt — warms the lower jiao), SP8 (xi-cleft of Spleen — acute pain point for menstrual pain). Heavy moxa on CV3, CV4.加：GV4命门（灸——温肾阳之火以暖胞宫）、CV8神阙（隔盐灸——温下焦）、SP8地机（脾之郄穴——痛经急性止痛要穴）。CV3、CV4重灸。
Qi stagnation/Blood stasis气滞血瘀证Add: LV3 (smooths Liver Qi descent), LI4 (LV3+LI4 = , opens all four gates, moves Qi and Blood throughout), SP8 (xi-cleft for acute pain), BL17 (hui-meeting of Blood). Reducing method throughout.加：LV3太冲（疏肝气下行）、LI4合谷（LV3+LI4=四关，通开四关）、SP8地机（郄穴止急痛）、BL17膈俞（血之会穴）。全程泻法。
Qi-Blood deficiency气血两虚证Add: BL20 + BL21 , CV6 (sea of Qi — builds Qi foundation), moxa on CV3+CV4+SP6. Reinforcing method throughout. Treat throughout the cycle.加：BL20脾俞+BL21胃俞、CV6气海（气之海——培补气之根基）、CV3+CV4+SP6加灸。全程补法。贯穿整个月经周期治疗。
Kidney deficiency肾虚证Add: KI3 (source point of Kidney — nourishes Jing directly), BL23 , GV4 (if Kidney Yang Xu). Tonify KI3; add moxa for Yang deficiency.加：KI3太溪（肾之原穴——直接滋养肾精）、BL23肾俞、GV4命门（若肾阳虚）。补KI3；若有阳虚成分则加灸。
Damp-Heat湿热蕴结证Add: SP9 (resolves Damp from the Spleen), LV2 (clears Liver Heat), BL32 (local point in the sacral region, directly clears Heat from the uterus/lower jiao). Reducing method. No moxa.加：SP9阴陵泉（从脾化湿）、LV2行间（清肝热）、BL32次髎（骶区局部穴，直接清下焦之热）。泻法。禁灸。
Shao Fu Zhu Yu Tang少腹逐瘀汤
Cold obstruction + Blood stasis: severe cramps, cold lower abdomen, dark clots, dramatic heat pad relief寒凝血瘀：剧烈痉挛，下腹冷痛，紫暗血块，热敷明显缓解
Mechanism: Targets the lower abdomen — the uterine region. Combines blood-activating herbs (, , ,) with warming herbs (, ,) and Qi movers (,). The warming herbs re-open Cold-contracted vessels; the Blood activators push the stasis out; the Qi movers ensure Blood follows Qi downward. Directly addresses the Cold to stasis to obstruction chain.机理：精准靶向少腹——胞宫区域。活血药（蒲黄、五灵脂、没药、赤芍）配伍温里药（小茴香、干姜、肉桂）及行气药（延胡索、川芎）。温里药重开寒凝收缩的经脉；活血药推出瘀滞；行气药确保血随气向下运行。直接针对寒凝→血瘀→阻滞的病理链条。
Ge Xia Zhu Yu Tang膈下逐瘀汤
Qi stagnation + Blood stasis: distending + stabbing pain, clots, mood swings, breast distension, wiry pulse气滞血瘀：胀痛兼刺痛，血块，情绪波动，乳胀，脉弦
Mechanism: Uses both Qi movers (, ,) and Blood activators (, , , ,). The Qi movers address the Liver stagnation root; the Blood activators resolve the consequent stasis. Key herb: moves Liver Qi specifically through the lower jiao, facilitating the downward descent into the Chong vessel.机理：行气药（香附、乌药、枳壳）与活血药（桃仁、红花、川芎、赤芍、五灵脂）并用。行气药处理肝郁之根；活血药化解继发的瘀血。关键药：香附专门通过下焦运行肝气，促进其向下进入冲脉。
Ba Zhen Tang八珍汤
Qi-Blood deficiency: dull pain after period, scanty pale blood, fatigue, pallor, weak pulse气血两虚：经后隐痛，经量少色淡，疲乏，面色苍白，脉弱
Mechanism: Si Jun Zi Tang (four gentlemen — build Spleen Qi, restore ascending Blood production) + Si Wu Tang (four substances — nourish and move Blood in the Chong vessel). Together: rebuild the ascending Qi + nourish the Chong vessel = fill the empty vessel that is causing pain. Treat for at least 2-3 cycles before expecting results.机理：四君子汤（补脾气以恢复升清生血功能）+四物汤（直接在冲脉中滋养并运行血液）。合用：重建升清之气+充养冲脉=填补导致疼痛的空虚经脉。需治疗至少2–3个月经周期方见效。
Wen Jing Tang (Jin Gui Yao Lue)温经汤（《金匮要略》）
Cold + deficiency mixed: chronic cold pain, scanty blood, some stasis, cold hands, dry lips — complex cold-deficiency-stasis triad寒虚夹瘀：慢性冷痛，经量少，夹有瘀血，手冷，唇口干燥——寒虚瘀复杂三联症
Mechanism: Zhang Zhongjing's formula. Warms the meridians (, ,), nourishes Blood (, , ,), clears residual Heat (,), tonifies Qi (,).
