Kidney Jing (the deepest constitutional reserve) depleted → profound exhaustion unresponsive to rest → post-exertional malaise肾精（最深层体质储备）耗竭→深度疲惫对休息无反应→劳累后不适
Key clinical features关键临床特征Profound fatigue not relieved by any rest; post-exertional malaise lasting 24–72 hours after minimal activity; cognitive dysfunction (processing speed, word-finding); unrefreshing sleep; orthostatic intolerance; deep-weak pulse especially chi; pale or slightly dark tongue. CAUTION: over-treatment worsens. Gentle, gradual, sustained approach only.任何休息均无法缓解的深度疲劳；最小活动后持续24–72小时的劳累后不适；认知功能障碍（处理速度、找词）；睡眠不解乏；直立性不耐受；脉深弱尤以尺部；舌淡或略暗。注意：过度治疗会加重。只能采用轻柔、渐进、持续的方法。
Treatment approach治疗方法Nourish Kidney Jing — do NOT stimulate strongly. Gentle needling only (no EA, no strong stimulation). BL23 (gentle tonification) + KI3 + GV4 (light moxa only — avoid strong heat) + CV4 + SP6. Herbal: Zuo Gui Wan (nourish Kidney Yin-Jing) or You Gui Wan (if Yang deficiency dominates). Key herbs: (deer velvet antler) or — the most direct Jing-nourishing substances. Treatment course: 6–12 months minimum. Set realistic expectations upfront.滋养肾精——不要强刺激。仅轻柔针刺（不用电针，不用强刺激）。BL23（轻柔补法）+KI3+GV4（仅轻灸——避免强热）+CV4+SP6。方药：左归丸（滋养肾阴精）或右归丸（若阳虚为主）。关键草药：鹿茸或鹿角胶——最直接的填精物质。疗程：至少6–12个月。提前建立现实预期。
Fatigue Acupuncture — The Most Important Principle疲劳针灸——最重要的原则
Less is more for deep fatigue深度疲劳时少即是多
For Level 1 and 2 fatigue: standard tonification acupuncture with moxa is appropriate — ST36 (moxa), BL20, BL23, CV4, GV20 (gentle). For Level 3 CFS: the most common acupuncture error is over-treating. Using too many needles, EA, or strong stimulation on a deeply depleted patient produces a crash (post-treatment worsening lasting days). Rule for CFS: maximum 6–8 needles, gentle insertion, minimal manipulation, 20 minutes only, no EA. Start with 1 session per week. Increase only if patient clearly tolerates without worsening.第一和第二层疲劳：标准补法针灸配艾灸合适——ST36（灸），BL20，BL23，CV4，GV20（轻柔）。第三层慢性疲劳综合征：最常见的针灸错误是过度治疗。对深度虚损患者使用过多针、电针或强刺激会产生崩溃（治疗后恶化持续数天）。慢性疲劳综合征规则：最多6–8针，轻柔进针，最小限度手法，仅20分钟，不用电针。每周1次开始。只有在患者明显耐受而无加重时才增加频率。
Moxa as primary modality艾灸作为主要治疗方式For all levels of fatigue, moxa often outperforms needling alone. The sustained gentle warmth of moxa on ST36, CV4, BL23, and GV4 builds Yang Qi more effectively than needle stimulation for constitutional deficiency. Indirect moxa (moxa box or stick moxa) for CFS — never direct scarring moxa. Teach patients self-moxa on ST36 and CV4 daily at home — this extends the treatment effect significantly and gives patients an active role in their recovery.对所有层次的疲劳，艾灸通常优于单独针刺。ST36、CV4、BL23和GV4上持续温和的艾灸对体质虚损补益阳气比针刺刺激更有效。慢性疲劳综合征用间接灸（艾灸盒或艾条灸）——绝不用直接灸。教导患者每天在家自我艾灸ST36和CV4——这显著延伸治疗效果，并给患者在康复中的主动角色。
Bu Zhong Yi Qi Tang补中益气汤
Level 1 Spleen-Qi deficiency fatigue — tired especially afternoons, improves with rest, poor appetite, slight SOB, pale tongue, weak pulse第一层脾气虚疲劳——尤其午后疲倦，休息后改善，食欲差，轻度气短，舌淡，脉弱
Mechanism: Li Dongyuan's master formula for Central Qi deficiency. (large dose 30–60g) provides the primary Qi fuel. ++tonify Spleen Qi. +(small dose 3–6g each) lift the clear Yang that deficient Spleen fails to raise — this is the signature of the formula: not just tonifying but directing the Qi upward where it is needed. nourishes Blood so the tonified Qi has a vehicle. prevents the tonifying herbs from causing stagnation. The formula produces sustained energy that peaks after meals and during the afternoon (the Spleen's most active time).机理：李东垣的中气虚损主方。黄芪（大剂量30–60g）提供主要气的燃料。人参+白术+甘草补脾气。升麻+柴胡（各小剂量3–6g）升举脾虚不能上升的清阳——这是本方的特征：不只是补益而是向上引导气机到所需之处。当归养血使被补的气有载体。陈皮防止补益药引起停滞。本方产生持续能量，在饭后和午后（脾最活跃时）达到峰值。
Zuo Gui Wan左归丸
Level 3 Kidney Jing depletion — profound fatigue, post-exertional malaise, cognitive dysfunction, night sweats, low back soreness, red tongue little coat, thready pulse第三层肾精耗竭——深度疲劳，劳累后不适，认知功能障碍，盗汗，腰酸，舌红苔少，脉细
Mechanism: Zhang Jingyue's formula for Kidney Yin-Jing restoration. (30–60g) deeply nourishes Kidney Yin and Jing. +: the famous Yin-Yang pair — turtle shell (Yin substance, from the earth) fills Kidney Yin; deer antler gelatin (Yang substance, from a growing living thing) nourishes the Jing and marrow. Together they address both the substance (Yin) and the vitality (Jing-Yang) dimensions of Kidney depletion. +strengthen the Kidney and prevent the heavy tonifying herbs from causing stagnation. This formula takes 3–6 months to produce significant results — be patient and set expectations accordingly.机理：张景岳的肾阴精恢复方。熟地黄（30–60g）深层滋养肾阴和精气。龟板胶+鹿角胶：著名的阴阳对——龟板（阴性物质，来自地）填充肾阴；鹿角胶（阳性物质，来自生长的活体）滋养精气和骨髓。两者共同处理肾虚耗竭的物质（阴）和活力（精阳）两个维度。菟丝子+牛膝强肾并防止重型补益药引起停滞。本方需要3–6个月才能产生显著效果——要有耐心，相应设定预期。
Case — Post-Viral CFS: 12-Month Recovery病案——病毒感染后慢性疲劳综合征：12个月恢复
Patient: 34F, previously high-functioning professional. Developed severe fatigue 14 months after COVID-19 infection ("Long COVID"). Cannot work. Profound exhaustion — any activity (walking to mailbox, short conversation) causes crashes lasting 2–3 days. Sleep unrefreshing. Cognitive dysfunction — cannot read a paragraph and retain it. Orthostatic intolerance (dizzy on standing). Previously tried: multiple supplements, IV vitamins (temporary partial relief only). Tongue: pale, slightly dark. Pulse: thready, weak, especially chi and cun.患者：女，34岁，之前高效职场人士。新冠感染（"长新冠"）14个月后出现严重疲劳。无法工作。深度疲惫——任何活动（走到邮箱、短暂交谈）都引起持续2–3天的崩溃。睡眠不解乏。认知功能障碍——无法阅读一段文字并记住。直立性不耐受（站立时头晕）。之前尝试：多种营养补充剂、静脉注射维生素（仅有临时部分缓解）。舌淡略暗。脉细弱，尤以尺和寸部。
Pattern: Level 3 — Kidney Jing depletion with Qi-Blood deficiency and Blood stasis (slightly dark tongue). The viral illness depleted the Kidney Jing at the deepest constitutional level. The Blood stasis component (slightly dark tongue) reflects the post-viral immune activation that has damaged the microvasculature.

Approach — extreme caution: 6 needles only per session. No EA. 20-minute sessions weekly. If any session causes a crash (worsening for >24h after treatment), reduce to 4 needles and 15 minutes at next session.

Points: BL23 (light tonification) + KI3 + GV4 (light moxa only 5 min) + CV4 + SP6 + BL17 (for Blood stasis component). Herbal: Zuo Gui Wan + Dan Shen 15g (for Blood stasis). Self-moxa taught: CV4 10 minutes daily.

Month 3: Crashes less severe (1 day instead of 3). Walking tolerance 10 minutes without crash. Month 6: Can read 20 minutes. Light household tasks possible. Month 12: Working part-time (20 hours/week). No crashes with moderate activity. Still not 100% — realistic expectation set at month 1 was "significant functional improvement in 12 months, possibly longer for full recovery." 证型：第三层——肾精耗竭伴气血两虚和血瘀（舌略暗）。病毒感染在最深体质层面耗竭肾精。血瘀成分（舌略暗）反映病毒后免疫激活损伤微血管。

方法——极度谨慎：每次仅6针。不用电针。每周20分钟治疗。若任何治疗后出现崩溃（治疗后恶化>24小时），下次减至4针和15分钟。

穴位：BL23（轻柔补法）+KI3+GV4（仅轻灸5分钟）+CV4+SP6+BL17（针对血瘀成分）。方药：左归丸+丹参15g（针对血瘀）。自我艾灸指导：每天CV4 10分钟。

第3个月：崩溃程度减轻（1天而非3天）。步行耐受10分钟不崩溃。第6个月：能阅读20分钟。轻度家务可能。第12个月：兼职工作（每周20小时）。中度活动无崩溃。仍未100%——第1个月设定的现实预期是"12个月内显著功能改善，完全恢复可能需要更长时间"。
Teaching point — the two critical rules for CFS: (1) Less stimulation, not more — the deeply depleted patient crashes from over-treatment. Every acupuncturist's instinct is to do more; for CFS, the correct response to slow progress is more patience, not more needles. (2) Set realistic expectations at session 1 — CFS recovery is measured in months to years, not weeks. Patients who understand this maintain treatment compliance; those who don't become disillusioned when they don't improve by session 4.教学要点——慢性疲劳综合征两条关键规则：(1)减少刺激而非增加——深度虚损患者因过度治疗而崩溃。每位针灸师的本能是做更多；对慢性疲劳综合征，面对缓慢进展的正确反应是更多耐心，而非更多针。(2)第1次治疗时建立现实预期——慢性疲劳综合征恢复以月到年计，而非周。理解这一点的患者保持治疗依从性；不理解的患者在第4次治疗没有改善时会幻灭。
Dermatology · Qi Dynamic皮肤病证 · 气机框架
Herpes Zoster带状疱疹
Liver-Gallbladder Damp-Heat blazing through the channel — erupting as a band of vesicles following the course of a meridian, with severe burning pain肝胆湿热燔灼经络——沿经络走行爆发为带状水疱，伴剧烈灼热疼痛
Core Mechanism: Damp-Heat Blazing Through the Channel(Wrapping Fire Cinnabar)核心机制：湿热燔灼经络——缠腰火丹
Herpes Zoster (— snake coil sores; — wrapping waist fire cinnabar) is defined by its channel-following distribution. The vesicles do not scatter randomly — they follow the course of a specific meridian, reflecting that the pathogen is traveling WITHIN the channel, not just at the skin surface.

Core pathogenesis: Latent Damp-Heat in the Liver-Gallbladder system (often triggered by emotional stress, illness, or immune suppression) blazes outward through the Liver or Gallbladder channel → the channel becomes a pathway for the eruption → vesicles appear in a unilateral band following the channel's anatomical course.

Three clinical phases and their Qi dynamics:
Acute (active vesicles + pain): Liver-GB Damp-Heat blazing — + . Clear Damp-Heat urgently.
Subacute (crusting, resolving): Damp-Heat partially resolved, Qi and Blood stagnation in the channel — . Move Qi and Blood in the channel.
Post-herpetic neuralgia (PHN): Persistent pain after vesicles resolve — Qi-Blood stasis in the channel + underlying deficiency (Kidney Yin Xu or Qi-Blood Xu). /. This is the most difficult phase to treat.

Clinical note: Herpes Zoster in immunocompromised patients or involving the face/eye (Ramsay Hunt syndrome, ophthalmic zoster) requires concurrent conventional medical management. TCM can be combined but should not be the sole treatment. 带状疱疹（蛇串疮；缠腰火丹）由其沿经络走行的分布定义。水疱不是随机散在——而是沿特定经络循行，反映病邪在经络内运行，而非仅在皮肤表面。

核心病机：潜伏于肝胆系统的湿热（常由情志压力、疾病或免疫抑制触发）向外燔灼，穿透肝或胆经→经络成为爆发通道→水疱沿经络的解剖走行呈单侧带状出现。

三个临床阶段及其气机：
急性期（活动性水疱+疼痛）：肝胆湿热燔灼——出不畅+升太过。紧急清湿热。
亚急性期（结痂，消退中）：湿热部分消退，经络中气血瘀滞——出不畅。行经络气血。
带状疱疹后神经痛（PHN）：水疱消退后持续疼痛——经络气血瘀滞+潜在虚证（肾阴虚或气血虚）。出不畅/降不及。这是最难治疗的阶段。

临床注意：免疫功能低下患者或涉及面部/眼部（拉姆齐亨特综合征，眼部带状疱疹）的带状疱疹需要同时进行常规医学处理。中医可配合治疗，但不应作为唯一治疗。
Key Diagnostic Questions关键诊断问诊
1. Distribution: which channel does the band follow?1. 分布：带状皮损沿哪条经络？
Thorax and abdomen, wrapping around the waist or ribs: Most common — Liver or Gallbladder channel (the GB channel encircles the flank and rib area). The GB channel runs bilaterally along the ribs; the Liver channel runs up the inner flank.

Face (around the eye, forehead): Gallbladder channel or ophthalmic branch of the Trigeminal/San Jiao — serious, requires conventional treatment.

Arm: Heart, Pericardium, or Small Intestine channels.

Leg (inner thigh, shin): Liver or Kidney channels.

The channel-following distribution is the key TCM diagnostic feature — it confirms the pathogen is within the channel system, not just at the surface. 胸腹部，环绕腰部或肋部：最常见——肝经或胆经（胆经环绕侧胁和肋骨区域）。胆经沿肋骨双侧走行；肝经沿内侧胁肋上行。

面部（眼周、额头）：胆经或三叉神经/三焦眼支——严重，需要常规治疗。

上臂：心经、心包经或小肠经。

腿部（大腿内侧、胫骨）：肝经或肾经。

沿经络的分布是关键的中医诊断特征——确认病邪在经络系统内，而非仅在表面。
2. Pain character — before, during, and after vesicle eruption2. 疼痛性质——水疱爆发前、中、后
Burning, stabbing pre-eruption pain (before visible vesicles): The classic prodrome — Damp-Heat is already blazing through the channel before the skin erupts. This burning pain along a dermatome without visible lesions is a diagnostic clue; consider herpes zoster even before vesicles appear.

Severe burning pain with active vesicles: Acute Liver-GB Damp-Heat — Heat intensity is maximum.

Persistent stabbing or electric-shock pain after vesicles have crusted/resolved: Post-herpetic neuralgia — Qi-Blood stasis remaining in the channel after the acute Damp-Heat resolves. This is the most clinically significant complication, especially in elderly patients. 爆发前灼烧、刺痛（水疱出现前）：经典前驱症状——湿热在皮肤爆发前已在经络中燔灼。沿皮节无可见皮损的灼热痛是诊断线索；即使在水疱出现前也应考虑带状疱疹。

活动性水疱伴剧烈灼热痛：急性肝胆湿热——热邪强度最大。

水疱结痂/消退后持续刺痛或电击样痛：带状疱疹后神经痛——急性湿热消退后，经络中残余气血瘀滞。这是最重要的临床并发症，尤其在老年患者。
Acute: red vesicles + burning + rib/flank急性：红色水疱+灼热+肋/胁
Liver-GB Damp-Heat肝胆湿热 升太过
Subacute: crusting + dull ache亚急性：结痂+隐痛
Qi-Blood Stasis气血瘀滞 出不畅
PHN: persistent pain, no lesions + elderlyPHN：持续疼痛无皮损+老年
Stasis + KI Xu /瘀滞+肾虚 出不畅/入不足
Liver-Gallbladder Damp-Heat (Acute Phase)肝胆湿热证（急性期）
Excess实证Damp-Heat湿热
Latent Liver-GB Damp-Heat erupts through the channel → vesicles in a band along GB/LV channel course → severe burning pain潜伏肝胆湿热通过经络爆发→沿胆/肝经走行带状水疱→剧烈灼热疼痛
Key symptoms主要症状Clusters of red-based vesicles in a unilateral band; severe burning or stabbing pain preceding and accompanying the eruption; most commonly on trunk along the ribs/flank; may have concurrent fever, bitter taste, irritability; red tongue, yellow greasy coat; wiry-rapid or slippery-rapid pulse单侧带状红色水疱簇集；严重的灼热或刺痛先于并伴随爆发；最常见于躯干肋/胁部；可伴发热、口苦、烦躁；舌红苔黄腻；脉弦数或滑数
Qi dynamic气机/: Damp-Heat accumulates in the Liver-GB channel system (often from emotional stress, diet, or chronic stagnation). A triggering event (illness, overwork, immune suppression) releases this latent Damp-Heat → it blazes through the GB or LV channel → erupts at the skin surface following the channel's course. The unilateral distribution reflects the channel's unilateral path. Damp is heavy and obstructing (blocks the channel's normal flow); Heat agitates and burns (produces the red color and intense pain).升太过/出不畅：湿热积聚于肝胆经络系统（常由情志压力、饮食或慢性郁滞）。触发事件（疾病、过劳、免疫抑制）释放此潜伏湿热→燔灼通过胆或肝经→沿经络走行在皮肤表面爆发。单侧分布反映经络的单侧走行。湿邪重浊阻滞（阻塞经络正常流动）；热邪扰动灼烧（产生红色和剧烈疼痛）。
Spleen Deficiency-Damp (Milder Presentation)脾虚湿蕴证（较轻表现）
Deficiency-Excess虚实夹杂
Spleen Xu generates Damp → Damp (without significant Heat) accumulates in the channel → milder presentation with less redness and less pain脾虚生湿→湿邪（无明显热邪）积聚于经络→较轻的表现，红色和疼痛较少
Key symptoms主要症状Paler, less red vesicles; less intense pain or dull ache rather than burning; concurrent poor appetite, loose stools, fatigue; pale tongue, white greasy coat; soggy-moderate pulse水疱颜色较淡，红色较少；疼痛较轻或为隐痛而非灼热痛；同时伴食欲不振、便溏、疲乏；舌淡苔白腻；脉濡缓
Qi dynamic气机/: Spleen Qi is too weak to transform and transport Damp → Damp accumulates in the channel. Without significant Heat driving it, the eruption is milder and the pain less intense. This pattern is more common in patients with pre-existing Spleen deficiency (elderly, chronically ill). Treatment: strengthen Spleen + resolve Damp + open the channel.升不及/出不畅：脾气太弱，无力运化转输湿邪→湿邪积聚于经络。无显著热邪驱动，爆发较轻，疼痛较不剧烈。此证型在有既往脾虚的患者（老年人、慢性病患者）更常见。治疗：健脾+化湿+开通经络。
Qi-Blood Stasis in Channel (Post-Herpetic Neuralgia)气滞血瘀证（带状疱疹后神经痛）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Acute Damp-Heat has resolved but leaves Qi-Blood stasis in the channel → persistent stabbing, electric-shock, or burning pain long after vesicles have gone急性湿热消退但遗留经络中气血瘀滞→水疱消退很久后持续刺痛、电击样或灼热痛
Key symptoms主要症状Persistent pain (more than 1 month after vesicle resolution) in the zone of previous eruption; stabbing, burning, or electric-shock quality; allodynia (pain from light touch); hyperpigmented scar area; concurrent depression, insomnia, fatigue (from chronic pain); wiry-thin or rough-choppy pulse; pale-purple tongue with ecchymosis在之前爆发区域持续疼痛（水疱消退1个月以上）；刺痛、灼热或电击样性质；异常性疼痛（轻触即痛）；色素沉着瘢痕区；同时伴抑郁、失眠、疲乏（慢性疼痛所致）；脉弦细或涩；舌淡紫有瘀点
Qi dynamic气机(Stasis permanently obstructs the channel): The acute Damp-Heat burned through the channel, damaging its tissue. After the Damp-Heat resolves, the damaged channel remains obstructed by Qi-Blood stasis — like a fire that has passed but left behind scorched, blocked tissue. Qi and Blood cannot flow through → persistent pain. The wiry-choppy pulse reflects both Liver channel involvement (wiry) and Blood stasis (choppy). Elderly patients are more prone to PHN because their underlying Qi and Blood are already deficient, providing less recovery capacity.出不畅（瘀滞永久阻塞经络）：急性湿热燔灼通过经络，损伤其组织。湿热消退后，受损的经络仍被气血瘀滞阻塞——如火过后遗留焦灼、阻塞的组织。气血不能流通→持续疼痛。弦涩脉反映肝经受累（弦）和血瘀（涩）。老年患者更易发生PHN，因为其潜在气血已虚，恢复能力较弱。
Acupuncture Strategy: Channel-Based Treatment with Local Surround Needling针灸策略：以经络为基础配合局部围刺
Herpes Zoster is the condition where the channel-following distribution of TCM acupuncture is most directly applicable. Treatment always combines:
(1) Distal points on the affected channel (to clear the pathogen from within the channel itself)
(2) Local surround needling (— ring of needles around the affected skin area, angled inward)
(3) Prick-and-cup on the affected area in acute phase — the single most effective technique for reducing acute Damp-Heat pain 带状疱疹是中医针灸沿经络分布治疗最直接适用的病症。治疗始终结合：
(1) 患侧经络的远端穴位（从经络内部清除病邪）
(2) 局部围刺法（围绕患处皮肤区域一圈针刺，针尖向内倾斜）
(3) 刺络拔罐（急性期在患处——减轻急性湿热疼痛最有效的单一技术）
Acute Liver-GB Damp-Heat急性肝胆湿热期
GB34 阳陵泉
He-sea of Gallbladder + hui-meeting of sinews — the primary distal point for GB channel Damp-Heat. Clears Damp-Heat from the entire GB channel (which courses along the ribs and flank where most HZ occurs). The hui-meeting of sinews also addresses the nerve-like pain that follows the channel path. Reducing method.胆之合穴+筋之会穴——胆经湿热的首要远端穴位。清整条胆经湿热（循行于大多数带状疱疹发生的肋骨和胁肋处）。筋之会穴还处理沿经络走行的神经样疼痛。泻法。
LV3 太冲
Yuan-source of Liver — clears Liver channel Fire and Damp-Heat. For HZ on the Liver channel territory (inner flank, inner leg). Combined with GB34, addresses both the Liver and GB channels simultaneously — important because HZ always involves the Liver-GB axis.肝之原穴——清肝经火邪和湿热。用于肝经走行区域带状疱疹（内侧胁肋、大腿内侧）。配合GB34，同时处理肝经和胆经——重要因为带状疱疹始终涉及肝胆轴线。
SP6 三阴交
Liver-Spleen-Kidney meeting — addresses Damp (Spleen component), clears Liver Heat, regulates Yin. Essential for both the Damp and Heat components of Liver-GB Damp-Heat.肝脾肾三阴之会——处理湿邪（脾的成分），清肝热，调节阴液。对肝胆湿热的湿邪和热邪成分均必要。
Acute local technique (most important)急性期局部技术（最重要）Surround needling: 4–6 needles angled inward around the vesicle cluster border. Prick-and-cup: Prick the vesicle cluster with a plum blossom needle or lancet until slight bleeding, then apply a cup for 5–10 minutes. This draws out the Damp-Heat directly through the skin — the most effective single technique for acute HZ pain relief and accelerating vesicle resolution. Reducing method for all acute distal points. No moxa in acute phase.围刺法：在水疱簇集边界周围斜刺4–6根针，针尖向内。刺络拔罐：用梅花针或三棱针点刺水疱簇集至轻微出血，然后拔罐5–10分钟。这直接通过皮肤引出湿热——急性带状疱疹止痛和加速水疱消退最有效的单一技术。急性期所有远端穴位用泻法。急性期禁灸。
Subacute (crusting, residual ache)亚急性期（结痂，残余隐痛）Continue GB34, LV3, SP6. Add: BL17 (activate Blood in the channel), LI4 (move Qi). Reduce intensity of local treatment. May begin mild moxa around (not on) the affected area to promote Blood circulation.继续GB34、LV3、SP6。加：BL17膈俞（活化经络中的血液），LI4（行气）。减少局部治疗强度。可开始在患处周围（而非患处上）轻灸以促进血液循环。
Post-herpetic neuralgia (PHN)带状疱疹后神经痛（PHN）Primary strategy: Move Qi-Blood stasis in the channel + support the root deficiency. Add: BL17 (activate Blood), SP10 (activate Blood in skin), ST36 + SP6 (build root Qi-Blood). For Kidney Yin Xu (elderly): add KI3 , KI6 . Continue surround needling on the pain zone. Electroacupuncture along the channel path is highly effective for PHN. Moxa (indirect, with moxa stick) on pain zone. Long treatment (3–6+ months).主要策略：通行经络中的气血瘀滞+支持根本虚证。加：BL17（活血），SP10（活化皮肤中的血液），ST36+SP6（补根本气血）。肾阴虚（老年）：加KI3太溪、KI6照海。继续在疼痛区域围刺。沿经络路径的电针对PHN非常有效。在疼痛区域（间接，用艾条）施灸。长期治疗（3–6个月以上）。
Long Dan Xie Gan Tang龙胆泻肝汤
Acute Liver-GB Damp-Heat — active red vesicles, severe burning pain, bitter taste, wiry-rapid pulse, red tongue yellow greasy coat急性肝胆湿热——活动性红色水疱，严重灼热疼痛，口苦，脉弦数，舌红苔黄腻
Mechanism: The definitive formula for Liver-GB Damp-Heat — used for the same root pattern in both urticaria GI type and herpes zoster. ++clear Liver-GB Heat intensely; ++drain Damp downward via urination (give the Damp-Heat an exit downward, away from the channel); +protect Yin and Blood from the aggressive Heat-clearing. The formula simultaneously clears the source AND provides a downward exit — critical for resolving the channel blazing.机理：肝胆湿热的确定性方剂——用于荨麻疹胃肠型和带状疱疹相同根本证型。龙胆草+黄芩+栀子强力清肝胆热邪；车前子+泽泻+木通通过利尿向下引流湿邪（给湿热一条向下的出路，远离经络）；生地黄+当归保护阴液和血液不被攻伐清热药所伤。本方同时清除来源和提供向下出路——对消解经络燔灼至关重要。
Chu Shi Wei Ling Tang除湿胃苓汤
Spleen Xu-Damp — milder vesicles, less red, dull ache, poor appetite, loose stools, white greasy coat脾虚湿蕴——较轻水疱，红色较少，隐痛，食欲不振，便溏，苔白腻
Mechanism: Same formula used for subacute eczema — addresses the Spleen Xu-Damp root. Strengthens Spleen Qi to transform the Damp that is accumulating in the channel; drains residual Damp downward through urination. Appropriate when Damp predominates over Heat in the channel pathology.机理：与亚急性湿疹使用相同方剂——处理脾虚湿蕴之根。健脾气以运化积聚于经络的湿邪；通过利尿向下引流残余湿邪。适用于经络病理中湿邪重于热邪时。
Xue Fu Zhu Yu Tang + Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang血府逐瘀汤 + 补阳还五汤
Post-herpetic neuralgia (PHN) — persistent stabbing pain, allodynia, purple tongue, choppy pulse带状疱疹后神经痛（PHN）——持续刺痛，异常性疼痛，舌紫，脉涩
Mechanism: Two formulas combined for PHN. : activates Blood and breaks stasis in the channel (, , , ,) while moving the stagnant Qi that accompanies stasis (, ,). : for cases with significant Qi deficiency (especially elderly)(large dose, 60–120g) powerfully tonifies Qi to drive Blood movement, while the Blood activators remove stasis. The combination addresses both the stasis component and the underlying Qi deficiency that prevents natural resolution. Must be combined with regular acupuncture.机理：两方合用治疗PHN。血府逐瘀汤：在经络中活血化瘀（桃仁、红花、川芎、赤芍、牛膝）同时行随瘀而来的滞气（柴胡、枳壳、桔梗）。补阳还五汤：用于气虚明显（尤其老年人）——黄芪（大量，60–120g）有力补气以推动血行，而活血药化除瘀滞。合方同时处理瘀滞成分和阻碍自然消解的潜在气虚。须配合定期针灸治疗。
Case 1 — Acute Liver-GB Damp-Heat病案一——急性肝胆湿热
Patient: 58M, retired manager. 5 days of severe burning pain on the right side of the chest and ribs, followed by the appearance of clusters of red fluid-filled vesicles in a band from the spine to the sternum along the 5th–6th rib. Pain is intense, burning, worse at night. Cannot bear clothing touching the skin. History: recent major family stress event 3 weeks ago. Bitter taste. Irritability. Red tongue with yellow greasy coat. Wiry-rapid pulse.患者：男，58岁，退休管理人员。右侧胸部和肋部剧烈灼热痛5天，随后出现沿第5–6肋骨从脊柱到胸骨的带状红色水疱簇集。疼痛剧烈，灼热，夜间加重。无法忍受衣物接触皮肤。病史：3周前重大家庭压力事件。口苦。烦躁。舌红苔黄腻。脉弦数。
Reasoning chain: Major emotional stress → damages Liver's Qi-moving function → Liver Qi stagnates → transforms to Heat → combines with latent Damp in the GB channel → this Damp-Heat blazes through the GB channel (which encircles the ribs — 5th–6th rib distribution = GB channel territory) → erupts as vesicles following the channel path. The 3-week stress-to-eruption lag reflects the time needed for Qi stagnation to accumulate and transform into Damp-Heat sufficient to erupt. Bitter taste + wiry-rapid pulse = Liver-GB Heat confirmed.

Pattern:
Acupuncture: GB34 (reducing), LV3 (reducing), SP6, BL17. Local: prick-and-cup on the vesicle cluster (drain the Damp-Heat directly). Surround needling around the cluster border.
Herbal: Long Dan Xie Gan Tang
Key point: Begin treatment immediately — early aggressive treatment of acute HZ reduces PHN risk 推理链：重大情志压力→损伤肝之行气功能→肝气郁滞→化热→与胆经潜伏湿邪结合→湿热燔灼通过胆经（环绕肋骨——第5–6肋分布=胆经领域）→沿经络走行爆发为水疱。压力到爆发的3周滞后反映气郁积聚并转化为足以爆发的湿热所需时间。口苦+脉弦数=肝胆热邪确证。

证型：肝胆湿热
针灸：GB34（泻法），LV3（泻法），SP6，BL17。局部：水疱簇集刺络拔罐（直接引出湿热）。簇集边界围刺。
方药：龙胆泻肝汤
要点：立即开始治疗——早期积极治疗急性带状疱疹可降低PHN风险
Teaching point: The prick-and-cup technique on the vesicle cluster is the single most effective intervention for acute HZ pain — it directly extracts the Damp-Heat from the channel through the skin. Clinical experience shows it can reduce pain by 50–70% in the first treatment session. However, it must only be used during the active vesicle phase (not on open wounds or after crusting begins, and not on the face).教学要点：水疱簇集的刺络拔罐是急性带状疱疹疼痛最有效的单一干预——直接通过皮肤从经络中提取湿热。临床经验显示第一次治疗即可减轻50–70%的疼痛。然而，必须仅在活动性水疱阶段使用（不用于开放性伤口或结痂开始后，且不用于面部）。
Case 2 — Post-Herpetic Neuralgia病案二——带状疱疹后神经痛
Patient: 72F, retired. Right-sided chest pain for 4 months following a herpes zoster episode that resolved 3 months ago. Pain is constant: burning, stabbing, electric-shock quality. Even light touch from clothing is unbearable (allodynia). Sleep severely disrupted by pain. Depression and anxiety secondary to chronic pain. Currently on gabapentin with partial relief. Right chest skin shows hyperpigmented scar patches. Pale-purple tongue with ecchymosis. Thready-wiry-choppy pulse. Fatigue.患者：女，72岁，退休。4个月前带状疱疹发作，3个月前水疱消退后持续右侧胸痛。疼痛持续：灼热、刺痛、电击样性质。即使衣物轻触也无法忍受（异常性疼痛）。疼痛严重干扰睡眠。慢性疼痛继发抑郁和焦虑。目前服用加巴喷丁，部分缓解。右侧胸部皮肤显示色素沉着瘢痕斑片。舌淡紫有瘀点。脉细弦涩。疲乏。
Reasoning chain: Age 72 = pre-existing Qi and Blood deficiency (natural decline). Acute HZ 4 months ago → Damp-Heat blazed through the GB channel, damaging the channel tissue → acute Damp-Heat resolved but left behind Qi-Blood stasis in the scorched channel tissue → stasis blocks Qi-Blood flow → persistent pain. Allodynia = hypersensitised damaged channel tissue (any stimulus triggers pain). Purple tongue + choppy pulse = Blood stasis confirmed. Thready = Qi-Blood deficiency underlying. The deficiency is why the channel cannot self-repair — there is insufficient Qi and Blood to restore the channel.

Pattern: +
Treatment principle: Activate Blood and break channel stasis (primary); build Qi-Blood to support channel repair (secondary)
Acupuncture: GB34, BL17, SP10 (activate Blood); ST36, SP6, KI3 (build Qi-Blood-Yin). Surround needling on pain zone. Electroacupuncture along the right GB channel (from GB34 to GB24 or GB21). Moxa stick on pain zone (gentle indirect).
Herbal: Xue Fu Zhu Yu Tang (breaks stasis) + Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang (tonifies Qi to drive Blood). 3+ months treatment required. 推理链：72岁=既有气血两虚（自然衰减）。4个月前急性带状疱疹→湿热燔灼通过胆经，损伤经络组织→急性湿热消退但遗留焦灼的经络组织中气血瘀滞→瘀滞阻塞气血流通→持续疼痛。异常性疼痛=高度敏感的受损经络组织（任何刺激均触发疼痛）。舌紫有瘀点+脉涩=血瘀确证。脉细=潜在气血两虚。虚证是经络无法自我修复的原因——气血不足以恢复经络。

证型：气滞血瘀+气血两虚
治则：活血化瘀通络（主）；补气血以支持经络修复（辅）
针灸：GB34、BL17、SP10（活血）；ST36、SP6、KI3（补气血阴）。疼痛区域围刺。沿右侧胆经电针（GB34至GB24或GB21）。疼痛区域艾条温和间接灸。
方药：血府逐瘀汤（化瘀）+补阳还五汤（补气以推动血行）。需要3个月以上治疗。
Teaching point: PHN prevention through early treatment is far more important than PHN treatment once established. Aggressive treatment of acute HZ in the first week — prick-and-cup, Long Dan Xie Gan Tang, regular acupuncture — significantly reduces PHN incidence. Once PHN is established in elderly patients, expect slow progress. Electroacupuncture along the channel (high frequency, 80–100Hz for pain inhibition) is the most effective single modality for established PHN. Manage patient expectations: 3–6 months of consistent treatment for meaningful improvement.教学要点：通过早期治疗预防PHN远比PHN已建立后的治疗重要。第一周积极治疗急性带状疱疹——刺络拔罐、龙胆泻肝汤、定期针灸——显著降低PHN发生率。一旦老年患者建立PHN，预计进展缓慢。沿经络电针（高频，80–100Hz用于疼痛抑制）是已建立PHN最有效的单一治疗方式。管理患者预期：需要3–6个月持续治疗方能取得有意义的改善。
Neurology · Qi Dynamic神经病证 · 气机框架
Hemifacial Spasm面肌痉挛
Involuntary unilateral facial twitching — Wind in Blood-deficient channels, or Phlegm-Wind blocking the facial channels, disrupting the smooth Qi flow through the face不自主的单侧面肌抽搐——血虚生风或痰风阻滞面部经络，干扰面部气机的顺畅流动
Qi Dynamic Framework · Wind in the Facial Channels气机框架 · 面部经络中的风邪
Hemifacial spasm is characterised by involuntary, unilateral, repetitive contractions of the facial muscles — beginning around the eye (orbicularis oculi) and spreading to the cheek and mouth. It is strictly unilateral and progressive if untreated.

TCM core understanding: "Wind causes movement and change". Any involuntary movement of the body is mediated by Wind in TCM. The key question is: what generates Wind in the facial channels?

Three Wind-generating mechanisms:
① (Blood deficiency generates Wind): The most common root — insufficient Blood fails to nourish and moisten the facial channel sinews → the sinews become dry and lose their smooth movement → Wind arises from the empty, unmoored sinew. This is "internal Wind from deficiency". The key: Wind does not need an external trigger; it arises from within the deficient, undernourished channels.

② (Liver Yang transforms to Wind): Liver Yang rises → generates Wind that enters the facial channels. Associated with hypertension, stress, and a wiry pulse. The Wind here is excess in nature.

③ (Wind-Phlegm obstructing the channels): Phlegm (from Spleen deficiency) combines with Wind → blocks the facial channels → disrupts normal Qi flow → spasm. The Phlegm "stickiness" explains why spasms can become fixed and chronic.

Qi dynamic: — the facial channels cannot allow smooth, unobstructed Qi movement. The spasm IS the obstructed Qi attempting to force its way through the blocked channel in paroxysmal bursts. Unlike paralysis (no Qi movement), spasm represents erratic, uncontrolled Qi movement.

Clinical note: Hemifacial spasm must be distinguished from facial tic (tourette's-type), blepharospasm (bilateral), and secondary causes (acoustic neuroma, vascular compression, multiple sclerosis). These require appropriate medical evaluation. TCM acupuncture is most effective for idiopathic hemifacial spasm. 面肌痉挛的特征是不自主的、单侧的、重复性的面肌收缩——从眼周（眼轮匝肌）开始，扩散至面颊和口部。严格单侧发生，若不治疗则进行性加重。

中医核心理解："风主动"。体内任何不自主运动在中医均由风邪介导。关键问题是：什么在面部经络中产生风邪？

三种生风机制：
①血虚生风：最常见的根本——血液不足，无法滋养和润泽面部经络之筋→筋变得干燥，失去平稳运动→风邪从空虚、失于固摄的筋中产生。此为"虚风内动"。关键：风邪不需要外部触发；它从内部虚弱、失养的经络中产生。

②肝阳化风：肝阳上亢→化生风邪进入面部经络。与高血压、压力和弦脉相关。此为实性风邪。

③风痰阻络：痰邪（来自脾虚）与风邪结合→阻塞面部经络→干扰正常气流→痉挛。痰邪的"粘滞性"解释了为何痉挛可以固化为慢性。

气机：出不畅——面部经络不能允许平稳、畅通的气机运动。痉挛就是受阻的气机试图以阵发性爆发强行穿过阻塞经络。与瘫痪（无气机运动）不同，痉挛代表不规律、失控的气机运动。

临床注意：面肌痉挛必须与面部抽动（图雷特综合征型）、眼睑痉挛（双侧）和继发性病因（听神经瘤、血管压迫、多发性硬化）鉴别。这些需要适当的医学评估。中医针灸对特发性面肌痉挛最有效。
Spasm Characteristics痉挛特征
Which side? Where did it start? Eye only, or spreading to cheek/mouth? Continuous or paroxysmal? Frequency — occasional vs constant? Triggered or spontaneous?哪侧？从哪里开始？仅限眼睛，还是扩散至面颊/口部？持续性还是阵发性？频率——偶发还是持续？诱发还是自发？
→ Location and spread pattern identifies which facial channels are involved; trigger factors reveal the Wind type→ 位置和扩散模式识别涉及的面部经络；触发因素揭示风邪类型
Starting around the eye → spreading downward to mouth: Classic progression. The eye is where the Gallbladder, Stomach, and Bladder channels converge; the cheek and mouth are Stomach and Large Intestine channel territory. The spasm follows the channel distribution downward.

Stress, fatigue, or anxiety triggers: Liver Yang Wind — emotional tension tightens Liver Qi → generates Wind → enters the facial channels. Wiry pulse will confirm.

Worse with fatigue, better with rest: Blood deficiency generating Wind — the channels are more empty when Qi and Blood are depleted by fatigue → Wind arises more easily from the empty channel space.

Worse in cold weather, better with warmth: Cold contracts the channels → restricts the already-obstructed Qi flow → triggers spasm. Wind-Cold component. 从眼周开始→向下扩散至口部：经典进展。眼区是胆经、胃经和膀胱经汇聚处；面颊和口部是胃经和大肠经走行区域。痉挛沿经络分布向下进展。

压力、疲劳或焦虑触发：肝阳化风——情志紧张收紧肝气→化生风邪→进入面部经络。弦脉将确证。

劳累后加重，休息后好转：血虚生风——气血因疲劳而耗竭时经络更为空虚→风邪更易从空虚的经络空间产生。

寒冷天气加重，温暖时好转：寒邪收引经络→限制已受阻的气流→触发痉挛。风寒成分。
Systemic Context全身背景
Sleep quality? Dizziness? Palpitations? Menstrual history (women)? Hypertension? Anxiety or depression? Duration of condition?睡眠质量？头晕？心悸？月经史（女性）？高血压？焦虑或抑郁？病程？
→ Systemic signs distinguish Blood deficiency Wind from Liver Yang Wind — the two most important patterns→ 全身征象区分血虚生风与肝阳化风——最重要的两种证型
Insomnia, palpitations, pale lips/nails, scanty menstruation (women): Blood deficiency — the Heart loses its Blood nourishment → palpitations + insomnia. Women especially susceptible after menstruation, childbirth, or chronic blood loss. The facial channel Wind arises from the same Blood deficiency that deprives the Heart of nourishment.

Hypertension + headache + irritability: Liver Yang Wind — Yang rising generates both the hypertension and the facial Wind. The common root is Kidney Yin insufficiency failing to anchor Liver Yang.

Obesity + greasy diet + foggy head: Wind-Phlegm pattern — Phlegm from Spleen deficiency combines with Wind. Often accompanied by a greasy tongue coat and slippery pulse.

Duration: Less than 6 months = generally more responsive to acupuncture. More than 2 years = channels more chronically obstructed; longer treatment course needed. 失眠、心悸、面唇爪甲色淡、月经量少（女性）：血虚——心失血液濡养→心悸+失眠。女性尤其在月经后、产后或慢性失血后易感。面部经络的风邪来自同一血虚，也使心失所养。

高血压+头痛+烦躁易怒：肝阳化风——阳气上亢同时产生高血压和面部风邪。共同根本是肾阴不足不能锚固肝阳。

肥胖+饮食厚腻+头脑不清：风痰阻络——脾虚生痰与风邪结合。常伴苔腻和滑脉。

病程：少于6个月=通常对针灸反应较好。超过2年=经络长期阻塞较重；需要更长疗程。
Eye spasm + fatigue worse + pale + insomnia眼痉挛+劳累加重+面白+失眠
Blood Xu Wind血虚生风 荣不足
Eye spasm + stress trigger + HTN + wiry眼痉挛+压力触发+高血压+脉弦
Liver Yang Wind肝阳化风 升太过
Eye spasm + obese + greasy coat + slippery眼痉挛+肥胖+苔腻+脉滑
Wind-Phlegm风痰阻络 出不畅
Blood Deficiency Generating Wind (most common)血虚生风证（最常见）
Deficiency虚证
Insufficient Blood fails to nourish the facial channel sinews → sinews become dry and unmoored → Wind arises from within the empty channels → spasm血液不足，无法滋养面部经络之筋→筋变得干燥、失于固摄→风邪从空虚经络内部产生→痉挛
Key symptoms主要症状Unilateral facial twitching starting around the eye; worse with fatigue and stress; better with rest; concurrent insomnia, palpitations, dizziness; pale lips and nails; in women: scanty pale menstruation; pale tongue, thin coat; thin-weak pulse单侧面肌抽搐，从眼周开始；劳累和压力后加重；休息后好转；同时伴失眠、心悸、头晕；面唇爪甲色淡；女性：月经量少色淡；舌淡苔薄；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机→: Blood is the nutritional substrate for the channel sinews. When Blood is insufficient (from chronic overwork, insufficient nutrition, blood loss, or post-menstrual depletion), the sinews of the face lose their Blood nourishment → they become dry and taut, like drying leather → any slight provocation (fatigue, emotional stress) generates erratic, uncontrolled Wind movements within the channel → facial spasm. Treatment: nourish Blood → the nourished sinews settle and Wind extinguishes. "Treat the Wind by nourishing Blood first".荣不足→出不畅：血液是经络之筋的营养底物。血液不足（来自长期过劳、营养不足、失血或经后耗竭）时，面部之筋失去血液濡养→变得干燥紧绷，如同干燥的皮革→任何轻微的触发（疲劳、情志压力）在经络中产生不规律、失控的风邪运动→面肌痉挛。治疗：养血→得养之筋安定，风邪自灭。"治风先治血，血行风自灭"。
Liver Yang Transforming to Wind肝阳化风证
Excess实证
Liver Yang rises → generates excess Wind → Wind enters the facial channels → spasm triggered by emotional stress肝阳上亢→化生实性风邪→风邪进入面部经络→情志压力触发痉挛
Key symptoms主要症状Facial spasm clearly triggered by stress, anger, or anxiety; associated with headache and dizziness; hypertension; irritability; red face on exertion or emotion; red tongue with thin yellow coat; wiry pulse (especially left guan)面肌痉挛由压力、愤怒或焦虑明显触发；伴头痛和头晕；高血压；烦躁易怒；活动或情志激动时面红；舌红苔薄黄；脉弦（尤以左关为甚）
Qi dynamic气机: Kidney Yin is insufficient to anchor Liver Yang → Yang rises → generates excess Wind in the upper body. The face is the meeting place of all Yang channels — excess Yang Wind naturally accumulates there. The stress-trigger is the defining clinical sign: emotional stress drives Liver Qi stagnation → which intensifies Liver Yang rising → which intensifies the Wind in the facial channels → spasm. The wiry pulse (Liver's pulse) confirms Liver Yang involvement. Treatment must calm the Liver, anchor the Yang, and nourish the Kidney Yin root.升太过：肾阴不足以锚固肝阳→阳气上升→在上体产生实性风邪。面部是六阳皆会之处——过剩的阳性风邪自然积聚于此。压力触发是决定性的临床征象：情志压力驱动肝气郁滞→加重肝阳上亢→加重面部经络中的风邪→痉挛。弦脉（肝之脉）确证肝阳受累。治疗必须平肝、潜阳并滋养肾阴之根。
Wind-Phlegm Obstructing the Channels风痰阻络证
Excess实证
Phlegm from Spleen deficiency combines with Wind → forms a sticky obstruction in the facial channels → disrupts Qi flow → spasm with chronic, fixed character脾虚生痰与风邪结合→在面部经络形成粘滞阻塞→干扰气流→具有慢性固定特征的痉挛
Key symptoms主要症状Facial spasm of longer duration; often accompanied by numbness or heaviness of the face; digestive symptoms — poor appetite, loose stools, bloating; overweight constitution; heaviness of the head; white or yellow greasy tongue coat; slippery-wiry pulse面肌痉挛病程较长；常伴面部麻木或沉重感；消化症状——食欲不振、便溏、腹胀；超重体质；头重；苔白或黄腻；脉滑弦
Qi dynamic气机(Phlegm-Wind permanently obstructs the facial exit layer): Phlegm is the most obstinate of pathogens — when it combines with Wind in the facial channels, the obstruction becomes sticky and fixed. The Phlegm makes the Wind-movement erratic rather than smooth → spasm. The facial numbness/heaviness (unusual in pure Blood deficiency pattern) is caused by the Phlegm obstructing the channel's sensory function. Treatment requires resolving Phlegm first (ST40, CV12), then expelling Wind (LI4, GB20).出不畅（风痰永久阻塞面部出口层）：痰为最顽固的病邪——当它与风邪结合于面部经络时，阻塞变得粘滞而固定。痰邪使风邪运动不规律而非平稳→痉挛。面部麻木/沉重感（单纯血虚证型中不常见）由痰邪阻塞经络感觉功能造成。治疗首先需要化痰（ST40、CV12），然后祛风（LI4、GB20）。
Critical Acupuncture Principle: NEVER Use Strong Stimulation on the Spastic Face关键针灸原则：绝对不要对痉挛的面部强刺激
This is the most important and most commonly violated principle in hemifacial spasm acupuncture. Strong stimulation (heavy manipulation, strong electro-acupuncture) on the affected facial muscles will WORSEN the spasm — not improve it. The mechanism: strong stimulation further agitates the already-erratic Qi in the blocked channels → more uncontrolled movement → more spasm.

The correct local strategy: Gentle needling on the affected side — light insertion, minimal manipulation, very gentle or NO electro-acupuncture on the affected face. The therapeutic work is done through:
① Distal points (LI4 contralateral, GB20 bilateral, LV3) that regulate the root pattern from a distance
② Scalp acupuncture — the Motor/Sensory Area on the contralateral side
③ Root pattern treatment — nourish Blood (BL17, ST36, SP6) for Blood deficiency; calm Liver (LV3, GB20) for Liver Yang

Electro-acupuncture for hemifacial spasm: If used at all on the face, use only on the HEALTHY side (contralateral mirror points) or on the distal channel points — never strong EA on the affected facial muscles. Some protocols use very low frequency (1–2Hz) gentle EA on distal arm/leg points only. 这是面肌痉挛针灸中最重要也最常被违反的原则。对患侧面肌强刺激（强手法、强电针）会使痉挛加重——而非改善。机制：强刺激进一步激扰已阻塞经络中本已不规律的气机→更多失控运动→更多痉挛。

正确的局部策略：患侧轻柔针刺——轻插针，最小手法，患侧面部极轻或不用电针。治疗性工作通过以下方式完成：
①远端穴位（LI4对侧，GB20双侧，LV3）从远处调节根本证型
②头皮针——对侧运动/感觉区
③根本证型治疗——血虚证养血（BL17、ST36、SP6）；肝阳证平肝（LV3、GB20）

面肌痉挛的电针：若在面部使用，只用于健侧（对侧镜像穴位）或远端经络穴位——绝不在患侧面肌强电针。某些方案仅在远端上下肢穴位使用极低频（1–2Hz）轻柔电针。
Core Protocol核心方案
GB20 风池
Wind Pool — the master point for all Wind affecting the head and face风池——所有影响头面部风邪的主穴
GB20 is the "pool" where Wind accumulates at the base of the skull before entering the face. It is the entry point for both external Wind (from cold drafts, infections) and internal Wind (Liver Yang, Blood deficiency). Needling bilateral GB20 with gentle reducing method "drains" the accumulated Wind from the facial channels. This is the single most important point for all types of hemifacial spasm — regardless of pattern, GB20 bilateral is always included. Direct needle toward the contralateral eye angle (for facial conditions). Avoid strong downward needling (risk to medulla).GB20是风邪在枕骨底部进入面部前积聚的"池"。是外风（寒风、感染）和内风（肝阳、血虚）的进入点。双侧GB20轻柔泻法针刺"引流"面部经络积聚的风邪。这是所有类型面肌痉挛最重要的单一穴位——无论证型，双侧GB20始终包括在内。针尖朝向对侧眼角方向（用于面部疾病）。避免向下强力针刺（有伤延髓的风险）。
LI4 合谷
Contralateral LI4 — "face and mouth, seek Hegu" — commands the face from a distance对侧LI4——"面口合谷收"——从远处统领面部
LI4 contralateral (if right face is affected, needle left LI4) controls the face through the LI channel's ascending path to the contralateral face. This allows strong distal stimulation to regulate the facial channel without directly agitating the spastic muscles. LI4 also opens the surface and regulates Wei Qi — which helps stabilise the Wind-disrupted channel surface. Reducing method.对侧LI4（若右侧面部受累，针刺左侧LI4），通过大肠经上行路径至对侧面部来控制面部。这允许强远端刺激来调节面部经络，而不直接激扰痉挛肌肉。LI4还开表调节卫气——有助于稳定被风邪干扰的经络表面。泻法。
LV3 太冲
Extinguishes Wind, calms the Liver — addresses the Liver component of all three Wind patterns息风平肝——处理所有三种风邪证型中的肝之成分
LV3 is the source point of the Liver — it directly regulates Liver Qi and extinguishes Wind regardless of whether the Wind is from Blood deficiency (tonify method builds Liver Blood to anchor Wind), Liver Yang (reducing method calms Liver Yang), or Wind-Phlegm (neutral method opens the Liver Qi stagnation that drives Phlegm accumulation). LV3 + LI4 is a powerful Wind-clearing combination for the face.LV3为肝之原穴——无论风邪来自血虚（补法建立肝血以锚固风邪）、肝阳（泻法平肝阳）或风痰（平补平泻开通驱动痰积聚的肝气郁滞），均直接调节肝气并息风。LV3+LI4（四关）是清除面部风邪的有力组合。
Local Facial Points — Gentle Method Only面部局部穴位——仅用轻柔手法
Eye area (orbicularis spasm)眼区（眼轮匝肌痉挛）BL2 , GB1 , TE23 , ST1 — all with gentle, superficial insertion (0.3–0.5 cun), minimal or no manipulation, retain 20 minutes. DO NOT use electro-acupuncture here. These points open the channel Qi in the spastic area without adding stimulation that would worsen spasm.BL2攒竹、GB1瞳子髎、TE23丝竹空、ST1承泣——均轻柔浅刺（0.3–0.5寸），最小或不行手法，留针20分钟。禁止在此处电针。这些穴位开通痉挛区域的经络气机，而不增加会加重痉挛的刺激。
Cheek and mouth area面颊和口部区域ST4 , ST6 , ST7 — gentle insertion. If spasm is extending to the lower face. No strong manual stimulation. For ST6 especially, excessive stimulation directly activates the masseter and buccinator — worsening spasm.ST4地仓、ST6颊车、ST7下关——轻柔针刺。若痉挛扩展至面下部。不行强手法刺激。尤其ST6，过度刺激直接激活咬肌和颊肌——加重痉挛。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Blood deficiency Wind血虚生风证Add: BL17 (hui-meeting of Blood — nourish Blood systemically), ST36 + SP6 (build Qi-Blood production), BL20 (Spleen root of Blood production). Reinforcing method + moxa on BL17, ST36. HT7 for the insomnia/palpitations component. This is the primary treatment direction — the facial local points are secondary.加：BL17膈俞（血之会穴——全身养血），ST36+SP6（补益气血生化），BL20脾俞（血液生化的脾之根）。补法+BL17、ST36艾灸。HT7神门用于失眠/心悸成分。这是主要治疗方向——面部局部穴位为辅。
Liver Yang Wind肝阳化风证Add: KI3 (nourish Kidney Yin — the root that anchors Liver Yang), BL18 (back-shu of Liver — regulates Liver function), GB43 (ying-spring of GB — clears GB channel Heat). Reducing method for GB20, LV3. No moxa. Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin herbal support.加：KI3太溪（滋肾阴——锚固肝阳之根），BL18肝俞（肝之背俞穴——调节肝功能），GB43侠溪（胆之荥穴——清胆经热）。GB20、LV3泻法。禁灸。天麻钩藤饮草药辅助。
Wind-Phlegm obstructing channels风痰阻络证Add: ST40 (master Phlegm-resolving point), CV12 (middle jiao pivot — regulate Spleen-Stomach to reduce Phlegm production), SP9 (resolve Damp). Neutral method for ST40. The Phlegm resolution is the priority before Wind can be effectively expelled.加：ST40丰隆（化痰主穴），CV12中脘（中焦枢纽——调节脾胃以减少痰的产生），SP9阴陵泉（化湿）。ST40平补平泻法。在风邪能被有效驱除之前，化痰是优先事项。
Si Wu Tang + Zhi Gan Cao Tang (modified)四物汤 + 炙甘草汤（加减）
Blood deficiency generating Wind — pale, thin-weak pulse, insomnia, palpitations, scanty menstruation, fatigue-triggered spasm血虚生风——面色苍白，脉细弱，失眠，心悸，月经量少，劳累触发痉挛
Mechanism: Si Wu Tang is the foundational Blood nourishing formula(nourishes and moves Blood), (nourishes Kidney-Liver Blood foundation), (nourishes and constrains Liver Blood — specifically anchors Wind by holding the Blood in the channels), (moves Blood to prevent stagnation during nourishing). Add (extinguishes Wind from the channels directly), (calms Liver and extinguishes Wind), +(insect medicinals — penetrate the channels and stop spasm through their antispasmodic and channel-opening properties). The insect medicinals are particularly valuable for hemifacial spasm — they access the channels at a level that plant herbs cannot. Start at low doses and monitor for sensitivity.机理：四物汤是补血基础方——当归（养血活血），熟地黄（滋养肾肝血之根基），白芍（养肝血并收敛——通过固摄经络中的血液专门锚固风邪），川芎（活血以防补益过程中停滞）。加天麻（直接熄灭经络中的风邪），钩藤（平肝息风），全蝎+蜈蚣（虫类药——通过其抗痉挛和开通经络的特性，在植物草药无法到达的层次穿透经络并止痉）。虫类药对面肌痉挛特别有价值——它们能在植物草药无法到达的层次进入经络。从低剂量开始，监测过敏反应。
Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin天麻钩藤饮
Liver Yang Wind — stress-triggered spasm, hypertension, headache, irritability, wiry pulse肝阳化风——压力触发痉挛，高血压，头痛，烦躁，脉弦
Mechanism: Same formula as used for hypertensive stroke prevention — because the root pattern is the same: Liver Yang rising from Kidney Yin insufficiency. +extinguish Wind; +anchor Yang downward; +clear Heat; +nourish Kidney-Liver Yin root. Add or (stiff silkworm) to specifically address the facial spasm component — these channel-penetrating medicinals add the antispasmodic action that the base formula lacks for peripheral spasm.机理：与高血压性中风预防使用的相同方剂——因为根本证型相同：肾阴不足导致肝阳上亢。天麻+钩藤息风；石决明+牛膝潜阳降逆；黄芩+栀子清热；杜仲+桑寄生滋养肾肝阴根。加全蝎或僵蚕以专门处理面肌痉挛成分——这些穿透经络的药物增加了基础方对外周痉挛所欠缺的抗痉挛作用。
Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang半夏白术天麻汤
Wind-Phlegm — facial spasm with heaviness/numbness, digestive symptoms, greasy coat, slippery pulse风痰阻络——面肌痉挛伴沉重/麻木，消化症状，苔腻，脉滑
Mechanism: A classic formula specifically designed for Wind-Phlegm in the head and face. (the chief herb — extinguishes Wind specifically from the head/face/channels); (resolves Phlegm from the Spleen-Stomach); +(strengthen Spleen to prevent re-generation of Phlegm — treat the source); (moves Qi to prevent Phlegm stagnation); +(protect the middle jiao). The formula addresses both the Wind (branch) and the Phlegm (root) simultaneously — it prevents recurrence by eliminating the Spleen deficiency that generates Phlegm. Add +to enhance the antispasmodic channel-penetrating action.机理：专为头面部风痰而设计的经典方。天麻（君药——专门熄灭头/面/经络中的风邪）；半夏（化脾胃之痰）；白术+茯苓（健脾以防痰的再次生成——治其来源）；陈皮（行气以防痰停滞）；生姜+大枣（保护中焦）。本方同时处理风邪（标）和痰邪（本）——通过消除产生痰邪的脾虚来防止复发。加全蝎+僵蚕以增强抗痉挛的通络作用。
Case 1 — Blood Deficiency Wind (Most Common Clinical Pattern)病案一——血虚生风（最常见临床证型）
Patient: 48F, accountant. Right-sided facial twitching for 14 months — began as occasional eye twitching, now constant eye twitching with spreading to the right cheek. Markedly worse during tax season (overwork + stress). Better after sleep. Concurrent: difficulty falling asleep (mind active), occasional palpitations, dizziness when standing, pale lips. Menstruation regular but light and pale. Pale tongue, thin coat. Thin-weak pulse, especially at the right guan.患者：女，48岁，会计师。右侧面肌抽搐14个月——从偶发眼部抽搐开始，现为持续眼部抽搐并扩散至右侧面颊。报税季（过劳+压力）期间明显加重。睡后好转。同时伴：入睡困难（思虑过多），偶发心悸，站立时头晕，唇色苍白。月经规律但量少色淡。舌淡苔薄。脉细弱，尤以右关为甚。
Reasoning chain: 14 months overwork (accounting) → chronic Blood depletion (Blood is consumed by mental overwork). Worse during tax season = worse with overwork, confirming Blood deficiency (exertion consumes Blood). Better with sleep = rest allows Blood to return to the Liver (— Liver stores Blood during rest), replenishing the channels. Insomnia = Blood deficiency fails to nourish the Heart Shen at night → mind stays active. Palpitations = Heart Blood Xu. Pale lips + light menstruation + pale tongue = Blood deficiency confirmed at multiple levels. Right guan weak = Spleen (right guan) failing to produce Blood. Wind in the face arises from the empty, Blood-deficient facial channel sinews.

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Nourish Blood as primary; extinguish Wind as secondary
Acupuncture: GB20 bilateral (gentle reducing), LI4 contralateral (reducing), LV3 (reinforcing — to build Liver Blood), BL17 (reinforcing + moxa), ST36 + SP6 (reinforcing + moxa), HT7 (for insomnia). Local face: BL2, GB1 (gentle, no EA). 20 treatments over 10 weeks.
Herbal: Si Wu Tang + Tian Ma + Gou Teng + 推理链：14个月过劳（会计工作）→慢性血液耗竭（脑力过劳消耗血液）。报税季加重=过劳后加重，确认血虚（劳动消耗血液）。睡后好转=休息使血液归于肝（肝藏血——肝在休息时储存血液），补充经络。入睡困难=血虚不能在夜间滋养心神→思维持续活跃。心悸=心血虚。唇色苍白+月经量少+舌淡=血虚在多个层次确证。右关弱=脾（右关）不能生血。面部风邪从空虚、血虚的面部经络之筋产生。

证型：血虚生风
治则：养血为主；息风为辅
针灸：GB20双侧（轻泻法），LI4对侧（泻法），LV3（补法——补肝血），BL17（补法+灸），ST36+SP6（补法+灸），HT7（用于失眠）。局部：BL2、GB1（轻柔，不电针）。10周内20次治疗。
方药：四物汤+天麻+钩藤+僵蚕
Teaching point: The single most common error in treating hemifacial spasm is focusing all treatment on the face with strong stimulation. This case demonstrates the correct priority: the face receives only gentle local treatment; the majority of the treatment is directed at the root (Blood deficiency at BL17, ST36, SP6) and the Wind-clearing distal points (GB20, LI4, LV3). When the Blood deficiency root is addressed, the facial sinews regain their nourishment, and the Wind resolves spontaneously over several weeks. Expect 8–16 weeks for meaningful improvement in chronic (>12 months) Blood deficiency hemifacial spasm.教学要点：治疗面肌痉挛最常见的单一错误是将所有治疗集中在面部并用强刺激。此病案展示了正确的优先顺序：面部只接受轻柔局部治疗；大部分治疗针对根本（BL17、ST36、SP6的血虚）和祛风远端穴位（GB20、LI4、LV3）。当血虚根本得到处理时，面部之筋恢复濡养，风邪在数周内自然消解。慢性（>12个月）血虚面肌痉挛，预期需要8–16周才能取得有意义的改善。
Case 2 — Liver Yang Wind (Stress and Hypertension Correlated)病案二——肝阳化风（与压力和高血压相关）
Patient: 55M, department manager. Left facial twitching for 6 months — clearly worse during work meetings and when deadline pressure is high. Associated headache at the temples and vertex. Tinnitus (high-pitched, worse with stress). Known hypertension on medication (partially controlled). Sleep is light, wakes easily with racing thoughts. Red-tinged face. Red tongue, thin yellow coat. Wiry pulse, especially left guan and chi.患者：男，55岁，部门经理。左侧面肌抽搐6个月——工作会议期间和截止日期压力大时明显加重。伴颞部和头顶头痛。耳鸣（高调，压力时加重）。已知高血压服药（部分控制）。睡眠浅，易醒，思维飞速。面色略红。舌红苔薄黄。脉弦，尤以左关、尺部为甚。
Reasoning chain: Chronic managerial stress + hypertension (chronic Liver Yang rising pattern) → Liver Yang continuously elevated → any acute stress episode (meeting, deadline) triggers acute Liver Yang surge → Wind blazes into the facial channels (face = right hemisphere Liver Yang projection?) → spasm. Temple headache = GB channel (Gallbladder channel runs through the temples, and GB is paired with Liver). Tinnitus worsens with stress = Liver-GB Heat rising through the shaoyang channel to the ear. Wiry left guan = Liver Yang stagnation. Wiry left chi = Kidney Yin insufficient (failing to anchor Liver Yang).

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Calm Liver, anchor Yang, nourish Kidney Yin; extinguish Wind from face
Acupuncture: GB20 bilateral (reducing — clear GB channel Wind-Heat), LV3 bilateral (reducing), KI3 bilateral (reinforcing — nourish Kidney Yin root), GB43 (reducing — clear GB channel Heat/tinnitus), LI4 contralateral (reducing). Local face: BL2, TE23, ST7 (gentle, no EA). No moxa.
Herbal: Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin + (add 3g) 推理链：长期管理层压力+高血压（慢性肝阳上亢证型）→肝阳持续升高→任何急性压力发作（会议、截止日期）触发肝阳急性上亢→风邪燃烧进入面部经络→痉挛。颞部头痛=胆经（胆经走行经过颞部，且胆与肝表里）。耳鸣压力时加重=肝胆热邪循少阳经上冲至耳。左关弦=肝气郁滞。左尺弦=肾阴不足（不能锚固肝阳）。

证型：肝阳化风
治则：平肝潜阳，滋肾阴；熄灭面部风邪
针灸：GB20双侧（泻法——清胆经风热），LV3双侧（泻法），KI3双侧（补法——滋肾阴之根），GB43（泻法——清胆经热/耳鸣），LI4对侧（泻法）。局部面部：BL2、TE23、ST7（轻柔，不电针）。禁灸。
方药：天麻钩藤饮+全蝎（加3g）
Teaching point: The stress-spasm correlation is the decisive diagnostic sign for Liver Yang Wind hemifacial spasm. When every episode of spasm is clearly linked to a specific emotional or work stress event, the pattern is almost certainly Liver Yang — not Blood deficiency (which correlates with fatigue and physical overwork, not emotional reactivity). The two patterns require opposite root treatments: Blood deficiency requires moxa and reinforcing; Liver Yang requires reducing and no moxa. Mixing them up produces ineffective treatment. The tinnitus here is a bonus diagnostic confirmation — Kidney Yin insufficiency failing to anchor both the Liver Yang (spasm) and the Shaoyang channel (tinnitus) simultaneously.教学要点：压力-痉挛相关性是肝阳化风面肌痉挛的决定性诊断征象。当每次痉挛发作明确与特定情志或工作压力事件相关时，证型几乎必为肝阳——而非血虚（血虚与疲劳和体力过劳相关，而非情志反应性）。两种证型需要相反的根本治疗：血虚需要艾灸和补法；肝阳需要泻法和禁灸。混淆两者产生无效治疗。此处的耳鸣是额外的诊断确证——肾阴不足同时不能锚固肝阳（痉挛）和少阳经络（耳鸣）。
Digestive Disorders消化病证
Hiccup呃逆
is the sound and sensation of Stomach Qi rebelling upward through the diaphragm. Every hiccup IS Qi going the wrong direction — upward and outward, when it should be descending. In TCM, the Stomach's fundamental Qi direction is downward; is its most immediate failure. The diaphragm is the physical gate between chest and abdomen; the hiccup is Qi forcing that gate open from below, against its natural direction. Understanding means understanding what disrupts the Stomach's descent, and why the diaphragm becomes involved. 呃逆是胃气上逆穿越横膈所产生的声音和感觉。每一次呃逆都是气机走向错误——向上向外，而应当向下。在中医，胃气的根本运行方向是向下（胃气主降）；呃逆是其最直接的失常。横膈是胸腹之间的物质门户；呃逆是气机从下方强迫打开该门户，逆其自然方向。理解呃逆，意味着理解什么破坏了胃的降，以及为什么横膈被牵连其中。
⚠ When Hiccups Are a Red Flag⚠ 呃逆的红旗警征
Most hiccups are benign and transient. Investigate urgently if: Hiccups lasting >48 hours (intractable hiccups — may indicate CNS lesion, phrenic nerve irritation, metabolic disorder, or diaphragmatic irritation from mass, abscess, or pericarditis); new onset after stroke or head trauma (CNS involvement); hiccups in a seriously ill patient (sign of systemic deterioration — seen in renal failure, sepsis, late-stage cancer); hiccups that prevent sleep, eating, or breathing. TCM is appropriate for: functional hiccups, post-meal hiccups, stress-triggered hiccups, and chronic mild recurrent hiccups without structural cause. 大多数呃逆为良性且短暂。以下情况须紧急检查：持续>48小时的顽固性呃逆（可能提示CNS病变、膈神经刺激、代谢紊乱或肿块/脓肿/心包炎引起的膈肌刺激）；卒中或头部外伤后新发呃逆（CNS受累）；危重患者的呃逆（全身恶化的征象——见于肾衰竭、败血症、晚期癌症）；呃逆妨碍睡眠、进食或呼吸。中医适用于：功能性呃逆、餐后呃逆、情绪诱发呃逆，以及无器质性原因的慢性轻度反复呃逆。
Qi Dynamic Framework and Its Failures气机框架 · 胃气主降及其失常
Normal: Stomach Qi descends → food and turbid Qi move downward → digestion proceeds → nothing rebounds upward.

= (Descent disrupted) → Qi reverses direction →

Four mechanisms that disrupt Stomach descent:
① Cold invasion of Stomach: Cold constricts the Stomach, preventing normal Qi downward movement. Qi builds up and bursts upward. Sudden onset after cold food/drink or cold exposure.
② Stomach Fire: Heat agitates Stomach Qi upward. Fire has an inherent ascending nature — when Fire accumulates in the Stomach, Qi cannot descend. Hiccups are loud, forceful, with Heat signs.
③ Qi stagnation: Liver Qi stagnation invades the Stomach (Wood overacting on Earth) → disrupts Stomach descent → Qi reverses. Emotion-triggered, often accompanied by chest distension, sighing.
④ Deficiency: Stomach Qi or Yin is too depleted to maintain the downward direction. Hiccups are weak, intermittent, accompanied by fatigue. Seen in prolonged illness, elderly, post-chemotherapy. 正常：胃气主降→食物和浊气向下运行→消化正常进行→无任何反向上冲。

呃逆=降失常（下降受扰）→气机反向→升太过

四种破坏胃气下降的机制：
①寒邪犯胃：寒邪收引胃腑，阻碍气机正常下行。气机积聚并向上爆发。进食寒凉或受寒后突然发作。
②胃火（胃火上冲）：热邪激扰胃气上冲。火性炎上——胃中火热积聚时，气机无法下降。呃逆声响、有力，伴热象。
③气机郁滞：肝气郁滞侵犯胃腑（木克土）→扰乱胃气下降→气机逆行。情绪诱发，常伴胸闷、叹气。
④虚证：胃气或胃阴太虚，无力维持向下方向。呃逆声弱、断续，伴疲乏。见于久病、老年、化疗后。
Sound & Force声音与力度
Loud and forceful hiccup, or soft and low? Does it come in rapid bursts, or intermittently with long gaps? Does holding breath help momentarily?呃逆声响有力，还是声低无力？是快速连发，还是时断时续间隔较长？屏气是否能暂时缓解？
→ Force and rhythm directly reflect whether the Qi reversal is from excess (loud, strong) or deficiency (weak, intermittent)→ 力度和节律直接反映气机逆行是实证（响、有力）还是虚证（弱、断续）
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Qi Reversal Strength = Pattern Severity机理 · 气机逆行强度=证型严重程度
Loud, strong, frequent: There is a strong pathological force driving the upward reversal — Cold constriction, Fire agitation, or Qi stagnation pressure. The reversal has energy behind it.

Weak, intermittent, barely audible: The Stomach Qi is so depleted that it cannot even maintain a consistent downward direction. Small, weak upward bursts occur because there is insufficient Qi to maintain any direction consistently. In seriously ill patients, weak hiccups are a poor prognostic sign — the body's Qi regulation is collapsing. 响、有力、频繁（实证）：有强烈病理力量驱动向上逆行——寒邪收引、火热激扰或气滞压力。逆行有能量支撑。

弱、断续、几乎听不到（虚证）：胃气太虚，甚至无法维持一致的向下方向。因气机不足以维持任何方向，出现细小、虚弱的向上爆发。在危重患者中，虚弱的呃逆是预后不良的征象——身体的气机调节正在崩溃。
Loud, forceful, frequent响、有力、频繁
Excess — Cold/Fire/Qi stagnation实证——寒/火/气滞
Weak, intermittent, soft弱、断续、声低
Deficiency — Qi/Yin Xu虚证——气/阴虚
Triggers & Modifiers诱发与调节因素
Started after eating cold food or iced drinks? After eating too fast or overeating? When emotionally upset or stressed? Relieved by warmth (warm compress, warm drinks)? Worse with warmth?进食寒凉食物或冷饮后开始？进食过快或暴饮暴食后？情绪激动或压力时？温热缓解（热敷、热饮）？温热加重？
→ Triggers almost always reveal the pathological mechanism — Cold trigger + warmth relief = Cold pattern; stress trigger = Liver-Stomach; overeating trigger = food stagnation→ 诱因几乎总能揭示病理机制——寒冷诱发+温热缓解=寒证；情绪诱发=肝胃；暴食诱发=食积
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · The Trigger IS the Diagnosis机理 · 诱因即诊断
triggers are diagnostically precise because each mechanism has a characteristic initiating event:

Cold food/drink → immediate hiccup: Cold enters Stomach → immediately constricts Stomach Qi → Qi cannot descend → reflex upward burst. The Cold is the direct cause; the hiccup is the immediate consequence. Treatment: warm and disperse Cold.

Stress/emotional upset → hiccup: Liver Qi surges, invades Stomach, disrupts descent. Often occurs in emotionally sensitive patients before or during difficult conversations. Treatment: soothe Liver, harmonize Stomach.

Overeating → hiccup: Food mass overcrowds the Stomach, preventing descent. Qi has nowhere to go but up. Treatment: dissolve food stagnation, restore descent. 呃逆诱因在诊断上很精准，因为每种机制都有其特征性的起始事件：

寒凉食物/饮料→立即呃逆：寒邪入胃→立即收引胃气→气机无法下降→反射性向上爆发。寒邪是直接病因；呃逆是即时后果。治疗：温散寒邪。

情绪/压力→呃逆：肝气上冲，侵犯胃腑，扰乱下降。常在情绪敏感的患者中，在困难对话前后发生。治疗：疏肝和胃。

暴食→呃逆：食物过量充塞胃腑，阻碍下降。气机无处可去，只能上冲。治疗：消食化积，恢复下降。
Cold food/drink trigger + warmth relief寒凉诱发+温热缓解
Cold invading Stomach寒邪犯胃
Spicy food + thirst + loud辛辣食物+口渴+声响
Stomach Fire胃火
Stress/argument trigger情绪/争吵诱发
Liver invading Stomach肝胃不和
Overeating trigger + bloating暴食诱发+腹胀
Food stagnation食积
Pattern Decision呃逆辨证思路
Step 1: Loud/strong = excess (①②③). Weak/intermittent = deficiency (④⑤).响/有力=实证（①②③）。弱/断续=虚证（④⑤）。
Step 2 (excess): Warmth relieves = Cold ①. Heat signs + thirst = Fire ②. Stress trigger + chest distension = Liver-Stomach ③.温热缓解=寒①。热象+口渴=火②。情绪诱发+胸闷=肝胃③。
Step 3 (deficiency): Fatigue + cold limbs + pale tongue = Qi Xu ④. Dry mouth + no coat + thin-rapid pulse = Yin Xu ⑤.疲乏+四肢冷+舌淡=气虚④。口干+无苔+细数脉=阴虚⑤。
① Cold Invading Stomach(Cold forces Qi upward)① 寒邪犯胃——升太过（寒邪迫气上逆）
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden onset after cold food/drink or cold exposure; loud hiccup; epigastric distension or pain; warmth relieves; no thirst; white tongue coat; slow or tight pulse进食寒凉或受寒后突然发作；呃声响亮；胃脘胀满或疼痛；温热缓解；不渴；舌苔白；脉缓或紧
Formula方药(Dingxiang San) or modified with warming herbs丁香散或橘皮竹茹汤加温散药
② Stomach Fire(Fire drives Qi upward)② 胃火——升太过（火邪驱气上冲）
Key symptoms主要症状Loud forceful hiccup; foul breath; thirst with preference for cold drinks; epigastric burning; constipation; red tongue yellow coat; slippery-rapid pulse呃声响亮有力；口气臭秽；口渴喜冷饮；胃脘灼热；便秘；舌红苔黄；脉滑数
Formula方药or (with Heat-clearing modification)竹叶石膏汤或橘皮竹茹汤（加清热修改）
③ Liver Qi Invading Stomach③ 肝气犯胃——出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状Hiccups triggered by emotional upset; chest and flank distension; belching; sighing; hiccup may stop when distracted; wiry pulse; pale or slightly red tongue情绪激动诱发呃逆；胸胁胀满；嗳气；叹气；分散注意力时呃逆可能停止；脉弦；舌淡或略红
Formula方药(Xuanfu Daizhe Tang) — the primary descending formula; add , if Liver component is prominent旋覆代赭汤——首要降逆方；肝气成分明显时加柴胡、白芍
④ Stomach Qi Deficiency(Qi too weak to descend)④ 胃气虚——降不及（气太虚无力下降）
Key symptoms主要症状Weak soft hiccup; fatigue; poor appetite; cold limbs; loose stool; pale tongue white coat; weak pulse呃声低弱；疲乏；纳差；四肢冷；大便溏；舌淡白苔；脉弱
Formula方药+ components (, , to warm and tonify)旋覆代赭汤+理中丸成分（党参、干姜、白术以温补）
⑤ Stomach Yin Deficiency(Yin insufficient to anchor descent)⑤ 胃阴虚——降不及（阴不足以锚定下降）
Key symptoms主要症状Dry intermittent hiccup; dry mouth; no appetite; dry stool; afternoon heat sensation; red tongue with little or no coat; thin-rapid pulse. Often seen in chronic illness, post-chemotherapy, elderly.干燥断续呃逆；口干；不欲饮食；大便干结；午后热感；舌红少苔或无苔；脉细数。常见于慢性病、化疗后、老年人。
Formula方药(Yi Wei Tang) + — nourish Stomach Yin, gently descend rebellious Qi益胃汤+橘皮竹茹汤——滋养胃阴，轻柔降逆
Core Protocol — All Patterns核心处方——所有证型
PC6 内关 Neiguan Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
PC6 is the single most effective point for hiccups — its efficacy is documented in both classical texts and modern clinical trials. PC6 controls the Yinwei Mai which regulates the chest and epigastric region; it opens the chest, descends rebellious Qi, and specifically relaxes diaphragmatic spasm. The Pericardium channel's pathway through the diaphragm gives it direct anatomical-channel access to the hiccup mechanism. Strong stimulation of PC6 during a hiccup episode often stops the hiccup within minutes. This is one of the most clinically demonstrable acupuncture effects.PC6是治疗呃逆最有效的单一穴位——其疗效在经典文献和现代临床试验中均有记载。PC6控制阴维脉，调节胸部和胃脘区域；宽胸、降逆气，特异性松弛膈肌痉挛。心包经循行过横膈（心包经过横膈）赋予其对呃逆机制的直接解剖-经脉通路。在呃逆发作期间对PC6强刺激，常能在数分钟内止住呃逆。这是针灸效果中临床最可直接验证的之一。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Strong stimulation for acute hiccup — reducing method, vigorous needle manipulation during hiccup episode. For chronic/deficiency: even reinforcing-reducing. Can combine with acupressure between sessions: patient presses PC6 firmly for 1–2 minutes during episode.直刺0.5–1寸。急性呃逆需强刺激——泻法，呃逆发作时大幅度手法。慢性/虚证：平补平泻。发作间期可配合穴位按压：患者发作时用力按压PC6，持续1–2分钟。
ST36 足三里 Zusanli Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
He-Sea of Stomach channel — directly regulates Stomach Qi and specifically promotes its descending function. In hiccups, ST36 is the "root" treatment: while PC6 stops the acute spasm at the diaphragm level, ST36 restores the Stomach's normal downward Qi direction. Without ST36, treating only the symptom (diaphragm spasm) leaves the underlying Stomach Qi dysregulation unaddressed. For deficiency patterns, add moxa.胃经合穴——直接调节胃气并特异性促进其下降功能。在呃逆中，ST36是「根本」治疗：PC6在膈肌层面止住急性痉挛，ST36恢复胃气正常的向下方向。不用ST36，只治症状（膈肌痉挛）会遗留潜在的胃气失调未处理。虚证加灸法。
CV12 中脘 Zhongwan Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
Front-Mu of Stomach and Hui point of Fu organs — regulates the Stomach directly from the front surface. In hiccups, CV12 harmonizes the Stomach Qi and reinforces the descending direction. It is positioned at the epigastrium, the physical region of the Stomach, and its stimulation directly influences Stomach Qi movement. For Cold pattern: CV12 with moxa is the most efficient local warming treatment. For Fire pattern: mild reducing without moxa.胃的前募穴，六腑会穴——从前面直接调节胃腑。在呃逆中，CV12调和胃气并加强下降方向。位于上腹部，即胃的物质区域，其刺激直接影响胃气运动。寒证：CV12加灸是最有效的局部温热治疗。火证：轻泻法不用灸。
BL17 膈俞 Geshu Assistant — Diaphragm Direct佐——直接针对横膈
Why this point为什么选它
BL17 is the Back-Shu of the Diaphragm AND the Hui-Meeting point of Blood. Its dual role in hiccups: (1) Directly relaxes the diaphragm — the anatomical structure responsible for the hiccup reflex. The BL17 point sits at the level of the 7th thoracic vertebra, exactly at the diaphragm's posterior attachment. Needling it directly influences the local muscle tension. (2) As Blood meeting point, it moves Blood stagnation in the diaphragm area (relevant in chronic or post-trauma hiccups where Blood stasis may be involved). One of the most anatomically logical point selections in the entire system.BL17是横膈的背俞穴，也是血的会穴。在呃逆中的双重作用：①直接松弛横膈——呃逆反射的解剖结构。BL17位于第7胸椎水平，正是横膈后附着点。针刺直接影响局部肌张力。②作为血会穴，运化横膈区域的血瘀（与慢性或外伤后呃逆中可能存在的血瘀相关）。这是整个系统中解剖逻辑最充分的穴位选择之一。
Technique操作
Oblique medial 0.5–0.8 cun (toward spine). NEVER perpendicular (pneumothorax risk). Even method for most patterns. Can add mild moxa for Cold/deficiency.向脊柱方向斜刺0.5–0.8寸。切勿垂直（气胸风险）。大多数证型平补平泻。寒/虚证可加轻灸。
Pattern Modifications随证加减
① Cold①寒证Moxa on CV12 + ST36. Add CV6 (moxa) to warm Central Qi. Remove all reducing technique.CV12+ST36加灸。加CV6气海（灸）以温中气。去除所有泻法。
② Stomach Fire②胃火Add LI11 (reducing) + ST44 (reducing — Ying-Spring point of Stomach, clears Stomach Fire specifically). No moxa.加LI11曲池（泻法）+ST44内庭（泻法——胃经荥穴，特异性清胃火）。不用灸法。
③ Liver-Stomach③肝胃不和Add LV3 (reducing) to soothe Liver Qi. Add GB34 to dredge Shaoyang. PC6 especially important in this pattern (Yinwei Mai regulation).加LV3太冲（泻法）以疏肝气。加GB34阳陵泉以疏少阳。此证型PC6尤为重要（阴维脉调节）。
⑤ Stomach Yin Xu⑤胃阴虚Add SP6 (reinforcing) + KI3 (reinforcing) to nourish Yin. Gentle technique throughout. No aggressive stimulation — depleted Yin cannot tolerate strong needle manipulation.加SP6三阴交（补法）+KI3太溪（补法）以滋阴。全程轻柔手法。不用强刺激——阴虚无法耐受强刺激手法。
旋覆代赭汤 Xuánfù Dàizhě Tāng
Source: Pattern: All patterns with rebellious Qi — the universal descending formula出处：《伤寒论》· 证型：所有气逆证型——通用降逆方
Hiccup, belching, nausea from rebellious Stomach Qi; epigastric fullness; may have thin mucus. Modified according to Hot/Cold/Deficiency sub-pattern.胃气上逆所致呃逆、嗳气、恶心；胃脘痞满；可有清稀黏液。根据寒热虚实亚型加减。
旋覆花 9g包煎代赭石 30g先煎党参 12g半夏 9g生姜 15g大枣 4枚炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
(Inula flower, Sovereign): Descends Lung and Stomach Qi, dissolves Phlegm, stops hiccup and belching. Its downward direction is its primary therapeutic property. Must be wrapped during decoction (the flower silks can irritate the throat).

(Hematite, Minister): Heavy mineral — its physical weight embodies the therapeutic principle: heaviness descends. forces rebellious Qi downward through its heavy-sinking property. Large dose (30g) required for effect. Must be decocted first to extract its mineral properties. The combination of (light, moving) + (heavy, anchoring) is the classical "light-heavy" paired strategy for descending rebellious Qi.

+ + (Middle Jiao support): Tonify Spleen-Stomach Qi to prevent the heavy minerals from over-draining. Also addresses any underlying Qi deficiency component.

+ : Dissolve Phlegm, descend rebellious Qi, stop nausea — supporting the downward direction of the sovereign and minister. (15g, large dose) specifically warms the Stomach and prevents Cold-induced rebellious Qi.旋覆花（君）：降肺胃气，化痰，止呃逆嗳气。向下的方向是其主要治疗属性。煎煮时必须包煎（花须可刺激咽喉）。

代赭石（臣）：重镇矿物——其物质重量体现治疗原则：重则下沉。代赭石通过其重镇之性强制使上逆之气下降。需大剂量（30g）方有效。必须先煎以提取矿物属性。旋覆花（轻，运动）+代赭石（重，锚定）的组合是降逆气的经典「轻重」配伍策略。

党参+炙甘草+大枣（中焦支持）：补脾胃气以防重镇药过度耗损。也针对任何潜在的气虚成分。

半夏+生姜：化痰，降逆，止恶心——支持君臣药的向下方向。生姜（15g，大剂量）特异性温胃并防止寒邪所致上逆。
橘皮竹茹汤 Júpí Zhúrú Tāng
Source: Pattern: Stomach Qi/Yin deficiency with rebellious Qi出处：《金匮要略》· 证型：胃气/阴虚气逆
Hiccup or belching in weak or chronically ill patients; dry mouth; mild heat sensation; fatigue; red tongue little coat or thin white coat; thin-weak pulse虚弱或慢性病患者的呃逆或嗳气；口干；轻微热感；疲乏；舌红少苔或薄白苔；脉细弱
橘皮 12g竹茹 12g党参 9g生姜 9g大枣 5枚炙甘草 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
(Chen Pi): Moves Qi in the Middle Jiao, descends rebellious Stomach Qi, resolves Phlegm. The Qi-moving aspect addresses the stagnation component even in deficiency patterns.

(Bamboo shavings): Clears mild Heat from the Stomach, stops vomiting/hiccup, resolves Phlegm-Heat. Gentle enough for Yin deficiency patients — it clears Heat without damaging Yin (unlike bitter-cold herbs like which would further deplete Stomach Yin).

+ + : Tonify Middle Jiao Qi — essential in deficiency patterns where rebellious Qi is partly from weakness rather than excess pathogen.

This formula is gentler than (no heavy minerals) and is preferred for elderly, post-chemotherapy, or Yin-deficient patients where heavy descending would be too aggressive.橘皮（陈皮）：运化中焦气机，降逆胃气，化痰。运气成分针对虚证中的郁滞成分。

竹茹：清胃中轻微热邪，止呕/止呃，化痰热。对阴虚患者足够温和——清热而不伤阴（不同于黄连等苦寒药会进一步耗竭胃阴）。

党参+大枣+炙甘草：补中焦气——在虚证中不可或缺，因为上逆之气部分来自虚弱而非实邪。

此方比旋覆代赭汤更温和（无重镇矿物），适用于老年、化疗后或阴虚患者，对这些患者而言重镇降逆过于峻猛。
Case 1案例一Acute Cold Hiccup — Immediate Needling急性寒邪呃逆——即刻针刺
Patient: 35M. Hiccups started 30 minutes ago after drinking iced beer. Loud, constant, every 10–15 seconds. Epigastric tightness. No thirst. Tongue coat: thin white. Pulse: slightly tight.患者：男，35岁。30分钟前喝冰啤酒后开始呃逆。响亮、持续，每10–15秒一次。胃脘发紧。不渴。舌苔：薄白。脉：略紧。
Immediate acupuncture: PC6 bilateral (strong reducing, needle during hiccup episode) + CV12 (moxa) + ST36 (even). Within 5 minutes of needling PC6: hiccup slowed to every 60 seconds. By 15 minutes: resolved. No herbal prescription needed for acute cold hiccup of 30-minute duration.即刻针灸：PC6双侧（强泻法，在呃逆发作时行针）+CV12（灸）+ST36（平补平泻）。针刺PC6后5分钟内：呃逆减慢至每60秒一次。15分钟后：消失。无需草药方——30分钟内的急性寒邪呃逆。
Teaching point: PC6 for acute hiccup is one of the most immediately demonstrable acupuncture effects available. It is also teachable as a self-care point — patients can press PC6 firmly during hiccup episodes at home. This makes it an excellent clinical teaching case for students skeptical about acupuncture efficacy.教学要点：PC6治急性呃逆是最能立即展示针灸效果的治疗之一。也可作为自我护理穴位教给患者——患者在家发作时可用力按压PC6。这使其成为对针灸疗效持怀疑态度学生的绝佳临床教学案例。
Case 2案例二Stomach Yin Xu Hiccup — Post-Chemotherapy胃阴虚呃逆——化疗后
Patient: 62F, mid-chemotherapy for breast cancer. Persistent weak hiccup for 3 weeks. Dry mouth, no appetite, mild nausea. Fatigue. Red tongue with no coat. Thin-rapid pulse.患者：女，62岁，乳腺癌化疗中。持续虚弱呃逆3周。口干，无食欲，轻微恶心。疲乏。舌红无苔。脉细数。
Formula: + 12g + 9g (reinforce Stomach Yin nourishment). Acupuncture: PC6 (gentle even) + ST36 (gentle reinforcing) + CV12 (gentle even, no moxa) + BL17 (gentle even) + SP6 (reinforcing) + KI3 (reinforcing). All gentle — Yin-depleted patients cannot tolerate strong needle stimulation.方药：橘皮竹茹汤+麦冬12g+石斛9g（加强滋养胃阴）。针灸：PC6（轻平补平泻）+ST36（轻补法）+CV12（轻平补平泻，不灸）+BL17（轻平补平泻）+SP6（补法）+KI3（补法）。全程轻柔——阴虚患者无法耐受强刺激手法。
Teaching point: Post-chemotherapy hiccup is paradigmatically a Stomach Yin Xu pattern — chemotherapy isthat burns Yin. The weak hiccup, dry mouth, red tongue no coat are the classic signs. Treatment must nourish Yin and gently descend rebellious Qi without aggressive draining(with heavy minerals) would be too strong for this patient.教学要点：化疗后呃逆是胃阴虚证型的典型——化疗是灼伤阴液的热毒。虚弱的呃逆、口干、舌红无苔是经典征象。治疗必须滋阴并轻柔降逆气，而不能积极泄泻——旋覆代赭汤（含重镇矿物）对此患者过于峻猛。
Gynecology · Chong-Ren妇科病证 · 冲任
Infertility不孕症
Kidney Jing as the constitutional root — all female infertility has Kidney deficiency as the background. The pattern determines whether the Kidney Yin (follicular phase), Kidney Yang (luteal phase), Blood (uterine lining), or Phlegm-stasis (structural) is the primary obstacle.肾精为体质根本——所有女性不孕均以肾虚为背景。证型决定肾阴（卵泡期）、肾阳（黄体期）、血（子宫内膜）还是痰瘀（结构性）是主要障碍。
The Four-Phase Cycle Framework for Infertility Treatment不孕症治疗的四期周期框架
TCM infertility treatment works WITH the menstrual cycle, applying different interventions at different phases. This is the most effective approach because the TCM mechanisms align with the hormonal physiology:

Menstruation (Days 1–4): Move Blood, clear the uterus. Allow the old Blood to leave cleanly. Treat Blood stasis if dysmenorrhea is present.

Follicular phase (Days 5–13): Nourish Kidney Yin and Blood. Align with estrogen rise and follicle development. Yin-nourishing herbs + Spleen (to generate Blood). Key herbs: , , .

Ovulation (Days 13–15): Activate Kidney Yang and Qi, move Blood to support release. Coincides with LH surge. Yang-activating herbs + gentle Blood movers to facilitate follicle release. Key: , + , .

Luteal phase (Days 15–28): Warm Kidney Yang to support implantation. Align with progesterone phase. Kidney Yang herbs maintain the endometrial warmth for implantation. Key: (corpus luteum) function requires Yang warmth — Tu Si Zi, Ba Ji Tian, Lu Jiao Jiao. 中医不孕症治疗与月经周期协同，在不同阶段应用不同干预。这是最有效的方法，因为中医机制与激素生理学一致：

月经期（第1–4天）：活血，清洁子宫。让旧血干净排出。若有痛经则治疗血瘀。

卵泡期（第5–13天）：滋养肾阴和血液。配合雌激素升高和卵泡发育。滋阴药+脾（以生血）。关键草药：熟地黄、女贞子、枸杞子。

排卵期（第13–15天）：激活肾阳和气，活血以支持卵泡释放。与LH峰同步。激阳药+温和活血药促进卵泡释放。关键：仙灵脾、菟丝子+丹参、香附。

黄体期（第15–28天）：温肾阳以支持着床。配合孕激素阶段。肾阳药维持子宫内膜温度以支持着床。关键：黄体（黄体）功能需要阳气温煦——菟丝子、巴戟天、鹿角胶。
Menstrual History and Constitutional Assessment月经史与体质评估
Cycle length and regularity? Flow amount (scanty = Blood/Yin deficiency; heavy = Heat or Qi deficiency). Clots? Painful? Low back soreness during period? Cold or warm sensation in lower abdomen?周期长度和规律性？经量（量少=血/阴虚；量多=热或气虚）。血块？痛经？经期腰酸？下腹冷感还是热感？
→ Cold lower abdomen = Kidney Yang Xu. Scanty pale flow = Kidney Yin/Blood Xu. Dark clots + pain = Blood stasis. Irregular cycle = Liver Qi→ 下腹冷感=肾阳虚。量少色淡=肾阴/血虚。暗色血块+痛=血瘀。周期不规=肝气
Cold lower abdomen + long cycle + scanty pale下腹冷+周期长+量少色淡
Kidney Yang Xu — root肾阳虚——根本
Scanty flow + dry skin + night sweats + short cycle量少+皮肤干+盗汗+周期短
Kidney Yin Xu肾阴虚
Dark clots + dysmenorrhea + fixed pain暗色血块+痛经+固定痛
Blood stasis in Chong-Ren冲任血瘀
Obese + irregular + sticky phlegm + greasy coat肥胖+不规律+粘痰+苔腻
Phlegm-Damp blocking Chong痰湿阻滞冲任
Kidney Yang Deficiency (most common root)肾阳虚证（最常见根本）
Deficiency虚证
Kidney Yang cannot warm the uterus → cold uterus cannot support implantation → infertility with cold, long cycle, scanty pale flow肾阳不能温煦胞宫→宫寒不能支持着床→不孕伴寒象、周期长、量少色淡
Treatment focus治疗重点Warm Kidney Yang throughout the cycle, intensified in the luteal phase. GV4 + BL23 (moxa — essential). CV4 moxa (warms the uterus directly). SP6. Herbal: You Gui Wan (base formula for Kidney Yang Xu) with modifications by cycle phase. The "warm uterus" strategy: warming needles on CV4 + GV4 bilateral warming needle or moxa in every session during luteal phase.整个周期均温肾阳，黄体期加强。GV4+BL23（灸——必须）。CV4关元灸（直接温煦胞宫）。SP6。方药：右归丸（肾阳虚基础方）随周期阶段加减。"温宫"策略：黄体期每次治疗均在CV4+GV4双侧温针或艾灸。
Blood Stasis in Chong-Ren — Structural (Endometriosis / PCOS)冲任血瘀证——结构性（子宫内膜异位/多囊卵巢）
Excess实证
Blood stasis obstructs the Chong and Ren channels → uterine/tubal structural changes → eggs cannot implant or travel血瘀阻滞冲任→子宫/输卵管结构改变→卵子不能着床或运行
Treatment治疗Activate Blood, dissolve stasis in Chong-Ren. Most aggressive treatment during menstruation (days 1–4). SP10 + SP8 (xi-cleft of Spleen — for Blood stasis dysmenorrhea) + CV3 + ST29 . Herbal: Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan (dissolves uterine Blood stasis) + +(for severe endometriosis). Combine with warming herbs if Kidney Yang Xu coexists (very common).活血化瘀，化解冲任瘀滞。月经期（第1–4天）治疗最积极。SP10血海+SP8地机（脾经郄穴——血瘀痛经）+CV3+ST29归来。方药：桂枝茯苓丸（化子宫血瘀）+三棱+莪术（重度子宫内膜异位）。若同时有肾阳虚（非常常见），合并温阳药。
Phlegm-Damp Blocking Chong — PCOS / Anovulation痰湿阻滞冲任证——多囊卵巢/无排卵
Excess实证
Spleen Xu → Phlegm-Damp accumulates in the Chong channel → ovarian follicles cannot mature and release → anovulation and infertility脾虚→痰湿积聚于冲脉→卵巢卵泡不能成熟和释放→无排卵和不孕
Treatment治疗Strengthen Spleen + resolve Phlegm-Damp + activate Yang at ovulation to trigger release. ST36 + SP9 + ST40 (Phlegm resolution) + CV12. At ovulation: add LV3 + SP8 + GV4 moxa to trigger the Yang surge needed for follicle release. Herbal: Cang Fu Dao Tan Tang (— the specific formula for Phlegm-Damp infertility, PCOS). Weight loss is part of treatment — 5–10% weight reduction significantly improves ovulation in PCOS.健脾+化痰湿+排卵期激活阳气触发释放。ST36+SP9+ST40（化痰）+CV12。排卵期：加LV3+SP8+GV4灸以触发卵泡释放所需的阳气冲动。方药：苍附导痰汤——痰湿不孕、多囊卵巢综合征的专方。减重是治疗的一部分——减重5–10%显著改善多囊卵巢综合征的排卵。
Cycle-Based Acupuncture Protocol周期性针灸方案
Follicular phase (Days 5–13)卵泡期（第5–13天）KI3 (tonification) + SP6 (tonification) + CV4 (light moxa) + ST36 (tonification). Nourish Yin and Blood to build the follicle. Gentle tonifying needling only. No strong stimulation, no moxa on lower abdomen.KI3（补法）+SP6（补法）+CV4（轻灸）+ST36（补法）。滋养阴血以建立卵泡。仅轻柔补法针刺。不强刺激，不在下腹灸。
Ovulation (Days 13–15)排卵期（第13–15天）Add LV3 (smooth Liver Qi to facilitate release) + SP8 (xi-cleft — moves Chong channel Blood at the critical moment) + GV4 (strong moxa to generate the Yang surge). This is the most important session of the cycle for anovulatory patients. Timing is crucial: treat on Day 12–13 to anticipate ovulation.加LV3（疏肝气以促进释放）+SP8地机（郄穴——在关键时刻活化冲脉血液）+GV4（强灸以产生阳气冲动）。这是无排卵患者周期中最重要的一次治疗。时机至关重要：在第12–13天治疗以预期排卵。
Luteal phase (Days 15–28)黄体期（第15–28天）BL23 + GV4 (moxa — warm Yang to maintain corpus luteum function) + CV4 moxa + SP6 + HT7 (calm Shen — anxiety is common in the 2-week wait). If IVF support: begin acupuncture 3 days before embryo transfer, day of transfer (before and after), and 3 days after. Evidence: day-of-transfer acupuncture increases IVF success rates by approximately 40% in multiple RCTs.BL23+GV4（灸——温阳以维持黄体功能）+CV4灸+SP6+HT7（安神——两周等待期焦虑常见）。若支持试管婴儿：在胚胎移植前3天开始针灸，移植当天（前后），移植后3天。证据：移植当天针灸在多项随机对照试验中使试管婴儿成功率提高约40%。
You Gui Wan (Luteal phase base)右归丸（黄体期基础方）
Kidney Yang Xu infertility — cold uterus, long cycle, scanty pale flow, cold lower abdomen, deep-slow-weak pulse肾阳虚不孕——宫寒，周期长，量少色淡，下腹冷，脉沉迟弱
Mechanism: The primary Kidney Yang tonic formula. (deer antler gelatin) nourishes the Chong-Ren and warms Kidney Yang — the single most targeted herb for uterine Yang. +warm Kidney Yang fire. +nourish the Yin root so Yang has a foundation. +strengthen the Kidney and Chong channel. Use in the luteal phase (days 15–28) when Yang support is most needed for implantation.机理：主要补肾阳方剂。鹿角胶滋养冲任并温肾阳——单味最有针对性的温子宫阳气草药。附子+肉桂温肾阳之火。熟地黄+山茱萸滋养阴根使阳有根基。杜仲+菟丝子强肾和冲脉。在黄体期（第15–28天）使用，此时最需要阳气支持着床。
Zi Yin Bu Shen Wan / modifications (Follicular phase)滋阴补肾丸/加减（卵泡期）
Kidney Yin Xu component — short cycle, scanty flow, dry skin, night sweats, red tongue little coat, thin rapid pulse (follicular phase treatment)肾阴虚成分——周期短，量少，皮肤干，盗汗，舌红苔少，脉细数（卵泡期治疗）
Follicular phase formula construction: 30g + 15g + 15g + 15g + 15g + 12g + 12g. This combination nourishes Kidney Yin and Liver Blood simultaneously — the two substances needed for follicle development and uterine lining building. is the key herb: it nourishes Kidney Yin specifically and has clinical evidence for improving egg quality. (Chinese raspberry) astringes Kidney Jing to prevent premature release.卵泡期方药构成：熟地黄30g+女贞子15g+枸杞子15g+覆盆子15g+菟丝子15g+白芍12g+当归12g。此组合同时滋养肾阴和肝血——卵泡发育和子宫内膜建立所需的两种物质。女贞子是关键草药：专门滋养肾阴，有改善卵子质量的临床证据。覆盆子收敛肾精防止提前释放。
Case — IVF Support: Two Failed Cycles to Success病案——试管婴儿辅助：两次失败后成功
Patient: 36F. Primary infertility 3 years. Two failed IVF cycles (both resulted in fertilization but failed implantation at transfer). Diagnosed with "thin endometrium" (lining 5–6mm at transfer, optimal is ≥8mm). Also: cold hands and feet, cycle 35 days, scanty pale flow, low back soreness. Pale tongue, deep-weak pulse at chi.患者：女，36岁。原发性不孕3年。两次试管婴儿失败（均受精但移植时着床失败）。诊断为"子宫内膜薄"（移植时内膜5–6mm，最佳≥8mm）。也有：手足冰冷，周期35天，量少色淡，腰酸。舌淡，尺脉沉弱。
Analysis: Thin endometrium = insufficient Blood to build the uterine lining = Kidney Yang Xu failing to drive Blood to the uterus. The cold extremities, long cycle, pale scanty flow, and deep-weak chi pulse all confirm Kidney Yang Xu with Blood deficiency as the root.

Treatment (3 months before third IVF cycle):
Follicular phase: nourish Kidney Yin + Blood (cycle-based herbs + SP6, KI3, ST36).
Luteal phase: warm Kidney Yang + move Blood to uterus (You Gui Wan + CV4 moxa, BL23 moxa, BL17).
Third IVF cycle: acupuncture on day of embryo transfer (before and after transfer) + 3 days post-transfer.

Result: Endometrial lining at transfer: 9.2mm. Successful implantation. Healthy delivery at 39 weeks.

The 3-month preconception treatment improved endometrial thickness from 5–6mm to 9.2mm — a change that conventional medicine had been unable to achieve in 2 cycles. 分析：子宫内膜薄=血液不足以建立子宫内膜=肾阳虚不能驱动血液至子宫。手足冰冷、周期长、量少色淡和尺脉沉弱均确认肾阳虚伴血虚为根本。

治疗（第三次试管婴儿周期前3个月）：
卵泡期：滋养肾阴+血液（周期性草药+SP6、KI3、ST36）。
黄体期：温肾阳+活血至子宫（右归丸+CV4灸、BL23灸、BL17）。
第三次试管婴儿周期：胚胎移植当天针灸（移植前后）+移植后3天。

结果：移植时子宫内膜厚度：9.2mm。成功着床。39周健康分娩。

3个月孕前治疗将内膜厚度从5–6mm改善至9.2mm——这是传统医学在2个周期中无法实现的改变。
Teaching point: The IVF support protocol (acupuncture on day of embryo transfer) is one of the most evidence-based applications of acupuncture in reproductive medicine. Multiple RCTs show approximately 40% increase in clinical pregnancy rates when acupuncture is performed on the day of transfer. The mechanism: acupuncture reduces uterine contractility (measured by uterine artery Doppler) and increases endometrial blood flow, both of which improve implantation conditions. The preconception herbal treatment to build Kidney Yang and Blood addresses the constitutional issue that thin endometrium reflects.教学要点：试管婴儿支持方案（胚胎移植当天针灸）是针灸在生殖医学中证据最充分的应用之一。多项随机对照试验显示移植当天进行针灸时临床妊娠率提高约40%。机制：针灸减少子宫收缩性（通过子宫动脉多普勒测量）并增加子宫内膜血流，两者均改善着床条件。孕前草药治疗补充肾阳和血液，处理薄内膜所反映的体质问题。
Mind & Sleep神志睡眠
Insomnia失眠
Root: Wei Qi cannot enter Yin at night. Branch: which Qi direction is blocking this entry.根本：卫气夜间不能入阴。枝节：哪个气机方向阻碍了这个「入」的过程。
All insomnia shares one root: Wei Qi cannot enter Yin at night. The intake questions identify why — which Qi direction is obstructing this entry. Five question groups. By the end, the pattern is almost always clear. 所有失眠都有同一个根本：卫气夜间不能入阴。问诊的目的是找出为什么——哪个气机方向阻碍了「入」的过程。五组问题，问完基本定位。
Core Framework · Why Insomnia is an Entry-Exit Problem核心框架 · 失眠为什么是出入问题
《Lingshu》: "Wei Qi travels Yang during the day (active, awake), enters Yin at night (quiet, asleep)." Sleep is the natural result of Wei Qi successfully entering the Yin aspect. Insomnia means this entry is blocked.《灵枢》：「卫气昼行于阳，夜行于阴」。睡眠是卫气顺利入阴的自然结果。失眠意味着这个「入」的过程受阻。
Why does Wei Qi fail to enter Yin? The other Qi dynamics tell us:

Excessive Ascent: Liver Yang or Heart Fire surges upward at night, creating Yang excess that prevents Yin from receiving Wei Qi.

Insufficient Descent: Stomach Qi fails to descend, turbid Qi rises to disturb the Heart.

Insufficient Ascent: Heart-Spleen deficiency means insufficient Blood for Wei Qi to enter — the "bed" is empty.

Entry-Exit Disruption: Wei Qi loses its day-night rhythm. Seen most clearly in Heart-Kidney Disharmony and Heart-Gallbladder Qi Deficiency. 卫气为什么不能入阴？其他气机方向告诉我们：

升太过：肝阳或心火夜间上冲，实热阻止卫气入阴。

降不及：胃气不降（胃不和则卧不安），浊气上行扰心。

升不及：心脾两虚，血不足，卫气无处可入——阴分「床」是空的。

出入失常：卫气昼夜节律紊乱。心肾不交、心胆气虚最为典型。
Group 1 · Sleep Quality第一组 · 睡眠性质
Sleep睡眠
Cannot fall asleep, wakes repeatedly, or wakes early and cannot return to sleep?难以入睡，入睡后反复惊醒，还是早醒后无法再睡？
→ Three failure modes of sleep, each points to a different pattern→ 三种睡眠失败模式，各自指向不同证型
＋
Mechanism机理
Sleep onset, maintenance, and early waking each represent a different stage of Wei Qi's Yin entry process being disrupted.入睡困难、易醒、早醒，分别代表卫气入阴过程在不同阶段被打断。
Cannot fall asleep: Active Yang obstruction — Heart Fire, Liver Fire, or Phlegm-Heat — too much Yang preventing the shift into Yin mode. Excess pattern.

Falls asleep but wakes repeatedly: Wei Qi enters Yin but is expelled — the Yin substance is too deficient to hold it. Heart-Spleen Xu or Heart-Gallbladder Xu. Often with vivid dreams or palpitations on waking.

Wakes early (3–5am), cannot return to sleep: Wei Qi exits Yin prematurely when Liver Qi begins ascending. If Liver-Kidney Yin is deficient, this ascent pulls Wei Qi out too early. Classic Yin deficiency sign. 难以入睡：主动阳气阻碍——心火、肝火、痰热，阳气噪音太多无法切换到阴模式。实证为主。

入睡后易醒：卫气入阴但反复被驱出——阴血不足以留住卫气。心脾两虚或心胆气虚。常伴多梦或醒时心悸。

早醒（3–5点），不能再睡：肝气开始升发时卫气提前离开阴分。肝肾阴虚则升发力量过强，把卫气提前从阴分拉出。经典阴虚信号。
Direction答案指向
Cannot fall asleep难以入睡
Excess Yang / Fire阳实 / 火热
Wakes repeatedly入睡后易醒
HT-SP Xu心脾两虚HT-GB Xu心胆气虚
Early waking早醒
Yin Xu阴虚HT-KD Disharmony心肾不交
Sleep睡眠
Dream quality: vivid/disturbing, fearful nightmares, or minimal dreams but unrefreshed sleep?梦的性质：梦境纷乱鲜明，还是噩梦恐惧，还是梦少但不解乏？
→ Dream content reveals which organ system is failing to anchor the Shen→ 梦的内容揭示哪个脏腑无法固守心神
＋
Mechanism · Dreams as Diagnostic Windows机理 · 梦是诊断窗口
Vivid, disturbing, multiple storylines: Heart Fire or Liver Fire — excess Yang agitating the Shen. Mind overactivated.

Fearful dreams, wakes in fright, heart racing: Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu — Gallbladder governs courage. When deficient, the mind cannot maintain safety during the vulnerable Yin state of sleep. Characteristic: person knows they are overreacting but cannot help it.

Dreams of water, drowning, cold: Heart-Kidney Disharmony — Kidney Water themes in dreams reflect the Water-Fire axis being broken.
