Few dreams, sleep is unrefreshing, fatigue on waking: Heart-Spleen Xu — Shen is undernourished, not agitated. Like a phone with low battery. 纷乱鲜明、多故事线：心火或肝火——实热扰神，神明过度激活。

噩梦惊恐、惊醒心悸：心胆气虚——胆主勇气决断，胆气虚时心神在睡眠阴分状态中无法维持安全感。特征：当事人知道自己反应过度但无法控制。

梦见水、溺水、寒冷：心肾不交——梦中出现肾水主题，反映水火轴断裂。

少梦但不解乏：心脾两虚——神明营养不足而非被扰动。如低电量手机。
Direction答案指向
Vivid/disturbing纷乱鲜明
Heart/Liver Fire心火/肝火
Fearful, startled噩梦惊醒
HT-GB Qi Xu心胆气虚
Water / cold dreams水寒相关梦
HT-KD Disharmony心肾不交
Few dreams, tired少梦不解乏
HT-SP Xu心脾两虚
Group 2 · Accompanying Symptoms第二组 · 伴随症状
Body躯体
Palpitations with restlessness and heat, OR palpitations easily triggered by fright, OR palpitations with fatigue and pale complexion?心悸伴烦热，还是受惊易引发心悸，还是心悸伴疲乏面白？
→ Heart symptom character distinguishes excess from deficiency, and which deficiency→ 心的症状性质区分实证与虚证，以及哪种虚证
＋
Mechanism · Heart Symptom Direction机理 · 心的症状方向
Palpitations + restlessness + mouth ulcers + thirst: Heart Fire — excess Yang disturbing the Shen. The Heart is overloaded with heat. Person feels hot, agitated, cannot quiet down.

Palpitations easily triggered by small sounds or fright, timidity: Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu — Shen has lost its protective Qi. Every small disturbance causes alarm. Person is aware they are overreacting.

Palpitations + fatigue + pale complexion + poor memory: Heart-Spleen Xu — insufficient Blood to nourish the Heart. Shen is undernourished, not disturbed. Person is exhausted, not agitated.

Palpitations + five-centre heat + night sweats: Heart-Kidney Disharmony — Kidney Yin cannot cool the Heart, Heart Fire cannot warm the Kidneys. Five-centre heat is the signature. 心悸+烦躁焦虑+口腔溃疡+口渴：心火——实热扰神，心脏过载，感到燥热激动，无法平静。

细小声音或受惊即引发心悸、胆怯：心胆气虚——神明失去保护之气，细小扰动即引起警报，当事人知道自己反应过度。

心悸+疲乏+面色苍白+记忆力差：心脾两虚——血不足以养心，神明营养不足而非被扰动，感到疲惫而非烦躁。

心悸+五心烦热+盗汗：心肾不交——肾阴无法凉润心脏，心火无法温煦肾水，五心烦热是特征。
Direction答案指向
Restless + hot烦热焦虑
Heart Fire心火亢盛 升太过
Easily startled易惊胆怯
HT-GB Xu心胆气虚 出入失常
Fatigue + pale疲乏面白
HT-SP Xu心脾两虚 升不及
Five-centre heat五心烦热
HT-KD Disharmony心肾不交
Body躯体
Digestive symptoms: epigastric fullness, nausea, or heavy feeling after eating?消化症状：胃脘胀满、恶心、饭后沉重感？
→ — Stomach disharmony directly causes insomnia→ 「胃不和则卧不安」——胃气不和直接导致失眠
＋
Mechanism · The Stomach-Sleep Axis机理 · 胃-睡眠轴
Stomach Qi descends normally after eating. When blocked, undigested turbid Qi rises, agitating the Heart and Shen at night. Late or heavy eating creates Phlegm-Dampness → transforms to Heat → Phlegm-Heat rises to disturb the Heart. Key clues: insomnia worse after late heavy meals, thick greasy tongue coat, chest stuffiness.

Clinical rule: If digestive symptoms accompany insomnia, treat the Middle Jiao first. Calming the Heart alone will have limited effect if the Stomach is still rebelling. 胃气饭后应该下降。当这个下降被阻断，未消化的浊气向上升，在夜间扰动心神。晚食重食生痰湿→化热→痰热上扰心神。关键线索：晚食或饱食后失眠加重，苔厚腻，胸闷。

临床原则：若消化症状伴随失眠，先治中焦。胃气仍在上逆时，单纯安神效果有限。
Direction答案指向
Fullness + nausea胀满恶心
Phlegm-Heat痰热扰心 降不及
Worse after eating饱食后加重
Stomach Qi Rebellion胃气上逆
Thick greasy coat苔厚腻
Phlegm-Damp confirmed痰湿确认
Group 3 · Triggers第三组 · 诱发因素
Trigger诱因
Triggered by stress/frustration, or overthinking/worry, or physical exhaustion, or fright?压力郁闷诱发，思虑过度，体力透支，还是受到惊吓？
→ Each emotion affects a specific organ and Qi direction — the trigger often reveals the pattern→ 每种情志影响特定脏腑——诱因往往直接揭示证型
＋
Mechanism · Emotions as Qi Disruptors机理 · 情志如何干扰气机
Anger, frustration, suppression: Liver Qi stagnation → Fire. The blocked upward Liver Qi builds pressure and erupts at night, preventing sleep onset.

Overthinking, rumination: "Knots" the Middle Jiao Qi, depletes Spleen's Blood production → Heart Blood insufficient. Chronic worriers develop Heart-Spleen Xu insomnia.

Physical exhaustion, no emotional component: Deficiency — Heart-Spleen or Kidney Yin. Body depleted, not disturbed. Treat the root deficiency.

Fear, sudden shock: Kidney and Gallbladder. Fear injures Kidney, disrupts Water-Fire axis. Shock disrupts Gallbladder's stabilizing function. 愤怒郁闷被压制（怒）：肝气郁结化火。被压制的肝气向上力量积聚压力，夜间爆发阻止入睡。

思虑过度反刍（思）：「结」住中焦气机，耗损脾的生血能力→心血不足。慢性忧虑者发展为心脾两虚失眠。

体力透支，无情志因素：虚证——心脾或肾阴虚。身体被耗竭而非被扰动。先治根本虚损。

恐惧惊吓：肾和胆。恐伤肾，扰乱水火轴；惊伤胆，破坏胆的稳定功能。
Direction答案指向
Anger/frustration愤怒郁闷
Liver Fire肝郁化火 升太过
Overthinking思虑过度
HT-SP Xu心脾两虚 升不及
Physical exhaustion体力透支
Deficiency虚损
Fear / shock恐惧惊吓
KD-HT / HT-GB心肾/心胆
Group 4 · Time Pattern第四组 · 时间规律
Time时间
What time do you wake? Midnight (11pm–1am), 1–3am, 3–5am, or variable?几点醒来？子时（23–1点），1–3点，3–5点，还是无规律？
→ Organ clock: fixed waking time reveals which channel's pathology is driving insomnia→ 子午流注：固定醒来时间揭示哪条经脉的病变驱动失眠
＋
Mechanism · Organ Clock and Insomnia机理 · 子午流注与失眠时辰
Cannot fall asleep until after midnight (, GB peak): Gallbladder Qi cannot initiate the Yin transition. Person lies awake exactly during the Gallbladder's peak hour. → Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu.

Wakes at 1–3am (, LV peak): Liver Fire at its most active. Most common time for Liver-pattern insomnia. Often accompanied by irritability or physical restlessness on waking.

Wakes at 3–5am: Liver Qi begins ascending. If Liver-Kidney Yin is deficient, this pulls Wei Qi out of Yin prematurely. Cannot return to sleep. → Yin deficiency / Heart-Kidney Disharmony.

Variable timing: Focus on triggers and emotions rather than organ clock. 子夜后才能入睡（子时，胆经最旺）：胆气无法启动阴的转换，当事人恰好在胆经最旺时间躺着睡不着。→ 心胆气虚。

凌晨1–3点醒（丑时，肝经最旺）：肝火在此时最为活跃。最常见的肝证型失眠时间，醒来时常伴烦躁或身体躁动。

凌晨3–5点醒（寅时）：肝气开始升发。肝肾阴虚时升发力量过强，把卫气提前从阴分拉出，无法再睡。→ 阴虚/心肾不交。

时间无规律：关注诱发因素和情志而非子午流注。
Direction答案指向
Can't sleep till midnight子夜前无法入睡
HT-GB Xu心胆气虚
Wakes 1–3am1–3点醒
Liver Fire / Stagnation肝郁化火
Wakes 3–5am3–5点醒
LV-KD Yin Xu肝肾阴虚HT-KD Disharmony心肾不交
Variable无规律
Focus on triggers关注诱发因素
Time时间
Acute (weeks) or chronic (months to years)?急性（数周）还是慢性（数月至数年）？
→ Duration determines excess-to-deficiency progression and guides treatment priority→ 病程决定实证向虚证的演变，决定治疗优先级
＋
Mechanism · The Excess-to-Deficiency Progression机理 · 实证向虚证的演变
Insomnia almost always begins as excess (Fire, Phlegm, Stagnation) and gradually becomes deficiency as prolonged sleeplessness depletes Qi and Blood.

Acute (days–weeks), clear trigger: Excess — clear aggressively with reducing method.

Subacute (1–3 months), trigger gone but sleep not recovered: Transitional — excess clearing but deficiency emerging. Mixed treatment.

Chronic (3+ months): Primarily deficiency. Aggressive reducing will further deplete. Prioritize tonification.

Years of refractory insomnia: Deep root deficiency. Expect slow progress. Set realistic expectations. 失眠几乎总是从实证（火、痰、郁滞）开始，随着长期失眠耗竭气血，逐渐转为虚证。

急性（数日至数周），有明确触发事件：实证——用泻法积极治疗。

亚急性（1–3个月），触发因素消退但睡眠未恢复：过渡期——实证消退但虚证出现。混合治疗。

慢性（3个月以上）：以虚为主。激进泻法会进一步耗竭。以补为主。

数年难治性失眠：根本虚损深。预期进展缓慢。建立现实预期。
Direction答案指向
Acute, clear trigger急性有诱因
Excess — reducing实证——泻法
1–3 months1–3个月
Mixed — clear + tonify虚实夹杂
Chronic 3+ months慢性3个月以上
Deficiency primary以虚为主
Seven patterns. Each has a distinct symptom cluster and a clear Qi dynamic explanation. Identify the primary pattern first, then note secondary patterns. Treatment targets the primary.七个证型，每个都有独特症候群和明确气机解释。先确定主要证型，再注意次要证型，治疗针对主要证型。
Excess Patterns实证类

① Liver Fire Disturbing Heart肝郁化火型

Excessive Ascent升太过
Liver Qi stagnation → Fire surges upward to disturb the Heart-Shen. Excess Yang prevents Wei Qi entering Yin.肝气郁结化火，火热上炎扰动心神。实热阻止卫气入阴。
  • Difficulty falling asleep难以入睡
  • Irritability, easily angered烦躁易怒
  • Vivid disturbing dreams梦境纷乱
  • Wakes at 1–3am1–3点易醒
  • Headache, red eyes, bitter taste头痛目赤口苦
  • Tongue: red, yellow coat; Pulse: wiry rapid舌红苔黄，脉弦数

② Phlegm-Heat Disturbing Heart痰热扰心型

Insufficient Descent降不及
Diet creates Phlegm → transforms to Heat → Stomach Qi fails to descend → Phlegm-Heat rises to disturb Heart. .饮食失节生痰化热，胃气不降，痰热上扰心神。胃不和则卧不安。
  • Cannot fall asleep, racing mind难入睡，思维急速
  • Chest oppression, nausea胸闷恶心
  • Worse after late/heavy meals晚食后加重
  • Bitter taste, profuse phlegm口苦痰多
  • Tongue: red, thick greasy yellow coat舌红，苔黄厚腻
  • Pulse: slippery rapid脉滑数

③ Heart Fire Blazing心火亢盛型

+升太过 + 出入失常
Heart Fire burns upward, Shen in constant agitation. Upper Jiao so full of Yang heat that Yin cannot enter.心火上炎，心神持续躁扰。上焦阳热过盛，阴分无法受纳。
  • Extreme difficulty falling asleep极难入睡
  • Severe restlessness, agitation烦躁不安
  • Mouth/tongue ulcers口舌生疮
  • Palpitations, thirst, dark urine心悸口渴，尿黄赤
  • Tongue: red tip, yellow coat舌尖红，苔黄
  • Pulse: rapid, forceful at cun脉数，寸部有力
Deficiency Patterns虚证类

④ Heart-Spleen Deficiency心脾两虚型

Insufficient Ascent升不及
Spleen fails to generate Blood → Heart Blood insufficient to anchor Shen → Wei Qi has nowhere to enter. Develops from chronic worry or overwork.脾不生血，心血不足以养神。卫气无处可入。由长期思虑或劳倦发展而来。
  • Falls asleep but wakes repeatedly能入睡但反复易醒
  • Vivid dreams, wakes unrefreshed多梦，醒后不解乏
  • Palpitations, poor memory, fatigue心悸，健忘，疲乏
  • Poor appetite, pale complexion食欲不振，面色苍白
  • Tongue: pale; Pulse: thin weak舌淡，脉细弱

⑤ Heart-Kidney Disharmony心肾不交型

Entry-Exit Disruption出入失常（水火不济）
Kidney Water cannot ascend to cool Heart; Heart Fire cannot descend to warm Kidneys. Water-Fire axis broken — fundamental Yin-Yang entry-exit rhythm disrupted.肾水不能上济心火，心火不能下温肾水。水火轴断裂，阴阳出入根本节律被破坏。
  • Early waking 3–5am, cannot return早醒3–5点，不能再睡
  • Five-centre heat (palms, soles, chest)五心烦热
  • Night sweats, tinnitus盗汗，耳鸣
  • Low back soreness, dry mouth at night腰膝酸软，夜间口干
  • Tongue: red, little coat; Pulse: thin rapid, weak chi舌红苔少，脉细数尺弱

⑥ Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu心胆气虚型

Entry-Exit Disruption出入失常（卫气不能启动入阴）
Gallbladder governs the midnight Yin transition. When deficient, this transition cannot begin. Sleep is easily disrupted by any external disturbance.胆主子时阴的转换启动。胆气虚时转换无法开始，睡眠易被任何外部干扰破坏。
  • Cannot fall asleep until midnight or later子夜或之后才能入睡
  • Easily startled awake, fearful dreams易惊醒，噩梦恐惧
  • Timidity, indecisiveness in daily life日常胆怯犹豫不决
  • Palpitations from small sounds细小声音即引发心悸
  • Tongue: pale; Pulse: wiry thin or weak舌淡，脉弦细或弱
Special Pattern特殊型

⑦ Stomach Disharmony胃气不和型

Insufficient Descent降不及（胃气上逆）
Stomach failure to descend sends turbid Qi upward, directly agitating the Heart-Shen. Treat the Stomach — sleep resolves.胃气不降，浊气上行直接扰动心神。治胃，睡眠自然恢复。
  • Insomnia clearly worse after overeating or late meals暴食或晚食后失眠明显加重
  • Epigastric fullness, belching, nausea脘腹胀满，嗳气，恶心
  • No significant emotional component无明显情志因素
  • Tongue: thick coat; Pulse: slippery苔厚，脉滑

Mixed Patterns — Clinical Reality虚实夹杂——临床实际

Multiple Qi dynamic disruptions多个气机方向同时失常
Chronic insomnia almost always involves mixed patterns. Most common combinations:慢性失眠几乎总是虚实夹杂。最常见组合：
  • Liver Fire + HT-SP Xu (stress-depleted)肝郁化火 + 心脾两虚
  • HT-KD Disharmony + Liver Fire (menopausal)心肾不交 + 肝郁（更年期）
  • Phlegm-Heat + HT-SP Xu (lifestyle + depletion)痰热 + 心脾两虚
  • Rule: treat excess first, then deficiency原则：先攻实，后补虚
Decision Steps破案决策步骤
Step 1:第一步： Acute or chronic? → Acute = likely excess; chronic = likely deficiency or mixed急性还是慢性？→ 急性多实，慢性多虚或夹杂
Step 2:第二步： Cannot fall asleep OR wakes repeatedly? → Cannot fall asleep = excess; wakes repeatedly = deficiency难入睡还是易醒？→ 难入睡多实，易醒多虚
Step 3:第三步： What time does waking occur? → 1–3am = Liver; 3–5am = Yin Xu / HT-KD; midnight = HT-GB几点醒来？→ 1–3点=肝；3–5点=阴虚/心肾不交；子夜=心胆
Step 4:第四步： Digestive symptoms? → Yes = Phlegm-Heat or Stomach disharmony; treat Middle Jiao first有消化症状？→ 有=痰热或胃气不和；先治中焦
Step 5:第五步： Five-centre heat + night sweats? → Heart-Kidney Disharmony; nourish Yin as priority五心烦热+盗汗？→ 心肾不交；以滋阴为优先
Step 6:第六步： Easily startled + timid + indecisive? → Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu; tonify both Heart and Gallbladder易惊胆怯+犹豫不决？→ 心胆气虚；心胆同补
Core points first (all patterns), then pattern-specific additions. Every point includes the Qi dynamic mechanism — not just what it does, but why it was chosen.先用核心穴位（所有证型），再加证型特异穴位。每个穴位包含气机机制——不只是功效，而是选择背后的原因。
Core Points · All Patterns核心穴位 · 所有证型均用
HT 7
Shenmen · Heart Source Point神门 · 心经原穴
Calms the Shen — the anchor of all insomnia treatment镇静安神——所有失眠治疗的基础锚点
＋
Why this point为什么选它
HT 7 is the Source point of the Heart channel — it directly accesses the Heart's original Qi. The Heart houses the Shen; HT 7 is the most direct route to calm it regardless of why the Shen is disturbed (Fire, deficiency, Phlegm). It addresses the downstream result — an agitated Shen — across all patterns. Same point, but technique is completely opposite depending on pattern: reducing for excess, tonification for deficiency.神门是心经原穴——直接接触心的原气。无论心神被扰的原因（火、虚、痰），神门提供最直接的安神通道，处理所有证型的共同下游结果——躁扰的心神。同一穴位，但操作完全相反：实证泻法，虚证补法。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun. Reducing for excess (Liver Fire, Heart Fire, Phlegm-Heat). Tonification for deficiency (HT-SP Xu, HT-KD, HT-GB Xu). Bilateral.直刺0.3–0.5寸。实证（肝火、心火、痰热）泻法。虚证（心脾两虚、心肾不交、心胆气虚）补法。双侧取穴。
PC 6
Neiguan · Pericardium Luo, Yin Wei Mai内关 · 心包经络穴，通阴维脉
Opens chest, calms Heart — pairs with HT 7 to address both Heart Qi and Blood宽胸宁心——与神门配伍，同时处理心气与心血
＋
Why this point为什么选它
The Pericardium protects the Heart. PC 6 opens chest Qi stagnation (which compounds insomnia), regulates Heart Qi, and calms the Shen. Its connection to the Yin Wei Mai regulates the Yin aspect broadly — directly relevant to Wei Qi's entry into Yin. HT 7 addresses Heart Blood (substance); PC 6 addresses Heart Qi (function). Together they cover both dimensions.心包保护心脏。内关宽胸理气（胸中气滞加重失眠），调节心气，宁神。通阴维脉广泛调节阴分——直接与卫气入阴相关。神门处理心血（物质）；内关处理心气（功能）。两穴合用覆盖两个维度。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Needle sensation toward fingers. Bilateral. Same reducing/tonifying logic as HT 7.直刺0.5–1寸，针感向手指方向传导。双侧取穴。补泻逻辑同神门。
GV 20
Baihui · Meeting of all Yang百会 · 诸阳之会
Regulates Yang — reducing draws excess down, tonification lifts deficiency up调节阳气——泻法引实热下行，补法升提清阳
＋
Why this point为什么选它
GV 20 sits at the apex of all Yang channels. Its bidirectional function is uniquely valuable: excess Yang patterns — reducing draws excess Yang downward, away from disturbing the Shen; deficiency patterns — tonification or moxa lifts clear Yang to nourish brain and stabilize Shen. This is the clearest example in TCM where the benefit comes entirely from technique, not location alone.百会位于所有阳经最高交会点。双向调节功能独特有价值：实热证——泻法将多余阳气向下引，远离扰神；虚证——补法或灸升提清阳以濡养脑髓稳定心神。这是中医中穴位疗效完全取决于操作方法而非位置本身的最清晰例子。
Technique操作
Flat insertion 0.5–0.8 cun. Excess: reducing. Deficiency: tonification or moxa (5–10 min — especially effective for HT-SP Xu).平刺0.5–0.8寸。实证：泻法。虚证：补法或艾灸（5–10分钟，对心脾两虚尤其有效）。
SP 6
Sanyinjiao · Three Yin Intersection三阴交 · 三阴经交会穴
Nourishes Blood and Yin — builds the Yin foundation Wei Qi needs to enter养血滋阴——构建卫气入阴所需的阴分基础
＋
Why this point为什么选它
SP 6 meets the Spleen, Liver, and Kidney channels — the three organs most responsible for Blood and Yin. In insomnia, this directly addresses the "bed" for Wei Qi — building the Yin substance that Wei Qi needs to enter at night. Without sufficient Yin, Wei Qi cannot settle regardless of how well other points calm the Shen.三阴交交会脾、肝、肾三经——三个最主要负责生成贮藏血液与阴分的脏腑。在失眠中，这直接解决了卫气的「床」的问题——建立卫气夜间入阴所需的阴分物质基础。没有充足的阴分，无论其他穴位安神效果多好，卫气都无处安歇。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Tonification for all deficiency patterns. Contraindicated in pregnancy. Bilateral.直刺1–1.5寸。所有虚证均用补法。孕妇禁用。双侧取穴。
Anmian
Extra point安眠穴 · 经外奇穴
Direct sleep-promoting — adjunct for all patterns直接促眠——所有证型辅助穴
＋
Location and Why定位与原理
Midpoint between GB 20 (Fengchi) and TE 17 (Yifeng), posterior to the mastoid process. This area intersects the Gallbladder channel (Shaoyang — pivot of Yin-Yang transition) and Triple Energizer channel (regulates Qi between three Jiao). Needling here influences both the Yin-Yang transition mechanism and Qi circulation between Upper, Middle, and Lower Jiao. Does not replace pattern-based treatment, but adds direct sleep-promoting effect regardless of pattern.风池（GB 20）与翳风（TE 17）连线中点，乳突后方。此区域交汇胆经（少阳，阴阳转换枢纽）和三焦经（调节三焦间气机运动）。针刺此处同时影响阴阳转换机制和三焦气机循环。不替代辨证治疗，但无论证型如何都增加直接促眠效果。
Technique操作
Perpendicular or slightly oblique 0.8–1.2 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing. Bilateral.直刺或微斜刺0.8–1.2寸。平补平泻。双侧取穴。
Liver Fire / Heart Fire — Excess Ascent肝郁化火 / 心火亢盛——升太过
LV 2
Xingjian · Liver Spring point行间 · 肝经荥穴
Clears Liver Fire — first choice for Liver Fire insomnia (wakes 1–3am, irritable)清肝泻火——肝火失眠首选（1–3点醒，烦躁）
＋
Why this point为什么选它
LV 2 is the Spring (Ying) point — "Spring points govern heat." Liver Fire insomnia is an excess heat condition of the Liver channel; LV 2 clears this fire directly at the channel level. Combine with LV 3 (Source point) to address both the fire (LV 2) and the stagnation that created it (LV 3). Think of it as: LV 3 loosens the blocked Qi, LV 2 clears the heat that resulted.行间是荥穴——「荥主身热」。肝火失眠是肝经实热病证；行间直接在经络层面清泻这把火。配太冲（原穴）同时处理火（行间）和产生火的郁滞（太冲）。类比：太冲松开堵住的气机，行间清除由此产生的热。
Technique操作
Oblique 0.5–0.8 cun. Reducing. Pair with LV 3. Bilateral.斜刺0.5–0.8寸。泻法。配太冲。双侧取穴。
HT 8
Shaofu · Heart Spring point少府 · 心经荥穴
Clears Heart Fire — for mouth ulcers, agitation, dark urine (pattern ③)清心泻火——口疮、烦躁、尿赤（③型）
＋
Why this point为什么选它
HT 8 is the Spring point of the Heart channel — "Spring points govern heat." When Heart Fire is blazing (pattern ③), HT 7 alone calms the Shen but does not clear the Fire. HT 7 calms the smoke alarm; HT 8 puts out the fire. Both needed when Heart Fire is the primary pattern.少府是心经荥穴——「荥主身热」。心火亢盛时（③型），单用神门只能安神而不能清火。神门关掉烟雾警报，少府扑灭火源。心火亢盛为主证时两穴都需要。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun. Reducing. Bilateral.直刺0.3–0.5寸。泻法。双侧取穴。
Phlegm-Heat / Stomach Disharmony — Insufficient Descent痰热扰心 / 胃气不和——降不及
ST 40
Fenglong · Stomach Luo point丰隆 · 胃经络穴
Transforms Phlegm — primary Phlegm-clearing point; thick greasy coat is the indicator化痰要穴——全身化痰第一穴；厚腻苔是使用指征
＋
Why this point为什么选它
ST 40 is the Luo (Connecting) point of the Stomach channel, connecting to the Spleen. Phlegm is generated when the Spleen fails to transform Dampness. ST 40 activates both the Stomach (descending) and Spleen (transforming) simultaneously through its Luo connection — clears the root of Phlegm generation while helping descend Stomach Qi.丰隆是胃经络穴，与脾相连。脾失运化水湿则生痰。丰隆通过络脉连接同时激活胃（降浊）和脾（运化）——在清除痰的根源的同时帮助胃气下降。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Reducing. Combine with ST 36. Bilateral.直刺1–1.5寸。泻法。配足三里。双侧取穴。
Heart-Spleen Deficiency — Insufficient Ascent心脾两虚——升不及
BL 15 + BL 20
Xinshu + Pishu · Back-Shu points心俞 + 脾俞 · 背俞穴
Directly tonify Heart and Spleen — the most powerful combination for HT-SP Xu insomnia直接补心健脾——心脾两虚失眠最有力的组合
＋
Why this combination为什么选这个组合
Back-Shu points directly communicate with their organs. BL 15 tonifies the Heart directly — more powerful than channel points alone for genuine Heart Blood deficiency. BL 20 rebuilds the Spleen — the source of Blood generation. Together, they treat both components of Heart-Spleen Xu: BL 20 builds the factory (Spleen generates Blood); BL 15 nourishes the organ that needs the Blood (Heart).背俞穴直接与相应脏腑沟通。心俞直接补心——对真正的心血虚比单用经穴力量更强。脾俞重建脾——生血之源。合用同时处理心脾两虚的两个组成部分：脾俞建设工厂（脾生血）；心俞滋养需要血液的脏腑（心）。
Technique操作
Oblique 0.5–0.8 cun away from spine. Tonification + moxibustion. Bilateral.向脊柱外侧斜刺0.5–0.8寸。补法+艾灸。双侧取穴。
Heart-Kidney Disharmony / Heart-Gallbladder Xu — Entry-Exit Disruption心肾不交 / 心胆气虚——出入失常
KI 3
Taixi · Kidney Source point太溪 · 肾经原穴
Nourishes Kidney Yin — rebuilds the upward arm of the Water-Fire axis滋肾阴——重建水火轴的上行一臂
＋
Why this point为什么选它
In Heart-Kidney Disharmony, Kidney Water cannot ascend to cool the Heart, and Heart Fire cannot descend to warm the Kidneys — the Water-Fire entry-exit cycle is broken. KI 3 as Source point directly replenishes Kidney Yin/Water, rebuilding the ascending arm of the axis. Combined with HT 7 (calming Heart Fire) and SP 6 (nourishing Yin broadly), this trio addresses all three components of the broken axis.心肾不交时，肾水无法上升凉润心脏，心火无法下降温煦肾水——水火出入循环断裂。太溪作为原穴直接补充肾阴/肾水，重建轴的上行一臂。配神门（安神清心火）和三阴交（广泛滋阴），这三穴组合处理断裂轴的全部三个组成部分。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Tonification. Bilateral.直刺0.5–1寸。补法。双侧取穴。
GB 40
Qiuxu · Gallbladder Source point丘墟 · 胆经原穴
Tonifies Gallbladder Qi — restores the midnight Yin transition switch补胆气——恢复子时阴的转换启动
＋
Why this point为什么选它
The Gallbladder governs the initiation of the Yin transition at midnight. In HT-GB Qi Xu, this transition fails — the person lies awake exactly during the Gallbladder's peak hour. GB 40 as Source point directly supplements Gallbladder Qi, restoring its ability to initiate the sleep transition. This point addresses something unique: the Gallbladder's specific role as the "switch" that turns on sleep.胆主子时阴的转换启动。心胆气虚时这个转换失败——当事人恰好在胆经最旺时间躺着睡不着。丘墟作为原穴直接补充胆气，恢复其启动睡眠转换的能力。这个穴位处理的是独特的东西：胆作为启动睡眠「开关」的特定角色。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–0.8 cun. Tonification. Combine with HT 7 (tonification) for the Heart-Gallbladder pair. Bilateral.直刺0.5–0.8寸。补法。配神门（补法）处理心胆两虚。双侧取穴。
Each formula addresses the specific Qi dynamic causing the insomnia — not just generic Shen-calming. The logic is always: what is blocking Wei Qi from entering Yin, and how does this formula remove that block?每个方剂针对导致失眠的具体气机失常——不只是笼统安神。逻辑始终是：什么阻止了卫气入阴，这个方剂如何消除那个阻碍？
① Liver Fire① 肝郁化火型——升太过
Longdan Xiegan Tang龙胆泻肝汤
《Yi Fang Ji Jie》出处：《医方集解》
Irritability, cannot fall asleep, wakes 1–3am, red eyes, bitter taste, wiry rapid pulse, red tongue yellow coat烦躁，难入睡，1–3点醒，目赤，口苦，脉弦数，舌红苔黄
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Liver Fire is excess Yang surging upward, preventing Wei Qi from entering Yin. Formula drains Liver-Gallbladder Fire (Longdan cao, Huangqin, Zhizi), drains heat via urine (Zexie, Mutong, Cheqianzi), and nourishes Yin consumed by Fire (Shengdi, Danggui). The draining direction is downward — aligned with the descent the body needs to restore. Short course only (1–2 weeks) due to extreme cold nature. 肝火是实热阳气上冲，阻止卫气入阴。方剂泻肝胆之火（龙胆草、黄芩、栀子），从小便排出热邪（泽泻、木通、车前子），滋补火热耗伤的阴分（生地、当归）。泻的方向向下——与身体需要恢复的降的方向一致。仅短期使用（1–2周），极寒性质不适合长期。
Drain LV-GB Fire龙胆草（泻肝胆实火） Clear heat黄芩（清热） Clear fire栀子（清火） Drain via urine泽泻（利水泻热） Nourish Yin生地（养阴） Nourish Blood当归（养血） Disperse LV Qi柴胡（疏肝）
② Phlegm-Heat ⑦ Stomach Disharmony② 痰热扰心 / ⑦ 胃气不和型——降不及
Wendan Tang温胆汤
《San Yin Ji Yi Bing Zheng Fang Lun》出处：《三因极一病证方论》
Cannot fall asleep, chest oppression, nausea, thick greasy tongue coat, slippery pulse难入睡，胸闷，恶心，苔黄厚腻，脉滑
Formula logic:方解逻辑：The name "Warm the Gallbladder" misleads — this formula actually clears Phlegm-Heat and harmonizes Stomach-Gallbladder. Banxia and Chenpi dry Dampness and descend Stomach Qi (addressing); Zhuru clears Phlegm-Heat; Fuling calms Shen and transforms Dampness; Zhishi breaks Middle Jiao Qi stagnation. Mechanism: once Stomach Qi descends properly, Phlegm-Heat stops rising to disturb the Heart. 「温胆」名称有误导性——实际上清化痰热、和胃利胆。半夏和陈皮燥湿降胃气（处理降不及）；竹茹清化痰热；茯苓宁心化湿；枳实破中焦气滞。机制：胃气一旦正常下降，痰热就停止上扰心神。
Descend Stomach, dry Damp半夏（降胃燥湿） Move Qi, dry Damp陈皮（理气燥湿） Clear Phlegm-Heat竹茹（清化痰热） Calm Shen, transform Damp茯苓（宁心化湿） Break Qi stagnation枳实（破气消积） Harmonize甘草（调和）
③ Heart Fire Blazing — +③ 心火亢盛型——升太过+出入失常
Huanglian Ejiao Tang黄连阿胶汤
《Shang Han Lun》 Zhang Zhongjing · Shaoyin pattern出处：《伤寒论》张仲景 · 少阴病
Extreme restlessness, cannot sleep, palpitations, five-centre heat, night sweats — Heart Fire + Kidney Yin deficiency极度烦躁，不能入睡，心悸，五心烦热，盗汗——心火+肾阴虚
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Original text: "Shaoyin disease, patient feels dysphoric and cannot sleep — Huanglian Ejiao Tang governs." Huanglian and Huangqin clear Heart Fire (excess ascending Yang); Ejiao and Baishao nourish Kidney Yin and Heart Blood; Jizihuang (egg yolk) nourishes Yin and anchors the Shen. Simultaneously clears excess and tonifies deficiency — perfectly suited for the HT Fire + KD Yin Xu pattern that develops in chronic insomnia. 原文：「少阴病，心中烦，不得卧，黄连阿胶汤主之」。黄连、黄芩清心火（实热上亢之阳）；阿胶、白芍滋肾阴养心血；鸡子黄滋阴潜阳固神。同时清实热和补虚损——完美适合慢性失眠发展而来的心火+肾阴虚混合证型。
Clear Heart Fire黄连（清心火） Clear heat黄芩（清热） Nourish Yin-Blood阿胶（滋阴养血） Nourish Blood, anchor Yin白芍（养血敛阴） Nourish Yin, anchor Shen鸡子黄（滋阴潜阳）
④ Heart-Spleen Deficiency④ 心脾两虚型——升不及
Guipi Tang归脾汤
《Ji Sheng Fang》 Yan Yonghe出处：《济生方》严用和
Wakes repeatedly, fatigue, poor appetite, palpitations, poor memory, pale complexion, thin weak pulse反复易醒，疲乏，食欲不振，心悸，健忘，面色苍白，脉细弱
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Spleen is the source of Blood; Heart is the organ Blood nourishes. When Spleen is weak (from overthinking, overwork), Blood production fails → Heart undernourished → Shen has no anchor. Guipi Tang tonifies Spleen Qi (Huangqi, Renshen, Baizhu, Fuling) and nourishes Heart Blood (Danggui, Longyanrou) simultaneously — building both the factory (Spleen) and its product (Blood). This is the formula for insomnia that is not agitation but exhaustion — the person is not disturbed, just depleted. 脾是生血之源；心是血液滋养的脏腑。脾虚（因思虑过度、劳倦）时血液生产失败→心失滋养→神明无处安守。归脾汤同时补脾气（黄芪、人参、白术、茯苓）和养心血（当归、龙眼肉）——同时建设工厂（脾）和其产品（血）。这是失眠不是烦躁而是耗竭的方剂——当事人不是被扰动，而是被耗尽。
Tonify SP Qi黄芪（补脾气） Tonify Qi人参（补气） Strengthen SP白术（健脾） Nourish Blood当归（养血） Nourish HT Blood龙眼肉（养心血） Calm Shen酸枣仁（安神） Open orifices, calm Shen远志（开窍宁神） Calm Shen, SP茯苓（宁心健脾）
Suanzaoren酸枣仁
The premier herb for insomnia — nourishes Liver Blood, calms the Shen失眠第一药——养肝血、安心神
Calm Shen · Nourish Blood · Liver Heart channels · Sour sweet, neutral安神药 · 养血 · 入肝心经 · 酸甘平
＋
Why it works for insomnia为什么对失眠有效
Suanzaoren nourishes Liver Blood — the Liver stores Blood at night, and this Blood anchors the Shen. When Liver Blood is insufficient (the most common deficiency in insomnia), the Shen cannot settle during sleep. Suanzaoren replenishes this anchor. Its sour flavor also "gathers" and holds the Shen in place. It does not sedate by suppressing the nervous system — it nourishes the substance the Shen needs to rest. Best decocted first (30 minutes before other herbs).酸枣仁直接养肝血——肝夜藏血，这个血是固守心神的物质基础。肝血不足（失眠中最常见虚损）时，心神在睡眠中无法安定。酸枣仁补充这个锚。其酸味还有收敛性质，「聚拢」并固守心神。它不是通过抑制神经系统来镇静——而是滋养心神安息所需的物质。最好先煎（比其他药先30分钟）。
Dosage剂量
15–30g for insomnia. Higher than textbook doses — clinical experience shows 15g minimum for reliable effect. Crush before decocting to improve extraction.治疗失眠15–30g。高于教材典型剂量——临床经验显示最少15g才有可靠效果。煎前捣碎提高提取率。
⑤ Heart-Kidney Disharmony⑤ 心肾不交型——出入失常
Jiao Tai Wan + Suanzaoren Tang交泰丸合酸枣仁汤
Jiao Tai Wan: 《Han Shi Yi Tong》; Suanzaoren Tang: 《Jin Gui Yao Lue》交泰丸：《韩氏医通》；酸枣仁汤：《金匮要略》
Early waking 3–5am, five-centre heat, night sweats, tinnitus, low back soreness, red tongue, thin rapid pulse早醒3–5点，五心烦热，盗汗，耳鸣，腰膝酸软，舌红，脉细数
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Jiao Tai Wan (Huanglian + Rougui): Huanglian (bitter cold) sends Heart Fire downward; Rougui (acrid warm) draws Kidney Yang upward — two herbs working in opposite directions to restore the Water-Fire axis. Suanzaoren Tang adds Liver Blood nourishment and Heat-clearing for the chronic depleted presentation. Together: restore the axis AND nourish the Yin and Blood that have been consumed. 交泰丸（黄连+肉桂）：黄连（苦寒）引心火下降；肉桂（辛温）引肾阳上升——两味药以相反方向运作恢复水火轴。酸枣仁汤增加肝血滋养和清热以应对慢性耗竭表现。合用：恢复轴的运转+滋养耗竭的阴血。
Send HT Fire down黄连（引心火下降） Draw KD Yang up肉桂（引肾阳上升） Nourish LV Blood, calm Shen酸枣仁（养肝血安神） Clear deficiency Heat知母（清虚热） Move Blood川芎（活血） Calm Shen茯苓（宁心）
⑥ Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu⑥ 心胆气虚型——出入失常
Anshen Dingzhi Wan + Wendan Tang安神定志丸合温胆汤
Anshen Dingzhi Wan: 《Yi Xue Xin Wu》安神定志丸：《医学心悟》
Cannot fall asleep until midnight, easily startled, fearful dreams, timidity, palpitations from small sounds子夜前不能入睡，易惊醒，噩梦，胆怯，细小声音引起心悸
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Anshen Dingzhi Wan tonifies Heart Qi and calms the Shen (Renshen, Fuling, Longchi, Shichangpu, Yuanzhi). Wendan Tang clears Phlegm obstructing Gallbladder function. The Gallbladder governs decision and courage — when Gallbladder Qi is deficient, the mind cannot maintain stability during the vulnerable Yin sleep state. This combination tonifies Heart and Gallbladder while clearing Phlegm obstruction that commonly accompanies Gallbladder dysfunction. 安神定志丸补心气安心神（人参、茯苓、龙齿、石菖蒲、远志）。温胆汤清化阻碍胆腑功能的痰邪。胆主决断勇气——胆气虚时心神在睡眠阴分状态中无法维持稳定。这个组合同时补心胆之气，同时清化常伴随胆功能障碍的痰邪。
Tonify HT-GB Qi人参（补心胆之气） Calm Shen, settle fright龙齿（镇惊安神） Open orifices石菖蒲（开窍宁神） Calm Shen远志（宁心） Descend, dry Damp半夏（降逆燥湿） Clear GB Phlegm-Heat竹茹（清胆热化痰）
Two cases, each demonstrating a different reasoning path. The goal is not to memorize these cases but to practice the same reasoning process with every patient.两个案例，展示不同推理路径。目的不是记住案例，而是对每个病人练习同样的推理过程。
Case 1 · Phlegm-Heat Pattern案例一 · 痰热扰心型
Presentation主诉
Male, 45. Cannot fall asleep for 3 months. Racing mind when in bed. Started a new business — works late, eats dinner at 9–10pm, drinks wine to "wind down." Chest feels stuffy at night. Tongue: red, thick yellow greasy coat. Pulse: slippery, slightly rapid. 男性，45岁。近3个月难以入睡。躺在床上思维急速。最近创业——工作到很晚，晚上9–10点吃晚饭，喝酒来「放松」。夜间胸闷。舌红，苔黄厚腻。脉滑略数。
↓ Step 1: Most important single finding?第一步：最重要的单一发现？
Key Finding Analysis关键发现分析
Thick yellow greasy coat + racing mind + chest stuffiness after late eating + slippery rapid pulse → Phlegm-Heat.

Mechanism: late heavy meals + alcohol → Spleen-Stomach cannot transform → Phlegm-Dampness accumulates → transforms to Heat → Phlegm-Heat rises at night to disturb Heart-Shen. The racing mind is not psychological anxiety — it is Phlegm-Heat agitating the Shen. Greasy coat is the definitive sign. 苔黄厚腻+思维急速+晚食后胸闷+脉滑数→痰热。

机制：晚食重食+酒→脾胃无法运化→痰湿积聚→化热→痰热夜间上扰心神。思维急速不是心理焦虑——是痰热扰动心神。腻苔是决定性体征。
↓ Step 2: Qi dynamic direction第二步：气机方向
Qi Dynamic气机分析
— Stomach Qi rebellion carrying Phlegm-Heat upward. Late eating overloads the Stomach, Qi cannot descend, rises with accumulated Phlegm-Heat. This is in its Phlegm-Heat variant. 降不及——胃气上逆携带痰热上行。晚食使胃超载，气机无法下降，反而携积聚的痰热上行。这是「胃不和则卧不安」的痰热变型。
↓ Step 3: Treatment第三步：治疗
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Lifestyle first (without this, treatment has limited effect): No eating after 7pm. Reduce alcohol significantly — alcohol directly worsens Phlegm-Heat.

Acupuncture: HT 7 reducing · PC 6 even · ST 40 reducing · ST 36 reducing · GV 20 reducing

Formula: Wendan Tang — clear Phlegm-Heat, harmonize Stomach-Gallbladder, restore descent 生活方式优先（不改，治疗效果有限）：晚7点后不进食。明显减少饮酒——酒直接加重痰热。

针灸：HT 7神门（泻）· PC 6内关（平）· ST 40丰隆（泻）· ST 36足三里（泻）· GV 20百会（泻）

方药：温胆汤——清化痰热，和胃利胆，恢复下降
↓ Step 4: Outcome validation第四步：疗效验证
What to Observe观察指标
If diagnosis is correct, first sign of improvement: reduced chest stuffiness — Stomach Qi beginning to descend. Sleep improvement follows 1–2 weeks later as Phlegm-Heat clears. If chest stuffiness clears but sleep does not improve → look for secondary Liver Qi stagnation overlay masked by the Phlegm-Heat presentation. 如果诊断正确，第一个改善信号：胸闷减轻——胃气开始下降。睡眠在1–2周后随痰热消退而改善。如果胸闷消退但睡眠无改善→寻找被痰热表现掩盖的次要肝气郁滞成分。
Case 2 · Heart-Spleen Deficiency (Chronic Depletion)案例二 · 心脾两虚型（慢性耗竭）
Presentation主诉
Female, 38. Insomnia for 2 years following extreme work stress and caring for a sick parent. Stress is now gone, but sleep has not returned. Falls asleep but wakes at 2–3am and cannot return. Vivid dreams all night. Fatigue, poor memory, poor appetite. Pale complexion. Tongue: pale, thin white coat. Pulse: thin, weak at cun-guan. 女性，38岁。两年前经历极度工作压力和照顾病患父母后出现失眠。现在压力已消除，但睡眠未恢复。能入睡但凌晨2–3点醒来无法再睡。整夜多梦。疲乏，记忆力差，食欲不振。面色苍白。舌淡，苔薄白。脉细弱，寸关尤甚。
↓ Step 1: Critical observation第一步：关键观察
The Key Diagnostic Clue最关键的诊断线索
Stress is gone but sleep has not returned. This single observation rules out the stress as the current cause. The pathophysiology has shifted: prolonged stress and overwork depleted Heart Blood and Spleen Qi. The original "excess" trigger is gone, but it left behind a depleted foundation.

This immediately rules out aggressive reducing treatment — there is nothing to reduce. Treatment must be entirely tonifying. 压力已消除但睡眠仍差。这个单一观察排除了压力作为当前病因。病理生理已经转移：长期压力和劳倦耗竭了心血和脾气。原来的「实证」诱因已消失，但留下了耗竭的基础。

这立即排除了激进的泻法——没有实邪可泻。治疗必须完全以补为主。
↓ Step 2: Pattern confirmation第二步：证型确认
Pattern Analysis证型分析
Heart-Spleen Deficiency:
Pale tongue + thin weak pulse = Blood deficiency confirmed
Wakes 2–3am = Liver Blood deficiency (Liver Qi begins ascending at this time; insufficient Blood to contain the rising Yang)
Fatigue + poor appetite = Spleen Qi deficiency confirmed
Poor memory + vivid dreams = Heart Blood insufficient to anchor Shen

Add Suanzaoren 30g + Baishao 15g to Guipi Tang base to specifically nourish Liver Blood and address the 2–3am waking. 心脾两虚（升不及）：
舌淡+脉细弱=血虚确认
凌晨2–3点醒=肝血虚（此时肝气开始升发；血不足以涵阳）
疲乏+食欲不振=脾气虚确认
记忆力差+多梦=心血不足以养神确认

在归脾汤基础上加酸枣仁30g+白芍15g，专门养肝血，针对2–3点醒。
↓ Step 3: Treatment + realistic expectations第三步：治疗+现实预期
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture: HT 7 tonification · PC 6 tonification · SP 6 tonification · BL 15 + BL 20 tonification + moxa · GV 20 moxa · LV 3 tonification (for 2–3am waking)

Formula: Guipi Tang + Suanzaoren 30g + Baishao 15g

Realistic expectations: 2 years of depletion will not resolve in 2 weeks. Minimum 6–8 weeks. Improvement in energy and memory will come before sleep improvement — these signs confirm the foundation is being rebuilt. Prepare the patient for this sequence. 针灸：HT 7神门（补）· PC 6内关（补）· SP 6三阴交（补）· BL 15心俞+BL 20脾俞（补+灸）· GV 20百会（灸）· LV 3太冲（补，针对2–3点醒）

方药：归脾汤+酸枣仁30g+白芍15g

现实预期：两年的耗竭不会在两周内解决。最短6–8周。精力和记忆力的改善会在睡眠改善之前出现——这些信号确认基础正在重建。提前告知患者这个顺序。
Case 3 (Template · to be added)案例三（模板·待添加）
Format: Presentation → Key finding → Qi dynamic → Treatment → Outcome validation. Every step explains "why this judgment." 格式：主诉→关键发现→气机分析→治疗方案→疗效验证。每步说明「为什么这样判断」。
Gynecology · Qi Dynamic妇科病证 · 气机框架
Menopausal Syndrome更年期综合征
The Kidney Yin and Yang transition at Tiangui exhaustion — whole-body Qi dynamic destabilised as the Chong and Ren vessels begin their decline天癸竭时肾阴阳转变——冲任二脉开始衰退，全身气机失调
Theoretical Foundation: Tiangui and the 7-Year Cycle理论基础：天癸与七年周期
The Suwen establishes that the female life cycle is governed by 7-year periods. At 7x7 = 49 years, Tiangui (— the Kidney-derived essence that activates the reproductive axis) becomes exhausted. The Chong vessel empties; the Ren vessel weakens; menstruation ceases.

This is a natural physiological transition — not a disease. But the transition becomes turbulent when the Kidney is relatively depleted before Tiangui exhaustion reaches its natural endpoint:

Kidney Yin declines → insufficient Yin to anchor Ministerial Fire in the lower jiao → Fire rises upward → hot flushes, night sweats, irritability, insomnia, palpitations
Kidney Yang weakens → warming of the middle and lower jiao diminishes → cold symptoms, fatigue, water metabolism disruption, oedema
Both Yin and Yang fluctuate → symptoms oscillate between heat and cold (the most clinically challenging pattern)

(Liver-Kidney share Yin root): As Kidney Yin declines, it takes Liver Yin down with it → Liver Yang rises unchecked AND Liver Qi stagnates → emotional storm. This explains why menopausal emotional instability is physiological, not psychological.

Key principle: Treatment does not reverse the natural decline — it smooths the transition. 《素问·上古天真论》确立女性生命周期以7年为节段。7×7=49岁时，天癸（肾所化、激活生殖轴的精微物质）耗竭。冲脉空虚；任脉衰弱；月经停止。

这是自然的生理性转变——不是疾病。但当天癸耗竭在到达自然终点前肾已相对虚竭时，转变可能动荡不安：

肾阴衰减→阴不足以锚固相火于下焦→相火上浮→烘热、盗汗、烦躁、失眠、心悸
肾阳衰弱→中下焦温煦减退→寒象、疲乏、水液代谢失调、水肿
阴阳俱波动→症状在热与寒之间摇摆（临床最具挑战性的证型）

乙癸同源（肝肾共享阴液之根）：随肾阴衰减，同时带动肝阴下降→肝阳上亢同时肝气郁滞→情志风暴。这解释了为何更年期情绪不稳是生理性的，而非心理性的。

关键原则：治疗不能逆转自然衰减——而是平滑这一过渡。
Symptom Cluster Mapping症状群归类
Heat symptoms → Kidney Yin Xu component热象症状→肾阴虚成分
Hot flushes: Kidney Yin can no longer anchor Ministerial Fire in the lower jiao → Fire rises upward in waves → heat in face, neck, chest → sweating as the body attempts to discharge excess heat. The waves are episodic because the Ministerial Fire is unstable — it rises, is partially discharged, then builds again.

Night sweats: Night is Yin time; Yang should descend. When Yin is insufficient, Yang cannot be contained during sleep → leaks outward as sweat. HT6 (xi-cleft of Heart) is the specific point for night sweats.

Irritability/anxiety/mood instability: — Kidney Yin decline takes Liver Yin down too → Liver Yang rises → emotional instability without clear external trigger. This is pathophysiological, not personality.

Insomnia, palpitations: Heart Blood relies on Kidney Yin for its cooling foundation. When Kidney Yin is insufficient, Heart Yang is unanchored → mind cannot rest. 阵发性烘热：肾阴不能再锚固相火于下焦→相火阵发性上浮→面部、颈部、胸部热→机体试图排出多余热量而出汗。热浪呈阵发性因相火不稳定——上浮，部分排出，然后再次积聚。

盗汗：夜间为阴时；阳气应下行。阴液不足时，阳气睡眠中不能被涵纳→外泄为汗。HT6阴郄（心之郄穴）是盗汗的特效穴。

烦躁/焦虑/情绪不稳：乙癸同源——肾阴衰减同时带动肝阴下降→肝阳上亢→无明确外部诱因的情绪不稳。这是病理生理性的，不是人格问题。

失眠、心悸：心血依赖肾阴为其冷却基础。肾阴不足时，心阳失于锚固→心神不能安宁。
Cold symptoms → Kidney Yang Xu component寒象症状→肾阳虚成分
Cold intolerance, cold limbs, oedema: Kidney Yang is the warming root of the whole body. As it declines, the middle jiao loses warmth → Spleen function weakens → water metabolism fails → oedema, weight gain, fatigue. Many perimenopausal women have both Yin and Yang deficiency simultaneously: they have hot flushes AND cold feet; night sweats AND daytime fatigue.

Low back soreness, joint pain, osteoporosis risk: Kidney governs the bones and the lower back. As Kidney Jing declines, the bones lose their nourishment. This is the direct mechanism linking Kidney decline to menopausal osteoporosis. 畏寒、四肢冷、水肿：肾阳为全身温煦之根。随其衰减，中焦失温→脾功能衰弱→水液代谢失常→水肿、体重增加、疲乏。许多围更年期女性同时有阴阳两虚：既有烘热又有足冷；既有盗汗又有日间疲乏。

腰酸、关节痛、骨质疏松风险：肾主骨、主腰（腰为肾之府）。随肾精衰减，骨骼失养。这是将肾衰减与更年期骨质疏松联系起来的直接机理。
Kidney Yin Deficiency (most common)肾阴虚证（最常见）
Yin Deficiency阴虚
Tiangui exhaustion → Yin depleted → Yang rises unchecked → heat, instability, dryness throughout天癸耗竭→阴液虚竭→阳气上浮无制→热象、不稳定、干燥
Key symptoms主要症状Hot flushes; night sweats; irritability; insomnia; palpitations; dry mouth/throat; dizziness; tinnitus; low back soreness; vaginal dryness; red tongue without coat (or thin coat); thready-rapid pulse烘热；盗汗；烦躁；失眠；心悸；口干咽干；头晕；耳鸣；腰酸；阴道干涩；舌红无苔（或薄苔）；脉细数
Qi dynamic气机→: Kidney Yin is the anchor that keeps Ministerial Fire in the lower jiao. As Yin declines, the anchoring force diminishes → Fire rises upward → heat in upper body, face, Heart. The body's upper jiao becomes relatively Yang-excess (hot, active, insomniac) while the lower jiao becomes Yin-deficient (dry, empty). The Yin-deficiency heat is episodic with an emptiness sensation — not constant thirst or constipation as in true excess Heat.入不足→升太过：肾阴是将相火锚固于下焦的锚固力。随阴液衰减，锚固之力减弱→相火上浮（升太过）→上体、面部、心脏热象。上焦呈相对阳亢（热、活跃、失眠），而下焦阴虚（干燥、空虚）。阴虚发热呈阵发性伴空虚感——不像实热那样持续口渴或便秘。
Kidney Yang Deficiency肾阳虚证
Yang Deficiency阳虚
Kidney Yang fails → warming of whole body diminishes → cold, water retention, fatigue, depression肾阳衰竭→全身温煦减退→寒象、水液潴留、疲乏、抑郁
Key symptoms主要症状Cold intolerance; cold limbs; fatigue; depression; oedema; loose stools; frequent urination; low back soreness; pale or puffy face; pale tongue, white wet coat; deep-slow-weak pulse畏寒；四肢冷；疲乏；抑郁；水肿；便溏；尿频；腰酸；面色苍白或浮肿；舌淡苔白润；脉沉迟弱
Qi dynamic气机(Yang warming root lost): Kidney Yang is the "fire of the gate of life" — the root of all Yang warming in the body. As it declines with Tiangui exhaustion, the entire body's warming function diminishes. The middle jiao cools → Spleen loses its Yang support → water metabolism fails → oedema, loose stools. Less common than Yin deficiency at menopause, but often mixed with it.入不足（阳性温煦之根丧失）：肾阳为"命门之火"——全身阳性温煦之根。随天癸耗竭而衰减，全身温煦功能下降。中焦变冷→脾失阳气支持→水液代谢失常→水肿、便溏。在更年期比阴虚证型少见，但常混合出现。
Kidney Yin-Yang Dual Deficiency肾阴阳两虚证
Dual Deficiency阴阳两虚
Both Yin and Yang declining simultaneously → oscillating hot-cold symptoms, emotional volatility, exhaustion阴阳同时衰减→热寒症状交替，情绪波动，精疲力竭
Key symptoms主要症状Hot flushes AND cold limbs simultaneously; night sweats AND morning fatigue; irritability AND depression (within same day); low back soreness; insomnia; pale-dry tongue; pulse alternates between thready-rapid (Yin Xu phase) and deep-weak (Yang Xu phase)烘热同时四肢冷；盗汗同时晨间疲乏；烦躁同时抑郁（同一天内）；腰酸；失眠；舌淡干；脉在细数（阴虚期）与沉弱（阳虚期）之间交替
Qi dynamic气机(both roots failing —): Yin and Yang are interdependent — when Yin is severely depleted, Yang loses its nourishment source and begins to fail as well. The patient experiences both the rising fire of Yin deficiency AND the cold exhaustion of Yang deficiency simultaneously. Treatment must nourish Yin without further damaging Yang, and warm Yang without further consuming Yin. was specifically designed for this challenge.入不足（两个根本均衰失——阴损及阳）：阴阳相互依存——阴严重虚竭时，阳失去滋养来源亦开始衰竭。患者同时体验阴虚的上浮之火和阳虚的寒冷衰竭。治疗必须滋阴而不进一步损阳，温阳而不进一步耗阴。二仙汤专为此挑战而设计。
Liver Qi Stagnation + Kidney Yin Xu (emotional-dominant)肝郁肾阴虚证（情志为主）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Kidney Yin declines → Liver loses its Yin nourishment → Liver Qi stagnates and Yang rises → emotional storm肾阴衰减→肝失阴液滋养→肝气郁滞且肝阳上亢→情志风暴
Key symptoms主要症状Prominent emotional instability: mood swings, crying without reason, anger, anxiety; hot flushes; insomnia; breast distension; sighing; wiry-thready-rapid pulse; red tongue突出的情绪不稳定：情绪波动、无故哭泣、愤怒、焦虑；烘热；失眠；乳胀；叹息；脉弦细数；舌红
Qi dynamic气机(Liver-Kidney shared Yin root): In five phase theory, Liver and Kidney share the same Yin essence. When Kidney Yin declines at menopause, it cannot nourish Liver Yin → the Liver loses its Yin foundation → Liver Yang rises unchecked while Liver Qi stagnates. The emotional instability of perimenopause is often this dual failure: Yin deficiency as the root + Liver Qi stagnation as the branch.乙癸同源（肝肾共享阴液之根）：在五行理论中，肝（乙木）与肾（癸水）共享阴精（乙癸同源）。更年期肾阴衰减，不能濡养肝阴→肝失阴液根基→肝阳上亢同时肝气郁滞。围更年期情绪不稳往往是这一双重失常：阴虚为本（入不足）+肝气郁滞为标（降不稳）。
Core Points — All Patterns基础穴位——各证型通用
KI3 太溪
Source point of Kidney — the single most direct point to nourish Kidney Yin and Jing. In all menopausal patterns, this is the root point addressing the Kidney foundation. Tonifying method always; add moxa for Yang deficiency component.肾之原穴——直接滋养肾阴和肾精的最重要单一穴位。所有更年期证型中，这是处理肾之根基的根本穴位。始终用补法；阳虚成分加灸。
SP6 三阴交
Liver + Spleen + Kidney Yin meeting — addresses all three Yin organs simultaneously. Particularly important in menopause because the Liver-Kidney Yin axis is the primary imbalance. Also regulates the emotional axis through the Liver component.肝脾肾三阴之会——同时处理所有三个阴脏。在更年期尤为重要，因肝肾阴轴是主要失衡所在。同时通过肝的成分调节情志轴。
CV4 关元
Regulates Chong/Ren and nourishes the lower jiao foundation. Moxa on CV4 is especially valuable for Yang deficiency component — directly warms the source of Kidney Yang. For Yin deficiency patterns: needle only (no moxa), or moxa lightly.调节冲任，濡养下焦根基。CV4艾灸对阳虚成分尤为宝贵——直接温暖肾阳之源。阴虚证型：仅针刺（禁灸），或轻灸。
HT6 阴郄
Xi-cleft of Heart — the specific point for night sweats. When Kidney Yin is insufficient and Heart Yang is unanchored, the sweating mechanism is driven by Heart deficiency-heat. HT6 calms Heart Shen, clears deficiency heat from the Heart level, and stops sweating. Include whenever night sweats are present.心之郄穴——盗汗的特效穴。肾阴不足、心阳失锚时，出汗机制由心之虚热驱动。HT6安心神，清心的虚热，止汗。凡有盗汗均应加用。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Kidney Yin Xu (hot flushes, night sweats dominant)肾阴虚（烘热、盗汗为主）Add: KI6 (nourishes Kidney Yin, opens Yin Qiao Mai — the Yin vessel), BL23 , KI2 (clears Kidney deficiency Heat from the source), GV14 (clearing Heat — reducing method). No moxa on heat-clearing points.加：KI6照海（滋肾阴，通阴跷脉——阴脉）、BL23肾俞、KI2然谷（从根源清肾之虚热）、GV14大椎（清热——泻法）。热象穴位禁灸。
Kidney Yang Xu (cold, fatigue, oedema dominant)肾阳虚（怕冷、疲乏、水肿为主）Add: GV4 (heavy moxa — warms the Kidney Yang gate of life), BL23 (moxa), ST36 (build Spleen Yang to support water metabolism), SP9 (resolve Damp/oedema). Reinforcing + moxa throughout.加：GV4命门（重灸——温暖肾阳之命门之火）、BL23肾俞（灸）、ST36（补脾阳以支持水液代谢）、SP9阴陵泉（化湿/消肿）。全程补法+艾灸。
Liver Qi stagnation + emotional instability肝郁+情绪不稳定Add: LV3 (smooth Liver Qi), PC6 (calm the Heart-Liver emotional axis — the bridge between the Liver's Qi regulation and the Heart's Shen), GV20 (calms Shen — ascending point where Yang meets and is regulated). Neutral-to-reducing for LV3; always tonifying for KI3.加：LV3太冲（疏肝气）、PC6内关（平静心肝情志轴——肝之气机调节与心之神的桥梁）、GV20百会（安神——阳气汇聚调节的上升穴位）。LV3平补平泻至泻法；KI3始终用补法。
Insomnia + palpitations prominent失眠+心悸突出Add: HT7 (source of Heart — calms Shen directly at the Heart level), PC7 (calms Heart-Pericardium axis), BL15 (back-shu of Heart — reaches the Heart organ from the back). Neutral method.加：HT7神门（心之原穴——直接在心之层面安神）、PC7大陵（平静心-心包轴）、BL15心俞（心之背俞穴——从背部直达心脏）。平补平泻法。
Liu Wei Di Huang Wan六味地黄丸
Kidney Yin Xu — hot flushes, night sweats, dizziness, tinnitus, dry mouth, red tongue no coat, thready-rapid pulse肾阴虚——烘热、盗汗、头晕、耳鸣、口干、舌红无苔、脉细数
Mechanism: The foundational Kidney Yin formula. Three tonics: nourishes Kidney Jing directly, astringes Kidney Yin to prevent leakage, tonifies Spleen and Kidney simultaneously. Three drains: drains Dampness to prevent stagnation, drains Damp and calms Shen, clears the deficiency Heat generated by Yin Xu. The three drains prevent the tonics from causing stagnation.

Key variations: Zhi Bai Di Huang Wan adds +— for pronounced night sweats, irritability (more heat-clearing power). Qi Ju Di Huang Wan adds +— for Liver-Kidney Yin Xu with eye symptoms and headache. 机理：肾阴之基础方。三补：熟地黄直接滋养肾精，山茱萸收涩肾阴防止外泄，山药同时补脾肾。三泻：泽泻渗利湿邪以防停滞，茯苓渗湿安神，丹皮清阴虚所生之虚热。三泻防止补药造成停滞。

关键变方：知柏地黄丸加知母+黄柏——用于明显盗汗、烦躁（增强清热能力）。杞菊地黄丸加枸杞+菊花——用于肝肾阴虚伴眼部症状和头痛。
Er Xian Tang二仙汤
Kidney Yin-Yang dual deficiency — hot flushes AND cold limbs; night sweats AND morning fatigue; mood instability; mixed hot-cold presentation肾阴阳两虚——烘热同时四肢冷；盗汗同时晨间疲乏；情绪不稳；寒热混杂表现
Mechanism: A modern formula developed specifically for menopausal syndrome (Shanghai Longhua Hospital, 1950s). +warm and tonify Kidney Yang (address cold component); nourishes Blood and regulates Liver; tonifies Yang while being moist (not drying — important to avoid damaging Yin); +clear the deficiency Heat of Yin Xu while also descending the rising Fire. The formula simultaneously warms Yang and clears deficiency heat — designed exactly for the mixed presentation where standard formulas would be either too hot or too cold.机理：专为更年期综合征开发的现代方（上海龙华医院，20世纪50年代）。仙茅+淫羊藿温补肾阳（处理寒象成分）；当归养血调肝；巴戟天补阳而质润（不燥——重要，以避免损伤阴液）；知母+黄柏清阴虚之虚热并降浮越之火。本方同时温阳和清虚热——专为阴阳两虚的混合表现而设计，标准方剂在此情境中要么过热要么过寒。
Jia Wei Xiao Yao San加味逍遥散
Liver Qi stagnation + Yin Xu heat — emotional instability dominant; hot flushes; irritability; insomnia; breast distension; wiry-thready-rapid pulse肝郁+阴虚内热——情绪不稳定为主；烘热；烦躁；失眠；乳胀；脉弦细数
Mechanism: base sooths Liver Qi, nourishes Liver Blood (+), and strengthens Spleen (+). Then clears Blood Heat and clears Heart-Liver Fire (particularly indicated for irritability and insomnia driven by Fire). Addresses both the Liver Qi stagnation branch (the presenting emotional storm) and the Heat/Yin Xu root. Most useful when emotional instability is more prominent than classical hot flushes.机理：逍遥散基础疏肝气（柴胡）、养肝血（当归+白芍）、健脾（白术+茯苓）。加丹皮清血热，加栀子清心肝之火（尤适于火邪驱动的烦躁和失眠）。同时处理肝气郁滞之标（表现性情志风暴）和热/阴虚之本。当情绪不稳定比经典烘热更突出时最为适用。
Case 1 — Classic Kidney Yin Xu Menopause病案一——典型肾阴虚更年期综合征
Patient: 51F, accountant. Periods becoming irregular over past 2 years; last period 8 months ago. Hot flushes 8-12 times/day, especially at night. Night sweats soaking clothes. Sleep severely disrupted. Irritability and tearfulness. Dry mouth and throat especially at night. Low back soreness. Vaginal dryness. Red tongue, no coat. Thready-rapid pulse, especially at chi position.患者：女，51岁，会计师。近2年月经开始不规律；8个月前末次月经。每日烘热8–12次，夜间尤甚。盗汗浸透衣物。睡眠严重障碍。易怒和爱哭。口干咽干尤以夜间为甚。腰酸。阴道干涩。舌红无苔。脉细数，尺位尤甚。
Reasoning chain: Age 51 = physiological Tiangui exhaustion time (7x7=49 plus or minus 2 years). Kidney Yin is the root sustainer of all Yang-anchoring in the body. As Yin declines: Ministerial Fire loses its anchor in the lower jiao → rises → hot flushes, sweating. Night is Yin time → insufficient Yin during Yin time = maximal instability → worst at night. Dry mouth and vaginal dryness = insufficient Yin to moisten. Irritability = Liver Yin also depleted → Liver Yang rises. Chi pulse (Kidney position) thready-rapid = classic Kidney Yin Xu pulse.

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Nourish Kidney Yin, clear deficiency Heat, calm Shen
Acupuncture: KI3 (reinforcing), SP6, CV4 (no moxa), HT6 (night sweats), KI6, BL23, GV14 (reducing, for heat), HT7
Herbal: Zhi Bai Di Huang Wan
Lifestyle: Reduce spicy, alcohol, coffee; cooling foods; gentle exercise; sleep hygiene 推理链：51岁=生理性天癸耗竭时间（7×7=49±2年）。肾阴是全身阳气锚固的根本维持者。随阴液衰减：相火失去在下焦的锚固→上浮→烘热、出汗。夜间为阴时→阴时阴液不足=最大不稳定→夜间最重。口干、阴道干涩=阴液不足以濡润。烦躁=肝阴（乙癸同源）亦虚竭→肝阳上亢。尺脉（肾位）细数=肾阴虚经典脉象。

证型：肾阴虚
治则：滋肾阴，清虚热，安神志
针灸：KI3（补法）、SP6、CV4（禁灸）、HT6（盗汗）、KI6、BL23、GV14（泻法，清热）、HT7
方药：知柏地黄丸
生活方式：减少辛辣、酒精、咖啡；凉性食物；温和运动；睡眠卫生指导
Teaching point: The Kidney Yin-Yang balance at menopause is not a single fixed state — it changes month to month. A patient presenting with pure Yin deficiency in Month 1 may show mixed Yin-Yang deficiency by Month 4 as Yang begins to weaken. Reassess every 4-6 weeks and adjust the formula accordingly. A common progression: Zhi Bai Di Huang Wan → Liu Wei Di Huang Wan → Er Xian Tang as the patient transitions through the menopausal phases.教学要点：更年期的肾阴阳平衡不是单一固定状态——它逐月变化。第1个月表现为纯阴虚的患者，在第4个月阳气开始衰弱时可能显示阴阳两虚的混合状态。每4–6周重新评估并相应调整方药。常见进展路径：知柏地黄丸→六味地黄丸→二仙汤。
Case 2 — Mixed Yin-Yang Xu with Liver Qi Stagnation病案二——阴阳两虚夹肝气郁滞
Patient: 49F, secondary school teacher. Periods still present but irregular (27-45 day cycles). Hot flushes 4-6/day but cold feet despite flushes. Crying episodes without cause. Extreme mood swings (rage then weeping then laughter within same hour). Insomnia. Low back soreness. Heavy fatigue in mornings. Breast tenderness. Red tongue with slight white coat. Wiry-thready pulse, alternating rapid at chi.患者：女，49岁，中学教师。月经仍有但不规律（27–45天周期）。每日烘热4–6次，但烘热同时足冷。无故哭泣。极端情绪波动（愤怒→哭泣→大笑，同一小时内）。失眠。腰酸。晨间极度疲乏。乳房触痛。舌红略有白苔。脉弦细，尺脉交替出现数象。
Reasoning chain: Age 49 — at the Tiangui threshold. Periods still present → not complete Tiangui exhaustion yet, but actively declining. Hot flushes = Kidney Yin Xu component (Yang rising). Cold feet simultaneously = Kidney Yang Xu component (peripheral warming failing). This is . Extreme emotional volatility → : Kidney Yin decline takes Liver Yin down → Liver Qi stagnates AND Liver Yang rises = emotional storm. Wiry pulse = Liver Qi stagnation; thready = Yin Xu; alternating rapid at chi = Kidney instability reflecting the Yin-Yang fluctuation.

Pattern: +
Treatment principle: Warm Kidney Yang and nourish Kidney Yin simultaneously; soothe Liver Qi; clear deficiency Heat
Acupuncture: KI3 (reinforcing), SP6, CV4 (moxa — for Yang component), HT6, LV3 (smooth Liver Qi), PC6 (emotional axis), HT7, GV20
Herbal: Er Xian Tang base + + to smooth Liver and clear Heat 推理链：49岁——天癸阈值。月经仍有→天癸尚未完全耗竭，但正在积极衰减。烘热=肾阴虚成分（阳气上浮）。同时足冷=肾阳虚成分（外周温煦失常）。此为肾阴阳两虚。极端情绪波动→乙癸同源：肾阴衰减同时带动肝阴下降→肝气郁滞同时肝阳上亢=情志风暴。弦脉=肝气郁滞；细脉=阴虚；尺部交替出现数象=反映阴阳波动的肾之不稳定。

证型：肾阴阳两虚+肝气郁滞
治则：温肾阳与滋肾阴并举；疏肝气；清虚热
针灸：KI3（补法）、SP6、CV4（灸——针对阳虚成分）、HT6、LV3（疏肝气）、PC6（情志轴）、HT7、GV20
方药：二仙汤基础+丹皮+柴胡以疏肝清热
Teaching point: The emotional storm of perimenopause is not psychological instability — it is a physiological Qi dynamic crisis. When patients minimize their symptoms as "just emotions" or when family members dismiss them as personality changes, this framework provides the reframing: the Liver-Kidney Yin axis is failing; the regulatory mechanisms that normally buffer emotional Qi are depleted. This is as physiological as a fractured bone. Communicating this reframing to both the patient and their family dramatically improves compliance and de-stigmatizes the menopausal experience.教学要点：围更年期的情志风暴不是心理不稳定——而是生理性气机危机。当患者将症状最小化为"只是情绪"，或家庭成员将其视为性格变化时，这一框架提供了重新诠释：肝肾阴轴正在衰竭；正常情况下缓冲情志气机的调节机制已经耗竭。这与骨折一样具有生理基础。将这一重新诠释传达给患者及其家属，能显著改善依从性，并对更年期体验去污名化。
Gynecology · Qi Dynamic妇科病证 · 气机框架
Menstrual Irregularity月经不调
Disordered cycle timing, volume, and colour — the Chong and Ren failing to regulate the periodic descent of Blood月经周期、经量、经色紊乱——冲任不能调节经血周期性下行
Core Framework: Cycle = Chong/Ren Regulated Descent核心框架：月经周期 = 冲任调节经血下行
A normal 28-day cycle reflects the Chong vessel filling over the follicular phase (Blood accumulates) → the Liver's Qi ensures a timely and complete descent → Blood discharges → cycle resets. Any disruption reflects a dysfunction in this regulated descent.

Early period (, less than 21 days): Blood moves too fast or too hot — Heat in Blood driving it out prematurely, or Qi deficiency losing control of the holding function
Late period (, more than 35 days): Blood moves too slow or blocked — Cold, stasis, Blood Xu, or Qi stagnation slows the descent
Irregular: Oscillating control — Liver Qi stagnation (sometimes pushes early, sometimes fails to descend) or Kidney deficiency (inconsistent Jing supply to Chong) 正常28天周期反映冲脉在卵泡期充盈（血液积聚）→肝气确保及时完整地下行→经血排出→周期重置。任何干扰均反映此调节性下行功能的紊乱。

月经提前（少于21天）：血行过快/过热——血热过早驱动，或气虚失于固摄
月经错后（多于35天）：血行过慢/受阻——寒凝、血瘀、血虚或气滞减缓下行
月经先后不定期：调控不稳——肝气郁滞（有时提前，有时不能下行）或肾虚（冲脉精微供应不稳定）
Three Essential Questions三个核心问题
1. Cycle timing — consistently early, consistently late, or irregular?1. 周期时间——持续提前、持续错后，还是先后不定？
Consistently early (7+ days): Always excess Blood movement — Heat driving Blood out prematurely, or Qi deficiency failing to hold Blood in the Chong until the natural time. Ask: is the blood bright red and heavy (Heat)? Or pale and scanty (Qi deficiency)?

Consistently late (7+ days): Always insufficient Blood movement — obstruction (Cold, stasis) or insufficient Blood to fill the Chong to its threshold. Ask: is blood dark with clots (obstruction)? Or pale and scanty (Blood deficiency)?

Irregular (sometimes early, sometimes late): Unstable regulation — Liver Qi stagnation alternates between stasis and explosive release, or Kidney Jing is insufficient to maintain consistent Chong filling. 持续提前（7天以上）：始终为血行过速——热邪过早驱动，或气虚不能固摄直至自然时机。问：血色鲜红量多（热证）？还是色淡量少（气虚）？

持续错后（7天以上）：始终为血行不足——阻滞（寒凝、血瘀）或血液不足以充盈冲脉至阈值。问：血色暗有血块（阻滞）？还是色淡量少（血虚）？

先后不定期：调控不稳——肝气郁滞在瘀滞与爆发式排出之间交替，或肾精不足以维持冲脉充盈的稳定性。
2. Volume and colour of blood2. 经量与经色
Heavy, bright red, thick: Blood Heat — Heat accelerates and amplifies discharge
Heavy, pale, watery: Qi deficiency — Qi cannot contain Blood; Blood spills out without force
Scanty, pale, thin: Blood deficiency — insufficient Blood to fill the Chong
Scanty, dark purple with clots: Cold obstruction or stasis — Blood thickens and clots
Variable: Liver Qi stagnation or Kidney deficiency — inconsistent Chong filling 量多、鲜红、质稠：血热（实热）——热邪加速并放大排出
量多、色淡、质稀：气虚——气不能固摄；血液无力溢出
量少、色淡、质薄：血虚——血液不足以充盈冲脉
量少、紫暗有血块：寒凝或血瘀——血液凝稠成块
量不定：肝气郁滞或肾虚——冲脉充盈不稳定
3. Emotional and systemic correlation3. 情志及全身相关
Does stress worsen the cycle irregularity? If worse months consistently match high-stress months → Liver Qi stagnation is primary.

Back pain + dizziness + tinnitus? → Kidney root involvement (always underlying when cycle irregularity is chronic).

Fatigue + loose stools + poor appetite? → Spleen Qi deficiency (holding function and Blood generation both failing). 压力是否加重月经不规律？若压力大的月份与症状重的月份一致→肝气郁滞为主。

腰痛+头晕+耳鸣？→肾之根本受累（月经不调长期持续时始终有肾的因素）。

疲乏+便溏+食欲差？→脾气虚（固摄功能与血液生成均失常）。
Early + heavy + bright red提前+量多+鲜红
Blood Heat血热 升太过
Early + heavy + pale watery提前+量多+色淡稀
Qi Deficiency气虚 升不及
Late + scanty + pale thin错后+量少+色淡薄
Blood Deficiency血虚 升不及
Irregular + mood-correlated先后不定+情志相关
Liver Qi Stagnation肝气郁滞 降不稳
Late/irregular + low back错后/不定+腰酸
Kidney Deficiency肾虚 入不足
Blood Heat — Early Period血热证——月经提前
Excess Heat实热
Heat in Blood → accelerates descent → Blood exits before the Chong is naturally full血热→加速下行→经血在冲脉自然充盈前即排出
Key symptoms主要症状Period 7+ days early; heavy, bright red, thick blood; irritability; thirst; constipation; red tongue, yellow coat; rapid pulse. Yin-deficiency heat subtype: scanty blood, afternoon fever, night sweats, red tongue no coat.月经提前7天以上；经量多、色鲜红、质稠；烦躁；口渴；便秘；舌红苔黄；脉数。阴虚内热亚型：经量少、午后潮热、盗汗、舌红无苔。
Qi dynamic气机/: Heat is Yang in nature — its direction is upward and outward. When Heat enters the Blood, it agitates the Blood's natural movement pattern, accelerating the Chong vessel's release beyond its natural schedule. The result is premature discharge: too early, too much, too hot. The Liver, which normally controls the timing of menstrual release, is overwhelmed by Heat agitation.升太过/降太速：热为阳邪，其性上升外散。热邪入血，激扰血液自然运动规律，加速冲脉超出自然时机的释放。结果是过早排出：时间提前、量过多、质过热。正常控制月经排出时机的肝，被热邪激扰所淹没。
Qi Deficiency — Early Period气虚证——月经提前
Deficiency虚证
Spleen Qi too weak to hold Blood in the Chong vessel → Blood leaks out prematurely, pale and watery脾气虚弱，无力固摄血液于冲脉→经血过早溢出，色淡质稀
Key symptoms主要症状Early period but blood is pale, watery, scanty-to-normal volume; fatigue; pale face; shortness of breath; prolapse sensation; loose stools; pale tongue; weak pulse月经提前但经血色淡质稀量少至正常；疲乏；面色苍白；气短；下坠感；便溏；舌淡；脉弱
Qi dynamic气机(holding function fails): The Spleen's ascending function includes holding Blood within the vessels. When Spleen Qi is deficient, its holding force weakens → Blood is not properly contained in the Chong → it seeps out prematurely. Unlike Heat (which pushes Blood out with force), Qi deficiency Blood escapes passively — hence pale and watery.升不及（固摄功能失常）：脾之升清功能包括固摄血液于脉内。脾气不足，其固摄之力减弱→血液不能被正常固摄于冲脉→过早渗出。与热邪（有力推动血液外出）不同，气虚时血液被动溢出——故色淡质稀。
Blood Deficiency — Late Period血虚证——月经错后
Deficiency虚证
Insufficient Blood to fill the Chong vessel to its threshold → delayed release → scanty, pale blood血液不足，无法将冲脉充盈至自然阈值→排出延迟→经量少色淡
Key symptoms主要症状Period 7+ days late; scanty pale thin blood; dizziness; blurred vision; pale lips and nails; palpitations; poor memory; insomnia; pale tongue; thin-weak pulse月经错后7天以上；经量少色淡质薄；头晕；视物模糊；面唇爪甲色淡；心悸；记忆力差；失眠；舌淡；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机/: Blood is produced by the Spleen ascending and transforming food Qi. When this ascending-generating function is insufficient, the Chong vessel fills slowly. The menstrual period is delayed because the Chong must reach a natural fullness threshold before discharge is triggered. If the vessel fills slowly, the trigger comes late — hence late period with scanty pale blood.升不及/荣不足：血液由脾升清转化食气而生。当此升清生血功能不足，冲脉充盈缓慢。月经推迟是因为冲脉必须达到自然充盈阈值才能触发排出。若充盈缓慢，触发延迟——故月经错后且量少色淡。
Liver Qi Stagnation — Irregular Period肝气郁滞证——月经先后不定期
Excess实证
Liver Qi oscillates between stasis (delays period) and explosive release (early period) → cycle is unpredictable肝气在瘀滞（延迟月经）与爆发式释放（提前月经）之间摆动→周期不可预测
Key symptoms主要症状Cycle varies — sometimes early, sometimes late; mood strongly correlated with cycle irregularity; breast distension pre-menstrually; sighing; irritability or depression; clots; purple tongue; wiry pulse周期变化不定——有时提前有时错后；情绪与月经紊乱密切相关；经前乳胀；叹息；易怒或抑郁；血块；舌紫；脉弦
Qi dynamic气机(unstable Liver regulation): The Liver is the regulatory force of the menstrual cycle — it controls when the Chong vessel releases. When the Liver Qi is stagnant, this regulatory function becomes erratic. Sometimes the stagnation builds pressure and releases prematurely (early period). Sometimes the stagnation locks the vessel shut, preventing timely release (late period). The irregularity reflects the Liver's oscillating failure to regulate.降不稳（肝调节功能不稳定）：肝是月经周期的调节力量——控制冲脉何时释放。肝气郁滞时，此调节功能变得紊乱。有时郁滞积聚压力并过早释放（月经提前）。有时郁滞锁闭脉道，阻止及时排出（月经错后）。周期不定期反映肝调节功能的摆动性失常。
Kidney Deficiency — Irregular/Late Period肾虚证——月经错后/先后不定期
Deficiency虚证
Kidney Jing insufficient → Chong vessel lacks its root nourishment → cycle becomes delayed and inconsistent肾精不足→冲脉缺乏根本濡养→周期延迟且不稳定
Key symptoms主要症状Late or irregular period; scanty blood; prominent low back soreness; dizziness; tinnitus; nocturia; deep-weak pulse especially at chi position月经错后或先后不定期；经量少；腰酸为主；头晕；耳鸣；夜尿；脉沉细弱，尤以尺脉为甚
Qi dynamic气机(root deficiency): Chong Mai originates in the Kidney and is nourished by Kidney Jing. When Jing is depleted (through ageing, overwork, chronic illness), the Chong vessel lacks its raw material supply → it fills incompletely and inconsistently → the menstrual cycle loses its reliable foundation.入不足（根本不足）：冲脉发源于肾，由肾精濡养。当精气耗竭（通过衰老、过劳、慢性病），冲脉缺乏原料供应→充盈不完全且不稳定→月经周期失去可靠的根基。
Core Points基础穴位
CV4 关元
Regulates the entire Chong/Ren system — the root point for all menstrual disorders. Tonify for deficiency; reduce for excess. Add moxa for Cold and deficiency patterns.调节整个冲任系统——所有月经病的根本穴位。虚证用补法；实证用泻法。寒证和虚证加灸。
SP6 三阴交
Liver + Spleen + Kidney meeting — regulates all three organ systems that control the cycle. Essential for every pattern of .肝脾肾三经交会——调节控制月经周期的所有三个脏腑系统。每种证型必用。
SP10 血海
"Sea of Blood" — the master point for regulating Blood movement. Reduces excess Blood flow (early/heavy period) and activates sluggish Blood (dark clots, late period). Adjust method and moxa by pattern."血海"——调节血液运行的主穴。减少过多血液流出（提前/量多）并活化迟滞之血（暗色血块，月经错后）。根据证型调整针法和灸法。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Blood Heat (early, heavy, red)血热证（提前量多色红）Add: LV2 (clear Liver Heat), KI2 (clear Kidney Yin-deficiency heat), SP1 (jing-well — stops excessive bleeding acutely). Reducing method. No moxa.加：LV2行间（清肝热）、KI2然谷（清肾阴虚内热）、SP1隐白（井穴——急性止血）。泻法。禁灸。
Qi deficiency (early, pale, watery)气虚证（提前色淡质稀）Add: ST36 (build Spleen Qi and Stomach foundation), BL20 , CV6 (Sea of Qi — consolidates Qi holding function), moxa on CV4. Reinforcing method throughout.加：ST36足三里（补脾胃根基）、BL20脾俞、CV6气海（气之海——固摄气之功能）、CV4加灸。全程补法。
Blood deficiency (late, scanty, pale)血虚证（错后量少色淡）Add: BL17 (hui-meeting of Blood — tonify Blood systemically), BL20 , ST36, moxa on CV3+CV4. Reinforcing method. Treat throughout cycle — build Blood between periods, not just during.加：BL17膈俞（血之会穴——全身补血）、BL20脾俞、ST36、CV3+CV4加灸。补法。贯穿整个周期治疗——在经间期补血，而不仅是经期。
Liver Qi stagnation (irregular, mood-driven)肝气郁滞证（先后不定，情志相关）Add: LV3 (smooths Liver Qi descent — primary point for Liver regulation), LV14 (front-mu of Liver — local Liver Qi regulation), PC6 (regulates emotional-Qi axis between Heart and Liver). Neutral-to-reducing method.加：LV3太冲（疏肝气下行——肝调节首选穴）、LV14期门（肝之募穴——局部肝气调节）、PC6内关（调节心肝之间的情志-气机轴）。平补平泻至泻法。
Kidney deficiency (late, low back prominent)肾虚证（错后，腰酸突出）Add: KI3 (source point of Kidney — nourishes Jing and Yin directly), BL23 , GV4 (if Kidney Yang deficient). Reinforcing method + moxa for Yang deficiency.加：KI3太溪（肾之原穴——直接滋养肾精和肾阴）、BL23肾俞、GV4命门（若肾阳虚）。补法+阳虚成分加灸。
Qing Jing San清经散
Blood Heat — early period, heavy bright red blood, irritability, red tongue, rapid pulse血热——月经提前，经量多色鲜红，烦躁，舌红，脉数
Mechanism: Clears Heat from the Chong vessel and Blood phase without damaging Blood. +clear Heat from the blood level, constrains the Blood, calms the spirit and drains Dampness, clears Heat from the lower jiao specifically. Directs Heat clearing to the Chong vessel without aggressive purging that would damage Qi and Blood.机理：清冲脉及血分之热而不伤血。丹皮+地骨皮清血分之热（凉血），白芍敛血，茯苓宁神渗湿，黄柏专清下焦之热。本方清热方向专一指向冲脉，不用激进的泻下药以免伤气血。
Bu Zhong Yi Qi Tang补中益气汤
Qi deficiency — early period, pale watery blood, fatigue, prolapse sensation, loose stools气虚——月经提前，经血色淡质稀，疲乏，下坠感，便溏
Mechanism: Li Dongyuan's classic formula for Spleen Qi deficiency. +build the ascending Qi; +lift the sinking Qi upward. The ascending function of the Spleen is restored → Blood is properly contained within the Chong vessel → premature release stops. The prolapse sensation is a diagnostic clue: the same ascending failure that fails to hold Blood also fails to hold up organs.机理：李东垣治脾气虚之经典方。黄芪+人参建立升清之气；升麻+柴胡提升下陷之气。脾的升清功能恢复→血液被正常固摄于冲脉→过早释放停止。下坠感是诊断线索：无力托举脏腑与无力固摄血液——同一升清失常。
Si Wu Tang四物汤
Blood deficiency — late period, scanty pale blood, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations血虚——月经错后，经量少色淡，头晕，视物模糊，心悸
Mechanism: The classical Blood nourishing formula. nourishes the Kidney-Liver Blood foundation; nourishes and moves Blood in the Chong vessel; nourishes Liver Blood and constrains; moves Blood to prevent stagnation during nourishment. The combination nourishes without causing stasis and moves without damaging. Over 2-3 cycles, gradually fills the Chong vessel.机理：补血经典方。熟地黄滋养肾肝血之根基；当归在冲脉中补血活血；白芍养肝血并收敛；川芎活血以防补益过程中停滞。合用补而不滞，行而不伤。经2–3个月经周期，逐渐充盈冲脉。
Xiao Yao San逍遥散
Liver Qi stagnation — irregular period, breast distension, mood swings, sighing, wiry pulse肝气郁滞——先后不定期，乳胀，情绪波动，叹息，脉弦
Mechanism: smooths Liver Qi; +nourish Liver Blood (ensuring Liver has the Blood substrate to function); +strengthen Spleen. The formula restores the Liver's regulatory function over the Chong vessel → cycle stabilizes. Jia Wei Xiao Yao San adds +for cases with Heat transformation (irritability, hot flushes preceding period).机理：柴胡疏肝解郁；当归+白芍养肝血（确保肝有血液底物以发挥功能）；白术+茯苓健脾。本方恢复肝对冲脉的调节功能→月经周期趋于稳定。加味逍遥散加丹皮+栀子用于热化证（烦躁、经前烘热）。
Case — Liver Qi Stagnation with Irregular Cycle病案——肝气郁滞月经先后不定期
Patient: 28F, graphic designer, freelance. Cycle has ranged from 21 to 40 days over past year. Heavy pre-menstrual breast tenderness. Sighing frequently. Easily irritated, worse before period. Dark clots some months. Moderately heavy flow. Purple-dusky tongue with thin coat. Wiry pulse.患者：女，28岁，自由职业平面设计师。过去一年月经周期21至40天不等。经前乳房明显触痛。频繁叹息。易激惹，经前加重。部分月份有暗色血块。经量中等偏多。舌紫暗苔薄。脉弦。
Reasoning chain: Freelance work = irregular schedule + financial stress → chronic emotional tension → Liver Qi stagnation. The Liver controls when the Chong vessel releases. Stagnated Liver Qi → sometimes builds pressure and releases prematurely (21-day cycles); sometimes remains knotted and delays release (40-day cycles). The cycle variability IS the Liver's oscillating failure. Breast tenderness (Liver channel traverses breast), sighing (Liver's sound), irritability (Liver's emotion), wiry pulse (Liver's pulse) all confirm the diagnosis.

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Soothe Liver Qi, regulate Chong vessel, stabilise cycle
Acupuncture: LV3, LV14, PC6, CV4, SP6, SP10
Herbal: Xiao Yao San
Lifestyle: Regularise sleep/work schedule; stress management counselling 推理链：自由职业=时间不规律+经济压力→长期情志紧张→肝气郁滞。肝控制冲脉何时释放。肝气郁滞→有时积压后过早释放（21天周期）；有时仍处郁结而延迟排出（40天周期）。周期不定本身就是肝调节功能摆动性失常的表现。乳房触痛（肝经循乳）、叹息（肝之声）、易怒（肝之情志）、弦脉（肝之脉象）均确证诊断。

证型：气滞血瘀
治则：疏肝行气，调理冲脉，稳定周期
针灸：LV3、LV14、PC6、CV4、SP6、SP10
方药：逍遥散
生活方式：规律作息；压力管理指导
Teaching point: Irregular cycles almost always implicate the Liver. The key question is: are the irregularities correlated with emotional stress? When stress and cycle irregularity track together perfectly — worse months always being the more stressed months — the Liver is the primary target. This is one of the clearest demonstrations of the Liver-emotion-menstruation axis in clinical practice.教学要点：先后不定期几乎总与肝有关。关键问题是：不规律是否与情志压力相关？当压力与周期不规律完美对应时——压力大的月份总是症状重的月份——肝是主要靶点。这是临床实践中肝-情志-月经轴最清晰的示范之一。
Urology · Lower Jiao泌尿生殖 · 下焦
Overactive Bladder / Urinary Frequency膀胱过度活动症·尿频
Bladder failing to hold — either Kidney Yang cannot anchor the Bladder's closing function, or Damp-Heat irritates it into premature opening. The two mechanisms are opposite and require opposite treatments.膀胱不能固摄——肾阳不能锚固膀胱的关闭功能，或湿热刺激其提前开放。两种机制相反，需要相反的治疗。
Bladder Opening-Closing — The Kidney's Gate Function膀胱开阖——肾的主水功能
The Bladder's opening and closing function is governed by Kidney Yang Qi transformation. The Kidney Yang provides the warming and anchoring force that keeps the Bladder closed until an appropriate volume triggers voluntary opening.

OAB — Deficiency type (most common in elderly): Kidney Yang declines → Qi transformation weakens → Bladder loses its closing anchor → urgency, frequency, nocturia, stress incontinence. Cold deficiency pattern. The Bladder is not irritated — it simply lacks the holding force.

OAB — Damp-Heat type (more common in younger patients): Damp-Heat accumulates in the Lower Jiao → constantly irritates the Bladder → urgency and frequency with burning or discomfort. Hot excess pattern. The Bladder is being irritated into premature opening.

Qi dynamic: — The Bladder's rhythmic opening-closing cycle is disrupted. In deficiency: the Kidney cannot maintain the "closed" state long enough. In Damp-Heat: the irritant prevents the Bladder from reaching a resting "closed" state at all. 膀胱的开阖功能由肾阳气化统管。肾阳提供温煦和锚固之力，使膀胱在适当容量触发自主开放之前保持关闭。

膀胱过度活动——虚证型（老年最常见）：肾阳衰退→气化减弱→膀胱失去关闭锚固力→尿急、尿频、夜尿、压力性尿失禁。寒性虚证。膀胱不是受到刺激——只是缺乏固摄之力。

膀胱过度活动——湿热型（年轻患者较常见）：湿热积聚下焦→持续刺激膀胱→尿急尿频伴灼热或不适。热性实证。膀胱被刺激提前开放。

气机：出入失常——膀胱节律性开合周期被破坏。虚证：肾不能维持足够长的"关闭"状态。湿热：刺激物使膀胱根本无法到达静息"关闭"状态。
Frequency + nocturia + no burning + elderly + cold尿频+夜尿+无灼热+老年+怕冷
KD Yang Xu — anchor failure肾阳虚——固摄失职
Urgency + burning + yellow urine + young尿急+灼热+尿黄+年轻
Damp-Heat irritation湿热刺激
Stress incontinence + fatigue + prolapse sensation压力性尿失禁+疲乏+下坠感
Qi sinking — Central Qi Xu气陷——中气虚
Kidney Yang Xu — Deficiency OAB (most common)肾阳虚证——虚性膀胱过度活动（最常见）
Deficiency虚证
Kidney Yang fails to anchor Bladder closure → urgency and frequency without irritation, cold and pale肾阳不能锚固膀胱关闭→尿急尿频无刺激感，寒象，色淡
Key symptoms主要症状Frequent urination (every 1–2 hours); urgency without burning; nocturia 2–4×; urine clear pale and copious; no discomfort during urination; cold extremities; low back soreness; fatigue; pale tongue; deep-slow-weak chi pulse尿频（每1–2小时）；尿急但无灼热；夜尿2–4次；尿清淡量多；排尿无不适；肢冷；腰酸；疲乏；舌淡；尺脉沉迟弱
Treatment治疗Warm Kidney Yang to restore Bladder anchor. GV4 (moxa — essential) + BL23 (moxa) + CV4 (moxa) + BL32 (EA 2Hz — sacral nerve stimulation to improve detrusor-sphincter coordination). Herbal: Suo Quan Wan (the classical formula for Kidney Yang Xu frequency — ++) combined with Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan for constitutional warmth.温肾阳以恢复膀胱固摄。GV4命门（灸——必须）+BL23肾俞（灸）+CV4关元（灸）+BL32次髎（电针2Hz——骶神经刺激改善逼尿肌-括约肌协调）。方药：缩泉丸（肾阳虚尿频的经典方——乌药+益智仁+山药）配合金匮肾气丸温补体质。
Central Qi Sinking — Stress Incontinence中气下陷证——压力性尿失禁
Deficiency虚证
Spleen-Lung Qi too deficient to hold organs in place → pelvic floor weakens → leakage with coughing, sneezing, laughing脾肺气虚不能固摄器官→盆底肌减弱→咳嗽、喷嚏、大笑时漏尿
Treatment治疗Lift Qi to hold pelvic organs. GV20 (moxa — lifts Yang) + CV6 (Sea of Qi — tonifies and holds) + ST36 (build Spleen-Lung Qi) + BL32 (strengthen pelvic floor via sacral nerve). Herbal: Bu Zhong Yi Qi Tang (the formula for Qi sinking — ++lift the Central Qi). Combine with pelvic floor exercises (Kegel) — TCM treatment dramatically improves results when combined with structured pelvic rehabilitation.升气以固摄盆腔器官。GV20（灸——升阳）+CV6气海（气之海——补气固摄）+ST36（补脾肺气）+BL32（通过骶神经强化盆底）。方药：补中益气汤（气陷方——黄芪+升麻+柴胡升提中气）。配合盆底运动（凯格尔）——中医治疗与结构性盆底康复联合时效果显著提高。
BL32 Sacral EA — The Mechanism-Based Core InterventionBL32骶部电针——基于机制的核心干预
Why BL32 works for OAB为什么BL32对膀胱过度活动有效
The S3 sacral nerve root (which passes through BL32's foramen) is the primary nerve controlling bladder function. Electroacupuncture at BL32-BL32 bilateral at 2Hz directly stimulates this nerve root, producing three simultaneous effects: (1) increases bladder capacity (the detrusor muscle relaxes, allowing the bladder to hold more before triggering urgency), (2) strengthens the urethral sphincter closure reflex, (3) reduces pathological urgency signals from the bladder mucosa. This is the same mechanism as sacral nerve modulation (SNM) used in urology — acupuncture achieves this non-invasively. Clinical evidence: multiple RCTs demonstrate BL32 EA produces urodynamic improvement comparable to antimuscarinics for OAB, with no side effects.S3骶神经根（穿过BL32骶后孔）是控制膀胱功能的主要神经。双侧BL32-BL32电针2Hz直接刺激此神经根，产生三种同步效果：(1)增加膀胱容量（逼尿肌松弛，允许膀胱在触发尿急前容纳更多），(2)强化尿道括约肌关闭反射，(3)减少来自膀胱黏膜的病理性尿急信号。这与泌尿科使用的骶神经调节（SNM）机制相同——针灸非侵入性地实现此目的。临床证据：多项随机对照试验证明BL32电针产生的尿动力学改善与抗毒蕈碱药物相当，无副作用。
SP6 + KI3 + CV3SP6+KI3+CV3Systemic regulation alongside sacral stimulation. SP6 regulates all three lower Yin channels (Spleen-Kidney-Liver) that converge in the pelvic region. KI3 directly nourishes Kidney Qi/Yang (the constitutional root of OAB). CV3 (front-mu of Bladder) regulates the Bladder's Qi directly from the front. For Kidney Yang Xu: add moxa on CV4 and GV4. For Damp-Heat: add SP9 reducing method.全身调节配合骶部刺激。SP6调节汇聚于盆腔的三条下部阴经（脾肾肝）。KI3直接滋养肾气/阳（膀胱过度活动的体质根本）。CV3中极（膀胱募穴）从前方直接调节膀胱之气。肾阳虚：加CV4和GV4艾灸。湿热：加SP9泻法。
Suo Quan Wan缩泉丸
Kidney Yang Xu OAB — clear pale frequent urine, nocturia, no burning, cold extremities, deep-weak pulse. The classical formula for urinary frequency from deficiency.肾阳虚膀胱过度活动——尿清淡频繁，夜尿，无灼热，肢冷，脉沉弱。尿频虚证的经典方。
Mechanism: Three herbs, elegant simplicity. (lindera root) warms the Kidney and Bladder, disperses Cold from the Lower Jiao, and specifically stops urinary frequency from Cold — it enters the Kidney-Bladder channel and warms the "holding" function. (alpinia seed) warms Kidney Yang, astringes urination, stops frequency — its astringent property directly counteracts the leaking Bladder. (dioscorea) strengthens the Spleen and nourishes the Kidney simultaneously, providing the constitutional foundation. The formula addresses Kidney Yang deficiency from two angles: warming (+) and astringency (+). Combine with Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan for deeper Kidney Yang tonification.机理：三味药，优雅的简洁。乌药温肾膀胱，散下焦寒邪，专止寒性尿频——入肾膀胱经，温暖"固摄"功能。益智仁温肾阳，固缩小便，止频——其收涩性质直接对抗漏泄的膀胱。山药同时健脾补肾，提供体质基础。本方从两个角度处理肾阳虚：温化（乌药+益智仁）和收涩（益智仁+山药）。与金匮肾气丸联合以更深层补肾阳。
Case — Nocturia 5×/night: Resolved in 6 Sessions病案——夜尿5次/夜：6次治疗缓解
Patient: 72F. Nocturia 4–5×/night for 3 years. Daytime frequency every 45–60 minutes. Urgency but no burning. Urodynamics: overactive bladder, no obstruction. Tried oxybutynin — intolerable dry mouth and constipation. Cold hands, fatigue, low back soreness. Pale tongue, deep-slow pulse.患者：女，72岁。夜尿4–5次/夜，持续3年。白天每45–60分钟尿频。尿急但无灼热。尿动力学：膀胱过度活动，无梗阻。尝试奥昔布宁——口干便秘无法耐受。手冷，疲乏，腰酸。舌淡，脉沉迟。
Treatment (6 sessions, 2×/week): BL32 bilateral EA 2Hz 30min + CV4 moxa 15min + GV4 moxa 10min + BL23 moxa + SP6 + KI3 (all tonification). Herbal: Suo Quan Wan + Jin Gui Shen Qi Wan.
Week 2: Nocturia 3×/night. Week 4: nocturia 1–2×/night, daytime frequency every 2–3 hours. Week 6: nocturia 1×/night (patient considers this acceptable). Daytime frequency normal. No medication side effects. Energy improved, low back soreness resolved.治疗（6次，每周2次）：双侧BL32电针2Hz 30分钟+CV4灸15分钟+GV4灸10分钟+BL23灸+SP6+KI3（均补法）。方药：缩泉丸+金匮肾气丸。第2周：夜尿3次/夜。第4周：夜尿1–2次/夜，白天每2–3小时。第6周：夜尿1次/夜（患者认为可接受）。白天尿频正常。无药物副作用。精力改善，腰酸消除。
Teaching point: OAB in elderly women failed by anticholinergics is an ideal case for BL32 sacral EA. The mechanism (sacral nerve modulation) is evidence-based, the results are reliable, and there are no side effects. The key is combining the sacral neural stimulation (BL32 EA) with the constitutional Kidney Yang treatment (moxa on GV4, BL23, CV4) — one addresses the neurological dysfunction, the other addresses the constitutional root.教学要点：抗胆碱药失败的老年女性膀胱过度活动是BL32骶部电针的理想病例。机制（骶神经调节）有循证依据，效果可靠，无副作用。关键是将骶部神经刺激（BL32电针）与体质肾阳治疗（GV4、BL23、CV4艾灸）联合——一个处理神经功能障碍，另一个处理体质根本。
Metabolic · Spleen-Phlegm代谢内分泌 · 脾虚痰湿
Obesity肥胖
Phlegm-Damp accumulation from Spleen Qi deficiency — the body cannot transform and transport ingested nutrients, which accumulate as pathological fat (the structural correlate of Phlegm)脾气虚导致痰湿积聚——机体不能运化和转输摄入的营养物质，积聚为病理性脂肪（痰的结构对应物）
Core Mechanism: Fat Is Phlegm — The Spleen's Failure to Transform核心机制：肥人多痰——脾失运化
The classical TCM statement: "" — people who are obese generally have abundant Phlegm-Damp. Fat tissue is the structural manifestation of unresolved Phlegm-Damp accumulation. The Spleen is the master of transformation and transportation — when its Qi is deficient, ingested food and fluids are incompletely transformed:

— Incompletely transformed food → fat (Phlegm-Damp in the flesh)
— Incompletely transformed fluids → oedema (Damp in the interstitium)
— Incompletely transformed Qi → fatigue (insufficient clear Qi ascending)

Three patterns, one root:
① Spleen Qi Xu + Phlegm-Damp (most common, 70%): the foundational pattern — Spleen too weak to transform, Phlegm-Damp accumulates
② Stomach Heat + Food Stagnation (excess appetite type): excessive appetite driven by Stomach Fire; the food cannot be properly processed → accumulates
③ Liver Qi stagnation + Spleen Xu (emotional eating type): stress → Liver overacts on Spleen → Spleen further weakened → Phlegm-Damp worsens

Qi dynamic: — Spleen Yang fails to lift and transform (the Spleen governs ascending of clear Yang). The turbid Damp sinks and accumulates as fat in the lower body and abdomen. 经典中医论述："肥人多痰湿"——肥胖之人一般有丰盛的痰湿。脂肪组织是未能消解的痰湿积聚的结构性表现。脾主运化——当其气虚时，摄入的食物和津液不能完全被转化：

— 不完全转化的食物→脂肪（肌肉中的痰湿）
— 不完全转化的津液→水肿（组织间隙的湿邪）
— 不完全转化的气→疲乏（清气不能充分上升）

三种证型，一个根本：
①脾气虚+痰湿（最常见，70%）：基础证型——脾太弱无力运化，痰湿积聚
②胃热+食积（食欲亢进型）：胃火驱动的过度食欲；食物不能被正常处理→积聚
③肝气郁滞+脾虚（情绪性进食型）：压力→肝克脾→脾进一步虚弱→痰湿加重

气机：升不及——脾阳不能升清运化（脾主清阳上升）。浊湿下陷，积聚为腹部和下体脂肪。
Weight Pattern and Constitutional Assessment体重模式与体质评估
How long overweight? Distribution (central/abdominal vs generalised)? Appetite: excessive, normal, or low? Energy level? Stress eating? Digestive symptoms? Sleep?超重多久？分布（中央/腹部vs全身性）？食欲：过旺、正常还是不佳？精力水平？压力性进食？消化症状？睡眠？
→ Appetite pattern separates Stomach Heat (excessive) from Spleen Xu (normal or low); distribution identifies the primary organ→ 食欲模式区分胃热（过旺）和脾虚（正常或不佳）；分布识别主要脏腑
Weight gain despite normal or low appetite + fatigue + loose stools: Spleen Qi Xu — the classic Phlegm-Damp pattern. The patient is NOT overeating in absolute terms; their Spleen simply cannot transform what they eat. This is the most important diagnostic insight: overweight patients who say "I don't eat that much" are often correct — their Spleen is inefficient, not their willpower deficient.

Excessive appetite + always hungry + easy weight gain + constipation: Stomach Fire — the Stomach is over-functioning (too much descending/processing drive), generating excessive appetite. The Liver also often contributes (stress → Liver Fire → Stomach Fire). These patients overeat but also have genuine excess Stomach Qi driving them.

Weight gain correlated with stress/emotional events + night eating + emotional eating: Liver Qi stagnation overacting on Spleen. The Liver's over-constraint of the Spleen during emotional stress directly weakens Spleen's transforming function. Weight gain follows emotional difficulty — patients notice they gain most weight during or after stressful periods.

Postpartum, post-illness, or post-menopause weight gain: Spleen Qi and Kidney Yang deficiency — constitutional depletion weakens the metabolic Yang. This is the most challenging pattern as the metabolic rate is genuinely reduced at the tissue level. 尽管食欲正常或不佳仍体重增加+疲乏+便溏：脾气虚——经典痰湿证型。患者在绝对意义上并非过食；其脾虚无力运化所食之物。这是最重要的诊断洞见：说"我吃得不多"的超重患者通常是正确的——是其脾功能低下，而非意志力缺乏。

食欲亢进+总是饥饿+容易体重增加+便秘：胃火——胃功能亢进（过多的下降/处理驱动力），产生过度食欲。肝也常参与（压力→肝火→胃火）。这些患者确实过食，但也有真实的胃气过旺驱动他们。

体重增加与压力/情绪事件相关+夜间进食+情绪性进食：肝气郁滞克伐脾土。情绪压力期间肝对脾的过度克制直接削弱脾的运化功能。体重增加跟随情绪困难——患者注意到在压力期间或之后体重增加最多。

产后、病后或绝经后体重增加：脾气和肾阳虚——体质耗竭削弱代谢阳气。这是最具挑战性的证型，因为代谢率在组织水平上确实降低。
Low appetite + fatigue + loose stools + greasy coat食欲不佳+疲乏+便溏+苔腻
Spleen Xu + Phlegm-Damp脾虚+痰湿
Excessive hunger + constipation + rapid pulse食欲亢进+便秘+脉数
Stomach Fire胃火
Stress eating + emotional + wiry pulse压力性进食+情绪+脉弦
Liver Qi overacting on Spleen肝气克脾
Postpartum/menopause + cold + deep-weak chi产后/绝经后+畏寒+尺脉沉弱
Spleen-Kidney Yang Xu脾肾阳虚
Spleen Qi Xu + Phlegm-Damp (most common)脾气虚+痰湿证（最常见）
Deficiency虚证
Spleen too weak to transform food into usable Qi → food transforms into Phlegm-Damp → Phlegm-Damp accumulates as body fat脾太虚无力将食物转化为可用之气→食物转化为痰湿→痰湿积聚为体脂
Key symptoms主要症状Generalised overweight especially abdomen; fatigue after eating; bloating; loose stools; poor appetite or normal appetite without much eating; heavy limbs; brain fog; greasy tongue coat; soggy-slippery pulse全身性超重尤其腹部；饭后疲乏；腹胀；便溏；食欲不振或进食不多但食欲正常；肢体沉重；头脑不清；苔腻；脉濡滑
Treatment principle治则Strengthen Spleen Qi to restore transformation → Phlegm-Damp dissolves as the source is eliminated. ST36 (Spleen-Stomach Qi building), SP9 (Damp resolution), ST40 (Phlegm resolution), CV12 (middle jiao pivot). Electro-acupuncture on ST25 bilateral (direct abdominal fat mobilisation). Herbal: Shen Ling Bai Zhu San or Er Chen Tang (Phlegm-Damp resolution). Diet: reduce cold, raw, sweet, and Damp-generating foods.健脾气以恢复运化→来源消除后痰湿溶解。ST36（脾胃气培补），SP9（化湿），ST40（化痰），CV12（中焦枢纽）。双侧ST25电针（直接腹部脂肪动员）。方药：参苓白术散或二陈汤（化痰湿）。饮食：减少寒凉、生冷、甜食和生湿食物。
Stomach Fire + Food Stagnation胃火+食积证
Excess实证
Stomach Fire drives excessive appetite → overeating → food accumulates → weight gain with genuine excess pattern胃火驱动过度食欲→过食→食物积聚→伴真性实证的体重增加
Treatment治疗Reduce Stomach Fire: ST44 (ying-spring of ST — the primary point to reduce Stomach Fire and suppress appetite), ST21 (reduces Stomach capacity sensation), LI11 (clear Heat). Auricular: Hunger point + Stomach point (reduce appetite signals). Herbal: Bao He Wan (food stagnation + Stomach harmonisation) + Huang Lian Jie Du Tang if Stomach Fire is severe.清降胃火：ST44内庭（胃经荥穴——清胃火和抑制食欲的主穴），ST21梁门（减少胃容量感），LI11（清热）。耳穴：饥点+胃点（减少食欲信号）。方药：保和丸（食积+胃和）+若胃火严重加黄连解毒汤。
Liver Qi Stagnation + Spleen Xu (Emotional Eating)肝气郁滞+脾虚证（情绪性进食）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Emotional stress → Liver Qi stagnates → overacts on Spleen → Spleen fails to transform → Phlegm-Damp and fat accumulate; eating soothes the Liver temporarily情志压力→肝气郁滞→克伐脾土→脾失运化→痰湿和脂肪积聚；进食暂时抚慰肝气
Treatment治疗Smooth Liver + strengthen Spleen: LV3 (smooth Liver Qi), PC6 (calms the emotional eating trigger), ST36 + SP6 (strengthen Spleen). Auricular: Shen Men + Liver + Stomach (NADA-adjacent approach for the emotional-Liver component). Herbal: Xiao Yao San (harmonise Liver and Spleen — the classic formula for exactly this pattern).疏肝+健脾：LV3太冲（疏肝气），PC6内关（平息情绪性进食触发），ST36+SP6（健脾）。耳穴：神门+肝+胃（处理情绪-肝气成分的NADA相邻方法）。方药：逍遥散（调和肝脾——正是此证型的经典方）。
Acupuncture for Obesity: Two Strategies — Systemic + Local肥胖针灸：两种策略——全身+局部
Effective acupuncture for obesity uses two complementary strategies simultaneously:
Systemic: Regulate the organ dysfunction (Spleen, Stomach, Liver) that causes the metabolic inefficiency
Local: Directly stimulate fat mobilisation in the abdominal area through strong electro-acupuncture on local points

Both are necessary — systemic treatment alone may not produce visible fat reduction; local EA without systemic correction will not produce sustained results. 有效的肥胖针灸同时使用两种互补策略：
全身性：调节导致代谢低效的脏腑功能障碍（脾、胃、肝）
局部：通过局部穴位的强电针直接刺激腹部区域的脂肪动员

两者均必要——单独全身治疗可能不产生可见的脂肪减少；无全身矫正的局部电针不会产生持续结果。
Core Body Protocol核心体针方案
