Systemic points (all patterns)全身穴位（各证型）ST36 (strengthens Spleen-Stomach transformation — the root of all metabolic treatment), SP9 (resolves Damp from the Spleen), ST40 (master Phlegm-resolving point — "Fenglong" is the primary point for Phlegm regardless of pattern), CV12 (middle jiao pivot — regulates all Spleen-Stomach function). These four points form the metabolic foundation for all obesity patterns.ST36足三里（健脾胃运化——所有代谢治疗之根），SP9阴陵泉（从脾化湿），ST40丰隆（化痰主穴——"丰隆"是无论证型均用于化痰的首要穴位），CV12中脘（中焦枢纽——调节所有脾胃功能）。这四穴构成所有肥胖证型的代谢基础。
Local abdominal EA (the fat-mobilisation protocol)腹部局部电针（脂肪动员方案）ST25 bilateral (front-mu of Large Intestine — the primary abdominal fat-reduction point, regulates LI function and abdominal Qi circulation), CV6 (Sea of Qi — strengthens abdominal Qi), CV4 (builds the root Yang), ST27-ST28 area (below the umbilicus, targets lower abdominal fat deposits). EA: dense-disperse wave 2/100Hz, 30 minutes. Strong stimulation (patient feels strong abdominal muscle contraction). This EA protocol directly stimulates local adipocyte lipolysis and improves mesenteric blood flow. For abdominal obesity: the ST25-CV6 EA pairing produces the most consistent inch-reduction results.双侧ST25天枢（大肠募穴——腹部减脂首要穴位，调节大肠功能和腹部气机循环），CV6气海（气之海——增强腹部气机），CV4关元（培固根本阳气），ST27-ST28区域（脐下，靶向下腹部脂肪积聚）。电针：密疏波2/100Hz，30分钟。强刺激（患者感受到强烈的腹肌收缩）。此电针方案直接刺激局部脂肪细胞脂解，改善肠系膜血流。腹部肥胖：ST25-CV6电针配对产生最一致的腰围减少效果。
Auricular protocol for obesity肥胖耳穴方案The five auricular points for obesity: Hunger point (— reduces appetite signals by modulating the hypothalamic hunger centre), Mouth point (— reduces oral craving), Endocrine point (— regulates metabolic hormonal function), Spleen point (— strengthens the Spleen transformation function), Shen Men (— calms the emotional eating component). Use press needles (Wang Bu Liu Xing seeds or titanium press needles) retained for 3–5 days. Patient presses the points before each meal to activate appetite suppression. Change every 5–7 days, alternating ears.肥胖五耳穴：饥点（通过调节下丘脑饥饿中枢减少食欲信号），口穴（减少口腔渴求），内分泌穴（调节代谢激素功能），脾穴（增强脾的运化功能），神门（平息情绪性进食成分）。使用压贴针（王不留行籽或钛合金压贴针），留置3–5天。患者在每餐前按压穴位以激活食欲抑制。每5–7天更换，两耳交替。
Er Chen Tang + Zhi Shi + Da Huang (modified)二陈汤 + 枳实 + 大黄（加减）
Phlegm-Damp obesity with constipation — the "turbid Phlegm" type where both Phlegm accumulation and bowel sluggishness contribute to weight gain痰湿肥胖伴便秘——痰浊积聚和肠道迟滞均参与体重增加的"浊痰"型
Mechanism: base (+++) resolves Phlegm-Damp from the Spleen-Stomach. Add (moves Qi downward — breaks the Phlegm stagnation and assists bowel movement), (small dose — purges the accumulated turbidity downward; at 3–6g does not produce diarrhoea but promotes bowel regularity and lipid reduction). (lotus leaf — specifically reduces abdominal fat in TCM; modern research confirms lipase inhibition). (hawthorn — resolves food stagnation and reduces fat, especially effective for lipid metabolism; the most important herb for hyperlipidaemia accompanying obesity). This combination addresses Phlegm resolution + bowel clearance + fat-specific herbs simultaneously.机理：二陈汤基础（半夏+陈皮+茯苓+甘草）从脾胃化痰湿。加枳实（向下行气——化解痰停滞并协助排便），大黄（小剂量——将积聚的浊气向下泻出；3–6g的大黄不产生腹泻但促进肠道规律和降脂）。荷叶（专门减少中医腹部脂肪；现代研究确认脂肪酶抑制）。山楂（消食化积并减脂，对脂质代谢特别有效；肥胖伴高脂血症最重要的草药）。此组合同时处理化痰+通腑+脂肪特异性草药。
Xiao Yao San逍遥散
Liver Qi stagnation + Spleen Xu obesity — emotional eating, stress-correlated weight gain, premenstrual weight gain, wiry pulse肝气郁滞+脾虚肥胖——情绪性进食，压力相关体重增加，经前体重增加，脉弦
Mechanism: +smooth and nourish Liver (addresses the stagnation root); ++strengthen Spleen (repairs the Liver-overaction damage); nourishes Blood (Liver Blood deficiency often drives the emotional eating). The formula precisely targets the Liver-Spleen imbalance — when the Liver is smooth and the Spleen is strong, the emotional eating trigger is removed and the metabolic transformation restores. Add +to the base formula for the fat-specific action. For premenstrual weight gain: add +(reduce fluid retention in the perimenstrual phase).机理：柴胡+白芍疏肝养肝（处理郁滞根本）；白术+茯苓+甘草健脾（修复肝克脾的损伤）；当归养血（肝血虚常驱动情绪性进食）。本方精确靶向肝脾失衡——肝气条达，脾气健运，情绪性进食触发器被移除，代谢运化恢复。基础方加荷叶+山楂以产生脂肪特异性作用。经前体重增加：加泽泻+泽兰（减少经前期液体潴留）。
Case — Spleen Xu Obesity: "I Don't Eat Much But Keep Gaining Weight"病案——脾虚肥胖："我吃得不多但一直在增重"
Patient: 44F, office manager. Weight 185 lbs at 5'4" (BMI 31.8). Has been overweight since her 30s. Reports eating "less than my thin friends." Fatigue after meals. Abdominal bloating daily. Loose stools 2–3×/day. Feels cold easily. Tried multiple diets — lost small amounts then regained. Low motivation to exercise (exhausted). Swollen pale tongue with tooth marks, thick white coat. Soggy-slippery pulse.患者：女，44岁，办公室经理。身高5'4"体重185磅（BMI 31.8）。30多岁起超重。报告吃得"比我那些瘦朋友少"。餐后疲乏。每日腹部胀气。每天2–3次便溏。容易畏寒。尝试过多种节食——体重小幅减少后反弹。运动积极性低（筋疲力尽）。舌淡胖有齿痕苔白厚。脉濡滑。
Pattern: Spleen Qi Xu + Phlegm-Damp (classic). The patient's self-report of eating less than thin friends is clinically valid — her Spleen efficiency is the problem, not her caloric intake. The soggy-slippery pulse, tooth-marked tongue, post-meal fatigue, and loose stools are all textbook Spleen Qi deficiency with Damp accumulation. The cold sensation adds a Yang deficiency component.

Treatment (16-session course, 8 weeks):
Systemic: ST36 + SP9 + ST40 + CV12 (reinforcing + moxa on ST36 and CV12).
Local EA: ST25 bilateral + CV6, dense-disperse 2/100Hz, 30 minutes each session.
Auricular: Hunger + Spleen + Endocrine + Shen Men press needles (changed weekly).
Diet advice: warm cooked foods; eliminate cold, raw, dairy; small regular meals. No crash dieting — focus on metabolic quality, not caloric restriction.
Herbal: Er Chen Tang modified (with , , ).
8-week results: Weight −9 lbs. Waist −2.5 inches. Energy significantly improved. Loose stools resolved. Bloating 90% reduced. Patient: "I didn't eat less — I just stopped feeling exhausted after every meal." 证型：脾气虚+痰湿（经典）。患者自述比瘦朋友吃得少是临床有效的——其脾的效率是问题所在，而非卡路里摄入。濡滑脉、齿痕舌、餐后疲乏和便溏都是典型的脾气虚伴湿邪积聚。畏寒感增加阳虚成分。

治疗（8周16次）：
全身性：ST36+SP9+ST40+CV12（补法+ST36和CV12艾灸）。
局部电针：双侧ST25+CV6，密疏波2/100Hz，每次30分钟。
耳穴：饥点+脾+内分泌+神门压贴针（每周更换）。
饮食建议：温热熟食；消除寒凉、生冷、乳制品；少量规律进餐。不节食——专注代谢质量而非限制卡路里。
方药：二陈汤加减（加荷叶、山楂、枳实）。
8周结果：体重−9磅。腰围−2.5英寸。精力显著改善。便溏消除。腹胀减轻90%。患者："我没有吃得更少——我只是不再在每顿饭后感到筋疲力尽了。"
Teaching point — the most important clinical insight for obesity: "I don't eat much but keep gaining weight" is a legitimate clinical presentation of Spleen Qi deficiency, not a psychological rationalisation. The Spleen's failure to transform means that even moderate food intake is incompletely metabolised → converted to Phlegm-Damp → stored as fat. Treating these patients with caloric restriction alone (without restoring Spleen transformation function) produces temporary weight loss followed by rapid regain as soon as normal eating resumes. Restoring the Spleen's metabolic efficiency is the key — when the Spleen works efficiently, the same food intake produces Qi rather than Phlegm.教学要点——肥胖最重要的临床洞见："我吃得不多但一直在增重"是脾气虚的合理临床表现，而非心理合理化。脾的运化失常意味着即使适度的食物摄入也不能完全代谢→转化为痰湿→储存为脂肪。仅用限制卡路里治疗这些患者（不恢复脾的运化功能）会产生短暂减重，一旦恢复正常进食后迅速反弹。恢复脾的代谢效率是关键——当脾正常运化时，同样的食物摄入产生气而非痰。
Emotional Disorders情志病证
Palpitations心悸
Palpitations is the subjective awareness of one's own heartbeat — felt as racing, pounding, fluttering, or irregular. In TCM, the Heart governs the blood vessels AND houses the Shen (spirit/consciousness). Palpitations are therefore always a dual disturbance: the physical rhythm of the Heart, and the stability of the Shen that lives within it. Understandingmeans understanding what makes the Shen lose its anchor. 心悸是对自身心跳的主观感知——感觉为心跳加速、砰砰跳、扑动或不规律。在中医，心主血脉且藏神（神/意识）。因此心悸始终是双重扰动：心脏的物理节律，以及居于其中的心神的稳定性。理解心悸，意味着理解什么使心神失去锚定。
⚠ Cardiac Safety Screen — MUST Complete Before TCM Treatment⚠ 心脏安全筛查——治疗前必须完成
Palpitations can be benign (functional, emotional, constitutional) or life-threatening (arrhythmia, structural cardiac disease). TCM treats functional palpitations. Red flags requiring immediate cardiology referral:
• Palpitations + syncope or near-syncope (loss of consciousness)
• Palpitations + chest pain or pressure
• Palpitations + severe dyspnea or orthopnea
• Irregular rhythm confirmed on pulse (especially irregularly irregular = atrial fibrillation)
• New onset in patients with known cardiac history, hypertension, or diabetes
• Family history of sudden cardiac death

Always confirm: has patient had ECG? If palpitations are frequent and no ECG, refer before treating. 心悸可以是良性的（功能性、情志性、体质性），也可以是危及生命的（心律失常、结构性心脏病）。中医治疗功能性心悸。需立即转诊心脏科的红旗警征：
• 心悸+晕厥或晕厥前兆（意识丧失）
• 心悸+胸痛或胸压感
• 心悸+严重呼吸困难或端坐呼吸
• 脉诊确认不规律节律（尤其绝对不规律=房颤）
• 已知心脏病史、高血压或糖尿病患者新发心悸
• 家族猝死史

务必确认：患者是否做过心电图？如频繁心悸且无心电图，治疗前先转诊。
Qi Dynamic Framework · The Heart as Sovereign and Residence气机框架 · 心为君主之官与神的居所
The Heart's dual role: Pumps Blood (physical) AND anchors the Shen (spiritual). When either is disrupted, palpitations result — but the mechanism differs completely.

Excess palpitations (— /):
Fire, Phlegm-Fire, or Blood Stasis disturbs the Heart from outside — the Shen is attacked by pathological Qi. The Heart's rhythm is disrupted from without. The palpitations are typically forceful, sudden, emotion-triggered, accompanied by heat or agitation.

Deficiency palpitations (—):
The Shen has no adequate home — Blood, Qi, or Yin is insufficient to nourish the Heart and anchor the Shen. The Heart's chamber is empty; any minor stimulus (sound, movement, thought) bounces the untethered Shen into awareness. The palpitations are typically mild, persistent, fatigue-triggered, accompanied by weakness.

Teaching key: The same symptom (awareness of heartbeat) arises from opposite mechanisms. Treatment is therefore completely different: excess → clear and drain; deficiency → nourish and anchor. 心的双重角色：泵血（物质层面）且藏神（精神层面）。两者任一受扰均导致心悸——但机制完全不同。

实证心悸（升太过/出入失常）：
火热、痰火或血瘀从外扰动心脏——心神被病理之气攻击。心的节律受外部干扰。心悸通常有力、突发、情绪诱发，伴热感或躁动。

虚证心悸（降不及）：
心神无充分居所——血、气或阴不足以濡养心脏和锚定心神。心之室空虚；任何细小刺激（声音、动作、思虑）都使失锚的心神弹入意识。心悸通常轻微、持续、劳累诱发，伴虚弱感。

教学要点：同一症状（对心跳的感知）来自完全相反的机制。治疗因此截然不同：实证→清泻；虚证→滋养固摄。
Quality of Palpitation心悸性质
Describe the sensation: Is it a forceful pounding, a rapid flutter, a skipping or irregular beat, or a gentle persistent awareness? Is it distressing and alarming, or just noticeable?描述感觉：是有力的砰砰跳，是快速扑动，是漏跳或不规律，还是轻微持续的感知？是令人苦恼和警觉的，还是只是能察觉到？
→ Forceful/alarming = likely excess; gentle/persistent = likely deficiency. This single distinction guides the entire treatment strategy.→ 有力/令人恐惧=多为实证；轻微/持续=多为虚证。这一区别引导整体治疗策略。
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Two Sides of the Same Symptom机理 · 同一症状的两面
The severity and quality of the palpitation sensation directly maps to the excess/deficiency axis:

Forceful, racing, alarming (with fear): The Shen is being actively attacked by pathological Qi (Fire, Phlegm-Fire). The Heart is contracting against resistance. The patient feels threatened — this is the Shen reacting to an assault.

Gentle, persistent, easily fatigued ("constant palpitations"): The Heart chamber is undernourished. The Shen has no firm ground. Even normal movement causes the Heart to "feel itself" because there is no Blood or Qi cushion. In TCM, (zhēngchōng) specifically denotes the chronic deficiency type and is considered more serious and harder to treat than acute . 心悸感觉的严重程度和性质直接映射虚实轴线：

有力、急速、令人恐惧的心悸：心神正被病理之气（火热、痰火）主动攻击。心脏在阻力下收缩。患者感到受威胁——这是心神对攻击的反应。

轻微、持续、劳则加剧（怔忡——"持续性心悸"）：心之室营养不足。心神无坚实根基。即使正常活动也使心脏「感知自身」，因为没有血或气的缓冲。在中医，怔忡特指慢性虚损型，被认为比急性心悸更严重、更难治。
Forceful, sudden, alarming有力、突发、令人恐惧
Excess — Fire/Phlegm实证——火/痰
Gentle, persistent, with fatigue轻微、持续、伴疲乏
Deficiency — Qi/Blood/Yin虚证——气/血/阴
Irregular rhythm on pulse脉律不齐
ECG first 先做心电图
Triggers诱发因素
What brings it on? Emotional upset (anger, fear, fright)? Physical exertion? Rest? At night? After eating? Spontaneously without obvious cause?什么诱发？情绪激动（愤怒、恐惧、惊吓）？体力活动？休息时？夜间？餐后？无明显原因自发出现？
→ Emotion-triggered = Shen disturbance (excess or Heart-GB Xu); exertion-triggered = Qi/Blood deficiency; night + heat = Yin Xu; after eating = Phlegm-Fire from Middle Jiao→ 情绪诱发=心神受扰（实证或心胆气虚）；劳累诱发=气/血虚；夜间+热象=阴虚；餐后=中焦痰火
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Trigger Reveals Mechanism机理 · 诱因揭示机制
Emotional trigger (fright, anger, excitement): The emotion directly disrupts Qi flow → sudden surge disturbs the Shen in its residence → palpitations. This maps to Heart-Gallbladder Qi Xu (— easily startled) or Liver Fire (anger → Fire → Heart).

Exertion trigger: Physical activity demands more Qi and Blood → the deficient Heart cannot supply the demand → Shen is underserved → palpitations. Maps to Heart Qi Xu, Heart Blood Xu.

Night trigger with heat: At rest, Yang enters Yin — if Yin is deficient, this transition disturbs the Heart (water insufficient to cool fire at night). Maps to Heart-Kidney Yin Xu.

After eating: Eating activates Middle Jiao Qi → if Phlegm-Heat is in the Middle Jiao, this activation drives Phlegm-Fire upward to disturb the Heart. 情绪诱发（惊吓、愤怒、兴奋）：情绪直接扰乱气机→突然冲击扰动居于其中的心神→心悸。映射到心胆气虚（易受惊）或肝火（怒→火→心）。

劳累诱发：体力活动需要更多气血→虚损的心无法满足需求→心神供养不足→心悸。映射到心气虚、心血虚。

夜间伴热象：休息时阳入阴——若阴虚，此过渡扰动心脏（水不足以在夜间制火）。映射到心肾阴虚。

餐后：进食激活中焦气机→若中焦有痰热，此激活将痰火向上驱动扰心。
Fright / startle trigger惊吓诱发
Heart-GB Xu心胆气虚
Exertion trigger + fatigue劳累诱发+疲乏
Qi/Blood Xu气血虚
Anger trigger + heat signs愤怒诱发+热象
Liver Fire → Heart肝火扰心
Night + five-centre heat + sweats夜间+五心烦热+盗汗
Yin Xu阴虚
Accompanying Symptoms — Mind & Body伴随症状——身心两方面
Anxiety, restlessness, or fear during the palpitation? Insomnia, poor memory, or dream-disturbed sleep? Fatigue, pale face, poor appetite? Dizziness, tinnitus, low back ache?心悸时有焦虑、烦躁或恐惧感？失眠、健忘或梦扰？疲乏、面色苍白、纳差？眩晕、耳鸣、腰酸？
→ Anxiety/fear with palpitation = Shen unanchored; fatigue/pallor = Blood/Qi Xu; dizziness + tinnitus + back = Kidney involvement (Yin Xu)→ 心悸时焦虑/恐惧=心神失锚；疲乏/面色苍白=气血虚；眩晕+耳鸣+腰酸=肾（阴虚）
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Reading the System Failure机理 · 解读系统失调
The accompanying symptoms reveal which organ systems are failing and in which direction:

Anxiety + fear during palpitation: The Shen is experiencing its own instability — it is both the cause and the witness of its own disturbance. This is the hallmark of Shen pathology, not just cardiac pathology.

Poor memory + dream-disturbed sleep + fatigue + pale face: Heart Blood and Spleen Blood Xu — Blood is insufficient to nourish both the Heart (memory, Shen) and the Spleen (appetite, digestive energy). Classic Heart-Spleen Dual Xu pattern.

Dizziness + tinnitus + low back ache: Kidney involvement — Kidney Yin is depleted (tinnitus = KI channel ascending without nourishment; low back = KI domain; dizziness = Marrow/Brain under-nourished). This is the Heart-Kidney Yin Xu pattern. 伴随症状揭示哪些脏腑系统失调及方向：

心悸时焦虑+恐惧：心神正在经历自身的不稳定——它既是自身紊乱的原因，又是见证者。这是神志病理的标志，而非单纯心脏病理。

健忘+梦扰+疲乏+面色苍白：心血和脾血虚——血不足以同时濡养心脏（记忆、心神）和脾（食欲、消化能量）。经典心脾两虚证型。

眩晕+耳鸣+腰酸：肾受累——肾阴耗竭（耳鸣=肾经上升无濡养；腰酸=肾主腰；眩晕=髓/脑濡养不足）。这是心肾阴虚证型。
Pattern Decision Tree辨证决策树
Step 1 — Excess or Deficiency?第一步——实证还是虚证？ Forceful + sudden + emotion-triggered + excess pulse = Excess (①②). Gentle + persistent + fatigue-triggered + weak pulse = Deficiency (③④⑤).有力+突发+情绪诱发+实脉=实证（①②）。轻微+持续+劳累诱发+弱脉=虚证（③④⑤）。
Step 2 — Which excess?第二步——哪种实证？ Heat signs (bitter, red tongue, yellow coat) → Liver Fire (①). Greasy coat + muzzy head + nausea → Phlegm-Fire (②).热象（口苦、舌红、黄苔）→肝火（①）。腻苔+头昏+恶心→痰火（②）。
Step 3 — Which deficiency?第三步——哪种虚证？ Easily startled + pale tongue + thin pulse → Heart-GB Xu (③). Fatigue + pallor + poor appetite → Heart-Spleen Xu (④). Night sweats + five-centre heat + red tongue no coat → Heart-Kidney Yin Xu (⑤).易惊+舌淡+脉细→心胆气虚（③）。疲乏+面白+纳差→心脾两虚（④）。盗汗+五心烦热+舌红无苔→心肾阴虚（⑤）。
① Liver Fire Harassing the Heart① 肝火扰心——升太过
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden forceful palpitations triggered by anger/stress; irritability; bitter taste; red eyes; headache; insomnia; red tongue yellow coat; wiry-rapid pulse情绪激动/压力诱发的突发有力心悸；烦躁；口苦；目赤；头痛；失眠；舌红苔黄；脉弦数
Qi dynamic气机— Liver Fire erupts upward through the chest into the Heart, directly assaulting the Shen. The palpitation IS the Shen reacting to Fire's intrusion. Fire drives Blood to move chaotically → Heart rhythm disrupted.升太过——肝火向上冲过胸部入心，直接冲击心神。心悸正是心神对火热入侵的反应。火热驱使血液运行紊乱→心律失调。
Formula方药or + (Magnetite-Cinnabar pill — anchors Shen)龙胆泻肝汤或丹栀逍遥散+磁朱丸（重镇安神）
② Phlegm-Fire Disturbing the Heart — +② 痰火扰心——升太过+出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状Palpitations with extreme agitation, possibly incoherent speech or confused thinking; chest oppression; bitter taste; copious sputum; yellow greasy tongue coat; slippery-rapid or wiry-slippery-rapid pulse心悸伴极度躁动，可能言语不清或思维混乱；胸闷；口苦；痰多；苔黄腻；脉滑数或弦滑数
Qi dynamic气机Phlegm blocks the Heart orifices (at the Heart level) + Fire agitates from above. The Shen cannot enter or exit cleanly — it is trapped in a Phlegm-clouded, Fire-heated Heart chamber. In severe cases, this pattern approaches (manic-depressive disorder). The palpitation is inseparable from the mental disturbance.痰阻心窍（心层面的出入失常）+火从上方扰动（升太过）。心神不能干净地进出——被困在充满痰浊、火热的心室中。严重时，此证型接近癫狂（双相障碍）。心悸与神志扰乱不可分离。
Formula方药(clear Phlegm-Fire) + (if severe manic features)黄连温胆汤（清痰火）+生铁落饮（如有明显狂躁表现）
③ Heart-Gallbladder Qi Deficiency③ 心胆气虚——出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状Palpitations easily triggered by fright or sudden sounds; anxiety; timidity; poor sleep with nightmares; easily startled; pale tongue; wiry-thin or thin-weak pulse心悸易被惊吓或突然声音诱发；焦虑；胆怯；睡眠差伴噩梦；易受惊；舌淡；脉弦细或细弱
Qi dynamic气机— Gallbladder Qi is too weak to maintain the Yang-Yin boundary. Any external stimulus crosses that boundary too easily and disturbs the Shen. The Heart has no Qi armor — it feels everything. This is the most "emotional" palpitation pattern — essentially anxiety made physical.出入失常——胆气太弱无法维持阴阳边界。任何外部刺激都太容易穿越该边界扰动心神。心脏没有气的防护——它感知一切。这是最具「情志性」的心悸证型——本质上是焦虑的躯体化。
Formula方药+ (if Blood Xu component)安神定志丸+酸枣仁汤（兼血虚成分时）
④ Heart-Spleen Dual Deficiency④ 心脾两虚——降不及
Key symptoms主要症状Gentle palpitations worsened by fatigue; pallor; fatigue; poor appetite; loose stool; poor memory; insomnia with difficulty falling asleep; pale swollen tongue thin white coat; thin-weak pulse轻微心悸劳累加重；面色苍白；疲乏；纳差；大便溏；健忘；失眠难以入睡；舌淡胖薄白苔；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机— The Spleen fails to generate enough Blood (and). The Heart is chronically under-nourished. The Shen has no Blood to dwell in — it becomes restless from emptiness, not from attack. Treatment must primarily tonify Spleen and Heart Blood, not calm the Shen directly (calming without nourishment is treating the branch while ignoring the root).降不及——脾不能生成足够的血（脾统血且脾为气血生化之源）。心脏长期营养不足。心神无血可居——因空虚而浮动，而非受攻击。治疗必须首先补脾、养心血，而非直接安神（无濡养的安神是治标忽根）。
Formula方药(Guipi Tang — the primary Heart-Spleen Xu formula)归脾汤（心脾两虚的首选方）
⑤ Heart-Kidney Yin Deficiency⑤ 心肾阴虚——降不及
Key symptoms主要症状Palpitations worse at night; night sweats; five-centre heat; dizziness; tinnitus; low back soreness; poor memory; red tongue little or no coat; thin-rapid pulse心悸夜间加重；盗汗；五心烦热；眩晕；耳鸣；腰酸；健忘；舌红少苔或无苔；脉细数
Qi dynamic气机— Kidney Yin (Water) cannot rise to cool and nourish the Heart (Fire). The Heart-Kidney axis (— Water and Fire in mutual aid) has broken down. Heart Fire has no Water anchor; it disturbs the Shen unchecked at night. This is the chronic downstream endpoint of long-term emotional stress or untreated Liver Fire.降不及——肾阴（水）不能上升以濡养、制约心（火）。心肾轴（水火既济）已崩解。心火无水的锚定；夜间不受约束地扰动心神。这是长期情志压力或未治肝火的慢性下游终点。
Formula方药(moderate) or (severe, red tongue no coat)天王补心丹（中等）或黄连阿胶汤（重证，舌红无苔）
Core Points — All Patterns核心穴位——所有证型
HT7 神门 Shenmen Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
HT7 is the Yuan-Source point of the Heart channel — the primary point for ALL Heart Shen disorders. In palpitations, it directly addresses the Shen instability regardless of cause. It calms without sedating, grounds without suppressing. Essential in every palpitation protocol, excess or deficient. The technique (reinforcing vs reducing) adjusts according to pattern, not the point itself.HT7是心经原穴——所有心神疾患的首要穴位。在心悸中，无论病因如何均直接针对心神不稳定。它安神而不镇静，固摄而不压制。在每个心悸处方中均必不可少，无论虚实。操作手法（补/泻）根据证型调整，而非穴位本身。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun. Reducing for excess patterns; reinforcing for deficiency patterns. Always gentle — the Heart channel is sensitive.直刺0.3–0.5寸。实证用泻法；虚证用补法。始终轻柔——心经敏感。
PC6 内关 Neiguan Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
PC6 is the Luo point of the Pericardium (Heart Protector) and master point of the Yinwei Mai. Its specific action in palpitations: (1) Regulates Heart rhythm — PC6 directly influences cardiac rate through the Pericardium's protective relationship with the Heart; (2) Opens the chest and relieves oppression — essential when palpitations come with chest tightness; (3) Calms the Shen through the Pericardium, which buffers the Heart from emotional assault. The Pericardium is the "Heart's diplomat" — it receives and filters emotional impacts before they reach the Heart Shen.PC6是心包经络穴，阴维脉主穴。在心悸中的特异作用：①调节心律——PC6通过心包对心脏的保护关系直接影响心率；②宽胸除烦——当心悸伴胸闷时尤为必要；③通过心包安神，心包在情志冲击到达心神之前进行缓冲和过滤。心包是「心的外交官」——接收并过滤情志影响，使其不直接波及心神。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing for most patterns. Patient often feels Qi radiating toward the chest — this is the desired response.直刺0.5–1寸。大多数证型用平补平泻。患者常感气感向胸部放射——这是预期反应。
BL15 心俞 Xinshu Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
BL15 is the Back-Shu (associated effect) point of the Heart. It directly communicates with the Heart organ — its position on the Bladder channel at the level of the Heart provides direct access to regulate Heart Qi, Blood, and Shen. In palpitations, BL15 is particularly valuable for deficiency patterns (reinforcing) where the Heart needs direct Qi and Blood supplementation. Paired with HT7 (Front-Back Shu-Yuan combination), it creates a powerful dual-access treatment: HT7 from the Yin surface, BL15 from the Yang surface.BL15是心的背俞穴。直接与心脏器官沟通——其在膀胱经上与心脏平行的位置提供直接调节心气、心血和心神的通路。在心悸中，BL15对虚证特别有价值（补法），心脏需要直接的气血补充。与HT7配伍（俞原配穴），形成强力的双向通路治疗：HT7从阴面，BL15从阳面。
Technique操作
Oblique medial 0.5–0.8 cun (angled toward spine). NEVER perpendicular — pneumothorax risk. Reinforcing for deficiency; even method or mild reducing for excess. Can add moxa for Yang/Qi deficiency patterns.斜向脊柱方向刺0.5–0.8寸。切勿垂直深刺——气胸风险。虚证用补法；实证用平补平泻或轻泻。气/阳虚证型可加灸。
GV14 大椎 Dazhui Assistant (Excess patterns only)佐（仅用于实证）
Why this point为什么选它
GV14 is the meeting point of all Yang channels and the primary point for clearing excess Heat from the entire body. In Liver Fire or Phlegm-Fire palpitations, GV14 provides a systemic Heat-clearing action that supports the channel-specific clearing of LV2 and GB43. It is particularly useful when the patient presents with significant heat signs (fever, flushing, agitation) accompanying the palpitations. Not used in deficiency patterns — would further damage already-depleted resources.GV14是所有阳经的交会穴，是清全身实热的首要穴位。在肝火或痰火心悸中，GV14提供系统性清热作用，支持LV2和GB43的经脉特异性清热。当患者出现明显热象（发热、面红、躁动）伴随心悸时特别有用。不用于虚证——会进一步耗损已经不足的资源。
Technique操作
Slightly upward oblique 0.5–1 cun. Reducing method. Can bleed with lancet in severe heat presentations. Do not use moxa here in Fire patterns.略向上斜刺0.5–1寸。泻法。严重热象时可点刺放血（刺血）。火热证型勿在此穴用灸。
Pattern Modifications随证加减
① Liver Fire → Heart①肝火扰心Add LV2 (reducing) + GB43 (reducing). Combination: HT7 + PC6 + BL15 + LV2 + GB43 + GV14.加LV2行间（泻法）+GB43侠溪（泻法）。组合：HT7+PC6+BL15+LV2+GB43+GV14。
② Phlegm-Fire②痰火扰心Add ST40 (reducing) + CV12 (even method). Combination: HT7 + PC6 + ST40 + CV12 + LV2 + GV14.加ST40丰隆（泻法）+CV12中脘（平补平泻）。组合：HT7+PC6+ST40+CV12+LV2+GV14。
③ Heart-GB Xu③心胆气虚Add GB40 (reinforcing) + ST36 (reinforcing). All reinforcing technique. Optional moxa on CV4.加GB40丘墟（补法）+ST36足三里（补法）。全用补法。可在CV4加灸。
④ Heart-Spleen Xu④心脾两虚Add ST36 (reinforcing) + SP6 (reinforcing) + BL20 (reinforcing). Moxa on ST36 and BL20 strongly recommended to build Spleen Yang for Blood generation.加ST36足三里（补法）+SP6三阴交（补法）+BL20脾俞（补法）。强烈建议在ST36和BL20灸以建脾阳生血。
⑤ Heart-Kidney Yin Xu⑤心肾阴虚Add KI3 (reinforcing) + KI6 (reinforcing) + SP6 (reinforcing). No moxa on Fire points. Even gentle reinforcing technique throughout.加KI3太溪（补法）+KI6照海（补法）+SP6三阴交（补法）。火热穴位不用灸。全程轻柔补法。
归脾汤 Guīpí Tāng
Source: Pattern: Heart-Spleen Dual Deficiency (④)出处：《济生方》· 证型：心脾两虚（④）
Gentle persistent palpitations, fatigue, poor appetite, pallor, insomnia, poor memory, loose stool, pale swollen tongue, thin-weak pulse轻微持续心悸，疲乏，纳差，面色苍白，失眠，健忘，大便溏，舌淡胖，脉细弱
党参 12g黄芪 15g白术 9g茯神 12g当归 9g龙眼肉 9g酸枣仁 15g远志 6g木香 6g炙甘草 6g生姜 3片大枣 5枚
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
Spleen-tonifying axis: + + + — builds Spleen Qi so Blood can be generated (Spleen is the source of Blood production). prevents these heavy tonics from causing stagnation — vital addition.

Heart-nourishing axis: + — nourishes Heart Blood directly. + + — calm Shen and open Heart orifices.

Formula logic in Qi dynamic terms: Spleen Qi Xu → Blood not generated → Heart Blood Xu → Shen has no home. restores the Spleen→Blood→Heart supply chain from the upstream source. It is not primarily a "calm Shen" formula — it is a "build the Blood that holds the Shen" formula.补脾轴线：党参+黄芪+白术+炙甘草——建脾气以生血（脾为血的生化之源）。木香防止这些重补药产生滞碍——关键加味。

养心轴线：当归+龙眼肉——直接养心血。茯神+酸枣仁+远志——安神开心窍。

气机框架中的方义：脾气虚→血不生（降不及）→心血虚→心神无所居。归脾汤从上游来源恢复脾→血→心的供应链。它本质上不是「安神」方——而是「建养心神之血」的方。
炙甘草汤 Zhì Gāncǎo Tāng
Source: Pattern: Qi and Blood Deficiency with irregular pulse出处：《伤寒论》· 证型：气血两虚伴脉律不齐
Palpitations with irregular or intermittent pulse, shortness of breath, fatigue, pale or sallow complexion, dry mouth, pale or slightly red tongue, thin-weak-intermittent pulse心悸伴脉律不齐或结代脉，气短，疲乏，面色苍白或萎黄，口干，舌淡或略红，脉细弱或结代
炙甘草 12g生地 30g党参 9g桂枝 9g阿胶 9g烊化麦冬 9g麻仁 9g生姜 9g大枣 10枚
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
is the classical formula for the (knotted-intermittent pulse) — the pulse associated with arrhythmia from Qi and Blood deficiency. It has a uniquely balanced composition: + + + nourish Yin and Blood heavily; + warm Yang to move the newly-generated Blood; + + tonify the Central Qi that drives the Heart's pumping action. This is a Qi-Blood-Yin-Yang formula simultaneously — appropriate because the represents a systemic deficiency. Classically decocted with rice wine to enhance its Blood-moving circulation property.炙甘草汤是结代脉（气血虚损所致心律失常的脉象）的经典方。其组成独特平衡：生地+阿胶+麦冬+麻仁大量滋阴养血；桂枝+生姜温阳以推动新生之血运行；炙甘草+党参+大枣补益推动心脏搏动的中气。这是同时兼顾气血阴阳的方——适用于结代脉所代表的系统性虚损。经典煎法加入清酒以增强其活血通脉之性。
黄连阿胶汤 Huánglián Ējiāo Tāng
Source: Pattern: Heart-Kidney Yin deficiency with Fire — severe (⑤)出处：《伤寒论》· 证型：心肾阴虚兼火——重证（⑤）
Severe palpitations at night, extreme agitation, insomnia, night sweats, five-centre heat, dry mouth, red tongue with zero coating, thin-rapid pulse夜间严重心悸，极度烦躁，失眠，盗汗，五心烦热，口干，舌红无苔，脉细数
黄连 9g黄芩 6g白芍 9g阿胶 9g烊化鸡子黄 2枚
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
This 5-herb formula from the Shang Han Lun is exceptionally elegant: + directly drain Heart Fire from above; + (egg yolk) nourish Yin and Blood from below; moderates the bitter cold of /and nourishes Liver Blood (preventing the clearing herbs from harming Yin further). The classical preparation note: add (egg yolk) after cooling the decoction — do not boil the egg yolk. This represents the most precise Water-Fire balancing formula in the classical repertoire: clear the Fire, simultaneously restore the Water.此方来自《伤寒论》，五味药极为精妙：黄连+黄芩从上直泻心火；阿胶+鸡子黄（蛋黄）从下滋阴养血；白芍缓和黄连/黄芩的苦寒，养肝血（防止清热药进一步伤阴）。经典制备注意：汤液冷却后加入鸡子黄——不要煮沸蛋黄。这代表经典方中最精准的水火既济方：清火的同时恢复水。
Case 1案例一Liver Fire Palpitations — Continuation from Emotional Insomnia肝火心悸——情志失眠的延续
Patient: 44M, engineer. 6 monthshistory, now: forceful pounding heart episodes triggered by argument or deadline stress. Episodes last 5–20 min, self-terminate. Also: insomnia (wakes 2am), irritability, bitter taste. ECG taken last month — normal sinus rhythm. Red tongue, yellow coat, wiry-rapid pulse.患者：男，44岁，工程师。6个月郁证史，现：争吵或截止日期压力诱发有力的砰砰心跳发作。每次发作持续5–20分钟，自行终止。另有：失眠（凌晨2点醒），烦躁，口苦。上月心电图——正常窦性心律。舌红，苔黄，脉弦数。
(6 months)郁证（6个月）
→
Liver Fire generated肝火产生
→
Fire erupts upward → Heart火热上冲→入心
→
Shen disturbed → palpitations + insomnia心神受扰→心悸+失眠
Treatment: . Acupuncture: HT7 + PC6 + BL15 + LV2 + GB43 + GV14. Lifestyle: cold water face splash during episode (activates vagal response — modern rationale maps to descending the surge of Yang Qi). Avoid alcohol (, amplifies Fire).治疗：丹栀逍遥散。针灸：HT7+PC6+BL15+LV2+GB43+GV14。生活方式：发作时用冷水冲脸（激活迷走反射——现代理论映射为引降上冲的阳气）。避免饮酒（热性，放大火热）。
Outcome: After 6 sessions, palpitation frequency reduced from daily to 1–2x/week. Insomnia parallel improvement. Teaching point: treating Liver Fire resolves both palpitations AND insomnia simultaneously — same root, two expressions.疗效：6次治疗后，心悸频率从每天减少到每周1–2次。失眠同步改善。教学要点：治疗肝火同时解决心悸和失眠——同一根本，两种表现。
Case 2案例二Heart-Spleen Xu — The Overworked, Under-nourished Pattern心脾两虚——过劳、营养不足证型
Patient: 29F, graduate student, 2 years of overwork and poor eating. Gentle persistent palpitations worsened by exertion. Fatigue, poor appetite, pale face, loose stool, forgetful, cannot concentrate. Pale swollen tongue with teeth marks, thin white coat. Thin-weak pulse.患者：女，29岁，研究生，2年过劳饮食不规律。轻微持续心悸劳累加重。疲乏，纳差，面色苍白，大便溏，健忘，注意力不集中。舌淡胖有齿痕，薄白苔。脉细弱。
Overwork + poor diet injures Spleen过劳+饮食不节伤脾
→
Spleen fails to generate Blood脾失生血
→
Heart Blood Xu → Shen unanchored心血虚→心神失锚
→
Gentle palpitations + cognitive deficits轻微心悸+认知功能下降
Treatment: (12-week course minimum). Acupuncture: HT7 + PC6 + BL15 + BL20 + ST36 + SP6 (all reinforcing, moxa on ST36 and BL20). Dietary: regular warm meals, reduce cold raw food (damages Spleen Yang). Reduce study hours temporarily.治疗：归脾汤（最少12周疗程）。针灸：HT7+PC6+BL15+BL20+ST36+SP6（全用补法，ST36和BL20加灸）。饮食：规律温热餐食，减少生冷食物（损伤脾阳）。暂时减少学习时间。
Outcome: Palpitations resolved at 8 weeks. Energy and appetite improved significantly by week 6. Memory and concentration improved at 10 weeks. Full course needed — Blood deficiency takes time to rebuild.疗效：心悸于8周消失。精力和食欲在第6周明显改善。记忆力和注意力于第10周改善。需完整疗程——血虚需要时间重建。
Case 3案例三Case — Irregular Pulse in Deficiency Pattern炙甘草汤案——虚证结代脉
Patient: 61M, retired. Palpitations with noticeable "skipping beats." Shortness of breath on exertion. Fatigue. Slight dry mouth. Pale-red tongue, thin coat. Pulse: thin-weak with occasional missed beats. GP confirmed benign PVCs on ECG — no structural disease, no treatment indicated by cardiology. Referred for TCM management.患者：男，61岁，退休。心悸伴明显「漏跳」感。劳力性气短。疲乏。轻微口干。舌淡红，苔薄。脉细弱伴偶尔停跳（结脉）。全科医师心电图确认良性室性早搏——无器质性病变，心脏科无需治疗。转介中医处理。
Treatment: (30ml). Acupuncture: HT7 + PC6 + BL15 + ST36 + KI3 (all reinforcing, mild moxa on BL15 and ST36). 12-week course. Monthly pulse monitoring to track frequency.治疗：炙甘草汤（煎法：加清酒30ml同煎）。针灸：HT7+PC6+BL15+ST36+KI3（全用补法，BL15和ST36轻灸）。12周疗程。每月脉诊监测结脉频率。
Teaching point: is one of the few classical formulas with a direct modern parallel — studies show it can reduce PVC frequency in benign arrhythmia. The (missed-beat pulse) is the diagnostic key: it indicates the Heart's Qi-Blood cannot sustain continuous, even contraction. rebuilds this supply from all four dimensions (Qi, Blood, Yin, Yang) simultaneously.教学要点：炙甘草汤是少数有直接现代对应研究的经典方——研究显示可减少良性心律失常的室早频率。结代脉（漏跳脉）是诊断关键：表明心脏气血不能维持持续、均匀的收缩。炙甘草汤从四个维度（气、血、阴、阳）同时重建这一供应。
Emotional Disorders Cascade — Full Picture情志病证级联——全貌
→ (Fire) → → (continued Fire) → → (Fire burns Yin) → → . Each stage is the untreated or under-treated previous stage. A patient with in a deficiency pattern has almost always passed through theand emotional insomnia stages first. 郁证→（化火）→情志失眠→（火持续）→心悸→（火灼阴）→心肾阴虚→脏躁。每个阶段都是上一阶段未治或治疗不足的结果。处于虚证心悸的患者，几乎都已经历过郁证和情志失眠阶段。
Lung System · Throat肺系病证 · 咽喉
Chronic Pharyngitis慢性咽炎
A persistent throat disorder with two distinct mechanisms — Phlegm-Qi stagnation (overlap) versus Yin deficiency with Empty Fire. Misidentifying the pattern leads to opposite and counterproductive treatment.持续性咽喉病证，两种截然不同的机制——痰气郁结（与梅核气重叠）对比阴虚火旺。识别错证型会导致方向相反且适得其反的治疗。
Chronic Pharyngitis vs Plum Pit Qi — The Critical Distinction慢性咽炎与梅核气——关键鉴别
Plum Pit Qi: The sensation is purely functional — something stuck in the throat that cannot be swallowed or coughed up. No objective finding on examination. Driven entirely by Liver Qi stagnation and Phlegm. When the Liver Qi resolves, the sensation disappears.

Chronic Pharyngitis — Phlegm-Qi type: Similar sensation to Plum Pit Qi but with actual mucosal changes — redness, swelling, follicles on the posterior pharyngeal wall. The Qi stagnation has produced structural Phlegm accumulation in the mucosa itself.

Chronic Pharyngitis — Yin deficiency type: Dry, scratchy, burning throat. No phlegm. Worse in afternoon and evening. The Lung-Kidney Yin is depleted, Empty Fire rises to scorch the throat. This is the opposite mechanism — not Phlegm excess but Yin deficiency. Using Phlegm-dissolving herbs on a Yin-deficient throat worsens it dramatically. 梅核气：感觉纯粹是功能性的——咽中如有物梗阻，吞之不下，吐之不出。检查无客观发现。完全由肝气郁滞和痰所驱动。肝气疏通后感觉消失。

慢性咽炎——痰气郁结型：感觉类似梅核气，但有实际黏膜改变——咽后壁红肿、滤泡增生。气机郁滞已在黏膜本身产生痰的结构性积聚。

慢性咽炎——阴虚火旺型：干燥、刺痒、灼热感。无痰。午后和傍晚加重。肺肾阴虚，虚火上炎灼烧咽喉。这是相反的机制——不是痰实而是阴虚。对阴虚咽喉使用化痰药会显著加重。
Character of Throat Discomfort咽喉不适性质
Dry and burning, or phlegmy and sticky? Worse morning or evening? Emotional stress trigger? Voice affected?干燥灼热，还是有痰粘腻？晨起还是傍晚加重？情绪压力触发？声音受影响？
→ Dry + evening worse = Yin deficiency. Phlegmy + stress worse = Phlegm-Qi stagnation→ 干燥+傍晚加重=阴虚。有痰+压力加重=痰气郁结
Dry + burning + evening worse + no phlegm干燥+灼热+傍晚加重+无痰
Yin deficiency Empty Fire阴虚火旺
Sticky phlegm + stress worse + globus sensation粘痰+压力加重+梗阻感
Phlegm-Qi stagnation痰气郁结
Morning worse + yellow phlegm + red throat晨起加重+黄痰+咽红
Phlegm-Heat痰热蕴结
Yin Deficiency Empty Fire (most common chronic type)阴虚火旺证（最常见慢性型）
Deficiency虚证
Lung-Kidney Yin depleted → Empty Fire rises to scorch throat → chronic dry burning pharynx肺肾阴虚→虚火上炎灼烧咽喉→慢性干燥灼热咽部
Key symptoms主要症状Chronic dry, scratchy, burning throat; no phlegm or minimal clear sticky; worse afternoon/evening; worse with talking; mild hoarseness; thirst but dry mouth worse at night; low-grade fever possible; red tongue little coat; thready-rapid pulse慢性咽干、刺痒、灼热；无痰或少量清稀粘痰；午后/傍晚加重；多言加重；轻度声嘶；口渴但夜间口干更甚；可有低热；舌红苔少；脉细数
Treatment治疗Nourish Yin, clear Empty Fire, moisten the throat. KI3 + LU7 (the Lung-Kidney Yin axis) + CV23 (throat local). Herbal: Yang Yin Qing Fei Tang or Bai He Gu Jin Tang. NEVER use warm, drying, or Phlegm-resolving herbs — they will worsen the Yin deficiency dramatically.滋阴清虚火，润喉。KI3太溪+LU7列缺（肺肾阴液轴）+CV23廉泉（咽喉局部）。方药：养阴清肺汤或百合固金汤。绝对不用温燥或化痰药——会显著加重阴虚。
Phlegm-Qi Stagnation (overlap)痰气郁结证（与梅核气重叠）
Mixed虚实夹杂
Liver Qi stagnation + Phlegm accumulation → structural Phlegm in pharyngeal mucosa → globus + visible follicles肝气郁滞+痰邪积聚→咽黏膜结构性痰邪→梗阻感+可见滤泡
Key symptoms主要症状Globus sensation (something stuck); visible redness and follicles on posterior pharyngeal wall; sticky phlegm; worse with emotional stress; throat clears frequently; wiry or slippery pulse; white or slightly greasy coat梗阻感（如有物）；咽后壁可见红肿和滤泡增生；粘稠痰；情绪压力加重；频繁清嗓；脉弦或滑；苔白或略腻
Treatment治疗Smooth Liver Qi + dissolve Phlegm + open the throat channel. LV3 + PC6 + ST40 + CV22 (opens throat, descends rebellious Qi). Herbal: Ban Xia Hou Po Tang (the definitive formula). Add +to target the throat specifically.疏肝气+化痰+开通咽喉经络。LV3+PC6+ST40+CV22天突（开通咽喉，降逆气）。方药：半夏厚朴汤（确定性方剂）。加玄参+桔梗专向靶向咽喉。
Core Points — All Pharyngitis所有咽炎核心穴位
CV22天突The master local point for all throat conditions. Located at the suprasternal notch. Needle technique: insert perpendicular 0.2 cun, then angle the needle downward behind the sternum 1–1.5 cun. This reaches directly into the tracheal and pharyngeal space. Opens the throat, descends rebellious Qi, dissolves Phlegm. Essential for both Yin deficiency and Phlegm-Qi types — but technique is different: lighter stimulation for Yin deficiency, stronger for Phlegm-Qi.所有咽喉病症的主局部穴。位于胸骨上窝。针刺技术：垂直进针0.2寸，然后角度向下沿胸骨后方1–1.5寸。这直接到达气管和咽喉空间。开咽喉，降逆气，化痰。对阴虚和痰气型均必要——但手法不同：阴虚轻刺激，痰气郁结强刺激。
CV23廉泉Local point above the hyoid bone. Needle directed toward the root of the tongue. Promotes fluid secretion in the throat — directly addresses the dryness of Yin deficiency type. Also dissolves Phlegm in the throat channel. Combine with CV22 for all pharyngitis.舌骨上方的局部穴。朝向舌根方向进针。促进咽喉液体分泌——直接处理阴虚型的干燥。也化咽喉经络中的痰邪。所有咽炎均与CV22合用。
LU7 + KI6 (Ba Mai pair)LU7列缺+KI6照海（八脉交会穴对）The classical pair for throat disorders: "Lieque Ren Mai, LU7 paired with KI6" — this combination opens the Ren Mai and simultaneously nourishes Lung and Kidney Yin. It is the systemic Yin-nourishing pair that supports the local throat treatment. Essential for Yin deficiency type. Also effective in Phlegm-Qi type to prevent Yin damage from the dispersing herbs.咽喉病症的经典穴对："列缺任脉，照海阴跷脉"——此组合开通任脉同时滋养肺肾阴液。是支持局部咽喉治疗的全身滋阴穴对。阴虚型必用。痰气郁结型也有效，防止疏散药物损伤阴液。
Yang Yin Qing Fei Tang养阴清肺汤
Yin deficiency chronic pharyngitis — dry burning throat, evening worse, red tongue little coat, thready rapid pulse阴虚慢性咽炎——咽干灼热，傍晚加重，舌红苔少，脉细数
Mechanism: ++deeply nourish Lung-Kidney Yin — the root treatment for the dry scorched throat. nourishes Blood and Yin. cools Blood-Heat (the Empty Fire aspect). moistens and dissolves any residual thin Phlegm without drying. lightly disperses and reaches the throat. The formula is entirely cool-moist in nature — exactly what the scorched Yin-deficient throat needs. Take after meals, slightly warm, twice daily.机理：生地黄+玄参+麦冬深层滋养肺肾阴液——干燥灼热咽喉的根本治疗。白芍养血滋阴。牡丹皮凉血清热（虚火方面）。川贝母润肺化痰不燥，化解残余稀薄痰邪。薄荷轻散达咽喉。全方性质清润——正是阴虚灼热咽喉所需。饭后温服，每日两次。
Ban Xia Hou Po Tang半夏厚朴汤
Phlegm-Qi stagnation pharyngitis — globus sensation, sticky phlegm, stress-triggered, follicles on posterior wall痰气郁结咽炎——梗阻感，粘稠痰，压力触发，咽后壁滤泡
Mechanism: The classical formula for — works equally for Phlegm-Qi chronic pharyngitis. dissolves Phlegm; moves Qi downward and opens the throat; drains Damp; disperses stagnant Qi from the throat surface; warms and helps disperse. Add 15g (cools and moistens the throat mucosa) and 10g (guides upward to the throat, opens and ventilates the pharyngeal channel) to specifically target the chronic pharyngitis component beyond the Plum Pit Qi presentation.机理：梅核气的经典方——对痰气郁结慢性咽炎同样有效。半夏化痰；厚朴行气向下开通咽喉；茯苓渗湿；苏叶疏散咽喉表面郁滞之气；生姜温散。加玄参15g（凉润咽黏膜）和桔梗10g（向上引导至咽喉，开通和通气咽喉经络）以专向靶向超越梅核气表现的慢性咽炎成分。
Case — "Chronic Pharyngitis" Treated Backwards for 2 Years病案——"慢性咽炎"被逆向治疗2年
Patient: 45F, teacher. Throat dryness and mild burning for 2 years. Multiple courses of antibiotics (no effect). Tried various "throat clearing" herbal teas (made worse). ENT: chronic pharyngitis, mild. Symptoms: dry scratchy throat, worse after long lectures, worse late afternoon and evening. No phlegm. Red tongue, almost no coat. Thready rapid pulse. Also: low back soreness, night sweats occasionally. She had been self-medicating with spicy "throat-clearing" teas.患者：女，45岁，教师。咽干轻度灼热2年。多次抗生素疗程（无效）。尝试各种"清咽"凉茶（反而加重）。耳鼻喉科：慢性咽炎，轻度。症状：咽干刺痒，长时间授课后加重，午后和傍晚加重。无痰。舌红苔几乎无。脉细数。也有：腰酸，偶有盗汗。一直自用辛辣"清咽"凉茶。
The error: "Throat-clearing" teas are typically composed of cool dispersing herbs (like , , ). These are appropriate for Phlegm-Heat pharyngitis with thick yellow phlegm. But for Yin deficiency pharyngitis, dispersing herbs scatter the remaining Yin — making the dryness progressively worse. The more tea she drank, the worse the throat became. This is iatrogenic Yin damage from incorrect pattern identification.

Pattern: Lung-Kidney Yin deficiency (+++= Kidney Yin deficiency confirmed). The Empty Fire rises to scorch the pharynx. Teaching voice + long speaking depletes Qi and Yin further.

Treatment: Yang Yin Qing Fei Tang (8 weeks). Acupuncture: CV22, CV23, LU7, KI6, KI3 (all reinforcing, no moxa on throat points). Forbidden: all dispersing, drying, or spicy substances. Voice rest when possible.

4 weeks: Dryness 50% improved. Night sweats gone. 8 weeks: throat comfortable. Still mild dryness after long lectures — advised KI3 + SP6 daily self-massage and Yin-nourishing diet (pear, lily bulb , black sesame). 错误所在："清咽"凉茶通常由清散草药（如菊花、胖大海、金银花）组成。这些适合有黄稠痰的痰热咽炎。但对阴虚咽炎，疏散草药耗散残余阴液——使干燥逐渐加重。越喝茶，咽喉越差。这是因证型识别错误造成的医源性阴损。

证型：肺肾阴虚（舌红苔少+脉细数+腰酸+盗汗=肾阴虚确证）。虚火上炎灼烧咽部。教学用嗓+长时间说话进一步耗竭气阴。

治疗：养阴清肺汤（8周）。针灸：CV22、CV23、LU7、KI6、KI3（均补法，咽喉穴位不灸）。禁忌：所有疏散、温燥或辛辣物质。尽量声休。

4周：干燥改善50%。盗汗消失。8周：咽喉舒适。长时间授课后仍有轻度干燥——建议每日自我按摩KI3+SP6，滋阴饮食（梨、百合、黑芝麻）。
Teaching point: Chronic pharyngitis has two opposite mechanisms. The single most important question: is there phlegm or is the throat dry? Phlegm = dissolve and disperse. Dry = nourish and moisten. Applying dispersing treatment to a dry throat is the most common error — and it is exactly what most over-the-counter throat remedies do. Always check the tongue coat: no coat = Yin deficiency. Greasy coat = Phlegm.教学要点：慢性咽炎有两种相反的机制。最重要的单一问题：有痰还是咽干？有痰=化解和疏散。干燥=滋养和润泽。对干燥咽喉用疏散治疗是最常见的错误——这也正是大多数非处方咽喉药物所做的。始终检查舌苔：无苔=阴虚。腻苔=痰。
Emotional Disorders情志病证
Plum Pit Qi梅核气
Plum Pit Qi is the classical TCM name for the sensation of something lodged in the throat — neither swallowable nor expectorable. It is not a structural lesion. It is the bodily language of suppressed emotion: Qi stagnation generates Phlegm, and the two bind together in the throat, the body's most exposed gate between inner and outer. Understandingmeans understanding how the body somatises what the mind cannot process. 梅核气是中医对咽部异物感的经典命名——既咽不下，又吐不出。它不是器质性病变，而是情志压抑的躯体语言：气滞生痰，气痰互结，阻于咽喉——这是内外之间最暴露的门户。理解梅核气，就是理解身体如何将心智无法处理的情绪转化为躯体症状。
Qi Dynamic Framework · Why the Throat?气机框架 · 为何结于咽喉？
Core Mechanism: (Entry-Exit Disruption) + (Ascent-Descent Imbalance)

The Liver governs the smooth flow of Qi in all directions. When emotional suppression obstructs Liver Qi, the outward-moving Qi is blocked. Stagnant Qi cannot transform fluids → Phlegm accumulates. Qi and Phlegm then bind in the throat — the junction between the chest and the exterior world.

Why the throat specifically? In Chinese medical geography, the throat is the gateway of expression — the route through which interior Qi exits into the world as speech, breath, and voice. Suppressed emotions (anger not spoken, grief not expressed) have nowhere to go. Qi attempts to exit through its natural gate but is blocked by Phlegm. The result: a persistent sense of obstruction exactly where expression should occur.

Key teaching point:is the most common somatisation pattern in TCM. The sensation is real, the obstruction is functional, the lesion is in the Qi dynamic, not in the tissue. Modern ENT scopes show nothing — because there is nothing structural to find. 核心病机：出入失常 + 升降失调

肝主疏泄，调畅全身气机。情志压抑阻碍肝气，向外运行之气（出）受阻。气滞不能运化津液→痰湿内生。气与痰相互凝结（气痰互结），阻于咽喉——胸腔与外界之间的交界门户。

为何偏结于咽喉？在中医的身体地理学中，咽喉是表达的门户——内在之气通过言语、呼吸、声音出于外界的通路。被压抑的情绪（未说出的愤怒，未释放的悲伤）无处可去。气试图从其自然出口外出，却被痰所阻。结果：在本应表达之处产生持续的梗阻感。

教学要点：梅核气是中医最常见的躯体化模式。感觉是真实的，梗阻是功能性的，病变在气机而非组织。现代喉镜检查无异常——因为没有器质性病变可寻。
⚠ Rule Out Before TCM Treatment⚠ 治疗前必须排除器质性病变
is a diagnosis of exclusion. Always confirm modern workup has ruled out: esophageal cancer (especially in older patients, smokers, or those with dysphagia to solids), thyroid mass, GERD (gastroesophageal reflux disease), laryngopharyngeal reflux, tonsillar hypertrophy, cervical osteophyte. Red flags requiring immediate referral: progressive difficulty swallowing solids → liquids, unintentional weight loss, blood in sputum, hoarseness >3 weeks. 梅核气是排除性诊断。治疗前必须确认已排除：食管癌（尤其年龄较大、吸烟、固体食物吞咽困难的患者）、甲状腺肿块、胃食管反流病（GERD）、喉咽反流、扁桃体肥大、颈椎骨赘。需立即转诊的红旗警征：进行性吞咽固体→液体困难、非自愿体重减轻、痰中带血、声嘶>3周。
Chief Complaint主诉
Describe the throat sensation. Does it feel like something is stuck — but nothing comes up when you try to clear it, and you can still swallow food and drink normally?描述一下咽喉的感觉。是否感觉有什么东西卡在那里——但试图咳清时什么也吐不出，且吞咽食物和饮水仍然正常？
→ The hallmark triad: sensation present + cannot hawk up + swallowing unimpaired = functional obstruction, not structural→ 三联征：有感觉+咳吐不出+吞咽不受影响=功能性梗阻，而非器质性
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · The Functional-Structural Distinction机理 · 功能性与器质性的区别
The defining feature ofis the dissociation between sensation and function: the patient feels obstruction but swallows normally. This is only possible if the obstruction is in the Qi layer, not in the physical tissue. Qi and Phlegm bind creating a functional block that activates sensory nerve endings (hence the persistent sensation) without creating mechanical resistance to the food bolus (hence swallowing is intact).

When swallowing is also impaired, the obstruction has crossed into the physical tissue layer — this is a red flag requiring immediate ENT referral. 梅核气的定义性特征是感觉与功能的分离：患者有梗阻感，但吞咽正常。这只有在梗阻位于气层而非实质组织时才可能发生。气痰互结产生功能性阻滞，激活感觉神经末梢（因此有持续感觉），但不对食团产生机械阻力（因此吞咽完好）。

当吞咽也受损时，梗阻已进入实质组织层——这是需要立即转诊耳鼻喉科的红旗警征。
Sensation present, swallowing intact有感觉，吞咽正常
Out-disruption气痰互结 出入失常
Progressive dysphagia (solids > liquids)进行性吞咽困难（固体>液体）
REFER immediately 立即转诊
Modulating Factor加减因素
Does the throat sensation get worse when you are stressed, emotionally upset, or ruminating — and improve when you are relaxed, distracted, or on holiday?咽喉感觉在紧张、情绪激动或反复思虑时加重，放松、转移注意力或度假时减轻？
→ Emotion-dependence is the single most important diagnostic feature — it confirms the Qi dynamic origin→ 情志依赖性是最重要的单一诊断特征——确认气机源头
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Qi Follows the Mind机理 · 气随心动
Emotional stress immediately disrupts Liver Qi's smoothing function → aggravates Qi stagnation → intensifies the→ sensation worsens. Relaxation restores Liver Qi flow → Phlegm-Qi bond loosens → sensation fades. This fluctuation mirrors the Qi dynamic directly. A structural lesion (tumor, lymph node) would NOT fluctuate with emotional state. This one question reliably separates functional from structural obstruction when combined with intact swallowing. 情绪紧张立即破坏肝气疏泄→气郁加重→气痰互结加深→感觉恶化。放松恢复肝气运行→气痰互结松动→感觉减轻。这种波动直接映射气机变化。器质性病变（肿瘤、淋巴结）不会随情绪状态波动。结合吞咽完好，这一个问题可靠地区分功能性与器质性梗阻。
Worse with stress, better with distraction紧张加重，分心减轻
Qi stagnation confirmed气郁确认
Constant, unrelated to emotion持续存在，与情志无关
Investigate structurally 需影像检查
Associated Symptoms伴随症状
Any chest tightness, flank distension, frequent sighing, nausea, or the feeling of mucus in the throat that won't clear? Any emotional history of suppression, grief, frustration, or prolonged stress?有无胸闷、胁肋胀满、频繁叹气、恶心，或咽喉有黏痰感但咳不出？有无压抑、悲伤、郁闷或长期压力的情志病史？
→ These confirm Liver Qi stagnation + Phlegm accumulation as the full pathological picture→ 这些症状确认肝气郁滞+痰湿内生的完整病理图像
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · The Qi-Phlegm Cascade机理 · 气痰互结的形成链条
Sighing: The body's instinctive attempt to move stagnant Qi upward and outward — temporary relief through forced Qi expansion.

Chest tightness + flank distension: Liver Qi stagnation affects its own territory (flanks, Shaoyang axis) and the chest (Qi cannot distribute upward through the chest).

Nausea + mucus sensation: Stagnant Qi fails to help Spleen transform fluids → Phlegm-Damp accumulates in Middle Jiao, rises with rebellious Qi to the throat.

Emotional history: Anger, grief, frustration, and prolonged worry are the four most common Liver Qi stagnation triggers. Ask gently — patients often do not connect throat symptoms with emotional state. 叹气：身体本能地试图将停滞之气向上向外运动——通过强制气体扩张暂时缓解。

胸闷+胁肋胀满：肝气郁滞影响其自身领地（两胁、少阳轴）及胸部（气不能向上布散于胸中）。

恶心+黏痰感：气滞无法协助脾运化水液→痰湿内生于中焦，随逆行之气上达咽喉。

情志病史：怒、悲、郁、忧是肝气郁滞最常见的四种诱因。温和地询问——患者往往不将咽喉症状与情绪状态联系起来。
Sighing + chest tight + flank distension叹气+胸闷+胁胀
Qi stagnation气郁 出入失常
Nausea + mucus + sticky sensation恶心+黏痰+黏腻感
Phlegm accumulation痰凝 降不及
Heat signs: dry mouth, red tongue tip热象：口干，舌尖红
Stagnation → Fire郁久化火 升太过
Tongue & Pulse舌脉
Tongue coating — thin white or white greasy? Tongue body color? Pulse — wiry, slippery, or wiry-slippery?舌苔——薄白苔或白腻苔？舌体颜色？脉象——弦脉、滑脉，或弦滑脉？
→ Thin white = pure Qi stagnation; greasy = Phlegm added; wiry = Liver; slippery = Phlegm; wiry-slippery = classic pulse→ 薄白苔=纯气郁；腻苔=已有痰凝；弦=肝；滑=痰；弦滑=梅核气经典脉象
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Reading the Qi-Phlegm Ratio机理 · 读取气痰比例
The tongue and pulse together reveal whether Qi stagnation or Phlegm accumulation is the dominant component — this directly governs whether to emphasize Qi-moving or Phlegm-dissolving in treatment.

Thin white coat + wiry pulse: Qi stagnation dominant, Phlegm minimal. Treat primarily with Qi-moving herbs/points (, , PC6, LV3).

White greasy coat + wiry-slippery pulse: Phlegm has fully formed. Must address Phlegm as equal priority (, , ST40, CV22).

Red tongue body + thin yellow coat: Stagnation has generated Fire. Add heat-clearing to the formula (,). 舌脉共同揭示气郁还是痰凝占主导地位——这直接决定治疗中是侧重行气还是化痰。

薄白苔+弦脉：气郁为主，痰湿较少。主要用行气药/穴（厚朴、苏梗、PC6、LV3）。

白腻苔+弦滑脉：痰已充分形成。必须将化痰列为同等优先级（半夏、茯苓、ST40、CV22）。

舌体红+薄黄苔：郁滞已化火。在方中加入清热药（黄芩、栀子）。
Thin white + wiry薄白苔+弦
Qi dominant气郁为主
White greasy + wiry-slippery白腻苔+弦滑
Qi + Phlegm气痰并重
Red body + yellow coat舌红+黄苔
Fire added兼热
Pattern Differentiation — 3 Steps辨证三步法
Step 1:第一步： Confirm core pattern: throat sensation + emotion-triggered + normal swallowing = (all cases ofshare this base)确认核心证型：咽喉异物感+情志诱发+吞咽正常=气痰互结（所有梅核气共享此基础）
Step 2:第二步： Is there Heat? → Red tongue, dry mouth, irritability = . Is there significant Phlegm-Damp? → Greasy tongue, nausea, heavy body = with Damp是否有热象？→舌红、口干、烦躁=气郁化火。是否有明显痰湿？→腻苔、恶心、身重=痰气交阻兼湿
Step 3:第三步： Is there deficiency? → Prolonged illness, fatigue, pale tongue = Spleen Qi Xu or Yin Xu complicating the stagnation pattern是否有虚损？→病程较长、疲乏、舌淡=脾气虚或阴虚兼夹于郁滞证型
① Qi-Phlegm Binding (Core Pattern)① 气痰互结（核心证型）——出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状Throat obstruction sensation, worse with stress, better at rest; chest tightness; frequent sighing; normal swallowing; white/greasy tongue coat; wiry or wiry-slippery pulse咽喉异物感，情绪紧张时加重，休息时减轻；胸闷；频繁叹气；吞咽正常；白/腻苔；弦脉或弦滑脉
Qi dynamic气机— Qi cannot exit through the throat gate. Phlegm blocks the channel. Ascending-descending is secondarily disrupted because Phlegm in the Middle Jiao interferes with Stomach descent.出入失常——气不能从咽喉门户外出。痰凝阻塞通道。升降亦次级受干扰，因中焦痰湿妨碍胃气下降。
Formula方药Banxia Houpo Tang (core formula for all)半夏厚朴汤（所有梅核气的核心方）
② Qi Stagnation Generating Fire② 气郁化火——升太过
Key symptoms主要症状Throat obstruction + dry mouth + bitter taste + irritability + red tongue with thin yellow coat + wiry-rapid pulse咽喉异物感+口干+口苦+烦躁+舌红薄黄苔+弦数脉
Qi dynamic气机+ — prolonged Qi stagnation generates Fire. Fire has an upward nature, further driving Qi and Phlegm upward and heating the throat. The throat now has both obstruction (Phlegm-Qi) AND heat irritation (Fire).出入失常+升太过——气郁日久化火。火性炎上（升太过），进一步驱使气痰上冲，灼热咽喉。咽部此时既有梗阻（气痰），又有热刺激（郁火）。
Formula方药+ or (add heat-clearing)半夏厚朴汤+丹栀逍遥散或加味逍遥散（加清热）
③ Qi-Phlegm + Spleen Deficiency③ 气痰互结兼脾气虚——出入失常兼升不及
Key symptoms主要症状Prolonged+ fatigue + poor appetite + loose stool + pale swollen tongue with teeth marks + thin white coat + weak pulse梅核气日久+疲乏+纳差+大便溏+舌淡胖有齿痕+薄白苔+脉弱
Qi dynamic气机Spleen Qi Xu = Spleen cannot raise clear Yang and transform fluids → Phlegm-Damp becomes self-generating. Even if you move the Qi-Phlegm obstruction, it will re-form because the Spleen keeps producing new Phlegm. Must tonify Spleen alongside dissolving Phlegm.脾气虚（升不及）=脾不能升清阳、运化水液→痰湿自我再生。即使疏散气痰互结，也会重新形成，因为脾持续产生新的痰湿。必须在化痰同时补脾。
Formula方药+ (Spleen-tonifying base)半夏厚朴汤+六君子汤（补脾为基础）
Same Treatment, Different Diseases异病同治
(Banxia Houpo Tang) appears in multiple disease contexts: here forthroat obstruction; infor chest-flank stagnation with Phlegm; in the Cough module for Phlegm-Damp obstructing Lung descent. The common thread: Phlegm-Qi binding obstructing a Qi gate — whether that gate is the throat, the chest, or the Lung. The formula works because it simultaneously moves Qi (,) and dissolves Phlegm (,), restoring entry-exit through whichever gate is blocked. 半夏厚朴汤出现在多个疾病语境中：此处用于梅核气咽喉梗阻；在郁证中用于气痰互结致胸胁郁滞；在咳嗽模块中用于痰湿阻肺降。共同线索：气痰互结阻塞某一气机门户——无论该门户是咽喉、胸中还是肺。该方有效是因为它同时行气（厚朴、苏叶）和化痰（半夏、茯苓），恢复被阻门户的出入功能。
Core Protocol — Base (All Patterns)核心处方——气痰互结基础（所有证型）
CV22 天突 Tiantu Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
CV22 sits at the suprasternal notch — the exact physical location of the throat gate. As the local point of , it directly addresses the site of Qi-Phlegm obstruction. The Conception Vessel runs through the throat and is the primary channel linking the uterus (emotional storage) to the pharynx. Needling CV22 opens the throat gate, dissipates the local Qi-Phlegm binding, and restores entry-exit movement through this gate.天突位于胸骨上窝——咽喉门户的确切解剖位置。作为梅核气的局部穴，直接针对气痰互结的部位。任脉循行过咽喉，是连接胞宫（情志储藏所）与咽部的主要经脉。针刺天突开咽喉之门户，消散局部气痰互结，恢复该门户的出入运动。
Technique ⚠操作 ⚠
Two-step needling — mandatory safety procedure:
Step 1: Insert needle perpendicular 0.2 cun (just past skin).
Step 2: Angle needle 90° downward, directing tip behind the sternum (not into the trachea). Advance 0.5–1 cun along the posterior sternal wall.
Never thrust forward — the trachea lies immediately anterior. Never angle laterally — the carotid vessels and pleura are at risk. Even reinforcing-reducing technique. Have patient breathe shallowly during insertion.两步进针法——强制安全程序：
第一步：垂直进针0.2寸（刚过皮肤）。
第二步：针尖向下转90°，沿胸骨后壁（而非气管）推进0.5–1寸。
切勿向前直刺——气管紧邻前方。切勿向侧面进针——颈动脉和胸膜均在危险范围内。平补平泻手法。进针时令患者浅呼吸。
PC6 内关 Neiguan Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
PC6 is the Luo point of the Pericardium channel and master point of the Yinwei Mai. Its two key actions in: (1) Opens the chest — relieves chest tightness by restoring Qi circulation in the thoracic cavity; (2) Regulates the Heart and Shen — the Pericardium protects the Heart from emotional assault, and PC6 is the primary point for emotion-related chest/throat constriction. It is also the classic point for nausea (rebellious Stomach Qi) — directly relevant when Phlegm rises upward.PC6是心包经络穴，阴维脉主穴。在梅核气中有两个关键作用：①宽胸——通过恢复胸腔气循环解除胸闷；②调心安神——心包保护心脏免受情志侵害，PC6是情志相关胸咽收缩的首要穴位。亦是恶心（胃气上逆）的经典穴——在痰邪上升时直接相关。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing. Slight medial angle allowable. Patient should feel Qi sensation radiating up the forearm toward the chest.直刺0.5–1寸。平补平泻。可略向内侧角度。患者应感受到气感沿前臂向胸部放射。
LV3 太冲 Taichong Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
LV3 is the Yuan-Source point and Shu-Stream point of the Liver channel. It addresses the root cause of: Liver Qi stagnation. By directly regulating the Liver's smoothing and flowing function, LV3 works upstream of the entire pathology cascade. When Liver Qi flows freely, it ceases to generate Phlegm, and the throat obstruction loses its source. Paired with PC6 (with LI4 in other contexts), this creates a powerful Qi-moving combination across the whole body.LV3是肝经原穴、输穴。针对梅核气的根本病因：肝气郁滞。通过直接调节肝的疏泄功能，LV3在整个梅核气病理链条的上游起效。当肝气畅达，不再生成痰湿，咽喉梗阻便失去其来源。与PC6配伍（在其他情境中与LI4组成四关），形成强力的全身行气组合。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Reducing method — rapid insertion, wider stimulation, slow withdrawal. Strong Qi sensation expected.直刺0.5–1寸。泻法——快速进针，较强刺激，缓慢出针。预期有较强得气感。
ST40 丰隆 Fenglong Minister臣
Why this point为什么选它
ST40 is the premier Phlegm-resolving point in the entire acupuncture system — the Luo point of the Stomach channel that regulates fluid metabolism across the Middle Jiao. Wherever there is Phlegm (in throat, chest, anywhere), ST40 addresses the Phlegm component directly. In, Phlegm is co-equal with Qi stagnation; ST40 handles the Phlegm arm while LV3 and PC6 handle the Qi arm. This is a classic two-axis treatment strategy.ST40是整个针灸体系中化痰第一要穴——胃经络穴，调节中焦水液代谢。无论痰在何处（咽喉、胸中、任何部位），ST40直接针对痰的成分。在梅核气中，痰与气郁同等重要；ST40处理痰的轴线，而LV3和PC6处理气的轴线。这是经典的双轴治疗策略。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–2 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing or reducing. Strong stimulation appropriate for Phlegm (excess) patterns.直刺1–2寸。平补平泻或泻法。较强刺激适用于痰（实证）证型。
LI4 合谷 Hegu Assistant佐
Why this point为什么选它
LI4 is the command point for the face and mouth region, and the Yuan-Source of the Large Intestine channel. In throat conditions, LI4 has a specific descending action on the throat and head region — the Large Intestine channel passes through the lower jaw and connects to the throat area. Paired with LV3 (Four Gates), LI4 + LV3 together create a powerful whole-body Qi-regulating combination: LI4 moves Qi downward from the upper body; LV3 moves Qi from the Liver axis outward.LI4是面口部位的主穴，大肠经原穴。在咽喉病证中，LI4对咽喉和头部区域有特异性下降作用——大肠经循行经过下颌与咽喉区域。与LV3配伍（四关），LI4+LV3共同形成强力的全身调气组合：LI4引气从上部下行；LV3使气从肝经轴线向外运行。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Even reinforcing-reducing. Contraindicated in pregnancy.直刺0.5–1寸。平补平泻。孕妇禁用（强刺激可能引起宫缩）。
Modifications by Pattern随证加减
Heat signs热象（气郁化火）Add LV2 (reducing) — Liver channel Ying-Spring point, clears Liver Fire without damaging Yin. Add GB34 to dredge Shaoyang and descend Fire.加LV2行间（泻法）——肝经荥穴，清肝火而不伤阴。加GB34阳陵泉以疏少阳、降火。
Spleen Qi Xu兼脾气虚Add ST36 (reinforcing) + SP6 (even method) — tonify Spleen to address the Phlegm source. Reduce ST40 stimulation strength.加ST36足三里（补法）+SP6三阴交（平补平泻）——补脾以断痰源。减轻ST40刺激强度。
Significant anxiety/Shen disturbance明显焦虑/神志不宁Add HT7 — calms the Shen directly. Add GV20 — grounds ascending Yang, steadies the mind.加HT7神门——直接安神。加GV20百会——镇降升阳、安定心神。
半夏厚朴汤 Bànxià Hòupò Tāng
Source: Jin Gui Yao Lue (Essential Prescriptions of the Golden Cabinet)出处：《金匮要略》
The foundational formula forin all patterns — Qi-Phlegm binding causing throat obstruction, chest tightness, frequent sighing, nausea; white greasy tongue; wiry-slippery pulse梅核气所有证型的基础方——气痰互结致咽喉异物感、胸闷、频繁叹气、恶心；白腻苔；弦滑脉
半夏 12g 厚朴 9g 茯苓 12g 生姜 9g 苏叶 6g
Formula Logic方义解析
Sovereign君药
Banxia 12g — Dissolves Phlegm, descends rebellious Qi, and opens the throat. As the strongest Phlegm-dissolving herb, directly attacks the Phlegm arm of. Its descending nature also counteracts the upward displacement of Phlegm-Qi toward the throat (restoring descent/).半夏 12g——化痰散结，降逆止呕，开通咽喉。作为最强的化痰药，半夏直接攻击气痰互结中的痰的轴线。其下降性质也对抗痰气向咽喉上逆（恢复降的功能）。
Minister臣药
Houpo 9g — Moves Qi downward, relieves abdominal and chest distension, dissolves Phlegm-Damp. is the Qi-moving arm: it directly addresses the Qi stagnation component, promotes descent, and broadens the Middle Jiao so Phlegm cannot re-accumulate. Together with, they form the Phlegm-Qi double-attack: dissolves existing Phlegm, moves the Qi that was binding with it.厚朴 9g——行气降逆，宽中除满，燥湿化痰。厚朴是行气轴线：直接针对气滞成分，促进下降（降），宽开中焦使痰不得再聚。与半夏共同构成气痰双攻：半夏化已成之痰，厚朴行与之互结之气。
Assistant佐药
Fuling 12g — Strengthens Spleen, drains Dampness, prevents new Phlegm generation. Without addressing the Phlegm source (Spleen unable to transform fluids), and would dissolve current Phlegm only for it to reform. is the maintenance herb: it repairs the Spleen-fluid metabolism so the formula has lasting effect.

Shengjiang 9g — Warms and harmonizes Middle Jiao, assists in dissolving Phlegm, prevents 's toxicity, descends rebellious Stomach Qi (anti-nausea).茯苓 12g——健脾渗湿，防止新痰再生。若不针对痰的来源（脾不能运化水液），半夏厚朴只能化当下之痰，随后复生。茯苓是维持性药：修复脾的水液代谢，使方药效果持久。

生姜 9g——温中和胃，助半夏化痰，制半夏之毒（半夏配生姜是经典对药），降逆止呕（止恶心）。
Courier使药
Suye 6g — Spreads Lung Qi, moves Qi laterally and outward, lifts depression. In the Qi dynamic framework: specifically restores the outward movement of Qi — the exact direction blocked in. It guides the formula's action toward the throat-chest gate that needs to be reopened. The aroma of also has a direct dispersing effect on Phlegm-Qi binding.苏叶 6g——宣散肺气，横向外出行气，宣肺解郁。在气机框架中：苏叶特异性恢复气的外出运动（出）——正是梅核气中被阻断的方向。它引导全方作用朝向需要重新开放的咽喉-胸门户。苏叶的芳香气味也对气痰互结有直接散化作用。
Formula Logic Summary方义总结
This is a perfectly balanced Qi-Phlegm formula: (dissolve Phlegm) + (move Qi) = attack both components of; (repair Spleen) = prevent recurrence; (warm Middle, anti-nausea) = support ; (open outward gate) = restore the exact Qi direction that is blocked. Five herbs, two axes, complete coverage.这是一个完美平衡的气痰方：半夏（化痰）+厚朴（行气）=双攻互结的两个成分；茯苓（修复脾）=防止复发；生姜（温中止呕）=辅助半夏；苏叶（开出口门户）=恢复被阻的气机方向。五味药，两条轴线，全面覆盖。
加减法 — Pattern Modifications
Base formula modifications for each sub-pattern根据证型加减基础方（半夏厚朴汤）
Modifications by Pattern随证加减
(Heat signs)气郁化火（热象）
Add 9g + 9g (clear Heat without damaging Yin). Or combine with as the base instead. Remove or reduce (warming, counterproductive with Fire). Consider adding (descends Fire, relieves nausea caused by Stomach Heat).加黄芩9g+栀子9g（清热而不伤阴）。或改以丹栀逍遥散为基础方合用。减少或去除生姜（温性，与郁火相悖）。考虑加竹茹（降火，缓解胃热所致恶心）。
(Spleen Xu)兼脾气虚
Combine with (, , , , , — overlaps with base formula, increase dose). The combined formula addresses: dissolves Qi-Phlegm obstruction; rebuilds the Spleen-Phlegm source axis.合用六君子汤（党参、白术、茯苓、甘草、陈皮、半夏——半夏与基础方重叠，增加用量）。合方分工：半夏厚朴汤消散气痰互结；六君子汤重建脾-痰来源轴线。
(Strong Liver Qi stagnation)肝气郁滞明显
Add 9g + 12g to reinforce Liver Qi regulation. Consider combining with as a framework when emotional component dominates over Phlegm component.加柴胡9g+白芍12g（疏肝养阴）以加强调肝力度。当情志成分明显重于痰湿成分时，考虑以逍遥散为框架合用。
Case 1案例一Classic — Qi-Phlegm Binding经典梅核气——气痰互结
Patient: 38F, marketing manager. Chief complaint: throat "lump" sensation for 3 months. Cannot swallow it down or hawk it up. Swallowing food and drink completely normal. Symptoms worsen during deadline periods, disappear entirely on vacation. Chest tightness, frequent sighing. ENT scope: normal. Tongue: pale-red body, thin white coat. Pulse: wiry.患者：女，38岁，市场经理。主诉：咽喉异物感3个月。既不能咽下，又不能吐出。吞咽食物和饮水完全正常。截止日期临近时加重，度假时完全消失。胸闷，频繁叹气。耳鼻喉科喉镜：正常。舌：舌体淡红，薄白苔。脉：弦。
Stress → Liver Qi stagnation压力→肝气郁滞
→
Stagnant Qi fails to transform fluids → Phlegm气郁不能运化水液→生痰
→
Qi + Phlegm bind in throat gate气痰互结于咽喉门户
→
→ obstruction sensation出入失常→梗阻感
Treatment: (standard dose). Acupuncture: CV22 + PC6 + LV3 + ST40 + LI4. Lifestyle: 20 min daily unstructured movement (walk, no phone), journaling to externalize suppressed thought.治疗：半夏厚朴汤（常规剂量）。针灸：CV22+PC6+LV3+ST40+LI4。生活方式：每日20分钟非结构化运动（散步，不看手机），日记外化被压抑的思维。
Outcome (4 weeks): Throat sensation reduced 70%. Still present during extreme stress. Continue formula with addition of9g + 12g to reinforce Liver regulation.疗效（4周）：咽喉异物感减轻70%。极度紧张时仍存在。续方加柴胡9g+白芍12g以加强调肝。
Case 2案例二+ Emotional Counseling Integration气郁化火型梅核气+情志疏导配合
Patient: 45F, divorced 6 months ago. Throat lump + dry mouth + bitter taste on waking + irritability + insomnia (difficulty falling asleep, vivid dreams). Tongue: red body, thin yellow coat. Pulse: wiry-rapid.患者：女，45岁，离婚6个月。咽喉异物感+口干+晨起口苦+烦躁+失眠（难以入睡，多梦）。舌：舌红，薄黄苔。脉：弦数。
Grief/anger suppressed after divorce离婚后压抑悲伤/愤怒
→
Liver Qi stagnation → Fire over time肝气郁滞→日久化火
→
Fire drives Qi-Phlegm upward + irritates Shen郁火驱气痰上冲+扰神
→
+ insomnia co-presentation梅核气+失眠并见
Treatment: + 9g + 9g + 6g (remove). Acupuncture: CV22 + PC6 + LV3 + ST40 + LV2 + HT7. Refer to emotional counseling concurrently — the grief of divorce is the unresolved root; TCM manages the bodily manifestation, counseling addresses the source.治疗：半夏厚朴汤+黄芩9g+栀子9g+竹茹6g（去生姜）。针灸：CV22+PC6+LV3+ST40+LV2+HT7。同时转介情志疏导——离婚的悲伤是未解决的根本；中医处理躯体表现，疏导解决情志来源。
Outcome: After 6 sessions + counseling, irritability significantly reduced. Throat sensation 50% better. Insomnia improving. Continued combined approach 12 weeks total.疗效：6次治疗+心理疏导后，烦躁明显减轻。咽喉异物感好转50%。失眠改善中。继续联合治疗共12周。
Case 3案例三with Spleen Xu — The Chronic Recurrent Pattern梅核气兼脾气虚——慢性反复型
Patient: 52M, retired teacher, mild anxiety history. Throat lump sensation on-and-off for 3 years. Worsens with worry, eases after meals. Fatigue, loose stool, poor appetite. Pale swollen tongue, teeth marks, thin white coat. Weak-wiry pulse.患者：男，52岁，退休教师，有轻度焦虑史。咽喉异物感断续3年。忧虑时加重，餐后稍减。疲乏，大便溏，纳差。舌淡胖，有齿痕，薄白苔。脉弱带弦。
Worry injures Spleen over years思虑多年伤脾
→
Spleen Xu → continuous Phlegm-Damp production脾虚→持续生痰湿
→
Phlegm binds with Qi → reforms repeatedly痰与气互结→梅核气反复形成
→
Cannot resolve with Phlegm-moving alone单纯化痰行气不能根治
Treatment: . Acupuncture: CV22 + PC6 + ST36 (reinforcing) + SP6 + ST40 (even method) + LV3 (mild reducing). Reduce ST40 stimulation strength (avoid over-draining a Xu patient).治疗：半夏厚朴汤合六君子汤。针灸：CV22+PC6+ST36（补法）+SP6+ST40（平补平泻）+LV3（轻泻法）。减轻ST40刺激强度（避免过度泻虚证患者）。
Teaching point: This pattern explains why somepatients relapse repeatedly — the Spleen is continuously generating new Phlegm. Treating Qi-Phlegm obstruction without repairing the Spleen is like removing water from a leaking boat without patching the hole. Only when Spleen function is restored does theresolve durably.教学要点：这一证型解释了为何部分梅核气患者反复复发——脾持续产生新的痰湿。不修复脾而只治气痰互结，如同从漏水的船上舀水却不补洞。只有脾的功能恢复，梅核气才能持久缓解。
Cross-Module Connections跨模块关联
frequently co-presents with (common Liver Qi stagnation root) and (when Phlegm-Fire rises to disturb Shen). When throat obstruction, emotional constraint, AND insomnia occur together, treatas the primary module andas a manifestation pattern. 梅核气常与郁证（共同的肝气郁滞根本）和情志失眠（气痰化火上扰心神时）并发。当咽喉梗阻、情志抑郁和失眠三者同时出现，以郁证为主要模块，梅核气作为其躯体化表现模式处理。
Gynecology · Postpartum妇科病证 · 产后
Postpartum Recovery产后调理
The "month of confinement" — postpartum is a period of profound Qi-Blood depletion requiring targeted rebuilding. Three primary syndromes: postpartum blood deficiency, postpartum blood stasis (lochia retention), and postpartum depression (Heart-Shen failing on an empty Blood foundation).月子——产后是气血深度耗竭的时期，需要有针对性的重建。三种主要综合征：产后血虚、产后血瘀（恶露不绝）和产后抑郁（空血基础上心神失养）。
Postpartum TCM Framework — The Three Priorities产后中医框架——三大优先事项
Childbirth depletes Qi and Blood massively (the labor process) and leaves Blood stasis (placental attachment site, lochia). TCM postpartum management has three sequential priorities:

Priority 1 — Clear the old Blood (first 2 weeks): Ensure complete lochia discharge. Retained Blood (blood stasis) causes pain, fever, and prevents new Blood from being generated. Do not tonify until the old Blood has cleared.

Priority 2 — Rebuild Qi and Blood (weeks 2–6): Once lochia has cleared, begin intensive Qi-Blood tonification. This is the core of the "month of confinement" — rebuilding the depleted reserves.

Priority 3 — Strengthen the Kidney root (weeks 6+): After Qi-Blood is restored, address the deeper Kidney Jing depletion that pregnancy drew upon. This prevents long-term sequelae (premature aging, osteoporosis, hormone imbalances). 分娩大量耗竭气血（分娩过程）并留下血瘀（胎盘附着处，恶露）。中医产后管理有三个顺序优先事项：

第一优先——清除旧血（前2周）：确保恶露完全排出。血液残留（血瘀）引起疼痛、发热，并阻止新血生成。旧血清除之前不要进补。

第二优先——重建气血（第2–6周）：一旦恶露排清，开始密集气血补益。这是"月子"的核心——重建耗竭的储备。

第三优先——强化肾的根本（第6周以后）：气血恢复后，处理妊娠所消耗的更深层肾精耗竭。这可防止长期后遗症（过早衰老、骨质疏松、激素失衡）。
Lochia prolonged + pain + dark clots (week 1–2)恶露延长+疼痛+暗色血块（第1–2周）
Blood stasis — clear first血瘀——先清除
Fatigue + pale + poor milk + brain fog (week 2+)疲劳+面白+乳少+思维迟钝（第2周+）
Qi-Blood Xu — rebuild气血两虚——重建
Weeping + anxiety + insomnia + low milk哭泣+焦虑+失眠+乳少
Postpartum depression — HT-SP Xu产后抑郁——心脾两虚
Blood Stasis — Lochia Retention (weeks 1–2)血瘀证——恶露不绝（第1–2周）
Excess实证
Retained placental Blood stagnates → blocks uterine recovery → prolonged lochia, pain, blocks new Blood generation胎盘残余血液瘀滞→阻碍子宫恢复→恶露延长，疼痛，阻碍新血生成
Key symptoms + treatment主要症状+治疗Lochia dark, clotted, or prolonged past 2 weeks; lower abdominal pain relieved by warmth and massage; prefer warmth on abdomen; dark tongue or purple. Treatment: SP10 + SP8 + ST29 + CV3 (gentle — move Blood without dispersing Qi). Herbal: Sheng Hua Tang (the classical postpartum formula — ++++: activates Blood, warms the uterus, expels retained lochia while simultaneously warming to prevent Cold invasion of the empty uterus). Take in the first 7 days postpartum regardless of pattern — it is the standard postpartum clearing formula.恶露色暗、有血块或超过2周延长；下腹痛温热和按摩后缓解；喜热敷腹部；舌暗或紫色。治疗：SP10+SP8+ST29+CV3（轻柔——活血不散气）。方药：生化汤（经典产后方——当归+川芎+桃仁+炮姜+甘草：活血，温子宫，排出残余恶露同时温化防止寒邪侵入空虚的子宫）。产后前7天无论证型均服——这是标准产后清理方。
Qi-Blood Dual Xu — Core Postpartum Depletion (weeks 2–6)气血两虚证——核心产后耗竭（第2–6周）
Deficiency虚证
Labor depletes Qi (exhaustion) and Blood (blood loss) → pale, fatigued, poor milk, brain fog, hair loss beginning分娩耗竭气（体力消耗）和血（失血）→面白，疲乏，乳少，思维迟钝，开始脱发
Treatment治疗Intensive Qi-Blood tonification. BL17 + BL20 + ST36 (moxa — essential, builds Qi and Blood simultaneously) + SP6 + CV4 (moxa). For insufficient breast milk: add ST18 (local point for lactation) + SI1 (the key distal point for insufficient lactation — SI1 stimulates milk let-down via the Shaoyin-Taiyin axis). Herbal: Ba Zhen Tang + 30g + 10g (the standard postpartum tonification formula). For insufficient milk: add 15g + 6g (promote milk flow through the channels).密集气血补益。BL17+BL20+ST36（灸——必须，同时补气养血）+SP6+CV4（灸）。乳汁不足：加ST18乳根（泌乳局部穴）+SI1少泽（乳汁不足关键远端穴——SI1通过少阴-太阴轴刺激泌乳）。方药：八珍汤+黄芪30g+炙甘草10g（标准产后补益方）。乳少：加王不留行15g+通草6g（促进乳汁通过经络流动）。
Postpartum Depression — Heart-Spleen Xu + Liver Qi产后抑郁证——心脾两虚+肝气郁滞
Mixed虚实夹杂
Blood depleted → Heart-Shen loses nourishment + Liver Qi stagnates from sudden hormonal shift → emotional lability, weeping, anxiety, insomnia血液耗竭→心神失养+激素突然变化导致肝气郁滞→情绪不稳定，哭泣，焦虑，失眠
Treatment治疗Nourish Blood + calm Shen + smooth Liver Qi. HT7 (tonification) + PC6 + LV3 (smooth Liver Qi) + SP6 + BL17 + GV20 (lift Yang to brighten mood). Herbal: Gui Pi Tang + 10g (add Liver-smoothing to the Heart-Spleen tonification base) or Gan Mai Da Zao Tang (the classical formula for Zang Zao — emotional lability from Yin-Blood deficiency — ++nourish the Heart and calm the Shen gently). Screen for severe PPD requiring psychiatric referral.养血安神疏肝气。HT7（补法）+PC6+LV3（疏肝气）+SP6+BL17+GV20（升阳以改善情绪）。方药：归脾汤+柴胡10g（在心脾补益基础上加疏肝）或甘麦大枣汤（脏躁的经典方——阴血不足导致的情绪不稳——甘草+小麦+大枣轻柔滋养心神）。筛查需要精神科转诊的严重产后抑郁。
Postpartum Acupuncture — Key Points and Timing产后针灸——关键穴位和时机
Week 1–2 (stasis clearing phase)第1–2周（清瘀阶段）
SP10 + SP8 + CV3 + ST29 (local uterine point). Gentle stimulation only — the patient is deeply depleted, not just treating stasis. Moxa on CV4 is safe and beneficial from day 3–5 postpartum (warms the uterus, prevents Cold invasion). No strong stimulation, no EA in the first week.SP10+SP8+CV3+ST29归来（子宫局部穴）。仅轻柔刺激——患者深度耗竭，不只是治疗血瘀。CV4艾灸从产后第3–5天起是安全和有益的（温子宫，防止寒邪侵入）。第一周不强刺激，不用电针。
Week 2–6 (rebuilding phase)第2–6周（重建阶段）BL17 + BL20 + BL23 (all with moxa) + ST36 (moxa) + SP6 + CV4 (moxa). This is the classical postpartum rebuilding combination — the three Back-Shu points (Blood, Spleen, Kidney) with moxa represent the three pillars of constitutional rebuilding. Treat weekly. Add HT7 if sleep is disrupted. Add LV3 if emotional lability is present.BL17+BL20+BL23（均加灸）+ST36（灸）+SP6+CV4（灸）。这是经典产后重建组合——三个背俞穴（血、脾、肾）加灸代表体质重建的三大支柱。每周治疗。若睡眠受扰加HT7。若情绪不稳定加LV3。
Insufficient lactation (any time)乳汁不足（任何时间）SI1 (the most important point for insufficient lactation — stimulate strongly by press-needle or needle prick at the tip; this activates the Shaoyin-Taiyin link to the lactation pathway). ST18 (directly below the nipple — local point that opens the breast channels). GB21 (descends Qi from the upper body into the breast — the classical "let-down" point). These three together form the standard lactation acupuncture protocol.SI1少泽（乳汁不足最重要的穴位——通过压针或穴位点刺强刺激；这激活连接泌乳路径的少阴-太阴联系）。ST18乳根（乳头正下方——开通乳腺经络的局部穴）。GB21肩井（从上身向乳房降气——经典"泌乳"穴）。这三穴共同构成标准泌乳针灸方案。
Sheng Hua Tang生化汤
Days 1–7 postpartum (all patients) — the standard postpartum clearing formula regardless of pattern产后第1–7天（所有患者）——无论证型均用的标准产后清理方
Mechanism: The classical "transform and generate" formula for postpartum. Name means "generate the new by transforming the old." (large dose 24g) nourishes Blood AND activates Blood — dual action (essential in postpartum when Blood must both move and be nourished). activates Blood in the uterine channel. breaks Blood stasis to expel retained lochia. (dry-fried ginger) warms the empty uterus and prevents Cold invasion — the postpartum uterus is extremely vulnerable to Cold because it is open and depleted. harmonizes. Take warm, 3× daily for days 1–7. Stop when lochia becomes pale and scanty (stasis cleared).机理：产后经典"化旧生新"方。方名意为"化旧以生新"。当归（大剂量24g）养血和活血——双重作用（产后必须，因为血液既需运动又需滋养）。川芎活子宫经络中的血液。桃仁化血瘀以排出残余恶露。炮姜（炮制生姜）温空虚的子宫，防止寒邪侵入——产后子宫因开放和耗竭而极易受寒。甘草调和。温服，第1–7天每日3次。当恶露变淡变少时停服（血瘀已清）。
Ba Zhen Tang + Huang Qi八珍汤 + 黄芪
Weeks 2–6 rebuilding phase — fatigue, pale complexion, poor appetite, scanty milk, hair loss beginning, pale tongue, thin-weak pulse第2–6周重建阶段——疲劳，面色苍白，食欲差，乳汁少，脱发开始，舌淡，脉细弱
Mechanism: Ba Zhen Tang = Si Jun Zi Tang (— Qi) + Si Wu Tang (— Blood). Adding 30g provides the primary Qi fuel for Spleen-Lung to generate both Qi and Blood simultaneously. This is the foundational postpartum rebuilding formula. Take twice daily for 4–8 weeks. Add 15g + 6g if breast milk is insufficient — these two herbs specifically open the breast channels to promote milk flow. Add 10g + 10g if mood symptoms are present.机理：八珍汤=四君子汤（气）+四物汤（血）。加黄芪30g提供脾肺同时生成气和血的主要气的燃料。这是基础产后重建方。每日两次，服用4–8周。若乳汁不足加王不留行15g+通草6g——这两味药专门开通乳腺经络以促进乳汁流动。若有情绪症状加柴胡10g+香附10g。
Case — Postpartum Depletion: Recovery in 6 Weeks病案——产后耗竭：6周恢复
Patient: 31F. 3 weeks postpartum, second baby. Profound fatigue — cannot lift the baby without help. Breast milk insufficient (supplementing with formula). Hair loss noted. Low mood, weeping easily, anxious about ability to care for children. Lochia stopped at day 10. Pale complexion. Tongue: pale, thin white coat. Pulse: thin-weak, especially cun and guan.患者：女，31岁。产后3周，第二胎。深度疲劳——不能独自抱起婴儿。乳汁不足（补充配方奶）。注意到脱发。情绪低落，容易哭泣，对照顾孩子的能力感到焦虑。恶露第10天停止。面色苍白。舌淡苔薄白。脉细弱，尤以寸和关部。
Analysis: Classic Qi-Blood dual deficiency postpartum (week 2+ phase — lochia has cleared, rebuilding phase begins). The low mood and anxiety are secondary to Blood deficiency (Heart-Shen losing nourishment), not primary depression requiring psychiatric intervention.

6-session protocol (weekly): BL17 + BL20 + BL23 (all moxa) + ST36 (moxa) + SP6 + HT7 (tonification). For lactation: add SI1 (bilateral, press-needle) + ST18 + GB21.
Herbal: Ba Zhen Tang + 30g + 15g + 6g + 10g.

Week 2: Energy improved enough to care for baby independently. Milk supply improved 50%. Mood better.
Week 4: Energy "much better than before pregnancy" (she was Iron-deficient in this pregnancy). Milk supply sufficient — formula discontinued. Hair loss slowing.
Week 6: Mood normal. Energy good. Patient: "I wish I had done this after my first baby too." 分析：经典的气血两虚产后（第2周+阶段——恶露已清，重建阶段开始）。情绪低落和焦虑是血虚（心神失养）的继发症状，而非需要精神科干预的原发性抑郁。

6次方案（每周）：BL17+BL20+BL23（均加灸）+ST36（灸）+SP6+HT7（补法）。泌乳：加SI1（双侧，压针）+ST18+GB21。
方药：八珍汤+黄芪30g+王不留行15g+通草6g+柴胡10g。

第2周：精力改善到足以独立照顾婴儿。乳汁供应改善50%。情绪好转。
第4周：精力"比怀孕前好多了"（她在这次妊娠中有铁缺乏症）。乳汁供应充足——停用配方奶。脱发减缓。
第6周：情绪正常。精力良好。患者："我希望第一胎后也做了这个。"
Teaching point — postpartum depression vs postpartum Blood deficiency: Most mild-to-moderate postpartum emotional symptoms in TCM are secondary to Qi-Blood deficiency, not primary psychiatric illness. When the Blood deficiency is treated, the emotional symptoms resolve without antidepressants. The diagnostic differentiator: if the patient has pale tongue, thin-weak pulse, and physical depletion symptoms (fatigue, poor appetite, insufficient milk) alongside the emotional symptoms, treat the Blood deficiency first. Only if emotional symptoms persist after the physical depletion is addressed should psychiatric referral be considered.教学要点——产后抑郁对比产后血虚：中医大多数轻至中度产后情绪症状是气血虚的继发症状，不是原发性精神疾病。治疗血虚后，情绪症状无需抗抑郁药即可缓解。诊断鉴别要点：若患者有舌淡、脉细弱和躯体耗竭症状（疲劳、食欲差、乳汁不足）同时伴情绪症状，先治血虚。只有在躯体耗竭被处理后情绪症状持续，才应考虑精神科转诊。
Urology · Lower Jiao泌尿生殖 · 下焦
Prostatitis / BPH前列腺炎·前列腺增生
Two conditions, one gland — acute/chronic prostatitis is Damp-Heat in the Lower Jiao; BPH is Kidney deficiency with Phlegm-stasis. The distinction determines treatment direction completely.两种病证，一个腺体——急慢性前列腺炎是下焦湿热；前列腺增生是肾虚痰瘀。鉴别决定治疗方向。
⚠ Screen Before Treating⚠ 治疗前筛查
Acute prostatitis with high fever, chills, and severe urinary symptoms = possible bacterial prostatitis requiring antibiotics — refer or co-manage. PSA elevation with urinary obstruction in older men = refer for prostate cancer screening before initiating TCM. Haematuria (blood in urine) always requires investigation.急性前列腺炎伴高热、寒战和严重泌尿症状=可能是细菌性前列腺炎，需要抗生素——转诊或联合管理。老年男性PSA升高伴尿道梗阻=开始中医治疗前转诊进行前列腺癌筛查。血尿始终需要检查。
Qi Dynamic Framework for Prostate Disorders前列腺病证气机框架
The prostate sits in the Lower Jiao at the intersection of the Kidney, Bladder, and Liver channels. The Kidney governs urination, the Bladder stores and excretes urine, and the Liver channel wraps around the genitals.

Prostatitis (Damp-Heat): + — Damp-Heat accumulates in the Lower Jiao, blocking normal Bladder opening and closing. Symptoms: painful urination, urgency, burning, perineal pain. Hot excess pattern.

BPH (Kidney Xu + Phlegm-stasis): — Kidney Yang declines with age → Qi transformation weakens → Phlegm-stasis condenses in the prostate → gland hypertrophies → mechanical obstruction. Cold deficiency pattern with structural change. 前列腺位于下焦，是肾经、膀胱经和肝经的交汇处。肾主排尿（气化主水），膀胱储存和排泄尿液（开阖），肝经绕阴器。

前列腺炎（湿热）：降不及+出入失常——湿热积聚于下焦，阻塞膀胱正常开阖。症状：排尿疼痛、尿急、灼热感、会阴部疼痛。热性实证。

前列腺增生（肾虚+痰瘀）：出入失常——肾阳随年龄衰退→气化减弱→痰瘀凝结于前列腺→腺体增生→机械性梗阻。寒性虚证伴结构改变。
Painful urination + burning + perineal pain排尿疼痛+灼热+会阴痛
Damp-Heat — prostatitis湿热——前列腺炎
Weak stream + nocturia + elderly + no pain尿流无力+夜尿+老年+无疼痛
KD Xu + stasis — BPH肾虚+瘀滞——前列腺增生
Chronic dull perineal ache + anxiety + sexual慢性钝性会阴痛+焦虑+性功能
Chronic prostatitis — mixed慢性前列腺炎——虚实夹杂
Damp-Heat in Lower Jiao — Acute/Subacute Prostatitis下焦湿热证——急慢性前列腺炎
Excess实证
Damp-Heat accumulates in Lower Jiao → blocks Bladder Qi transformation → painful, burning, frequent urination湿热积聚下焦→阻塞膀胱气化→排尿疼痛、灼热、频繁
Key symptoms主要症状Urinary urgency, frequency, burning pain; perineal and lower abdominal pain; yellow turbid urine; possible fever; sexual dysfunction (pain with ejaculation); red tongue yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse尿急、尿频、灼热感；会阴和下腹部疼痛；尿黄浑浊；可有发热；性功能障碍（射精痛）；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Treatment治疗CV3 (front-mu of BL, clears Lower Jiao Damp-Heat) + SP9 (drains Damp) + BL28 (back-shu of BL) + SP6 (regulates Lower Jiao). BL32 (sacral foramen — local perineal point via sacral nerve plexus). Herbal: Ba Zheng San (the principal formula for Damp-Heat urinary disorders).CV3中极（膀胱募穴，清下焦湿热）+SP9（利湿）+BL28膀胱俞（膀胱背俞穴）+SP6（调节下焦）。BL32次髎（骶后孔——通过骶神经丛的局部会阴穴位）。方药：八正散（下焦湿热泌尿病证的主方）。
Kidney Yang Xu + Phlegm-Stasis — BPH肾阳虚+痰瘀证——前列腺增生
Deficiency + Structural虚证+结构性
Aging depletes Kidney Yang → Qi transformation weakens → Phlegm-stasis condenses in the gland → mechanical obstruction → obstructive lower urinary tract symptoms衰老耗竭肾阳→气化减弱→痰瘀凝结于腺体→机械性梗阻→梗阻性下尿路症状
Key symptoms主要症状Weak urinary stream; hesitancy; nocturia 2–4×; feeling of incomplete emptying; no burning pain; elderly; cold extremities; low back soreness; pale tongue; deep-weak pulse at chi尿流无力；排尿犹豫；夜尿2–4次；排尿不尽感；无灼热疼痛；老年；肢冷；腰酸；舌淡；尺脉沉弱
Treatment治疗Warm Kidney Yang to restore Qi transformation + dissolve Phlegm-stasis in the gland. GV4 + BL23 (moxa — warm Kidney Yang). CV4 (moxa — warm the Lower Jiao origin). BL32 (local sacral stimulation — EA at 2Hz strongly stimulates the pelvic nerve plexus, relaxes the urethral sphincter, and improves detrusor function). Herbal: Ji Sheng Shen Qi Wan + Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan (combined: warm Kidney Yang + dissolve Phlegm-Blood stasis).温肾阳恢复气化+化解腺体中的痰瘀。GV4+BL23（灸——温肾阳）。CV4关元（灸——温下焦元气）。BL32次髎（骶部局部刺激——2Hz电针强烈刺激盆腔神经丛，松弛尿道括约肌，改善逼尿肌功能）。方药：济生肾气丸+桂枝茯苓丸（联合：温肾阳+化痰血瘀）。
BL32 — The Most Important Point for Both ConditionsBL32次髎——两种病证最重要的穴位
Location and mechanism位置与机理BL32 is located in the second sacral foramen. The sacral nerve plexus (S2-S4) that passes through this foramen directly innervates the bladder, prostate, and urethral sphincter. Needling BL32 (and nearby BL31, BL33, BL34 — the group) stimulates the sacral nerve roots that control all pelvic organ function. EA at 2Hz on BL32 bilateral: produces parasympathetic pelvic stimulation → detrusor contraction + urethral relaxation → improves both emptying and flow. This is the most evidence-supported acupuncture intervention for BPH.BL32位于第二骶后孔。穿过此孔的骶神经丛（S2-S4）直接支配膀胱、前列腺和尿道括约肌。针刺BL32（及附近BL31、BL33、BL34——八髎穴组）刺激控制所有盆腔器官功能的骶神经根。双侧BL32电针2Hz：产生副交感盆腔刺激→逼尿肌收缩+尿道松弛→改善排空和尿流。这是BPH针灸中最有循证支持的干预。
CV3 — Front-Mu of BladderCV3中极——膀胱募穴Located 1 cun above the pubic symphysis on the midline. The front-mu of the Bladder channel — the most direct anterior access point to the Bladder's Qi. For Damp-Heat: strong reducing method clears Heat and drains Damp from the Bladder. For BPH: gentler stimulation combined with moxa on CV4 (just below) warms the origin and improves Qi transformation. Always needle with a comfortably full bladder — the point is more effective when the bladder has some content to provide resistance.位于耻骨联合上1寸中线处。膀胱经募穴——膀胱之气最直接的前方入口。湿热型：强泻法清热利湿。BPH：较轻刺激配合CV4（正下方）艾灸温元气，改善气化。始终在膀胱适度充盈时进针——当膀胱有一定内容物提供抵力时穴位更有效。
Ba Zheng San八正散
Damp-Heat prostatitis — painful burning urination, yellow turbid urine, perineal pain, red tongue yellow greasy coat湿热前列腺炎——排尿疼痛灼热，尿黄浑浊，会阴痛，舌红苔黄腻
Mechanism: Eight herbs draining Damp-Heat from the Lower Jiao via urination. ++++all drain Damp-Heat through urination. clears Triple Jiao Fire. purges Damp-Heat downward via the bowel (the secondary route when urinary drainage is insufficient). specifically stops urethral pain (— the tip of the licorice root — is specifically indicated for urethral burning, a traditional application). Short course only (1–2 weeks) — too cold for long-term use.机理：八味草药通过排尿排出下焦湿热。车前子+滑石+木通+瞿麦+萹蓄均通过利水通淋排出湿热。栀子清三焦火。大黄向下通过肠道泻出湿热（当泌尿排出不足时的次要途径）。甘草梢专门止尿道疼痛（甘草梢——甘草根尖——专门适用于尿道灼热，传统应用）。仅短期使用（1–2周）——过于寒凉不适合长期。
Ji Sheng Shen Qi Wan + Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan济生肾气丸 + 桂枝茯苓丸
BPH — weak stream, nocturia, no pain, elderly, cold extremities, pale tongue, deep-weak chi前列腺增生——尿流无力，夜尿，无疼痛，老年，肢冷，舌淡，尺脉沉弱
Mechanism: Ji Sheng Shen Qi Wan (+ + ): adds the descending/draining function of and to the Kidney Yang warming base — specifically designed for BPH. The draws Qi downward to open the urinary passage; promotes urinary flow. Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan dissolves the Phlegm-Blood stasis in the enlarged gland — it is the classical formula for lower abdominal masses and stasis. The combination addresses both the root (Kidney Yang) and the structural change (Phlegm-stasis in the gland). Take for 3+ months.机理：济生肾气丸（金匮肾气丸+牛膝+车前子）：在温肾阳基础上加入牛膝和车前子的下降/排泄功能——专为前列腺增生设计。牛膝向下引气开通尿道；车前子促进尿液流动。桂枝茯苓丸化解增大腺体中的痰血瘀——是腹部包块和血瘀的经典方剂。联合处理根本（肾阳）和结构改变（腺体痰瘀）。服用3个月以上。
Case — BPH: Nocturia from 4× to 1× in 8 Weeks病案——前列腺增生：夜尿从4次减至1次，8周
