Core pair for Spleen-pattern tinnitus — generate fuel + guide to destination脾虚耳鸣核心穴对——产生燃料+引向目的地
＋
Why this pair为什么选这对
ST 36 (tonification) builds Middle Jiao Qi — the source material for clear Yang. GV 20 (tonification or moxa) lifts that clear Yang to the apex of the body so it reaches the sensory orifices including the ear. ST 36 generates the fuel; GV 20 ensures it reaches the ear. This pair is the acupuncture equivalent of Bu Zhong Yi Qi Tang's Huang Qi + Sheng Ma.足三里（补法）建立中焦之气——清阳的物质来源。百会（补法或灸）将清阳升举至巅顶，确保到达包括耳窍在内的清窍。足三里产生燃料；百会确保到达目的地。等效于补中益气汤的黄芪+升麻。
Technique操作
ST 36: perpendicular 1–2 cun, tonification. GV 20: flat insertion 0.5 cun, tonification or moxa 5–10 min. ST 36 bilateral.足三里：直刺1–2寸，补法。百会：平刺0.5寸，补法或灸5–10分钟。足三里双侧取穴。
The formula logic for tinnitus follows the Qi dynamic principle: excess patterns clear the upward-surging pathogen; deficiency patterns replenish the ascending substance. Directional herbs (Niu Xi draws down; Sheng Ma lifts up; Ci Shi anchors and guides) are as important as the main action herbs.耳鸣方药逻辑遵循气机原则：实证清泄上冲邪气；虚证补充上达物质。方向药（牛膝引下；升麻升上；磁石潜镇并引导）与主要作用药同等重要。
① Liver Fire① 肝火上扰型——升太过
Longdan Xiegan Tang龙胆泻肝汤
Yi Fang Ji Jie · Also first choice for Liver Fire migraine and Liver Fire insomnia — same mechanism, different locations出处：《医方集解》· 同时是肝火偏头痛和肝火失眠的首选方——同一病机，不同部位
Sudden high-pitched tinnitus + anger trigger + red eyes + bitter taste + wiry rapid pulse + red tongue yellow coat暴发高调耳鸣+情绪诱发+目赤口苦+脉弦数+舌红苔黄
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Shaoyang channels (GB and SJ) run directly to the ear. Liver Fire generates heat in the Liver and forces it into the Gallbladder channel (Shaoyang), which carries it to the ear. Longdan cao drains Liver-Gallbladder Fire; Huangqin and Zhizi clear heat; Zexie, Mutong, Cheqianzi drain Fire downward through urine; Shengdi and Danggui nourish Yin consumed by Fire. Cross-disease insight: same formula for Liver Fire insomnia (wakes 1–3am) and Liver Fire migraine — different locations, same mechanism. This is in practice. 少阳经（胆经和三焦经）直接循行至耳部。肝火在肝中产生热邪，迫入胆经（少阳），携带至耳窍。龙胆草泻肝胆实火；黄芩、栀子清热；泽泻、木通、车前子引火从小便下行排出；生地、当归滋养被火耗伤的阴分。异病同治洞见：这是治疗肝火失眠和肝火偏头痛的同一个方——不同部位，同一机制。
Drain LV-GB Fire龙胆草（泻肝胆实火） Clear heat黄芩（清热） Clear fire栀子（清火） Drain via urine泽泻（利水泻热） Nourish Yin生地（养阴） Nourish Blood当归（养血） Guide to Shaoyang柴胡（引经少阳）
② Phlegm-Fire② 痰火郁结型——出入失常
Wendan Tang + Longdan cao + Shi Chang Pu温胆汤加龙胆草、石菖蒲
San Yin Ji Yi · Modified Wendan Tang for ear channel obstruction出处：《三因极一病证方论》加减——针对耳部经道阻塞的温胆汤
Persistent tinnitus with ear fullness + heavy head + thick yellow greasy coat + wiry slippery pulse持续耳鸣伴耳内憋闷+头重+苔黄厚腻+脉弦滑
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Phlegm-Fire requires two simultaneous actions: transform Phlegm (Banxia, Chenpi, Fuling) and clear Fire (Zhuru, added Longdan cao). Zhishi breaks the Qi stagnation allowing Phlegm and Fire to congeal. The thick greasy coat is the distinguishing sign from pure Liver Fire — if greasy coat is present, Phlegm is confirmed and Wendan Tang base is preferred over Longdan Xiegan Tang alone. Shi Chang Pu is essential for any tinnitus with ear fullness — it opens the orifice and cuts through Phlegm obstruction directly. 痰火需要两个同时动作：化痰（半夏、陈皮、茯苓）和清火（竹茹、加入龙胆草）。枳实破除允许痰火胶结的气滞。厚腻苔是区别于单纯肝火的标志——腻苔确认有痰，优选温胆汤基础。石菖蒲是必加药——任何伴耳内憋闷的耳鸣，直接开窍化痰。
Dry Damp, descend半夏（燥湿降逆） Clear Phlegm-Heat竹茹（清化痰热） Break Qi stagnation枳实（破气消积） Transform Damp茯苓（渗湿） Open ear orifice石菖蒲（开窍化痰） Clear Fire龙胆草（清泻火热）
③ Kidney Essence Deficiency③ 肾精亏虚型——升不及
Erlong Zuoci Wan耳聋左慈丸
Built on Liu Wei Di Huang Wan — specifically modified for ear disorders以六味地黄丸为基础——专为耳病加减
Gradual low-pitched tinnitus + low back soreness + fatigue + poor memory + red tongue little coat + thin pulse渐进低调耳鸣+腰膝酸软+疲乏健忘+舌红苔少+脉细
Formula logic:方解逻辑：Liu Wei Di Huang Wan is the base — nourishes Kidney Yin and Essence. The key additions: Wu Wei Zi (astringes Kidney Essence, prevents further leakage); Ci Shi (, magnetite — heavy, sinks downward to anchor floating Yang while simultaneously guiding Essence upward to the ear via its resonance with Kidney); Chai Hu as messenger to the Shaoyang ear channel. Ci Shi is the defining addition — it simultaneously anchors excess Yang AND guides Essence toward the ear. This bidirectional action is what makes this formula specifically suited to tinnitus. 六味地黄丸为基础，滋肾阴填精。关键加味：五味子（收摄肾精，防止进一步外泄）；磁石（重坠潜阳，同时引导精气趋向耳窍）；柴胡作为引经药引至少阳耳部经道。磁石是决定性加味——同时潜镇上浮的阳气并引导精气趋向耳窍。这个双向作用使此方专门适合耳鸣。
Nourish KD Yin-Essence熟地（滋肾阴填精） Astringe Essence山茱萸（收涩精气） Tonify SP-KD山药（补脾肾） Anchor Yang, guide to ear磁石（重镇潜阳引精上耳） Astringe KD五味子（收摄肾精） Guide to Shaoyang柴胡（引经少阳） Drain turbidity泽泻（泻浊）
④ Spleen Qi Deficiency④ 脾胃气虚型——升不及
Yiqi Congming Tang益气聪明汤
Dong Yuan Shi Xiao Fang, Li Dongyuan — "tonify Qi to make the orifices clear and bright"出处：《东垣试效方》李东垣——「补气以聪明清窍」
Intermittent tinnitus worsening with fatigue + poor appetite + pale tongue tooth marks + thin weak guan pulse劳后加重的间歇性耳鸣+食欲不振+舌淡齿痕+关部脉细弱
Formula logic:方解逻辑： Li Dongyuan's insight: sensory orifice failure often originates in Spleen-Stomach — the source of clear Yang. Huang Qi and Ren Shen tonify Middle Jiao Qi (the source); Sheng Ma and Ge Gen lift clear Yang upward (the direction); Bai Shao nourishes Liver-Blood supporting Shaoyang; Huang Bai clears residual heat from deficient Middle Jiao; Man Jing Zi clears the head and guides to the ear orifice. "Congming" means clear intelligence — this formula clears the head and ear by rebuilding their Qi supply from below, not by draining from above. Completely different direction from pattern ①. 李东垣洞见：感官清窍失灵往往源于脾胃——清阳的来源。黄芪和人参补中焦之气（来源）；升麻和葛根升举清阳上行（方向）；白芍养肝血支持少阳；黄柏清虚弱中焦产生的余热；蔓荆子清利头目引经至耳窍。「聪明」——此方通过从下重建气机来源而非从上清泄来聪耳明目。与①型方向完全相反。
Tonify Middle Qi黄芪（补中气） Tonify Qi人参（补气） Lift clear Yang升麻（升提清阳） Lift, nourish fluids葛根（升阳生津） Nourish LV Blood白芍（养肝血） Clear deficiency heat黄柏（清虚热） Clear head, guide to ear蔓荆子（清利头目引经）
Four cases — one for each primary pattern. Notice: same local ear points (SI 19, SJ 21, GB 2) appear in every case, but the distal points and technique are completely opposite between excess and deficiency. Cases 1 and 2 are the clearest contrast.四个案例，每个主要证型各一个。注意：局部耳穴（听宫、耳门、听会）在每个案例中出现，但实证与虚证之间远端穴位和操作方向完全相反。案例一和二是最清晰的对比。
Case 1 · Liver Fire Pattern案例一 · 肝火上扰型
Presentation主诉
Male, 42. Right-sided loud high-pitched ringing, 5 days, following major argument with business partner. Press test: louder. Right temporal headache, red eyes, bitter taste morning, irritability. Tongue: red, yellow coat. Pulse: wiry rapid. 男性，42岁。右侧响亮高调鸣响，5天，与合伙人激烈争吵后开始。按压测试：加响。右侧颞部头痛，目赤，晨起口苦，烦躁。舌红苔黄，脉弦数。
↓ Reasoning推理
Qi Dynamic气机分析
High-pitched + press louder + anger trigger = confirmed.

Anger → explosive Liver Qi upswing → transformed to Fire → entered Gallbladder channel (Shaoyang) → Shaoyang ran to right temporal region (headache), eye (red eyes), ear (tinnitus). Same pathomechanism as Liver Fire migraine — but the Qi hit the ear orifice instead of producing headache as primary complaint. This cross-disease recognition is key: recognizing the same mechanism in a different location.

Urgency: Acute tinnitus under 2 weeks has best prognosis. Every week of delay increases risk of chronification. Treat twice weekly minimum. 高调+按之加响+情绪诱发=升太过确认。

愤怒→肝气爆炸性上冲→化火→进入胆经（少阳）→少阳循行至右颞（头痛）、目（目赤）、耳（耳鸣）。与肝火偏头痛是同一病机——只是气机冲击了耳窍而非以头痛为主诉。跨疾病识别：在不同部位识别同一机制。

紧迫性：2周内的急性耳鸣预后最好。每推迟一周增加慢性化风险。每周至少针灸两次。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all reducing): SI 19, SJ 21, GB 2 ipsilateral · LV 2 + LV 3 bilateral · SJ 5 bilateral · GB 43 bilateral (GB Spring point — clears GB channel heat)

Formula: Longdan Xiegan Tang — 7–14 day course only

Outcome validation: After 2–3 sessions, first sign: pitch drops from high to lower (Fire abating); press test changes (no longer louder). Temporal headache usually resolves before tinnitus. If no change after 4 sessions → add Phlegm component (ST 40, modify toward Wendan Tang). 针灸（全程泻法）：患侧听宫、耳门、听会 · 双侧行间+太冲 · 双侧外关 · 双侧侠溪（胆经荥穴，清胆经热）

方药：龙胆泻肝汤——仅用7–14天

疗效验证：2–3次后第一信号：音调从高降低（火热消退）；按压测试改变（不再加响）。颞部头痛通常先于耳鸣缓解。4次后无变化→加痰的成分（丰隆，方药改向温胆汤方向）。
Case 2 · Kidney Essence Deficiency案例二 · 肾精亏虚型
Presentation主诉
Female, 55. Bilateral low-pitched humming tinnitus, 2 years. Press test: softer. Worsens at night in quiet, improves with rest. Low back soreness, fatigue, occasional dizziness, poor memory, mild night sweats. Tongue: pale red, scanty coat, slightly dry. Pulse: thin, chi barely palpable. 女性，55岁。双侧低调嗡嗡耳鸣，2年。按压测试：减轻。夜间安静时加重，休息改善。腰膝酸软，疲乏，偶眩晕，健忘，轻微盗汗。舌淡红苔少略干。脉细，尺部几近难摸。
↓ Reasoning推理
Contrast with Case 1与案例一对比
Low-pitched + press softer + fatigue + night worsening = (Kidney Essence) confirmed.

Chi pulse barely palpable = Kidney Qi nearly absent. Night sweats + scanty coat + dry tongue = Kidney Yin deficiency dominant, Yang not yet severely depleted. The ear is not being attacked — it is being starved of nourishment.

Same local points as Case 1, but everything else is reversed: local ear points open the orifice (same); but instead of LV 2 reducing to drain Fire, we use KI 3 tonifying to supplement Essence; instead of SJ 5 clearing the channel, we use GV 20 lifting clear Yang up. 低调+按之减轻+疲劳+夜间加重=升不及（肾精亏虚）确认。

尺脉几近难摸=肾气几近消失。盗汗+苔少+舌略干=肾阴虚主导，肾阳尚未严重亏损。耳窍不是被攻击——而是被剥夺濡养。

与案例一相同的局部穴，其他所有方面完全相反：局部耳穴开窍（相同）；但以太溪补法补精代替行间泻法泻火；以百会升清阳代替外关清经道。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all tonification): SI 19, SJ 21, GB 2 bilateral · KI 3 bilateral (tonify Essence) · BL 23 bilateral (Back-Shu, direct organ) · SP 6 bilateral (nourish Yin) · GV 20 (lift clear Yang to ear)

Formula: Erlong Zuoci Wan — 2–3 month sustained course

Realistic expectations: 2 years of Kidney Essence depletion requires months of rebuilding. Improvement sequence: fatigue reduces first → low back soreness improves → tinnitus frequency reduces → volume reduces last. Prepare the patient for this order. 针灸（全程补法）：双侧听宫、耳门、听会 · 双侧太溪（补精）· 双侧肾俞（背俞，直接补脏）· 双侧三阴交（滋阴）· 百会（升提清阳至耳窍）

方药：耳聋左慈丸——持续2–3个月疗程

现实预期：2年肾精亏耗需数月重建。改善顺序：疲乏先减→腰酸改善→耳鸣频率减少→响度最后改善。提前告知患者这个恢复顺序。
Case 3 · Spleen Qi Deficiency — Why not Kidney?案例三 · 脾胃气虚型——为什么不是肾虚？
Presentation主诉
Male, 38. Intermittent low-pitched tinnitus 6 months, clearly worse after exertion or long work day, triggered by standing up quickly. Press test: softer. Poor appetite, loose stools, afternoon fatigue, pale. No low back pain. Tongue: pale, slight tooth marks. Pulse: thin weak, especially guan. 男性，38岁。间歇性低调耳鸣6个月，体力劳动或长时工作后明显加重，快速起立诱发。按压测试：减轻。食少，便溏，午后疲乏，面白。无腰痛。舌淡轻微齿痕。脉细弱，关部尤甚。
The Differential: Spleen vs Kidney鉴别：脾虚 vs 肾虚
Both are — but the organ is different:
Age 38 with no low back pain → Kidney Essence decline at 38 needs a cause; absent here
Guan (Middle Jiao) pulse weak, not chi (Lower Jiao/Kidney)
Standing-up trigger → clear Yang cannot immediately rise when position changes → Spleen-Middle Jiao
Poor appetite + loose stools → Spleen signs, not Kidney signs

Treatment difference: GV 20 + ST 36 + BL 20 (Middle Jiao source) replaces KI 3 + BL 23 (Kidney source). Formula: Yiqi Congming Tang instead of Erlong Zuoci Wan. Same pattern category, different organ address. 都是升不及——但脏腑不同：
38岁无腰痛→这个年龄肾精衰退需原因；此例没有
关脉弱（中焦），不是尺脉弱（下焦/肾）
起立诱发→体位改变时清阳无法即刻上达→脾中焦
食少便溏→脾的症状，不是肾的症状

治疗差异：百会+足三里+脾俞（中焦来源）代替太溪+肾俞（肾的来源）。方药：益气聪明汤而非耳聋左慈丸。同一证型类别（升不及），不同脏腑入口。
Case 4 · Phlegm-Fire — Key Differentiator from Liver Fire案例四 · 痰火郁结——与肝火的关键鉴别
Presentation主诉
Male, 48. Persistent high-pitched tinnitus with strong right ear fullness, 3 months. History: heavy alcohol, high-stress work, irregular diet. Press test: louder, fullness intensifies. Head heavy. Bitter taste, yellow phlegm, chest oppression. Tongue: red, thick yellow greasy coat. Pulse: wiry slippery rapid. 男性，48岁。持续高调耳鸣伴明显右耳内憋闷感，3个月。病史：大量饮酒，高压工作，饮食不规律。按压测试：加响且憋闷加重。头重如裹。口苦，痰多色黄，胸脘痞满。舌红苔黄厚腻，脉弦滑数。
The Key Differentiator from Case 1与案例一的关键鉴别
The thick GREASY coat + ear fullness = Phlegm confirmed.

Case 1 (Liver Fire): thin yellow coat — Fire without Phlegm
This case: thick yellow GREASY coat — Phlegm confirmed; Fire + Phlegm combined

Ear fullness = Phlegm physically occupying the ear orifice channel. Pure Fire would not produce this heavy, blocked, full sensation — that quality belongs to Phlegm.

Treatment implication: Longdan Xiegan Tang alone is insufficient — it clears Fire but not Phlegm. Must combine with Wendan Tang base + Shi Chang Pu. ST 40 becomes essential. And alcohol must stop — it directly generates Phlegm-Heat and treatment will be undermined without this lifestyle change. 苔黄厚腻+耳内憋闷=痰湿确认。

案例一（肝火）：苔薄黄——有火无痰
此例：苔黄厚腻——痰湿确认；火+痰合并

耳内憋闷=痰邪物质性地占据耳部经道。单纯火热不会产生这种沉重堵塞憋满感——那是痰的特质。

治疗含义：单用龙胆泻肝汤不足——清火而不化痰。必须合用温胆汤+石菖蒲。丰隆变为必用穴。必须戒酒——饮酒直接生痰热，不戒酒治疗效果将持续被抵消。
Treatment Plan治疗方案
Acupuncture (all reducing): SI 19, SJ 21, GB 2 ipsilateral · LV 2 + LV 3 (clear Liver Fire) · ST 40 (transform Phlegm — essential addition vs Case 1) · SJ 5 · PC 5 Jianshi (open Phlegm obstruction in middle)

Formula: Wendan Tang + Longdan cao 6g + Shi Chang Pu 10g

Must state directly: Eliminate alcohol. No treatment will be fully effective while alcohol continues generating Phlegm-Heat. 针灸（全程泻法）：患侧听宫、耳门、听会 · 双侧行间+太冲（清肝火）· 双侧丰隆（化痰——与案例一相比的关键增加）· 双侧外关 · 双侧间使（疏通中焦痰阻）

方药：温胆汤+龙胆草6g+石菖蒲10g

必须直接告知：戒酒。继续饮酒，任何治疗都无法完全有效。
Case 5 (Template · to be added)案例五（模板·待添加）
Blood stasis pattern — chronic, unresponsive, dark tongue, possible trauma history. 气滞血瘀型——慢性、对其他治疗无效、舌暗、可能有外伤史。
Dermatology · Qi Dynamic皮肤病证 · 气机框架
Urticaria荨麻疹
Wind-driven eruptions of the skin — Wei Qi failing to defend the surface, pathogenic factors exploding outward or being trapped in the skin layer风邪驱动的皮肤风团——卫气失于护表，邪气向外爆发或郁闭于肌肤
Core Mechanism: Wind in the Skin Layer核心机制：风客肌肤
Urticaria (, wind rash lumps) is defined by its Wind nature: wheals appear suddenly, move from place to place, disappear and reappear, and are intensely itchy. Wind is the carrier pathogen — it always combines with another factor:

Wind-Heat: Red, hot, itchy wheals — Heat is the amplifying driver; warmth and exercise worsen
Wind-Cold: Pale or white wheals — Cold contracts the skin; cold air or cold water triggers; warmth relieves
Intestinal Damp-Heat: Food-triggered urticaria — pathogenic Heat from the Stomach/Intestines erupts upward to the skin layer
Qi-Blood Deficiency: Chronic recurring urticaria — Wei Qi is too weak to defend; Wind enters easily
Chong-Ren Disharmony: Cycle-correlated urticaria in women

Qi dynamic core: when pathogen is trapped in skin; when Heat drives eruptions upward. The skin is the outermost layer of — eruptions represent pathogenic Qi forcing its way outward through the skin when it cannot be properly resolved. 荨麻疹（风疹块）由其风邪性质定义：风团突然出现，此起彼伏，反复发作，剧烈瘙痒。风为载体病邪——总与其他因素结合：

风热：红色、灼热、瘙痒风团——热邪为放大驱动；温暖和运动加重
风寒：苍白或白色风团——寒邪收引皮肤；冷空气或冷水触发；温暖缓解
肠胃湿热：食物触发性荨麻疹——胃肠热邪上蒸至皮肤层
气血两虚：慢性反复性荨麻疹——卫气太虚，无力护表；风邪易入
冲任失调：女性月经相关性荨麻疹

气机核心：邪气郁闭于肌肤时为出不畅；热邪驱动上蒸时为升太过。皮肤是"出"的最外层——风团代表邪气不能正常解除时强行向外透出皮肤。
Key Inquiry Questions问诊要点
1. Colour and temperature of wheals1. 风团颜色与温度
Red, warm, burning: Wind-Heat — Heat agitates the Blood and rises to the skin surface. The redness reflects Blood-Heat at the skin level.

Pale white or skin-coloured, cold: Wind-Cold — Cold contracts the skin, blocks Qi and Blood circulation in the surface layer; no Heat to redden the skin.

Red, associated with abdominal symptoms: Gastrointestinal Damp-Heat — the redness is real Heat erupting from the Stomach/Intestine axis upward through the Lung's control of the skin. 红色、灼热：风热——热邪扰动血液并上蒸至皮肤表面。红色反映皮肤层的血热。

苍白或肤色、冰冷：风寒——寒邪收引皮肤，阻滞表层气血运行；无热邪使皮肤发红。

红色，伴腹部症状：胃肠湿热——红色为真实热邪从胃肠轴线向上穿过肺对皮肤的控制而爆发。
2. Triggering factors2. 诱发因素
Heat, exercise, hot shower triggers: Wind-Heat — body temperature rise releases the latent Wind-Heat from the skin layer.

Cold air, cold water, cold weather triggers: Wind-Cold — Cold in the environment resonates with Cold in the skin layer, triggering contraction and wheal formation.

Certain foods (seafood, spicy, alcohol) triggers: Gastrointestinal Damp-Heat — these foods generate Heat and Damp in the Stomach/Intestines, which then erupts to the skin.

Stress, emotional upset triggers: Liver Qi stagnation → transforming to Heat → erupts to skin. Often mixed with Wind-Heat.

Menstrual cycle correlation (worse before period): Chong-Ren disharmony — Liver-Blood is insufficient to nourish the skin at certain phases. 受热、运动、热水澡诱发：风热——体温升高释放潜伏于皮肤层的风热。

冷空气、冷水、寒冷天气诱发：风寒——环境中的寒邪与皮肤层的寒邪共鸣，触发收缩和风团形成。

特定食物（海鲜、辛辣、酒）诱发：胃肠湿热——这些食物在胃肠中产生湿热，随后爆发至皮肤。

压力、情志波动诱发：肝气郁滞→化热→发于皮肤。常与风热混合。

与月经周期相关（经前加重）：冲任失调——特定阶段肝血不足以濡养皮肤。
3. Duration and pattern: acute vs chronic3. 病程与模式：急性vs慢性
Acute (less than 6 weeks), intense, clear trigger: Excess pattern — Wind-Heat or Wind-Cold. Treatment: dispel Wind, address the secondary pathogen.

Chronic (more than 6 weeks), recurring, no clear trigger, worse with fatigue: Deficiency pattern — Qi-Blood deficiency. Wei Qi is chronically insufficient; Wind easily enters. Treatment requires building the root, not just dispelling Wind. "Treat the Wind by nourishing Blood". 急性（不足6周），剧烈，诱因明确：实证——风热或风寒。治疗：祛风，处理继发病邪。

慢性（超过6周），反复发作，无明确诱因，劳累后加重：虚证——气血两虚。卫气长期不足；风邪易入。治疗需培补根本，而非单纯祛风。"治风先治血，血行风自灭"。
Red + warm + heat trigger红色+灼热+受热诱发
Wind-Heat风热 升太过
Pale + cold trigger苍白+受寒诱发
Wind-Cold风寒 出不畅
Food trigger + GI symptoms食物触发+胃肠症状
GI Damp-Heat肠胃湿热 升太过
Chronic + fatigue worse慢性+劳累加重
Qi-Blood Xu气血两虚 出不固
Wind-Heat Invading the Surface风热犯表证
Excess实证Heat热证
Wind-Heat attacks the Wei level → agitates Blood-Heat → erupts outward to skin → red hot itchy wheals风热袭表→扰动血热→外发肌肤→红热瘙痒风团
Key symptoms主要症状Sudden red wheals, hot to touch, intense itching; worsened by warmth and exercise; may have fever, sore throat; thirst; red tongue, thin yellow coat; floating-rapid pulse突发红色风团，触之灼热，剧烈瘙痒；受热和运动加重；可伴发热、咽痛；口渴；舌红苔薄黄；脉浮数
Qi dynamic气机/: Wind is Yang, rising and dispersing; Heat is also Yang, upward-moving. Wind-Heat combined penetrates the Wei layer and agitates the Blood at the skin surface — Blood-Heat erupts outward producing the red wheals. The floating pulse confirms the pathogen is in the Wei (exterior) level. The wheals move location constantly because Wind is mobile.升太过/出不畅：风为阳邪，上升散发；热亦为阳邪，向上运动。风热合邪侵入卫分，扰动皮肤表面的血分——血热外发产生红色风团。浮脉证实病邪在卫（表）层。风团不断转移位置因为风善行而数变。
Wind-Cold Binding the Surface风寒束表证
Excess实证Cold寒证
Wind-Cold contracts and binds the skin → Qi and Blood in the skin layer are obstructed → pale wheals, cold-triggered风寒收引束表→皮肤层气血受阻→苍白风团，受寒触发
Key symptoms主要症状Pale white or skin-coloured wheals; triggered by cold air, cold water, cold weather; relieved by warmth; no thirst; may have chills; pale tongue, white coat; floating-tight pulse苍白或肤色风团；冷空气、冷水、寒冷天气触发；温暖缓解；不渴；可有恶寒；舌淡苔白；脉浮紧
Qi dynamic气机(Cold contracts the skin exit layer): Cold's nature is contraction. Wind-Cold binds the skin surface, obstructing the normal outward movement of Wei Qi. The blocked Wei Qi accumulates in the skin layer, causing wheal formation. The wheals are pale (no Heat to redden them). Heat application counteracts Cold contraction and relieves the wheals.出不畅（寒邪收引皮肤出口层）：寒性收引。风寒束缚皮肤表面，阻碍卫气的正常外出运动。被阻的卫气积聚于皮肤层，导致风团形成。风团苍白（无热邪使之发红）。热敷对抗寒凝收缩并缓解风团。
Gastrointestinal Damp-Heat肠胃湿热证
Excess实证Damp-Heat湿热
Food-generated Damp-Heat accumulates in Stomach/Intestines → Lung (which governs skin) cannot disseminate normally → Damp-Heat erupts to skin layer饮食生湿热积于胃肠→肺（主皮毛）不能正常宣发→湿热发于皮肤层
Key symptoms主要症状Urticaria triggered by specific foods (seafood, spicy, alcohol, shellfish); concurrent GI symptoms — abdominal bloating, nausea, loose stools or constipation, borborygmi; red tongue, yellow greasy coat; slippery-rapid pulse特定食物触发荨麻疹（海鲜、辛辣、酒精、贝类）；同时伴胃肠症状——腹胀、恶心、便溏或便秘、肠鸣；舌红苔黄腻；脉滑数
Qi dynamic气机(Stomach Heat rebels upward to skin): The Lung controls the skin surface and coordinates with the Large Intestine in the Metal phase. When the Stomach and Intestines generate Damp-Heat, it rises through the Lung-LI axis and erupts through the skin (the Lung's organ of expression). Treatment must clear the Stomach/Intestine Damp-Heat at its source, not merely relieve the skin — the skin is the symptom, the gut is the root.升太过（胃热上逆于皮肤）：肺主皮毛，与大肠在金行中协调。胃肠产生湿热时，通过肺-大肠轴线上升并透过皮肤（肺的表达器官）爆发。治疗必须从源头清胃肠湿热，而非仅缓解皮肤——皮肤是症状，肠道是根本。
Qi-Blood Deficiency (Chronic)气血两虚证（慢性）
Deficiency虚证
Insufficient Qi-Blood → Wei Qi too weak to defend the skin → Wind enters easily → chronic recurring wheals气血不足→卫气太弱，无力护表→风邪易入→慢性反复风团
Key symptoms主要症状Chronic urticaria (more than 6 weeks); recurring episodes especially with fatigue; pale or faint red wheals; worse in evenings or when tired; concurrent: fatigue, pallor, palpitations, poor sleep, scanty pale menstruation (in women); pale tongue, thin coat; weak-thin pulse慢性荨麻疹（超过6周）；反复发作尤以劳累后为甚；风团色淡或浅红；傍晚或疲乏时加重；同时伴：疲乏、面色苍白、心悸、睡眠差、月经量少色淡（女性）；舌淡苔薄；脉细弱
Qi dynamic气机(Wei Qi insufficiently protects the surface layer): Wei Qi is the outermost Yang protection — it patrols the skin and prevents external Wind from penetrating. When Qi-Blood is chronically deficient (from overwork, poor nutrition, post-illness), Wei Qi is insufficient → the skin surface is unprotected → Wind enters repeatedly. "Treat the Wind by nourishing Blood first — when Blood flows, Wind extinguishes itself".出不固（卫气对"出"的表面层保护不足）：卫气是最外层的阳性保护——巡守皮肤，防止外风侵入。气血长期不足（因过劳、营养不良、病后），卫气不足→皮肤表面失保护→风邪反复侵入。"治风先治血，血行风自灭"。
Chong-Ren Disharmony (Menstrual-Correlated)冲任失调证（月经相关）
Deficiency虚证
Chong-Ren unable to regulate Blood distribution to the skin → Wind fills the skin deficiency pre-menstrually → cycle-correlated wheals冲任不能调节血液分布至皮肤→经前血虚招风→周期性风团
Key symptoms主要症状Urticaria appearing or worsening before or during menstruation; concurrent menstrual irregularity or dysmenorrhea; low back soreness; itching worse at night; pale-red wheals; deep-weak or wiry-thin pulse荨麻疹在月经前或经期出现或加重；同时伴月经不调或痛经；腰酸；夜间瘙痒加重；风团色淡红；脉沉细或弦细
Qi dynamic气机→: The Chong vessel is the sea of Blood — it fills pre-menstrually then discharges. When Chong-Ren is insufficient (Kidney Jing deficiency), the pre-menstrual Blood is insufficient to nourish the skin → the skin surface is relatively Blood-deficient → Wind enters the empty space. The cyclic nature is the diagnostic key — it follows the Chong vessel's fill-discharge rhythm.入不足→出不固：冲脉为血海——经前充盈然后排出。冲任不足（肾精虚）时，经前血液不足以濡养皮肤→皮肤表面相对血虚→风邪趁虚而入。周期性是诊断关键——它遵循冲脉的充盈-排出节律。
Acupuncture Principle: Dispel Wind from the Surface, Regulate Qi and Blood in the Skin Layer针灸原则：祛风解表，调理皮肤层气血
The skin is governed by the Lung and is the outer expression of Wei Qi. The Large Intestine (Lung's paired organ) governs the lower descending of the Metal phase. Acupuncture strategy: open the skin surface (LU7, LI4, GV14), dispel Wind (GB20, BL12 "Wind Gate"), cool Blood-Heat (SP10, BL40), and tonify the root for deficiency patterns (ST36, SP6, BL20).皮肤受肺所主，为卫气的外在表达。大肠（肺的表里脏腑）主金行之下降。针灸策略：开皮肤表面（LU7、LI4、GV14），祛风（GB20、BL12"风门"），凉血热（SP10、BL40），虚证补其根本（ST36、SP6、BL20）。
Core Points — All Patterns基础穴位——各证型通用
LI4 合谷
Yuan-source of Large Intestine — commands the face and skin surface. As the "command point of the face and mouth," LI4 directly regulates the Lung-LI axis that controls skin. Dispels Wind, opens the surface, stops itching. The premier point for all skin conditions. Reducing method for excess; contraindicated in pregnancy.大肠原穴——统领颜面和皮肤表面。作为"面口合谷收"的命令穴，LI4直接调节控制皮肤的肺-大肠轴线。祛风解表，止痒。所有皮肤病的首选穴。实证泻法；孕妇禁用。
SP10 血海
Sea of Blood — cools and regulates Blood at the skin level. Urticaria is always a Blood-level condition at the skin: Wind agitates Blood, causing eruptions. SP10 directly cools Blood-Heat and stops the eruption mechanism. Classical saying: "for skin diseases, SP10 is essential". Reducing method for Heat.血海——在皮肤层凉血调血。荨麻疹始终是皮肤层的血分病变：风邪扰动血液，导致风团。SP10直接凉血热并阻止风团机制。经典说法："治皮肤病，血海不可少"。热证用泻法。
BL12 风门
"Wind Gate" — the specific entry point of external Wind into the body. Located on the Bladder channel at T2, it is the gateway through which Wind enters and can be expelled. Cupping on BL12 is particularly effective for Wind-Cold urticaria — the suction directly draws Wind out through the gate it entered. For Wind-Heat: needling with reducing method."风门"——外风进入人体的特定门户。位于膀胱经T2处，为风邪进出的门户。BL12拔罐对风寒荨麻疹特别有效——负压直接从其进入的门户将风邪引出。风热证：泻法针刺。
GV14 大椎
Meeting of all Yang channels — the master point to regulate Wei Qi and clear surface Heat. GV14 is where all six Yang channels converge; stimulating it regulates the entire Yang defensive system. For Wind-Heat: reducing method clears surface Heat. For Wind-Cold: moxa here warms the Yang defensive layer and dispels Cold.诸阳之会——调节卫气和清表热的主穴。GV14为六条阳经汇聚之处；刺激此穴调节整个阳性防御系统。风热证：泻法清表热。风寒证：灸此穴温阳卫层以驱寒。
Pattern-Specific Additions证型加减
Wind-Heat风热证Add: LU7 (opens Lung, releases the surface), BL40 (clears Blood-Heat — classical "for skin diseases associated with Heat, bleed BL40"), LI11 (clears Heat from the LI channel, stops itching). Reducing method. No moxa.加：LU7列缺（开肺，解表），BL40委中（清血热——经典"皮肤病有热者，委中出血"），LI11曲池（清大肠经热，止痒）。泻法。禁灸。
Wind-Cold风寒证Add: LU7 (releases Wind-Cold from the surface), moxa on GV14 and BL12 (warm the surface, dispel Cold), ST36 (build Wei Qi). Cupping on BL12 is highly effective.加：LU7列缺（从表层驱散风寒），GV14和BL12艾灸（温表，驱寒），ST36（补卫气）。BL12拔罐高效。
GI Damp-Heat肠胃湿热证Add: ST25 (front-mu of Large Intestine — clears Damp-Heat from the GI tract at the source), ST36, SP9 (resolve Damp), LI11 (clear LI Heat). Reducing method.加：ST25天枢（大肠募穴——从源头清胃肠湿热），ST36，SP9阴陵泉（化湿），LI11曲池（清大肠热）。泻法。
Qi-Blood deficiency (chronic)气血两虚证（慢性）Add: ST36 (build Spleen-Stomach Qi and Blood production), SP6 (nourish Blood, regulate three Yin organs), BL20 , BL17 (hui-meeting of Blood — build Blood systemic). Reinforcing method + moxa. Must treat for 6–8 weeks minimum.加：ST36（补脾胃气血生化），SP6（养血，调理三阴），BL20脾俞，BL17膈俞（血之会穴——全身补血）。补法+灸。至少需治疗6–8周。
Chong-Ren disharmony冲任失调证Add: CV4 (regulates Chong/Ren), KI3 (nourishes Kidney Jing — Chong vessel root), SP6 (regulates three Yin organs). Treat throughout the menstrual cycle, not only during episodes.加：CV4关元（调节冲任），KI3太溪（滋养肾精——冲脉之根），SP6（调理三阴）。贯穿整个月经周期治疗，而非仅在发作期。
Xiao Feng San消风散
Wind-Heat urticaria — red hot itchy wheals, acute onset, floating-rapid pulse, red tongue yellow coat风热荨麻疹——红色灼热瘙痒风团，急性发作，脉浮数，舌红苔黄
Mechanism: The classical formula for Wind-Heat skin conditions. ++dispel Wind from the surface (the outer layer); +clear Damp-Heat; +clear Heat from the Qi level; +nourish Blood (so Wind has no Blood-deficient space to occupy); drains Heat downward through the urine. The principle: dispel Wind AND nourish Blood simultaneously — because Wind exploits Blood deficiency. A formula that treats both the surface and the root simultaneously.机理：治疗风热皮肤病的经典方。荆芥+防风+蝉蜕从表面（外出层）祛风；苦参+苍术清湿热；石膏+知母清气分热；生地黄+当归养血（使风邪无血虚之隙可乘）；木通引热下行从小便排出。原则：同时祛风与养血——因为风邪利用血虚。表里同治之方。
Gui Zhi Tang (modified)桂枝汤（加减）
Wind-Cold urticaria — pale wheals, cold-triggered, chills, floating-tight pulse, white coat风寒荨麻疹——苍白风团，受寒触发，恶寒，脉浮紧，苔白
Mechanism: Zhang Zhongjing's formula for Wind-Cold in the Taiyang Wei layer. warms and opens the skin surface; nourishes Blood in the skin (so Wind cannot exploit emptiness); warms the surface and disperses Cold; +harmonise and protect the middle jiao. The formula warms the skin's Yang defensive layer, dispels Cold, and nourishes the Blood simultaneously. Add +to strengthen the Wind-dispelling action for urticaria.机理：张仲景治太阳卫层风寒之方。桂枝温通皮肤表面（通阳解表）；白芍养皮肤层之血（使风邪无虚可乘）；生姜温表散寒；大枣+甘草调和保护中焦。本方温皮肤阳性卫层，驱散寒邪，同时养血。加荆芥+防风以加强荨麻疹的祛风作用。
Fang Feng Tong Sheng San防风通圣散
GI Damp-Heat urticaria — food-triggered, red wheals, abdominal bloating, constipation, red tongue yellow greasy coat肠胃湿热荨麻疹——食物触发，红色风团，腹胀，便秘，舌红苔黄腻
Mechanism: A two-directional formula — it clears Heat from the surface (, release the exterior) while simultaneously purging Damp-Heat from the interior via bowel movement (,). When the GI Damp-Heat source is cleared downward through the bowel, the skin eruptions resolve because the Heat has a proper exit. The formula embodies the principle: "give the pathogen an exit route" — instead of just clearing the skin, open the bowel exit.机理：双向方剂——从表面清热（防风、荆芥解表）同时通过排便将湿热从内部泻出（大黄、芒硝）。当胃肠湿热来源通过肠道向下清除时，皮肤风团消退，因为热邪有了正当出口。本方体现原则："给邪气一条出路"——而非仅清皮肤，开放肠道出口。
Yu Ping Feng San + Si Wu Tang玉屏风散 + 四物汤
Chronic Qi-Blood deficiency urticaria — recurrent, fatigue-triggered, pale wheals, pale tongue, weak pulse慢性气血两虚荨麻疹——反复发作，劳累诱发，风团色淡，舌淡，脉弱
Mechanism: (Jade Windscreen): builds Wei Qi (the "windscreen" that protects the skin surface), strengthens Spleen (the source of Qi-Blood production), gently dispels residual Wind while fixing the Wei Qi. nourishes Blood systemically. The combination: build the Wei Qi screen (stop Wind entry) + nourish Blood (remove Wind's foothold in the skin). Classical principle: "When Blood flows, Wind extinguishes itself."机理：玉屏风散："黄芪"建立卫气（保护皮肤表面的"风屏"），白术健脾（气血生化之源），防风在固护卫气的同时轻祛残余风邪。四物汤全身养血。合用：建立卫气屏障（阻止风邪进入）+养血（消除风邪在皮肤的立足点）。经典原则："血行风自灭"。
Case 1 — Acute Wind-Heat Urticaria病案一——急性风热荨麻疹
Patient: 28M, office worker. Sudden onset of red itchy wheals on trunk and arms 2 days ago, after attending a crowded outdoor event on a hot day. Wheals appear and disappear rapidly, moving location. Intensely itchy, burning sensation. Hot shower makes it dramatically worse. Mild sore throat, thirst. Red tongue, thin yellow coat. Floating-rapid pulse.患者：男，28岁，上班族。2天前在炎热天气参加户外聚会后，躯干和手臂突发红色瘙痒风团。风团迅速出现消失，位置不断转移。剧烈瘙痒，灼热感。热水澡明显加重。轻度咽痛，口渴。舌红苔薄黄。脉浮数。
Reasoning chain: Hot outdoor environment → Wind-Heat invaded the Wei level through sweat-opened pores → agitated Blood-Heat at the skin surface → wheals. Rapid location change = Wind's mobile nature. Hot shower worsens = external heat amplifies the Wind-Heat at the surface. Sore throat = Wind-Heat also irritates the throat (Lung's opening). Floating pulse = pathogen at the Wei/surface level; rapid = Heat.

Pattern:
Acupuncture: LI4 (reducing), SP10 (reducing), GV14 (reducing), BL12 (reducing), LI11
Herbal: Xiao Feng San
Advice: Avoid hot showers; cool compress relieves; avoid spicy food 推理链：炎热户外环境→风热从汗开之毛孔侵入卫分→扰动皮肤表面血热→风团。位置迅速转移=风的游走性质（风善行而数变）。热水澡加重=外热放大表面风热。咽痛=风热同时刺激咽喉（肺之开窍）。浮脉=病邪在卫/表层；数脉=热邪。

证型：风热犯表
针灸：LI4（泻法）、SP10（泻法）、GV14（泻法）、BL12（泻法）、LI11
方药：消风散
建议：避免热水澡；冷敷缓解；避免辛辣食物
Teaching point: The Lung-skin axis is the key anatomical understanding. Wind enters through the skin (Lung's territory), agitates Blood at the skin level, and produces wheals. The floating pulse is non-negotiable for exterior Wind patterns — if the pulse is not floating, the pathogen has moved deeper and requires a different approach.教学要点：肺-皮肤轴是关键的解剖学理解。风邪从皮肤（肺的领域）进入，扰动皮肤层的血液，产生风团。浮脉对于外风证型是不可或缺的——如果脉不浮，病邪已向深层移动，需要不同的治疗方法。
Case 2 — Chronic Qi-Blood Deficiency Urticaria病案二——慢性气血两虚荨麻疹
Patient: 42F, nurse. Recurrent urticaria for 3 years. Episodes mainly in evenings and after long shifts. Wheals are pale pink, mildly itchy. No clear food or environmental trigger. Takes antihistamines daily with partial control. Concurrent: fatigue, palpitations, poor sleep, menstruation scanty and pale. Pale tongue, thin coat. Thin-weak pulse.患者：女，42岁，护士。反复荨麻疹3年。发作主要在傍晚和长班后。风团色淡粉红，轻度瘙痒。无明确食物或环境诱因。每日服抗组胺药，部分控制。同时伴：疲乏、心悸、睡眠差、月经量少色淡。舌淡苔薄。脉细弱。
Reasoning chain: 3 years of nursing (irregular hours, physical and emotional strain) → chronically depleted Qi and Blood → Wei Qi insufficient to defend the surface → Wind enters the empty skin layer repeatedly → wheals. Evening worsening = Yin time: Yang Qi (including Wei Qi) naturally retreats inward at dusk, leaving the surface most unprotected. Pallor, palpitations, scanty menstruation = Blood deficiency confirmed. No clear trigger = the problem is the deficient defence, not an external excess pathogen.

Pattern:
Treatment principle: Nourish Qi and Blood, strengthen Wei Qi, expel Wind as secondary
Acupuncture: ST36, SP6, BL17, BL20, LI4, SP10. Moxa on ST36, BL20.
Herbal: Yu Ping Feng San + Si Wu Tang. Treat minimum 8 weeks. 推理链：3年护理工作（不规律作息、体力和情志消耗）→气血长期耗竭→卫气不足以护表→风邪反复侵入空虚的皮肤层→风团。傍晚加重=阴时：阳气（包括卫气）自然在黄昏时内收，皮肤表面保护最弱。面色苍白、心悸、月经量少=血虚确证。无明确诱因=问题在于防御不足，而非外来实邪。

证型：气血两虚
治则：补气养血，固表实卫，祛风为辅
针灸：ST36、SP6、BL17、BL20、LI4、SP10。ST36、BL20加灸。
方药：玉屏风散+四物汤。至少治疗8周。
Teaching point: The treatment principle reversal in chronic urticaria is the key concept: in acute excess patterns, dispelling Wind is primary. In chronic deficiency patterns, nourishing Blood and building Wei Qi are primary — the Wind-dispelling is secondary. Treating chronic urticaria with only Wind-dispelling herbs produces temporary results because the deficient Wei Qi keeps inviting Wind back in. Rebuild the defence first.教学要点：慢性荨麻疹治疗原则的反转是关键概念：急性实证，祛风为主。慢性虚证，养血和固表实卫为主——祛风为辅。仅用祛风药治疗慢性荨麻疹只能产生短暂效果，因为虚弱的卫气会不断招引风邪。先重建防御。
Emotional Disorders · Culminating Pattern情志病证 · 终末证型
Zang Zao — Visceral Agitation脏躁
(Zàng Zào, "Visceral Agitation") is the classical TCM diagnosis for severe emotional dysregulation marked by unpredictable episodes of grief, laughing, crying, and agitation — often without clear external cause. First described in the by Zhang Zhongjing: "Women who suffer from visceral agitation: sadness and desire to cry, as if possessed by spirits, frequent yawning and stretching — governs it." It is the clinical culmination of unresolved emotional disorders along thecascade — Yin has been so depleted that the Heart and Uterus can no longer anchor the Shen. 脏躁是中医对以不可预测的悲伤、笑、哭、躁动发作为特征的严重情志失调的经典诊断——常无明显外部诱因。首见于张仲景《金匮要略》：「妇人脏躁，喜悲伤欲哭，象如神灵所作，数欠伸，甘麦大枣汤主之。」它是郁证级联中未解决情志障碍的临床终末——阴液已耗竭至心与胞宫不再能锚定心神的程度。
Qi Dynamic Framework · Why the Shen Loses All Regulation气机框架 · 为何心神完全失调
The classical description : "Sadness and desire to cry, as if possessed by spirits, frequent yawning and stretching."

Mechanism — End-stage Yin Xu:
In normal emotional physiology, the Heart (Shen) and Liver (smooth flow of emotions) work together to regulate emotional expression. Both are nourished by Blood and Yin. When Yin is severely depleted:
① The Heart Shen has no Yin anchor → it becomes volatile, shifting rapidly between emotional states
② The Liver loses its smooth-flow function → emotions cannot be regulated, modulated, or expressed smoothly
③ The (Uterus/reproductive system) loses its Yin nourishment → in women, this creates a powerful resonance between reproductive hormonal cycling and emotional dysregulation

Why "as if possessed"? Because the Shen is experiencing emotional states that do not match the external reality — laughing at nothing, crying without cause. This is not psychosis: the patient knows the reactions are disproportionate. It is Shen that has lost its governor (Yin) and is expressing raw, unfiltered emotional energy.

Frequent yawning and stretching: The body's instinctive attempt to move Qi and open the chest — the same reflex as sighing in , but amplified to the whole body. The Liver Qi is stagnant and the body keeps trying to open it through large-muscle movement. 经典描述（《金匮要略》）：「喜悲伤欲哭，象如神灵所作，数欠伸。」

病机——阴虚终末期：
在正常情志生理中，心（神）和肝（情志疏泄）共同调节情绪表达。两者均由血和阴滋养。当阴液严重耗竭：
①心神无阴的锚定→变得不稳定，在情绪状态之间快速切换
②肝失疏泄功能→情绪不能被调控、调节或平顺表达
③胞宫失阴的濡养→在女性，这在生殖激素周期与情志失调之间产生强烈共鸣

为何「象如神灵所作」？因为心神正在经历与外部现实不符的情绪状态——无端而笑，无故而哭。这不是精神病：患者知道自己的反应是不成比例的。这是心神失去其统御（阴液）后，表达原始、未经过滤的情绪能量。

频繁欠伸：身体本能地试图运动气机、开展胸部——与郁证中叹气的反射相同，但放大至全身。肝气郁滞，身体持续通过大肌群运动尝试开通。
Classical Source经典出处 · 《金匮要略》· 甘麦大枣汤
Zhang Zhongjing's original text is a masterpiece of brevity: three symptoms (grief-crying, spirit-possession quality, yawning-stretching) and one formula (— three humble kitchen ingredients). This is the only formula in the classical canon prescribed specifically for a psychiatric/emotional presentation. Its apparent simplicity conceals profound nutritive logic: the three ingredients — wheat, jujube, and licorice — collectively nourish the Heart, calm the Shen, and restore the middle ground that emotional extremes have eroded. The formula works because it does not try to suppress the emotional dysregulation — it nourishes the Yin substrate that regulation requires. 张仲景的原文简洁而深刻：三个症状（悲哭、象如神灵所作、数欠伸）和一个方（甘麦大枣汤——三味普通食材）。这是经典方书中唯一专门为精神/情志表现开具的方。其表面简单掩盖着深刻的营养逻辑：三味药——小麦（养心除烦）、大枣（补中益气生血）、甘草（缓急和中）——共同滋养心脏、安定心神、修复情绪极端所侵蚀的中正之地。该方有效，因为它不试图压制情志失调——而是滋养调节所需的阴液底物。
⚠ Differential Awareness — vs. Western Psychiatric Diagnoses⚠ 鉴别意识——脏躁与西医精神科诊断
overlaps with but is NOT identical to: Major Depressive Disorder (MDD), Bipolar II disorder, Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder (PMDD), Conversion disorder, or Borderline Personality features. The TCM diagnosis focuses on the Yin deficiency mechanism regardless of the Western label. When to refer: Active suicidal ideation, psychotic features (losing touch with reality, not merely feeling "possessed"), inability to function, or symptoms unresponsive after 6–8 weeks of TCM treatment. TCM and psychiatry can work in parallel — they are not mutually exclusive. 脏躁与以下疾病有重叠但并不等同：重度抑郁障碍（MDD）、双相II型障碍、经前烦躁障碍（PMDD）、转换障碍或边缘性人格特征。中医诊断聚焦于阴虚机制，不受西医标签影响。何时转诊：主动自杀意念、精神病性特征（与现实脱离，而非仅感觉「象如神灵所作」）、无法正常生活功能，或中医治疗6–8周后症状无改善。中医与精神科可并行——两者不相互排斥。
Episode Character发作特征
Do you experience episodes of sudden crying, laughing, or intense sadness that seem to come without clear reason, or disproportionate to the situation? Do you feel the reactions are not fully under your control — as if something is happening to you rather than being chosen?您是否经历突然哭泣、大笑或强烈悲伤的发作，似乎没有明确原因，或与情境不成比例？您是否感到这些反应不完全在您的控制中——如同有什么事情发生在您身上，而非您主动选择的？
→ The "as if possessed" quality is the defining feature — patient retains insight but cannot regulate the emotional expression→「象如神灵所作」的特质是定义性特征——患者保持自知力但无法调控情绪表达
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Shen Without Yin Governance机理 · 心神失阴液统御
Retained insight with uncontrollable emotional expression is the hallmark that distinguishes from psychosis. The patient KNOWS the crying is disproportionate — the Shen (cognition) is intact. But the Shen's regulatory function (requiring Yin as its substrate) has collapsed. Emotions are like water: in health, Yin holds them in their proper channels; in , the channels have dried up and water spills unpredictably. The insight is preserved because the cognitive part of the Shen (— knowing) is less Yin-dependent than the regulatory part (— controlling). 在保留自知力的同时情绪表达不受控制，是脏躁区别于精神病的标志。患者知道哭泣是不成比例的——心神（认知）完好。但心神的调节功能（需要阴液作为底物）已崩溃。情志如水：健康时，阴液将其保持在适当的通道中；脏躁时，通道已干涸，水不可预测地外溢。自知力得以保存，因为心神的认知部分（知——了解）比调节部分（制——控制）对阴液的依赖更少。
Episodes + retained insight + cannot control发作+保留自知力+无法控制
confirmed脏躁确认 降不及极重
Loss of insight + believing possession is real丧失自知力+相信真的被附体
Refer psychiatry 转诊精神科
History & Timeline病史与时间线
How long have you had these episodes? Did they begin after a period of prolonged stress, grief, overwork, or multiple pregnancies/deliveries? Were there earlier symptoms — anxiety, insomnia, palpitations — before the episodes began?这些发作持续多久了？是否在长期压力、悲伤、过劳或多次妊娠/分娩后开始？发作开始前是否有更早的症状——焦虑、失眠、心悸？
→ rarely appears de novo — tracing the cascade back reveals the originalpattern and informs long-term treatment strategy→脏躁很少突然出现——追溯级联回到起点揭示原始郁证证型，指导长期治疗策略
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Reading the Cascade History机理 · 解读级联病史
The presence of earlier-stage symptoms beforedevelops is clinically important for two reasons:

1. Prognostic: Recent onset with clear cascade history responds better than long-standing— the Yin has been depleted for less time and is easier to rebuild.

2. Root identification: If the cascade began with anger/frustration →root is Liver Qi stagnation → the residual Liver element must be addressed alongside Yin nourishment. If the cascade began with worry/grief → Lung-Spleen root → Blood and Qi deficiency are primary. The classicalis the universal formula, but identifying the cascade root guides what to add to it. 脏躁发展前存在早期阶段症状，对临床有两个重要意义：

1. 预后：近期发病且有明确级联史的患者，比长期脏躁更易反应——阴液耗竭时间较短，更容易重建。

2. 识别根本：若级联从愤怒/郁闷开始→郁证根本是肝气郁滞→在滋阴的同时必须兼顾残余的肝的因素。若级联从忧虑/悲伤开始→肺脾根本→气血虚损为主。经典甘麦大枣汤是通用脏躁方，但识别级联根本指导加减用药。
Yin Deficiency Signs阴虚征象
Night sweats, five-centre heat (palms/soles/chest warm), dry mouth especially at night, dry skin or hair, low-grade tidal fever in the afternoon, insomnia with early waking?盗汗，五心烦热（手心/脚心/胸口发热），口干尤其夜间，皮肤或头发干燥，午后潮热，失眠早醒？
→ These confirm the Yin deficiency substrate beneath the emotional episodes — they also indicate severity (more signs = deeper Yin depletion = longer treatment)→ 这些确认情志发作背后的阴虚底物——也指示严重程度（症状越多=阴液耗竭越深=治疗时间越长）
Why this question为什么问这个
Mechanism · Yin Deficiency Severity Grading机理 · 阴虚严重程度分级
Mild Yin Xu: Occasional dry mouth, slightly red tongue with thin coat. Episodes infrequent. Responds well toalone.

Moderate Yin Xu: Night sweats, five-centre heat, red tongue with little coat, thin-rapid pulse. Episodes more frequent. Add or combine with .

Severe Yin Xu: Red tongue with zero coat, afternoon tidal fever, emaciation, continuous episodes. Consider as base. Long treatment course (3–6 months minimum). Combined approach with lifestyle modification and psychological support essential.

Clinical teaching point: The tongue coating is the most reliable Yin deficiency gauge in . Normal coat → Yin adequate. Thin coat → Yin beginning to deplete. No coat → Yin severely depleted. Mirror-like shiny tongue with zero coat = critical Yin exhaustion. 轻度阴虚：偶尔口干，舌略红薄苔。发作不频繁。单用甘麦大枣汤效果好。

中度阴虚：盗汗，五心烦热，舌红少苔，脉细数。发作较频繁。加百合地黄汤或合天王补心丹。

重度阴虚：舌红无苔，午后潮热，形体消瘦，持续发作。考虑以黄连阿胶汤为基础方。长疗程（最少3–6个月）。必须联合生活方式调整和心理支持。

临床教学要点：舌苔是脏躁中最可靠的阴虚评估指标。正常苔→阴液充足。薄苔→阴液开始耗竭。无苔→阴液严重耗竭。无苔镜面舌=阴液危重耗竭。
Pattern Differentiation — Built on Severity of Yin Depletion辨证——基于阴液耗竭程度
All share:所有脏躁共有： Yin deficiency base → use as the universal foundation. Then identify what is added on top.阴虚基础→以甘麦大枣汤为通用基础方。然后识别叠加内容。
Residual Liver Qi?残余肝气郁滞？ Flank tension, frequent sighing, wiry pulse component → add Liver-moving herbs (, ,)胁肋紧张，频繁叹气，脉弦→加疏肝药（柴胡、白芍、香附）
Phlegm clouding?痰蒙？ Confused speech, fuzzy thinking, greasy coat → add , to open orifices and dissolve Phlegm. Consider combined.言语混乱，思维模糊，腻苔→加胆南星、石菖蒲开窍化痰。考虑合用百合地黄汤。
Severe Fire from Yin Xu?阴虚生火严重？ Red tongue zero coat, extreme agitation, night sweats → shift base to , maintain as a supplement for the Shen-calming component.舌红无苔，极度躁动，盗汗→以黄连阿胶汤为基础方，保留甘麦大枣汤作为安神成分的补充。
① Heart-Lung Yin Deficiency (Core Pattern)① 心肺阴虚（核心证型）——降不及
Key symptoms主要症状Crying and grief episodes without clear cause; yawning and stretching; agitation; dry throat; insomnia; low-grade heat; slightly red tongue thin or little coat; thin-slightly rapid pulse无明显原因的哭泣和悲伤发作；欠伸；烦躁；咽干；失眠；低热；舌略红薄苔或少苔；脉细略数
Qi dynamic气机— Heart Yin cannot anchor the Shen (palpitations, insomnia, grief). Lung Yin deficiency underlies the sadness-crying pattern: the Lung governs grief, and when Lung Yin is depleted, grief becomes the default emotional state — the Lung's emotion leaks unchecked because its Yin substrate cannot contain it.降不及——心阴不能锚定心神（心悸、失眠、悲伤）。肺阴虚是悲哭模式的基础：肺主悲，肺阴耗竭时，悲伤成为默认情绪状态——肺阴底物不能制约，肺志（悲）持续外漏。
Formula方药(foundation, all patterns)甘麦大枣汤（基础方，所有证型）
② Yin Xu + Residual Liver Qi Stagnation — +② 阴虚+肝气郁滞残余——降不及+出入失常
Key symptoms主要症状episodes + flank distension + frequent sighing + irritability + wiry pulse component. Tongue: red with thin coat, slightly dry. This is the most common pattern — the Liver stagnation root never fully resolved before Yin became depleted.脏躁发作+胁肋胀满+频繁叹气+烦躁+弦脉成分。舌：红薄苔，略干。这是最常见证型——在阴液耗竭之前，肝气郁滞根本从未完全解决。
Qi dynamic气机The stagnation axis and deficiency axis coexist. Must treat both simultaneously — moving Liver Qi without nourishing Yin will further deplete; nourishing Yin without moving Liver Qi will create stagnation in the newly-nourished tissues.郁滞轴线（出入失常）和虚损轴线（降不及）并存。必须同时治疗两者——行肝气而不养阴将进一步耗竭；养阴而不行肝气将在新生组织中造成郁滞。
Formula方药+ (or add 9g + 12g + 9g directly to base formula)甘麦大枣汤+逍遥散（或直接在基础方加柴胡9g+白芍12g+香附9g）
③ Heart-Kidney Yin Xu (Severe Stage)③ 心肾阴虚（重度）——降不及极重
Key symptoms主要症状Frequent, prolonged episodes; extreme emotional lability; tidal fever; severe night sweats; dizziness; tinnitus; low back soreness; emaciation; red tongue zero coat (mirror-like); thin-rapid pulse频繁、持续的脏躁发作；极度情绪不稳定；潮热；严重盗汗；眩晕；耳鸣；腰酸；形体消瘦；舌红无苔（镜面）；脉细数
Qi dynamic气机The Water-Fire axis has completely collapsed. Kidney Water cannot rise to cool Heart Fire; Heart Fire cannot descend to warm Kidney Water. Both organs are depleted and dysregulated. Treatment is long-term (3–6+ months), primarily nourishing with clearing. Lifestyle changes are non-negotiable — without reducing the ongoing Yin-depleting stressors, herbal treatment cannot maintain gains.水火轴线完全崩解。肾水不能上升制约心火；心火不能下降温暖肾水。两脏均耗竭且功能紊乱。治疗是长期的（3–6个月以上），以滋养为主兼清热。生活方式调整不可妥协——若不减少持续耗竭阴液的应激因素，草药治疗无法维持疗效。
Formula方药as base + components added (, ,) for Shen-calming黄连阿胶汤为基础+加入甘麦大枣汤成分（麦冬、炙甘草、大枣）以安神
Classical Cross-reference Baihe Bing (Lily Disease)经典交叉参考 · 百合病
and (Lily Disease, also from) share overlapping presentations: Yin deficiency, emotional dysregulation, restlessness, inability to settle. The distinguishing feature: has a stronger physical wandering quality (cannot settle on food, activity, or position) while has a stronger emotional episode quality (sudden crying, laughing). In practice, they often co-present. (Lily and Rehmannia decoction) from thechapter is a natural companion formula(Lily bulb) specifically nourishes Heart and Lung Yin while clearing deficiency Heat from the Shen domain. 脏躁与百合病（亦出自《金匮要略》）有重叠表现：阴虚、情志失调、烦躁、不能安定。区别特征：百合病有更强的身体游走感（对食物、活动或体位均无法安定），而脏躁有更强的情志发作特质（突然哭泣、大笑）。实践中两者常并见。同章的百合地黄汤是天然的配伍方——百合专门滋养心肺阴液并清心神领域的虚热。
Core Protocol核心处方
HT7 神门 Shenmen Sovereign君
Why this point为什么选它
As in all emotional disorders, HT7 is sovereign: direct access to calming the Heart Shen. In , it is especially important because the Shen is not merely disturbed — it is dysregulated at the constitutional level. Regular needling of HT7 over weeks gradually builds the Shen's capacity to self-regulate. Use reinforcing technique only (no reducing — the patient has nothing to drain).如同所有情志疾患，HT7是君穴：直接平复心神的通路。在脏躁中尤为重要，因为心神不仅受扰——而是在体质层面失调。数周规律针刺HT7逐渐建立心神的自我调节能力。仅用补法（不用泻法——患者无可泻之物）。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 0.3–0.5 cun. Reinforcing only. Gentle stimulation. Retain 30 minutes. Moxa acceptable for severe Yang-Qi deficiency component.直刺0.3–0.5寸。仅用补法。轻柔刺激。留针30分钟。阳气虚重者可加灸。
KI3 太溪 Taixi + KI6 照海 Zhaohai Minister — Yin Nourishment Axis臣——滋阴轴线
Why these points为什么选这些穴
KI3 (Yuan-Source of Kidney): directly accesses and reinforces Kidney Yin — the deepest Yin reserve in the body, the ultimate anchor for Heart Fire and the Shen. In , KI3 is the root-of-root treatment: nourishing the fundamental Yin that all other organs draw from.

KI6 (Yinqiao Mai master point): opens the Yin aspect, specifically governs the Yin-entry phase of sleep and regulates the Yin energy available for emotional governance. It is particularly useful for the insomnia and emotional dysregulation aspects of simultaneously.KI3（肾原穴）：直接滋补肾阴——全身最深层的阴液储备，是心火和心神的终极锚点。在脏躁中，KI3是根本中的根本治疗：滋养所有其他脏腑所依赖的基本阴液。

KI6（阴跷脉主穴）：开阴分，专门主导睡眠的入阴阶段，调节可用于情志统御的阴能量。对脏躁的失眠和情志失调两个方面同时有效。
Technique操作
Both: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun. Reinforcing technique. No aggressive manipulation — the patient's Yin is depleted and excessive stimulation will further drain it.两穴均直刺0.5–1寸。补法。不用强刺激——患者阴液耗竭，过强刺激会进一步耗竭。
SP6 三阴交 Sanyinjiao Minister — Three-Yin Consolidation臣——三阴交汇
Why this point为什么选它
SP6 is the meeting point of Spleen, Liver, and Kidney channels — all three Yin organs. In , which involves Yin deficiency across multiple organs (Heart, Lung, Kidney) and Liver Qi residue, SP6 simultaneously nourishes Yin across all three leg Yin channels, tonifies Spleen Blood generation, and calms the Liver channel. One point, three-organ reach. Also specifically indicated for gynecological-emotional presentations (which are common in — the classical text specifically mentions women). Contraindicated in pregnancy.SP6是脾、肝、肾三经的交会穴——所有三条阴经。在脏躁（涉及多脏腑阴虚：心、肺、肾，及肝气残余）中，SP6同时滋养三条足阴经之阴、补脾生血、平肝。一穴三脏覆盖。也特别适用于妇科-情志并见的表现（脏躁中常见——经典文本特别提到女性）。孕妇禁用。
Technique操作
Perpendicular 1–1.5 cun. Reinforcing. Avoid in pregnancy.直刺1–1.5寸。补法。孕妇禁用。
PC6 内关 Neiguan + LU7 列缺 Lieque Assistant — Chest-Lung-Grief Axis佐——胸肺悲志轴线
Why these points为什么选这些穴
PC6: Regulates Heart Qi and calms Shen — as in all emotional modules, bridges the Pericardium's protective function between emotion and Heart.

LU7 (Lieque, Lung channel Luo point, master of Ren Mai): specifically addresses the grief-crying component. The Lung governs grief — when grief overflows uncontrollably (the hallmark), the Lung's Yin and descending function have failed. LU7 restores Lung's descending Qi, which contains and regulates the outward expression of grief. The Ren Mai connection also addresses the (uterus-heart axis) specifically mentioned in the classical description.PC6：调心气安神——如同所有情志模块，桥接心包在情志与心之间的保护功能。

LU7（列缺，肺经络穴，任脉主穴）：专门针对悲哭成分。肺主悲——当悲伤不受控制地外溢（脏躁标志），肺的阴液和肃降功能已失常。LU7恢复肺气肃降，制约并调节悲的向外表达。任脉联系也专门针对经典脏躁描述中提到的胞宫（胞宫-心轴线）。
Technique操作
PC6: perpendicular 0.5–1 cun, reinforcing. LU7: oblique proximally 0.5–0.8 cun, even method.PC6：直刺0.5–1寸，补法。LU7：向近端斜刺0.5–0.8寸，平补平泻。
Modifications加减
Residual Liver Qi (Pattern ②)残余肝气（证型②）Add LV3 (mild even method — do not reduce heavily as Yin is depleted). Add GB34 to dredge Shaoyang gently.加LV3太冲（轻度平补平泻——不可重泻，因阴液已耗竭）。加GB34阳陵泉轻柔疏泄少阳。
Severe Yin Xu (Pattern ③)严重阴虚（证型③）Add BL23 (reinforcing) — back-shu of Kidney, direct Kidney Yin supplementation. Optional moxa on BL23 if Yang deficiency coexists. Remove any reducing techniques entirely.加BL23肾俞（补法）——肾背俞穴，直接补充肾阴。若兼阳虚可在BL23加灸。完全去除所有泻法。
Gynecological presentation (menstrual-related)妇科表现（月经相关）Add CV4 (reinforcing, moxa recommended) — regulates Chong and Ren Mai, nourishes the axis. Timing: treat in follicular phase (days 5–13) for building; luteal phase (days 14–28) for regulating.加CV4关元（补法，推荐加灸）——调冲任，濡养胞宫轴线。时机：卵泡期（第5–13天）治疗以培补；黄体期（第14–28天）治疗以调节。
甘麦大枣汤 Gān Mài Dàzǎo Tāng
Source: Zhang Zhongjing's sole psychiatric formula Universal foundation for all patterns出处：《金匮要略》· 张仲景唯一精神科方 · 所有脏躁证型的通用基础
Visceral agitation with crying episodes, emotional lability, yawning, agitation, emotional exhaustion. Used as foundation in ALL patterns with modifications added according to sub-pattern.脏躁伴哭泣发作、情志不稳定、欠伸、躁动、情绪耗竭。作为所有脏躁证型的基础方，根据具体证型加减。
炙甘草 9g 浮小麦 30g 大枣 10枚
Formula Logic — Why Three Kitchen Ingredients Heal the Shen方义解析——为何三味食材治愈心神
(Floating Wheat Grain)浮小麦
Floating wheat (unripe, light wheat that floats in water) specifically nourishes the Heart, calms the Shen, and clears deficiency Heat. The lightness of floating wheat (it fails to germinate — arrested potential) gives it an affinity for calming agitation without suppression. In the Qi dynamic: it restores the descending-inward movement of the Heart Shen that has been lost in , without force. Classical dosage: 30g, as a large nourishing dose.浮小麦（未熟的、漂浮在水面的轻质小麦）特异性滋养心脏，安定心神，清虚热。浮小麦的轻质（不能发芽——被遏制的潜力）赋予其平息躁动而不压制的亲和性。在气机中：无需强制地恢复脏躁中已丧失的心神下降-内收（入·降）运动。经典剂量：30g，大量滋养剂量。
(Jujube)大枣
Tonifies the Middle Jiao (Spleen-Stomach), nourishes Blood, calms the Shen through nourishment rather than sedation. provides the Blood substrate that the Shen needs to be housed. Its sweet nature harmonizes the center and prevents emotional extremes — the "middle ground" quality that has lost. Also moderates the potential harshness of other formula components.补中（脾胃），养血，通过滋养而非镇静安神。大枣为心神提供所需的血液底物。其甘味和中，防止情绪极端——脏躁所失去的「中正」品质。也缓和其他方药成分可能的峻烈。
(Honey-fried Licorice)炙甘草
— literally "relaxes urgency and harmonizes the center." In , the emotional urgency (the sudden, uncontrollable episodes) IS the pathology that needs most. (honey-fried, warming) tonifies Qi, harmonizes all formula components, and — most importantly — literally slows and moderates emotional reactivity by nourishing the Middle Jiao that grounds the Shen. in this formula is not merely a harmonizer — it is an active therapeutic agent for emotional regulation.缓急和中——字面意义为「缓解急迫感并调和中焦」。在脏躁中，情绪急迫感（突然的、不可控的发作）正是最需要甘草的病理所在。炙甘草（炙，温性）补气、调和所有方药成分，最重要的是——通过滋养锚定心神的中焦，字面上减缓和调节情绪反应性。炙甘草在本方中不仅是调和剂——它是情志调节的主动治疗药物。
Formula Teaching Summary方义教学总结
Three food-grade herbs. No aggressive clearing, no heavy minerals, no sedation. The formula works by building the Yin substrate that emotional regulation requires — feeding the empty vessel rather than forcing it to stop reacting. This is the highest expression of Zhang Zhongjing's therapeutic philosophy: the simplest remedy is often the most profound. For patterns requiring additional treatment, add to this base rather than replacing it.三味药食同源之品。无强力清热，无重镇矿物，无镇静。该方通过建立情志调节所需的阴液底物而起效——滋养空虚的容器，而非强迫其停止反应。这是张仲景治疗哲学的最高体现：最简单的治疗往往是最深刻的。对于需要额外治疗的证型，在此基础方上加减，而非替换。
百合地黄汤 Bǎihé Dìhuáng Tāng
Source: Companion formula for -overlap出处：《金匮要略》· 百合病-脏躁重叠的配合方
Emotional dysregulation with additional restlessness and inability to settle (eating, sitting, lying); low-grade fever; scanty dark urine; red tongue no coat; thin-rapid pulse情志失调伴额外的烦躁和无法安定（饮食、坐卧皆不宁）；低热；尿少色深；舌红无苔；脉细数
百合 30g 生地黄汁 适量
Formula Logic方义解析
Core logic核心逻辑
(Lily bulb) nourishes Heart and Lung Yin, calms Shen, and clears deficiency Heat — it is the primary herb for the Shen domain (Heart-Lung axis) in deficiency patterns. The name (hundred unions) suggests its ability to harmonize and integrate the fragmented Shen. clears Heat and nourishes Yin from the Blood level. Together, these two herbs address the most severe end of Yin deficiency with Heat. Often combined with in clinical practice: addresses the Yin-Heat component; addresses the Shen-calming and emotional regulation component.百合（百合鳞茎）滋养心肺阴液，安神，清虚热——是虚证中心神领域（心肺轴线）的首要药物。百合（百个合并）之名暗示其调和、整合碎片化心神的能力。生地从血分层面清热养阴。两药合用，针对阴虚兼热的最严重端。临床实践中常与甘麦大枣汤合用：百合地黄汤针对阴虚热的成分；甘麦大枣汤针对安神和情志调节的成分。
加减法 — 脏躁 Pattern Modifications
All begin with . Modifications by sub-pattern:所有证型均以甘麦大枣汤为基础。各亚型加减：
All Modifications所有加减
Pattern ① — Core Yin Xu证型①——核心阴虚
alone or + 30g + 12g to reinforce Heart-Lung Yin axis.甘麦大枣汤单用，或加百合30g+麦冬12g以强化心肺阴液轴线。
Pattern ② — Yin Xu + Liver Qi证型②——阴虚+肝郁
+ 9g + 12g + 9g + 9g (components added).甘麦大枣汤+柴胡9g+白芍12g+香附9g+当归9g（加入逍遥散成分）。
Pattern ③ — Severe Heart-Kidney Yin Xu证型③——重度心肾阴虚
as base + add 30g + 10from. Or (patent) + as daily tea decoction.黄连阿胶汤为基础+加浮小麦30g+大枣10枚（来自甘麦大枣汤）。或天王补心丹（成药）+甘麦大枣汤作为日常代茶饮。
Menopausal / perimenopausal更年期/围更年期脏躁
+ (, , , , ,) — balances Kidney Yin and Yang simultaneously for the complex Yin-Yang transition of menopause. The framework is particularly appropriate when hot flashes and cold sensations coexist.甘麦大枣汤+二仙汤（仙茅、仙灵脾、当归、巴戟天、黄柏、知母）——同时平衡肾阴阳，适用于更年期复杂的阴阳转换。当潮热与怕冷并存时，二仙汤框架特别适当。
Case 1案例一Classic — Full Cascade Presentation经典脏躁——完整级联表现
Patient: 47F. History of(frustration after career setback, 3 years ago). Then emotional insomnia (2 years). Now: sudden uncontrollable crying episodes, 2–4x daily, lasting 10–30 min. Also sudden laughter that feels inappropriate. Frequent yawning. Night sweats, five-centre heat. Dry mouth at night. Red tongue, thin coat. Thin-rapid pulse.患者：女，47岁。郁证史（3年前事业挫折后郁闷）。之后情志失眠（2年）。现：突发不可控哭泣发作，每日2–4次，持续10–30分钟。也有感觉不适当的突然大笑。频繁欠伸。盗汗，五心烦热。夜间口干。舌红，薄苔。脉细数。
(3yr)郁证（3年）
→
(2yr)情志失眠（2年）
→
Fire burns Yin chronically火热日久灼伤阴液
→
— Shen ungoverned脏躁——心神失御
Treatment: + 9g + 12g + 12g + 20g (residual Liver Qi + Yin nourishment). Acupuncture: HT7 + KI3 + KI6 + SP6 + PC6 + LU7 + LV3 (mild). 12-week minimum course. Concurrent referral to counselling — the grief from the career setback was never fully processed.治疗：甘麦大枣汤+柴胡9g+白芍12g+麦冬12g+百合20g（残余肝气+滋阴）。针灸：HT7+KI3+KI6+SP6+PC6+LU7+LV3（轻度）。最少12周疗程。同时转介心理咨询——事业挫折的悲伤从未被充分处理。
Outcome: Crying episodes reduced from 2–4/day to 2–3/week by week 8. Night sweats resolved by week 6. Tongue coat beginning to return by week 10 (Yin rebuilding). Patient described feeling "like the ground is under me again." Treatment continued 6 months total with gradual tapering.疗效：哭泣发作在第8周从每日2–4次减少到每周2–3次。盗汗在第6周消失。第10周舌苔开始恢复（阴液重建）。患者描述感觉「重新找回了脚下的地面」。治疗共持续6个月，逐渐减量。
Case 2案例二Menopausal — Yin-Yang Transition更年期脏躁——阴阳转换
Patient: 53F, perimenopausal. Episodes of crying and emotional flooding, especially premenstrual (cycle now irregular). Hot flashes alternating with cold limbs. Night sweats. Palpitations. Insomnia. Slight dry mouth. Tongue: red body, thin-slightly yellow coat. Pulse: thin-wiry.患者：女，53岁，围更年期。哭泣和情绪爆发发作，尤其经前（周期现已不规律）。潮热与手足冷交替。盗汗。心悸。失眠。轻微口干。舌：舌红，薄略黄苔。脉：细弦。
Treatment: + . Acupuncture: HT7 + KI3 + SP6 + CV4 (moxa) + LU7 + PC6. Timing: treat luteal phase weekly; follicular phase fortnightly. Explain to patient: perimenopausal has a physiological component (hormonal Yin-Yang fluctuation) amplifying the emotional one — it is not "going crazy," it is a constitutional transition that TCM is specifically equipped to support.治疗：甘麦大枣汤+二仙汤。针灸：HT7+KI3+SP6+CV4（灸）+LU7+PC6。时机：黄体期每周一次；卵泡期每两周一次。向患者解释：围更年期脏躁有生理成分（激素阴阳波动）放大情志成分——这不是「精神出问题」，而是体质转换，中医对此有专门的支持能力。
Teaching point: Menopausal is the clinical overlap between TCM emotional medicine and gynecology. The Kidney Yin decline of menopause removes the same Yin anchor that emotional stress removes — they are the same mechanism by different causes. This is why perimenopausal women are the most classically described population.教学要点：更年期脏躁是中医情志医学与妇科学的临床交汇点。更年期肾阴下降移除了与情志压力相同的阴液锚点——两者是相同机制的不同病因。这正是为何围更年期女性是最经典描述的脏躁人群。
Complete Cascade Summary情志病证 · 完整级联总结
郁证
Qi stagnation
→
梅核气
Qi-Phlegm binding
→
情志失眠
Fire disturbs Shen
→
心悸
Shen unanchored
→
脏躁
Yin exhausted
Each module represents one stage in the progressive depletion of Yin from emotional disorder. Early-stage patterns (,) are excess-dominant and respond quickly. Mid-stage (,) are mixed excess-deficiency. Late-stage is deficiency-dominant and requires months of sustained nourishment. The earlier the intervention, the shorter the treatment and the better the prognosis. The cascade also runs in reverse during recovery — as Yin rebuilds, later-stage symptoms resolve before earlier-stage ones. 每个模块代表情志障碍中阴液进行性耗竭的一个阶段。早期证型（郁证、梅核气）以实为主，反应迅速。中期（情志失眠、心悸）为虚实夹杂。晚期（脏躁）以虚为主，需要数月持续滋养。干预越早，治疗越短，预后越好。级联在康复过程中也逆向进行——随着阴液重建，后期症状先于早期症状消解。
Digestive消化系统
Nausea / Vomiting呕吐
Root: Stomach Qi should descend; when it is disturbed it rebels upward. Every pattern of vomiting is one question — what is driving the Stomach Qi up: heat, cold, food, Liver invasion, or its own weakness. PC6 for nausea is the single best-evidenced point in all of acupuncture.根本：胃气以降为顺，被扰则上逆。呕吐诸证只问一事——什么在推动胃气上逆：热、寒、食、肝犯，还是胃自身之虚。内关止呕，是整个针灸循证证据最强的单穴。
First screen red flags, then read the vomitus. Refer urgently for: vomiting with severe headache/neck stiffness, projectile vomiting, blood (coffee-ground or fresh), severe abdominal pain with rigidity, signs of obstruction, or dehydration. Once safe, the nature of what comes up and when tells you the pattern. 先筛红旗，再辨呕吐物。以下急转诊：呕吐伴剧烈头痛／颈强、喷射性呕吐、呕血（咖啡渣或鲜血）、剧烈腹痛拒按、梗阻征象、脱水。安全后，吐什么、何时吐即可定证。
Core Framework · Why Vomiting is a Descent Failure of the Stomach核心框架 · 呕吐为何是胃失和降
The Stomach governs "receiving and rotting" food and sends it downward (胃主降浊). Vomiting is the visible sign that this downward movement (降) has reversed into rebellion (逆). So the question is never "what stops the vomiting" but "what is forcing the Stomach Qi up." Excess drivers push it up (heat, cold-pathogen, retained food, Liver Qi invading); deficiency lets it float up (Stomach too weak to hold the descent). Identify the driver, redirect the Qi downward — the vomiting resolves.胃主受纳腐熟、降浊下行。呕吐是"降"逆转为"逆"的外显。故所问从来不是"如何止呕"，而是"什么在迫胃气上逆"。实者迫之上（热、寒邪、食积、肝气犯胃）；虚者浮之上（胃虚不能主降）。识其driver、降其气，呕自止。
Q1 · Vomitus quality问一 · 吐物性状Sour-bitter hot fluid, thirst for cold → Stomach heat. Clear watery, no thirst → Cold. Sour-rotten undigested food → food stagnation. Scanty, dry-retching with little output → Stomach Yin/Qi weak.吐物酸苦灼热、喜冷饮→胃热。清水稀涎、不渴→寒。酸腐未化食物→食积。量少、干呕物少→胃阴／气虚。
Q2 · Timing & triggers问二 · 时间诱因Right after eating + emotional upset → Liver invading Stomach. After overeating → food stagnation. After cold food/cold exposure → Cold. Intermittent, worse when tired, better with warm food → Spleen-Stomach weakness.食后即吐+情志不畅→肝气犯胃。暴食后→食积。食冷／受凉后→寒。时作、劳则加重、得温食则减→脾胃虚弱。
Q3 · Accompanying问三 · 兼症Rib distension, belching, sighing → Liver. Burning epigastrium, foul breath, constipation → heat. Cold epigastric pain eased by warmth → cold. Foul belch, bloating relieved after vomiting → food. Fatigue, pale, poor appetite → deficiency.胁胀、嗳气、太息→肝。胃脘灼热、口臭、便秘→热。胃脘冷痛得温减→寒。嗳腐、吐后胀减→食。乏力、面白、纳差→虚。
Q4 · Special populations问四 · 特殊人群Pregnancy (morning sickness / 妊娠恶阻), post-operative, and chemotherapy-induced nausea are the highest-value acupuncture indications — PC6 has strong evidence in all three. Treat gently in pregnancy; coordinate with oncology for chemo cases.妊娠恶阻、术后、化疗呕吐是针灸最高价值适应症——内关在此三者循证证据强。孕期宜轻治；化疗者与肿瘤科协同。
Five patterns, one axis: all are the Stomach Qi failing to descend and rebelling up. Four are excess (a driver pushes it up); one is deficiency (the Stomach can't hold the descent). 五证一轴：皆胃气不降而上逆。四实（driver 迫之上），一虚（胃虚不主降）。
① Stomach Heat Rebelling Upward① 胃热上逆
Excessive Ascent — Stomach fire drives Qi and fluids upward升太过——胃火迫气津上冲
Key symptoms: vomiting sour-bitter hot fluid soon after eating, thirst for cold drinks, burning epigastrium, foul breath, possibly constipation; red tongue with yellow coat, rapid pulse. Mechanism: heat is Yang and rises; Stomach fire forces the contents and Qi upward before they can descend. Treatment: 清胃降逆止呕 — clear Stomach heat, descend the rebellion. Links to the 胃火·胃热 pattern card.主症：食后不久吐酸苦灼热之物、喜冷饮、胃脘灼热、口臭、或便秘；舌红苔黄、脉数。病机：热为阳而炎上；胃火迫内容与气上逆，不得下行。治法：清胃降逆止呕。联动「胃火·胃热」证型卡。
② Cold Pathogen Attacking the Stomach② 寒邪犯胃
Entry-Exit disorder — Cold congeals the Stomach, Qi cannot descend and rebels up出入失常——寒凝胃腑，气不降而上逆
Key symptoms: sudden vomiting of clear watery fluid, cold pain in the epigastrium relieved by warmth, no thirst, prefers warm drinks; white moist coat, tight/slow pulse. Often after cold food or cold exposure. Mechanism: Cold is contracting and congealing — it freezes the Stomach's descending function, and Qi rebels upward carrying clear fluid. Treatment: 温胃散寒，降逆止呕 — warm the Stomach, scatter Cold, descend rebellion. Links to the 寒湿 pattern card.主症：突发呕吐清水稀涎、胃脘冷痛得温则减、不渴、喜热饮；苔白润、脉紧或迟。多因食冷或受凉。病机：寒性收引凝滞——冻遏胃之降，气逆挟清水上冲。治法：温胃散寒、降逆止呕。联动「寒湿」证型卡。
③ Food Retention③ 食滞内停
Entry-Exit disorder — retained food blocks the Stomach, then rebels up出入失常——食滞壅阻胃腑，积而上逆
Key symptoms: vomiting of sour-rotten undigested food, foul belching, epigastric/abdominal distension that eases after vomiting, aversion to food, thick greasy coat. Follows overeating. Mechanism: excess food overwhelms Stomach transport; it stagnates, ferments, and blocks the Qi dynamic — the Stomach expels upward what it cannot send down. Treatment: 消食导滞，和胃降逆 — disperse food, resolve stagnation, harmonise and descend. Links to the 食积 pattern card.主症：呕吐酸腐未化食物、嗳腐、脘腹胀满吐后减、厌食、苔厚腻。多因暴食。病机：食积超胃之运，滞而腐、阻气机——胃不能降则上排其所积。治法：消食导滞、和胃降逆。联动「食积」证型卡。
④ Liver Qi Invading the Stomach④ 肝气犯胃
Entry-Exit disorder — constrained Liver Qi overacts on the Stomach, driving Qi up出入失常——肝郁横逆犯胃，迫气上逆
Key symptoms: vomiting or retching triggered/worsened by emotional upset, acid regurgitation, belching, rib and epigastric distension, sighing; wiry pulse. Mechanism: the Liver governs free coursing; when emotion constrains it, Liver Qi rebels sideways (横逆) into the Stomach, disrupting its descent — a wood-overacting-on-earth vomiting. Treatment: 疏肝和胃，降逆止呕 — course the Liver, harmonise the Stomach, descend rebellion. Links to the 肝气郁结 pattern card (its widest network).主症：呕吐或干呕遇情志诱发／加重、泛酸、嗳气、胸胁脘腹胀、太息；脉弦。病机：肝主疏泄，情志所郁则肝气横逆犯胃，扰其和降——木乘土之呕。治法：疏肝和胃、降逆止呕。联动「肝气郁结」证型卡（全库最广之网）。
⑤ Spleen-Stomach Weakness⑤ 脾胃虚弱
Insufficient Ascent/Descent — a weak Stomach cannot maintain its downward function升降不及——胃虚不能主降
Key symptoms: intermittent vomiting of thin clear fluid, worse when tired or after eating a little too much, poor appetite, fatigue, pale face, loose stool; pale tongue, weak pulse. Chronic, not acute. Mechanism: when Spleen-Stomach Qi is weak, the Stomach lacks the strength to hold its descending function, so Qi floats up intermittently — a deficiency vomiting, distinct from the forceful excess types. Treatment: 健脾益胃，和中降逆 — strengthen Spleen-Stomach, harmonise the middle, descend gently. Reinforcing, may add moxa. Links to the 脾气虚 pattern card.主症：时作呕吐清稀涎水、劳累或稍多食则甚、纳差、乏力、面白、便溏；舌淡、脉弱。属慢性非急性。病机：脾胃气虚则胃无力主降，气时时上浮——虚性呕吐，别于实证之势急。治法：健脾益胃、和中降逆。补法可加灸。联动「脾气虚」证型卡。
PC6 + ST36 + CV12 form the antiemetic core for every pattern — they harmonise the Stomach and descend rebellious Qi. Pattern points address the specific driver. 内关+足三里+中脘为各证止呕之核心——和胃降逆。配穴治具体 driver。
Core points (all patterns)核心穴（各证通用）PC6 内关 — the single most evidence-based antiemetic point (regulates the middle Jiao, descends Qi, calms the Stomach); ST36 足三里 — He-sea of Stomach, harmonises and descends; CV12 中脘 — Mu of Stomach, the direct Stomach-harmonising point.内关——循证最强之止呕穴（理中焦、降气、和胃）；足三里——胃之合，和降；中脘——胃募，直和胃气。
① Stomach heat① 胃热上逆+ ST44 内庭, LI4 合谷 (or ST45 厉兑) — clear Stomach fire; reducing method, no moxa.+ 内庭、合谷（或厉兑）——清胃火；泻法不灸。
② Cold pathogen② 寒邪犯胃+ moxa CV12 中脘, ST36, CV13 上脘 — warm the Stomach and scatter Cold; add gentle moxa.+ 灸中脘、足三里、上脘——温胃散寒；加温和灸。
③ Food retention③ 食滞内停+ ST25 天枢, ST21 梁门, ST44 内庭, SP4 公孙 — disperse food and free the middle; reducing.+ 天枢、梁门、内庭、公孙——消食导滞、通中；泻法。
④ Liver invading④ 肝气犯胃+ LV3 太冲, GB34 阳陵泉, PC6 (emphasised) — course the Liver and descend rebellion; even method.+ 太冲、阳陵泉、内关（重用）——疏肝降逆；平补平泻。
⑤ Spleen-Stomach weak⑤ 脾胃虚弱+ BL20 脾俞, BL21 胃俞, SP4 公孙, CV6 气海 (+moxa) — tonify and warm the Spleen-Stomach; reinforcing.+ 脾俞、胃俞、公孙、气海（加灸）——补温脾胃；补法。
Ban Xia and Sheng Jiang are the core Stomach-descending, anti-emetic pair across most patterns; the accompanying herbs shift by driver. 半夏、生姜为大多证降胃止呕之核心对；随 driver 变佐使。
① Stomach heat 胃热上逆① 胃热上逆竹茹汤 / 黄连温胆汤 — Zhu Ru, Huang Lian clear Stomach heat; Ban Xia descends. For heat with fluid damage add 麦冬/芦根.竹茹汤／黄连温胆汤——竹茹、黄连清胃热；半夏降逆。热伤津加麦冬、芦根。
② Cold 寒邪犯胃② 寒邪犯胃小半夏汤 + 良附丸 — Ban Xia + Sheng Jiang descend and warm; Gao Liang Jiang + Xiang Fu warm the Stomach and scatter Cold. 藿香正气 if with damp/exterior cold.小半夏汤+良附丸——半夏、生姜降温；高良姜、香附温胃散寒。兼湿／表寒用藿香正气。
③ Food 食滞内停③ 食滞内停保和丸 — Shan Zha, Shen Qu, Lai Fu Zi disperse food; Ban Xia + Chen Pi descend and harmonise. Strong stagnation → 枳实导滞丸.保和丸——山楂、神曲、莱菔子消食；半夏、陈皮和降。积重→枳实导滞丸。
④ Liver invading 肝气犯胃④ 肝气犯胃半夏厚朴汤 / 四七汤 + 左金丸 — course Qi and descend; Zuo Jin Wan (Huang Lian + Wu Zhu Yu) for the sour regurgitation of Liver-fire invading Stomach.半夏厚朴汤／四七汤+左金丸——理气降逆；左金丸（黄连+吴茱萸）治肝火犯胃之泛酸。
⑤ Spleen-Stomach weak 脾胃虚弱⑤ 脾胃虚弱香砂六君子汤 — Liu Jun Zi (Ren Shen, Bai Zhu, Fu Ling, Gan Cao, Ban Xia, Chen Pi) + Mu Xiang, Sha Ren — tonify Spleen-Stomach and harmonise the descent. The model formula for deficiency vomiting.香砂六君子汤——六君子（参、术、苓、草、半夏、陈皮）+木香、砂仁——补脾胃、和降。虚性呕吐之代表方。
Clinical pearl临证心得
For the three highest-value groups — pregnancy, post-op, chemotherapy — PC6 alone (or PC6 + ST36) is often enough and is what the evidence supports; you don't need the full pattern battery to reduce the nausea. Still differentiate the pattern for lasting results, but lead with PC6 for immediate relief. In pregnancy, keep stimulation gentle and avoid strongly reducing/forbidden points. 三大高价值人群——妊娠、术后、化疗——单用内关（或内关+足三里）常已足够，且正是循证所支持；不必上全套配穴即可缓解恶心。但仍须辨证以求长效，急则以内关取速效。孕期刺激宜轻，避强泻及妊娠禁忌穴。
Digestive消化系统
Epigastric Pain胃脘痛
Root: the Stomach loses its harmonious descent and its collaterals lose free flow — "no free flow, pain (不通则痛)" or "no nourishment, pain (不荣则痛)." Six patterns span cold, heat, Qi, food, stasis, and deficiency. This module carries the full internal-medicine differentiation; for red-flag screening and referral of acute visceral pain, see the Pain module.根本：胃失和降、胃络失于通畅——"不通则痛"或"不荣则痛"。六证涵盖寒、热、气、食、瘀、虚。本模块承担完整内科辨证；急性内脏痛的红旗筛查与转诊，见疼痛模块。
Screen red flags first. Refer urgently for: severe unrelenting pain, pain radiating to back/shoulder with sweating (cardiac/pancreatic), rigid abdomen, melena or hematemesis, weight loss with anorexia in older patients, or pain that is clearly not gastric. Epigastric pain can mimic cardiac and biliary emergencies. 先筛红旗。以下急转诊：剧痛不缓、痛引背／肩伴冷汗（心源／胰源）、腹硬拒按、黑便或呕血、老年消瘦纳差、明显非胃源之痛。胃脘痛可与心源、胆源急症相似。
↔ Cross-module: acute visceral-pain red-flag screening lives in the Pain module (visceral pain). This page handles the full pattern-based treatment.↔ 跨模块：急性内脏痛红旗筛查在疼痛模块（内脏痛）。本页承担完整辨证论治。
Core Framework · Two Roads to Stomach Pain核心框架 · 胃痛的两条路
All epigastric pain arises one of two ways. Excess — "no free flow, pain" (不通则痛): something obstructs the Stomach collaterals — cold congealing, heat scorching, Qi stagnating, food retained, or Blood static. The pain is usually stronger, refuses pressure, and is fixed or distending. Deficiency — "no nourishment, pain" (不荣则痛): the Stomach is under-warmed or under-nourished (Spleen-Stomach vacuity-cold, or Stomach Yin depleted); the pain is dull, likes pressure and warmth, and eases with food. Sorting excess from deficiency (and cold from heat) is the whole differentiation.胃脘痛皆出两途。实——"不通则痛"：有物阻胃络——寒凝、热灼、气滞、食停、血瘀。痛多较剧、拒按、固定或胀。虚——"不荣则痛"：胃失温养（脾胃虚寒，或胃阴亏虚）；痛多隐隐、喜按喜温、得食则减。辨虚实（兼辨寒热）即全部辨证之要。
Q1 · Pain quality问一 · 痛的性质Distending pain moving with mood → Qi (Liver). Cold cramping pain → cold. Burning pain → heat. Fixed stabbing pain, worse at night → stasis. Dull pain, likes pressure → deficiency.胀痛随情绪→气（肝）。冷绞痛→寒。灼痛→热。固定刺痛、夜甚→瘀。隐痛喜按→虚。
Q2 · Pressure & warmth问二 · 按压与温度Refuses pressure → excess. Likes pressure → deficiency. Eased by warmth → cold/vacuity-cold. Eased by cold, worse with warmth → heat.拒按→实。喜按→虚。得温则减→寒／虚寒。得凉则减、遇热重→热。
Q3 · Relation to food问三 · 与进食关系Worse after eating, distension, foul belch → food/Qi excess. Better after eating (pain when hungry) → deficiency. Burning + hunger but no appetite, dry mouth → Stomach Yin deficiency.食后加重、胀、嗳腐→食／气实。食后减（饥则痛）→虚。灼热+饥不欲食、口干→胃阴虚。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉White coat, tight/slow pulse → cold. Yellow coat, rapid → heat. Wiry → Qi. Purple/dark tongue, choppy pulse → stasis. Red-peeled tongue, thready-rapid → Stomach Yin xu. Pale tongue, weak pulse → vacuity-cold.苔白、脉紧／迟→寒。苔黄、脉数→热。脉弦→气。舌紫黯、脉涩→瘀。舌红剥、脉细数→胃阴虚。舌淡、脉弱→虚寒。
Six patterns. The first four are excess (不通则痛: cold, heat, Qi, food/stasis); the last two are deficiency (不荣则痛: vacuity-cold, Stomach Yin). Chronic pain often mixes — commonly Qi-stagnation evolving into stasis, or long heat draining Stomach Yin. 六证。前四属实（不通则痛：寒、热、气、食／瘀）；后二属虚（不荣则痛：虚寒、胃阴）。久痛多兼夹——常见气滞入瘀、久热耗胃阴。
① Cold Attacking the Stomach① 寒邪客胃
Entry-Exit disorder — Cold congeals the Stomach collaterals (不通则痛)出入失常——寒凝胃络（不通则痛）
Key symptoms: sudden cold cramping epigastric pain, marked relief from warmth and worsening from cold, no thirst, prefers hot drinks; white coat, tight pulse. Often after cold food/exposure. Treatment: 温胃散寒，理气止痛 — warm the Stomach, scatter Cold, move Qi. Links to the 寒湿 pattern card.主症：胃脘冷痛暴作、得温痛减遇寒加重、不渴、喜热饮；苔白、脉紧。多因食冷受凉。治法：温胃散寒、理气止痛。联动「寒湿」证型卡。
② Stomach Heat / Fire Blazing② 胃热炽盛
Excessive Ascent — Stomach fire scorches the collaterals (不通则痛)升太过——胃火灼络（不通则痛）
Key symptoms: burning epigastric pain, thirst for cold, foul breath, acid regurgitation, hunger, possibly constipation; red tongue with yellow coat, rapid pulse. Often from spicy/greasy diet, alcohol, or Liver-fire transferring to the Stomach. Treatment: 清胃泻火，和中止痛 — clear Stomach, drain fire, harmonise. Links to the 胃火·胃热 pattern card.主症：胃脘灼痛、喜冷、口臭、泛酸、消谷善饥、或便秘；舌红苔黄、脉数。多因辛辣肥甘、饮酒、或肝火犯胃。治法：清胃泻火、和中止痛。联动「胃火·胃热」证型卡。
③ Liver Qi Invading the Stomach③ 肝气犯胃
Entry-Exit disorder — constrained Liver Qi overacts on the Stomach (气滞则不通)出入失常——肝郁横逆犯胃（气滞则不通）
Key symptoms: distending epigastric pain radiating to the ribs, worse with emotional upset, belching, sighing, acid; wiry pulse. The most common chronic gastritis pattern. Mechanism: the Liver overacts on the Stomach; Qi stagnation blocks the collaterals — distending, moving pain that tracks the mood. Treatment: 疏肝理气，和胃止痛 — course the Liver, regulate Qi, harmonise the Stomach. Links to the 肝气郁结 pattern card (its widest network).主症：胃脘胀痛连胁、遇情志加重、嗳气、太息、泛酸；脉弦。慢性胃炎最常见证。病机：肝木乘胃土；气滞阻络——胀痛走窜、随情绪变。治法：疏肝理气、和胃止痛。联动「肝气郁结」证型卡（全库最广之网）。
④ Blood Stasis in the Stomach④ 瘀血停胃
Entry-Exit disorder — prolonged Qi stagnation enters the collaterals as stasis (瘀阻则不通)出入失常——气滞日久入络成瘀（瘀阻则不通）
Key symptoms: fixed stabbing epigastric pain, worse at night and with pressure, sometimes a palpable fixed area, possibly black stool or coffee-ground vomitus (bleeding); purple/dark tongue, possibly with stasis spots, choppy pulse. The endpoint of chronic unresolved Qi stagnation. Treatment: 活血化瘀，理气止痛 — invigorate Blood, resolve stasis, move Qi. Links to the 气滞血瘀 pattern card. Note: dark stool/hematemesis needs medical evaluation.主症：胃脘刺痛固定、夜甚拒按、或有定处压痛、或黑便／咖啡样呕吐物（出血）；舌紫黯或有瘀斑、脉涩。为久气滞不解之归宿。治法：活血化瘀、理气止痛。联动「气滞血瘀」证型卡。注：黑便／呕血须医学评估。
⑤ Spleen-Stomach Vacuity-Cold⑤ 脾胃虚寒
Insufficient Ascent — Spleen-Stomach Yang too weak to warm and nourish (不荣则痛)升不及——脾胃阳虚，温养不足（不荣则痛）
Key symptoms: dull persistent epigastric pain that likes warmth and pressure and eases with food, worse when hungry/tired/cold, vomiting of clear fluid, cold limbs, fatigue, loose stool; pale tongue, weak pulse. The classic chronic peptic-type pain. Mechanism: Yang vacuity fails to warm and nourish the Stomach; "no nourishment, pain" — a deficiency ache, not an obstruction. Treatment: 温中健脾，和胃止痛 — warm the middle, strengthen the Spleen, harmonise the Stomach. Moxa is central. Links to the 脾气虚 pattern card.主症：胃脘隐痛绵绵、喜温喜按、得食则减、饥／劳／寒则重、泛吐清水、肢冷、乏力、便溏；舌淡、脉弱。慢性消化性溃疡样痛之典型。病机：阳虚不能温养胃腑；"不荣则痛"——虚性隐痛，非阻滞。治法：温中健脾、和胃止痛。灸为要。联动「脾气虚」证型卡。
⑥ Stomach Yin Deficiency⑥ 胃阴亏虚
Insufficient Descent — Stomach Yin depleted, empty heat, collaterals under-moistened (不荣则痛)降不及——胃阴亏虚，虚热，胃络失濡（不荣则痛）
Key symptoms: dull burning epigastric pain, hunger without desire to eat, dry mouth and throat, dry stool, low-grade discomfort worse in the afternoon; red tongue with little/peeled coat, thready-rapid pulse. Often the end-stage of long-standing Stomach heat that has consumed the Yin. Mechanism: Stomach Yin (the moistening fluid) is depleted; the collaterals lose moisture and relative empty-heat arises — a dry, deficiency pain. Treatment: 养阴益胃，和中止痛 — nourish Yin, benefit the Stomach, harmonise. Links to the 阴虚火旺 pattern card.主症：胃脘隐隐灼痛、饥不欲食、口干咽燥、大便干、午后为著；舌红少苔或剥、脉细数。多为久胃热耗阴之终末。病机：胃阴（濡润之津）亏，胃络失濡而相对生虚热——干性虚痛。治法：养阴益胃、和中止痛。联动「阴虚火旺」证型卡。
CV12 + ST36 + PC6 harmonise the Stomach and stop pain in every pattern; pattern points address cold/heat/Qi/stasis/deficiency. Needle direction follows the mechanism. 中脘+足三里+内关为各证和胃止痛之核心；配穴治寒／热／气／瘀／虚。针向随病机。
Core points (all patterns)核心穴（各证通用）CV12 中脘 (Mu of Stomach, influential point of Fu), ST36 足三里 (He-sea, harmonises Stomach), PC6 内关 (regulates middle, descends rebellion). These three are the backbone of every gastric pattern.中脘（胃募、腑会）、足三里（合穴、和胃）、内关（理中焦、降逆）。三穴为各胃证之骨干。
① Cold 寒邪客胃① 寒邪客胃+ moxa CV12/CV13 上脘, ST36; add GB34 — warm and scatter cold, move Qi.+ 灸中脘／上脘、足三里；加阳陵泉——温散寒、理气。
② Heat 胃热炽盛② 胃热炽盛+ ST44 内庭, LI11 曲池, LV2 行间 (if from Liver fire) — clear Stomach fire; reducing, no moxa.+ 内庭、曲池、行间（肝火者）——清胃火；泻法不灸。
③ Liver Qi 肝气犯胃③ 肝气犯胃+ LV3 太冲, GB34 阳陵泉, PC6 (emphasised), Qimen LV14 — course Liver, harmonise Stomach.+ 太冲、阳陵泉、内关（重用）、期门——疏肝和胃。
④ Stasis 瘀血停胃④ 瘀血停胃+ BL17 膈俞, SP10 血海, LV3 — invigorate Blood, resolve stasis (rule out active bleeding first).+ 膈俞、血海、太冲——活血化瘀（先排除活动性出血）。
⑤ Vacuity-cold 脾胃虚寒⑤ 脾胃虚寒+ moxa BL20 脾俞, BL21 胃俞, CV6 气海, ST36 — warm and tonify Spleen-Stomach; reinforcing with generous moxa.+ 灸脾俞、胃俞、气海、足三里——温补脾胃；补法重灸。
⑥ Stomach Yin 胃阴亏虚⑥ 胃阴亏虚+ SP6 三阴交, KI3 太溪, BL21 胃俞 — nourish Yin and benefit the Stomach; even/reinforcing, no moxa.+ 三阴交、太溪、胃俞——养阴益胃；平补不灸。
Formulas by pattern. The pain resolves when the underlying obstruction is cleared or the deficiency is filled — treat the mechanism, not just the pain. 按证选方。祛其所阻或补其所虚，痛自止——治病机，非止痛。
① Cold 寒邪客胃① 寒邪客胃良附丸 / 香苏散 — Gao Liang Jiang + Xiang Fu warm the Stomach and move Qi. Severe cold → 附子理中丸.良附丸／香苏散——高良姜+香附温胃行气。寒重→附子理中丸。
② Heat 胃热炽盛② 胃热炽盛清中汤 / 化肝煎 — Huang Lian, Zhi Zi clear Stomach fire; add 左金丸 for acid with Liver fire.清中汤／化肝煎——黄连、栀子清胃火；泛酸兼肝火加左金丸。
③ Liver Qi 肝气犯胃③ 肝气犯胃柴胡疏肝散 — course the Liver and regulate Qi; the primary formula for Qi-stagnation gastric pain. Add 金铃子散 (Chuan Lian Zi + Yan Hu Suo) for pain.柴胡疏肝散——疏肝理气；气滞胃痛之主方。痛甚加金铃子散（川楝子+延胡索）。
④ Stasis 瘀血停胃④ 瘀血停胃失笑散 + 丹参饮 — Pu Huang + Wu Ling Zhi + Dan Shen invigorate Blood and stop pain. Add Qi-movers; if bleeding, add 白及/三七.失笑散+丹参饮——蒲黄+五灵脂+丹参活血止痛。佐理气；出血加白及、三七。
⑤ Vacuity-cold 脾胃虚寒⑤ 脾胃虚寒黄芪建中汤 — Huang Qi + Gui Zhi + Yi Tang warm and tonify the middle; the model formula for deficiency-cold gastric pain that likes warmth and pressure.黄芪建中汤——黄芪+桂枝+饴糖温补中焦；虚寒胃痛喜温喜按之代表方。
⑥ Stomach Yin 胃阴亏虚⑥ 胃阴亏虚益胃汤 / 一贯煎 — Sha Shen, Mai Dong, Sheng Di nourish Stomach Yin; Yi Guan Jian if Liver-Stomach Yin both deficient.益胃汤／一贯煎——沙参、麦冬、生地养胃阴；肝胃阴俱虚用一贯煎。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Two evolutions dominate chronic gastric pain. (1) Qi-stagnation → stasis: what began as distending, mood-linked pain becomes fixed and stabbing over months/years — when you see this shift, add blood-movers before the stasis entrenches. (2) Heat → Yin deficiency: chronic Stomach heat slowly consumes Stomach Yin, so an initially burning, thirsty picture becomes a dry, hungry-no-appetite, peeled-tongue picture — stop draining and start nourishing. Reading these transitions is the mechanism-based clinician's edge over a fixed disease-formula. 慢性胃痛有两大演变。（1）气滞→血瘀：初为胀痛随情绪，历月历年转为固定刺痛——见此转折即当加活血，勿待瘀深。（2）热→阴虚：久胃热渐耗胃阴，初为灼痛口渴，转为口干、饥不欲食、舌剥——当止清而转养。识此转归，正是病机辨证胜于死守病方之处。
Gynecology妇科病证
Uterine Bleeding (Beng Lou)崩漏
Root: the Chong and Ren vessels fail to hold and regulate the blood, so menstrual bleeding becomes sudden and heavy (崩, flooding) or prolonged and dribbling (漏, spotting). The two are one disorder at different intensities and often convert into each other. Treatment follows the classic three-step: 塞流 (stop the flow) · 澄源 (clear the source) · 复旧 (restore the base).根本：冲任不能固摄调节经血，致经血非时暴下（崩）或淋漓不尽（漏）。二者一病之轻重，且常相互转化。治遵经典三法：塞流·澄源·复旧。
Beng Lou is a symptom, not a diagnosis — rule out organic and dangerous causes first. Heavy or prolonged uterine bleeding requires medical evaluation: pregnancy-related bleeding (miscarriage, ectopic), fibroids/polyps, endometrial pathology (especially peri/post-menopausal or with risk factors), coagulation disorders, and malignancy must be excluded. Acupuncture/herbs support alongside — not instead of — proper gynecological assessment. Watch for signs of significant blood loss (dizziness, palpitation, pallor, hypotension) → urgent referral. 崩漏是症状而非诊断——先排除器质性及危险病因。量大或持续之子宫出血须医学评估：妊娠相关出血（流产、宫外孕）、肌瘤／息肉、子宫内膜病变（尤其围／绝经期或有高危因素者）、凝血障碍、恶性肿瘤须排除。针药为辅——不替代妇科评估。警惕明显失血征（头晕、心悸、面白、低血压）→急转诊。
Core Framework · Why the Chong-Ren Cannot Hold the Blood核心框架 · 冲任为何不能固摄经血
The Chong is the "sea of blood" and the Ren "governs the uterus"; together they store and release menstrual blood in rhythm. Bleeding out of rhythm means this holding-and-regulating function has failed, in one of three ways: Qi too weak to contain the blood (气不摄血 — the vessel cannot hold; deficiency), heat forcing the blood to move recklessly (血热妄行 — the blood is driven out; excess or deficient-heat), or stasis obstructing so new blood cannot return to the channel (瘀阻冲任 — old stasis blocks, fresh blood spills). Identify which, then apply the three-step: stop the acute flow, correct the root cause, rebuild afterward.冲为血海、任主胞胎，二者按节律蓄溢经血。经血非时而下，即此固摄调节失职，不外三途：气不摄血（脉不能固；虚）、血热妄行（血被迫出；实热或虚热）、瘀阻冲任（陈瘀阻络，新血不得归经而溢）。辨其属，则施三法：急则塞流、澄其源、后复旧。
Q1 · Flow & color问一 · 量与色Pale, thin, copious/prolonged blood → Qi not holding (deficiency). Bright-red or deep-red, thick, with clots, gushing → heat. Dark-purple with clots, fixed lower-abdominal pain → stasis.色淡质稀、量多或淋漓→气不摄（虚）。色鲜红或深红、质稠有块、量涌→热。色紫黯有块、小腹固定痛→瘀。
Q2 · Heat: excess or deficient问二 · 辨虚实之热Full-heat: bright red, thirst, irritable, red face, rapid forceful pulse. Deficient-heat (Kidney Yin xu): persistent scanty red spotting, tidal heat, night sweat, sore weak low back, thready-rapid pulse.实热：色鲜红、口渴、烦躁、面红、脉数有力。虚热（肾阴虚）：漏下量少色红、潮热、盗汗、腰膝酸软、脉细数。
Q3 · Constitution & timing问三 · 体质与时相Fatigue, pale, breathless, poor appetite → Qi/Spleen deficiency. Adolescents (immature Chong-Ren) and perimenopausal women (declining Kidney) are the two classic age peaks — note which.乏力、面白、气短、纳差→气／脾虚。青春期（冲任未充）与围绝经期（肾气渐衰）为两大高发期——注明属哪端。
Q4 · Beng vs Lou & conversion问四 · 崩漏及转化Sudden heavy flooding (崩) vs prolonged light spotting (漏). They convert: prolonged Lou can suddenly become Beng; heavy Beng, once it depletes, settles into chronic Lou. The pattern often shifts (e.g. heat → later Qi deficiency from blood loss) — reassess over the course.暴下如崩 vs 淋漓为漏。二者互转：久漏可骤成崩；崩甚耗气则转慢性漏。证型常随病程变（如热证失血后转气虚）——须随访再辨。
Four patterns across three mechanisms (Qi not holding / heat / stasis; heat splits into full and deficient). Whatever the pattern, the management sequence is the same three steps: 塞流 stop the flow acutely → 澄源 correct the root → 复旧 rebuild the blood and regulate the cycle. 四证三机（气不摄／热／瘀；热分实虚）。无论何证，处置皆循三法：塞流（急止血）→澄源（治其本）→复旧（补血调经）。
① Spleen Qi Deficiency — Qi Failing to Contain the Blood① 脾虚气不摄血
Insufficient Ascent — Spleen Qi too weak to raise and contain; the vessel cannot hold the blood升不及——脾气虚不能升举固摄，脉不统血
