Key symptoms: heavy or prolonged flow of pale, thin blood; fatigue, breathlessness, pale sallow face, poor appetite, loose stool, bearing-down sensation; pale tongue, weak pulse. Common in adolescents and after chronic overwork/illness. Mechanism: the Spleen governs the containment of blood (脾统血); when Spleen Qi sinks and weakens, it can neither raise nor hold, so blood escapes the vessels. Treatment: 补气摄血，固冲止崩 — tonify Qi, contain the blood, secure the Chong. Moxa is key. Links to the 气血两虚 pattern card.主症：经血量多或淋漓、色淡质稀；乏力、气短、面色㿠白或萎黄、纳差、便溏、小腹坠；舌淡、脉弱。多见青春期及久劳久病后。病机：脾统血，脾气下陷而虚则不能升举固摄，血溢脉外。治法：补气摄血、固冲止崩。灸为要。联动「气血两虚」证型卡。
② Blood-Heat Forcing the Blood (Full-Heat)② 血热妄行（实热）
Excessive Ascent/movement — heat drives the blood recklessly out of the Chong升太过——热迫血妄行，溢于冲任之外
Key symptoms: sudden heavy flooding of bright-red or deep-red thick blood, possibly with clots; thirst, irritability, red face, dark urine, dry stool; red tongue with yellow coat, rapid forceful pulse. Mechanism: heat is Yang and accelerating; it agitates the blood and forces it out of the vessels — "reckless movement of hot blood." Treatment: 清热凉血，固冲止血 — clear heat, cool the blood, secure the Chong and stop bleeding. Links to the 湿热 (血分热) pattern card.主症：经血暴下、色鲜红或深红质稠、或有血块；口渴、烦躁、面红、尿黄、便干；舌红苔黄、脉数有力。病机：热为阳而急迫，扰动营血、迫血妄行——"血热妄行"。治法：清热凉血、固冲止血。联动「湿热（血分热）」证型卡。
③ Kidney Yin Deficiency — Deficient-Heat Disturbing the Chong③ 肾阴虚（虚热扰冲）
Insufficient Descent — Kidney Yin depleted, empty heat stirs the blood; Chong-Ren unstable降不及——肾阴亏虚，虚热扰血，冲任不固
Key symptoms: persistent scanty spotting of bright-red blood, or intermittent light flooding; dizziness, tinnitus, sore weak low back and knees, tidal heat, night sweats, five-heart heat; red tongue with little coat, thready-rapid pulse. Common perimenopausally. Mechanism: Kidney Yin (which anchors the Chong-Ren and cools the blood) is depleted; empty heat arises and disturbs the blood, while the weakened root cannot secure the vessels. Treatment: 滋肾益阴，固冲止血 — enrich Kidney Yin, secure the Chong, stop bleeding. Links to the 肾阴虚 pattern card.主症：漏下量少色鲜红、或时崩时止；头晕、耳鸣、腰膝酸软、潮热、盗汗、五心烦热；舌红少苔、脉细数。围绝经期多见。病机：肾阴（固摄冲任、凉润营血）亏，虚热内生扰血，根本不固不能约束脉道。治法：滋肾益阴、固冲止血。联动「肾阴虚」证型卡。
④ Blood Stasis Obstructing the Chong-Ren④ 瘀阻冲任
Entry-Exit disorder — old stasis blocks the channel, fresh blood cannot return and spills出入失常——陈瘀阻络，新血不得归经而妄行
Key symptoms: prolonged dribbling or intermittent flooding of dark-purple blood with clots; fixed stabbing lower-abdominal pain that refuses pressure and eases somewhat after clots pass; purple tongue or with stasis spots, choppy pulse. Mechanism: static blood occupies the uterus/Chong so newly generated blood cannot enter the normal channel and instead leaks out at the wrong time — "static blood not resolved, bleeding will not stop" (瘀血不去，血不归经). Treatment: 活血化瘀，固冲止血 — invigorate Blood and resolve stasis so new blood returns to the channel, then secure the Chong. (Counterintuitive but classical: you move blood to stop bleeding here.) Links to the 气滞血瘀 pattern card.主症：漏下淋漓或时崩、色紫黯有块；小腹刺痛固定拒按、血块下后稍减；舌紫或有瘀斑、脉涩。病机：瘀血占据胞宫／冲任，新血不得归经而非时妄溢——"瘀血不去，血不归经"。治法：活血化瘀（使新血归经）、固冲止血。（看似矛盾而实为经典：此处以活血而止血。）联动「气滞血瘀」证型卡。
SP1, CV4, SP6 and the extra point 断红穴 form the bleeding-control core; pattern points address the root. The three-step logic applies: emphasise stopping the flow acutely, then shift to root treatment as bleeding settles. 隐白、关元、三阴交及经外奇穴断红穴为止血核心；配穴治本。三法逻辑：急则重塞流，血势缓后转治本。
Core points (stop the flow)核心穴（塞流）SP1 隐白 (moxa — classic empirical point to stop uterine bleeding, especially Spleen-not-holding), CV4 关元 (Ren + Chong origin, secures the uterus), SP6 三阴交 (crossing of three Yin, regulates the Chong-Ren), CV6 气海 (boosts Qi to contain blood). 断红穴 (extra point, between 2nd–3rd MC bones) for acute heavy bleeding.隐白（灸——止崩漏之经验要穴，尤宜脾不统血）、关元（任冲之源，固胞宫）、三阴交（三阴之会，调冲任）、气海（益气摄血）。断红穴（经外奇穴，二三掌骨间）治急性大出血。
① Spleen Qi not holding① 脾虚气不摄血+ moxa BL20 脾俞, ST36 足三里, GV20 百会 (lift the sunken Qi); reinforcing with generous moxa.+ 灸脾俞、足三里、百会（升举下陷）；补法重灸。
② Full-heat② 血热妄行+ SP10 血海, LI11 曲池, BL17 膈俞 — cool the blood and clear heat; reducing, no moxa (SP1 still moxa'd lightly to stop flow, or needled).+ 血海、曲池、膈俞——凉血清热；泻法不灸（隐白仍可轻灸或针以止血）。
③ Kidney Yin deficient-heat③ 肾阴虚+ KI3 太溪, KI6 照海, BL23 肾俞, SP6 — enrich Yin, secure the Chong; even method.+ 太溪、照海、肾俞、三阴交——滋阴固冲；平补。
④ Stasis④ 瘀阻冲任+ SP10 血海, BL17 膈俞, LV3 太冲, ST29 归来 — invigorate Blood so new blood returns to channel; even/reducing.+ 血海、膈俞、太冲、归来——活血使新血归经；平泻。
Formulas follow the three-step: 塞流 (stop) uses charred hemostatics; 澄源 (clear source) treats the pattern; 复旧 (rebuild) tonifies Qi-Blood and Kidney to regulate the cycle afterward. Charred herbs (炭) are the shared hemostatic thread. 方药循三法：塞流用炭类止血；澄源治证；复旧补气血肾以善后调经。炭类（如各药炒炭）为共通止血线。
① Spleen Qi not holding 脾虚气不摄血① 脾虚气不摄血固本止崩汤 / 归脾汤加减 — heavy Huang Qi + Ren Shen + Bai Zhu to tonify Qi and contain blood; add charred hemostatics (棕榈炭, 艾叶炭, 炮姜炭). This is the core deficiency prescription.固本止崩汤／归脾汤加减——重用黄芪+人参+白术补气摄血；加炭类止血（棕榈炭、艾叶炭、炮姜炭）。虚证之核心方。
② Full-heat 血热妄行② 血热妄行清热固经汤 — Sheng Di, Di Gu Pi, Huang Qin clear heat and cool the blood; Gui Ban + charred herbs (地榆炭, 藕节) secure and stop. Cool the blood to stop the reckless movement.清热固经汤——生地、地骨皮、黄芩清热凉血；龟板+炭类（地榆炭、藕节）固涩止血。凉血以止妄行。
③ Kidney Yin deficient-heat 肾阴虚③ 肾阴虚左归丸 + 二至丸 — Shu Di, Shan Yu Rou enrich Kidney Yin; Nü Zhen Zi + Han Lian Cao (Er Zhi Wan) nourish Yin and stop bleeding. For the perimenopausal deficient-heat pattern.左归丸+二至丸——熟地、山萸肉滋肾阴；女贞子+旱莲草（二至丸）养阴止血。围绝经期虚热证。
④ Stasis 瘀阻冲任④ 瘀阻冲任逐瘀止血汤 / 桃红四物汤加减 — invigorate Blood and resolve stasis (Dang Gui, Chuan Xiong, Tao Ren) with hemostatics (三七, 蒲黄炭) so new blood returns to the channel. Move to stop.逐瘀止血汤／桃红四物汤加减——活血化瘀（当归、川芎、桃仁）配止血（三七、蒲黄炭），使新血归经。以通为止。
Clinical pearl临证心得
The three-step (塞流·澄源·复旧) is a sequence over time, not three simultaneous goals. In the acute flooding phase, prioritise stopping the flow (even a temporary "hold" is worth it to prevent collapse). Once the bleeding slows, shift to 澄源 — treat the actual pattern, or the bleeding recurs. After it stops, 复旧: rebuild Qi-Blood and regulate the Kidney-Chong so the next cycle is normal. Skipping 复旧 is why Beng Lou recurs. And always remember: heavy or persistent bleeding is a red flag needing medical work-up — TCM manages the pattern alongside proper diagnosis, never in place of it. 三法（塞流·澄源·复旧）是随时间之序，非三者并求。暴崩期以塞流为先（即便暂"止"亦值，以防虚脱）。血缓后转澄源——治其真证，否则复发。血止后复旧：补气血、调肾冲，使下一周期正常。略复旧正是崩漏反复之由。并须牢记：量大或持续出血为红旗须医学检查——中医与诊断并行治证，绝不替代之。
Gynecology妇科病证
Breast Hyperplasia乳癖
Root: the breast lies on the Liver and Stomach channels and is governed by the Chong-Ren; when Liver Qi is constrained and/or the Chong-Ren is disharmonious, Qi stagnates and phlegm congeals into cyclical breast lumps. The classic pattern is 肝郁痰凝 on a background of 冲任失调.根本：乳房属肝胃二经、司于冲任；肝气郁结和／或冲任失调，则气滞痰凝成周期性乳房结块。典型证为肝郁痰凝，其本多为冲任失调。
Breast lumps require medical evaluation — do not treat a lump as "just 乳癖" without imaging/assessment. Refer for: a hard fixed painless lump, skin dimpling/retraction, nipple retraction or bloody discharge, unilateral non-cyclical enlargement, axillary nodes, or any lump in a higher-risk patient. TCM manages benign cyclical fibrocystic change (confirmed as such); it does not replace breast cancer screening. When malignancy is excluded, cyclical tender lumps that swell premenstrually and ease after respond well to Liver-coursing / phlegm-transforming treatment. 乳房肿块须医学评估——勿将肿块当作"只是乳癖"而不影像／评估。以下转诊：质硬固定无痛之块、皮肤凹陷／橘皮、乳头内陷或血性溢液、单侧非周期性增大、腋下结节、或高危患者之任何肿块。中医治良性周期性纤维囊性改变（已确诊者）；不替代乳腺癌筛查。恶性排除后，经前胀大、经后减之周期性触痛结块对疏肝／化痰治疗反应良好。
Core Framework · Qi Stagnation → Phlegm Congealing at the Breast核心框架 · 气滞→痰凝于乳络
The breast sits at the crossing of the Liver channel (which governs the free flow of Qi) and the Stomach channel, and its function follows the Chong-Ren and the menstrual rhythm. 乳癖 is fundamentally an entry-exit / obstruction disorder: emotional constraint knots the Liver Qi → the Qi dynamic stalls in the breast → fluids that should move congeal into phlegm → phlegm and stagnant Qi bind into lumps. Because the Chong-Ren fill and empty with the cycle, the lumps swell and hurt premenstrually (when Qi-Blood is most congested) and ease after menses. Underneath, especially in longer-standing or perimenopausal cases, lies a 冲任失调 (Chong-Ren disharmony, often with Kidney involvement) that must also be regulated for lasting resolution.乳房居肝经（主疏泄）与胃经之交，其用随冲任与月经节律。乳癖本质为出入／阻滞之病：情志郁结则肝气结→气机滞于乳→当行之津凝而成痰→痰与滞气搏结成块。冲任随周期盈亏，故块经前胀痛（气血最壅时）、经后减。其下，尤久病或围绝经期者，有冲任失调（常涉肾）之本，须同调方能久愈。
Q1 · Lump character & cycle问一 · 结块性状与周期Cyclical tender lumps, often bilateral/multiple, rubbery and mobile, swelling and painful premenstrually and easing after menses → benign 乳癖. (Hard, fixed, painless, non-cyclical, unilateral → refer, not this pattern.)周期性触痛结块、多双侧／多发、韧而可动、经前胀痛经后减→良性乳癖。（硬、固定、无痛、非周期、单侧→转诊，非本证。）
Q2 · Emotional & Qi signs问二 · 情志气滞象Irritability, low mood, rib and chest distension, sighing, symptoms worse with stress → Liver Qi constraint (the dominant driver). Premenstrual tension/breast pain tracking mood strongly supports this.烦躁、情绪低落、胸胁胀、太息、压力时加重→肝气郁结（主driver）。经前紧张／乳痛随情绪明显支持之。
Q3 · Chong-Ren / Kidney signs问三 · 冲任／肾象Irregular menses, menstrual pain, low back soreness, or perimenopausal status → Chong-Ren disharmony (often with Kidney deficiency) underlying the Liver constraint — treat both. More prominent in longer-standing cases.月经不调、痛经、腰酸、或围绝经期→肝郁之下有冲任失调（常兼肾虚）——须同治。久病者更著。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Wiry pulse, thin coat → Liver Qi constraint. Greasy coat, slippery-wiry pulse → phlegm-Qi binding. Signs of Kidney/Chong-Ren deficiency (deep-thready pulse, sore back) point to the underlying disharmony.脉弦、苔薄→肝郁。苔腻、脉滑弦→痰气交结。肾／冲任虚象（脉沉细、腰酸）提示其本之失调。
Two linked patterns: the branch is 肝郁痰凝 (Liver constraint with phlegm congealing — the immediate lump-forming mechanism), and the root, especially in chronic cases, is 冲任失调 (Chong-Ren disharmony). Course the Liver and transform phlegm for the lumps; regulate the Chong-Ren (and Kidney) for lasting resolution. 二相连之证：标为肝郁痰凝（成块之即时机制），本（尤久病）为冲任失调。疏肝化痰治其块；调冲任（及肾）以久愈。
① Liver Constraint with Phlegm Congealing① 肝郁痰凝
Entry-Exit disorder — constrained Liver Qi stalls the breast, fluids congeal into phlegm-lumps出入失常——肝气郁结滞乳，津凝成痰而结块
Key symptoms: cyclical breast lumps that swell and hurt premenstrually and ease after menses, distending rather than fixed-stabbing pain, rib/chest distension, irritability, low mood, sighing; rubbery mobile lumps; wiry pulse, often with a greasy coat. Mechanism: emotional constraint knots the Liver Qi in the breast; the stalled Qi dynamic fails to move fluids, which congeal into phlegm and bind with the stagnant Qi into lumps — the immediate lump-forming pattern. Treatment: 疏肝解郁，化痰散结 — course the Liver, resolve constraint, transform phlegm, dissipate lumps. Links to the 肝气郁结 pattern card (its widest network).主症：乳房结块经前胀大疼痛、经后减，胀痛而非固定刺痛，胸胁胀、烦躁、情绪低落、太息；块韧而可动；脉弦、多兼苔腻。病机：情志郁结，肝气结于乳；气机滞不行津，津凝成痰、与滞气搏结成块——成块之即时证。治法：疏肝解郁、化痰散结。联动「肝气郁结」证型卡（全库最广之网）。
② Chong-Ren Disharmony② 冲任失调
Entry-Exit / root disharmony — the Chong-Ren (with Kidney) fail to regulate, breast follows the disordered cycle出入／本之失调——冲任（及肾）失调，乳随紊乱之周期
Key symptoms: breast lumps closely tied to the menstrual cycle with irregular menses, menstrual pain, or perimenopausal change, low back soreness, and often signs of Kidney deficiency; lumps that persist or recur across cycles despite Liver-coursing alone. More prominent in longer-standing and perimenopausal cases. Mechanism: the breast and uterus share the Chong-Ren; when these vessels (frequently with underlying Kidney Yin/Yang imbalance) fail to fill and empty in rhythm, the breast tissue is chronically dysregulated — this is the root beneath the Liver-constraint branch, and why lumps recur if only the Qi is coursed. Treatment: 调摄冲任，补肾疏肝 — regulate the Chong-Ren, tonify the Kidney, course the Liver together. Links to the 冲任失调 pattern card.主症：乳块与月经周期密切、伴月经不调、痛经、或围绝经期改变、腰酸、常兼肾虚象；单纯疏肝而块跨周期不消或复发。久病及围绝经期者更著。病机：乳与胞宫共司于冲任；此二脉（常兼肾阴／阳失衡）不能按节律盈亏，则乳络长期失调——此为肝郁之下之本，亦单纯理气则块复发之由。治法：调摄冲任、补肾疏肝并行。联动「冲任失调」证型卡。
Local breast-region and Liver-Stomach channel points free the stagnation at the breast; distal Liver-coursing and Chong-Ren-regulating points treat the driver and root. Course the Liver first; add Chong-Ren/Kidney regulation for chronic cases. 局部乳区及肝胃经穴通乳之滞；远端疏肝、调冲任穴治driver与本。先疏肝；久病加调冲任／肾。
Local / breast region局部·乳区ST18 乳根, SI1 少泽 (empirical breast point), LV14 期门 (Mu of Liver, over the breast area), GB21 肩井, CV17 膻中 (Qi-influential, opens the chest) — free the Qi and dissipate lumps locally. Needle breast-region points obliquely/shallowly.乳根、少泽（乳病验穴）、期门（肝募、近乳区）、肩井、膻中（气会、宽胸）——局部行气散结。乳区穴宜斜／浅刺。
① Liver-phlegm 肝郁痰凝① 肝郁痰凝+ LV3 太冲, GB34 阳陵泉, PC6 内关, ST40 丰隆, SP6 三阴交 — course the Liver, move Qi, transform phlegm; even/reducing.+ 太冲、阳陵泉、内关、丰隆、三阴交——疏肝、行气、化痰；平泻。
② Chong-Ren 冲任失调② 冲任失调+ CV4 关元, SP6 三阴交, KI3 太溪, BL23 肾俞, LV3 — regulate the Chong-Ren, tonify Kidney, course Liver; reinforcing for the root points.+ 关元、三阴交、太溪、肾俞、太冲——调冲任、补肾、疏肝；本穴补法。
Formulas by pattern, coursing the Liver and transforming phlegm for the branch, regulating the Chong-Ren for the root. Treat cyclically where possible — emphasise Liver-coursing premenstrually. 按证选方，疏肝化痰治标、调冲任治本。可周期用药——经前重疏肝。
① Liver-phlegm 肝郁痰凝① 肝郁痰凝逍遥散 + 消瘰丸加减 — Xiao Yao San courses the Liver and harmonises; Xiao Luo Wan (Xuan Shen, Mu Li, Bei Mu) softens hardness and transforms phlegm-nodules. Add Xia Ku Cao, Zhe Bei Mu, Ju He to dissipate breast lumps.逍遥散+消瘰丸加减——逍遥散疏肝和中；消瘰丸（玄参、牡蛎、贝母）软坚化痰核。加夏枯草、浙贝母、橘核散乳块。
② Chong-Ren 冲任失调② 冲任失调二仙汤 / 二至丸 + 疏肝散结药 — regulate the Chong-Ren and balance Kidney Yin-Yang (Er Xian Tang for perimenopausal cases), combined with Liver-coursing, phlegm-softening herbs. For recurrent lumps rooted in Chong-Ren/Kidney disharmony.二仙汤／二至丸+疏肝散结药——调冲任、平肾阴阳（围绝经期用二仙汤），配疏肝软坚化痰之品。治根于冲任／肾失调之复发性乳块。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Two non-negotiables and one clinical key. Non-negotiable first: any breast lump needs proper evaluation to exclude malignancy — TCM treats confirmed benign cyclical change, never a suspicious mass on faith. Second: the emotional dimension is not incidental — 乳癖 is the archetypal Liver-constraint disease, and durable improvement usually requires the patient to work on stress and mood, not just take herbs. The clinical key: if lumps keep recurring despite good Liver-coursing, look beneath to the Chong-Ren/Kidney root — treating the branch alone is why they come back. Time the treatment to the cycle: emphasise coursing and dissipating premenstrually when the lumps are worst. 二不可让步、一临床要点。首不可让步：任何乳房肿块须正规评估排除恶性——中医治已确诊之良性周期改变，绝不凭信治可疑之块。次：情志维度非偶然——乳癖为肝郁病之原型，持久改善多需病人调压力情绪，非仅服药。临床要点：若疏肝良而块仍反复，须察其下之冲任／肾之本——单治标正是复发之由。择周期用药：经前块甚时重疏肝散结。
Gynecology / Postpartum妇科·产后
Insufficient Lactation缺乳
Root: breast milk is transformed from Qi and Blood and coursed out through the breast by the Liver's free flow. Insufficient lactation therefore has two roads — not enough milk generated (Qi-Blood deficiency, milk thin and scanty) or milk generated but not released (Liver constraint, milk blocked with breast distension).根本：乳汁由气血所化，赖肝之疏泄而出。缺乳有二途——化生不足（气血虚弱，乳少质稀）或化而不行（肝郁气滞，乳阻而胀）。
Support breastfeeding fundamentals alongside pattern treatment. Low supply is often multifactorial: latch and positioning, feeding frequency, hydration and nutrition, rest, and stress all matter and should be optimised with lactation support. Screen for and refer: retained placenta, significant postpartum hemorrhage, thyroid dysfunction, and mastitis (red hot painful breast + fever needs prompt treatment). TCM excels at the two classic patterns once feeding mechanics and medical causes are addressed. 辨证同时须支持哺乳基本要素。乳少常为多因：含接与体位、哺乳频率、水分营养、休息、压力皆重要，须配合哺乳指导优化。筛查并转诊：胎盘残留、产后大出血、甲状腺功能异常、乳腺炎（红肿热痛+发热须及时治）。哺乳机制与医学病因处理后，中医于二典型证甚效。
Core Framework · Generated from Qi-Blood, Released by the Liver核心框架 · 气血所化·肝之疏泄
Breast milk is Qi-Blood transformed, and it is coursed out of the breast by the Liver's free-flowing function. Two things must therefore be intact: enough Qi-Blood to generate the milk, and free Liver Qi to release it. Insufficient lactation splits cleanly along these: Qi-Blood deficiency (虚) — after difficult labour, blood loss, or in a weak constitution, the source is empty, so milk is scanty, thin, and watery, and the breasts are soft and undistended (nothing to release). Liver Qi stagnation (实/郁) — with postpartum stress, upset, or depression, the Liver fails to course, so milk is generated but trapped: the breasts are full, distended, even painful, yet little comes out. The two are treated in opposite directions — tonify to generate vs course to release — so distinguishing them (by whether the breast is soft-empty or full-distended) is the whole task.乳汁为气血所化，赖肝之疏泄而出于乳。故须二者俱全：足够气血以化乳，通畅肝气以行乳。缺乳沿此分明：气血虚弱（虚）——难产、失血后、或体弱，化源空，故乳少、质稀、清薄，乳房柔软不胀（无以行）。肝郁气滞（实／郁）——产后压力、抑郁，肝失疏泄，乳化而阻：乳房胀满、甚痛，而出少。二者治向相反——补以化 vs 疏以行——故辨之（凭乳房柔空或胀满）即全部之要。
Q1 · Breast fullness — the key sign问一 · 乳房胀否（关键）Soft, undistended, no pain, milk thin and scanty → Qi-Blood deficiency (nothing generated). Full, distended, tender/painful, milk present but not flowing → Liver Qi stagnation (generated but blocked). This single sign usually decides the pattern.柔软、不胀、不痛，乳少质稀→气血虚弱（化生不足）。胀满、触痛，有乳而不出→肝郁气滞（化而阻）。此一征多定证。
Q2 · Milk quality问二 · 乳质Thin, watery, clear, scanty → deficiency. Normal or thick quality but not flowing, in a full breast → stagnation. Note total supply trend and feeding frequency.清稀、量少→虚。质可而不行、乳房胀满→郁。注意总量趋势与哺乳频率。
Q3 · Constitution & emotion问三 · 体质与情志Fatigue, pale sallow face, poor appetite, dizziness, palpitation, difficult delivery/blood loss → Qi-Blood deficiency. Postpartum stress, low mood, irritability, rib/chest distension → Liver constraint. Postpartum mood also warrants attention for the mother's wellbeing.乏力、面色萎黄、纳差、头晕、心悸、难产／失血→气血虚弱。产后压力、情绪低落、烦躁、胸胁胀→肝郁。产后情绪亦须关注产妇身心。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Pale tongue, thready-weak pulse → Qi-Blood deficiency. Normal or slightly red tongue, wiry pulse, thin coat → Liver Qi stagnation. Red breast with heat/fever → suspect mastitis, refer.舌淡、脉细弱→气血虚弱。舌正或略红、脉弦、苔薄→肝郁气滞。乳房红热伴发热→疑乳腺炎，转诊。
Two patterns treated in opposite directions. The distinguishing sign is the breast itself: soft and empty = deficiency (tonify to generate milk); full and distended = stagnation (course to release milk). Getting this right is everything — tonifying a blocked breast worsens the distension; coursing an empty breast gives nothing to release. 二证治向相反。辨点在乳房本身：柔而空＝虚（补以生乳）；胀而满＝郁（疏以行乳）。辨对即全部——补胀满之乳增其胀，疏空虚之乳无以行。
① Qi-Blood Deficiency① 气血两虚
Insufficient generation — Qi-Blood too weak to transform into milk化源不足——气血虚弱，不能化生乳汁
Key symptoms: scanty thin watery milk (or none), soft undistended painless breasts, pale sallow lusterless face, fatigue, breathlessness, poor appetite, dizziness, palpitation; pale tongue, thready-weak pulse. Common after difficult labour, postpartum hemorrhage, or in a weak/undernourished mother. Mechanism: milk is transformed from Qi-Blood; when the postpartum source is depleted there simply is not enough substance to make milk — the breast is soft because there is nothing filling it. Treatment: 补益气血，佐通乳 — tonify Qi and Blood to generate milk, assisted by gentle milk-promoting herbs. Links to the 气血两虚 pattern card.主症：乳汁清稀量少（或无）、乳房柔软不胀不痛、面色萎黄无华、乏力、气短、纳差、头晕、心悸；舌淡、脉细弱。多见难产、产后出血、或体弱营养不足之产妇。病机：乳为气血所化；产后化源亏则无质以成乳——乳房软因无物充之。治法：补益气血以生乳，佐通乳。联动「气血两虚」证型卡。
② Liver Qi Stagnation② 肝郁气滞
Entry-Exit disorder — constrained Liver Qi fails to course the milk out出入失常——肝气郁结，乳汁疏泄不行
Key symptoms: milk present but not flowing, full, distended, tender or painful breasts, chest and rib distension, low mood or irritability, poor appetite, sighing; often clear postpartum stress or upset; wiry pulse, thin coat. Mechanism: the Liver courses the Qi that releases milk from the breast; when postpartum emotion constrains the Liver, the milk is generated but trapped — the breasts fill and distend, yet little flows. This is obstruction, not deficiency: the substance is there but the door is shut. Treatment: 疏肝解郁，通络下乳 — course the Liver, resolve constraint, free the collaterals to release the milk. Links to the 肝气郁结 pattern card.主症：有乳而不行、乳房胀满、触痛、胸胁胀、情绪低落或烦躁、纳差、太息；多有产后压力／不遂；脉弦、苔薄。病机：肝疏泄以行乳；产后情志郁肝，则乳化而阻——乳房胀满而出少。此属阻非虚：有质而门闭。治法：疏肝解郁、通络下乳。联动「肝气郁结」证型卡。
Local breast points plus the empirical milk-point SI1 are the shared core; pattern points either tonify Qi-Blood or course the Liver. The direction is opposite by pattern — reinforce with moxa for deficiency, even/reduce to free the flow for stagnation. 局部乳穴配下乳验穴少泽为共核；配穴或补气血或疏肝。治向随证相反——虚则补法加灸，郁则平／泻以通。
Core points核心穴SI1 少泽 (the classic empirical point to promote lactation — often bled/reduced), ST18 乳根, CV17 膻中 (Qi-influential, opens the chest and promotes milk flow), LV14 期门. These free and promote the milk locally in both patterns.少泽（下乳经典验穴——常点刺／泻）、乳根、膻中（气会、宽胸下乳）、期门。两证均以此局部通乳。
① Qi-Blood deficiency 气血两虚① 气血两虚+ ST36 足三里, SP6 三阴交, BL20 脾俞, CV6 气海 (+moxa) — tonify Qi-Blood to generate milk; reinforcing with moxa. SI1 reinforced/gentle.+ 足三里、三阴交、脾俞、气海（加灸）——补气血以生乳；补法加灸。少泽补／轻。
② Liver stagnation 肝郁气滞② 肝郁气滞+ LV3 太冲, GB34 阳陵泉, PC6 内关, SI1 少泽 (reduced/bled) — course the Liver and free the milk; even/reducing, no moxa. Add gentle breast massage.+ 太冲、阳陵泉、内关、少泽（泻／点刺）——疏肝通乳；平泻不灸。配合轻柔乳房按摩。
Formulas in opposite directions by pattern. Tong Cao, Wang Bu Liu Xing, Chuan Shan Jia (or its substitutes), and pig's-trotter soup are the traditional milk-promoting additions across patterns. 按证反向选方。通草、王不留行、穿山甲（或其代用品）、猪蹄汤为各证传统通乳之佐。
① Qi-Blood deficiency 气血两虚① 气血两虚通乳丹 Tong Ru Dan — heavy Ren Shen + Huang Qi + Dang Gui + Mai Dong to tonify Qi-Blood and generate milk, with Tong Cao and pig's trotter to promote flow. Tonify the source; the milk follows.通乳丹——重用人参+黄芪+当归+麦冬补气血生乳，佐通草、猪蹄通行。补其源，乳自生。
② Liver stagnation 肝郁气滞② 肝郁气滞下乳涌泉散 Xia Ru Yong Quan San — course the Liver and free the collaterals (Chai Hu, Qing Pi, Chuan Xiong, Wang Bu Liu Xing, Chuan Shan Jia, Tong Cao) to release the trapped milk. Free the flow; the milk comes.下乳涌泉散——疏肝通络（柴胡、青皮、川芎、王不留行、穿山甲、通草）以行阻滞之乳。通其行，乳自下。
Clinical pearl临证心得
The whole clinical decision rests on one examination: is the breast soft-and-empty or full-and-distended? Soft and empty → deficiency → tonify Qi-Blood (and support nutrition and rest); pushing "milk-promoting" coursing herbs on an empty breast achieves little because there is nothing to release. Full and distended → stagnation → course the Liver, free the flow, gentle massage, and attend to the mother's postpartum mood; tonifying a blocked full breast worsens the distension and can risk stasis/mastitis. And throughout, remember the non-herbal fundamentals — latch, frequency, hydration, rest, and reassurance drive supply as much as any formula, and a red hot painful breast with fever is mastitis, which needs prompt medical attention. 整个临床决策系于一诊：乳房柔空还是胀满？柔空→虚→补气血（并支持营养休息）；于空乳强投通乳疏利之品无益，因无以行。胀满→郁→疏肝、通行、轻柔按摩、并关注产妇产后情绪；补胀满阻滞之乳反增其胀，可致瘀／乳腺炎之险。且须始终记非药之本——含接、频率、水分、休息、安慰之驱动泌乳不逊于任何方药，而乳房红热痛伴发热为乳腺炎，须及时医学处理。
Skin & Hair皮肤·毛发
Hair Loss脱发
Root: "the hair is the surplus of the Blood (发为血之余)" and "the Kidney's bloom is in the hair (其华在发)." Hair is nourished from below by Kidney Essence and Blood and kept clear above by the scalp's local environment. Loss follows three roads: Blood-dryness with wind, Liver-Kidney (Essence-Blood) deficiency, or damp-heat steaming the scalp.根本：「发为血之余」「肾其华在发」。发赖肾精与血自下濡养、赖头皮局部环境自上清利。脱发三途：血虚风燥、肝肾（精血）不足、湿热熏蒸头皮。
Type the hair loss first. Sudden well-defined round bald patches = alopecia areata (斑秃, "油风") — often stress/fright-related, may regrow. Gradual patterned thinning (vertex/hairline) = androgenetic. Diffuse shedding a few months after illness/childbirth/crash-diet/stress = telogen effluvium (usually recovers). Screen for and refer: thyroid disease, iron deficiency/anemia, scarring alopecia, scalp fungal infection, and medication effects. 先分型。突发边界清之圆形斑片＝斑秃（油风）——多与压力／惊恐相关、可复生。渐进性规律性稀疏（巅顶／发际）＝雄激素性。病后／产后／过度节食／压力数月后弥漫脱落＝休止期脱发（多自复）。筛查并转诊：甲状腺病、缺铁／贫血、瘢痕性脱发、头皮真菌感染、药物影响。
Core Framework · Nourished from Below, Kept Clear Above核心框架 · 下养上清
Healthy hair needs two things: enough Essence-Blood rising to nourish the root (肾精、阴血 filling the follicle from below), and a clear scalp environment above (no damp-heat obstructing). Loss is therefore either a deficiency of nourishment — Blood-dryness that generates wind (血虚风燥, the classic patchy 斑秃) or deeper Liver-Kidney Essence-Blood depletion (肝肾不足, premature graying + loss) — or an excess obstructing above — damp-heat steaming the scalp so the follicle is choked in oil (湿热, the greasy-scalp thinning). Match the road: you cannot grow hair by nourishing Blood if the problem is a damp-heat scalp, and vice versa.健发需二事：足够精血上濡发根（肾精、阴血自下充毛囊），头皮环境清利于上（无湿热阻遏）。故脱发或为濡养不足——血虚生风（血虚风燥，典型斑秃）或更深之肝肾精血亏（肝肾不足，早白+脱发）——或为实阻于上——湿热熏蒸头皮，毛囊困于油腻（湿热，油腻性稀疏）。须对路：湿热头皮者养血无益，反之亦然。
Q1 · Pattern of loss问一 · 脱发形态Sudden round patches, smooth scalp → 斑秃 (blood-dryness/wind, often fright). Gradual vertex/hairline thinning with oily scalp → damp-heat. Diffuse thinning + premature graying + other deficiency signs → Liver-Kidney.突发圆斑、头皮光滑→斑秃（血虚风燥／惊）。渐进巅顶／发际稀疏伴头皮油→湿热。弥漫稀疏+早白+他虚象→肝肾。
Q2 · Scalp & hair quality问二 · 头皮与发质Dry scalp, dry brittle lackluster hair → Blood-dryness / Liver-Kidney. Oily scalp, greasy hair, dandruff, itch → damp-heat. Note dandruff, itch, redness, pustules (may indicate scalp pathology needing referral).头皮干、发干枯无泽→血虚／肝肾。头皮油、发腻、头屑、痒→湿热。注意头屑、瘙痒、红斑、脓疱（或提示头皮病变须转诊）。
Q3 · Systemic & trigger问三 · 全身与诱因Pale, dizzy, palpitation, poor sleep, post-partum → Blood deficiency. Sore back, dizziness, tinnitus, premature graying, low libido → Liver-Kidney. Recent major stress/fright → often 斑秃. Rich greasy diet → damp-heat.面白、头晕、心悸、眠差、产后→血虚。腰酸、头晕、耳鸣、早白、性欲低→肝肾。近期重大压力／惊吓→多斑秃。饮食肥甘→湿热。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Pale tongue, thready pulse → Blood deficiency. Red-peeled or pale tongue, deep-thready → Liver-Kidney. Red tongue, yellow greasy coat, slippery pulse → damp-heat.舌淡、脉细→血虚。舌红剥或淡、脉沉细→肝肾。舌红苔黄腻、脉滑→湿热。
Three patterns: two deficiency roads (Blood-dryness/wind and Liver-Kidney Essence-Blood) and one excess road (damp-heat scalp). Chronic patterned loss is often Liver-Kidney at root; the greasy-scalp presentation is damp-heat; sudden patches are Blood-dryness with wind. 三证：二虚路（血虚风燥、肝肾精血）与一实路（湿热头皮）。慢性规律脱发多根于肝肾；油腻头皮为湿热；突发斑片为血虚风燥。
① Blood Dryness Generating Wind① 血虚风燥
Insufficient nourishment → wind — Blood too dry to hold the hair, wind stirs and it falls濡养不足生风——血虚发失濡，血虚生风而发落
Key symptoms: sudden well-defined round bald patches (斑秃), dry scalp, dry brittle lackluster remaining hair, possibly scalp itch; often preceded by stress/fright/poor sleep; pale tongue, thready pulse. Mechanism: "the hair is the surplus of Blood" — when Blood is dry and deficient it cannot moisten the hair, and deficiency-generated wind (虚风) shakes it loose, so it falls suddenly in patches. Treatment: 养血祛风，滋养毛发 — nourish Blood, dispel wind, feed the hair. Links to the 血虚生风 pattern card.主症：突发边界清之圆形斑秃、头皮干、余发干枯脆无泽、或头皮痒；多先有压力／惊吓／眠差；舌淡、脉细。病机：「发为血之余」——血虚燥则不能濡发，血虚生风（虚风）动摇之，故突然成片脱落。治法：养血祛风、滋养毛发。联动「血虚生风」证型卡。
② Liver-Kidney Insufficiency② 肝肾不足
Insufficient Ascent at the root — Essence-Blood too depleted to fill the hair升不及于根本——精血亏虚不能充发
Key symptoms: gradual diffuse thinning with premature graying, dry lackluster hair, sore weak low back and knees, dizziness, tinnitus, poor memory, low libido; red-peeled (Yin-def) or pale (Yang-def) tongue, deep-thready pulse. Often with aging or overwork. Mechanism: "the Kidney's bloom is in the hair" — Kidney Essence generates Blood and fills the hair; when Essence-Blood is depleted the hair loses its root supply, thins, greys, and falls. The deepest, most chronic hair-loss root. Treatment: 滋补肝肾，填精养血 — tonify Liver-Kidney, fill Essence, nourish Blood. Links to the 肾阴虚 pattern card.主症：渐进弥漫稀疏伴早白、发干枯无泽、腰膝酸软、头晕、耳鸣、健忘、性欲低；舌红剥（阴虚）或淡（阳虚）、脉沉细。多见年老、劳伤。病机：「肾其华在发」——肾精生血充发；精血亏则发失根本之供，稀、白、落。脱发最深、最慢性之本。治法：滋补肝肾、填精养血。联动「肾阴虚」证型卡。
③ Damp-Heat Steaming the Scalp③ 湿热熏蒸
Entry-Exit obstruction — damp-heat steams the scalp and chokes the follicle出入受阻——湿热熏蒸头皮，困遏毛囊
Key symptoms: oily greasy scalp with progressive thinning (especially vertex), greasy hair needing frequent washing, dandruff, itch, sometimes pustules; often with rich diet, bitter mouth, heavy body; red tongue, yellow greasy coat, slippery pulse. Mechanism: Spleen fails to transform damp → damp-heat rises and steams the scalp, so the follicle is smothered in turbid oil and the hair loosens — an excess/obstruction above, not a deficiency below. Nourishing Blood here worsens the grease. Treatment: 清热利湿，凉血 — clear heat, drain damp, cool the blood; keep the scalp clear. Links to the 湿热 (肌肤) pattern card.主症：头皮油腻伴渐进稀疏（尤巅顶）、发腻需频洗、头屑、瘙痒、或脓疱；多饮食肥甘、口苦、身重；舌红苔黄腻、脉滑。病机：脾失运湿→湿热上蒸头皮，毛囊困于浊油而发松脱——实阻于上，非虚于下。此证养血反增其腻。治法：清热利湿、凉血；清利头皮。联动「湿热（肌肤）」证型卡。
Local scalp stimulation (including plum-blossom tapping over bald patches to move Qi-Blood to the follicles) plus pattern points that address the Blood/Essence root or the damp-heat above. Local + root is the standard combination. 局部头皮刺激（含梅花针叩刺斑片，引气血至毛囊）配辨证治血／精之本或湿热之上。局部+治本为标准配伍。
Local / scalp局部·头皮GV20 百会, GV24/头维/four-shen-cong region, and plum-blossom (七星针) tapping over the bald patches to draw Qi-Blood to the scalp and stimulate the follicles. Local encircling needling around patches for 斑秃.百会、头维／四神聪区，梅花针（七星针）叩刺斑片以引气血至头皮、激发毛囊。斑秃可围刺斑片周围。
① Blood-dryness 血虚风燥① 血虚风燥+ BL17 膈俞, SP10 血海, SP6 三阴交, ST36 — nourish Blood and dispel wind; reinforcing.+ 膈俞、血海、三阴交、足三里——养血祛风；补法。
② Liver-Kidney 肝肾不足② 肝肾不足+ BL23 肾俞, KI3 太溪, BL18 肝俞, GB39 悬钟, CV4 关元 — tonify Liver-Kidney, fill Essence; reinforcing (+moxa if Yang-def).+ 肾俞、太溪、肝俞、悬钟、关元——补肝肾、填精；补法（偏阳虚加灸）。
③ Damp-heat 湿热熏蒸③ 湿热熏蒸+ SP9 阴陵泉, ST40 丰隆, LI11 曲池, SP6 — clear and drain damp-heat; reducing, no moxa.+ 阴陵泉、丰隆、曲池、三阴交——清利湿热；泻法不灸。
Formulas by pattern. Hair regrowth is slow — set a multi-month timeline. He Shou Wu, Han Lian Cao, Nü Zhen Zi, Sang Shen are the signature hair-nourishing herbs across the deficiency patterns. 按证选方。生发缓慢——须设数月周期。何首乌、旱莲草、女贞子、桑椹为各虚证生发要药。
① Blood-dryness 血虚风燥① 血虚风燥神应养真丹 / 四物汤加减 — nourish Blood and dispel wind (Dang Gui, Shu Di, Bai Shao, Chuan Xiong + He Shou Wu, Tian Ma, Qiang Huo). For 斑秃 with fright, add Shen-settling herbs.神应养真丹／四物汤加减——养血祛风（当归、熟地、白芍、川芎+何首乌、天麻、羌活）。斑秃兼惊者加安神之品。
② Liver-Kidney 肝肾不足② 肝肾不足七宝美髯丹 Qi Bao Mei Ran Dan — the classic hair/greying formula: He Shou Wu, Gou Qi, Dang Gui, Tu Si Zi, Niu Xi to tonify Liver-Kidney and fill Essence-Blood. Add Er Zhi Wan (Nü Zhen Zi + Han Lian Cao) for Yin-deficient greying.七宝美髯丹——生发乌须之经典方：何首乌、枸杞、当归、菟丝子、牛膝补肝肾、填精血。阴虚白发加二至丸（女贞子+旱莲草）。
③ Damp-heat 湿热熏蒸③ 湿热熏蒸茵陈蒿汤 / 萆薢渗湿汤加减 — clear damp-heat and cool the blood (Yin Chen, Bai Xian Pi, Sheng Di, Ze Xie). Once the scalp clears and grease reduces, then nourish. Do not tonic-load a damp-heat scalp.茵陈蒿汤／萆薢渗湿汤加减——清湿热、凉血（茵陈、白鲜皮、生地、泽泻）。头皮清、油减后再养。湿热头皮勿峻补。
Clinical pearl临证心得
The decisive fork is scalp condition: a dry scalp points to deficiency (nourish Blood/Essence); an oily scalp points to damp-heat (clear first, nourish later). Getting this backwards is the commonest error — pouring rich Blood tonics onto a greasy damp-heat scalp makes it worse. For 斑秃, the fright/stress link is real: address sleep and the Shen alongside the scalp, and reassure — many patches regrow. And always set expectations on time: even when the pattern is right, visible regrowth takes months. 决定性分岔在头皮状态：干性头皮指向虚（养血／精）；油性头皮指向湿热（先清、后养）。颠倒此判为最常见之误——湿热油腻头皮上滥投滋腻养血反重之。斑秃者惊恐／压力之联系真实：治头皮同时调睡眠与心神、并予安慰——多数斑片可复生。并须设时间预期：即便对证，可见生发亦需数月。
Neurology神经病证
Facial Palsy (Bell's)面瘫
Root: the facial channels (Yangming & Shaoyang of the face) are empty, and Wind — with Cold or Phlegm — enters the collaterals, so the sinews lose their nourishment and control on one side. Acupuncture's signature indication, treated in three stages.根本：面部经络（手足阳明、少阳）空虚，风邪（挟寒或痰）中于面络，筋肉失养失控于一侧。针灸招牌适应症，分三期论治。
First distinguish peripheral (Bell's) from central facial palsy — this changes everything. Peripheral: the whole half-face is involved, the forehead cannot wrinkle, the eye cannot close (Bell's sign). Central (e.g. stroke): the forehead is spared (can still wrinkle) because of bilateral cortical innervation, usually with limb signs. Central palsy → urgent referral, not channel treatment. 首辨周围性（贝尔）与中枢性面瘫——此别决定一切。周围性：整个半侧面受累，额纹消失、眼不能闭（贝尔征）。中枢性（如中风）：额纹保留（仍能皱额），因额肌双侧支配，多伴肢体体征。中枢性→急转诊，非经络治疗。
Core Framework · Why Facial Palsy is a Channel-Collateral (中经络) Wind Disease核心框架 · 面瘫为何是中经络的风病
The face is richly supplied by the Yangming (LI/ST) and Shaoyang (TE/GB) channels. When defensive Qi at the face is deficient (after fatigue, wind exposure, cold draft), Wind — the "spearhead of a hundred diseases," light and mobile — invades the facial collaterals. Wind stirs and cold/phlegm obstructs → the channel sinews lose warmth, nourishment, and Qi-flow → they slacken (弛缓), so the healthy side pulls the face across. This is an entry-exit disorder of the facial collaterals, not an internal-organ disease — which is exactly why local needling works so well.面部为手足阳明、少阳所濡。面部卫气不足时（劳累、当风、受凉后），风邪——「百病之长」，轻扬善动——中于面络。风动而寒／痰阻→经筋失温、失养、气不通→筋肉弛缓，健侧牵拉致㖞斜。此为面络出入失常，非内脏病——故局部针刺甚效。
Q1 · Which stage?问一 · 分期Days 1–7 acute (急性期, Wind still active, inflammation rising) → 10–20 days recovery (恢复期) → beyond ~3 months sequelae (后遗症期). Staging drives the whole treatment plan.1–7天急性期（风邪未定、炎症上升）→10–20天恢复期→约3月后后遗症期。分期决定整个治疗方案。
Q2 · Cold or Phlegm signs问二 · 寒／痰Wind-Cold: sudden onset after cold-wind exposure, aversion to cold, floating-tight pulse, no heaviness. Wind-Phlegm: heavier numb face, greasy coat, slippery pulse, often stouter constitution.风寒：受风寒后骤发、恶寒、脉浮紧、无沉重感。风痰：面部麻木沉重、苔腻、脉滑，多形盛之体。
Q3 · Severity问三 · 程度Can the eye close at all? Any forehead movement? Taste change on front tongue, hyperacusis, or pain behind the ear (suggests higher lesion, may be slower to recover) — note for prognosis.眼能否闭合？额有无活动？舌前味觉改变、听觉过敏、耳后疼痛（提示病位较高、恢复较慢）——记录以判预后。
Q4 · Underlying deficiency问四 · 本虚Recurrent or slow-healing cases: assess Qi-Blood (pale, fatigued, poor recovery of tone). Later stages nearly always shift toward Qi-Blood deficiency failing to nourish the recovering channels.反复或迁延者：查气血（面白、乏力、肌张力恢复差）。后期几乎均转为气血不足、经络失养。
Facial palsy is differentiated by stage first, then by pathogen. The same face, but the Qi-dynamic priority shifts over time: expel Wind early, unblock and free the channels in the middle, tonify and nourish late. 面瘫先按分期辨，再辨邪气。同一张脸，气机重点随时间转移：早期祛风，中期通络，后期补养。
① Acute Stage — Wind-Cold / Wind-Phlegm Attacking the Collaterals① 急性期 · 风寒／风痰阻络
Entry-Exit disorder — Wind (with cold or phlegm) obstructs the facial collaterals出入失常——风（挟寒或痰）阻滞面络
Presentation (days 1–7): sudden one-sided facial droop, inability to close the eye or wrinkle the forehead, mouth drawn to the healthy side, drooling, food trapped in the cheek; may have post-auricular pain. Wind-Cold: aversion to cold, floating-tight pulse. Wind-Phlegm: numb heavy face, greasy coat, slippery pulse. Priority: the pathogen is still active and unsettled — expel Wind and free the collaterals; keep needling gentle and shallow, avoid over-stimulating an acutely inflamed nerve.表现（1–7天）：突发单侧口眼㖞斜、眼不能闭、额纹消失、口角歪向健侧、流涎、食物滞颊；可有耳后痛。风寒：恶寒、脉浮紧。风痰：面麻沉重、苔腻、脉滑。重点：邪气未定——祛风通络；针宜浅宜轻，勿过激急性炎症之神经。
Treatment: 祛风散寒（化痰）通络 — dispel Wind, scatter Cold (or transform Phlegm), free the collaterals. This links to the 风痰阻络 pattern card (shared with stroke and hemifacial spasm).治法：祛风散寒（化痰）通络。联动「风痰阻络」证型卡（与中风、面肌痉挛共享）。
② Recovery Stage — Channels Obstructed, Qi-Blood Not Yet Flowing② 恢复期 · 经络失和·气血未充
Entry-Exit + insufficiency — Wind receding, but the collaterals are still blocked and under-nourished出入未复+不足——风渐退，而络仍阻、气血未充
Presentation (~2–4 weeks): the acute inflammation has settled; the face is still deviated but beginning to recover. The task shifts from expelling Wind to vigorously freeing the channels and drawing Qi-Blood to the face so the slackened sinews regain tone. This is the window where strong local stimulation and electro-acupuncture pay off most. Priority: unblock collaterals + start tonifying Qi-Blood.表现（约2–4周）：急性炎症已定，面仍㖞斜但渐复。重点从祛风转为大力通经活络、引气血上荣面部，使弛缓之筋复其张力。此为局部强刺激与电针最见效之窗。重点：通络+始补气血。
Treatment: 活血通络，益气养血 — invigorate and free the collaterals, boost Qi and Blood.治法：活血通络、益气养血。
③ Sequelae Stage — Qi-Blood Deficiency, Static Blood in the Collaterals③ 后遗症期 · 气血亏虚·瘀阻面络
Insufficient generation + stasis — Qi-Blood too weak to restore the face; prolonged obstruction becomes stasis化源不足+血瘀——气血不足难复面容；久阻成瘀
Presentation (>3 months): incomplete recovery — residual deviation, facial tightness or synkinesis (associated movements), sometimes contracture. The face is now under-nourished and the collaterals hold old stasis. Priority: tonify Qi-Blood to nourish the channels + gently move stasis; expect slow, patient progress and combine with facial exercises. Overly strong stimulation here can worsen synkinesis — moderate the dose.表现（>3月）：恢复不全——遗留㖞斜、面部僵紧或联动（连带运动），甚则挛缩。面失濡养、络有陈瘀。重点：补气血养经络+缓化瘀；进展宜缓、配合面肌功能锻炼。此期过强刺激反致联动加重——宜减量。
Treatment: 益气养血，活血化瘀通络 — tonify Qi-Blood, invigorate Blood, resolve stasis, free the collaterals. Links to 气血两虚 and 气滞血瘀 pattern cards.治法：益气养血、活血化瘀通络。联动「气血两虚」「气滞血瘀」证型卡。
Local facial points are the backbone throughout; distal points expel Wind and support Qi-Blood. The dose changes by stage: shallow and gentle in the acute stage, stronger with penetration/electro in recovery, moderate again in sequelae. 局部面穴为始终之骨干；远端穴祛风、助气血。刺激量随期变化：急性期浅而轻，恢复期强并透刺／电针，后遗症期再减量。
Core local points面部主穴ST4 地仓 ⟷ ST6 颊车 (penetration in recovery), ST7 下关, GB14 阳白, TE17 翳风, LI20 迎香, BL2 攒竹, GV26 水沟, ST2 四白. Choose by which muscles are weak — e.g. GB14/BL2 for forehead & eye closure, ST4/地仓 for the mouth.地仓⟷颊车（恢复期透刺）、下关、阳白、翳风、迎香、攒竹、水沟、四白。按无力肌群选——如阳白／攒竹治额与闭眼，地仓治口。
Distal — expel Wind远端 · 祛风LI4 合谷 (the command point of the face — "面口合谷收"), on the healthy side or bilaterally; TE5 外关, GB20 风池 to dispel exterior Wind. Wind-Cold → add moxa/gentle warmth; Wind-Phlegm → add ST40 丰隆.合谷（面口之要——「面口合谷收」），取健侧或双侧；外关、风池以祛外风。风寒→加灸／温；风痰→加丰隆。
Acute-stage caution急性期注意Shallow, few local needles, no strong stimulation and no electro-acupuncture in the first ~7 days — the nerve is acutely inflamed; over-stimulation may worsen it. Emphasise distal Wind-expelling points early.浅刺、面部少针、前约7天不强刺激、不电针——神经急性炎症，过刺反重。早期重用远端祛风穴。
Recovery-stage push恢复期加强Now use ST4→ST6 penetration needling and electro-acupuncture (low frequency) across weak muscle groups to drive Qi-Blood and re-activate the sinews. Add ST36/SP6 to tonify Qi-Blood supplying the face.此期用地仓透颊车、电针（低频）跨无力肌群，鼓动气血、激活经筋。加足三里／三阴交补气血以荣面。
Sequelae-stage后遗症期Moderate dose to avoid provoking synkinesis; add BL17 膈俞/SP10 血海 to move stasis and ST36/CV6 (+moxa) to tonify Qi-Blood. Combine with facial muscle exercises and warm compress.减量以防诱发联动；加膈俞／血海化瘀、足三里／气海（加灸）补气血。配合面肌锻炼与热敷。
Herbs support each stage. Acupuncture leads in facial palsy; herbs address the pathogen and the underlying deficiency. 方药辅助各期。面瘫以针为主；药治其邪与本虚。
① Acute · Wind-Cold-Phlegm① 急性 · 风寒痰牵正散 Qian Zheng San (Bai Fu Zi + Jiang Can + Quan Xie) — the classical formula that dispels Wind, transforms Phlegm, and frees the facial collaterals. Add Fang Feng/Jing Jie for Wind-Cold; combine with Bu Yang Huan Wu ideas if Qi-deficient.牵正散（白附子+僵蚕+全蝎）——祛风化痰、通面络之经典方。风寒加防风、荆芥；气虚合补阳还五之意。
② Recovery · free & nourish② 恢复 · 通养Continue 牵正散 + add Blood-movers (Chuan Xiong, Dang Gui, Ji Xue Teng) and Qi tonics (Huang Qi) to draw Qi-Blood to the face and free the collaterals.续牵正散+活血（川芎、当归、鸡血藤）、补气（黄芪），引气血上荣面部、通络。
③ Sequelae · tonify & resolve stasis③ 后遗症 · 补虚化瘀补阳还五汤 Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang — heavy Huang Qi to tonify Qi + Dang Gui/Chuan Xiong/Tao Ren/Hong Hua/Di Long to move Blood and unblock the collaterals. The model formula for "Qi deficiency with static collaterals."补阳还五汤——重用黄芪补气+当归、川芎、桃仁、红花、地龙活血通络。「气虚血瘀阻络」之代表方。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Prognosis and dose are everything. Most Bell's palsy recovers well if the acute stage is treated gently (not aggressively) and the recovery-stage window is used fully. The classic error is over-needling the face in week one — this can prolong recovery or seed synkinesis. Tell patients the timeline honestly: real change usually shows across weeks, not days. Protect the eye (cannot close) with lubrication/patching from day one. 预后与剂量最为关键。多数贝尔面瘫若急性期轻治（勿猛）、恢复期充分把握，预后良好。经典错误是第一周面部过刺——反致迁延或埋下联动之根。据实告知病程：真正好转多以周计而非以日计。首日即护眼（不能闭）——滴润／遮盖。
Neurology神经病证
Dizziness / Vertigo眩晕
Root: the clear orifices of the head lose their proper nourishment or are disturbed. Three classical drivers — Wind/Yang rising, phlegm-damp clouding, and deficiency failing to fill. "No Wind without dizziness, no phlegm without dizziness, no deficiency without dizziness."根本：头之清窍失养或被扰。三大经典病机——风阳上扰、痰湿蒙蔽、虚不上荣。「无风不作眩，无痰不作眩，无虚不作眩」。
First, separate true vertigo from lightheadedness, and screen red flags. Sudden severe vertigo with new neurological signs (diplopia, slurred speech, limb weakness, ataxia) needs urgent referral — do not treat as a channel problem. Once red flags are excluded, the three drivers (Wind-Yang / phlegm / deficiency) are distinguished by how the dizziness behaves. 先分辨真性眩晕与头昏，并筛红旗。突发剧烈眩晕伴新发神经体征（复视、言謇、肢体无力、共济失调）须急转诊，不可当经络病治。排除红旗后，三大病机（风阳／痰／虚）凭眩晕的表现方式区分。
Core Framework · Why Dizziness is a Qi-Dynamic Problem of the Head核心框架 · 眩晕为何是头部气机问题
The head is where all clear Yang gathers (诸阳之会) and where the marrow-sea fills. Dizziness arises in only two ways: something rises that shouldn't (Liver Yang/Wind flaring up, phlegm-damp carried up to cloud the orifices — an excess of ascent / entry-exit obstruction), or what should rise cannot (Qi-Blood or Kidney Essence too weak to fill the head — an insufficiency of ascent).头为诸阳之会、髓海所充。眩晕只有两条路：不该升的升上来了（肝阳／风上亢、痰湿上蒙清窍——升太过／出入受阻），或该升的升不上去（气血、肾精不足不能上充清窍——升不及）。
Q1 · Character问一 · 性质Spinning (rotatory) vs floating/heavy-headed? Rotatory with nausea → often Wind-Yang or phlegm. Floating, muzzy, worse on exertion → often deficiency.旋转性 vs 昏沉漂浮？旋转伴恶心→多风阳或痰。昏蒙、劳则加重→多虚。
Q2 · Triggers问二 · 诱因Worse with anger/stress → Liver Yang. Worse with rich/greasy food, heavy head, chest oppression → phlegm-damp. Worse with fatigue, after blood loss, on standing → deficiency.怒则加重→肝阳。厚味油腻后、头重胸闷→痰湿。劳累、失血后、起立时加重→虚。
Q3 · Accompanying问三 · 兼症Headache, tinnitus that roars, red face, bitter mouth → Liver Yang. Nausea, profuse sputum, heavy body → phlegm. Palpitation, pale face, poor sleep → Qi-Blood. Sore low back, faint tinnitus, seminal/knee weakness → Kidney Essence.头痛、耳鸣如潮、面红、口苦→肝阳。恶心、痰多、身重→痰。心悸、面白、眠差→气血。腰酸、耳鸣细微、膝软→肾精。
Q4 · Tongue & Pulse问四 · 舌脉Red tongue, thin yellow coat, wiry pulse → Liver Yang. Greasy white coat, slippery pulse → phlegm-damp. Pale tongue, thready weak pulse → Qi-Blood. Red-peeled or pale tongue with deep-thready pulse → Kidney Essence (Yin or Yang).舌红苔薄黄、脉弦→肝阳。苔白腻、脉滑→痰湿。舌淡、脉细弱→气血。舌红剥或淡、脉沉细→肾精（阴或阳）。
Q5 · Blood pressure问五 · 血压Check BP. Hypertension frequently underlies the Liver-Yang-rising picture and links dizziness to the hypertension protocol — treat both together.测血压。高血压常为肝阳上亢之底，使眩晕与高血压方案相连——二者同治。
Four core patterns. The first two are excess/ascent (something rises to disturb the head); the last two are deficiency (the head is not filled). Anchor each to its Qi dynamic, not just its symptom list. 四个核心证型。前两个属实／升（有物上扰头窍）；后两个属虚（清窍失充）。每个都锚定其气机，而非仅背症状。
① Liver Yang Rising① 肝阳上亢
Excessive Ascent — Yin fails to anchor Liver Yang, Yang flares up to the head升太过——阴不潜阳，肝阳上冲头目
Key symptoms: rotatory dizziness worse with anger/stress, distending headache, roaring tinnitus, flushed face, red eyes, bitter mouth, irritability; red tongue, wiry(-rapid) pulse; often with hypertension. Mechanism: chronic Liver-Kidney Yin insufficiency lets Liver Yang rise unchecked; Yang is light and rises, disturbing the clear orifices at the top. At its extreme it transforms to Wind (→ stroke risk).主症：眩晕旋转、怒则加重、头胀痛、耳鸣如潮、面红目赤、口苦、烦躁；舌红、脉弦（数）；多伴高血压。病机：肝肾阴虚日久，肝阳失潜而上亢；阳性轻升，上扰清窍。亢极化风（→中风之渐）。
Treatment: 平肝潜阳，滋阴息风 — pacify Liver, subdue Yang, enrich Yin. This pattern is shared with Hypertension and Hemifacial Spasm — see the 肝阳化风 pattern card for the full transmission.治法：平肝潜阳、滋阴息风。此证与高血压、面肌痉挛共享——完整传变见「肝阳化风」证型卡。
② Phlegm-Damp Clouding the Middle② 痰湿中阻
Entry-Exit obstruction — Spleen fails to transform, phlegm-damp rises to cloud the clear orifices出入受阻——脾失健运，痰湿上蒙清窍
Key symptoms: dizziness with a heavy muffled head (as if wrapped), chest/epigastric oppression, nausea, profuse sputum, poor appetite, heavy body; greasy white coat, slippery pulse. Mechanism: Spleen transport fails → damp congeals into phlegm → phlegm is turbid and obstructs the Qi dynamic, and Yang-Qi cannot carry the clear up past it; the orifices are clouded rather than nourished.主症：眩晕、头重如裹、胸脘痞闷、恶心、痰多、纳呆、身重；苔白腻、脉滑。病机：脾失健运→湿聚成痰→痰浊阻遏气机，清阳不能上升越过之，清窍被蒙而非被养。
Treatment: 燥湿化痰，健脾和中 — dry damp, transform phlegm, strengthen the Spleen. Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang is the signature formula.治法：燥湿化痰、健脾和中。半夏白术天麻汤为代表方。
③ Qi-Blood Deficiency③ 气血两虚
Insufficient Ascent — Qi-Blood too weak to carry the clear Yang up to fill the head升不及——气血亏虚，清阳不升，头窍失充
Key symptoms: dizziness that worsens on exertion or standing and eases with rest, pale lusterless face, palpitation, poor sleep, fatigue, low appetite; pale tongue, thready weak pulse. Common after blood loss, childbirth, or chronic illness. Mechanism: the head needs a steady upward supply of Qi-Blood; when the source is empty, the clear orifices are simply not filled — a nourishment failure, not an obstruction.主症：眩晕劳则加重、起立为甚、休息则缓，面白无华、心悸、眠差、乏力、纳差；舌淡、脉细弱。多见于失血、产后、久病。病机：头窍需气血持续上供；化源亏则清窍失充——属濡养不足，非阻滞。
Treatment: 补益气血，健运脾胃 — tonify Qi and Blood, strengthen Spleen-Stomach as the source. Gui Pi Tang / Ba Zhen Tang. See the 气血两虚 pattern card for its wider network.治法：补益气血、健运脾胃（资化源）。归脾汤／八珍汤。更广联动见「气血两虚」证型卡。
④ Kidney Essence Deficiency④ 肾精亏虚
Insufficient Ascent at the root — Essence-Marrow fails to fill the sea of marrow (brain)升不及于根本——精髓不足，髓海失充
Key symptoms: chronic dizziness with empty muffled head, faint persistent tinnitus, sore weak low back and knees, poor memory, hair/teeth changes; with Yin deficiency add tidal heat/night sweat, red-peeled tongue; with Yang deficiency add cold limbs, pale tongue. Deep-thready pulse. Mechanism: "The brain is the sea of marrow"; Kidney Essence generates marrow and fills the brain. Depleted by age, overwork, or long illness, the marrow-sea empties from below — the deepest form of the deficiency-dizziness.主症：眩晕日久、脑空头蒙、耳鸣细微持续、腰膝酸软、健忘、发齿改变；偏阴虚加潮热盗汗、舌红剥；偏阳虚加肢冷、舌淡。脉沉细。病机：「脑为髓海」，肾精生髓充脑。年老、劳伤、久病而亏，髓海从下而空——虚性眩晕之最深者。
Treatment: 补肾填精，充养髓海 — tonify Kidney, fill Essence, nourish the marrow-sea. Zuo Gui Wan (Yin) / You Gui Wan (Yang). See the 肾精亏虚 pattern card.治法：补肾填精、充养髓海。左归丸（阴）／右归丸（阳）。见「肾精亏虚」证型卡。
Main points address the head-orifice symptom; pattern points address the driver. Needle direction follows the mechanism — subdue and descend for excess/ascent, tonify and lift (with moxa) for deficiency. 主穴治头窍之标；配穴治病机之本。针向随病机——实／升者潜降，虚者补升（佐灸）。
Main points主穴GV20 百会 (with GV24/四神聪) — clears and regulates the clear orifices at the vertex; GB20 风池 — the crossing point that governs dizziness of every cause; GB43/LV3 to pacify, or moxa GV20 to lift, per pattern.百会（配四神聪）——通调巅顶清窍；风池——治眩晕各因之要穴；随证配侠溪／太冲以潜，或灸百会以升。
① Liver Yang① 肝阳上亢+ LV3 太冲, LV2 行间, GB20 风池, KI3 太溪, GB43 侠溪 — pacify Liver, drain the ascendant Yang, anchor with Kidney Water. Even-reducing; no moxa.+ 太冲、行间、风池、太溪、侠溪——平肝、泻上亢之阳、滋肾水以潜。平泻；不灸。
② Phlegm-Damp② 痰湿中阻+ ST40 丰隆, CV12 中脘, SP9 阴陵泉, PC6 内关, ST36 足三里 — transform phlegm, dry damp, strengthen Spleen, descend rebellious Stomach Qi (nausea).+ 丰隆、中脘、阴陵泉、内关、足三里——化痰燥湿、健脾、降胃止呕。
③ Qi-Blood③ 气血两虚+ ST36 足三里, SP6 三阴交, CV6 气海, BL20 脾俞, GV20 百会 (+moxa) — tonify Qi-Blood, lift the clear Yang. Reinforcing with moxa.+ 足三里、三阴交、气海、脾俞、百会（加灸）——补气血、升清阳。补法加灸。
④ Kidney Essence④ 肾精亏虚+ KI3 太溪, BL23 肾俞, GV4 命门, CV4 关元, GB39 悬钟 (marrow-influential) — tonify Kidney, fill Essence, nourish marrow. Add moxa if Yang-deficient.+ 太溪、肾俞、命门、关元、悬钟（髓会）——补肾填精益髓。偏阳虚加灸。
Formulas by pattern. Each targets the specific Qi dynamic, not "dizziness" as a symptom. 按证选方。每方针对具体气机，而非「眩晕」这一症状。
① Liver Yang 肝阳上亢① 肝阳上亢天麻钩藤饮 Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin — Tian Ma + Gou Teng extinguish Wind and subdue Yang; Shi Jue Ming anchors; Niu Xi leads Blood/Fire downward. For marked Yin deficiency → 镇肝熄风汤 Zhen Gan Xi Feng Tang.天麻钩藤饮——天麻、钩藤息风潜阳；石决明重镇；牛膝引血火下行。阴虚著者→镇肝熄风汤。
② Phlegm-Damp 痰湿中阻② 痰湿中阻半夏白术天麻汤 Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang — Ban Xia dries damp/descends rebellion, Bai Zhu strengthens Spleen, Tian Ma is the specific herb for phlegm-turbidity dizziness ("非天麻不能除").半夏白术天麻汤——半夏燥湿降逆，白术健脾，天麻为痰浊眩晕之要药（「非天麻不能除」）。
③ Qi-Blood 气血两虚③ 气血两虚归脾汤 Gui Pi Tang (with palpitation/poor sleep) or 八珍汤 Ba Zhen Tang (pure Qi-Blood dual tonic). Add moxa/warm foods; treat the Spleen-Stomach as the generating source.归脾汤（兼心悸眠差）或八珍汤（气血双补）。佐灸／温补脾胃以资化源。
④ Kidney Essence 肾精亏虚④ 肾精亏虚左归丸 Zuo Gui Wan (Yin-Essence) / 右归丸 You Gui Wan (Yang). For Yin-deficient empty-heat dizziness → 杞菊地黄丸 Qi Ju Di Huang Wan (adds Gou Qi + Ju Hua for the eyes/head).左归丸（阴精）／右归丸（阳）。阴虚有热之眩晕→杞菊地黄丸（加枸杞、菊花清利头目）。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Patterns mix in practice: elderly hypertensive patients often show Liver Yang rising on a root of Kidney Yin/Essence deficiency (标本同病). Subdue the Yang for the acute dizziness, but tonify Kidney Yin to remove the reason the Yang rises — otherwise it returns. This "treat branch and root together" is the essence of the mechanism-based approach. 临床多兼夹：老年高血压者常为肝阳上亢而根于肾阴／精亏（标本同病）。急则潜阳治眩晕之标，缓则滋肾阴以除阳亢之因——否则复发。此「标本同治」正是病机推理之精髓。
Metabolic & Cardiovascular代谢·心血管
Hypertension高血压
Root: a chronic imbalance in which Yang/fire/wind tends to rise while Yin/Essence fails to anchor below — the same upward-disturbance axis seen in dizziness and headache, expressed as sustained high pressure. TCM manages the pattern and symptoms alongside — never instead of — standard antihypertensive care and BP monitoring.根本：阳／火／风偏于上亢，阴／精不能潜降于下之慢性失衡——与眩晕、头痛同一上扰之轴，表现为血压持续升高。中医辨证治标本，须与规范降压治疗及血压监测并行，绝不替代之。
Safety first — this is a medically managed condition. TCM treatment is adjunctive: continue prescribed antihypertensives and BP monitoring; never advise stopping medication. Refer urgently for hypertensive emergency signs: BP very high with severe headache, visual change, chest pain, dyspnea, focal neurological signs, or confusion. Screen for and refer secondary causes (renal, endocrine) and end-organ damage. Acupuncture may modestly assist BP control and clearly helps the symptoms (headache, dizziness, poor sleep) — set expectations accordingly. 安全第一——此为须医学管理之病。中医为辅助：继续服用降压药、监测血压；绝不建议停药。高血压急症征象须急转诊：血压极高伴剧烈头痛、视觉改变、胸痛、呼吸困难、局灶神经体征、意识模糊。筛查并转诊继发病因（肾性、内分泌）及靶器官损害。针灸或可小幅助控压、明显改善症状（头痛、眩晕、眠差）——据此设定预期。
Core Framework · The Rising-Yang / Sinking-Yin Imbalance核心框架 · 阳升太过·阴降不及之失衡
Hypertension is understood not as one entity but as a chronic disturbance of the up-down axis, usually in a 本虚标实 (deficient root, excess branch) structure. The branch/excess is what rises: Liver Yang, Liver fire, wind, or phlegm-damp surging upward (the acute, symptomatic, higher-pressure states). The root/deficiency is what fails to anchor: Liver-Kidney Yin or Kidney Essence too depleted to hold the Yang down (the chronic substrate, especially with age). Early/robust patients tend toward the excess end (Liver Yang/fire, phlegm); older/long-standing patients toward the deficient end (Yin/Essence). Most real patients are a moving mixture — subdue what rises while nourishing what should anchor.高血压非单一病，而为升降之轴之慢性紊乱，多呈本虚标实之构。标／实为上升者：肝阳、肝火、风、痰湿上冲（急性、有症状、压力较高之态）。本／虚为失潜者：肝肾阴或肾精亏，不能潜阳于下（慢性底质，尤随年龄）。早期／壮实者偏实端（肝阳／火、痰）；年老／久病者偏虚端（阴／精）。多数病人为动态兼夹——潜其上亢，同时滋其当潜者。
Q1 · Symptom pattern问一 · 症状型Pounding headache, red face/eyes, irritability, worse with anger → Liver Yang/fire (excess). Heavy muffled head, chest oppression, obesity, nausea → phlegm-damp. Dizziness, tinnitus, sore low back, five-heart heat, insomnia → Yin-deficient Yang rising / Essence deficiency (root).头痛剧、面红目赤、烦躁、怒则甚→肝阳／火（实）。头重如裹、胸闷、形胖、恶心→痰湿。眩晕、耳鸣、腰酸、五心烦热、失眠→阴虚阳亢／精亏（本）。
Q2 · Constitution & age问二 · 体质与年龄Younger, robust, ruddy, stressed → excess (Liver Yang/fire). Stout, damp diet, sedentary → phlegm-damp. Older, thin or frail, long history → deficiency (Yin/Essence). This shifts the branch/root emphasis.年轻、壮实、面红、压力大→实（肝阳／火）。形盛、饮食肥甘、久坐→痰湿。年老、体瘦或虚弱、病久→虚（阴／精）。据此调标本之重。
Q3 · Course & comorbidity问三 · 病程与合并Note duration, current medications, and comorbidities (diabetes, dyslipidemia, cardiac, renal). Dizziness links this page to the Dizziness protocol (shared Liver-Yang pattern); headache and tinnitus also cross-link.记录病程、现用药、合并症（糖尿病、血脂异常、心、肾）。眩晕使本页与眩晕方案相连（共享肝阳证）；头痛、耳鸣亦交叉联动。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Red tongue, yellow coat, wiry(-rapid) pulse → Liver Yang/fire. Greasy coat, slippery pulse → phlegm-damp. Red tongue with little coat, thready-wiry-rapid → Yin-deficient Yang rising. Pale-ish tongue, deep-thready weak → Essence deficiency.舌红苔黄、脉弦（数）→肝阳／火。苔腻、脉滑→痰湿。舌红少苔、脉细弦数→阴虚阳亢。舌偏淡、脉沉细弱→精亏。
Five patterns along the excess→deficiency spectrum. The first three are excess/branch (Liver Yang, Liver fire, phlegm-damp — something rises); the last two are root/deficiency (Yin-deficient Yang rising, Essence deficiency — the anchor fails). 本虚标实 mixtures are the rule: subdue the branch acutely, nourish the root for lasting control. 五证沿实→虚之谱。前三属实／标（肝阳、肝火、痰湿——有物上升）；后二属本／虚（阴虚阳亢、精亏——潜降失职）。本虚标实兼夹为常：急则潜标，缓则滋本以久控。
① Liver Yang Rising① 肝阳上亢
Excessive Ascent — Yin fails to anchor Liver Yang, Yang surges to the head升太过——阴不潜阳，肝阳上冲头目
Key symptoms: high BP with dizziness, distending headache (temples/vertex), tinnitus, flushed face, irritability, insomnia, worse with stress/anger; red tongue, wiry pulse. The most typical hypertension pattern, usually on a root of Liver-Kidney Yin deficiency. Treatment: 平肝潜阳 — pacify the Liver, subdue Yang, anchor with Yin. This is the same pattern as the Dizziness and Hemifacial-spasm 肝阳上亢 — see the 肝阳化风 pattern card for the full transmission (and the stroke risk at its extreme).主症：血压高伴眩晕、头胀痛（颞／巅）、耳鸣、面红、烦躁、失眠、压力／怒则甚；舌红、脉弦。最典型之高血压证，多根于肝肾阴虚。治法：平肝潜阳（滋阴以潜）。此与眩晕、面肌痉挛之肝阳上亢同证——完整传变见「肝阳化风」证型卡（及亢极中风之险）。
② Liver Fire Blazing② 肝火亢盛
Excessive Ascent — Liver fire blazes upward, more heat than the Yang-rising pattern升太过——肝火上炎，较肝阳更甚之热
Key symptoms: high BP with severe pounding headache, markedly red face and eyes, bitter mouth, marked irritability/anger, dry mouth, thirst, constipation, dark urine; red tongue with yellow coat, wiry-rapid forceful pulse. A fuller, hotter, more excess picture than pattern ①. Mechanism: constrained Liver Qi has transformed fully to fire, which blazes upward with force. Treatment: 清肝泻火 — clear the Liver, drain fire. Links to the 肝火 pattern card.主症：血压高伴头痛剧烈搏动、面目红赤、口苦、烦躁易怒著、口干、渴、便秘、尿黄；舌红苔黄、脉弦数有力。较①更实、更热之象。病机：肝郁全然化火，上炎有力。治法：清肝泻火。联动「肝火」证型卡。
③ Phlegm-Damp Excess③ 痰湿壅盛
Entry-Exit obstruction — phlegm-damp obstructs the Qi dynamic and clouds the head出入受阻——痰湿阻遏气机、蒙蔽清窍
Key symptoms: high BP with a heavy muffled head (as if wrapped), dizziness, chest and epigastric oppression, nausea, profuse sputum, heavy body, often overweight; greasy white/yellow coat, slippery pulse. Common in stout patients with rich diet and metabolic syndrome. Mechanism: Spleen fails to transform fluids → phlegm-damp accumulates and obstructs the Qi dynamic, clouding the clear orifices and disturbing the up-down flow. Treatment: 化痰祛湿，健脾和中 — transform phlegm, dispel damp, strengthen the Spleen. Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang. Links to the 痰湿 pattern card.主症：血压高伴头重如裹、眩晕、胸脘痞闷、恶心、痰多、身重、多形盛；苔白／黄腻、脉滑。多见形盛、饮食肥甘、代谢综合征者。病机：脾失健运→痰湿聚而阻气机，蒙清窍、扰升降。治法：化痰祛湿、健脾和中。半夏白术天麻汤。联动「痰湿」证型卡。
④ Yin Deficiency with Yang Rising④ 阴虚阳亢
Insufficient Descent — Liver-Kidney Yin depleted, unanchored Yang rises (the classic 本虚标实)降不及——肝肾阴虚，阳失潜降而上亢（典型本虚标实）
Key symptoms: high BP with dizziness, tinnitus, dry eyes, sore weak low back and knees, five-heart heat, flushed cheeks, night sweats, insomnia, palpitation; red tongue with little coat, thready-wiry-rapid pulse. The core chronic pattern, especially mid-life onward. Mechanism: Liver-Kidney Yin (which anchors and cools the Yang) is deficient, so Yang rises relatively unchecked — deficiency below producing excess-like rising above. Treatment: 滋阴潜阳 — enrich Yin, subdue the rising Yang. This is the true root treatment for most Liver-Yang hypertension. Links to the 阴虚火旺 pattern card.主症：血压高伴眩晕、耳鸣、目干、腰膝酸软、五心烦热、颧红、盗汗、失眠、心悸；舌红少苔、脉细弦数。核心慢性证，尤中年后。病机：肝肾阴（潜降凉制阳者）虚，阳相对失制而上亢——下虚生上之似实的亢。治法：滋阴潜阳。此为多数肝阳型高血压之真本治。联动「阴虚火旺」证型卡。
⑤ Kidney Essence Deficiency⑤ 肾精亏虚
Insufficient Ascent/anchoring at the root — Essence-marrow depleted, Yin and Yang both weak below根本升摄不足——精髓亏虚，下元阴阳俱损
Key symptoms: chronic hypertension in older patients with an empty muffled head, dizziness, persistent faint tinnitus, poor memory, sore weak knees, hair/teeth changes; may lean Yin-deficient (tidal heat, red-peeled tongue) or Yang-deficient (cold limbs, pale tongue). Deep-thready pulse. Mechanism: long depletion of Kidney Essence empties the marrow-sea and weakens the root's ability to anchor — the deepest, most chronic substrate of hypertension. Treatment: 补肾填精，平调阴阳 — tonify Kidney, fill Essence, rebalance Yin-Yang (with the leaning corrected). Links to the 肾精亏虚 pattern card.主症：老年慢性高血压伴脑空头蒙、眩晕、耳鸣细微持续、健忘、膝软、发齿改变；或偏阴虚（潮热、舌红剥）或偏阳虚（肢冷、舌淡）。脉沉细。病机：肾精久亏，髓海空、根本潜摄之力衰——高血压最深、最慢性之底质。治法：补肾填精、平调阴阳（据偏向而纠）。联动「肾精亏虚」证型卡。
LV3 + GB20 + ST36 + KI3 form a core that subdues rising Yang and anchors it to the Kidney; pattern points address fire/phlegm/Yin/Essence. Acupuncture here is adjunctive to medication — its clearest wins are the symptoms (headache, dizziness, sleep) and modest BP support. 太冲+风池+足三里+太溪为核心，潜上亢之阳而归肾；配穴治火／痰／阴／精。针灸此处为药物之辅——最明确之效在症状（头痛、眩晕、睡眠）与小幅助控压。
Core points核心穴LV3 太冲 (pacifies Liver, guides Qi-Blood down), GB20 风池 (subdues Yang/wind rising to the head), ST36 足三里 (harmonises, has BP-regulating evidence), KI3 太溪 (anchors Yang to Kidney Water), LI11 曲池 (a commonly used point with BP-lowering data), GV20 百会 (regulates the head — reducing for excess).太冲（平肝、导气血下行）、风池（潜上冲头之阳／风）、足三里（和调，有降压证据）、太溪（滋水潜阳）、曲池（常用降压穴，有数据）、百会（调头——实则泻）。
① Liver Yang 肝阳上亢① 肝阳上亢+ LV2 行间, GB43 侠溪, KI3 太溪 — subdue Yang, anchor with Yin; even-reducing, no moxa.+ 行间、侠溪、太溪——潜阳、滋阴以潜；平泻不灸。
② Liver fire 肝火亢盛② 肝火亢盛+ LV2 行间, GB20, LI11 曲池, LV/GB jing-well bleeding if very full — clear and drain fire; reducing.+ 行间、风池、曲池、火盛可点刺井穴放血——清泻肝火；泻法。
③ Phlegm-damp 痰湿壅盛③ 痰湿壅盛+ ST40 丰隆, SP9 阴陵泉, CV12 中脘, ST36 — transform phlegm, drain damp, strengthen Spleen.+ 丰隆、阴陵泉、中脘、足三里——化痰、利湿、健脾。
④ Yin-deficient Yang rising 阴虚阳亢④ 阴虚阳亢+ KI3 太溪, SP6 三阴交, LV3, KI6 照海 — enrich Yin and subdue Yang; even/reinforcing for the Yin points.+ 太溪、三阴交、太冲、照海——滋阴潜阳；阴穴平补。
⑤ Essence deficiency 肾精亏虚⑤ 肾精亏虚+ BL23 肾俞, GV4 命门, CV4 关元, GB39 悬钟 (marrow), KI3 — tonify Kidney and fill Essence; moxa if Yang-leaning.+ 肾俞、命门、关元、悬钟（髓）、太溪——补肾填精；偏阳虚加灸。
Formulas by pattern. In most patients, combine a branch-subduing action with a root-nourishing one (标本兼治). Herbs are adjunctive — do not adjust or stop antihypertensive medication based on herbs. 按证选方。多数病人标本兼治——潜标配滋本。方药为辅——勿据方药调整或停降压药。
① Liver Yang 肝阳上亢① 肝阳上亢天麻钩藤饮 Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin — Tian Ma + Gou Teng + Shi Jue Ming subdue Yang and extinguish wind; Niu Xi leads down; Du Zhong/Sang Ji Sheng support the Liver-Kidney root. The workhorse formula.天麻钩藤饮——天麻+钩藤+石决明潜阳息风；牛膝引下；杜仲／桑寄生补肝肾之本。主力方。
② Liver fire 肝火亢盛② 肝火亢盛龙胆泻肝汤 Long Dan Xie Gan Tang — drain full Liver-GB fire downward. For strong upward fire with constipation, brief use; transition to Yin-nourishing as fire settles.龙胆泻肝汤——泻肝胆实火向下。火盛便秘者短用；火降后转滋阴。
③ Phlegm-damp 痰湿壅盛③ 痰湿壅盛半夏白术天麻汤 Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang — transform phlegm, strengthen Spleen, with Tian Ma for the phlegm-dizziness. Add Ze Xie/Che Qian Zi to drain damp.半夏白术天麻汤——化痰健脾，天麻治痰眩。加泽泻／车前子利湿。
④ Yin-deficient Yang rising 阴虚阳亢④ 阴虚阳亢杞菊地黄丸 / 镇肝熄风汤 — Qi Ju Di Huang Wan enriches Liver-Kidney Yin (with Gou Qi/Ju Hua for head-eyes); Zhen Gan Xi Feng Tang for marked Yin-deficient Yang surging toward wind. The root treatment.杞菊地黄丸／镇肝熄风汤——杞菊地黄滋肝肾阴（枸杞／菊花清利头目）；阴虚阳亢近化风者用镇肝熄风汤。此为本治。
⑤ Essence deficiency 肾精亏虚⑤ 肾精亏虚左归丸 (Yin) / 右归丸 (Yang) / 二仙汤 — tonify Kidney and fill Essence per the Yin/Yang lean; Er Xian Tang balances Kidney Yin-Yang and is used for menopausal/elderly hypertension with mixed deficiency.左归丸（阴）／右归丸（阳）／二仙汤——按阴阳偏向补肾填精；二仙汤平调肾阴阳，用于更年期／老年阴阳兼虚之高血压。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Two anchors keep hypertension management honest. First, the pattern usually moves along the excess→deficiency line over a patient's life: a ruddy, stressed 40-year-old with Liver fire becomes, at 65, an Essence-deficient Yin-deficient-Yang-rising picture — treat where they are, and reassess over years, not visits. Second, and non-negotiable: this is medically managed disease. TCM improves symptoms and quality of life and may modestly aid control, but you monitor BP, coordinate with the prescriber, never advise stopping medication, and refer any hypertensive-emergency sign immediately. Treating the pattern well and respecting the medicine are not in conflict. 两锚使高血压治疗不失分寸。其一，证型多随一生沿实→虚线移动：40岁面红压力大之肝火者，65岁成精亏阴虚阳亢之象——治其当下，以年而非以诊次复评。其二，不可让步：此为须医学管理之病。中医改善症状与生活质量、或小幅助控，然须监测血压、与处方者协同、绝不建议停药、任何高血压急症征象立即转诊。治证之善与敬畏医学，二者不悖。
Metabolic & Endocrine代谢内分泌
Sweating Disorders汗证
Root: sweat is "the fluid of the Heart," released through the interstices (腠理) under the control of Wei Qi and the balance of Yin-Yang. Abnormal sweating means this control has failed — either the exterior is not secured (spontaneous sweat, 自汗, a Qi/Yang problem) or empty fire forces the fluids out at night (night sweat, 盗汗, a Yin problem).根本：汗为心之液，由卫气司腠理开合、阴阳平衡而出。汗出异常即此调控失职——或表不固（自汗，气／阳之病），或虚火迫津夜出（盗汗，阴之病）。
First separate the two axes — day vs night — and screen for secondary causes. Rule out or refer for: hyperthyroidism, infection/TB (night sweats + fever + weight loss), diabetes/hypoglycemia, menopause (see the Menopause page), lymphoma, and medication effects. Sudden profuse sweating with palpitation/collapse is a medical emergency (severe Yang collapse / cardiac). Localized sweating (palms, head only) is differentiated separately from generalized sweating. 先分两轴——日间／夜间——并筛继发病因。以下排除或转诊：甲亢、感染／结核（盗汗+发热+消瘦）、糖尿病／低血糖、更年期（见更年期页）、淋巴瘤、药物影响。突发大汗伴心悸／虚脱为急症（亡阳／心源）。局部汗（仅手心、仅头部）与全身汗分别辨证。
Core Framework · The 自汗 / 盗汗 Axis核心框架 · 自汗／盗汗之轴
Sweat is body fluid pushed out through the interstices. Two things normally keep it in check: Wei Qi / Yang secures the exterior (holds the pores appropriately closed), and Yin anchors the fluids and restrains the Yang (keeps them from being forced out). Two classic patterns follow. Spontaneous sweat (自汗): occurs by day, worse on exertion, when Qi/Yang fails to secure the exterior — the pores stay open, fluid leaks. A deficiency of the holding, securing function. Night sweat (盗汗): occurs during sleep and stops on waking, when Yin is deficient and empty fire (unrestrained at night when Yang enters the interior) forces the fluids out. A deficiency of the anchoring, cooling function. The rule of thumb — 自汗多气虚阳虚, 盗汗多阴虚 — orients you, though overlap and exceptions exist.汗为津液经腠理外泄。常有二者约束之：卫气／阳固表（司腠理适度闭合），阴敛津液、制约阳气（使津不被迫出）。故成两典型证。自汗：日间、动则加重，因气／阳不固表——腠理疏开，津液外泄。属固摄之虚。盗汗：寐中出、醒则止，因阴虚而虚火（夜间阳入于里则失制）迫津外泄。属潜敛之虚。总纲——自汗多气虚阳虚，盗汗多阴虚——可为向导，然有重叠与例外。
Q1 · Day or night问一 · 昼夜Sweating by day, awake, worse on exertion, stops with rest → spontaneous sweat (自汗, Qi/Yang). Sweating during sleep, drenching, stops on waking → night sweat (盗汗, Yin). Both day and night → mixed or severe deficiency.日间清醒时出、动则甚、静则止→自汗（气／阳）。寐中出、湿透、醒则止→盗汗（阴）。昼夜均出→兼夹或重虚。
Q2 · Accompanying — deficiency type问二 · 兼症辨虚型Fatigue, breathlessness, easy colds, pale → Lung-Wei Qi not securing. Palpitation, poor sleep, pale face, poor memory → Heart-Blood not holding. Tidal heat, five-heart heat, dry mouth, red cheeks → Yin-deficient empty fire.乏力、气短、易感冒、面白→肺卫不固。心悸、眠差、面白、健忘→心血不足。潮热、五心烦热、口干、颧红→阴虚火旺。
Q3 · Location & character问三 · 部位与性状Whole-body vs localized (head/face, palms-soles, half-body). Sweat that is cold and profuse with cold limbs → Yang deficiency (more serious). Sticky yellow sweat with heat signs → damp-heat (a less common excess type). Note sweat color/odor.全身 vs 局部（头面、手足心、半身）。汗冷量多伴肢冷→阳虚（较重）。汗黏色黄兼热象→湿热（较少见之实型）。注意汗之色与味。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Pale tongue, weak pulse → Qi/Yang not securing. Pale tongue, thready-weak → Heart-Blood. Red tongue with little/peeled coat, thready-rapid → Yin-deficient empty fire. Red tongue, yellow greasy coat → damp-heat.舌淡、脉弱→气／阳不固。舌淡、脉细弱→心血。舌红少苔或剥、脉细数→阴虚火旺。舌红苔黄腻→湿热。
Three core patterns along the 自汗/盗汗 axis: two securing/holding failures (Lung-Wei Qi, Heart-Blood) that give spontaneous sweat, and one anchoring failure (Yin-deficient fire) that gives night sweat. (A damp-heat excess type and a Yang-collapse emergency type exist but are less common / urgent.) 沿自汗／盗汗轴之三核心证：二固摄之虚（肺卫气、心血）致自汗，一潜敛之虚（阴虚火）致盗汗。（另有湿热实型与亡阳急症型，较少见／属急。）
① Lung-Wei Qi Not Securing (Spontaneous Sweat)① 肺卫不固自汗
Insufficient Ascent/holding — Wei Qi too weak to secure the exterior, pores stay open升不及／固摄不足——卫气不固表，腠理疏而汗泄
Key symptoms: spontaneous daytime sweating, markedly worse on the slightest exertion; aversion to wind, frequent colds, fatigue, breathlessness, pale complexion; pale tongue, weak pulse. Mechanism: the Lung governs the Wei Qi that controls the opening and closing of the interstices; when Wei Qi is weak it cannot hold the pores closed, so fluid leaks out — worse with exertion, which further disperses the already-weak Qi. Treatment: 益气固表止汗 — boost Qi, secure the exterior, stop sweating. Yu Ping Feng San is the signature. Links to the 脾气虚 (肺脾气虚) pattern card.主症：日间自汗、稍动即甚；恶风、易感冒、乏力、气短、面色㿠白；舌淡、脉弱。病机：肺主卫气以司腠理开合，卫气虚则不能敛闭腠理，津液外泄——动则耗其已虚之气，故动甚。治法：益气固表止汗。玉屏风散为代表。联动「脾气虚（肺脾气虚）」证型卡。
② Heart-Blood Deficiency② 心血不足
Insufficient generation — Heart-Blood empty, sweat (the fluid of the Heart) not held化源不足——心血亏虚，汗（心之液）失于统摄
Key symptoms: sweating (spontaneous and/or night) with palpitation, poor dream-disturbed sleep, pale lusterless face, fatigue, poor memory, dizziness; pale tongue, thready-weak pulse. Common after blood loss, chronic illness, or overthinking. Mechanism: "sweat is the fluid of the Heart"; when Heart-Blood is deficient, the Heart cannot govern and hold its own fluid, and the unsettled Shen further loosens its control — so sweat escapes. Treatment: 补血养心，益气敛汗 — tonify Blood, nourish the Heart, boost Qi and astringe sweat. Links to the 心脾两虚 pattern card.主症：汗出（自汗和／或盗汗）伴心悸、眠差多梦、面色无华、乏力、健忘、头晕；舌淡、脉细弱。多见失血、久病、思虑后。病机：「汗为心之液」；心血虚则心不能主摄其液，心神不宁更失其固——汗遂外泄。治法：补血养心、益气敛汗。联动「心脾两虚」证型卡。
③ Yin Deficiency with Empty Fire (Night Sweat)③ 阴虚火旺盗汗
Insufficient Descent — Yin fails to anchor Yang; empty fire forces the fluids out at night降不及——阴不制阳，虚火夜迫津外泄
Key symptoms: night sweats (drenching during sleep, stopping on waking), five-heart heat, tidal flush over the cheeks, dry mouth and throat, insomnia, possibly low-grade afternoon fever; red tongue with little or peeled coat, thready-rapid pulse. Mechanism: when Yin is depleted it cannot restrain the Yang; at night the Yang enters the interior where, unchecked by cooling Yin, empty fire arises and steams the fluids out through the interstices — and stops on waking when Yang returns to the exterior. Treatment: 滋阴降火，固表止汗 — enrich Yin, clear empty fire, astringe sweat. Links to the 阴虚火旺 pattern card.主症：盗汗（寐中湿透、醒则止）、五心烦热、颧红潮热、口干咽燥、失眠、或午后低热；舌红少苔或剥、脉细数。病机：阴亏不能制阳；夜则阳入于里，失阴凉之制，虚火内生蒸津外泄——醒则阳出于表而止。治法：滋阴降火、固表止汗。联动「阴虚火旺」证型卡。
HT6 + KI7 + LU7/LI4 anchor the sweat-regulating core; pattern points address Qi/Blood/Yin. HT6 (Yin-Xi) and KI7 (Fu Liu) are the two classic empirical points — the pairing famously distinguishes and treats spontaneous vs night sweat. 阴郄+复溜+列缺／合谷为调汗核心；配穴治气／血／阴。阴郄、复溜为止汗两大经验穴——此配伍以辨治自汗与盗汗著称。
Core points核心穴HT6 阴郄 (Xi-cleft of Heart — the premier point to stop sweating, especially night sweat), KI7 复溜 (regulates sweat via the Kidney — reinforce for spontaneous sweat, even for night sweat), LU7 列缺 + LI4 合谷 (regulate the Wei Qi and the opening/closing of the interstices). Classic teaching: 复溜 reinforcing + 合谷 reducing to stop sweat; reverse to promote sweat.阴郄（心之郄——止汗第一穴，尤宜盗汗）、复溜（从肾调汗——自汗补、盗汗平）、列缺+合谷（调卫气及腠理开合）。经典：补复溜、泻合谷以止汗；反之则发汗。
① Lung-Wei Qi 肺卫不固① 肺卫不固自汗+ BL13 肺俞, ST36 足三里, CV6 气海 (+moxa), BL43 膏肓 — boost Qi and secure the exterior; reinforcing with moxa.+ 肺俞、足三里、气海（加灸）、膏肓——益气固表；补法加灸。
② Heart-Blood 心血不足② 心血不足+ HT7 神门, BL15 心俞, BL17 膈俞, SP6 三阴交, ST36 — nourish Heart-Blood, settle the Shen, astringe sweat; reinforcing.+ 神门、心俞、膈俞、三阴交、足三里——养心血、宁神、敛汗；补法。
③ Yin-deficient fire 阴虚火旺③ 阴虚火旺盗汗+ KI3 太溪, KI6 照海, SP6 三阴交, HT6 阴郄 (emphasised) — enrich Yin, clear empty fire, stop night sweat; even method, no moxa.+ 太溪、照海、三阴交、阴郄（重用）——滋阴降火、止盗汗；平补平泻、不灸。
Formulas by pattern, with astringent sweat-stoppers (麻黄根, 浮小麦, 煅牡蛎, 五味子) added across patterns to hold the fluid while the root is corrected. 按证选方，各证佐收涩止汗（麻黄根、浮小麦、煅牡蛎、五味子）以固津，同时治本。
① Lung-Wei Qi 肺卫不固① 肺卫不固自汗玉屏风散 Yu Ping Feng San — Huang Qi + Bai Zhu + Fang Feng to boost Qi and secure the exterior; the signature formula for spontaneous sweat with easy colds. Add 煅牡蛎/浮小麦 to astringe.玉屏风散——黄芪+白术+防风，益气固表；自汗易感冒之代表方。加煅牡蛎／浮小麦收涩。
② Heart-Blood 心血不足② 心血不足归脾汤 Gui Pi Tang — tonify Heart-Spleen, nourish Blood, settle the Shen; add 五味子/浮小麦 to astringe sweat. For sweating with palpitation and poor sleep.归脾汤——补心脾、养血、宁神；加五味子／浮小麦敛汗。治汗出兼心悸眠差。
③ Yin-deficient fire 阴虚火旺③ 阴虚火旺盗汗当归六黄汤 Dang Gui Liu Huang Tang — the classic night-sweat formula: Dang Gui + Sheng/Shu Di enrich Yin, the three Huang (Qin/Lian/Bai) clear empty fire, Huang Qi secures the exterior. For milder cases → 知柏地黄丸 + 牡蛎散.当归六黄汤——盗汗经典方：当归+生／熟地滋阴，三黄（芩／连／柏）清虚火，黄芪固表。轻者→知柏地黄丸+牡蛎散。
Clinical pearl临证心得
The 自汗=Qi/Yang, 盗汗=Yin rule is a starting orientation, not a law. In practice many patients — especially the chronically ill or elderly — have both, or a Heart-Blood pattern that sweats day and night. Treat what you actually find. Two safety notes: persistent night sweats with fever and weight loss must be worked up (TB, lymphoma, thyroid); and profuse cold sweating with cold limbs and a faint pulse is Yang collapse (亡阳) — a medical emergency, not a clinic sweating complaint. For menopausal flushing-sweats, see the Menopause page (Kidney Yin/Yang axis). 自汗=气／阳、盗汗=阴之纲是起始向导，非铁律。临床多数病人——尤久病、年老者——常两者并见，或心血证昼夜均汗。据实所见而治。二安全提示：持续盗汗伴发热消瘦须查（结核、淋巴瘤、甲状腺）；大汗淋漓而肢冷脉微为亡阳——急症，非门诊汗证。更年期潮热汗出见更年期页（肾阴／阳之轴）。
Sensory / Ophthalmology五官·眼科
Dry Eye干眼
Root: the eye is where the Essence of all five Zang pours up (五脏六腑之精皆上注于目), and is governed especially by the Liver (肝开窍于目) and moistened by Yin-fluid and Blood. Dry eye is a failure of this upward moistening — the fluids and Blood no longer reach and nourish the eye, most often from Liver-Kidney Yin deficiency or Blood deficiency, sometimes with empty heat.根本：五脏六腑之精皆上注于目，尤为肝所主（肝开窍于目），赖阴津与血濡润。干眼为此上濡失职——津血不能上达濡目，多因肝肾阴虚或阴血亏虚，或兼虚热。
Screen for secondary and serious causes. Consider and refer: Sjögren's syndrome and other autoimmune disease (dry eyes + dry mouth + joint symptoms), thyroid eye disease, Bell's palsy (incomplete eye closure), medication effects (antihistamines, antidepressants), and contact-lens or screen-related surface disease. Red painful eye with visual loss or photophobia is not simple dry eye — refer urgently. Otherwise dry eye responds well to Yin/Blood-nourishing pattern treatment plus local points and lifestyle (screen breaks, humidity). 筛查继发与严重病因。考虑并转诊：干燥综合征及其他自身免疫病（眼干+口干+关节症状）、甲状腺眼病、面瘫（闭眼不全）、药物影响（抗组胺、抗抑郁药）、隐形眼镜／屏幕相关眼表病。红痛眼伴视力下降或畏光非单纯干眼——急转诊。余者干眼对滋阴／养血辨证治疗+局部穴+生活调（屏幕休息、湿度）反应良好。
Core Framework · Why the Eye Loses Its Moisture核心框架 · 目为何失润
The eye is nourished by the upward flow of Essence, Yin-fluid, and Blood — the Liver stores Blood and opens to the eye, the Kidney stores Essence, and the fluids moisten. Dry eye is fundamentally a failure of moistening from insufficiency: either Liver-Kidney Yin is depleted (the fluids that should moisten the eye are gone, often with empty heat that further dries — the aging/screen-strain/menopausal picture), or Blood is deficient (the eye is not filled and nourished, worse with fatigue — the post-illness/overwork picture). Occasionally there is a relative excess overlay (Liver fire/wind-heat scorching the surface), but the dominant story in chronic dry eye is deficiency. Treat by nourishing what should rise to the eye.目赖精、阴津、血上濡——肝藏血而开窍于目、肾藏精、津液润之。干眼本质为虚而失濡：或肝肾阴亏（当濡目之津已耗，常兼虚热更燥——年老／用眼／更年期之象），或阴血不足（目失充养、劳则加重——病后／劳伤之象）。偶有相对之实（肝火／风热灼目表），然慢性干眼以虚为主。治在濡养当上濡目者。
Q1 · Sensation & timing问一 · 感觉与时相Dry, gritty, burning, foreign-body sensation, worse in the evening / after screens / in dry air. Burning with heat sensation, worse when tired-and-hot → Yin-deficient empty heat. Dry with blurred vision worse on fatigue → Blood deficiency.干涩、磨砂感、灼热、异物感，入夜／用屏／干燥环境加重。灼热感、疲而燥热甚→阴虚有热。干伴视物模糊、劳则甚→血虚。
Q2 · Systemic dryness问二 · 全身干燥Dry mouth/throat, tidal heat, night sweat, sore low back, dizziness, tinnitus → Liver-Kidney Yin. Pale face, dizziness, palpitation, scanty pale menses → Blood deficiency. Widespread dryness + joint symptoms → screen for Sjögren's/autoimmune.口咽干、潮热、盗汗、腰酸、头晕、耳鸣→肝肾阴虚。面白、头晕、心悸、经少色淡→血虚。广泛干燥+关节症状→筛查干燥综合征／自免。
Q3 · Use & environment问三 · 用眼与环境Hours of screen/near work, contact lenses, air-conditioning, low humidity — these deplete and dry regardless of pattern; address them alongside. Menopausal status (Yin decline) and age are relevant to the Liver-Kidney picture.屏幕／近距用眼时长、隐形眼镜、空调、低湿度——不论何证均耗且燥，须同时干预。更年期（阴衰）与年龄与肝肾之象相关。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Red tongue with little/peeled coat, thready-rapid pulse → Liver-Kidney Yin (with heat). Pale tongue, thready pulse → Blood deficiency. Red tongue, yellow coat, wiry-rapid → Liver-fire overlay (less common).舌红少苔或剥、脉细数→肝肾阴虚（兼热）。舌淡、脉细→血虚。舌红苔黄、脉弦数→兼肝火（较少见）。
Two core deficiency patterns: Liver-Kidney Yin deficiency (with empty heat — the dominant chronic dry-eye pattern) and Yin-Blood deficiency (the eye not filled). Both are failures of upward moistening; treat by enriching Yin and nourishing Blood so the fluids reach the eye. 二核心虚证：肝肾阴虚（兼虚热——慢性干眼主证）与阴血亏虚（目失充）。皆上濡失职；治在滋阴养血，使津血上达于目。
① Liver-Kidney Yin Deficiency① 肝肾阴虚
Insufficient Descent — Yin-fluid depleted, empty heat dries the eye further降不及——阴津亏虚，虚热更灼目窍
Key symptoms: dry burning gritty eyes, photophobia, blurred vision, worse in the evening and after screen use, with dry mouth/throat, tidal heat, night sweats, sore weak low back, dizziness, tinnitus; red tongue with little or peeled coat, thready-rapid pulse. Common with aging, menopause, and prolonged near work. Mechanism: the Liver stores Blood and opens to the eye; the Kidney stores the Essence that underwrites the Liver-Blood and the ocular fluids. When Liver-Kidney Yin is depleted, the eye loses its moistening fluid, and empty heat arising from Yin deficiency dries it further — a dry-and-hot deficiency. Treatment: 滋补肝肾，养阴明目 — enrich Liver-Kidney Yin, nourish fluids, brighten the eyes. Links to the 阴虚火旺 pattern card.主症：目干灼磨、畏光、视物模糊、入夜及用屏后加重，伴口咽干、潮热、盗汗、腰膝酸软、头晕、耳鸣；舌红少苔或剥、脉细数。多见年老、更年期、久近距用眼。病机：肝藏血开窍于目；肾藏精以充肝血及目之津。肝肾阴亏则目失濡津，阴虚生虚热更灼之——燥而热之虚。治法：滋补肝肾、养阴明目。联动「阴虚火旺」证型卡。
② Yin-Blood Deficiency② 阴血亏虚
Insufficient generation — Blood too deficient to fill and moisten the eye化源不足——阴血亏虚不能充濡目窍
Key symptoms: dry gritty eyes with blurred vision that worsens with fatigue and improves with rest, dry eyes without much heat sensation, pale lusterless face, dizziness, palpitation, scanty pale menses (in women); pale tongue, thready pulse. Common after blood loss, childbirth, chronic illness, or overwork. Mechanism: "the Liver stores Blood, and when the eye receives Blood it can see (肝受血而能视)"; when Blood is deficient it cannot rise to fill and moisten the eye, so the eye is dry and vision blurs — a nourishment failure, cooler and more purely deficient than pattern ①. Treatment: 养血滋阴，益目 — nourish Blood, enrich Yin, benefit the eye. Links to the 气血两虚 pattern card.主症：目干磨、视物模糊、劳则加重、休息则缓、干而少热感、面色无华、头晕、心悸、经少色淡（女）；舌淡、脉细。多见失血、产后、久病、劳伤。病机：「肝受血而能视」；血虚则不能上充濡目，故目干视糊——濡养不足，较①更凉、更纯虚。治法：养血滋阴、益目。联动「气血两虚」证型卡。
Local periocular points move Qi-Blood to the eye and stimulate tear function; distal points nourish the Liver-Kidney/Blood root. Local + root is the standard combination. Needle periocular points shallowly and carefully. 局部眼周穴引气血至目、促泪液功能；远端穴治肝肾／血之本。局部+治本为标准配伍。眼周穴宜浅刺慎刺。
Local / periocular局部·眼周BL2 攒竹, TE23 丝竹空, GB1 瞳子髎, ST1 承泣, EX 鱼腰, EX 太阳 — encircle and stimulate the eye to move Qi-Blood and promote lacrimation. Needle shallowly, avoid the globe; press firmly after withdrawal (periocular bruising risk).攒竹、丝竹空、瞳子髎、承泣、鱼腰、太阳——围目行气血、促泪。浅刺、避眼球；出针后按压（眼周易瘀）。
Distal (both patterns)远端（两证通用）LV3 太冲, GB37 光明 (Luo of GB, empirical eye point), KI3 太溪, SP6 三阴交, BL18 肝俞, BL23 肾俞 — nourish Liver-Kidney and Blood, brighten the eyes.太冲、光明（胆络，明目验穴）、太溪、三阴交、肝俞、肾俞——养肝肾血、明目。
① Liver-Kidney Yin 肝肾阴虚① 肝肾阴虚+ KI6 照海, KI3 太溪 (emphasised), SP6 — enrich Yin, clear empty heat; even/reinforcing, no moxa.+ 照海、太溪（重用）、三阴交——滋阴清虚热；平补不灸。
② Yin-Blood 阴血亏虚② 阴血亏虚+ BL17 膈俞, SP10 血海, ST36 足三里, SP6 — nourish Blood and generate fluids; reinforcing.+ 膈俞、血海、足三里、三阴交——养血生津；补法。
Formulas by pattern, both centered on nourishing Yin-Blood to bring moisture to the eye. Gou Qi Zi, Ju Hua, Mi Meng Hua, Sang Shen are the signature eye-brightening moistening herbs. 按证选方，皆以养阴血、濡目为中心。枸杞子、菊花、密蒙花、桑椹为明目润燥要药。
① Liver-Kidney Yin 肝肾阴虚① 肝肾阴虚杞菊地黄丸 Qi Ju Di Huang Wan — Liu Wei Di Huang (enrich Liver-Kidney Yin) + Gou Qi Zi + Ju Hua (nourish and brighten the eyes). The signature dry-eye formula. Add Mai Dong/Sha Shen to generate fluids if very dry.杞菊地黄丸——六味地黄（滋肝肾阴）+枸杞子+菊花（养目明目）。干眼代表方。甚燥加麦冬／沙参生津。
② Yin-Blood 阴血亏虚② 阴血亏虚四物汤 + 明目地黄丸加减 — nourish Blood (Dang Gui, Shu Di, Bai Shao, Chuan Xiong) with Gou Qi/Ju Hua/Mi Meng Hua to lead Blood to the eye and brighten vision. For Blood-deficiency dry eye with fatigue-blur.四物汤+明目地黄丸加减——养血（当归、熟地、白芍、川芎）配枸杞／菊花／密蒙花引血明目。治血虚干眼、劳则视糊。
Clinical pearl临证心得
Two things decide outcomes in dry eye. First, address the behavioral drivers — screen time, blink rate, contact lenses, dry/air-conditioned environments deplete Yin-fluid faster than any formula can replace it; pattern treatment without lifestyle change under-performs. Second, screen for Sjögren's and autoimmune disease whenever dry eyes come with dry mouth and joint symptoms — that is a referral, not a Yin-deficiency to be tonified alone. When it is straightforward Liver-Kidney or Blood-deficiency dry eye, Qi Ju Di Huang Wan plus periocular needling and screen discipline works reliably, though over weeks. 干眼二事决定疗效。其一，处理行为诱因——屏幕时间、瞬目频率、隐形眼镜、干燥／空调环境耗阴津之速快于任何方药所能补；辨证而不改生活方式则效逊。其二，眼干伴口干与关节症状时须筛查干燥综合征与自免病——此为转诊，非可独补之阴虚。若为单纯肝肾或血虚干眼，杞菊地黄丸配眼周针刺与用屏节制可靠有效，然以周计。
Urology / Men's Health泌尿生殖·男科
Impotence (ED)阳痿
Root: the ancestral sinew (宗筋) fails to rise. It can fail from too little fire (Mingmen/Kidney Yang declining, Heart-Spleen not nourishing) or from obstruction (Liver Qi constrained, damp-heat pouring down). Modern ED is frequently psychogenic — the Liver-Qi and fright patterns matter as much as the classic Kidney-Yang picture.根本：宗筋不振。或因火不足（命门／肾阳衰、心脾失养），或因所阻（肝郁、湿热下注）。现代阳痿多属心因性——肝郁与惊恐两证与经典肾阳证同等重要。
First separate psychogenic from organic, and screen for treatable medical causes. Preserved morning/nocturnal erections and situational failure point to psychogenic (Liver-Qi / fright) — highly responsive. Absent morning erections, gradual global decline, or risk factors (diabetes, cardiovascular disease, low testosterone, medications, pelvic surgery) suggest organic causes needing medical work-up. ED can be an early marker of cardiovascular disease — do not treat in isolation without appropriate referral. 先分心因性与器质性，并筛查可治的医学病因。晨勃／夜间勃起保留、情境性失败提示心因性（肝郁／惊恐）——极易见效。晨勃消失、渐进性全面减退、或有高危因素（糖尿病、心血管病、低睾酮、药物、盆腔手术）提示器质性，须医学检查。阳痿可为心血管病之早期信号——勿孤立处理，须适当转诊。
Core Framework · Why the Ancestral Sinew Fails to Rise核心框架 · 宗筋为何不振
Erection is the "ancestral sinew" (宗筋) filling and rising — it depends on Kidney Yang/Mingmen fire to warm and drive it, on Qi-Blood to fill it, and on the Liver (which governs the sinews and the free flow of Qi) to release it. So impotence arises two ways. Insufficiency (不用): Mingmen fire declines (肾阳虚), or Heart-Spleen fails to generate and lead Qi-Blood to the sinew (心脾两虚) — nothing to raise it. Obstruction (不通): Liver Qi is constrained so the sinew cannot be released (肝郁气滞 — the classic psychogenic ED), or damp-heat pours down and slackens it (湿热下注). Fright can also injure the Kidney and scatter the Qi (惊恐伤肾).
