Match the mechanism — a Kidney-Yang tonic given to a Liver-Qi patient makes things worse.勃起为宗筋充而举——赖肾阳／命门火以温煦鼓动、气血以充盈、肝（主筋、主疏泄）以启之。故阳痿有二。不用（虚）：命门火衰（肾阳虚），或心脾不能化生并输气血于宗筋（心脾两虚）——无以举之。不通（阻）：肝气郁结则宗筋不得舒（肝郁气滞——典型心因性阳痿），或湿热下注而弛纵（湿热下注）。惊恐亦可伤肾散气（惊恐伤肾）。须对证——给肝郁者投补肾壮阳，反增其害。
Q1 · Onset & situation问一 · 起病与情境Sudden, situational, after stress/relationship strain, better when relaxed or on holiday → Liver-Qi (psychogenic). Sudden after a fright/shock → fright injuring Kidney. Gradual with aging/overindulgence → Kidney Yang.突发、情境性、压力／关系紧张后、放松或休假时好转→肝郁（心因性）。受惊吓后突发→惊恐伤肾。随年龄／房劳渐起→肾阳虚。
Q2 · Cold/warmth & vitality问二 · 寒温与精力Cold limbs, sore cold low back/knees, low libido, clear frequent urine, listlessness → Kidney Yang. Palpitation, fatigue, poor sleep, pallor, overthinking → Heart-Spleen. Genital damp/sweaty, heavy limbs, bitter mouth, scanty dark urine → damp-heat.畏寒肢冷、腰膝冷痛、性欲低、小便清长、精神萎靡→肾阳虚。心悸、乏力、眠差、面白、思虑多→心脾。阴部潮湿、肢重、口苦、尿黄→湿热。
Q3 · Emotional state问三 · 情志Anxiety, performance worry, timidity, being easily startled → Liver-Qi / fright patterns. Depression, rib distension, sighing → Liver constraint. Chronic worry, mental exhaustion → Heart-Spleen. The psychological dimension is central in most modern cases.焦虑、表现性担忧、胆怯、易惊→肝郁／惊恐。抑郁、胸胁胀、太息→肝郁。久虑、心神疲惫→心脾。现代多数病例心理维度为核心。
Q4 · Tongue & pulse问四 · 舌脉Pale swollen tongue, deep-weak/slow pulse → Kidney Yang. Pale tongue, thready-weak pulse → Heart-Spleen. Wiry pulse → Liver-Qi. Red tongue with yellow greasy coat, slippery-rapid pulse → damp-heat.舌淡胖、脉沉弱／迟→肾阳。舌淡、脉细弱→心脾。脉弦→肝郁。舌红苔黄腻、脉滑数→湿热。
Five patterns across two axes: deficiency that cannot raise the sinew (Kidney Yang, Heart-Spleen, fright) and obstruction that will not release it (Liver-Qi, damp-heat). The classic teaching over-weights Kidney Yang; in practice, Liver-Qi (psychogenic) is the most common modern pattern — do not reflexively tonify Yang. 五证两轴：虚而不能举（肾阳、心脾、惊恐）与阻而不得舒（肝郁、湿热）。经典偏重肾阳；临床肝郁（心因性）为现代最常见证——勿见阳痿即壮阳。
① Mingmen Fire Decline / Kidney Yang Deficiency① 命门火衰·肾阳虚
Insufficient Ascent at the root — Mingmen fire fails to warm and raise the ancestral sinew升不及于根本——命门火衰，不能温举宗筋
Key symptoms: impotence with weak or absent erection, low libido, cold limbs, sore cold low back and knees, clear frequent/nocturnal urination, listlessness, possibly dawn diarrhea; pale swollen tongue, deep-weak/slow pulse. Often with aging, chronic illness, or sexual overindulgence. Mechanism: Mingmen fire is the root warmth driving the sinew; when it declines, there is no Yang to raise it — the classic deficiency ED. Treatment: 温补肾阳，兴阳起痿 — warm and tonify Kidney Yang, rouse the Yang. Moxa is central. Links to the 肾阳虚 pattern card.主症：阳痿举而不坚或不举、性欲淡漠、畏寒肢冷、腰膝冷痛、小便清长／夜尿、精神萎靡、或五更泻；舌淡胖、脉沉弱／迟。多见年老、久病、房劳。病机：命门火为鼓动宗筋之根，火衰则无阳以举——典型虚性阳痿。治法：温补肾阳、兴阳起痿。灸为要。联动「肾阳虚」证型卡。
② Liver Qi Stagnation (Psychogenic)② 肝郁气滞（心因性）
Entry-Exit disorder — constrained Liver Qi cannot release the ancestral sinew出入失常——肝气郁结，宗筋不得舒启
Key symptoms: impotence closely tied to mood and stress, often with preserved morning erections, performance anxiety, rib and chest distension, irritability or low mood, sighing; wiry pulse. Improves when relaxed. The most common modern pattern. Mechanism: the Liver governs the sinews and the free coursing of Qi; emotional constraint knots the Qi so the sinew cannot be released — this is obstruction, not deficiency, and tonifying Yang here worsens the constraint. Treatment: 疏肝解郁，兴阳 — course the Liver, resolve constraint. Address the psychological dimension. Links to the 肝气郁结 pattern card.主症：阳痿与情绪压力密切相关、多晨勃保留、表现性焦虑、胸胁胀闷、烦躁或情绪低落、太息；脉弦。放松则好转。现代最常见证。病机：肝主筋、主疏泄；情志郁结则气不舒，宗筋不得启——属阻非虚，此时壮阳反增其郁。治法：疏肝解郁、兴阳。兼顾心理。联动「肝气郁结」证型卡。
③ Heart-Spleen Dual Deficiency③ 心脾两虚
Insufficient generation — Heart-Spleen fails to generate and lead Qi-Blood to the sinew化源不足——心脾不能生化、输布气血于宗筋
Key symptoms: impotence with palpitation, fatigue, poor sleep, poor appetite, pale sallow face, poor memory; from overthinking, overwork, or chronic worry; pale tongue, thready-weak pulse. Mechanism: overthinking injures the Spleen; the Spleen no longer generates Qi-Blood and the Heart-Blood empties, so the sinew is not filled and the Shen not settled — a deficiency of substance and of spirit together. Treatment: 补益心脾，益气养血 — tonify Heart-Spleen, boost Qi and Blood. Links to the 心脾两虚 pattern card.主症：阳痿伴心悸、乏力、眠差、纳差、面色萎黄、健忘；多因思虑、劳倦、久忧；舌淡、脉细弱。病机：思虑伤脾，脾不生血、心血亏，宗筋失充、心神不安——形神俱虚。治法：补益心脾、益气养血。联动「心脾两虚」证型卡。
④ Fright and Fear Injuring the Kidney④ 惊恐伤肾
Insufficient Descent/holding — fright scatters the Qi and fear descends it; Kidney fails to hold气机失固——惊则气乱、恐则气下，肾失固摄
Key symptoms: impotence arising after a frightening or traumatic sexual/life experience, timidity, being easily startled, palpitation, insomnia, apprehension, suspicious guardedness; pulse often wiry-thready. Mechanism: "fright scatters the Qi, fear makes the Qi descend"; a shock disrupts the Kidney's grasp and the Heart-Shen's steadiness, so the sinew cannot rise. Overlaps heavily with anxiety. Treatment: 益肾宁神，定志起痿 — tonify the Kidney, settle the Shen, restore confidence. Psychological reassurance is essential. (Treated within this page; shares mechanism with anxiety/fright patterns.)主症：阳痿起于惊吓或创伤性性／生活经历后、胆怯、易惊、心悸、失眠、疑虑戒备；脉多弦细。病机：「惊则气乱，恐则气下」；惊扰肾之固摄与心神之定，宗筋不举。与焦虑高度重叠。治法：益肾宁神、定志起痿。心理疏导为要。（本页论治；与焦虑／惊恐病机相通。）
⑤ Damp-Heat Pouring Downward⑤ 湿热下注
Descent excess / obstruction — damp-heat pours into the lower Jiao and slackens the sinew降太过／阻滞——湿热下注，宗筋弛纵
Key symptoms: impotence (a slack, non-firm sinew) with damp/sweaty itchy genitals, heavy limbs, bitter sticky mouth, scanty dark urine or urinary discomfort, possibly with prostatitis; red tongue with yellow greasy coat, slippery-rapid pulse. Often with alcohol, rich diet, or lower-Jiao infection. Mechanism: damp-heat is turbid and heavy; poured into the lower Jiao it obstructs and relaxes the ancestral sinew — an excess/obstruction ED, not a deficiency. Tonifying here is wrong; you must clear. Treatment: 清热利湿 — clear heat, drain damp. Links to the 湿热 pattern card.主症：阳痿（宗筋弛纵不坚）伴阴部潮湿瘙痒、肢体困重、口苦黏、小便黄少或不适、或兼前列腺炎；舌红苔黄腻、脉滑数。多因饮酒、肥甘、下焦感染。病机：湿热重浊，下注则阻遏弛纵宗筋——属实／阻，非虚。此时补则误，当清。治法：清热利湿。联动「湿热」证型卡。
CV4/CV3, BL23, and SP6 form the core (tonify Kidney, benefit the lower Origin, regulate the three Yin at the genitals); pattern points address fire/Qi/Shen/damp-heat. Needle direction and moxa follow the mechanism — warm and tonify for deficiency, course and clear for obstruction. 关元／中极、肾俞、三阴交为核心（补肾、益下元、调宗筋之三阴）；配穴治火／气／神／湿热。针向与灸随病机——虚则温补，阻则疏清。
Core points核心穴CV4 关元 + CV3 中极 (Ren, front-Mu region of the lower Origin — tonify Kidney and rouse Yang), BL23 肾俞 (back-shu of Kidney), SP6 三阴交 (crossing of three Yin at the genital sinew), BL32 次髎 (sacral, regulates the lower Jiao / genital function). Add 关元/命门 moxa for Yang deficiency.关元+中极（任脉下元募区——补肾兴阳）、肾俞（肾之背俞）、三阴交（宗筋三阴之会）、次髎（骶部，调下焦／性功能）。阳虚加灸关元／命门。
① Kidney Yang 命门火衰① 命门火衰·肾阳虚+ moxa GV4 命门, BL23 肾俞, CV4 关元, KI3 太溪 — warm and tonify Mingmen fire; reinforcing with generous moxa.+ 灸命门、肾俞、关元、太溪——温补命门火；补法重灸。
② Liver Qi 肝郁气滞② 肝郁气滞+ LV3 太冲, GB34 阳陵泉, PC6 内关, LV5 蠡沟 (Luo of Liver, reaches the genitals) — course the Liver and free the sinew; even method, minimal moxa. Pair with reassurance/counseling.+ 太冲、阳陵泉、内关、蠡沟（肝络，达前阴）——疏肝启宗筋；平补平泻、少灸。配合心理疏导。
③ Heart-Spleen 心脾两虚③ 心脾两虚+ HT7 神门, ST36 足三里, BL20 脾俞, BL15 心俞 (+moxa) — tonify Heart-Spleen and settle the Shen; reinforcing.+ 神门、足三里、脾俞、心俞（加灸）——补心脾、宁心神；补法。
④ Fright 惊恐伤肾④ 惊恐伤肾+ HT7 神门, PC6 内关, GB40 丘墟, KI3 太溪, GV20 百会 — settle the Shen, restore courage, tonify Kidney; even method.+ 神门、内关、丘墟、太溪、百会——宁神定志、益肾;平补平泻。
⑤ Damp-heat 湿热下注⑤ 湿热下注+ SP9 阴陵泉, SP6, LV2 行间, BL32 次髎, CV3 中极 — clear and drain lower-Jiao damp-heat; reducing, no moxa. (Do NOT tonify Yang here.)+ 阴陵泉、三阴交、行间、次髎、中极——清利下焦湿热；泻法不灸。（此证忌壮阳。）
Match the formula to the mechanism. The single biggest clinical error in ED is reflexively prescribing Yang tonics — correct for Kidney-Yang decline, harmful for Liver-Qi constraint and damp-heat. 按病机选方。阳痿最大临床误区是见痿即壮阳——肾阳虚者宜，肝郁与湿热者则害。
① Kidney Yang 命门火衰① 命门火衰·肾阳虚赞育丹 / 右归丸 — warm and tonify Kidney Yang, rouse the sinew (Lu Rong, Rou Cong Rong, Ba Ji Tian, Yin Yang Huo, Fu Zi, Rou Gui). The core Yang-deficiency prescription.赞育丹／右归丸——温补肾阳、兴阳起痿（鹿茸、肉苁蓉、巴戟天、淫羊藿、附子、肉桂）。阳虚之核心方。
② Liver Qi 肝郁气滞② 肝郁气滞逍遥散 / 柴胡疏肝散 加减 — course the Liver and resolve constraint; add a little Yang-moving (Yin Yang Huo, Shi Chang Pu) rather than heavy tonics. Treat the constraint, not the "deficiency."逍遥散／柴胡疏肝散加减——疏肝解郁；佐少量启阳（淫羊藿、石菖蒲），勿重补。治其郁，非治其"虚"。
③ Heart-Spleen 心脾两虚③ 心脾两虚归脾汤 — tonify Heart-Spleen, boost Qi and Blood, settle the Shen. Add Kidney-supporting herbs if libido is also low.归脾汤——补益心脾、益气养血、宁心神。性欲亦低者加助肾之品。
④ Fright 惊恐伤肾④ 惊恐伤肾大补元煎 + 安神定志丸 — tonify the Kidney/Origin and settle the fright-scattered Shen; restore confidence. Counseling is inseparable from the herbs here.大补元煎+安神定志丸——补肾益元、镇惊安神、复其信心。此证心理疏导与方药不可分。
⑤ Damp-heat 湿热下注⑤ 湿热下注龙胆泻肝汤 / 萆薢分清饮 — clear and drain lower-Jiao damp-heat. Once the damp-heat clears, the sinew recovers — no tonic needed. Tonifying before clearing traps the pathogen.龙胆泻肝汤／萆薢分清饮——清利下焦湿热。湿热去则宗筋自复——不必补。未清先补则闭门留寇。
Clinical pearl临证心得
The decisive question is deficiency or obstruction. A young, stressed patient with preserved morning erections and situational failure has Liver-Qi ED — course the Liver, address the anxiety, and often add nothing tonic; heavy Yang tonics make him more constrained and more anxious. Reserve the powerful Yang tonics (Lu Rong, Fu Zi) for the genuinely cold, low-libido, aging Kidney-Yang picture. And always remember ED can flag cardiovascular or metabolic disease — pattern treatment sits alongside, not instead of, appropriate medical evaluation. 决定性之问是虚还是阻。年轻、压力大、晨勃保留、情境性失败者为肝郁阳痿——疏肝、解其焦虑，常无须补；重投壮阳反使其更郁更焦。峻补之品（鹿茸、附子）留给真正畏寒、性欲低、年老之肾阳证。并须牢记阳痿可为心血管／代谢病之信号——辨证治疗与医学评估并行，非替代之。
🔍 ✕
Six ways in. Type a plain-language symptom, a disease, a pattern, a Qi dynamic, a formula, or a point. 六维入口。输入大白话症状、病名、证型、气机、方名或穴位。
